nama: Mer si náreinde Ngánjánene ambum Yesu Kerisoenemén.
bt: Good talk started God's the son Yesu about Keriso.

nama: Ndernáye Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayam yéfarotam yáne Bukan, "Yéndon so yéngwáfáretan fronde si résagh ár, emon so fene end némáfrende,
bt: How prophet Aisaya wrote in his Buk: " I will send first messanger, who will your way prepare"

nama: ke nutne fanfne yuta, 'End frengéghét Yuraye álighét, wafrogh mbarkánd end yáyot.'"
bt: "voice shout clear from place, 'Way to prepare Lord to walk, make straight way for him.' "

nama: Jon yénmormén walitoghmén si táitotau árét fanfne yuwon, "Kawengongi féfenjo yaufita a so ewalitotan ménát Ngánjánam so ewáwáine féfene yaufi." 5 Méinyotio Judiamén ár a Jerusalemén ár néwanoyénd yáfaf. Fá kafenawét yéfenjo yaufita, yémon tawalitotau fá Joden wanjen. 6 Jon tawongérwén kemol séf sáláme ménáyafé belesafé, a yémon tánetau ngumbwainy a fáméghár. 7 Joném mat táyátotau ár ndenáye: "Efe tane soramé yéném, endene waftayam so yáinde tane wafté, endene sandol ángégh ferghét yénd féyotarofnar wém. 8 Yéndon ewalitotan fém nue, wénde yémon so ewalitote fém Ngánján Mbérmbére." Yesuene walitoghmén a wufoghmén
bt: Jon came, to baptize clear in place and talk preach from sins to turn away and to forget. 5 All of Judia man and of Jerusalem man went to him. They to confess their from sins, he baptized them Joden in river. 6 Jon worn animal name kemèl hair cloth with leather belt, and he ate locust and wild honey. 7 Jon knowledge made to people like: "Who my after come very with power is, whose foot skin roaf to untie I cannot am. 8 I baptized you with water, but he will baptized you God Spirit." Yesu's bapatizing and tempation

nama: Yéné efghon Yesu yénmormén Najareta Galili yu kénjút a yálitotam Joném Joden wanjen. 10 Yesu njam kénwiwotau nuta, yémon yinjoi njafar sawérghare Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng Yesuefaf mamunit yáne fifiyan nafayoi. 11 Si yénmormén kétándmé njafarta, "Fém ném tane ambum, efe yéndon némuwetan; yénd mindefifi náuwetan fefaf."
bt: This in day Yesu came from Najaret Galili region into and baptized him Jon Joden in river. 10 Yesu when came up from water, he saw him heaven open God's Spirit descended Sick dove his on body come down. 11 Word came from from the heaven: "You are my child, who I love; me very much please with you."

nama: Táf fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram yéméindai Yesu álighét fanfne yuwot. 13 Fá yémorangérmén kétánotio 40 efogh Sáifram yufotam. Yesu kété témorwén ánde wérár tamorwén, wénde njafar si résagh árém yambayénd Yesu. Yesum ewaferyéng yánjo fronde waitogh ár
bt: When immediate God's Spirit lead Yesu to walk clear to place. 13 He stayed until 40 days Sáifér tested him. Yesu was where the wild animal lived, but men carrying heavenly message(angels) served Yesu. Yesu called his first following man

nama: Soramé Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf sifayan, Yesu néngwanoi Galili yuwot Ngánjánene mer si táitotau. 15 Yesu norayai, "Efogh ténawer, Ngánján limánégh siyém kaka yém. Féfenjo yaufita kawengongi a efalo tiyátongi mer siǃ"
bt: After Jon was put in darkness house, Yesu went to Galili region God's good talk to teach. 15 "Time/day has come," Yesu said, "God's kingdom is close is. Your from sins turn away and real listen good talk"

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu tiyotawéng Galili arakaf téndomé, yémon ewinjeyai Saimon a yánngén Endru net waméghan ndimbal sawan, ménamén fá tárwén wagif rényégh ár. 17 Yesum emndeyai, "Kénaflend yénd kwénmaitend a yéndon so táyáten ár rényégh ár." 18 Táf fété yémofem eureyayénd yéfenjo net a yáiteyayénd Yesu.
bt: Other in day Yesu walked Galili region sea beside, he saw Saimon and little brother Endru net cleaning big lake, because they.d were fish catching man. 17 Yesu said, "Come me follow me and I will make man catching man." 18 When immediate they followed their net and followed Yesu.

nama: Njam fá néngwanoyénd nayuofnar, yémon ewinjeyai Jems Jefediene ambum, yánngén Jon boutan tawaflarwén, táfrengwét yéfenjo net. 20 Tekofnar Yesum emotangeyai, yémofem yéfrangeyayénd yéferafé Jefedi bout kénjún ásáfogh árofé a yáiteyayénd Yesu. Yesum yitroi yaufi mbérmbér
bt: When He went back not far, he saw Jems Jebedy son, little brother Jon bout sat, prepared their net. 20 Not far Yesu called them.d, they left it(net) their father Jebedy bout in working to man and followed Yesu. Yesu cast out evil spirit

nama: Fá néngwanoyénd Káfenam tesenot, a Safatan Yesu nénglawai áumengégh méngot a watamegh ewafngoi. 22 Ár sélngwél emormén yáne watameghan, ménamén yáne si waitogh témorwén muyafé, yau ndené nák watamegh ár. 23 Áumengégh méngon kété témorwén ár tasarmbotau yaufi mbérmbéram. Fá nutnayeng minde tukén, 24 "Fém némat ménde ném téfefaf, Yesu Najaretmén? Fém kéném téfefaf wasérmboghét? Yénd mat wém fém efe ném, fém ném Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár."
bt: They went back to the town of Capernaum, and Sabbath Yesu went into teaching to house and teaching began. 22 Man surprised come his teaching, because his talk following man come with authority, not like law teaching men. 23 Teaching in house there come man was possessed evil spirit. They shouted very high, 24 "You what want are to us, Yesu from Najaret? You come us to destroy? Me knowledge am you who are-you are God's without.dust(holy) man."

nama: Yesum yarnam, "Métar kékmboǃ Kéntor yá tambénǃ" 26 Yaufi mbérmbéram yésámbnetai ár a féyo yéméindai yaufi keyot a yéfrangoi.
bt: Yesu said strongly, "Quiet stop! Come out him from" 26 Evil spirit shaked man and then lead evil with voice and left him.

nama: Méinyotio ár emormén sélngwél a kawawanjawét fáro, némé watamegh yéné yém muyafé? Yéné ár muyafé yém yaufi mbérmbér wafareghét a yémofem tiyárangi Yesuǃ" 28 Si yánemén marat namndai wékeyero Galili yuwon. Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár enjneta
bt: All man were surprised and said themselves, "What teaching this is with authority? This man has authority to give orders to the evil Spirit and they heard Yesu 28 Word about him became wide became quickly Galili region in place." Yesu made good many man

nama: Yémofem yéfrangoyénd áumengégh méngo, fá néngwanoyénd yémafé Jems a Jon, Saimon a Endru yéfene méngot. 30 Saimone yanat enjne témorwén, a yémofem Yesue yaufroyénd yánemén. 31 Féyo Yesu néngwanoi yáfaf, Yesum ngángé yawerai a yauténam yáyot. Táf fété enjneyam yéfrangoi a yémon ewáfrendam yéfe njamke.
bt: They left teaching house, they went back with them Jems and Jon Saimon and Endru their to house. 30 Saimon's mother in law sick was, and they to Yesu told about her. 31 Then Yesu went to him, Yesu hand took and made rise to her. When immediate sick left him and he served them food.

nama: Yéné féréghan tárfár enjne téfnár a yaufi mbérmbér wasérmbogh ár tánémnjawét Yesuefaf. 33 Méinyotio tesen ár náumendaménd méngo sésafnefaf, 34 a Yesum mer táyátotau méinyotio fénaté enjneta. A yémo tawifnau tárfár yaufi mbérmbér. Wénde yaufi mbérmbér mat tamorwén efe Yesu témorwén, a Yesum yau taumyotawéng yaufi mbérmbér siot. Yesuf Ngánjánafé koraiwét métar sifayan
bt: This in evening many sick men and evil Spirit to destroy man came to Yesu. 33 All town man gathered house to entrance, 34 and Yesu made good all different from sick. And he cast out many evil spirit. But evil Spirit knowledge was who Yesu come, and Yesu not permitted evil spirit talk. Yesu closed(eyes) quiet to place

nama: Fauréghan Yesu néngwanoi méngota métar sifayat, ánde fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét. 36 Saimonéf néngwanoyénd yá fútarfé Yesue ronjaghét, 37 a njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu, fá norayayénd, "Árém néronjat fémǃ"
bt: In evening Yesu went from house clear to place, where they closed(eyes). 36 Saimon went back him with friend to Yesu to look for, 37 and when they saw Yesu, they said: " People are looking for you"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yénd so kuwanongém kaka tesenot, ménát yéndon so ewaufrotan mer si yéné árét. Yénémamén yénd kwéném." 39 Féyo fá tiotau Galili yuwomé, kété yémon táitotau si áumengégh méngo kénjún a yaufi mbérmbér tawifnau. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár
bt: Yesu answered, " We will go to close to town, so that we will say good talk this to people. That is why I came." 39 Then Yesu walked their teaching through house all in Galili region in place, there he preach talk teaching house through and evil spirit drived out. Yesu good made evil with skin man

nama: Yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár yénmormén Yesuefaf a yáwefnoi budme, "Fém njam ménde ném, fémon so mer kwiyáto yénd."
bt: Evil skin with sickness man came Sick and bent knee, "You when want are, you will make me good."

nama: Yesu ghérghérsisayam yifoi ewatembai ngángé a yiyánjai ár. Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd ménde fété wém. So mer némǃ" 42 Táf fété yaufi ghéngan enjneyam yéfrangoi merafayo.
bt: Yesu mercy thing filled reached hand and touched man. "Me want immediate am." Yesu answered. "Will good are 42 When immediate evil skin sick left him good.

nama: Yesum yéngwáfáretai yéné ár yéné táikér siafé, 44 "Ende yau taufro, téu nguwano, kauyafo fémyo ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a ghéngén taram ndernáye Mosesene nákam némndete fene frengéghmén, ndenáye fété fém frengéghkaf ném." 45 Wénde fá néngwanoi si afrogh marataye néngufngoi. Féyo yéné téfnan Yesu yau nélawai tesenot wénde mé témorangérwén téndota métar sifayan. Wénde ár ménjtaye mé tanmorwén yáfaf méinyotio yuta.
bt: Yesu sent this man this hard with talk, 44 "Whom not tell, must go, show yourself sacrifice burning to men and sacrifice give how Moses' law said your about being well, like immediate you cleaning are." 45 But he went talk freely wide talked. Then this in reason Yesu not entered to town but still stayed outside quiet in place. But man still still came to him all from place.

nama: Nambio efogh soramé, njam Yesu kor nénglawai Káfenamét, ár náyárayénd ndené Yesu té kénangote méngot. 2 Féyo tárfár ár náumendaménd kété témorwén sifayafnar méngon, ndenéyameyo téndota, yémon si táitotau yéfeyot. 3 Fo árém ténérsawét Yesuefaf aknyégh ár yame sutafé. 4 Ménamén ár tárfármén yau yufaryénd Yesuefaf, yénémamén tarmbotawét méngo sémsot tukét, a kend enendayénd némbne fénemé tewonawét néndkfot Yesuene sáfrére.
bt: Three time/day after, when Yesu again went into to Capernaum, man heard that Yesu had come back to house. 2 Then many man gathered there come no space in house, same way from outside, he talk preached them. 3 Four people brought to Yesu paralytic man mat with mat. 4 Because man for many not got to Yesu, for this reason climbed up house roof upto, and roofing barks took away little through hole lowered middle of Yesu in front of.

nama: Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, fá norayai, "Fútar, fene yaufi té wawalinda."
bt: When Yesu saw their big mind(faith), they said, "Friend, your.s sins had was forgiven."

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár tamorangérwén kété, kemnawét yéfenjomén, 7 "Némamén yéné ár ndené si noraye? Yémon Ngánjánene sifayé résaghét yafngoǃ Ngánjánro yém efe so tawalindangé yaufiyam!"
bt: Other law teaching men was sitting there, thinking about theirs, 7 "Why this man like talk said? He cursing talk talk said! God is the only one who can forget/forgive sins!"

nama: Yesu mat té náyátoi fá némé kemnawét a emotai, "Fém némamén nemnati yéné féfene tikfan? 9 Taikér yau yém tayot sái témndan yéné ár, 'Fene yaufi sem té wawalinda' o témndan ndenáye, 'Yame tékaf méngot nguwano?' 10 Wénde ndené fém mat so em Ároene Ambum ndené muyafé yém yéné mbandan yaufiyam wawalingét." 11 Yesu norayai aknyégh ároefaf, "Yéndon némndetan fém, kokai, yame tékaf, nguwano méngot." 12 Fá nokayoi yánjo yame yékafai yéné sélngwélafé yamam eméindai ár. Yémofem tuwetawét Ngánján yéné siafé, "Yéndfem ndené wafroghyam yau téfandamǃ" Yesum yanmoi Lefi
bt: Yesu knowledge had knew they what thinking and asked, "You why were thinking this your in heart? 9 Hard not is to me will said this man, 'Your sins are had was forgiven' or said that 'Mat take house go?' 10 But like you knowledge will are about the Son of Man that with authority is this on the ground sins to forget." 11 Yesu said paralytic to man, "I tell you you, get up, mat take go to house." 12 They got up his mat walked this with amaze thing showed them man. They praised God with this talk, "We haven't seen anything like this." Yesu called Lefi

nama: Yesu néngafértai ámbirotaro néngwanoi ndimbal arakaf téndomé. Ár mérén enmormén yáfaf, a yémon watamegh ewafngoi fá. 14 Fá njam tiyoyawéng, Yesum yinjoi Lefi Alfasene ambum témorangérwén mani kafégh méngon. Yesum témndangé, "Yénd kwénmaitoǃ" a Lefi nokayoi yéngwaitoi Yesu.
bt: Yesu went once again went big swamp beside. Man crowd came to him, and he teaching began them. 14 They when walked, Yesu saw him Lefi of Alphaeus son stayed money collecting in house. "Follow me" Yesu tell, and Lefi got up followed him Yesu.

nama: Yéné sémbáran Lefim yumyoi njamkeyot Yesu yánjo méngot, kété tamorwén mani kafégh ár a yaufi ár njamke tánetawét Yesuene waitogh árfé. 16 Njam nák watamegh ár efe tamorwén Farasi ár yinjoyénd Yesu néneyan yaufi ár a mani kafégh árfé, yémofem emotayénd yáne waitogh ár, "Némamén yémon njamke enete mani kafégh árfé a yaufi árfé?"
bt: This on the night Lefi allowed for food Yesu his to house, there were tax collector and sinful man food ate of Yesu following man with man. 16 When theacher of the law who were Farasi man saw Yesu in eating sinful man and money collecting with man, they asked his following man "Why he eat tax collector and evil with man?"

nama: Yesum eyárai a ewawangoi, Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yau mer árém njokté yarawetat wénde enjne téfnáramro. Yénd yau mbarkánd ár moghét wénmormén, wénde yaufi ár wanjarghét." Yesu yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén
bt: Yesu heard them and answered, "Not good people need a doctor but sick only men. I not straight man come , but evil man save." They asked Yesu about fasting

nama: Jonene waitogh ár a Farasi ár kawafarmetawét. Ámb ár enmormén Yesu yémotayénd, "Jonene waitogh ár a Farasi ár nawafarmetat, wénde némamén fene waitogh ár yauǃ"
bt: Jon following man and Farasi man . Other man came Yesu is, "How this is Jon following man and Farasi your , but your not

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Totér awerégh téfnárane ár yau so nawafarmetat njamandio fá em yémafé? 20 Wénde efogh yéna yéném njam awerégh ár so nguwanongé yéfe tambén, yéné efghon fá so nawafarmetat."
bt: Yesu answered, "How will guest men new men bridegroom while they are with them? They not will bridegroom. 20 But time/day this when take man will go them from, this in day they will bridegroom."

nama: Emo yau so tétirarngé totér sálámeta mbékwmbékwot a tékayongé namghét tándáwár sálámeyan. Njam té yafrota yéné, totér sálámeam so nokawete tándáwár sáláme a yáne féne so yém ndimbal. 22 A emon yau so totér wéri nu yararote tándáwár wéri nu ndimbayan. Njam yafrota, wéri nu ndimbé so katiyarngé, wéri nu a ndimbé so nawaghanét. Yau, totér wéri nu so yararote totér wéri nu ndimbat. Safatoe Yuré
bt: Who not will new clothes and new new old clothes. When he had did it, the new cloth will pull the old cloth and its hole would become big. 22 And who not will pour new alcohol water old alcohol water in container. When he did, new alcohol water will burst and waste alcohol water container, alcohol water will pour and alcohol water container will waste. No, new alcohol water will pour new alcohol water into container. Sabbath Lord

nama: Ámb Safatan Yesu tiotau kun ndawan yánjo waitogh árfé, yánjo waitogh árém ewafngoyénd kun mbwe férarégh. 24 Farasi ár norayayénd Yesuefaf, "Némamén yémofem ásáfogh yafrotat Safatan táf téfene nák yém?"
bt: Other Sabbath Yesu walked corn in garden and his following man with man, they picked corn seed began. 24 Farasi men said to Yesu, "Why they working do in Sabbath must our law is?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem yau yaftaménd némé Deifidém yafrotam njam fá yánjo mérnafé siogh tamorwén nénet? 26 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár Abiatarene efghon, fá nélawai Ngánjánene méngot, frengéghkaf féskaf flawé nénet, árké témorwén nák ghéngén wárogh árfetro nénet. A yémon wéi ewaramai ámb yánjo mérnat."
bt: Yesu answered, "You not read what Deifid did when He his with crowd hunger were to eat? 26 The leading burning sacrifice man of Abiatal in day, they entered God's to house, preparing to eat, which is law only burning sacrifice men to eat. And he again gave other his to crowd."

nama: Féyo Yesu wifogh si norayai yéfefaf, "Ngánjánam Safat yafrotam ároe, wénde yau ár yafrotam Safatoe. 28 Féyo Ároene Ambum siyém Safatoe Yuré."
bt: Then Yesu strict talk said to them, "Sabbath be made for man, not man for Sabbath. 28 Then Of man child is Sabbath Lord."

nama: Yesum emotai fá, "Árkéméné nák yém Safatan, mer wafroghét o yaufi wafroghét, ghérsé wanjarghét o ár ngiot?" Wénde fá métar náyátoyénd yáne sian.
bt: Yesu asked them, "Which is lawful to do, to save life or kill the people?" But they remained silently in this talk.

nama: Yémon ghékfe fá tawámnjotau nékwafé, fá mwighé kérté nawerai yéfenemén ménamén tikéf táikér tamorwén. Féyo Yesum yémndai, "Ngángé táfer." Yémon ngángé yéferyéng táf yáne ngángé mer náyátoyéng. 6 Farasi ár néngwanoyénd a mwighé táfrendawét Erodene árfé Yesue ngiot. Ndimbal mérén eném Yesuefaf
bt: He looked with eyes(looked around) them, he felt sad about them because their heart were hard(stubborn). So Yesu said, "Stretch out [your] hand." He stretched [his] hand, his hand healed 6 Farasi men went out and began to plot with Erod's people [how]to kill Yesu. Crowds follow Yesu

nama: Yesuf néngitérmboyénd yánjo waitogh árfé arakaf téndot, a ndimbal mérnam yaitoyénd Yesu Galili yuta. 8 Njam fá náyárayénd méinyotio yémon némé mer tawafrotau, tárfár ár enmormén kétándmé Judia, Jerusalem, Idumiya, a Joden wanje witmé karéf a Taire a Sidon kaka yu ár. 9 Ménamén ár tárfármén yémon emndai yánjo waitogh ár némbne bout frengéghét yáyot ménát árém yau so kilkil tafrotawét fá. 10 Féyo Yesum tárfár ár mer táyátotau, yénémamén efe enjnefé tamorwén frondeyot káyátotawét Yesue yanjaghét. 11 Njamandio yaufi mbérmbéram yinjoi Yesu, fá nuyai yuwot Yesue sáfrére nutnai, "Fém ném Ngánjánene Ambum." 12 Wénde yémon ekmboi fá ende yau taufrongi efe fá yém. Yesum ewaferyéng 12 yánjo muyafé ár
bt: Yesu withdrew with his following men to the lake, and crowd from Galili region followed. 8 When they heard all what he did good, many people came from Judia, Jerusalem, Idumia, and across Joden river and close area (around)Taire and Sidon. 9 Because of many people he told his following men to prepare a small bout for him in order that people can't do crush him. 10 Yesu healed many, this reason those who had diseases were pushing forward to touch Yesu. 11 Whenever evil spirits saw Yesu, they fell down to the land before Yesu and shouted, "You are the Son of God." 12 But he commanded strictly them not to reveal who he was. Yesu chose 12 men with Yesu's authority(apostles)

nama: Yesu ngarmbotau mband tunakéf téndot a emotayéng fá efe yáne méndefé tamorwén, a nénaflayénd yáfaf. 14 Yémon ewaferyéng 12ro yétkwén ewaramai yánjo muyafé ár, ménát fá yémafé so em a yémon so ewáfárete fá si waitoghét 15 a ménát muyafé so em yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét. 16 Yéné 12 em, Saimon(ende yétkwén yaramai Fité), 17 Jems Jebediene ambum a yánngén Jon(endefet Yesum yétkwén ewarameyai Boanéges, yáne fifi siyém ndenanit toyé), 18 Endru, Filif, Batolome, Metyu, Tomas, Jems Alfesene ambum, Tadeyes, Saimon efe ménde témorwén ndené Ju ár so kawanjetawét fáyo yau Rom waftayan, 19 a Judas Iskariot, emo Yesu sén yéramai. Yesu a Beljebab
bt: Yesu went up on a mountain and called to him those who he wanted, and they came to him. 14 He chose only 12-gave name men with Yesu's authority(apostles) in order that they will be with him and he will send them to preach talk 15 and to have authority that they will cast out evil spirit. 16 These are 12: Saimon (to whom he gave the name Fitè), 17 Jems son of Jebdedi and his little brother Jon (to them Yesu gave the name Boanèges, Sons of Thunder) 18 Endru, Filif, Batoleme, Metyu, Tomas, Jems son of Alfes, Tadeyes, Saimon who wants that Ju people will save by themselves without Rom power. 19 and Judas Iskariot, who gave teeth Yesu. Yesu a Beljebab

nama: Yesu nélawai méngot, wéikor ár mérén náumendam, yénémamén Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár njamke yau enetaménd. 21 Njam yáne mérén náyárayénd némé kufrotau, fá engmormén kétán Yesue wangoghét ménamén yémofem témndetawét ndené, "Fá siyém onon yém."
bt: Yesu entered a house, [and] again crowd gathered, Yesu and his following men were not able to eat food. 21 When his family heard what was happening, they went to take him away because they thought that, "He is out of mind."

nama: Nák watamegh téfnár efe enmormén kétándmé Jerusalemta norayayénd, "Fá siyém Beljebabém yarsoteǃ Yaufi mbérmbérafene sénko ároene muyaye, yémon yaufi mbérmbér ewifne."
bt: The teaching men of the law who came from Jerusalem said, "He is possessed by Beljebabǃ With the Power of head men of the evil spirits, he cast out evil spirits."

nama: Féyo Yesum eumendai a korayau rengerenge sie yéfefaf, "Ndernáye Sáifér so kawitrongé fáyo? 24 Njam méngotu kafalongé fáyo, méngotu yau so nakete. 25 Njam méngo mérén kafalongi fáyo, yéné méngo yau so nakete. 26 Njam Sáifér mérén nakarotat fáyo kafalongi, fá yau so taikrataye naketat, yáne yam yéna sof eyáto. 27 Efe yau so kényawangé ndimbal muyafé ároene méngo kénjút rokar résaghét táfandro yémon njam fronde yumbeta ángéghe ndimbal muyafé ár. Féyo yémon táf so tanangé yáne méngo. 28 Yéndon ewaufrotan efaloe, méinyotio yaufiyam a yaufi si árfene Ngánján so tawalindangé yéfene yaufi. 29 Wénde emo sotafé yaufi si njam noraya Ngánján Mbérmbéroenemén, Ngánján yau so tawalindangé yáne yaufi si, yéné siyém tuot yaufiyam.
bt: So Yesu called them and spoke to them in parables: How can Sáifèr cast out Sáifèr? 24 If a kingdom fought against itself, this kingdom cannot stand strongly. 25 If a house fought against itself, this house can not stand strongly. 26 If Sáifèr is divided and fight against himself, he can not stand strongly; his end is here(close). 27 No one can enter in strong men's house and carry off his things unless he first ties up strong men with rope. Then he can steal his house. 28 I tell you the truth, all the sins and blaspemies of men will be washed. 29 But whoever very bad saying when say to God Spirit can not washed; this is eternal sin."

nama: Yesum korayau yéné si ménamén fá korayawét, "Fá kar yaufi mbérmbérafé témorwén." Yesue yátmé a yánngnéf
bt: Yesu said this talk because they were saying, "He has an evil spirit." Yesu's mother and his young brothers

nama: Yesue yátmé a yánngnéf nénufaryénd. Tawakayongérwén méngo téndota, yémofem yáfáretayénd ámb ár Yesuefaf. 32 Ár mérén kénjún témorangérwén Yesu, a yémofem yaufroyénd yá, "Fene amé a fenngnéf téndota ewakai fém néronjat."
bt: Yesu's mother and his younger brothers arrived. They stood outside house, they sent someone to call Yesu. 32 A crowd was sitting around Yesu, and they said to him, "Your mother and your younger brother are standing outside and are looking for you.

nama: Yémo emotai, "Efe em tane amé a tane nénngnéf?"
bt: "Who are my mother and my little brother?" he asked. 34 Then he looked at those who seated around him and said, "Here are My mother and my little brothers! 35 Whoever does God's will he is my younger bother and my sister and mother."

nama: Kor Yesum yérnyai watamegh arakaf téndon. Ndimbal mérén náumendam fá yarendayénd, Yesu yéné téfnan boutan nuflai a námnjoi téfernetau sawan, njamandio méinyotio ár tamorwén nu téndomé. 2 Yémon tawatametau tárfár yammén rengerenge si, a yáne watamegh kénjún fá norayai, 3 "Káyárangiǃ Ndau téfnár nuwanoi wén mbwe taranéghét. 4 Njamandio tatarnau wén mbwe, ámb kuitawét end téndomé, a wéi men tanmorwén a tánetawét. 5 Ámb kuitawét wím sifayan ánde yau kor mer kanotawét. Fété kanotawét mulmulafé, wénde mband kor mer yau témorwén sérémb eighét. 6 Féyo njam efgham ewinjoi, wén éruyagh nufngoyénd, a kér emormén ménamén yéfene sérémb yau niyayénd kénjút. 7 Ámb kuitawét yus wétfaf, yus kanotawét a tatumndawét, yénémamén mbwe yau kafotawét. 8 Ámb wén mbwe kuitawét mer mbandan. Nanotaménd nafoyénd kwéki, ámb 30, ámb 60, a ámb minde fifi 100."
bt: Again Yesu began to teach beside of the lake. The crowd gathered around Yesu, [so] he got into a bout and sat in the bout out into the lake while all the people remained on outside of water. 2 He taught them many things by parables, and in his teaching said: 3 "Listen! A farmer went out to plant the seed. 4 As he was scattering the seed, some fell along the road, and the birds came and ate it. 5 Some fell on the rocky ground where did not have a good soil. So it sprang up quickly, because the good soil was not in. 6 But when the sun came up, the tree scorched, and they died because they have no root. 7 Others fell on thorn's place, which tree grew up and choked the trees, so that they did not bear seed. 8 Other seed fell on good ground. It came up and produced a crop, 30, 60, and even 100 times.

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai, "Fá efe ténganafé yém áyárghét, fá so káyárangé."
bt: Then Yesu said, "He who has ears to hear, let him hear"

nama: Njam fá yambia témorwén, 12 waitogh ár a ámb árém yémotayénd fá ménamén rengerenge simén. 11 Yémon ewaufroi, "Kwankwane mat Ngánján limánéghmén féfe té ewaramayén, wénde ámb árét siyém rengerenge sie 12 ménát, 'Yéné ár so náronjat, wénde yau so tinjongi. Yéné ár so káyárangi, wénde yau so yáne fifi tayamngongi. Njam fá náyáretat, fá so kawengongi Ngánjánefaf a fá so tawalindangé yéfene yaufi.'"
bt: When he was alone, 12 and other people asked him about parables. 11 He answered them, "The secret knowledge about the ruling of God was given to you. But to other people everything is said [in] parables 12 so that, 'These men may be seeing , but they will not see. These men may be hearing, but they will not understand. If they hear it, they turn to God and he(God) will wash their sins.

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Fémofem té yáyamngotati yéné rengerenge si? Nderé ménáyan fém so mat káyátongi ámb rengerenge si? 14 Ndau téfnáram tétarnau si. 15 Ámb ár ndené em end téndon ánde si kuyangé. Njamandio fá káyárangi, Sáifér yéném si oroe engérse árkéméné tatarnau yéfefaf. 16 Ámb ndené em wím sifayan ánde si kuyangé, káyáretawét si a wékeye tanangayénd áuwéghafé. 17 Wénde fá tamorwén sérémbofnar, yéfene efalo yiyátogh siyém tekofnar. Njam kérté o ufogh yéném ménamén simén, fá wékeye kuyangi. 18 Ámb ár ndené em mbandot mbwe árké kuyangi yus wétfaf, náyáretat si; 19 wénde fá mband mwighayam wafogh ewafngoi. Mani mwighayam tawaweindau ámb rokarot. Árkéménáyam si njangénnjangén tiyátotau mbweofnayot. 20 Ámb ár ndené em mer mbandan ánde mbwe kuyangi, si náyárayénd yumyoyénd a nafoi kwéki ámb 30, ámb 60 a ámb 100." Kwayaghé
bt: Yesu said to them, "Don't you understand this parable? How do you understand other parables? 14 The farmer plants the talk. 15 Some people are like [that] men plant seed along the path, which talk is sown. As soon as they hear it, Sáifèr comes and take away that was sown in them. 16 Others like seed sown on rocky places, hear the talk and quickly receive with joy. 17 But they have no root, their big mind(faith) are not long. When trouble or persecution comes because of the talk, they quickly fall away. 18 Other, like seed sown into thorn place, hear the talk; 19 but he began to think of the world. Thinking of money and the desires for other things was growing. Therefore talk became to be without fruit. 20 Others, like seed sown on good soil, hear the talk, accept it, and produce a crop-30, 60 and 100 times sown. Light

nama: Yesum ndenéyameyo noyarai, "Ár yau ndené nufarotat lambefé sinan sái etnotat a yame mbanmbanan. Wénde árém tafayongi lambefé kitarékitarayan. 22 Kété siyém némé yau warambnoghmén yém, árkéméné so kakmangé marataye. Némé ténoghe yém safén so kakmangé. 23 Njam ténganafé ném, káyárǃ
bt: Yesu said like that, "You don't bring in a lamp to put in a pot under a mat. But you put it on the table. 22 Whatever cannot be hidden, therefore it will be brought into the open. What was in secret will be brought light. 23 If you.s has ears, hearǃ

nama: "Káyár merkéráye némé fém náyáreteǃ Ndernáye ende fémon efrende ámb ár ndené endeyo fém so néfrendat, a minde tukén mer so yém. 25 Fá efe tane si náyáretat yéfe minde matyam so tawaramangé, wénde yéfeyot efe yau náyáretat némé némbnar yéfene matyam yém so tawakawangé." Rengerenge si wén mbwe anoghmén
bt: "Consider carefully what you hearǃ" How do you treat to other people, like this will be treated to you-and even more. 25 Whoever listen to my talk, more understaning will be given, but to whom doesn't hear, even what has little will be taken away from him The parable of the growing seed

nama: Yesu kor norayai, "Ngánján limánégh siyém ndenanit yém. Ár néwanoi mbwe taranéghét mbandot. 27 Sémbáran a efghon, fá kémégh yékém o kanongé, mbwe káfyarngé anoghafayo, fá mafina yém ndernáye nanote. 28 Méinyotio fáyo mbandam yéfune mbwe, fronde siyém mbém, soramé siyém téfén kétán afoghfaf. 29 Njamandio árnogh wérwér kawerangé a mbwe wau kayongi, féyo ndau téfnáram néfégh naifaye tawafngongé." Rengerenge si némbne mbwemén
bt: Yesu also said, "The ruling of God is like. A man scatters seed to the ground. 27 In night and day, [whether] he sleeps or gets up, the seed sprouts and grows, he does not know how to grow. 28 All by himself the soil produce the grain-first the stalk, [then]the head, after the grain ripens. 29 As the grain is ripe, then farmer harvest it to cut with bush knife. The parable of little seed

nama: Wéikor Yesu norayai, "Yéndon so ewaufrotan Ngánjánene limánéghmén rengerenge si. 31 Ndenanit yém némbne wén mbwe nau tiyangé mbandan. Yéné némbne mbwe siyém némbne fifi yém, ndené yau ámb wén mbwe kés em mband maratan. 32 Wénde njam tiyangi, so nanote minde ndimbal ndaumén njamke téfén káyátongé a wén náyátoi. Kafe yatene féyotaro menam ánde njén so erametat yáne njaran."
bt: Again he said, "How is the ruling of God? What parable shall we describe it? 31 It's like little seed is scattered on the ground. This is a very little on the wide ground. 32 But it is planted, [and it] will grow and become widely even be the largest of food plants. Its branches is possible that birds can make nest in its shade.

nama: Yesum tárfár rengerenge si tawaufrotau árét, yémon tawatametau ár yéfene áyárégh féyotaroyan ménát sioene fifi so tanangayénd. 34 Yémon si tawawaitotau yéfe rengerenge siero. Wénde njam fá yéfembia tamorwén yánjo waitogh árfé, yémon rengerenge sioene fifi tawawafenau yéfeyot. Yesum yékmboi ndimbal mbormbor
bt: Yesu said many parables to people, he taught to them to which they could understand. 34 He did not teach them without parable. But when he was alone with his following men, he explained the meaning of it to them. Yesu calms the storm

nama: Yéné férghan, Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Kétándmé karéf arakaf kurtongém." 36 Féyo yémofem efrangoyénd ár mérén, a yáne waitogh árfé nuwanoyénd 37 Ndimbal mbormboram eutfoi sawan. Sóf armbogh nufngoyénd bout olitoghétro témorwén.
bt: That evening, Yesu said to his following men, "Let us go over to the other side." 36 So they left the crowds [behind], and his following men started. 37 The storm came up in the lake. The waves broke over the bout, [so that] it was nearly swamped.

nama: Yesu kémégh tékmangérwén sénko tafal téfayongérwén bout kwémbta. Fá témorwén kémégh kér. Yáne waitogh árém tanongi a témndangi, "Watamegh ár, yénd olitoghétro yéném, yénd fémon té yénmarawene?"
bt: Yesu was in bottom of the bout., sleeping. He slept like died(deeply). His following men woke him up and shouting, "Teacher, we are going to drown, don't you care us?

nama: Yesu kéméghta nanoi mbormbor a sóf emndeyai, "Métar kamnden." Métar namndeyayénd táf fété.
bt: He got up, said to the wind and waves, "Be quiet." It was completely calm.

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Némamén fém férfér em? Féfene ndimbal mwighé té yém?"
bt: Yesu said to his following men, "Why are you afraid? Where is your big mind(faith)?

nama: Fá minde férfér tamorwén a korayangi yéfe kénjúnro, "Efe yéné yém? Mbormbor a sófam fá yiyárend!"
bt: They were very afraid and said to each other, "Who is this? [Even] the wind and the waves obey himǃ"

nama: Fá néngwanoyénd witmé karéf arakaf Gerasenes mbandot. 2 Njam Yesu nurtoyéng boutta, yaufi mbérmbérafé ár néntoryéng kétándmé mbéwé méngota Yesu yéngwanfetai. 3 Yéné ár tékmangérwén mbéwé méngomé, emo ámb yau yumbai a yénandmé yéfertai ámb seine. 4 Fronde yémofem yéta tumbetawét seine ghambran a ngángayan. Wénde mé tanfetau a emo ámb yau ngárámngárám térametau. 5 Sémbár efogh fá témorwén mbéwé méngon a mband tunakéf sifayan, kutnau a kanfentau fáyo wímamé.
bt: They went across the lake(swamp) to the land of Garasanes . 2 When Yesu got out of the bout, a man with evil spirit came from grave, he met him(Yesu). 3 This man was sleeping in the grave, and no one [could] tie him and [no one] did it again with the other strong rope. 4 They tried to tie him with a strong rope on the leg and the hand. But he was still cutting them and no helped him. 5 Night and day he was on the grave and the mountain, he was shouting and cutting his leg with stones.

nama: Njam yéné árom yinjoi Yesu nayuta, fá nénenngoi Yesuefaf a budme niyai. 7 Fá nutnayéng yánjo ke féyotaroyan, "Yesu, Minde tukén Ngánjánene ambum, némat fém ménde ném tafaf? Ngánjánene yétkwénan, fémon yau tékrátan kwékémǃ" 8 Ménamén Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Fém yaufi mbérmbér, kéntor yéné ároe tambénǃ"
bt: When that man saw Yesu far away, he came back to Yesu and knelt before him. 7 He shouted with his voice limitted, "Yesu, the son of the Most high God, what do you want from me? In the name of God, you don't cast me!" 8 Yesu said to him, "Come out of this man, you evil spirit!"

nama: Féyo Yesum yémotai fá, "Fene yétkwén efe yém?"
bt: Then Yesu answered him, "Who(what) is your name?" "My name is the plenty," he answered, "because we are plenty."

nama: Yémon wawérmanéghe taurémnau Yesu ménát yau yéfe witroghét yéné sifayata.
bt: He really wanted Yesu not to take them out of this place.

nama: Tárfár mérén kimb tamanjnawét mband tunakéf kaka. 12 Yaufi mbérmbéram yamnendayénd Yesu, "Ténmáfáreta kétán kimbafefaf, ténmumyo yénd kétán élaughét yéfefaf." 13 Yesum engéumyoi yaufi mbérmbér néngtoryénd a nénglawayénd kimbafefaf. Yéné kimb mérén 2,000 nuférmoi rékrék ngewonawét sawot méinyotio kolitotawét.
bt: They were feeding many pigs nearby mountain. 12 The evil spirits asked Yesu, "Send us to the pigs, allow us to go into them." 13 Yesu allowed evil spirit to come out and go into the pigs. Those herd of 2,000 pigs came out to the lake and all of them were drowned.

nama: Kimb wanjengégh téfnár nétonam a kafrotau yénémamén tesenan a yu tunan, ár néwanoyénd fandaghét némé yam kufrotau. 15 Njam fá enmormén Yesuefaf, yémofem yinjoyénd ár efe témorwén yaufi mbérmbér afoghare, fá témorangérwén sáláme umaneghafé a mer mwighafé, a fá férfér tamorwén. 16 Ár emofem yinjoyénd ewafroyénd árét némé kufrotau yaufi mbérmbér wasérmbogh ároenemén a wéi ewaufroyénd kimbafenemén. 17 Árém yamnendayénd Yesu yéfene yu frangoghét.
bt: Who look after the pigs ran and told this [in]the otherside of the town, people came to see what was happening. 15 When they came to Yesu, they saw the man who was full of evil spirit, he was sitting down dressed the cloth and with good mind; and they were scared. 16 Those who saw him told the people what was happening to the man controlled by evil spirit and told them about the pigs as well. 17 The people asked Yesu to leave their place.

nama: Njamandio Yesu uflighétro témorwén boutan, yéné ár efe yaufi mbérmbéram tasérmbotau yénmormén Yesuefaf yémafé álighét. 19 Yesum yau yumyoi, wénde yémon yémndai, "Ngango méngot fenjo mérnafefaf a tawaufro yéfeyot nderé merfifi Yuram tafrote feyot, a nderé mer fá yém feyot." 20 Ár néngwanoi si afrogh yéngérnyai Dekafolis kénjún nderé mer Yesum yafrotam yáyot. Yénémamén méinyotio ár sélngwél emormén. Kér mérés a enjnefé amaf
bt: When Yesu was about to get on the bout, this man who was controlled by evil spirit came to Yesu to go with him. 19 Yesu did not allow him, but he said to him, "Go back to your house and yor family and let them know how good the Lord did to you, how good he was to you." 20 The man went and preached in the Dekafolis how good Yesu did for him. Therefore all the people was shocked. A dead girl and a sick woman

nama: Njam Yesu kor néngférmai boute witmé karfot, ndimbal ár mérnam yarendayénd fá njamandio Yesu témorwén arakaf téndon. 22 Ámb áumengégh méngo sénko ár, yétkwén Jairus yénmormén kétán Yesue fandaghét, fá nuyai yáne kafkafot 23 a yémon yamnendai Yesu wáutárghét. Fá norayai, "Tane mérés siyém ndimbal enjne yémǃ Kénaf ngángé tafai, fá mer so káyátongé." 24 Yesuf néngwaneyayénd Jairusfé, tárfár árém soramé yaitoyénd a mé áumengéghanro ár tanmorwén. 25 Ár mérén kénjún amaf kété tafnyangérwén efe férék kertau 12 yunjéf. 26 Fá yéta túmén tiotau tárfár njoktafefaf a yémofem mer yau kor yiyátoyénd, wénde ndémkero tarametawét. 27 Njam amaf náyárai Yesuenemén, amafom yénmaitoi sémta Yesu ár mérén kénjún a yiyánjai yáne sáláme, 28 amaf nemnai, "Yéndon njam yáne sáláme tianjangén, yénd mer so kamndan." 29 Njam yiyánjai yáne sáláme, yáne férék erégh nékmboi a fá táf nawayamngoi nde mer té náyáton.
bt: When Yesu went across the swamp with bout, a large group of people surrounded him while Yesu was side of the swamp. 22 One of Yesu's family(church) head man, name Jairus came there to see Yesu, he knelt down to his foot 23 and he asked Yesu to help him. He said, "My daughter is very sick! Come and lay hands on her, she will be healed. 24 Yesu went with Jairus, Many people followed him and people were still gethering. 25 In the crowd woman was there who was bleeding for 12 years. 26 She always went to the doctors, and they didn't heal her, yet they were giving more pain. 27 When woman heard about Yesu, she came in beind Yesu in the crowd and toched his cloth, 28 woman thought, " When I tough his clothes, I will be healed." 29 When she touched him his cloth, her bleeding stopped and she felt in herself that I am healed.

nama: Táf fété Yesuene wafté néférmai. Fá nawengoi ár mérnafefaf a kamotangé, "Emo tane sáláme yiyánja?"
bt: At once the Power of Yesu left [from him]. He turned around to the people and asked, "Who touched my clothes?"

nama: Yáne waitogh ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Kéreta yéné árfefaf emofem fém némarendangiǃ Némamén fém namote emo fém nianja?"
bt: His following men said to him, "Look those people who surrounded you! How did you ask, who touched you?"

nama: Wénde Yesu nawengoi fandaghét emo yiyánjai fá. 33 Amaf mat náyátoi némé yáfaf nufrotam, a yéngmormén férférafé Yesue yáwefnoi. Yémon yaufrotam yáyot méinyotio efalo si. 34 Yesu norayai amafoefaf, "Mérés, fém sénonjo mer ném ménamén fenjo ndimbal mwighamén. Nguwano métare mer té náyáto fenjo kértata."
bt: But Yesu turned to look who touched him. 33 The woman knew what had happened to her, and went frightenly to Yesu and knelt. She told him the whole the truth. 34 Yesu said to woman, "You are healed because of your big mind(faith). Go happily and you are helaed from your proplem."

nama: Njamandio Yesu mé korayau, ámb ár enmormén Jairusene méngota efe témorwén áumengégh méngo sénko ár. Yémofem norayayénd, "Fene mérés kér té tém, Némamén watamegh ár ndenayu yawérsotati."
bt: While Yesu was still speaking, some men came from the house of Jairus, head man of Yesu's family(church). "Your daughter has died," they said, "Why bother the teaching man any more?"

nama: Yesum ekenai yéfene si a fá norayai Jairusefaf, "Yau férfér ném, efalo kwiyátoǃ"
bt: Yesu ignored their saying, Yesu told Jairus, "don't be afraid; trust me."

nama: Yesum ámb ár yau yumyoi álighét yémafé fáro Fité, Jems a Jon Jemse yánngén. 38 Njam fá néngaflayénd Jairusene méngot a ár ewinjoyénd uwérsoghan yeyan sarake tafrotawét. 39 Féyo Yesu nénglawai méngot a norayai yéfefaf, "Némamén fém ye nendati? Ambum kér yau tém wénde kémégh yékém." 40 Wénde yémofem turtawét Yesu yéné simén.
bt: Yesu did not allow anyone to go with him only Fitè, Jems a Jon small brother Jon. 38 When they came to the house of Jairus, Yesu saw people worried and cried and made a noise 39 So Yesu went in the house and said to them, "Why do you cry? the child is not dead but sleep." 40 But they laughed at him what he said.

nama: Yémon yerai ambum ngángayan a norayai yáfaf, "Talita kum," yáne fifi, "Mérés tosé, yéndon némndetan, kano." 42 Tekofnaye mérés nokayoi álighafayo. Mérés témorwén 12 yunjéf. Táf emorméng sélngwél. 43 Wénde Yesum ewaramai táikér si ende yau taufrongi yéné yammén némé nufrote. Féyo Yesum emndai, "Njamke taramangi."
bt: He hold the child on his hand and said to her, "Talita kum!"(its meaning, "Little girl, I say to you, wake up!") 42 Not long the girl stood up and walked (Girl was 12 years old). They were surprised. 43 But Yesu gave stick orders not to say about this what has happened. So Yesu told to them, "Give the food!"

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu a néngwanoi yánjo tesenot yánjo waitogh árfé. 2 Njam Safat nawerai, yémon watamegh yérnyai áumengégh méngon, tárfár ár efe káyáretawét yáne sifaf sélngwél tamorwén.
bt: Yesu left this place and went to his town with his following men. 2 When the Safat came, he started to teach in the Yesu's family(church), many people who heard his talk, they were surprised.

nama: Fá siyém méngo ramégh árro. Meriene ambum yém, Jems, Josef, Judas a Saimon yánngnéf em. Yáne mérésmérésafé yénd yéna yéném." Yémofem yékenayénd.
bt: He is a carpenter. He is Meri's son. Jems, Josef, Judas and Saimon are his small brother. His sister are here with us. People are not happy because what he was doing miraculous thing.

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Méinyotio árém eutémndat Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár wénde yánjo méngotu árém yau a mérnam a fútarém." 5 Yesum yau sélngwélafé yam yéné tesenan ewafrotam, wénde mé nambio enjne téfnárafefafétro ngángé efayoi. 6 Yesu sélngwélam yafrotam njam yéfene ndimbal mwighé yau yinjoi. Yesum ewafarnam 12
bt: Yesu said to them, " All the people respect the God's man who make know(prophet) but his village people, family and relatives don't (respect)." 5 Yesu [could] not do any special workings(miracles) in that town, except he lay his hands on few sick people. 6 Yesu was amazed when he didn't see their big mind(faith). Yesu sends out 12

nama: Yesum eumendai yáfaftio 12 waitogh ár, a ewafarnam fá sómbiosómbioe a muyé ewaramai yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét. 8 Yémon emndai fá, "Álighan némé yau tawanangi wénde awamarogh wéturo, yau njamke, yau mani, a yau awogh yáf. 9 Féyotaro yém tamakaro awogh, yau ámb awalogh sáláme tawanangi. 10 Fém njam árké méngot taumyongi, emor kétánotio kor kuwanongi yéné méngotuta. 11 Árké méngotuan yau njam taumyongi o táyárangi fém, kafkaf ngwérméng táf tasénangi féyo méngotu téfrangongi, awafaroghét ndené Ngánjánam tékrátan so tákmangé fá." 12 Yesuene waitogh árém méngotu yéfrangoyénd a si afrogh nufngoyénd árfefaf yaufita awengoghét Ngánjánefaf. 13 Yémofem tawifnawét tárfár yaufi mbérmbér a ár enjne téfnár tafaghanawét olif wén wékwre merafayo. Jon walitogh ároene kérmén
bt: Yesu gather them to himself 12, and sent them out two by two and gave them authority to cast evil spirits.

nama: Warsagh ár Erod náyárai Yesuenemén ménamén yáne yétkwén marat náyátoi. Ámb ár korayawét, "Jon walitogh ár kérta nénano, yénémamén sélngwélafé ásáfogh yémon ewafrote."
bt: King Erod heard about Yesu because his name became well known. Some people were talking, "Jon the baptist has been raised from the dead, because he was performing miraculos things.

nama: Ámb árém korayawét, "Yéné Elaija séno yém." Ámb ár wéi mé korayawét, "Fá siyém mat yátogh ár yém, ndenanit tándái ámb mat yátogh ár kés tanmorwén."
bt: Others said, "That might be Eliaja." Others still said, "He is a God's man who make know(prophet), like one of God's man who make know(prophet) were of long time ago."

nama: Wénde njam Erod náyárai Yesuenemén, fá norayai ndené, "Jon séno yémǃ Yéndon efe sénko yénfayén, fá séno nénano ghérsat."
bt: But when Erod heard about Yesu, the said that, "Might be Jon! Whom I cut the head, he might be arised to life.

nama: Erod fá fáyo namndai Jone werghét, a fá engwáfáretam Jone umbghét yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngot. Erodém yafrotam ménát Erodias sái téfrendangai mwighayan, fá témorwén Erodene néngén Filifene amaf, wénde Erodém yénmakawai a nawerai. 18 Fronde Joném mé korayau Erodefaf, "Yau mbarkánd yém feyot fenngénoene amaf awerghétǃ" 19 Féyo Erodias nékwafé témorwén Jonefaf a fá ménde krot sái tékmangai. Wénde yémon yau yafrotam 20 ménamén Erod férfér témorwén Jonefaf a yambayéng fá. Erod mat témorwén Jon siyém mbarkánd a njúnnjúnofnar ár. Erod mé usérmboghan témorwén ménáyan némé Jon korayau, wénde fá wéi mé mer témorwén yáne áyárghét.
bt: Erod himself said Jon held, and he himself held and tied with rope and put in the darkness house. Erod did this because of Erodias, the wife of his brother Filif, whom he married. 18 Jon was saying, "It is not straight for you to marry your small brother's wife!" 19 So Erodias was angried to Jon and she want to kill him. But she didn't do 20 because Erod was scared of Jon and protected him. Erod knew Jon was good and straight man. Erod was still confused because what Jon was saying, but he was still happy to listen to him.

nama: Ámb efghon Erodene áráfégh efogh téménd nawerai, yémon ewarawai yánjo tuk ásáfogh ár a fiyaré sénko ár a Galili yumén limánégh ár. 22 Njam Erodiasene yámérés nélawai téménd sifayat ermángégh nufngoi, warsagh ár Erod a yáne wan téfnárafene merotro.
bt: The other day it was Erod's birthday, he invited his high officials and military coomanders and head men of Galili region. 22 When daughter of Erodias went in the feasting place to started to dance, she pleased King Erod and his guests.

nama: Yéndon efalo si némndetan fém ndené witmé karéf méngotu so kémafarorén, njam fém ménde ném."
bt: I tell you the truth I will divide half of the village[kingdom], if you want.

nama: Mérés néngtoryéng a yátmé yémndai, "Yéndo némat so tamnendangén?" Yatmam yawangoi, "Jon walitogh ároene sénkotǃ"
bt: The girls went out and told her mother, "What will I ask for?" Mother answered, "The head of Jon the Baptist."

nama: Mérés wékeye néngangoi a Erode yaufroi, "Yénd ménde wém sénonjo kwaram Jon walitogh ároene sénko merekinan kwawafél."
bt: The girl went back quickly and told Erod, " I want you to give me the head of Jon the Baptist on a platter."

nama: Warsagh ár Erod ghérghérsisé nawerai ndernáye té yémndai. Wénde fá méndefnar témorwén yánjo si sái tarafarngai ménamén fá némé té norayai yánjo wan téfnárafene sáfrére. 27 Táf fété yémon ewáfáretai fiyaré Jonene sénko néfghét kwéfkwéf méngot. 28 Fiyaram sénko yénmaflayénd merekinan mérsoe taramangi. Féyo mérsom tafnamongé yatmafaf. 29 Njam Jonene waitogh árém náyárayénd ngimén, fá nuwanoyénd yáne fifi résaghét a yélawayénd mbéwé méngon. Yesum emanjnam 5,000 ár
bt: The ruling man(king) Erod felt sorry to the girl what he told her. But he did not want to break the without.lying talk(promise) because what he said in front of his guests. 27 Immediately he sent the soldiers to cut the head of Jon in the darkness house, 28 The soldiers put the head on the plate and gave it to the girl. So the girl passed it to her mother. 29 When Jon's following men heard about [Jon] being killed, they went and took his body and laid it in a grave. Yesu feeds 5,000 people

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár nénangotaménd Yesuefaf, yémofem taufrotawét yáyot yéfene ásáfoghmén a watameghmén. 31 Wénde tárfár ár tanmorwén a tangmorwén Yesuefaf a yáne muyafé árfefaf yéfeyot ámb féneféne yau témorwén nénet. Féyo Yesum emndai, "Kuwanongém métar sifayat enaghét."
bt: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) came back to Yesu, they told him about their work and teaching. 31 But many people were coming and going to Yesu and to his men with Yesu's authority(apostles), [so] they have no chance to eat. So Yesu told them, "Let's go to the quiet place to have a rest."

nama: Fá néngwanoyénd yéfembia boute métar sifayat. 33 Wénde tárfár árém ewinjoyénd fá a néngwaitoyénd yéfefaf a tárfár tesenmén ár wérseye kérsawét tunamé kétán Yesuefaf. 34 Njam Yesu nurtoyéng boutta, yémon ewinjoi tárfár ár mérén tanmorwén ndenanit wanjengégh árofnar sif. Yesu ghérghérsisé nawerai árfefaf a fá watamegh ewafngoi tárfár yammén.
bt: They went by themselves in a bout to the quiet place. 33 But many people saw them and followed them from many towns and ran beside the river to the Yesu. 34 When Yesu came out of the bout, he saw the group of people coming like sheep without watching man. Yesu had compassion to people and taught them many things.

nama: Séitefifiyan Yesuene waitogh ár enmormén yáfaf a yémndayénd, "Yéné sifayé siyém yauyau sifayé yém a séite té namndé. 36 Ewafarnai ár kaka méngotuot a witmé mband karéf áronjaghét yéfendio njamket."
bt: In the late afternoon, his following men came to Yesu and told him, "This is a remote place and it's almost very late. 36 Send the people away to nearby villages and other side to look for food for themselves to eat."

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem tawaramangi némndafi nénet." Wénde yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Fém ménde ném yéndfem 10,000 kinaye yéfe njamke résaghét?"
bt: Yesu answered, " You give them something to eat." But they asked Yesu, "Do you want us to get 10,000 Kina worth of food?"

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai, "Nderé tárfár njamke ewam? Tangém kénufénmangi." Fá nénangoyénd a yaufroyénd ndené, "Téfene em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif."
bt: Then Yesu asked, "How mich food do you have? Go and see." They came back and told him that, "We have 5 rapt of biskar and two fish."

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár ménát ár mérénmérne ámnjoghét yusan. 40 Féyo fá námnjotaménd ámb 100 e, ámb 50 e. 41 Yesum ewerai 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif, a euyoi njafar tukét, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a tawatfotau. Féyo eramai waitogh árfefaf tawarametawét árét. Yémon wéi tawafalotau sómbio wagif yéfeyot méinyotio. 42 Méinyotio árém enetaménd a eremngoi, 43 a Yesuene waitogh árém ekafayénd 12 yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar a wagif. 44 Kété tamorwén 5,000 ár emofem yéné njamke enetaménd. Yesu tiotau nu tukma
bt: Yesu told his following men to divide themselves in groups and to sit down on the grass. 40 So they sat down some in 100 and some in 50. 41 Yesu took 5 rapt of biskar and two fish and lift them up to heaven, he gave thanks to God and broke them. Then he gave them to his following men and [then]they gave them to the people. He also distribted two fish to them all. 42 All the people ate and were satisfied, 43 and Yesu's following men picked 12 basketfuls of leftover food and fish. 44 There were 5,000 people who ate this food. Yesu walks on the water

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár tekofnar uflighét bout kénjút a néngwanoyénd Betsaidat, njam ár mérén engwafarnai. 46 Soramé fá engéfrangoi, fá néngwanoi witmé karéf mband tunakfot Ngánjánafé orayéghét.
bt: Yesu told his following men to get into the bout quickly and left to Besaida, while he sent people away. 46 After he left people, he went up on the mountainside to talk with God.

nama: Njam sémbár náyátoi, bout témorwén arakaf néndkéfan, fá táf témorwén yambia tunan. 48 Yémon ewinjoi yánjo waitogh ár bout yéta baraye térayawét, wénde mbormboram mé tawangotau. Faurghétro témorwén wénde kwéfkwéf mé témorwén, Yesu yéfefaf ténmorwén nu tukmé awaingéghtro témorwén. 49 Yémofem njam yinjoyénd Yesu nu tukma álighan, fá kéma kemnawét ndené némndafi bérsebérse kar témorwén. Fá férfére nutnaménd, 50 ménamén yémofem njam yinjoyénd ngernger tamorwén.
bt: When evening came, the bout floated in middle of the lake, and he was alone on land. 48 He saw his following men struggling to paddle the bout, but the wind was against them. About daybreak, Yesu came to them walking on the water and was about to pass by them. 49 When they saw Yesu walking on the water, they were thinking that it was ghost. They shouted in fear, 50 because when they saw him, they were terrified.

nama: Féyo Yesu boutot nuflai, mbormbor táf nékmboi. Fá minde sélngwél emormén. 52 Yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd Yesuene wafté 5,000 ár manjarghan ménamén yéfene tikéf mé táikér tamorwén. Yesum mer táyátotau enjne téfnár Ganasaretén
bt: Then Yesu climbed into the bout, the wind stopped. They were still confused. 52 They did not recognize Yesu' authority to feed 5,000 people because their mind were still on doubt. Yesu healed the sick people in Ganasaret

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár nurtoyénd witmé karéf sawot a bout yékmayénd Ganasaret tesen kaka. 54 Njamandio fá nurtoyénd boutta, árém táf yáyámngoyénd Yesu. 55 Ár ghanyafé nenngoyénd méinyotio tesenot a tanérsawét méinyotio enjnefé ár tataye kétán ánde Yesu témorwén. 56 Méinyotio méngotu, tesen, ndau sifayé, marat sifayé árkamé Yesu tiotau, árém tangérsawét enjne téfnár. Yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu yáne sáláme fétfét yanjaghétro, a méinyotio árém emofem sáláme fétfét táyanjawét mer káyátotawét.
bt: Yesu and his following men crossed over to the other side of the lake and left bout close to Ganasaret. 54 As soon as they got out of the bout, people recognized Yesu. 55 The people ran with the talk to the towns for all the sick people to be carried where Yesu was. 56 Every villages, towns, garden places and marketplaces where Yesu went through, people brought every sick people to him. They asked him to touch the edge of his clothes, all the people who touched the edge of the clothes were healed.

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár efe enmormén Jerusalemta Yesufé náumendayénd. 2 Yémofem ewinjoyénd ámb Yesuene waitogh ár ngángé umbarghofnar tamorwén néneyan.
bt: Farasi men and the teaching men of the law who came from Jerusalem gathered around Yesu. 2 They saw some of Yesu's following men was eating without washing.

nama: Farasi ár a méinyotio Ju ár yéfekiafene watamegh si efalo táyátotawét. Yémofem túmén ngángé taumbnawét soramé njamke tánetawét. 4 Njam fá kénangotawét marat sifayata yémofem yau njamke tánetawét fronde ngángé taumbnawét. Yémofem ákiafene yam mé tawaitotawét, yéné rokar umbarghan, kafusi, ketol, sin a merekin.
bt: Farasi men and all Ju people really kept their ancestor's teaching. They always washed hands after(and then) they ate food. 4 When they came back from the marketplace they didn't eat food before they washed hands. They kept observing ancestor tradition, [like] these things- washing cups, kettles and dishes.

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém Yesu yémotayénd, "Némamén fene waitogh ár yau ndenáye emor téfene ákiafene watamegh ndernáye témorwén? Némamén yémofem njamke enetat yéfene ngángé umbarghofnar?"
bt: Farasi men and the techers of law asked Yesu, " Why your following men don't live like our ancesters teaching how was? Why they eat without washing their hands?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Aisayane si efalo témorwén njam fá kafrotau féfenemén ndené fém efe farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau. Ndenaye fété si kés yéfarotaménd, "Ngánján noraye, yéné árém wutémndat yénd mé mbérmbérero, wénde yéfene tikéf em nayu ta tambén.
bt: Yesu answered them, " Aisaya was straight talk saying when he said about you liar men(hypocrites), as talk already wrote: "These people respect me with only their lips, but their heart are far from me.

nama: Yémofem wáwefnotat ta fifiofnar yéfene watamegh em ár wafroghmén."
bt: They worship me in vain their teaching are that men made."

nama: Fémofem ekarotati Ngánjánene si wénde nawertati ár wafroghmén sian."
bt: You ignore God's talk but hold talk that men made."

nama: Yesu wéikor korayau yéfefaf, "Fém mer em Ngánjánene si kenaghan wénde fémofem ewaitotati féfenjo ákiafene watamegh siǃ 10 Moses norayai, 'Eutémanuwé ferafé a fetmé, a 'Emo njam yárefé a yátmé yaufi si emndéwé fáyo so kéran kakmangé.' 11 Wénde fémofem ewatametati ár a emndetati yárefé a yatmaf, "Yéndon eweretan rokar a ewáutárwan féfe wénde yénándené noraye korban yáne fifi Ngánján Yuré yém." 12 Féyo yénémamén yau so tumyongé némndafi wafroghét yárefé a yatmafet. 13 Fémofem ekarotati Ngánjánene si ménaye féfene ákiafene watamegh yame. Fémofem ewafrotati tárfár ndenanit."
bt: You are good to reject God's talk but you are keeping your ancesters' teaching! 10 Moses said, 'Honor your father and your mother, and 'Anyone when curse his father and his mother will put to death.'

nama: Yesum emotai ár tárfár yáfafaftio a emndai, "Kénáyárangi tafaf, méinyotio mat kamndangi. 15-16\~ Fémon némé enete a kénjút yéngém, yémo yau mámáfi tiyátongé. Wénde némé kénjuta kéntorngé farut yémo mámáfi ár yiyátote."
bt: Yesu called the crowd to him and said, "Listen to me, every people, understand it. 15-16\~ What you eat with lips and go into don't make unclean. But what comes out of that make unclean."

nama: Yéné soramé ár mérén efrangoi a nénglawayénd méngo kénjút, yáne waitogh ár namotayénd yéné si rengerengemén. 18 Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém mat fiyátam yéndon némamén emndetan. Fém mat fiyátam fémon némé enete sénféneye yémo yau mámáfi niyátote. 19 Yéné yau yiota fene tikfot, wénde fene futot, a fene fifiot." Ndenayo Yesu norayai, "Méinyotio njamke em nénemén."
bt: After this many people left a entered into house, his following men asked about this parable. 18 Yesu answered them, "Do you understan that I said? Do you understand what you eat with teeth, that don't make unclean? 19 This doesn't go into your heart, but into your stomach and [then go] out of your body." Yesu said that, "All food is for eating."

nama: Yesu norayai, "Némé kéntorngé tikéfta yémo kényátongé mámáfi. 21 Némé kéntorngé tikéfta yaufi mwighé, walyam, oro, ár ngi, amafanyo wanégh, 22 nité, yaufi wafroghyam, unyégh, wáiwáiofnar yam wafrogh, méndero yifote, wátaranégh, ndimbalndimbal mwighé a mwighafnar yam wafrogh. 23 Méinyotio yéné yaufiyam néntonat ároene tikéfta, ár tiyátongé yaufi." Téndo amafoene ndimbal mwighé
bt: Yesu said , "What comes out of the heart make him unclean. 21 What comes out of the heart [are] evil thoughts, bad sexual acting, theft, killing people, 22 adultary, bad act desires, deceit, sexual bad act desires, envy, slander, bigbig thought(pride), foolishness. 23 All these evil things comes out of peoples's heart, make a man unclean." Woman's big mind(faith)

nama: Yesum yéné sifayé yéfrangoi a nuwanoi Taire tesenot, kété télawangérwén méngo kénjún. Yesu méndefnar témorwén ár mat sái káyátongayénd ndené fá méngo kénjún yélau wénde fá mat náyátoyénd tekofnar. 25 Amaf endene mérés yaufi mbérmbéram tasérmbotau yénmormén Yesuene kafkafrére nuyai. 26 Fá témorwén téndo amaf Fonisian náráftam Siria yuwon. Yémon yamnendai Yesu yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét yámersoeta.
bt: Yesu left this place and went to Taire city, there he entered one men's house. Yesu did not want people to know about this but he couldn't keep it a secret. 25 A woman whose daughter was possessed by evil spirit came and fell in fornt of feet of Yesu. 26 The woman was Grik person, born in Sairia Finisian. She asked Yesu to cast out the evil spirit from her daughter.

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Ambum fronde njamkeye témanjnangiǃ Yau mer nérete yéfene njamke ághafet manjarghét."
bt: But Yesu said, "First I feed the children! [It's] not straight to take thier food and throw to the dogs."

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Yuré, Ambumtértrafene njamke mbarmbar nénguitat, ágham enetat kitaré mbanmbanan."
bt: The woman answered, "Lord, the scraps of Children food dropped, dogs eat under the table.

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efalo yéné yémǃ Fém nguwano sénonjo. Yaufi mbérmbéram fene mérés té yéfrango."
bt: Yesu answered her, " It is true! Go now. The evil spirit has left your daughter."

nama: Njam amaf néngangoi méngot, yémon yinjoi yámérés tékmangérwén yameyan, yaufi mbérmbér frangoghkaf témorwén. Yesum mer yiyátoi téngan méngu a babé ár
bt: When the woman went home and she found her daughter lying on the matress, and the evil spirit was gone. Yesu heals a deaf and mute man

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi Taire a néngwanoi Sidon a Dekafolis tesenamé nufaryéng Galili arakaffaf. 32 Ámb árém yénérsaménd yáfaf ár efe téngan méngu a babé témorwén. Yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu yanjaghétro.
bt: Yesu left the Taire and went Sidon area [and] went down the sea of Galili and around the region of Dekafolis. 32 Some people took to him a man who was deaf and mute. They asked Yesu just to touch him.

nama: Soramé Yesum yéngutoryéng téndot ár mérénta, Yesum ngángé efayoi ároene ténganan. Ndenéyameyo mbérém efayoi ngángayan a yayanjai yáne kánké. 34 Fá néwewoi njafarot a kénjkam ghérghérsisafé yémndai, "Efataǃ" yáne fifi yém 'Kasawérǃ' 35 Táf fété ároene téngan nasawéryénd, a si mere néngufngoi.
bt: After Yesu took him aside from the crowd, Yesu put the middle finger into man's ears. Then he spit [and] touched the man's tongue with the middle finger 34 He looked up to the heaven and with a deep sigh said, 'Efata!' this meaning is "Be opened!" 35 Instantly, man's ears opened, and speak a talk well.

nama: Yesum ekmboi fá yau néngafrotati ámb árfefaf. Yémon mé takmbotau yau nafrotati némé yéndon tafrotan, wénde árém ménjtaye mé ngafrotawét yánemén. 37 Ár sélngwél emormén a fá norayayénd, "Yémon tafrote yéné ásáfogh merfifi. Yémon mer yiyáto téngan méngu a babé ár."
bt: Yesu commended them not to tell to anyone. But the more he did saying, the more the people continue to talked about it. 37 People were amazed and they said, "[That] he does this work [is] well. He heals deaf and mute man."

nama: Tekofnaye ámb efghon ár mérén náumendaménd. Kétánotio yéfene njamke nefoyénd yau ámb nénet. Yesum emotayéng yánjo waitogh ár a emndai, 2 "Yénd ghérghérsisé wém yéné árfenemén, Fá té tam yéndfé nambio efogh némndafi njamke yau ewaramayénd. 3 Yéndon njam tawatemban siogh méngotuot fá so ngawambangi álighan, ménamén fá enmormén nayuta."
bt: Immedately the other day large crowd gathered. Until their food finished and nothing was left to eat. Yesu asked his following men and said, 2 "I have compassion about this people; they were with us three days without food provided. 3 If I send them hungry to their home, they will starve on the walking, because they came a long distance."

nama: Yánjo waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Wénde ánde yéné yauyau sifayan árké árom téu tanwawanangé féskaf flawé yéfe manjarghét?"
bt: His following men answered, "But where in this nothing place which people can take cassava to feed them?"

nama: Yesum emotayéng, "Njénamb féskaf flawé em féfefaf?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefenro"
bt: "How many cassavas do you have?" Yesu asked. "Only 7," they answered.

nama: Yesum emndai ár mérén ámnjoghét mbandan. Yémo njam sefen féskaf flawé ewerai kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne, yémon etfotam a eramayéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf awafghét ár mérnat ndernáye emndayéng. 7 Yéfene tawamorwén nambio némbne wagifro. Yémo kánjo si yaramai yéné wagifmén ndenéyameyo a emndayéng yánjo waitogh ár wagif wafghét árét. 8 Árém njam enetaménd eremngoyéng. Yéné soramé yáne waitogh árém ekafayénd sefen yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar árké nafrangoyénd. 9 4,000 ár tamorwén. A Yesum engwatembai méngotuot. 10 Fá nénguflayénd ngárndot yánjo waitogh árfé néngwanoyénd Dalmanuta witmé karéf mbandot. Farasi árém yémotayénd njafarmén sélngwélafé yamot.
bt: Yesu told the crowd to sit down on the ground. When he held 7 cassavas and gave thank to God, he broke them and gave them to his following men to share them to the crowd how he told them. 7 They had a few small fish as well. He gave thanks [to God] about fish also and told his following men to share them to the people. 8 When people ate and were satisfied. After that his following men picked up 7 basketfuls of pieces of food which were left over. 9 There were 4,000 people. And Yesu sent them to the villages. 10 They got [into]the bout with his following men and went the other side of Dalamanuta.

nama: Farasi ár enmormén a mogh yafngoyénd Yesu. Ménát yá ufoghét, yémofem Yesu yémotayénd sélngwélafé yam wafroghét ménát so tufarotangé nde Ngánjánam yéné wafté yaram. 12 Yémon kénjún tékrát yiyárayéng a norayai, "Némamén yéné ár mérnam némndendat sélngwélafé yamot? Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efaloe, yau so sélngwélafé yam tawaramangén." 13 Féyo yémon enéfrangoi fá, boutfaf nénangoi uflighét a néngférmai witmé karfot. Farasi árfene a Erodene minaghmén
bt: Farasi men came and began to ask Yesu. To test Yesu, they asked Yesu a surprising thing from heaven. 12 He felt a pain inside and said, "Why do this people ask for special workings(miracles)? I tell you the truth, I will not perform surprising thing." 13 Then he left them, came back to the bout and crossed to the other side. The yeast of the Farasi men and Erod.

nama: Yáne waitogh ár engwawalindai féskaf flawé résaghét. Wénde ámbiro yéfefaf boutan taflangérwén. 15 Yesum tamndetau fá, "Kor aem Farasi árfene a Erodene flawé minaghmén."
bt: His following men forgot to bring cassava. But only one [bag] they had with them in the bout . 15 Yesu told them, "Be alert. Be careful the yeast of Farasi men and Erod."

nama: Yémofem warunyéghét yiyátoyénd yénémamén yéfe kénjúnro fá norayayénd, "Ménamén yénd flawafnar yéném."
bt: They began to discuss in themselves and said, "[it is ]because we have no cassavas."

nama: Yesu mat náyátoi yéfene warunyéghmén, Yesum ewárnai fá, "Némamén fém norayati flawafnarmén? Fém somé ghékéf kwéfkwéf em a mwighé déudéu? Némé féfene tikéf mé táikér em? 18 Fém fété ghékfafé em wénde yau néretati, a ndenáyo ténganafé fété emo wénde yau náyáretati? Yau fém nawafarotati? 19 Yéndon njam 5 féskaf flawé etfotamén yéfe 5,000 árét, nderé tárfár yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbarafé wét ekafayénd fémofem?" Yémofem yawangoyénd "Tuwelf."
bt: Yesu knew their discussion, Yesu asked them: "Why are you talking about having no cassavas? Are you still blind to see and still doubting? Are your hearts still hardened? 18 Do you have eyes but you cannot see and also you have ears but cannot hear? And don't you remember? 19 When I broke the 5 cassavas for 5,000 people, how many basketfuls of pieces of food did you picked up? They answered, "Twelve."

nama: "Yéndon njam sefen féskaf flawé etfotamén yéfe 4,000 árét, nderé tárfár yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar ekafayénd fémofem?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefen."
bt: When I broke 7 flowa for 4,000 people, how many basketfuls of pieces of food did you pick up? They answered, "Seven."

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Némé féfene mwighé kwéfkwéfan mé ewam?" Yesum mer yiyátoi ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár Betsaidan
bt: He said to them, "Do you still not understand?" Yesu healed the blind man in Betsaida

nama: Fá enmormén kétán Betsaidat, a ámb árém yénémnjaménd ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár a Yesu yaunendayénd yá yanjaghét. 23 Yesum ngángayan yéngwerai a yéngémnjoi méngotu téndot. Njam yémon mbérme yéfarndai ároene ghékéf a Yesum táf ngángé efayoi yáfaf, a yémotai, "Fémo ámb rokar té efande?"
bt: They came to Betsaida, and some people brought a blind man and begged Yesu to touch him. 23 Yesu held him by the hand and took him outside the village. When he spitted [on] man's eyes and put his hands on him, Yesu asked, " Do you see anything?"

nama: Fá tukét néwewoi a norayai, "Yéndo ár efandan wénnit narendat."
bt: He looked up and said, "I see people moving like trees."

nama: Ámbirotaro Yesum wéi ngángé efayoi yéné ároene ghékfan. Féyo táf yáne ghékéf nasawéryénd a yáne erégh nawafarnjaméng, a méinyotio rokar kwayaghan tafandau. 26 Yesum yéngwáfáretai méngot a témndangé, "Yau méngotuot kufar." Fité norayai Yesu siyém Keriso
bt: Once more Yesu put his hands on this man's eyes. Then his eyes began to see and his sight was recovered, and he saw everything clearly. 26 Yesu sent him home and said, "Don't go into the village." Fitè's true saying about Keriso

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tárfár méngotuamé yénamé Kaisaria Filifi yuwomé. Álighan Yesum engmotai yánjo waitogh ár, "Ár norayat yénd efe wém?"
bt: Yesu and his following men went through many villages around region of Kasaria Filifi. On the way Yesu asked his following men, "People say who I am?"

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Ámb norayat Jon walitogh ár, wéi ámb norayat Elaija, a mé ámb árém néngorayat, ndené ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
bt: They answered, "Some say Jon the Baptist; other people say Elaija; and still other people say, might be a God's man who make know(prophet)."

nama: Yémon emotai, "Wénde fém wét ndernáye? Fém ndernáye norayati yénd efe wém?" Fitam yawangoi, "Fém fété ném Keriso."
bt: "But what about you?" he asked. "How do you say I am?" Fitè answered, "You are Keriso."

nama: Yesum ekmboi fá ende yau taufrongi efe yénd wém. Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
bt: Yesu stopped them not to tell anyone about him. Yesu told them about his death

nama: Féyo yémon watamegh ewafngoi ndené Ároene Ambum tárfár yamamé tékrát so yáyárete a so tékenangi sénko ár, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh árém. Fá so yésmetat krotio. Wénde fá so wéi kanongé nambio efogh soramé. 32 Yesum safén tékmetau yénémamén a Fitam yéngwasroi téndot a sotafé si yémndai.
bt: So he began to teach them that the Son of Man will feel pain many things and denied by the head people, chief burning sacrifice men and the teaching men of the law, and he will be killed and be raised three days later. 32 Yesu spoke publicly about this and Fitè took him aside and rebuked him.

nama: Wénde njam Yesu nawengoi efandai yánjo waitogh ár, yémon sotafé si Fité yémndai, "Sáifér! Kitrémb ta tambén. Fene mwighé yau em Ngánjáneta, wénde árta."
bt: But Yesu turned around and saw his following men, he rebuked Fitè. "Go away from me, Sáifèr! Your thought is not from God but from men."

nama: Féyo yémon emotai ár mérén yáfaftio yánjo waitogh árfé a norayai, "Efe ta waitoghét njam kufngongé, fá so kakenangé fáyo a tanangé yánjo wafatarégh wén a yénd kwénmaitongé. 35 Yénémaménnde efe ménde njam yém yánjo ghérsé wanjarghét so yaghne, wénde emo yaghna tane téfnan a sioene téfnan so kunjarngé. 36 Némé mer em ároe yéné mband marat njam tanangé, wénde yánjo ghérsé so yaghne? Yau mer yém. 37 Ároe yau yém yánjo ghérsé térarghét. 38 Efe njam tanemén wáiwái yém a tane simén yéné ngánjánofnar a yaufi efghon, féyo Ároene Ambum wáiwái so yém yánemén njam yéném Yárefane ndimbal kwayaghafé njúnnjúnofnar njafar si résagh árfé."
bt: Then he called to crowd to himself with his following men and said: "If anyone follow me, he will deny himself and carry his cross and follow me. 35 Therefore if anyone wants to save his life will lose it, but who loses his life for me and for my talk will save it. 36 What good it is a man gains the whole world, but lost his life? 37 Or who is to replace men's life again? 38 If anyone feel shame about me and my talk in this Godless sinful world, the Son of Man will also feel shame about him when he comes in his Father's glory with without.dust(holy) men carrying heavenly message(angels).

nama: A yémon emndai fá, "Yéndon féfe efalo ewaufrotan, ámb ár efe yéna ewakai yémofem fronde so tinjongi Ngánján limánégh sái yéném ménáyafé waftafé soramé kér em." Yesu nafurnai
bt: And he said to them, "I tell you the truth, some who are standing here will not taste death before they see the ruling of God come with power." Yesu was changed

nama: Siks efogh soramé Yesu Fité, Jems a Jon néwanoyénd mband tunakfot, ánde fáro méinyotio tamorwén. Kété fá nafurnai yéfene sáfrére. 3 Yáne sáláme nálálai kafe ngarot ánde yau so tinjo ndené kwayaghé yéné mbandan. 4 A kété nufareyayénd yéfe sáfrére Elaija a Moses fá korayawét Yesufé.
bt: After 6 days Yesu went to the mountain with Fitè, Jems and Jon, where they only themselves. There he was changed in front of them. 3 His clothes shined white where it can not be found in the world like as that bright. 4 And there appeared before them Elaija and Moses, they were talking with Yesu. 5 Fitè said to Yesu, "Teacher, it is good for us to be here. We will build three houses-one for you, one for Moses and one for Elaija. 6 (He did not know what to say, they were so frightened.)

nama: Féyo yéné soramé njafar kwamkwamam ewafaryéng fá, a kém yénmormén njafar kwamkwamta. "Yéné siyém tane ambum efe yéndon yuwetan. Káyárangi yáfafǃ"
bt: Then after that a cloud covered them, and a voice came from the sky: "This is my son, whom I love. Listen to him!"

nama: Tekofnaye fá njam néngretayénd yémofem efe ámb yau yinjoyénd mé Yesuro.
bt: Suddenly, when they looked [around], they did not see anyone but only Yesu.

nama: Njamandio fá kénewonawét mband tunakéfta yuwot, Yesum ekmboi ende yau táf taufrongi némé fémofem té téfandati kétánotio Ároene Ambum kérta kanongé. 10 Yémofem tarambnotawét yam yéfenjo kénjúnro taruindawét némé 'kérta anoghmén' fifi témorwén.
bt: While they were coming down the mountain, Yesu gave them orders not to telll anyone about what you saw until the Son of Man rise from dead. 10 They kept secret to themselves, discussing about meaning of "rising from the dead."

nama: A yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Némamén nák watamegh árém norayat ndené, 'Elaija so yéném fronde soramé Keriso?'"
bt: And they asked him, "Why do the teaching man of the law say that Elaija will(must) come first?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Efalo siyém, Elaija fronde so yém, ménát yémon méinyotio yam fronde so ewafrote. Fém té nemnati ndené yéfarotaménd Ároene Ambumom so tékrat yárarete a yékarotat. 13 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, Elaija té yénmormén, a yémofem té yafrotaménd yáfaf méinyotio némat fá ménde tamorwén, ndenáye Buk si kés noraye." Yaufi mbérmbérafé ghakér ambumoene mer yátoghmén
bt: Yesu answered, "The truth is, Elaija will come first, for he will prepare everything first. Why is it wriiten that the Son of Man will suffer and be rejected." 13 But I tell you, Elaija has come, and they have done to him everything what they wanted, as the scriptures say." The healing of a boy with an evil spirit.

nama: Njam Yesu a yánjo nambio waitogh árfé kénewonawét, yémofem ewinjoyénd ár mérén yáne waitogh ár ewarendayénd a kété nák watamegh árfé kéwitawét sian. 15 Tekofnaye njam méinyotio árém yinjoyénd Yesu, fá ndimbal kéráye sélngwél emormén yénémamén wérseye yanfetayénd fá áuwéghafé.
bt: When they came to the other following men, they saw a large crowd surrounded them and the teaching men of the law arguing with them. 15 Not long all the people saw Yesu, they were bigly surprised about this and ran to greet him.

nama: Yémon emotai, "Némamén fém néwitati yémafé?"
bt: "What are you arguing with them about?" he asked.

nama: Árom mérén kénjún yawangoi, "Watamegh ár, yéndon fefaf ténérsan tane ambum, efe yaufi mbérmbéram yasérmbotam siofnarot yéméindai. 18 Njamandio ngi yafngoi, fá mbandot yéntarmai a sén takérnau a féfam ewetoi táikéram yafrotam. Yéndon fene waitogh ár emotayén yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét, wénde féyotarofnar tamorwén wafroghét."
bt: A man in the crowd answered, "Teacher, I brought you my son, who was possessed by evil spirit made him not to talk.

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "O efalo yátoghofnar ár mérén, nderé teke yénd so wémor féfefaf? Nderé teke yénd so métar wém féfefaf? Ténmanend ghakér ambum tafaf."
bt: O unbelieveing people," Yesu answered, " how long shall I stay with you? How long will I be patient to you? Bring the boy to me."

nama: Féyo yémofem yénmanayénd ambum yáfaf. Njam yaufi mbérmbéram yinjoi Yesu, táf fété ambumom sorar tatirnau. Fá yéntarmai mbandot, kaumnau, féfam tetotau.
bt: So they brought the child to him. When the spirit saw Yesu, it threw the boy into the ground and rolled, shivering the teeth.

nama: Yesum yárefé yémotai, "Nderé teke fá tém ndené siyém?" Yémon yawangoi, "Kétándmayo fá tosé. 22 Tárfár mbinotmé yéta yaufi mbérmbéram ngiot térametau fá fését unamngoghét a nuwan walitoghét. Njam téu yénmáutána fene ghérghérsisaye."
bt: "How long has he been like this?" Yesu asked his father.

nama: Yesu norayai, "Némamén ndené noraye, njam téu yénmáutána? Méinyotio yam áfrátro em yáyot emo efalo yiyátota."
bt: "For sure to you?" said Yesu "Everything is possbile for him who truly approves(believes)."

nama: Tekofnaye yéné ambumoe yárefam nuwangoi, "Yéndon efalo yiyátotan. Ta kwáutána ménát so yéndon efalo yiyátotan minde."
bt: Immediately the boy's father answered, "I truly approve(believe), help me to believe more strongly!"

nama: Yesum njam ewinjoi ár mérén kénérsawét kaka, yémon yémndai yaufi mbérmbér. Fá norayai, "Fém téngan déudéu a babé mbérmbér, yéndon némndetan, kéntor yá tambén a yau kélau wéikor yáfaf."
bt: When Yesu saw that the crowd was running close to him, he rebuked the evil spirit. "You deaf and mute spirit," he said, "I command you, come out of him and never enter him again."

nama: Yaufi mbérmbér nutnayéng yaufi keyafé ambum yétarmai mbandot a nétoryéng. Ambum ndenanit néretai kar kér yémormén tárfár ár norayayénd, "Fá kér té tém." 27 Wénde Yesum yéngwerai ngángaye a yéngwakayoyéng.
bt: The evil spirit shouted with bad cry, threw the boy to the ground and came out. The boy looked like that he was dead the many said, "He is dead." 27 But Yesu held hom by the hand and made him stand.

nama: Soramé Yesu nénglawai, yánjo waitogh árém yémotayénd fá kwankwane, "Némamén yénd féyotarofnar ténmorwén yéné yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét?"
bt: After Yesu went inside, his following men asked him secretly, "Why couldn't we cast out that evil spirit?"

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Némaye ámb yau mé Ngánjánafé oraighanro yaufi mbérmbér so ewifnati." Yesum wéikor korayau yánjo kérmén
bt: He answered, "Nothing else can cast out the evil spirit only by talking with God."

nama: Yémofem yéngéfrangoyénd yéné sifayé a Galili yu yéngwaindaménd. Yesu méndefnar témorwén ámb ár sái mat káyátongayénd ndené fá kété em, 31 ménamén yémon tawatametau yánjo waitogh ár. Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Ároene Ambum siyém sén so yérametat árfene ngángat. Yémofem so yésmetat fá, a nambio efogh soramé fá so kanongé." 32 Wénde fá yau mat namndayénd némé fá korayau, wénde fá férfér tamorwén ámoghét. Efe so ndimbal yém?
bt: They left that place and passed through Galili region. Yesu did not want anyone to know that he is there, 31 because he was teaching his following men. He said to them, "The Son of Man wll be gave teeth into the hand of men. They will kill him, and after three days he will rise." 32 But their mind did not open what he meant and were afraid to ask him [about it] Who is big?

nama: Fá engmormén kétán Káfenamét. Fá njam méngo kénjún télawangérwén, yémon emotai fá, "Némamén fém nénwitati endmé?" 34 Wénde fá métar nékmboyénd ménamén álighan fá kéwitawét efe ndimbal so kamndangé.
bt: They went to kafenam. When he was in ther house, he asked them, "Why were you arguing on the road?" 34 But they kept quiet because on the way they had argued [about] who will be big.

nama: Yesu námnjo a emotai 12 waitogh ár a tamndangé, "Njam ámb ár ménde yém frondeyot, fá táf némbnar kamndangé méinyotio árfene ásáfoghét."
bt: When they sat down, Yesu asked the 12 and said, "If anyone wants to be first, he must be last person, and the without.payment working man(servant) of all the people."

nama: Yémon yénémnjoi némbne ambum tosé yakayoi yéfe kénjún. A tambnangé a korayangé yéfefaf, 37 "Emon tumyongé ndené ambum tosé tane yétkwénan ndenéyameyo yénd kwumyongé, a emo yénd kwumyongé yau yénd kwumyongé wénde fá emo yénd kwémáfárete." Emofé yénd yau néuwitam fá sem téfene
bt: He brought a little child among them, and grabbed him and said to them. 37 Who[ever] welcomes like this child in my name in the same way welcomes me; and whoever welcomes me does not welcome me but he who sent me." Whoever is not against us he is for us.

nama: Jon norayai, "Watamegh ár, yéndfem yinjoyém ámb ár tawifnau yaufi mbérmbér fene yétkwénan, féyo yémndayém, 'Fém kékmbo,' ménamén fém yau téfene mérénmén ár ném."
