bt: Jon said, "Teacher, we saw a man driving out the evil spirit in your name, so we told him, " You stop" , you are not from our group."

nama: Yesum emndai, "Yau yékmbotati, ménamén emo yafrote sélngwélafé yam tane yétkwénan tekofnaye fá yau so noraye yaufi si tanemén. 40 Ménamén emofé yénd yau nasénam fá siyém téfene. 41 Yéndon ewaufrotan efalo, ámb árom emo njam kafusiafé nu fe kémaramangé tane yétkwénan ménamén fém ném Kerisoene, yémo so tanangé fai." Néméinde Yaufiot
bt: Yesu told them, "Don't stop him, because who performs surprising thing in my name he will not say bad talk to me soon, 40 For whoever is not against us he is for us. 41 I tell you the truth, if anyone who gives you a cup of water in my name because you belong to Keriso, he will receive a reward. Causing you to sin

nama: "Emo njam yéméinda totér ambum yaufiot, nderé mer yém kéman ndimbal wím sái yumbetat a yitat árakafot. Yáne fai siyém némbnar. Wénde Ngánjánam sái taramangé yéné ároe minde ndimbal. 43-44\~ Fene ngángayam njam néméinda fém yaufiot, yéné ngángé téngnéf. Njam ámbiro ngángafé nguwano njafar méngotuot, yéné siyém mer. Wénde sómbio ngángafé njam nguwano ambino tuot fését ánde yau so kékmbongé, yéné siyém mámáfi. 45-46\~
bt: If anyone causes to sin these little child who truly approve(believe) me, how good will be for him tied around his neck with a big stone and throw it into the sea. 43-44\~ If your hand makes you to sin, cut one of your hand. How good will be for you to go into life with one hand, [instead of you go] into the without.end home(hell) with your two hands. 45-46\~

nama: Njam fene ghékfam néméinda fém yaufiot, tutor yéné. Njam ámbiro ghékfafé nguwano Ngánjánene limánéghét, yéné siyém mer. Wénde sómbio ghékfafé njam nguwano ambino tuot fését, yéné siyém mámáfi. 48 Ánde 'Yéfene sésfél yau so kér em, a fés yau so kékmbongé.'
bt: If your eye makes you to sin, take away one of your eyes. How good will be for you to enter God's kingdom with one eye instead of having two eyes which will cause you to throw you to the fire(hell), 48 where 'their worms do not die, and the fire is not stopped.'

nama: Méinyotio ár so njúnnjúnofnar eyátote fésam ndené fété solam ghéngén njúnnjúnofnar tiyátongé.
bt: Everyone will be purified by fire as a sacrifice is purified by salt.

nama: Sol siyém mer, wénde yáne ménde njam kefongé, ndernáye fémon so yafarnje wéikor ndené méndetio? Yau, fém solnit aném, a mer métar ghérsé ámb árfé emor."
bt: Salt is good, but if it is loses its taste, how can you make salty again? You must be salt, and be at peace with one another."

nama: Féyo Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu néngwanoi Judiat a néngférmai Joden wanje. Wéikor ár mérén enmormén kétán yáfaf, túmén yam áumengéghan, yémon tawatametau fá.
bt: Then Yesu left that place and went up to other side of Judia and across the Joden river. Again crowd came to him, as usual, he taught them.

nama: Ámb Farasi ár enmormén tufotawét ménaye ámoghe, "Féyotaro yém nákan árém so tatembangé yánjo amaf?
bt: Some Farasi men came and tested him by asking, "How does law say about divorce?

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Ndernáye Mosesém tamndetau?"
bt: "How did Moses teach you? he answered.

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, "Mosesém ár tamndangai watembégh férén faroghét a amaf táf tangwatembangayénd watembégh férnafé."
bt: They said, "Moses instructed a man to write a divorce letter and sent wife away with divorce letter."

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéné témorwén ménamén féfene tikéf taikérmén Mosesém yéfarotam féfeyot, 6 wénde kété ufroghan Ngánjánam ewafroméng ghakér a mérés. 7 'Yéné téfnan árom so tatembangé yárefé yátmé a ámbiro kamndend amafofé. 8 A yéné sómbio so kamndend ámbiro fifi.' Féyo fá yau so sómbio ere, wénde ámbiro. 9 Yénémaménnde némé Ngánjánam ámbiro táyáte árké árom yau so tafale."
bt: "This was because your hearts were hard [that] Moses wrote it for you." Yesu answered them. 6 "In the beginning God 'created man and woman.' 7 That is why a man will leave his father and mother and to become one with wife. 8 And the two will become one body. so they are not two, but one. 9 Therefore what God has made one, no man can seperate."

nama: Fá njam méngo kénjún tamorwén wéikor, yáne waitogh árém yémotayénd Yesu yénémamén. 11 Yémon ewawangoi, "Árké árom yánjo amaf tatembangé a kawerangé ámb mérés amafanyo nák erafne yáne amafoefaf. 12 A njam amafom yánjar tatembangé a kawerangé ámb ár yémon amafanyo nák erafne." Ambum tértér a Yesu
bt: When they were in their house again, his diciples asked Yesu about this. 11 He answered, "Which person divorces his wife and marries another woman breaks the law to his wife. 12 And if wife divorces his husband and marries another man, she breaks the law." The little children and Yesu

nama: Árém tanérsawét ambumtértér Yesuefaf yanjaghét, wénde yáne waitogh árém eusérmbotaménd fá. 14 Yesum njam ewinjoi, fá nékw nawerai yéfefaf. Yesum tamndangé fá, "Ambum tértér yau ekmbotati ménamén Ngánján limánégh siyém ndené árét yém. 15 Yéndon féfe efalo ewaufrotan, fémofem táf Ngánján limánégh tumyongi ambumtértérnit ménát fém táf so kélawangi." 16 Féyo Yesum ambumtértér tawambnangé ngángaye a frengégh ewafngoyéng. Wemár totér ár
bt: People brought little children to Yesu to touch them, but his following men rebuked them. 14 When Yesu saw this, he got angried to them. Yesu told them, " [Let] Little children come to me because the ruling of God belongs to little children. 15 I tell you the truth that, no one enter the ruling of God unless become like this little children." 16 So Yesu grabbed little children with his hands and blessed them. The rich young man

nama: Njamandio Yesu álighét nufngoi, ár nénenngoi yáfaf a budme niyai yá sáfrére. Yémon yémotai, "Mer watamegh ár, yéndon némé so yafrotan tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
bt: As Yesu was about to walk, a man ran to him and knelt before him. "Good teaching man," he asked, "What can I do to get enternal life?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némamén fémon wémnde ndené mer? Yau efe mer yém, mé Ngánjánro fáro. 19 Fém mat ném náknák, 'Ár ngi yau, amafanyo wanégh yau, oro yau, unyégh si yau ewaufrota, wasogh yau, eutémanwé fene fetmé a ferafé.'"
bt: "Why do you call me good? Yesu answered. "No one is good, only God alone. 19 You know the commandments: 'Do not murder, do not commit adultary, do not steal, do not lie, do not cheat, respect your mother and father."

nama: Yémon témndangé, "Watamegh ár, yéné nák méinyotio yéndon taweretan kétándmayo yénd tosé kwémorwén."
bt: "Teacher," he said, "all these commandments I was faithful since I was a small."

nama: Yesum yéfandai áuwéghafé fá, a témndangé, "Ámbiro yam fefaf náláite, kuwano, etérna fene méinyotio rokar némé em a engwarameta méinyotio mani yauyau árét, a fene ngonjél so nawamndat njafaran. Féyo kénaf, yénd kwénmaito."
bt: Yesu saw him with love. "Only one thing you are missing," Yesu said. "Go, sell everything you have and [then] give all money to the poor, and your riches will be kept in heaven. Then come, follow me."

nama: Táf fété ár ghérghérsisafé nuwanoi, ménamén ndimbal wemár témorwén.
bt: At the same time the man's face fell, he went away sad, because he was a big rich man.

nama: Yesu néngretai a tamndangé yánjo waitogh ár, "Nderé táikér yém wemár ároe kétán élaughét Ngánján limánéghétǃ"
bt: Yesu looked and said to his following men, "How hard it is for the rich man to enter the kindom of God!"

nama: Waitogh ár sélngwél emormén yáne sian. Wénde Yesum tamndangé kor, "Ambum, nderé táikér so yém kétán Ngánján limánégh élaughét. 25 Kértayafé yém kemoloe wét féneyan élaughét, wénde wemár ároe kérté yamam kétán élaughét Ngánján limánéghét so yáinde yéné!"
bt: The following men were surprised at his talks. But Yesu said again, " Children, how hard it is to enter the kingdon of God! 25 It is difficut to for a kamel to pass through the hole of a needle, but the difficulty of a rich person to enter inside God's kingdom surpasses that.”

nama: Waitogh ár minde sélngwél emormén a norayayénd yéfe kénjúnro, "Efe so féyotaro ngunjarngé?"
bt: "The following men were surprised and said to themselves, "Who can be saved?"

nama: Yesum engfandayéng fá a norayai, "Yéné siyém ároe féyotarofnar yém, wénde yau Ngánjáne, méinyotio féyotaro em Ngánjáneyot.
bt: Yesu looked at them and said, "This is impossible for man but not for God; everything is possible for God."

nama: Fitam témndangé, "Yéndfem rokar méinyotio té tanéurotam a nénmaitongém fémǃ"
bt: Fitè told him, "We left everything and followed you!"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan, árké árom tafrangongé méngo, yánaf o mérsof, yátmé, yárefé, ambumtértér o mband tanemén a mer simén 30 so tawinjongé minde tárfár sénonjo efghon, méngo tárfár, anaf, mérésof, tárfár amé, ambumtértér a mband, a ndenéyameyo kérté, a soramé efghon, so tanangi tuot ghérsé. 31 Wénde tárfár ár efe sénonjo fronde em so em kerkeran, a efe sénonjo kerkeran em fronde so kamndangi." Yesu kor norayai yánjo kérmén
bt: "I tell you the truth," Yesu answered, "Which person leave house, his brothers, his sisters, his mother, his father, his children o land because of me and good talk(good talk) 30 will see hundred times more today(many houses, brothers, sisters, mothers, children and fields-and in the same way chasing(persecution)) in future they will receive enternal life.

nama: Fá tayotawéng endmé kétán Jerusalemét, a Yesum talimndau endmé yáne waitogh ár sélngwél emormén, ámb ár tangwaitotawét férfér tamorwén. Wéikor ewimndai 12 waitogh ár téndot fronde tawaufrotau ménamén némé so kufrotau yáfaf. 33 Yémon emndai, "Yénd yényota kétán Jerusalemét, a Ároene Ambum so sén téramangi kétán ghéngén wárogh sénko árfefaf a nák watamegh téfnárafefaf. Fá so korayangi fém so kér ném, a so kwafnamongi kétán téndo árfefaf, 34 emofem si so wawafrotat tayot a mbérme wéfarndat, wéfmotat a kérot kwékmangi yénd, nambio efogh soramé yénd so kanon." Yéfene ómnengégh Jems a Jon
bt: They are walking to the Jersalem, and Yesu lead them on the road, his following men were srprised, those followed were afraid. Again he took the 12 aside and told them what would happen to him. 33 "We are going to Jerusalem," he said, "and the Son of Man will be gave teeth(betrayed) to the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and teaching men of the law. They will kill him to death, and will hand him over to the Side people, 34 who will make fun of him and spit him, whip and put him to death, three day after he will rise." Jems and Jon their request

nama: Féyo Jems a Jon, Jefediene ambum engérmén kétán yáfaf. Yémofem yamnendangeyayénd, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde yénre fémon so yénmawafrowé téfe némat njam fém kémamnendangem."
bt: Then Jems and Jon, Jefedi's sons, went to him. they begged him, "Teacher, we.d want you to do for us what we.d ask for."

nama: Yesum emotangeyai, "Némé wafroghét fém ménde ere tafaf yéndon sái ewawafrowan féfe?"
bt: "What do you want me to do for you? Yesu asked.

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "So fémon féyotaro ténmumye yénd fene tambénta a ámb fatrata ámnjoghét táf fém njam kámnjo fene ndimbal kwayaghé kitarayan."
bt: They answered.d, " Do you allow us to sit at your right and left when you sit on your.s big light(glorious) throne.

nama: Yesum emndeyai, "Fém yau mat ere némamén fém namot, fém féyotaro ere ghafté kafusi nu nénet yéndon árkéméné so yénetan? O fém so ewalitot ndenáye yénd sái walitotat?"
bt: "You don't know what you are asking," Yesu said to them. "Can you drink the cup of water which I will drink and be baptized with the baptism I am baptized?

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Féyotaro yéndfem so."
bt: "We can," they answered.d. Yesu told them, "You will drink the cup of water which I will drink and be baptized with the baptism I am baptized, 40 but to sit there at my right and left, I have no authoruty to give you. Only God is who gives this place to those whom he has chosen.

nama: Njam ámb 10 waitogh árém náyárayénd yénémamén, fá nékwafé nafghetaménd yéfefaf Jems a Jon. 42 Féyo Yesum emotayéng fá méinyotio a eumendayéng, "Fém mat em ndené téndo árfene warsagh ár nawarsat a elimndat ár ménayeofnaye árét mer yau ewawafrotat. A yéfene tuk ásáfogh árém wafté euyafotat ménát árém so ewaitotat náknák. 43 Ndené yau nufrotati fá kés em. Wénde njam ámb ár ménde yém ndimbalot, fá táf némbnar kamndangé árfene ásáfoghét. 44 Njam ámb ár ménde yém frondeyot, fá táf némbnar kamndangé árfene ásáfoghét. 45 Ndené ende Ároene Ambum yau yénmormén árém sái yausáfotat, wénde yéfe wáusáfoghét a yánjo ghérsé yéramai tárfár ár wanjarghét." Ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár Batamayas néretai
bt: When other ten heard about this, they became angry to them Jems and Jon. 42 So Yesu called them together and said, “You.p know that the head men of the Gentiles think of themselves as high up & rule people without considering their.p good. And the high up leaders force people to follow whatever rules they.p set down." 43 That is not the way in you, but if you want to become big must be a without.payment working man(servant) for the people. 44 and whoever want to become first must be a without.payment working man(servant) of people. 45 In this way the Son of Man did not come to give to man work for himself, but him to serve, and to give his life many people to save.{g{ ...f* {g{10.45 In this way the Son of Man did not come to give to man work for himself, but him to serve, and to give his life many people to save. need to check with Consultant. Blind man Batimayas looks

nama: Féyo fá enmormén kétán Jerikot. Njam Yesu a yáne waitogh ár a ndimbal mérén káumendawét, yéngéfrangoyénd tesen, a ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár Batamayas, témorwén Tamayasene ambum, efe témorangérwén end téndon kómnendau. 47 Njam yémon náyárai ndené Najaretmén Yesu nawainde, fá kétán ke nufngoi, "Yesu Deifidene ambum, ghérghérsisé kwawer tafaf!"
bt: Then they came to Jeriko. When Yesu and his following men and large crowd gathered, left the city, and blind man Batimayas, was the son of Timayas) who was sitting by the roadside begging. 47 When he heard that it was Yesu from Najaret, he began to shout, "Yesu the son of Deifid, have a pity on me!"

nama: Tárfár árém tusérmbotawét, "Métar!" Wénde fá mé minde tukén kutnau, "Deifidene ambum, ghérghérsisé kawer tafaf!"
bt: Many people rebuked him and told him to be quiet, but he still shouted, "Son of Deifid, have pity on me!"

nama: Yesu nékmboi áligh a korayangé, "Téngmotangend."
bt: Yesu stopped and said, "Call him." So they called to the blind man, "Come quickly he is calling you." 50 he threw his clothes aside, he Jumped up and went to Yesu.

nama: Yesum yémotayéng, "Némé ménde ném yéndon sái némawafrotan?" Ghékéf kwéfkwéf árom yémndai, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde wém sái kéretangen."
bt: "What do you want me to do for you?" yesu asked him. The blind man said, " Teacher , I want to see ."

nama: Yesum yémndayéng, "Nguwano, fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer té niyáto fém." Táf fété néretai a yéngwaitoi Yesu endmé.
bt: "Go," said Yesu, "your big mind(faith) made you well." Immediately he can see and followed Yesu on the road.

nama: Njam fá ufarghétro téngmorwén Jerusalemét a engmormén kétán Betfage a Betani mband tunakéf yétkwén Olifén. Yesum ewáfáretangeyai yánjo sómbio waitogh ár, 2 emndeyai yéné si, "Nguwanend méngotuot féferére, njam fém ngélawénd, fémofem so tinjend umbéghkaf ndonki, árké ár yau yéfayongérmén, ténferend a yénémnjet yénan. 3 Njam emon tamotange fém, 'Némé fémofem yéna yafrot?' táf yá taufrend, 'Yuré ménde yém, so ténmangongé tekofnaye.'"
bt: When he approached Jerusalem and came to Betfage and Betani at the Mount of Olif. Yesu sent.d his two following men, 2 said this talk, "Go to the village ahead of you, when you enter it, you will see the animal name donkey tied, which no one has [ever]riden on it, untie it and bring it here. 3 If anyone ask you, 'Why are you.d doing this?' tell him, 'The Lord needs it and will return it quickly."

nama: Fá néngwaneyayénd yinjeyayénd ndonki endén sémta umbéghkaf sésafnefaf. Njam yémofem téferwét, 5 ámb ár tawakayongérwén kété emotangeyayénd, "Némé fémofem yafrot, siyéferét yéné ndonki?" 6 Yémofem ewawangeyayénd ndernáye Yesum engémndeyai, féyo árém engéumieyayénd ndonki résaghét. 7 Njam yémofem yénémnjéménd ndonki Yesuefaf, yémofem tawiwét yéfenjo sáláme ndonki sémsotot, a Yesu yéné tukén nafayoi. 8 Tárfár árém wéi ndenéyameyo tangfiyangotawét yéfenjo sáláme endmé, ámb árém tangfiyangotawét wén njambam endmé árké yémofem tanénfetawét kéghatamé. 9 Fá efe tayotawéng endmé fronde a efe soramé nguwaitotawét ngutnawét, "Áuwégh yém!" "Efe yéném Yurane yétkwénan, frengéghkaf yém!"
bt: They went.d [and] found.d a animal name donkey beside the road tied at a doorway. When they.d untied it, 5 some people standing there asked them, "What are you doing, untying this donkey?" 6 They.d answered how Yesu told them to, and then the people let themtake the donkey away. 7 When they.d brought donkey to Yesu, they threw their clothes to donkey's back, and Yesu sat on it. 8 Many people also became wide their clothes on the road, while other people became wide tree leaves on the road which they had cut in the fields. 9 Those who go first and those who followed shouted, Hosana! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord!"

nama: "Téfene áki Deifidene méngotu yéném, frengéghkaf yém!" "Áuwégh minde tukén!"
bt: Blessed is coming the ruling of God our father Deifid! Hosanna in the highest.

nama: Yesu nénglawai Jerusalemét a néngwanoyéng kétán wáwefnogh méngot. Fá néngretai méinyotio rokarfaf, wénde táf tamorwén efogh nawaindai, fá néngwanoi kétán Betanit 12 waitogh árfé. Fig wén
bt: Yesu entered Jerusale and went to the worshipping house. He looked around everything, but when it was late afternoon, he went to Betani with 12 following men. Yesu sweeps the worshipping house

nama: Ámb efghon yémofem Betani yéfrangoyénd, Yesu témorwén siogh. 13 Nayuta yéngwinjoi árau fig wénfaf néngwanoi ménát ndené mbwefé kar témorwén. Fá njam kaka néngaflai, mé árauro ewinjoi ménamén yau wérwér nawerai fig wénoe afoghét. 14 Féyo yénémamén fá norayai kétán fig wénfaf, "Emo yau fifi so yéngnete mbwe fe tambén wéikor." Yánjo waitogh árém fá yiyárayénd wafalngogh sian. Yesum tésámbunau wáwefnogh méngo
bt: The next day they were leaving Betani, Yesu was hungry. 13 From the distance he saw bread fruit leaf he went to find out whether it was fruit. When he came close it, he saw only leaves because the season was not straight season to bear friut. 14 Then he said to the bread fruit, "No one will eat fruit from you again." His following men heard him say curse talk.

nama: Fá njam néngufaryéng Jerusalemét, Yesu nénglawayéng wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a wifarégh ewafngoi fá emofem tatérnawét rokar kété. Yémon tangwengotau mani térarégh kitaré a árfene ámnjogh rokar, 16 a fá yau taumyotau ár rokar résaghét wáwefnogh méngo sifayat. 17 Fá norayai, "Buk si noraye, 'Tane méngo so yémndetat Ngánjánafé orayégh méngo méinyotio yuwon.' Wénde fémofem yiyátongi oro téfnárane átnogh méngo."
bt: When he arrived Jerusalem, Yesu went into the worshipping house area and chased those who were selling things there, He overturned money tables and the branch of pigions, 16 and did not allowed them to sell in worshipping house area. 17 He said , "The scriptures say: ' My house will be called a house of talking with God for all nations'? But you made it robbers' hiding place."

nama: Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a nák watamegh ár náyárayénd yénémamén end ronjagh ewafngoyénd Yesue ngiot. Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a nák watamegh ár férfér nufngoyénd Yesuenemén, ménamén méinyotio ár mérén tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan.
bt: The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and teaching men of the law heard about this and began looking for the way to kill Yesu, for they began to feel afraid about him, because the whole crowd was surprised at his teaching.

nama: Njam férégh yénmafngoi Yesu a yáne waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tesenot. Watameghyam fig wénmén
bt: When evening came, Yesu and his disciples went to the city. The withered bread fruit

nama: Tándái akwan táf fá néngwanoyénd endmé tangmorwéng, yémofem yinjoyénd fig wén uruyaghare kétándmayo tuk a sérémb. 21 Fité táf nawafarotayéng a norayai Yesuefaf, "Watamegh ár, kéreta! Yéné fig wén fémon siyafalngoi té kér tém!"
bt: In the early morning, when they were going on the street, they saw the bread fruit dried from the top to the root. 21 Fitè remembered and said to Yesu, "Teacher, look! This bread fruit you cursed has withered!"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Ndimbal mwighé a ewam Ngánján kénjún! 23 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efaloe, njam ámb árom témndangé yéné mband tunakéf, 'Kuwano, ngauwar fém arakafot' a tikéf déudéu yau yém wénde efalo yiyátote yéné fá némé noraye so wafroghan yém, so nufrote yáfaf. 24 Yénémaménnde yéndon emndetan némndafiot fém njam kómnendangi Ngánjánafé oraighan, efalo tiyátongi nde fémofem té yanangi a féfe so tawaramanga némat fém nómnendangi. 25-26\~ A njam némakai Ngánjánafé oraighan, fémon njam yereta némndafi yáne emafé nasnanét, fronde kémawalindangé yéfene yaufiyam, ménát Ferafam njafaran so kémawalindangé fene yaufiyam." Ámogh ménamén Yesuene si muyamén
bt: "Have big mind(faith) in God," Yesu answered. 23 "I tell you the truth, if anyone order this mountain, 'Go, throw yourself into the sea,' and do not doubt in your heart but truly approves(believes) what you say, it will be done for him. 24 Therefore I tell you, if you ask in my name in talking with God, truly approve(believe) that you have received it, and it will be done for you. 25-26\~ And when you stand talking with God, you have something against your brother, wash him, so that your Father in heaven wash your sin. The quesion about Yesu' authority.

nama: Fá nénufaryénd wéikor Jerusalem kénjút, a njamandio Yesu karendau wáwefnogh méngo sifayamé, ghéngén wárogh sénko ár, nák watamegh ár a limánégh ár nénufaryénd yáfaf. 28 Fá namotayénd, "Endene yétkwénan fémon tawifne mani térarégh ár wáwefnogh méngota? Emo fe yéné si muyé némaram?"
bt: They arrived again in Jerusalem, and while Yesu was walking in the worshipping house area, the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests), the teaching men of the law and the head people came to him. 28 "What authority are you doing these things?" they asked. " Who gave you this authority to speak?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon fém so tamotangén ámbiro ámogh si. Kwawangongi ta, a yéndon so tawaufron féfe némé si muyayan yéndon yéné yam ewaufrotan. 30 Jonene walitogh árkamé yénmormén njafarta o árta? Ta kwaufrongi!"
bt: Yesu answered, "I will ask you one question. Answer me, and I will tell you [by]what authority I am doing these things. 30 Jon's baptism from heaven or from men? Tell me!

nama: Yémofem éwighét yiyátoyénd yéfe kénjúnro, a korayangi, "Njam yénd korayangém nde, 'Kétándmé njafarta' yémon so ténmotangé, 'Féyo némamén wét yau fémofem efalo yiyátongi Jon?' 32 Wénde yénd yau so korayangém árfene sáfrére, 'Kétándmé árta.'" Yémofem ár férférafé tafandawét ménamén méinyotio ár kemnawét ndené Jon fété témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
bt: They discussed it among themselves and said, "If we say, 'From heaven,' he will ask, 'Then why didn't you truly approve(believe) him?' 32 But if we say that, 'From men'(They feared the people, because every people held that Jon was true God's man who make know(prophet).)

nama: Féyo yémofem yawangoyénd Yesue, "Yénd mafina yéném." Yesu norayai, "Yéndon yau so tawaufron némé si muyayan yéndon ewafrotan yéné yam."
bt: So they answered Yesu, "We don't know." Yesu said, "I will not tell you by what authority I am doing these things."

nama: Féyo yémon yérnyayéng si yéfe rengerengeye, "Ámb árom yeitam géreif mbwe ménj ndau yurnam, yékw yétanam ménát mbwe tumángéghét wékwér étorghét. A ghékéf fayogh kitaré yérametam. Féyo yémon yéramai watmé géreif mbwe ménj ndau kétán ndau téfnárfefaf a fá néngwanoyéng nayu yuwot. 2 Arnogh efogh njam nawerai ámb ásáfogh ár yáfáretam ndau téfnárfefaf ámb mbwe kafghét géreif mbwe ménj ndaufaf. 3 Wénde yémofem yerayénd fá, tésmetawét a yéngwatembayénd némayafé ámb yau. 4 Féyo yémon ámb ásáfogh ár yáfáretam, yémofem wéi yétiaryénd sénkoyan wáiwáiafé yam yafrotaménd. 5 Yémon nambiomén kor yáfáretam, krot yésmetaménd. Yémon tárfáryo mé tawáfáretau, ámb tásmétawét kalot, ámb krot.
bt: Then he began to speak to them in parables: "A man planted a grape fruit vine garden and made fence around it, dug a hole for alcoholpress and built a watchtower. Then he rented the grape fruit vine garden to the farmers and he started his journey 2 At harvest time he sent a without.payment working man(servant) to the farmer to collect some of the fruit from grape fruit vine garden. 3 But they caught him, beat him and sent him away with nothing. 4 Then he sent another without.payment working man(servant); they beat on the head and treated him shamefully. 5 He sent another third man, they killed him. He continued to send some more other people; some of them they beat, other people they killed.

nama: 'Yémon yéfrangoi ámbiro watembghét, ambum efe yémon minde tuwetau. Soraméfifi yémon fá yáfáretam yéné siafé, 'Yémofem so yutémndat tane ambum.'
bt: "He left one to send, a son who he love so much. At last he sent him with this talk, 'They will respect my son.'

nama: Wénde ndau téfnár norayayénd kété yéfe kénjúnro, 'Yéné siyém yárefane sifayé résagh ár ambum. Kénaflangi so yésmetam krotio ménát yéné ndau so kamndangé téfene.' 8 Féyo yémofem yerayénd a yésmetaménd krotio a yitaménd géreif mbwe ménj ndau tambén.
bt: "But farmers said to themselves, "This is the heir of owner. Come, let's kill him, this garden will become ours. 8 So they held him and killed him and threw him out of the grape fruit vine garden.

nama: Némé so wét géreif mbwe ménj ndau yuram yafrote? Fá so kénwanongé a esmeta yéné ndau téfnár a géreif mbwe ménj ndau so tawaramangé ámb árfeyot. 10 Té fémofem yéné Buk si yaftaménd nde, "Sérasér yékenayénd méngo ramégh árém soramé namndayéng néndkéf sérasér.
bt: "What will the owner of the grape fruit vine garden do? He will come and killed this farmers and give this grape fruit vine garden to other people. 10 Haven't you read this God's talk written like this, the stone the builder rejected and became the capstone,

nama: Yuram yéné yafrotaméng, merfifi téfene ghékfan?""
bt: The Lord did it and how good it is in our eyes?

nama: Féyo Ju sénko téfnáram end taronjawét yá werghét, ménamén fá mat náyátoyénd fá korayau yéné rengerengeye yéfenemén. Wénde fá férféram tafindau ár mérénafenemén. Féyo yénémamén yémofem yéfrangoyénd a néngwanoyénd. Mani kémégh kétán Kaisare
bt: Then jewish head men looked for a way to arrest him, because they knew he told the parable about them. But they were afraid of the crowd; so they left him and went away. Paying tax to Rom high ruling man Kaisar

nama: Soramayo limánégh téfnáram engwáfáretaménd ámb Farasi ár a Erodene ár kétán Yesuefaf ménát werghét yánjo sian. 14 Fá nénaflayénd kétán yáfaf a norayayénd, "Watamegh ár, yénd mat yéném fém sném efalo si afrogh ár. Fém yau árém kénwendangi efe fém ném, wénde fémon ewatamete efalo si, némé Ngánjánene ménde yém árét. Ténmaufro mbarkánd yém Kaisare mani kémghét o yau? 15 Yéndfem so ekmetam o yau?"
bt: Later they sent some Farisi men and Erod's men to Yesu to catch him in his talks. 14 They came to him and said, "Teacher, we know you are honest man. You are not caring people, because what they think who they are; but you teach them the truth, what God's purpose for the people. Tell us, it is straight to pay taxes to Rom tukèn warsagh ár Roman Emperor Kaisar or not? 15 Will we pay or not?

nama: Yémofem yénmawanayénd mani mbwe a yémon emotayéng fá, "Endene sáf yéné yém? A endene yétkwén yém?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kaisarene."
bt: They brought the money and he asked them,, "Whose face is this? And whose name is?" "Rom high ruling man Kaisar's," they answered.

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Kaisare taramangi némé yáne yém a Ngánjáne taramangi némé yáne yém." A fá emormén sélngwél yánemén. Awerégh kérta anoghan
bt: Then Yesu said to them, "Give to Rom high ruling man Kaisar what is Rom high ruling man Kaisar's and Give to God what belongs to." And they were surprised of him. Marriage at the rising

nama: Féyo Saduki ár, efe norayat ndené kété yau anogh yém enmormén yéné ámoghafé yáfaf. 19 Fá korayangi, "Watamegh ár, Mosesém yéfarotam nák téfeyot ndené njam yángnoene ané kér yém a tatembangé amaf wénde ambumofnar, yánngnom fété so kwiré tékayongé a ambum eunjeta yanai. 20 Kété tamorwén sefen ambum fronde sénkom nawerai a kér yémormén ambumofnar. 21 Yénamayo kwiré nawerai, wénde fá ndenéyameyo kér yémormén, yéfrangoyéng ambumofnar. Nambiomén ndenéyameyo yémormén. 22 Féyo yéné sefenam ambum yau efrangoyénd kéran. Soramé amaf kér yémormén. 23 Kérta anoghan endene amaf so yém, ménamén yéné sefenam yéta naweretaménd?"
bt: Then the Saduki men, who talk there is no rising, came with a question to him. 19 "Teacher," they said, "Moses wrote for us that if a small brother's brother dies and leaves a wife but no children, small brother got married to the widow and produce children for his big brother. 20 There were 7 brothers. The first brother married and died with children. 21 The second married the widow, but he also died, leaving no child. The third was same way. 22 Then the 7 left no children. Later the woman died. 23 At the rising whose wife will she be, because the 7 were married to her?

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng, "Fém sem norsotati ménamén fém kérté em Ngánjánene si a wafté? 25 Njam kér ár nganongé ghérsat. Fá yau so naweretat a fá ndené so néretat njafar si résagh árnit njafaran. 26 Kér téfnárafene anoghmén, fémofem té yaftaménd Mosesene bukan afrogh sian? Ngánján norayam yáfaf, 'Ebraam, Aisek a Jeikof yémofem sénonjo tayot wáwefnotat.' 27 Ngánján siyém ghérsé árfene Ngánján yau kér árfene Ngánján ménamén Ngánjánam efande méinyotio ár, efe naketat sénonjo a efe kér té enmormén. Fém srem norsotati kérta anogh árfenemén!" Ndimbal nák
bt: Yesu answered, "Are you still confused in mind because you don't know the Book and the power of God? 25 When the dead people rise, they will not marry and they will be like the men carrying heavenly message(angels) in heaven. 26 Because(about) the dead people rising-did you not read in the book of Moses, in burning the bush, how God said to him, 'I am the God of Ebraam, the God of Aisak, and the God of Yakof'? 27 He is not the God of the dead people, but the God of the living people. You don't know totally! The big commandment

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár yénmormén áyárghét fá warunyéghan tamorwén. Ndené kémnawét nde Yesum mer wawangogh kar so tawaramangai yéfe, yémon yémotai Yesu, "Árké Mosesene nák minde ndimbalfifi em?"
bt: One of the teaching men of the law came to hear them debating. He thought that Yesu gave them a good answer, he asked Yesu, "Which commandment is the most important?"

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Minde ndimbalfifi nák siyém, káyárangi, Israil, Yuré téfene Ngánján, Yuré siyém ámbiro. 30 Yuweta fene Yuré Ngánján méinyotio fene tikfe, méinyotio fene mbérmbére, méinyotio fene mwighaye a méinyotio fene muyaye.' 31 Yénamayomén nák siyém, 'Yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fémyo ndernáye náuwéte.' Ánde ámb yau ndené yéné ndimbal nák ere."
bt: "The most important is it," Yesu answered, "Hear Israil, the Lord ot God, the Lord is one. 30 Love the Lord your God with your all heart, all your soul, all your mind and all your strength.' 31 The second commandment is, "Love your neighbor as you love yourself.' There is no other commandment like this two."

nama: Yéné árom yawangoyéng, "Mer noraye, watamegh ár, fémon mbarkándaye noraye ndené Ngánján siyém ámbiro kété siyém ámb yau efe yém wénde fáro. 33 Ménát sái yuweta fá méinyotio fene tikfe, méinyotio fene mwighaye kwayaghaye, méinyotio muyaye a sái yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fémyo, yéné uwégham ewainde méinyotio ramégh rokar a ghéngénghéngén yam."
bt: "Good said, teaching man," this man answered, "You are straight to say that God is only one and there is no one like him. 33 To love him with all your heart and with all your mind and with all your strength and love your neighbor as yourself, this love surpasses all offering and sacrifices.

nama: Njam Yesum téfandawang ndené yémon kwayaghaye tawawangotawéng merkéráye, fá norayai yáfaf, "Fém sném yau nayu ném kétándmé Ngánjánene limánéghta." Yéné soramé emo yau ámogh si yaramai férfér tamorwén. Endene ákimén Keriso Ngánjánene uyafoghmén ár yém
bt: When Yesu saw that he answered very clearly, he said to him, "You are not far from the ruling of God." After that no one ask him questions. Whose son is Keriso

nama: Njam Yesuf wáwefnogh méngo sifayan témorwén, yémo emotai, "Nák watamegh árém norayat ndené Keriso Ngánjánene uyafoghmén ár siyém Deifidene ákimén. Ndernáye fá norayat? 36 Ménamén Ngánján Mbérmbéram télimndau Deifid fáyo yéné siot, "Yuré noraye kétán tane Yurafaf, "Kámnjo yénandmé tane tambénta kétánotio yéndon fene mékw téfnár tákman fene kafkaf mbanmbanan."
bt: When Yesu was in the worshipping house area, Yesu asked, "How is that the teaching men of the law say that the Keriso is the descendant of Deifid? 36 Deifid himself said, the God Spirit made him to speak this talk, The Lord said to my Lord; Sit at my right until I put your enemies under your feet."

nama: Deifidém njam yémndeta Keriso yáne Yuré, ndernáye so Keriso yém yáne ambum? Ndimbal mérén náyáretaménd yáfaf méndefé. Yesum mat táyátotau ár nák watamegh árfenemén
bt: Deifid himself calls him 'Lord.' How he can be his descestant?" The large crowd heard him with joy.

nama: Njam yémon tawatametau, Yesu norayai, "Mwighé sénté nák watamegh árfenemén. Yéfene méndefé yém tombé sálámefé sái narendat, árém sái áuwégh ewarametat marat sifayan yéfeyot, 39 a yémofem ewafenat ndimbal árfene sifayé áumengégh méngo kénjún a ndenéyameyo árém ewáfrendat yéfe mer sifayé téméndfaf. 40 Wénde yémofem unyéghe kwirafene méngo rokar ewarsat. Tombé Ngánjánefaf orayégh si norayat ménát árém so efandat. Ndené árfene tékrat siyém minde tukén soramé yuwon Ngánjáneta." Kwirane ramégh
bt: Whe he taught them, Yesu said, "Be careful about the teaching men of the law. They like walk with long clothes and give a greeting in the public place, 39 and they chooses the best seats in the Yesu's family(church) and same way respected in the feasting place. 40 They take good things from widow's and steal from their house. Also say long talking with God. Like this people' s pain is too big(severely). The widow's offering

nama: Yesu námnjoi kaka sifayan ánde ramégh rokar takmetawét Ngánjáneyot a tafandau ár mérnam tawitawét yéfenjo mani kémégh téruot. Tárfár wemár árém takmetawét ndimbal mani yétkwén. 42 Wénde yauyau kwiré yénmormén ekmeyai sómbio mani mbwero.
bt: Yesu sat down close place where they were putting the offering and he watched the crowd putting ther money into the offering basket. Many rich people put a large amount of money. 42 But a poor widow came and put in only two coins.

nama: Yesum emotai yánjo waitogh ár, fá norayai, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, yauyau kwiram ewaindai méinyotio ár a yaramai ndimbal mani Ngánjáne. 44 Wemár árém takmetawét némbnare wénde yéfene mé tawamorwén tárfár, wénde yéné yauyau kwiram kétándmé áronjaghta ekmeyai méinyotio, yauyau kwirane némé tamorwén ghérsé ámnjoghét yéné eufeyai."
bt: He called his following men to him, Yes said, "I tell you the truth, this poor widow surpassed all the people and gave big money to God. 44 They all gave out of their riches which they live, but this poor widow gave everything from poverty, all what poor widow live on finished those [money].

nama: Njamandio Yesum yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo, ámb yáne waitogh árom norayai, "Watamegh ár, Kéreta! Némé ndimbal wíman méngo etnong!"
bt: As Yesu was leaving the worshipping house, one of his following men said to him, "Teacher, look what very big stones are these! What wonderful solid buildings are these!

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Té fémon téfande yéné ndimbal méngo? Yau so ámb wím efai ámb wíman, méinyotio so nironat."
bt: "Do you see these big buildings? Yesu answered. "Not one stone here will be left, everything will threw down.'

nama: Njam Yesu témorwén Olif Mband tunakfan witmé karéf kété wáwefnogh méngota, Fité, Jems, Jon a Endru yémotayénd, 4 "Ténmaufro njam yéné yam so ufroghan em wáwefnogh méngofaf? A némé yamam so ténmaufrongé ndené kaka méinyotio ufroghétro em?"
bt: When Yesu was on the Mountain of Olif opposite the worshipping house, Fitè, Jems and Endru asked him secretly, 4 "Tell us, when these things will be happen? And what will be the surprising thing that will be happening?

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Mwighé sénté ámb árom yau so ewarsoté fém. 6 Tárfár ár so eném tane yétkwénan so norayat, "Yénd wém Ngánjánene wafaréghmén ár," a so tárfáryo ewarsotat. 7 Njam fém náyáretati mékmén a ndenáyo so néngafrotat mékmén, yau táf férfér em. Yéné yam fété so nufrotat, wénde yénayoene yátogh yam mé yéném. 8 Ámb yu so kokayongé ámb yuafé ásméghét a ndenéyameyo ámb ndimbal yu so kokayongé ámb ndimbal yuafé ásméghét. Kété so em sokrere fénaté yuwomé a káukáu. Yéné yam sem ndenanit fronde tékrat ambum áráfghan.
bt: Yesu said to them: "Be careful no one will deceive you. 6 Many people will come my name with this talk, "I am he," and will receive many. 7 When you hear of wars and same way saying about wars, don't be confused. These things must happen, but the end is not yet to come. 8 Nation will fight against nation, and same way big area(kingdom) will fight against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in every places, and famines. These surprising thing are like the beginning of birth.

nama: Fém fété so fémyo nawarawene. Fém so kénramangi méngotu sénko téfnárafefaf a efmotat áumengégh méngo kénjún, fém so némakai tesen sénko ár a warsagh árfene sáfrére tane mer si téfnan. 10 Fronde yéné mer si so fété nafrotat méinyotio yuwomé soramé mbandoene yatogh. 11 Fém njam kémerangi moghét, yau táf mwighé néwérsotat némé si orayéghét. Mé koraya némé Ngánjánam kémramangé feyot yéné efghon, ménamén fém yau yéné noraye, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbér.
bt: "You must be on your guard. You will hand over to the village head men and you will be whitted in the Yesu's family(church), On acount of me you will be stand before head men of the city and ruling men(kings) because of my talk. 10 The good talk first will be preached to the whole world. 11 When you are held to asked [in the court], do not be trouble what to say. Just say what they give you at that time, because it is not you speaking, but the God Spirit.

nama: Yanafem sén so yangnof taramangi krot, a yéferafafem sén so yéfe ambumof taramangi. Ambum so kénawengongi yéferafafefaf ménát krot so tákmangi. 13 Méinyotio árém so méndméndafé néfandat ménamén tanemén, wénde fá efe taikrataye yakai kétánotio yatoghfaf fá so kawanjarngé.
bt: Elder brother will give teeth(betray) his young brother to death, and a father his child. Children will come against his parents to put them to death. 13 All men will hate you because of me, but he who stand firm to the end will be saved.

nama: Fémofem so tinjongi minde mámáfi yam árké yamam so yaghne sifayé, so yiyangé nák sifayan. Wafégh ár mat fété so em. Yéné efghon Judian efe em fá fété so nérsat mband tunakfot. 15 Efe yánjo méngo sémsotan njam yéfai yau táf kéworngi yuwot méngo kénjút rokar utorghét, wénde kengongi. 16 Efe ndawan em yau táf kangongi fenjo sálámeyot, wénde kengongi. 17 Yéné efghon nderé mámáfiyafé so yém ambum suafé amafafet a mbrake amafafet! 18 Orayégh Ngánjánefaf yéné yam yau so nufrote mindefifi yunjéf néndkfan. 19 Ménamén yéné efogh so yém minde mámáfi féyotarofnaye. Kétándmé ufroghan njam Ngánjánam yafrotam mband, sénonjo a kétánotio soramé ndené mámáfi yam yau kor so nufrote. 20 Njam Yuram efogh yau ténfangai ndémbndémb, efe yau so naketat. Wénde ménamén fá nemne yáne waferégh ármén, yémon kwéf enfetaméng ténjfi. 21 Yéné kwéfon ámb árém njam korayangé fefaf, "Kéreta, Keriso siyém!" o "Kéreta, fá kés yém! Yau táf efalo eyátotati." 22 Yénémamén Keriso yétkwénan tárfár unyégh ár so eném. Ndenéyameyo Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene yétkwénan tárfár unyégh ár so eném. Fá so nofarnat unyégh ásáfogh yéngufarotat a sélngwélafé unyégh ásáfogh so ewafrotat ménát yáne ár yénéménaye so ewarsotat Ngánjánene wafaréghkaf efe em, táf téu nufrota. 23 Yénémamén fém so nawarawenati. Fronde yéndon té enwaufrotamén soramé yam so nufrotat.
bt: When you see what you doesn't want which will make you frighten will stand where should not be, those who undertand talk-then those who are in Judia run to the mountains. 15 Anyone who is on the house's roof must not come down to take out his things from the house. 16 Those are in the garden must not come back to get his clothes. 17 In those days how terrible will be for those pregnant mother and delivering mother! 18 Talk with God that this will not happen in the very cold season(winter), 19 because that day will be terrible from the beginning God created the world. nowadays this will not happen again. 20 If the Lord had not cut short days, no one will live(survive). But for the sake of the elect, whom he has chosen, he has cut short days. 21 At that day when some one say to you, "Look, Kereso is here!', or 'Look, there he is!' don't truly approve(believe) it. 22 Because many false God's people who make know(prophets) will come in the name of Keriso and same way many false God's people who make know(prophets) will come the name of God's man who make know(prophet) and will perform false special workings(miracles) to deceive the elect if it is possible. 23 That is why be on your guard what I taught you before.

nama: Wénde tékrat kwéf soramé efghon, 'Efogh so yém kwéfkwéf, a ghéraream yau so yéramete kwayaghé,
bt: But this trouble dau, 'the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give [its ]light;

nama: kénd so nénatarnat kétándmé njafarta, a njafar fifi so nasámbnetat.'
bt: the stars will fall down from the sky, and heavenly bodies will be shaken.

nama: Yéné kwéfon árém so tinjongi Ároene Ambum, fá so yéném njafar kwamkwam kénjún ménáyafé ndimbal waftafé a njafarmén mer sáfafé. 27 A yémon so yánjo njafar si résagh ár tawafarnangé a yánjo waferégh ár wumengéghét kétándmé 4 mband kwéndkwénd tambén a kétánotio yéné mband min yatoghfaf kétán njafaroene mband min yatoghfaf.
bt: At that day men will see the Son of Man coming in clouds with big power and big light(glory). 27 And he will send his men carrying heavenly message(angels) and gather his elect from 4 corners of the world and from the ends of the earths and to the ends of the heavens.

nama: Tanang matyam fig wénta. Njamandio wén árau natarnat a mbambam éwiwogh kufngongi fém mat kamndang ndené efogh yu kaka yém. 29 Njam fémofem efandati yéné tékrát yam ufroghan, fém mat so kamndangi tane angogh siyém kaka yém, mé fétfétan. 30 Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan, fronde méinyotio yam so nufrotat soramé yéné ámb ár mérén so kefongi. 31 Njafar a mband so kefend wénde tane si yau so kefongongé. Efe ámb yau mat yém soramé efoghmén
bt: Learn from this breadfruit tree: As soon as you see the dried leaves falling and new shoot growing that dried season is near. 29 When you see this things have happened, you will know that end is near. 30 I tell you the truth, this generation {h{ ...f* {h{13.30 generation how will seperate to crowd< question

nama: Efe ámb yau mat yém tane angogh efoghmén, yau njafar si résagh ár, yau Ambum, wénde mé Afaro. 33 Kor aem! Oyarghafé! Fém mafina em njam yéné kwéf so kawerangé. 34 Ndenanit yém ár ándan yénau kuwanongé. Fronde yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár engékmai wanjengét ámbiroámbiro yéfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár fáro, a ámb yémndai méngo sésafne wanjengét, kor aem ghékéf sénté, soramé yémon yánjo méngo yéngéfrangoi.
bt: "No one knows about day or hour, not the agels, not the Son, but only the Father. 33 Be on guard! Be alert! You do not know when that day will come. 34 It is like a man going to another place . He leaves his house and put without.payment working man(servant) in charge of the house, one by one to perform their duties, and tells one to look after the gate to be alert.

nama: Yénémaménnde kor aem ghékéf sénté ménamén fém mafina em njam méngo yuré so nénangote féréghan, sémbár néndkéfan o njam ghakér kowi kutnangé, o akwan. 36 Fá njam kufarngé sélngwéle, yau táf kéminjongé kémghan. 37 Némé yénd norayan féfefaf, yénd norayan méinyotio árfefaf: Kor aem ghékéf sénté!"
bt: Therefore watch because you don't know when the owner of the house will come back-in the evening, at midnight or when the rooster crows, or morning. 36 If he arrives in surprise, do not [let] him find you sleeping. 37 What I say to you, I say to every people: 'Watch!'"

nama: Njamandio fá témorangérwén Betanin, Yesum njamke tánetau Saimonene méngon efe yaufi ghéngan enjnefé témorwén. Amafom yénérsam a yétiaryéng minde tukén manimén wékwér ndarambafé Yesu yasuryéng sénkoyan.
bt: While he was staying in Betani, Yesu ate food in Saimon's house who had leprocy on the skin, a woman brought special smelling liquid and poured on the head of Yesu.

nama: Ámb ár káwatarnawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Némamén yéné amafom minde tukén manimén wékwér taghne? 5 Yémon miya 10,000 kinat tétérnangai a tawaramangai yauyau árétǃ" Yémofem yarnayénd amaf.
bt: This woman made some people angry so people started making fun of her in themselves, "Why this woman waste of special smelling liquid? 5 It could have sold for more than 300 silver coin{j{ ...f* {j{14.5 This money is year slary for work man, it's about 10,000 Kina. I put put note. and [the money] give to the poor." They said bad talk to this woman.

nama: Wénde Yesum emndai, "Téfrangongiǃ Némamén mwighayam ewawérsote yánemén? Yémon yéné yam tafrote tafaf minde merfifi. 7 Yauyau árfé fém túmén so em a ewáutánati ámb efghon njam fém ménde em. Wénde yénd fémafé yau so túmén yéném. 8 Yémon yéné mer tafrote frondeyo wasurégh tane fifiyan mer wimafé wékwre tane kér yéfrenda. 9 Yéndon efalo emndetan, méinyotio sifayamé mband maratan árkamé téu árém néngafrotat mer si, yémofem so nafrotat némé amafom tafrote a so yéngwawafarotat yáne ásáfogh." Judas néngwanoi Yesue sénot
bt: But Yesu said, "leave her, why are you dulting her? She had done this very good things to me. 7 The poor will always be with you and help them. But I will not be with always. 8 She did this good [thing] first to pour special smelling liquid on my body to prepare for my dead. 9 I tell you the truth, wherever the good talk is preached throughout the world, what she has done will be told to remember her thing."

nama: Judas Iskariot, ámb témorwén Yesuene 12 waitogh ár, fá nuwanoi limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf si frengéghét Yesue sénot. 11 Fá náuwetaménd yéné sian a yémofem efalo yiyátoyénd mani ramghét Judase. Féyo Judasém end táronjau Yesue ramghét. Yesuene ambinomén njamke
bt: Judas Iskariot, one of the 12 following men, he went to the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) to give teeth(betray) Yesu [to them.] 11 They were happy in this talk and agreed to give him money. So Judas is looking for a way to arrest Yesu. Yesu's last supper

nama: Fronde efghon Minaghofnar flawé téméndmén, árké efghon túmén tásmétawét Waingégh sif tosé. Yesuene waitogh árém yémotayénd, "Yesu, ándan fene ménde yém yéndfem sái yéfrendam feyot Waingégh téménd njamke?"
bt: On the first day of the Feast of unleavened biskar, which it was customary to sacrife the Passover lamb, Yesu's following men asked him, "Yesu, where do yo want us to prepare for you Passover meal?

nama: Yesum emndeyai yáne sómbio waitogh ár, "Kuwanend tesenot, ár so téfangend endén nu ndarambafé. Táf téngwaitend. 14 Njam fá kélawangé méngot, méngo yuré témndend, 'Téfene watamegh ár ménde yém. Ánde yém tane wan ároene méngo saté, ánde yéndon so enetan Waingégh njamke tane waitogh árfé?' 15 Yuram so tawauyafe féfe ndimbal méngo saté, méinyotio teghkaf árké yém. Fémofem táf njamke yefrengéghét kété."
bt: Yesu said two of his following men, "Go into the city, and you will meet a man carring a jar of water. follow them. 14 When he goes into the house, tell the house owner, 'Our Teacher wants: Where is my guest room, where I will eat the Passover meal with my following men? 15 The owner will show you bigh room, all furnished. make prepation might be there."

nama: Fá néwaneyayénd rokar ewinjeyayénd ndenáye fété Yesum ndernáye tamndéwéng. Féyo yémofem yéfrengménd Waingégh njamke.
bt: They went.d and saw.d everything just as Yesu said. So they prepared.d the Passover meal.

nama: Férégh njam namndai, Yesuf nufaryénd yánjo 12 árfé. 18 Njam yémofem njamke tánetawét, Yesum emndai, "Yéndon efalo emndetan, ámbiro ár yéna yém emo so sén wéramete yénd, yéné ár emafé yéndfé enwam njamke."
bt: When evening came, Yesu arrived with his 12 people. 18 When they were eating food, Yesu said, "I tell you the truth, one [of you] is here who will give teeth(betray) me-this man who is eating with me."

nama: Yéné siam eméindai waitogh ár mámé mwighat a fénatayero kawafenawét Yesuefaf, "Yénd yau?"
bt: This talk made the following men to worry, and one by one explain to Yesu, "Not me?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéna fété yém ámb 12 ármén emafé yéndfé enwam ámbiro merekinan. 21 Ároene Ambum kér so yém ndernáye yéfrotaménd Buk si yánemén. Wénde nderé mámáfi yém yéné ároe emo sén yéramete. Mer so témorwén fá yau fiya káráftau."
bt: Yes answered, "This is one of the 12 who are eating in one plate. 21 The Son of Man will die in God's will, but how terrible is that man who give teeth(betray) him. It would be better for him not to be burn."

nama: Njamandio yémofem tánetawét, Yesum féskaf flawé yérai, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a tawatfotau, a waitogh árfét tawarametau a norayai, "Ténetangi, yéné siyém tane fifi."
bt: While they were eating, Yesu took biskar, gave thank to God and broke it, and gave it to his following men and said, "Eat it, this is my body."

nama: Féyo yémon yérai kafusi, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a ewaramai yéfe a méinyotio árém nu enetaménd.
bt: Then he held the cup, gave thanks to God and gave it them and they all drank it.

nama: Yesum emndai, "Yéné siyém tane férék árké nertam tárfár árét. Ngánjánam si yéfrendai a yétetai tane férke. 25 Yéndon efalo emndetan fém, yéndon yaufifi so enetan yéné wéri nu kétánotio efogh kawerangé táf yéndon so ténetangén totér wéri nu Ngánjánene limánéghan."
bt: Yesu said, "This is my blood which is poured for many people, which we have agreed with Father. 25 "I tell you the truth, I will not drink this alcohol until the day when I will drink new alcohol in the kingdom of God."

nama: Táf yémofem Ngánjáneyot wagh eufaryénd a nuwanoyénd Olif Mband tunakfot. Yesu norayai Fitane kenaghmén
bt: When they sung a song and went to the Mount of Olif. Yesu said about Fitè's denial

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Méinyotio fém so kengongi a kwéfrangongi yéndro. Buk siam noraye, "Yéndon so tésmangén wanjengégh ár, táf sif so kófárnangi.' 28 Wénde yéné soramé yénd njam kanongén, yénd féfe frondeta so wéngém Galili yuwot."
bt: Yesu said to his following men, "All of you will deny me, how God's talk say' " 'I will kill the watching man, the sheep will be scattered.'

nama: Fité norayai, "Ámb árém njam fém kénéfrangongi, yéndon yaufifi so kénéfrangonǃ"
bt: Fitè said, "[even]If other people deny,, I will not deny!"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon efalo némndetan, sénonjo sémbáran, fém so koraya nambinotmé, 'Yénd mafina wém fá,' soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sómbinotma."
bt: Yesu answered, "Today in the night before the rooster crows two times, you will say three times that, 'I don't know him.'"

nama: Wénde Fitam mé ménjtaye korayau, "Yénd fémafé kér so yénre, yéndon yau so korayangén, Yénd mafina wém fémǃ" Ámb árém ndené sáfotio si korayawét. Yesu oraighan Getsemanin
bt: But Fitè kept saying that, "I will die with you, I will not say, I don't know you!" Other people say the same. Getsemane

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár nuwanoyénd yu yétkwén Getsemane. Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Kámnjongi yéna njamandio yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam." 33 Yesum ewasroi Fité, Jems a Jon yémafé álighét, a tikfan yáyárai ndené kértat nélawétan. 34 Yesum emndai fá, "Tane tikfan ghérghérsisé yém mindefifi wétumnde. Kámnjongi yéna a néretati."
bt: Yesu and his following men went place name Getsemane. Yesu said his following men, "Sit here while I talk with God." 33 Yesu took Fitè, Jems and Jon along with him, and he felt in his heart that I went into suffering. 34 "My soul is in sorrow to the point of death," Yesu said to them, "Sit here and keep watch."

nama: Yesu néngwanoi nayuofnar, fá budme niyai mbandan Ngánjánafé koraiwét. 36 Fá Ngánjánafé koraiwét, "Afé, Afé! Méinyotio yam feyot sem áfrat. Téfnár yéné tékrát tafafta. Wénde tane ménde yau, wénde fene ménde so nufrote."
bt: Yesu went little farther, he knelt down to the ground and talked with God. 36 He talked with God, "Father, Father! Everything is possible for you. Take this suffering from me. But no my will, but your will be done."

nama: Yesu nénangotam yánjo waitogh árfefaf a ewinjoi fá kémghan. Yesum yémndai Fité, "Saimon, némamén fém kémégh nékém? Némamén fém yau nérete ámbiro efoghféneféne yéndfé? 38 Kanongi a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tautfongé. Mbérmbér ménde yém meryam wafroghét, wénde fifi siyém njangén."
bt: Yesu came back to his following men and found them sleeping. Yesu said to Fitè, "Saimon, why are you asleep? Why are you not wake with for one hour? 38 Wake up and talk with God so that you will not fall into temptation. The spirit is willing, bt the body is weak."

nama: Ámbirotaro fá néngaflai Ngánjánafé oraighét yéné siyo tafértau. 40 Wénde njam Yesu kénangotau, yémon wéikor ewinjoi kémghan ménamén ghékéf tamorwén kérté. Fá yau mat tamorwén némé si so tawangongayénd yáyot.
bt: Once more he went and talked with God the same talk repeatly. 40 But when Yesu came back, he found them again sleeping, because their eyes were heavy. They did not know what to say to him.

nama: Njam Yesu nambinotma nénangotam, yémon emndai, "Némé fém mé kémégh ekém a nenati? Féyo tamǃ Efogh té nawer. Kéretangi, Ároene Ambum yaufi árfene ngángat raméghét yafngong. 42 Kokayongiǃ Mato kuwanongémǃ Kéretangi tane sén téfnár snufaneǃ" Yesu yerayénd
bt: When Yesu came back the third time, he told them, "Are you still sleeping and resting? Enough! The hour has come. Look, the Son of Man is given into the hand of sinners. 42 Wake up! Let us go! Look my man who give teeth(betrayer) is arriving. Yesu held

nama: Yesu njam mé korayau, Judas nufaryéng efe témorwén ámbiro kétándmé 12 waitogh ármén. Tárfár árém tanérsawét timé a witmafé sénté naifafé enmormén kétán yáfaf yémofem engwáfáretaménd limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, nák watamegh ár a Ju árfene sénko ár. 44 Judasém wéi mwighé yékmai yéfeyot, fá wéi emndai, "Ár yéndon efe tésnetangén fá fiyém. Yérayénd a yéngémnjoyénd fiyarafene ngángat yéngramayénd." 45 Judas néwanoi mbarkándaye Yesuefaf a yémndai, "Watamegh árǃ" Judasém táf yésnetai, 46 Árém yerayénd a yumbetaménd Yesu. 47 Kété tawakayongérwén ámb ár yá kaka witmafé sénté naifafé yanfai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ároene téngan.
bt: When Yesu was still speaking, Yudas arrived who was one of the Twelve. Many peole brought clubs and stalks, sent from the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests), the teaching men of the law and Ju head people. 44 Judas arranged the way(surprising thing) with them, he also said to them, "The man who I kiss is the one; hold im and held himand hand him over to the hand of a soldiers. 45 Judas went straight to Yesu and said, "Teacher!" and Yudas kissed him. 46 The men held Yesu and tied him. 47 There was a man was stood near with stalk and struck the without.payment working man(servant) of the leading burning sacrifice man, cut his ear.

nama: Yesu norayai ár mérnafefaf, "Némé yénd ámb féfene oro téfnár wém, árkémamén fém taném náifafé a timafé? 49 Méinyotio efghon yénd fémafé ténmorwén wáwefnogh méngon, fémofem yénd yau wérayénd. Wénde Buk si efalo náyáto." 50 Méinyotio Yesuene waitogh árém yéfrangoyénd a néngoyénd.
bt: Yesu said to the crowd, "Am I a robber, that's why you came with stalks and clubs? 49 Every day I was with you in the worshipping house, you did not arrest me. But the Scripture will be fulfilled. 50 All Yesu's following men left him and ran away.

nama: Ámb totér ár kété témorwén emo Yesu táitotau tawongérwén sáláme. Njam totér ár yerayénd sálámeyan, 52 sálámero teretawét fá firo nengoi. Yesu yénémnjoyénd ndimbal árfene sáfrére
bt: One young man was there who followed Yesu wearing a clothe. When Yesu held, 52 he took off clothes, and ran away naked. Yesu brought before the head people

nama: Yémofem yénémnjoyénd Yesu limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf, a méinyotio limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, Ju árfene limánégh ár a nák watamegh ár nénáumendayénd. 54 Fité nayu kéráye mé kénwaitotau, a njam yémon kaka yiyátoi limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene méngo saf, fá nufaryéng a námnjoi ámb wanjengégh árfé Fité fésén kafalau.
bt: They brought Yesu to the leading burning sacrifice man, and the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests), Ju leadrs and the teaching men of the law gathered together. 54 Fitè was coming at some distant, and when he came near to the leading burning sacrifice man' house, he arrived and sat down with other guards and Fitè warmed at the fire.

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a méinyotio Ju sénko árfene áumengégh ár yéta táronjawét ménát Yesum némé yaufi tawafrotau yémofem krot sái tékmangayénd. Wénde efe yau ár yinjoyénd. 56 Tárfár ár enmormén a nufroyénd unyégh si yánemén. Wénde yéfene afrogh si efalo yau yiyátoyénd.
bt: The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and whole counculers(Sandrin) tried to look for Yesu's fault [in order] that they will put him to death. But no one found his fault. 56 Many people came and told lie about him. But their testamony did not agree.

nama: Féyo ámb ár kokayongi a yéné unyégh si norayayénd, 58 "Yéndfem fété yiyáráyém fá korayau yéné sian, 'Yéndon so yironan yéné ár ngángé raméghmén wáwefnogh méngo a nambio efogh soramé yéndon so yérametan ámb, yau so yém ár ngángé raméghmén.'" 59 Wénde yéfene afrogh si efalo yau yiyátoyénd.
bt: Then some people stood up and said this lying talk, 58 "We heard what he said this talk, "I will destroy this hand made worshipping house and in three days will build another one, not like as man made.' 59 But their testamony did not agree.

nama: 'Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár nokayoi árfene sáfrére a yémotai Yesu, "Fém némamén yau noraye féndio awomarogh si? Fémon té eyárete yéné ár kés norayat téfén yénmwitat fefaf? 61 Wénde métar namndai a yau ewawangoi. Wéikor limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai, "Fém ném Keriso? Yéndfem Ngánjáne yáwefnotam. Fém ném Yáne ambum?"
bt: The leading burning sacrifice man stood up before people and asked Yesu, "Why don't you say to defend yourself? Don't you hear this people saying and throwing blame to you? 61 But he kept quiet and did not answered. Again the leading burning sacrifice man asked him, "Are you Keriso, the Son of the Blessed God?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "A, yénd fété wém, tekofnaye fémofem so tinjongi ámnjoghan Ároene Ambum yénd Ngánján wafté tambén ngángata, a so wéném njafar kwamkwam kénjún."
bt: Yesu answered, "Yes, I am, Not long you will see the Son of Man sitting the right hand of the Mighty God, and will come from heaven."

nama: Ghéngén wárogh sénko árom yétiraryéng yánjo sáláme ménamén fá nékw nawerai a norayai, "Yénd méndefnar yéném ámb ghékéf fayogh ár. 64 Fémofem té yiyárangi yémon Ngánjánene sifayé résaghét yafngo! Fém ndernáye nemnati?"
bt: The leading burning sacrifice man tore his clothes and said, "Why do we need [any]more watching men? 64 You have heard dening talk. How do you think?"

nama: Ámb árém Yesu mbérme farángégh yafngoyénd. Yémofem ghékéf yawamoyénd, yesmayénd sáfan a témndetawét, "Emon nésém fém? Korayaǃ" Ámb wanjengégh árém yéngwasroi Yesu ngiot. Fitam yékenayéng Yesu
bt: Some people began to spit Yesu. They covered his eyes and said to him, "Who hit you? Say! Some guards took Yesu and beat him. Fitè denied Yesu

nama: Njamandio Fité mé témorwén méngo sáfan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene ásáfogh mérés yénmormén kétán. 67 Njam yémon yinjoi Fité fésén kafalau, kor téfandau merkéráye, "Fém ámb yéné kénmorwén Yesufé Najaretménǃ"
bt: While Fitè was still in the courtyard, One of without.payment working man(servant) girls of the leading burning sacrifice man came by. 67 When she saw Fitè warming [himself], she came close and recognized Fitè. "You were with Yesu from Najaret(Najarian)," she said.

nama: Wénde Fitam yanyotayéng a yémndai, "Yénd mafina wém némamén fém noraye," a fá néngaflai méngo sáf sésafneta.
bt: But Fitè denied it and said, "I don't know what are you saying," and he went out into the enterance.

nama: Njam ásáfogh mérsom kété yinjoi, yémon emndai kor efe tawakayongérwén, "Yéné ár ámb fiyémǃ" 70 Wéikor Fitam yányotayéng. Tekofnaye efe tawakayongérwén kaka Fitafé yémndayénd Fité, "Fém ámb fété ném. Fém ném Galili yuménǃ"
bt: When the without.payment working man(servant) girl saw him there, she said again to those standing around, "This man is one of them." 70 Again Fitè denied it. Not long those standing near Fitè said to Fitè, "You are one of them. You are Galili region man!"

nama: Féyo Fité norayai, "Yénd soté efalo si norayan! Ngánjánam mété tékrátan kwékmangé táf njam nuindan. Yénd mat yau wém fém endenemén norayatiǃ"
bt: He began to curse on himself by saying, "I don't know this man whom you are talking about!"

nama: Táf fété ghakér kowi nutnam sómbinotma. Féyo Fité nawafarotai Yesuene si némé témndetau fá, "Frondeyo ghakér kowi njam kutnangé sómbinotma, fémon so kwékenang yénd nambinotmé." Táf Fité ye nufngoi.
bt: Immediately the rooster crowed the second time. Then Fitè remembered what Yesu said to him: Before the rooster crows twice, you will deny me three times." Then Fitè began to cry.

nama: Tándái akwan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, Ju árfene sénko ár, nák watamegh ár, a méinyotio áumengégh ár yéfenjo mwighé taufanawét. 'Némé so yafrotam Yesuefaf?' Yémofem yumbetaménd fá, yémnjoyénd, a yéramayénd Failetefaf.
bt: In early morning, the chief burning sacrifice men, Ju head men, the teaching men of the law and whole Ju head men's meetings discussed their plan. What will we do to Yesu? They tied him, led him and handed him to Failet.

nama: Failetém yémotai Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?" Yesum yawangoi, "A yénd fété wém." 3 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém tárfár nékwmendafé si tafayotawét Yesue. 4 Wéikor Failetém yémotai, "Fém so féyotaro kuwango? Té yéfande njénambafé méndméndafé si némafayotat."
bt: Failet asked Yesu, "Are you the ruling man(king) of the Ju people?" Yesu answered, "I am."

nama: Wénde Yesu métar náyátoi uwangofnar, a Failet sélngwélam yafrotam.
bt: But Yesu was still silent without any reply, and Failet was amazed.

nama: Waingégh témndan gafana téngmorwén yunjfero kwéfkwéf méngo ár utorghét ende ménát ár nómnendayénd. 7 Ár yétkwén Barabas efe témorwén kwéfkwéf méngon Rom warsagh ár ngi téfnár tárfár árfé talawangérwén. 8 Ár mérén enmormén Failet témotangi yá utorghét némé túmén tawafrotau.
bt: It was the custome at the Feast to take out the darkness house man(prisoner) whom the people asked. 7 A man called Barabas who was in the darkness house who committed murder. 8 The crowd came to Failet and asked him to do for them what he usually did.

nama: Failetém emotai, "Fém ménde em yéndon tutorén féfeyot Ju árfene warsagh ár." 10 Failet mat náyátoi nde limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém yéramayénd yáfaf Yesu méndménde.
bt: "Do you want me set free for you the ruling man(king) of the Ju people? Failet asked, 10 Failet knew that the chief prists handed Yesu over to him with jealousy.

nama: Wénde limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém ewasemnayénd ár mérén Failetefaf Barabase utorghét. 12 Failetém emotai ár mérén, "Némé yéndon so yafrotan féfeyot yéné ároefaf fémofem efe yémndetati Ju árfene warsagh ár?"
bt: But the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) stirred the crowd to Failet to set free Barabas. 12 Failet asked the crowd, "What will I do for you about this man who you call the ruling man(king) of the Ju people?"

nama: Fá nutnayénd "Téngwamend wafatarégh wén tukén!"
bt: They shouted, "Crucified him on the cross!"

nama: Failetém emotai, "Némamén? Némé yaufi yafrotam yémon?" Wénde fá kutnawét minde tukén, "Téngwamendǃ"
bt: "Why? What crime has he did?" Failet asked, But they shouted louder, "Cricified him!"

nama: Failetém ménde ewawifoi ár mérnafene. Féyo yéngéumyoi Barabas yéfefaf. Failetém tamndangé Yesue fémoghét yéngwafnamoi tukét wamghét. Fiyarayam si tawafrotawét Yesue
bt: Failet wanted to satisfy the crowd, Failet released Barabas to them. He bit him and handed him over to crucify him. The soldiers made fun of Yesu

nama: Fiyarayam yélimayénd Yesue kétán ndimbal ároene méngot, árké yém Fratoriyam, a emotai méinyotio fiyaré áumengéghét. 17 Yémofem yamanetaménd ndéndák ngarot sáláme warsagh árfene sálámenit, yéfayoyénd wétwétafé ákiki sénkoyan. 18 Fá téngémndetawét, "Ai, Ju árfene warsagh ár!" 19 Férghe téfértawét yémofem wéne Yesu sénkoyan a mbérme téfarndawét. Fá budme ningiayénd a tésmetawét. 20 Njam yémofem si tawafrotawét yáyot, ndéndák ngarot sáláme yáfitraryénd a yánjo sáláme yawoyénd wéikor. Féyo yémofem yélimayénd Yesu wamghét. Yesu wafatarégh wénan yénamndaménd
bt: The soldiers led Yesu away into the head man's house(that is Fratoriyèm) and called whole soldiers together. 17 They put a purple clothes on him, and put the crown of thorns on his head. 18 They began to shout to him, "Hail, the ruling man(king) of the Ju people!" 19 Repeatedly they bit him on the head of Yesu and spit him. They knelt down and worshipped him. 20 When they they made fun of him, they took away the purple clothes and put his own clothes on him. Then they led Yesu to the place to crucify him. Yesu was crucified on the cross

nama: Yémofem ár yétkwén Saimon yéfángoyénd endén efe témorwén tesenot kétándmé Sailenta, a fiyarayam táfáretawét fá Yesuene wafatarégh wén résaghét. Saimon ténmorwén Aleksenda a Rufusfene yéferafé. 22 Yémofem yéngémnjoyénd Yesu yéné sifayé yétkwén Golgota, yáne fifi sénko sot sifayé. 23 Féyo yémofem yauyafoyénd Yesue wéri nu ndémke wifogh murmurafé, wénde yémon mé yékenai.
bt: They met a man name Saimon on the road who was [comming] to the town from Sailen, and the soldiers forced him to carry the cross of Yesu. Saimon was the father of Aleksande and Rufus. 22 They brought Yesu to the place name Golgota(this meaning is Skull). 23 Then they offered to Yesu alcohol mixed with medicine to take away a pain, but he refused it.

nama: Yémofem yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan a téfalotawét yáne sáláme ménaye ndais kembneye.
bt: They crucified on the cross. They distributed his clothes by playing dice.

nama: Efogh féneféne 9 akwan Yesu ténamndawét wafatarégh wénan. 26 Férén yéfarotaménd wén karfan árét wafghét Yesuenemén, 'Ju árfene warsagh ár.'
bt: It was 9:00 o'clock in the morning [when] Yesu was nailed on the cross. 26 The written notice about Yesu to read, "The ruling man(king) of the Ju people."

nama: Yémofem enaménd sómbio oro téfnár Yesufé, ámb tambénta a fatrata. 28 (Yau siménj) 29 Ár endmé kawaindawét tasalitawét yéfene sénko tafnendawét sén krarghafé. Yémofem si tawafrotawét, "Fém korayawéng ndené 'Yéndon so wáwefnogh méngo yironan a nambio efghon so yérametan,' 30 kénewor wafatarégh wénta a kawanjar fémyoǃ"
bt: They nailed two criminals with Yesu, one on the his right side and another on the left side. 28 29 People[who]passed by the road insult him, shaking their heads with grainding.{k{ ...f* {k{15.29 with grainding check spelling

nama: Ndenéyameyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh árém tasalitawét Yesu mé yéfe kénjúnro. Fá korayawét, "Yémon tawanjane ámb árro wénde fáyo yau nawanjaneǃ 32 Yéné Keriso, warsagh ár Israilmén, mato kénewor wafatarégh wénta ménát yéndfem so kéminjongém a efalo kényátongémǃ" Ár efe enaménd Yesufé yémofem tasaliwét. Yesuene Kérmén
bt: In the same way the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the teaching men of the law insulted him among themselves. They said, "He saved only other people but he can't save himself!" 32 Let this Keriso, the ruling man(king) of Israil, come down from the cross, so that we can see and truly approve(believe)." People who nailed with Yesu they insulted him The Death of Yesu

nama: Yéné séite méinyotio yu nénamndai kwéfitaro. Yéné kwéfitayam yérsam 3 aklok séite. 34 Yéné efoghféneféneyanyo Yesu minde nutnaméng, "Eli Eli, lama sabaktani?" Yéné sioene fifi siyém, 'Tane Ngánján, tane Ngánján, némamén yénd fémon wéfrango tambia?'
bt: That afternoon whole land was dark. This darkness took till 3 O'clock in the afternoon. 34 At that hour Yesu cried out with a loud voice, "Eli, Eli lama sabaktani? This talk meaning is, "My God, my God, why did you forsake me?"

nama: Ámb ár efe tawakayongérwén kaka yiyáráyénd Yesu, fá norayayénd, "Káyárangi, yémon yémote Elaija."
bt: Some people who were standing near heard him saying, they said, "Listen, he is calling Elaija."

nama: Féyo ámbiro ár néngenngoi nguafé ghafté wéri nuan yukai wéne yéngwáuyoi Yesue nénet. Fá norayai, "Yambia téfrangend. Mato so yéfandam Elaijam téu ténmeworngaǃ" 37 Yesu minde nutnai soramé kér yémorméng.
bt: Then one man ran, dip the sponge with sour alcohol, put it on a stick, and offered it to Yesu to drink, he said, "Leave himself, let's see if Elaija bring him down." 37 Yesu cried out and after he died.

nama: Wáwefnogh méngon sénjté sáláme kété tamangérwén árkéménayam ár tawangotau Ngánjánefaf álighét, natiraryéng sómbio karéf kétándmé tuk kétánotio yu. 39 Njam Rom fiyaré sénko ár efe takayongérwén téfandau tukét ndernáye Yesu kér yémormén, fá norayai, "Efalo yéné árom yiyátoi Ngánjánene Ambum fété témǃ"
bt: In the worshipping house the thick curtain was hanging torn into two part from top to bottom. 39 When Roman soldiers' big head man who was standing, looking at how Yesu died, he said, "Truly this man was the Son of God!"

nama: Ámb amafam kétándmé nayuta ténfandawét. Ámb Meri Makdalin, Salome, ámb Meri efe témorwén Joses a yánngén Jems yéfetmé. 41 Yéné amafam Yesu táitotawét a tarawenawét fá njam Yesu témorwén Galili yuwon. Tárfáryo ámb amaf efe té enmormén Yesufé Jerusalemét kété tamorwén. Yesuene yátoghmén
bt: Some women saw from a distance, Among them were Meri Magdalin, Meri the mother Jems and Joses,and Salome. 41 These women followed Yesu and cared him when Yesu was in Galili region. Many other women who came with Yesu to Jerusalem were also there. The burial of Yesu

nama: Afrengégh efogh Fraide, yéné efogh Safat frondeta, njam férghétro témorwén, 43 Josef Aramatiamén Ju sénko árfene áumengégh utmanégh ár, efe kawanjetau Ngánjánene limánégh efghot, yéngmormén férférofnar Failetefaf, namotai Yesuene fifiot. 44 Failet sélngwél yémormén njam náyárai, "Yesu kér té tém," yénémamén yémon yanmoi Rom fiyaré sénko ár a yémotai, "Yesu Fété kér tém?" 45 Rom fiyaré sénko árom efalo yaufroi, "Yesu fété kér tém," féyo Failetém Josefé fifi yéngwaumyoi. 46 Josefem fai yafrotam tombé sénjté sáláme, féyo yémon yéworyéng Yesuene fifi yuwot wafatarégh wénta, yéfiyanam sáláme a yélawai mbéwé méngon árké té yénfétaménd wímmén. Féyo yémon yéngfetayénd wím sésafne wamghét. 47 Meri Makdalin a Josese yátmé Meri téfandawét ánde Yesuene fifi yélawayénd.
bt: Preaparation day Fraide(this day before Sabbath) it was almost evening. 43 Josef Aramia, the member of Council, who was waiting for the ruling of God, went fearlessly to the Failet, and asked for Yesu's body. 44 Failet was surprised to hear that Yesu was already dead, for the reason he gathered Roman soldiers and asked them, "Yesu was already dead?" 45 The Roman soldiers' big head man told him that 'he was already dead," so Failet gave Josef the body 46 Josef bought long thick cloth, then he took down Yesu's body, wrapped it, and placed it in the grave house which was cut out of rock. Then he rolled a rock to close the entrance. 47 Meri Magdalin and Meri, the mother of Joses saw where Yesu's body was laid.

nama: Njam Safat nawaindai, Meri Makdalin, ámb Meri Jemse yátmé a Salome fai yafrotaménd mer wimafé wékwér ménát Yesuene fifi wasurghét. 2 Sande tándái akwan, totér efogh árnyéghan, fá nuwanoyénd kétán mbéwé méngofaf. 3 Álighan fáro namotayénd, "Emo so ténmafetangé wím téfeyot mbéwé méngo sésafneta?"
bt: When the Sabath was over, Meri Magdalin, Meri the mother of Jems and Salome bought good smelling special smelling liquid so that they might go to anoint Yesu's body. 2 Early morning on Sunday, at sunrise, they went to the grave house. 3 On the road they asked to themselves, "Who will roll the stone away from the entrance of the grave house?"

nama: Wénde njam fá néngretayénd tukét, yémofem yinjoyénd yéné wím, árké ndimbal témorwén té nitérmboi. 5 Njam amaf mbéwé méngon nélawayénd, yémofem yinjoyénd totér ár kwayaghé sáláme tawongérwén témorangérwén amafafene tambén ngángata, a amaf férféram ewifoi.
bt: But when they looked up, they saw that stone, which was large, had been rolled away. 5 When women went into the grave house, they so young man wearing white clothes sitting on the right side, and women were afraid.

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árom emndai, "Yau férfér em. Fémofem efe yéronjati Yesu Najaretmén efe yénamndaménd. Fá yéna yau yém, kérta té nano. Kéretangi kétán yáne fifi ánde yékmayénd. 7 Wénde kuwanongi, tawaufrongi yéné si yáne waitogh árfet a Fité, 'Féfe frondeta fá té yéngém Galili yuwot. Fémofem so tinjongi kété, ndernáye yémon fronde tamndetau."
bt: But the man carrying heavenly message said, "Don't be afraid. Who you are looking for Yesu Najarene, who was crucified. He is not here. He has risen! See the place where they laid him. 7 But go, tell this talk to his following men and Fitè, 'He's going ahead of you to Galili region. You will see him there, how he told you before he died."

nama: Amaf nétoryénd a néngengoyénd mbéwé méngo tambén ménamén fá tamorwén ngernger mwighayan kowérsotawét. Fá némé si yau norayayénd ménamén férfér tamorwén. Tándáwár yátogh mer sifaf 16.9-20 Yesu nufaryéng Meri Makdalinefaf
bt: Women went out and ran away from the grave house with fear and amazed. They did not say anything because they were afraid. [Early reliable talk(manuscriture) and old watching men do not have Mak 16:9-20]

nama: Njam Yesu nanoi kétándmé kérta Sande akwan, Yesu fronde nufaryéng Meri Makdalinefaf, ende tambén Yesum ewifnai 7 yaufi mbérmbér. 10 Amaf néwanoi Yesuene waitogh árfefaf, efe ghérghérsisé tamorwén a ye kendawét, a ewaufroi yéfe némé kufrotau. 11 Wénde njam yémon ewaufroi yéfe ndené Yesu ghérsé yém, té yinjon, yémofem efalo yau yiyátoyénd. Yesu nufaryéng sómbio waitogh árfefaf
bt: When Yesu rose from the death on Sunday morning, Yesu appeared first to Meri Magdalin, out of whom Yesu had driven 7 evil spirit. 10 Woman went to the following men of Yesu, who were sad and mourning, and told them what had happened. 11 But when woman told them that Yesu was alive and that woman had seen Yesu, they did not truly approve(believe) woman.

nama: Yéné soramé Yesu nufaryéng fénaté sáfot sómbio árfefaf njamandio fá tangérwén endmé ámb yuwot. 13 Fá néngwaneyayénd ámb waitogh árét ewafroyénd yéfeyot némé kufrotau, wénde yémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd yénémamén. Yesu nufaryéng 11 waitogh árfefaf
bt: After this Yesu appeared two men [of the following men] in a different form while they were walking .dto other place. 13 They came back and told to other people what had happened, but they could not truly approve(believe) it.

nama: Soraméfifi Yesu nufaryéng 11 waitogh árfefaf njam yémofem njamke tánetawét. Yémon tamndetau ménamén ndimbal mwighé yau tawamorwén. Fá tikéf táikér tamorwén Yesue efalo yátoghét emofem téfandawét fá soramé kérta nanoi. 15 Yesum fá emndai, "Kuwanongi méinyotio yuwomé, mat engyátotati Mer si méinyotio árét. 16 Njam emofem efalo yiyátotat a fá so ewalitotat, Ngánjánam so tawanjarngé. Wénde njam yau efalo yiyátotat, Ngánjánam so tawaramangé yaufioene fai. 17 Yéndon so ewarametan wafté sélngwélafé yam wafroghét méinyotio efalo yátogh árét. Yémofem so yaufi mbérmbér ewifnat tane yétkwénan a fá so norayat ámb árfene sie árké yau kotametawét. 18 Yémofem ngángaye kamban so eweretat, a yémofem kér nu njam enetat, némé yau so nufrote. Yémofem ngángé njam efayotat enjne téfnárfefaf, fá so mer náyátotat."
bt: Later Yesu appeared the eleven following men as they were eating. He rebuked them because they were stubborn not to truly approve(believe) Yesu who saw him after he had risen from the death. 15 Yesu said to them, "Go into all the world and tell the good talk to all the people. 16 Whoever truly approves(believes) him will be saved, but if they dont truly approve(believe) him, they will be condemned. 17 These surprising things and surprising things will follow them who truly approve(believe) him: They will cast out evil spirits in my name and they will say new languages. 18 They will hold the snake with their hands, and they drink deadly water, nothing will happen. They will put their hands on sick people, and they will be healed.

nama: Njam Yuré Yesum si ewifoi yéfefaf, fá táf nénguyoi njafarot a námnjoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. 20 Féyo waitogh ár táf nofarnayénd méinyotio yuwomé, mat tangyátotawét mer si. Yuré kásáfotau yéfe kénjúmé a tárfár sélngwélafé yam tawafrotawét. Yéné yamam tuyafotau ndené yáne si efalo témorwén.
bt: When the Lord Yesu finished his saying to them , he was lift up into heaven and sat at the right hand of God. 20 Then the following men went out everywhere to preach good talk, and the Lord worked through them to confirm what he was saying to them by many surprising things and surprising things followed them.

nama: Fútar Tiafilus:
bt: Friend Tiafilus:

nama: Yémofem yafrotaménd kétamé némé si té yinjoyénd ufroghan a emofem yéfarotaménd. 3 Yéndon té merkéráye téfandawan méinyotio yam kétándmé ufrogh, mer kéretau tayot faroghét ménát merkéráye ndenéfifi némé té kufrotau. Yéndon yafrotan feyot minde merfifi Tiafilus, 4 Yéndon yéné yafrotan ménát fém so mat ném efalo si méinyotio árkéméné fém té káyáretau. Jon walitogh ár yáne áráféghmén si afrogh
bt: They did from what talk had seen in the beginning and who wrote it. 3 I have carefully looked for all things from the beginning, it seemed good to me to write what had exactly happened. I have done for you very good, Tiafilus, 4 I do this so that you will know all true talk which you have heard. Annoucement of his birth of Jon the Baptist

nama: Yéné efghon Erod njam témorwén Judiamén warsagh ár, kété témorwén ghéngén wárogh ár yétkwén Jakaraya efe tafnyangérwén ghéngén wárogh ár Abiane mérén, yáne amaf Elisabet Aron ákimén. 6 Jakaraya a Elisabet Ngánjánene ghékfan mer ghérsaye tamorarwén, méinyotio Yurane nák tawaitoghét. 7 Wénde ambumofnar tarwén, ménamén Elisabetéf mwinu tárwén, a fá bulu náyáteyayénd.
bt: At that time of when Erod was the ruling man(king) of Judia there was burning sacrifice men name Jakaraya who belonged in the group of burning sacrifice men Abia, his wife Elisafet (was) a descendant of Eron. 6 Jakaraya and Elisafet lived in good life in the sight of God, they followed all the Lord's law. 7 But they.d lived without a baby because Elisafet was barren, and they.d became old.
