nama: Ámb efghon Jakarayane mérénta ghéngén ásáfogh efogh nawerai, yémon ghéngén wárogh ásáfogh yérnyai Ngánján sáfrére. 9 Yéfene túmén témndan Ngánjánam taferngai ménát mer wimafé rokar wároghét Ngánján wáwefnogh méngo kénjút. 10 Njam efogh náwerai mer wimafé rokar wároghét, méinyotio ár náumendaménd wáwefnogh méngo sifayan Ngánjánafé oraighét.
bt: One day it came to Jakaraya's family's turn of the burning sacrifice man work, and he started woking to burn sacrifice before God,{l{ ...f* {l{1.8 One day it came to turn Jakaraya's burning sacrifice men work before God. it need to check again.

nama: Féyo Ngánjánene njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng yáfaf, nokayoyéng ghéngén wárogh séki tambénta. 12 Njam Jakarayam yinjoyéng, fá sélngwél yémormén a férféram yifoyéng. 13 Wénde njafar si résagh árom yémndayéng, "Yau férfér ném, Jakaraya, fene Ngánjánafé orayégh si té náyárang. Fene amaf Elisabet so nésle ghakér ambum, fémon táf yétkwén taram Jon. 14 Fá so yém áuwégh a remngogh feyot, a tárfár so náuwetat ménamén yáne éslaghmén. 15 Fá ndimbal so yém Ngánjánene ghékfan, wéri nénefnar a ámb táikér nu, a fá so yém Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf kétándmayo éslagh. 16 Tárfár ár Israilmén yémon so ewangote kétán Yuré yéfenjo Ngánjánefaf. 17 A fá so yéngém Yurane frondeta, mbérmbéran a waftayan ndenanit Elaija kés témorwén, ménát afafene tikéf wangoghét kétán yéfenjo ambumafefaf, a ayáréghofnaye ghérsata wangoghét kétán káfeté; efalo ghérsat táfrendau Yurai."
bt: Then an heaven talk carrying man(man carrying heavenly message) of God appeared to him, and stood at the right side from the table burning sacrifice(altar). 12 When Jakaraya saw him, he was surprised and was full of fear. 13 But the man carrying heavenly message said to him, "Don't be afraid, Jakaraya, he (God) heard your talking with God. Your wife Elisafet will bear a son, you must give name him Jon. 14 He will be joy and happiness for you, and many [people] will rejoice because of his birth. 15 He will be big in God's eye, (and he will be) wihout-drink alcohol and other strong drink, and he will be full of the God Spirit from the birth. 16 He will turn many people from of Israil(Israil people) to the Lord to their God. 17 And he will go ahead of Lord, in the spirit and in the power like Elaija was, in order to turn father's heart to their children and without-hearing(disobedient) life to the wisdom; he prepare true life for the Lord.

nama: Jakarayam yémotai njafar si résagh ár, "Ndernáye wét yénd mat so kamndan yénémamén? Yénd swém bulu wém a tane amaf siyém ndenéyameyo ausé."
bt: Jakaya asked the man carrying heavenly message, "How can I become knowing(know) about this? I am an old man and my wife is also old woman."

nama: Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, "Yénd wém Geibrél. Yénd Ngánjáne kaka wakai a yénd kwénmáfárete siafé sái kémaufron yéné mer si. 20 A sénonjo fém kékmbo métar a yau noraya kétánotio yéné ufroghene efogh kawerangé ménamén fémo efalo yau tane si so táyáto. Árkéméné so efalo kénamndangi yánjo efghon."
bt: The man carrying heavenly message answered, "I am Geibrèl. I stand close to God and he sent me with talk [which] I will tell you this good talk. 20 And now silence put [into] you and [you] cannot speak until the practicing day come because you didn't become true(believe) my talk. Which [it] will come true in its day.

nama: Yéné tekan árém Jakaraya njam tanjetawét a mwighé uwérsoghan tamorwén ménamén tekfifi télawangérwén wáwefnogh méngo kénjún. 22 Njam fá nétoryéng, fá yau korayau yéfefaf. Yémofem yáyámngoyénd ménamén yémon ghékéf waingégh Ngánján yinjoi wáwefnogh méngo kénjún, fá siofnar namndai yéfeyot ngángayero tawaweindau. 23 Njam yáne wáwefnogh efogh nefoyénd, fá néngangoi méngot. 24 Soramé yáne amaf Elisabet namndai suafé a 5 ghérare méngo kénjúnro témorangérwén yau kétonau. 25 Elisabet norayai, "Yuram yéné tafrote tayot, yéné efghon Ngánjánam yauyafoi yáne ménde a yitérmboi tane wáiwáiafé yam árfe tambén." Yesuene áráféghmén si afrogh
bt: In this long time when the people were waiting for Zakaraya and was confusing mind(wondering) because he was staying very long [time] in the worshipping house. 22 When he came out, he couldn't say anything to them. They realized that he had seen a eye passover thing in the worshipping house, he became without-talk(couldn't speak) them (but) only with hands made surprising things (to them). 23 When his worshipping days were finished, he went back to home. 24 After (this) his wife became pregnant and for 5 months she stayed only inside house [but] she didn't go out. 25 Elisabet said, "The Lord did it for me, in this day God showed his favor and took away my shameful things from the people!" Report about the Birth of Yesu

nama: Táf Elisabetene 6 ghérareyan, Ngánjánam yáfáretam njafar si résagh ár Geibrél Najaret Galili yuwot, 27 yéné méinyo mérésoefaf efe yéreindaménd awerghét Josefefaf, Deifidene mérén kénjút, yáne yétkwén témorwén Meri. 28 Njafar si résagh ár yéngmormén Meri yémndai, "Mer frengégh siafé! Yuré siyém fefaf yém." 29 Meri ndimbal sélngwél yémorméng yáne sian a mwighé uwérsoghét yéméindai ndernáye yéné áuwéghfifi so yém. 30 Wénde njafar si résagh árom yémndai, "Yau férfér ném, Meri, fémon Ngánjánene ménde té yinjo. 31 Fém so ném ambumafé a fém so nésle ghakér ambum, a yétkwén táf taram Yesu. 32 Fá so yém ndimbal a so yémndetat Minde tukén Ambum. Yuré Ngánjánam so tiyátongé warsagh ár ndenáye fété yáne áki Deifid kés témorwén. 33 A fá so yém Israil limánégh ár tuotot. Yáne méngotu yau so yiyato!"
bt: In the 6th month of Elijafet's [pregnancy], God sent the man carrying heavenly message Geibrèl to Najaret in Galili region region, 27 to the pure girl(the girl without relationship with man) whom did without.lying talk(promise) to marry with Josef, in the family of Defid, her name was Meri. 28 The man carrying heavenly message came Meri and said, "Blessed with talkǃ The Lord is with you." 29 Meri was so surprised of his talks and wondered how this greeting will be. 30 But the man carrying heavenly message said to her, "Don't be afraid, Meri, you have found God's favor. 31 You will be with a son and be pregnant a son, and you must give the name Yesu. 32 He will be big and will be called the son of the Most High. The Lord God will make him the ruling man(king) as his ancester Deifid was. 33 And he will be a ruler people of Israil forever. His kingdom will never end."

nama: Merim yémotai njafar si résagh ár, "Ndernáye so yéné yém, ménamén yénd swém méinyo mérés?"
bt: Meri asked the man carrying heavenly message, "How will be this, because I am virgin?"

nama: Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, "Efalo, Ngánján Mbérmbér fefaf so yéném, a Minde Tukén waftayam fém so kémafarngé. Yéné téfnan njúnnjúnofnar ambum so yémndetat Ngánjánene Ambum. 36 Elisabet fene mérénmén ambumafé so yém ausayan a efe témndetawét ndené mwiné téfnár yém, sénonjo suafé yém 6 ghérare kénjún. 37 Yénémamén Ngánjáneyot yau táikér yém."
bt: The man carrying heavenly message answered, " Surely, the God Spirit will come to you, and the power of Most High will cover you. The without.dust(holy) son will be called God's son. 36 Elisafet, your relative will be with child in her old age, and [she] who was said the barren is 6th month now. 37 Because there are no hard for God."

nama: Merim yawangoi, "Yénd wém Yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Féyotaro so nufrote némé té wémndé." Si soramé njafar si résagh árom yéfrangoi. Merim yiyafoi Elisabet
bt: Meri answered, "I am the God's without.payment working man(servant). It will happen what you told me." After talks the man carrying heavenly message left her. Meri visits Elisafet

nama: Yéné efghon Meri wékeye álighét náfrendam tesenot Judia tunakéf yuwot. 40 Fá nélawai Jakarayane méngot a frengégh si yaramai Elisabete. 41 Njam Elisabet náyárai Meriene frengégh si, ambum táf nalinai fút kénjún, a táf Elisabet témorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf. 42 Fá tuk kéme norayai, "Frengéghkaf ném méinyotio amaf kénjún, a frengéghafé ambum fémon so yéráfteǃ 43 Némamén yénd méndefé wém, tane Yurane amé sái yéném tafaf? 44 Njam fene frengégh si náyárai, táf ambum tane fút kénjún notanai áuwéghafé. 45 Nderé áuwéghafé yém yáyot si némé té norayai Ngánjánene efalo si sái nufrota yáfaf." Meriene wagh
bt: At that day Meri got quickly prepared and (went) to a town in the mountain side in Judia. 40 She went into Jakaraya's house and gave greeting to Elisabet. 41 When Elisabet heard Meri's greeting, the baby moved in her belly and Elisabet was filled with God Spirit. 42 She spoke a loudly, "Blessed are you among women, and blessed is the child you will bearǃ 43 Why am I favored, the mother of my Lord comes to me? 44 When your greeting was heard, the baby in my belly moved with joy. 45 How happy is she who responds what God's ture talk will be done to her. Meri's Song

nama: Meri norayai, "Tane tikfam Yuré yuwete
bt: Meri said, "My heart praises the Lord

nama: a tane mbérmbér áuwéghan yém Ngánján tane Wanjarégh ár kénjún,
bt: and my spirit rejoices in God my saving man,

nama: ménamén yémon yénd wafarotam yuwan ghérsafé yáne ásáfogh mérés! Yénandmé sénonjo méinyotio árém so wémndetat yénd ndené frengéghmén ném,
bt: for he remembers me (as )his humble without.payment working man(servant) woman. From now on all the people will call me you are blessed.

nama: ménamén Minde tukén waftafé sélngwélafé yam tayot yafrotam. Yáne yétkwén yém njúnnjúnofnar.
bt: for the power of Most High has done surprised thing for me. His name is without.dust(holy).

nama: Yáne ghérghérsisé so néngusamngote yéfeyot emofem férférafé yéfandat fá kétándmé ámb ár saté kétánotio ámb ár saté.
bt: His mercy will extend to those who fear Him from generation to generation.

nama: Yémon té yuyafotam muyé yánjo ngángaye, yémon té ewafarnai fá efe tuktuk mwighé emarghan tamorwén.
bt: He has shown mighty with his hands; he scattered those who are high-mind.

nama: Yémon té eweworyéng yuwot limánégh ár yéfenjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayata, wénde euyoyéng tukét métar ár.
bt: He put down rulers from their positions, but has raised up the humble.

nama: Yémon té eremngoi siogh ár tárfár rokare wénde engwatembayéng wemár ár sotro.
bt: He has filled the hungry with many things, but has sent the rich empty.

nama: Yémon té yáutánam yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár Israil yafarotai ghérghérsisaye.
bt: He has helped his without.payment working man(servant) Israil, remebering with mercy.

nama: Ebraamefaf a yánjo mérénfaf tuot, ndernáye té nénorayayéng téfene afafefaf."
bt: to Ebraam and his descendants forever how he had said to our fathers.

nama: Merif emorarmén Elisabetfé nambio ghérare soramé Meri néngangoi méngotuot. Jon walitogh ár yáne áráféghmén si
bt: Meri stayed with Elisafet for three months after Meri went back village. The birth of Jon the baptist

nama: Elisabetene efogh njam nawerai yáne ambummén, fá náráftam ghakér. 58 Yáne kaka ár a fútaréf náyárayénd ndené Yuram ndimbal ghérghérsisé yuyafoi a fá káuwétawét yémafé.
bt: When the time for Elisafet to have her baby, she gave birth to a son. 58 Her neighbors and relatives heard that God has shown big mercy and they rejoiced with her.

nama: 8 efogh nawerayéng fá engmormén ghéngan néfghét a yémofem yétkwén yéramayénd yárefé Jakaraya soramé, 60 wénde yátmé norayai, "Yau! Yáne yétkwén so yém Jon."
bt: On the eighth day they went to circumcise the child, and they were going to name(gave a name)him after his father Jakaraya, 60 but his mother said, "Noǃ his name will be Jon."

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, "Ámb yéné yétkwén yau yém féfene mérnan."
bt: They said, "There is no one among your relatives who has that name."

nama: Yémofem ngángaye yéngwaghnyayénd yárefai ménát ambumoe yétkwén ramghét. 63 Fá namotayéng farogh fefat ngángé awaunyéghe, méinyotio ár sélngwél emorméng yémon yéfarotam, "Yáne yétkwén siyém Jon." 64 Táf fété Jakaraya si néngufngoi a tuwetau Ngánján. 65 Ár fútar Ngánján férféram ewifoi, Judia yu árém taruindawét yéné yammén. 66 Méinyotio ár efe náyárayénd mwighé uwérsoghan tamorwén, a namotayénd, "Efe yéné ambum so yém?" Ménamén Yurane ngángé kété témorwén. Jakarayane wagh
bt: They made a surprising thing with hand to his father to [find out what] he give son's name. 63 He asked for a writing paper with surprising thing by hand, and every people was surprised that he wrote, "His name is Jon." 64 Immediately Jakaraya started saying and praising God. 65 The neighbors were filled with fear, and Judia people were talking about these things. 66 Everyone who heard this were wondered and asking, "Who is this child going to be?" For Lord's hand was there. Jakaraya's song

nama: Yárefé Jakaraya Ngánján Mbérmbéram yafoi si nufngoi,
bt: His fatherJakaraya was filled with spirit and began to speak,

nama: "Áuwégh yém Yurai, Israilmén Ngánján! Fá té téném yánjo ár wanjarghét.
bt: "Praise be to the Lord, the God of Israil, who has come to save his people.

nama: Fá yénmáfáretam téfe wanjarégh ár yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár Deifid yáne mérénmén.
bt: He has sent us saving man in his without.payment working man(servant) Deifid his family.

nama: Némé fá norayai yáne Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé tándái,
bt: What he said through his God's people who make know(prophets) of long ago,

nama: Wanjarégh yém kétándmé téfene mék téfnárafene ngángata emofem méndméndat yénfandat yénd.
bt: salvation from our enemies and from hand of all who hate us.

nama: Ghérghérsisé yuyafoi téfene afafefaf a ewafarotai yánjo njúnnjúnofnar árnyégh.
bt: he showed mercy to our fathers and remembered his without.dust(holy) covenant.

nama: Wengéghofnar si norayai téfene afé Ebraamefaf.
bt: He said without changing talk/oath to our father Ebraam.

nama: Yénd yénmutoryéng kétándmé mék téfnárfene ngángata a yénméindai yénd yáyot férférofnar yam wafarerghét:
bt: He rescued us from our enemies's hand and enabled us to serve him without fear.

nama: njúnnjúnofnar a mbarkánd kér ro Ngánjáne sáfan méinyotio téfene efghon.
bt: In holiness and straightness before God all our days.

nama: Fém, tane ambum, so ném Minde Tuk Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, so ném Yurane sáfréré end frengéghét yáyot,
bt: You, my child, will be be a God's man who make know(prophet) of the Most High, you will be(go) before Lord to prepare the way for him,

nama: yánjo árét so ewaramete wanjarégh mat yéfene yaufi wányányégh kénjúmé.
bt: you will give his people the knowledge of salvation through the washing of their sins.

nama: Ménamén téfene Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé njafar tambén árnyégh efogh so yéném téfefaf.
bt: Because of our God's mercy from heaven the rising sunwill come to us.

nama: So télálángé fá efe kwéfkwéfan em a kér mbanmbanan efe em so engwambete téfene kafkaf krufrát endmé."
bt: It will shine on those who lived in darkness and on those who lived under death, he will guide our feet into the path of peace.

nama: Ambum nanotam a muyafé namndai mbérmbéran, a fá tékmangérwén fanfne yuwon kétánotio marataye nufaryéng Israilét.
bt: The child grew and became strong in spirit, and he stayed in desert until he appeared publicly to Israil.

nama: Yéné efghon Kaisar Augustusam muyé si yéramai marataye yétkwén kayoghét Rom yuwon. 2 Yéné simormén frondefifi yam yétkwén kayoghét njam Kwirinius gafana témorwén Sirian. 3 Méinyotio ár nuwanoyénd yéfenjo tesenot yétkwén yáuwéghét.
bt: In those days [Rom high ruling man] Kaisar Augustus gave strong talk widely to take a census(gave name to register) in Roman country. 2 This was the first thing to take a census when Kwirinius was governor in Siria. 3 All people went to their town to take a census.

nama: Féyo, ménamén Josef siyém Deifidene ákimén, fá néngwanoi Najaret tesenta Galili yuwot kétán Betliem Judia kénjút, yéné tesen siyém ánde Deifid nanotam. 5 Fá nuwaneyayénd Merifé yétkwén kayoghét, efe té yémndayénd awerghét Josefefaf a táf áráféghétro témorwén ambum. 6 Njamandio tarwén kété, efogh nawerai ambum áráfghét, 7 a fá fronde sénko ambum náráftam. Sálámeye yéfiyaryéng ambum yéflayéng wérárafene njamke téruan ménamén kété yau sifayé témorwén yéfeyot méngon. Sif wanjengégh ár a njafar si résagh ár
bt: So, because Josef was descendant of Deifid, he went from the town of Najaret in Galili region region to Betliem in Judia, that town was where Deifid grew up. 5 He went there with Meri to register the name, who had said to marry to(was engaged with) Josef and almost gave birth a child. 6 While they.d were there, the day came near to gave birth child, 7 and she gave birth to first head(firstborn) son. She wrapped the son with clothes and placed him in a animal's food container(manger) because there was no space(room) for them in the house. The watching men of sheep and the men carrying heavenly message(angels)

nama: A sif wanjengégh ár tékmangérwén kaka sifayan ghékéf tawafayotawét sifafet sémbáran. 9 Yurane njafar si résagh ár sélngwéle nufaryéng yéfefaf a Yurane ndimbal kwayaghayam etremngoi, a fá férfér tamorwén. 10 Wénde njafar si résagh árom emndai fá, "Férfér yau em. Yéndon enwarsan mer si féfeyot ndimbal áuwégh méinyotio árét. 11 Sénonjo Deifidene tesen kénjún Wanjarégh ár té káráfte féfeyot, fá yém Yuré Keriso. 12 Yéné siyém féfeyot wayamngoghét: fémofem so tinjongi ambum sáláme fiyaréghkaf wérárafene njamke téruan."
bt: And watching men of sheep were living in the near fields, they watched sheep at night. 9 An man carrying heavenly message of the Lord suddenly appeared to them, and the big light(glory) of the Lord shone, they were afraid. 10 But the man carrying heavenly message said to them, "Don't be afraid. I bring good talk to you big joy to all the people. 11 Today in the town of Deifid, Savior was born for you; he is the Lord Keriso. 12 This is recognising for you: you will find a child wrapped with clothes in a animal's food container(manger)."

nama: Sélngwélafé minde tárfár njafar si résagh ár nufaryénd yéné njafar si résagh árfé, tuwetawét Ngánján a korayawét,
bt: Suddenly so many men carrying heavenly message(angels) appeared with the man carrying heavenly message, praising God and said,

nama: "Áuwégh yém Ngánjáneyot minde tukén, yéné mbandan krufrát yém yéfeyot yáne méndefé árét."
bt: "Glory to God in very high, on land peace is to them to his liking people."

nama: Njam njafar si résagh árém efrangoyénd a nuwanoyénd njafarot, sif wanjengégh ár fáro norayayénd, "Kuwanongém Betliemét fandaghét némé yam nufrote kété, árkémamén Yuram té yénmaufroi." 16 Sif wanjengégh ár nuwanoyénd wékeye ewinjoyénd Meri, Josef, a tosé efe tékmangérwén wérárafene téruan. 17 Yémofem njam yinjoyénd fá, si yétarnayénd némé njafar si résagh árom té ewaufroyéng yéné ambumoenemén. 18 Efe méinyotio náyárayénd sélngwél emormén némé sif wanjengégh árém ewafroyénd yéfeyot. 19 Meriene tikfan si tamorwén a mé kawafarotau. 20 Sif wanjengégh ár nangoyénd áuwéghafé tuwetawét Ngánján ménamén némé náyárayénd a ghékfe yinjoyénd, árkémamén té yéfe ewaufroyénd. Yesu témorwén wáwefnogh méngo kénjún
bt: When the men carrying heavenly message(angels) left them and went to heaven, the watching men of sheep said to on another, "Let's go to Betliem to see what has happened there, which the Lord has told us about." 16 They went quickly and found Meri, Josef, and the baby who was lying in an animal's container. 17 When they saw him, they spread the talk about the child what man carrying heavenly message had told them. 18 All who heard it were amazed at what the watching men of sheep told to them. 19 Meri had the talk in her heart and keep remembering them. 20 The watching men of sheep went back with praising God with joy because what they heard and seen in the eye, just as they told to them. Yesu was in the worshipping house

nama: Ménayan 8 efghon, efogh nawerayéng yáne ghéngan néfghét, yáne yétkwén Yesu, njafar si résagh árom fronde yétkwén yaramai soramé su nawanai.
bt: On the eighth day, the day came to cut his skin(circumcise him), his name Yesu, [which]the man carrying heavenly message had firstly given him before he was conceived.

nama: Njam efogh nawerai wányányégh téménd wafroghét ndernáye Mosesene nák témorwén, Josef a Meri ambum yérséménd Jerusalemét Yurafaf wateghét 23 Yurane nák ndernáye té yéfarotam, "Méinyotio fronde sénko ghakér ambum wateghét Yurafaf." 24 A fá nuwanoyénd ghéngén ramghét ménamén Yurane nák ndernáye noraye ménát sómbio mamuot o sómbio duf tosat. Simionene afrogh si
bt: When the day came cleaning feast doing how the law of Moses was, Josef and Meri brought the child to Jeusalem to present to the Lord, 23 how how [he] wrote the law of the Lord, "Every firstborn son is to present to the Lord." 24 And they went to present a sacrifice because how the law of the Lord said to [take] two of doves o two young pigeons. The report of Saimon

nama: Ár témorwén Jerusalem kénjún yétkwén Simion, efe témorwén mbarkándro a Ngánján férférafé ár. Fá kawanjetau ménát Israil wanjarghét, a témorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf. 26 Ngánján Mbérmbéram mwighé yaramai, "Fém yau so kér ném fronde Yurane Keriso so tinjo." 27 Ngánján Mbérmbéram yimndai Simion kétán wáwefnogh méngo kénjút. Njam yárefafem ambum Yesu yérséménd kétán túmén yam wafroghfaf ánde témorwén nákan, 28 Simioném ambum yambnai ngángaye a áuwégh yawangoyéng Ngánjáne táf norayai,
bt: There was a man in Jerusalem name Saimon, who was straight and God-fearing man. He was waiting for salvation of Israil, and he was full of God Spirit. 26 The God Spirit gave a plan to him that, 'You will not die before you will see the Lord's Keriso.' 27 The God Spirit led the Saimon into the worshipping house. When his parents brought there the child Yesu to do what the custom of the law were, 28 Saimon took child with his hands and return God joyfully God and saying,

nama: "Wanjarégh ár Yuré, fémon némé té wémndai, sénonjo yénd fene faiofnar ásáfogh ár kér so wém áuwéghafé.
bt: "Savior Lord, what you have said me, now I, your worker can die with joy.

nama: Ménamén tane ghékfam fene wanjarégh té yinjo,
bt: Because my eyes have seen your salvation,

nama: ménát méinyotio árém so yéfandat árkéméné fémon té néusénam.
bt: so that all people will see which you have prepared.

nama: Fá so yém ndenanit kwayaghé sái yuyafotam fene efalofifi Téndo árét, a yémon so eméinde ár sái nemnat tukén Israil árfenemén."
bt: He will be like a light that show your truth to Side people, and he will cause people to think highly the people of Israil.

nama: Ambumoe yárefé a yátmé sélngwél ermén némé Simion té norayai yánemén. 34 Simioném efrendai fá a yémndai Meri, yátmé, "Yéné ambumom so eméinde ámb Israil ár sái nékmbotat Ngánján efalo yiyátoghét, a tárfár ár so kawengongi Ngánjánefaf a fá so yém waufarogh ménát mat yátoghét árét wénde tárfár árém so yékenat fá. 35 Ménát tárfár árfene tikéfta yaufi mwighé so nufanat. Yaufi wafroghyam yémofem so ewafrotat yáfaf árkéménayam so tawaramangé ndimbal ghérghérsisé." Annane ghérsamén afrogh si
bt: The child's father and mother were surprised what had said about him. 34 Saimon blessed them and said to Meri, his mother, "This child will cause some Israil people to stop believing God, and many to turn to God, and he will be a surprising thing to warn people but many people will be against him. 35 So [that] the evil thoughts from many people's hearts will be revealed. Doing to bad things they will do to him will give you big sorrow." Anna's report about life

nama: Kété témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh amaf, Anna, Fanuelene mérés, Aserene mérénmén. Fá témorwén auséfifi, a fá enmorarmén yánjarfé sefen yunjfro. 37 A kwiré náyátoi kétánotio 84 yunjéf namndayéng. Yémon yau yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo wénde táwefnotau sémbár a efghon Ngánjánafé koraiwét a kawafarmetau. 38 Yéné efogh féneféneyan yénmormén yéfefaf, yémon kánjo yaramai Ngánjáne a ewaufroi ambumoenemén efe kawanjetawét Jerusalem wanjarghét.
bt: There was a woman God's man who make know(prophet), Anna, the daughter of Fanuel of the family/clan of Aser. She was very old, and she lived with her husband only 7 years. 37 And [then] she became a widow until she became 84 years old. She never left the worshipping house but bent down/worshiped night and day, talked with God and fasted. 38 At that time she came to them, she gave thanks to God and spoke about the child to (all) who were waiting for salvation of Jerusalem.

nama: Njam Yurane nák némé wafroghét tamorwén Merifém Josefé té ewifeyayénd, fá táf nangeyayénd Galili yuwot yéfenjo tesenot Najaret. 40 Ambum nanotam muyafé namndai, fá káfeté mwighé wafoghkaf témorwén, Ngánjánene ngárám yáfaf témorwén. Ghakér ambum Yesu wáwefnogh méngon
bt: When Josef and Meri had finished what the law of the Lord required, they.d returned to Galili region to their town of Najaret. 40 The child grew and became strong; he was full of wisdom, and the grace of God was to him. The Boy Yesu at the worshipping house

nama: Méinyotio yunjfan yárefaf tayowéng Jerusalemét Waingégh téméndfaf. 42 Njam fá 12 yunjéf namndai, fá nuwanoyénd kétán, túmén yam wafarogh téméndfaf. 43 Téménd soramé njam yárefaf kénangowét méngotuot, ghakér ambum Yesu nawangsoi Jerusalemén, wénde mat yau tarwén ambumoenemén. 44 Fá kéma kemarwét ndené mérne kar álighan kénangotawét, ámbiro efogh eyoméng. Yémofem ronjagh yafngeyayénd yéfenjo mérén kénjún a fútarfefaf. 45 Njam yau fá yinjeyayénd, fá nangeyayénd Jerusalemét yá ronjaghét. 46 Nambio efogh soramé yémofem yinjeyayénd wáwefnogh méngon, témorangérwén watamegh téfnárafé, káyáretau yéfefaf a ámogh si tawarametau. 47 Méinyotio emofem tiyáretawét fá emormén sélngwél yáne uwangoghan mwighé kwayaghé térsawét. 48 Njam yárefafem yinjeyayénd fá, sélngwél ermén, a yatmam yémndai, "Ambum, ndené fémo némamén yénmafrowé? Yénd afafé ténre ndémkefé fe ronjaghan."
bt: In every year his parents went to Jerusalem to the feast of Passover. 42 When he became 12 years old, they went there the feast according to custom. 43 After the feast [was over], his parents were coming back hometown, the boy Yesu stayed in Jerusalem, but they.d didn't know about child. 44 They were thinking that he might return trip together, [and] they went on for a day. They began looking for him among their relatives and to friends. 45 When they didn't find him, they went back to Jerusalem looking for him. 46 After three days they found him in the worshipping house, sitting with the teaching men, listening to them and asking them questions. 47 Everyone who heard him they were amazed at his carrying bright thinking(undersanding) in his answers. 48 When his parents saw him, they were surprised. and his mother said, "Son, why are you doing like this to us? I with your father were painfully looking for you.

nama: Yesum ewawangeyai, "Némémén yénd fémofem wéronjét? Fém mat fiya tarwén ndené yénd tane Afane méngo kénjún wém." 50 Wénde fá mé katambarwét némé si yémon té tamndéwéng.
bt: Yesu answered them, "Why were you looking for me? You should know that I am in my Father's house." 50 But they didn't understand what talk he was saying.

nama: Fá nuwanoyénd Najaretét yárefafé a fá áyárégh ár náyátoi yárefafefaf. Wénde yatmam méinyotio si ewanai yánjo tikéf kénjút. 52 Yesu nanotam fifiyan a káfeté mwighayan a yáne ménde Ngánjánafé a ár.
bt: He went back to Najaret with parents and he became obedient man to the parents. But his mother accepted all talks in her heart. 52 Yesu grew in body and in wisdom and in favor with God and men.

nama: Njam tuk warsagh ár Kaisar Tiberiusém télimndau Rom 15 yunjéf, táf Fontius Failet témorwén Judiamén gafana, Erod témorwén limánégh ár Galili yuwon, Erode yánngén Filif témorwén limánégh ár Itulia a Trakonitisan a Lisanias témorwén limánégh ár Abileneyan, 2 a táf Anas a Kayafas ghéngén wárogh sénko ár tarwén, Buk si yénmormén Jonefaf Jakarayane ambumoefaf fanfne yuwon. 3 Yémon yarendam méinyotio Joden yu, si táitotau walitoghmén a tawalitotau yaufita awengoghét. 4 Ndernáye yéfarotaménd Buk sian Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane si, "Ámb ár ke nutne fanfne yuwon, 'End frengéghét Yuraye álighét, wafrogh mbarkánd end yáyot.
bt: When Tiberius Emperor ruled Rom 15 years, when Fontius Failet was governor of Judia, Erod was ruler in Galili region, Erod's small brother Filif was ruler in Itulia and Trakonitis, and Lisanias was ruler in Abilene, 2 and at that time Anas and Kayafas were leading burning sacrifice men, God's talk came to Jon son of Jakaraya in the desert. 3 He went through all the region of Joden, he preached about baptism and baptized to turn away from sins. 4 How [someone] wrote it in the God's talk(is written in the talks of God/scripture), God's man who make know(prophet) Aisaya, "Someone is shouting in the desert, 'To prepare the way for the Lord to travel, making a straight paths for him.

nama: Méinyotio yékwyékw wéfángéghét a méinyotio mband tunakéf fénarghét a fafatot. Méinyotio ménjuté end so em mbarkánd a yaufi end so em frengéghkaf.
bt: Every valley shall be smooth, and every montain shall be leveled and lowered. Every crooked roads shall be straight, and the bad roads shall bestraighten.

nama: A méinyotio árém so tinjongi Ngánjánene wanjarégh.'"
bt: And all people will see God's salvation.'"

nama: Jon norayai ár mérénfaf árké tanmorwén nuwot walitoghét yáfaf, "Fém kamban ghérsafé ár mérén! Emon fém emndai Ngánjánene nékwta sái kenngongi? 8 Yénayam so ewafrotati árkéménayam féfe so tayaufrongi ndené té nawengongi yaufita. A yau yaufi si kufngongi féfenjo kénjún ndené, 'Ebraam siyém téfene áki.' Yéndo emndetan fém ndené yéné wím tambén Ngánjánam so tautorngé ambum Ebraameyot. 9 Mbilé siyém frengéghkaf yém wén sérémb néfghét, a árké wénam yau njam mer mbwe yéfuna yéné wén siyém néfghét a fését wighét."
bt: Jon said to the crowds which came to be baprtized by him, "You are the people with snack lifeǃ Who told you (people) to flee from God's anger? 8 You will do these things which you will show that you had turned from (your) sin. And do not try to say among youselves that, 'Ebraam is our ancester.' I tell you that out of these stones God can raise up children for Ebraam. 9 The ax is ready to cut the root of the trees, and if which tree does not bear fruits will be cut and thrown into the fire."

nama: Ár mérnam yémotayénd, "Némé yéndfem so yafrotam yénandmé?"
bt: The crowd asked, "What shall we do from here?"

nama: Joném ewawangoi, "Ár efe sómbio sodafé njam yém ámb ároe so taramangé, a efe njamkefé yém ndenéyameyo so yafrote."
bt: Jon answered, "If the man with two shirts must give it to other, and who has food must do the same way.

nama: Mani kafégh ár ndenéyameyo enmormén nu walitoghét, fá namotayénd, "Watamegh ár, némé so yafrotam?"
bt: Tax collectors came the same way to be baptized, they asked, "Teacher, what should we do?"

nama: Yémon emndai fá, "Yau féfenjo méndeye takafangi kétamé némé té engémndan." 14 Ámb fiyaram wéi yémotayéng, "Yéndfem némé so yafrotam?" Yémo ewawangoi, "Yau ewarémnati maniot ár o ekafetati unyéghe a eremngotati féfenjo fayam."
bt: He told them, "Don't collect with your wanting from what had told to." 14 Some soldiers also asked him, "What should we do?" He answered, "Don't steal money from people and accuse them with lying and be content with your pay.

nama: Ár kawanjetawét oyárghafé a méinyotio tikfan kéwérsotawét nde Jon némé Keriso namndé. 16 Joném ewawangoi méinyotioat, "Yéndon ewalitotan fém nue. Wénde efe tane soramé yéném tane muyé so taindangé, endene sandol ángégh fénaghét yénd féyotarofnar wém. Yémon so ewalitote fém Ngánján Mbérmbére a fése. 17 Fá siyém frengéghkaf yém njénro faloghét kétándmé fifiyafé mbwe yánjo foke. Kétándmé yémon so yésámbune saf, so euménde fifiyafé mbwe yánjo méngo kénjún, wénde so tawarongé njénro kémboghofnar fése." 18 A ámb tárfár sie Joném tawawéngsotau ár a mer si tawawaitotau yéfeyot.
bt: The people were waiting with saying and were all wondering in their hearts that Jon might be the Keriso. 16 Jon answered them all, "I baptize you with water. But one who is coming whose power surpasses me, I cannot untie the thongs of his sandols. He will baptize you with the God Spirit and with fire. 17 He is ready to divide chaffs from the fruitful seeds with fork. Then he will sweep the place, will gather fruitful seeds into his house, but he will burn chaffs into the without-end fire. 18 And with many other talks Jon advised them and preached the good talk to them.

nama: Wénde njam Joném yarnam Erod limánégh ár ménamén yémon nawerai yánngnoene amaf, Erodias a ámb yaufiyam ewafrotam, 20 Erodém yasamngoi yénandmé yéfefaf. Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngon. Yesuene walitoghmén
bt: But when Jon rebuked the ruler Erod because of Erodias, his young brother's wife, and the other evil things he did, 20 Erod added this to them. He put Jon to the darkness house(darkness house). The Baptism of Yesu

nama: Njam méinyotio ár ewalitotam, Yesu wéi yálitotam. Njam fá Ngánjánafé oraighan témorwén njafar táf nasawéryéng, 22 a Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng Yesuefaf men kénjúmé ndenanit mamu. Si yénmormén kétándmé njafarta, "Fém ném tane uwéghafé ambum, yénd minde náuwétan fefaf." Yesuene ákiafenemén
bt: When he baptized all the people, he also baptized Yesu. When he was talking with God, heaven was opened, 22 and the God Spirit came down to Yesu with a through bird like a mamu(pigeon). A voice came from heaven, "You are my lovely son, I'm so pleased with you." Ancester of Yesu

nama: Yesu namndai 30 yunjéf táf yánjo ásáfogh yérnyai. Yesu maratan nakmai ndené Josefene ambum yém Josef témorwén Eliene ambum,
bt: Yesu himself was 30 years old when he began his work. Yesu was thought widely that was the Josef's son, Josef was the son of Eli,

nama: Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum, Melkiene ambum, Yanaiene ambum, Josefene ambum,
bt: the Son of Matat, the son of Lefi, the son of Melki, the son of Yanai, the Josef's son,

nama: Matatiasene ambum, Amosene ambum, Nakumene ambum, Esliene ambum, Nagaiene ambum,
bt: the son of Matatias, the son of Amos, the son of Nakum, the son of Esli, the son of Nagai,

nama: Matene ambum, Matatiasene ambum, Semeinene ambum, Josekene ambum, Jodene ambum,
bt: the son of Mat, the son of Matatias, the son of Semein, the son of Josek, the son of Joda

nama: Joananene ambum, Resane ambum, Jerufafelene ambum, Sialtielene ambum, Neriene ambum,
bt: the son of Joanan, the son of Resa, the son of Jerufafel, the son of Sealtiel, the son of Neri,

nama: Melkiene ambum, Adiene ambum, Kosamene ambum, Elmadamene ambum, Erene ambum,
bt: the son of Melki, the son of Adi, the son of Kosam, the son of Elmadam, the son of Er,

nama: Josuane ambum, Elieserene ambum, Jorimene ambum Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum.
bt: the son of Josua, the son of Elieser, the son of Jorim, the son of Matat, the son of Lefi,

nama: Simionene ambum, Judane ambum, Josefene ambum, Jonamene ambum, Eliakimene ambum,
bt: the son of Saimon, the son of Juda, the Josef's son, the son of Jonam, the son of Eliakim,

nama: Meliane ambum, Menane ambum, Matatane ambum, Natanene ambum, Deifidene ambum,
bt: the son of Melia, the son of Mena, the son of Matata, the son of Natan, the son of Deifid,

nama: Jesiene ambum, Obedene ambum, Boasene ambum, Samonene ambum, Nasunene ambum,
bt: the son of Jesi, the son of Obed, the son of Boas, the son of Samon, the son of Nasun,

nama: Aminadafene ambum, Ramene ambum, Ejronene ambum, Feresene ambum, Judane ambum,
bt: the son of Aminadaf, the son of Ram, the son of Ejron, the son of Feres,

nama: Jeikofene ambum, Aisekene ambum, Ebraamene ambum, Terane ambum, Naorene ambum,
bt: the son of Jeikof, the son of Aisek, the son of Ebraam, the son of Tera, the son of Naor,

nama: Serukene ambum, Reuene ambum, Felekene ambum, Eferene ambum, Selane ambum,
bt: the son of Seruk, the son of Reu, the son of Felek, the son of Efer, the son of Sela,

nama: Keinanene ambum, Afasadene ambum, Semene ambum, Noane ambum, Lamekene ambum,
bt: the son of Keinan, the son of Afasad, the son of Sem, the son of Noa, the son of Lamek,

nama: Metuselane ambum, Inokene ambum, Jaredene ambum, Maalalelene ambum, Kenanene ambum,
bt: the son of Metusela, the son of Enok, the son of Jared, the son of Maalalel, the son of Kenan,

nama: Enosene ambum, Setene ambum, Edémene ambum, Ngánjánene ambum.
bt: the son of Enos, the son of Set, the son of Edèm, the son of God.

nama: Yesu, Ngánján Mbérmbér afoghkaf, kangotau Jodenta a Ngánján Mbérmbéram yalimai fanfne yuwomé, 2 40 efghon fá yufotam Sáifram. Yémon yau enetam yéné efghon, yéné soramé siogh témorwén.
bt: Yesu, full of the God Spirit, returned from the Joden and the God Spirit led into the desert, 2 for the forty days Saifè tempted him. He did not eat during these days, after that he was hungry.

nama: Sáifram yémndai, "Fém njam ném Ngánjánene ambum, yéné wím tengo njamkeyot."
bt: Sáifèr said, "If you are God's son, turn this stone into the food."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Buk sian yékai, 'Ár njamkeyero yau so yémor.'"
bt: Yesu answered, "It is written in the God's talk, 'Man shall not live by food alone.'

nama: Sáifram yalimai mband tunakfot a yauyafotam yáyot méinyotio mband marat. 6 Sáifram yémndai, "Yéndon so kémaraman méinyotio muyé a meryam, ménamén tane em, so tawaraman méndefé árfet ende téu. 7 Fémon njam kwáwefno ta, méinyotio fene so em."
bt: Sáifèr led him to the mountain and showed him all the world. 6 Sáifèr said to him, "I will give you all the authority and good things, for [these] are mine, I will give it to anyone I want. 7 If you worship me, all will be yours."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Buk sian yékai, 'Yáwefnota fene Yuré Ngánjánoe a yausáfota yandro.'" 9 Sáifram yalimai Jerusalemét a nokayoi minde tukén wáwefnogh méngon. Yémon yémndai, "Fém njam ném Ngánjánene ambum, fém yénamé kátna yuwot." 10 Buk sian yékai ndené, "Yémon so enwáfárete njafar si résagh ár fe wambghét,
bt: Yesu answered, "It is written in the God's talk, 'Worship your Lord God and serve him only.'" 9 Sáifèr led him to Jerusalem and had him stand on the highest point of the worshipping house. He said, "If you are the son of God, jump to the land from here." 10 It is written in the talk of God that, "He will send men carrying heavenly message(angels) to guard you,

nama: yémofem so kémerangi yéfenjo ngángaye, ménát fene kafkaf yau so kawambangi wíman."
bt: they will hold you with their hands so that your foot will not be hurt on a stone.'

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Ndené noraye, fémo yau yékmeta fenjo Yuré Ngánján ufoghan."
bt: Yesu answered, "It says that, you don't put your Lord God into the test.'"

nama: Njam Sáifram yánjo ufogh yam ewifoi Yesu táf yéfrangoi ámb efghot. Yesu yékenayénd Najaretén
bt: When Sáifèr finished his temptation, he left Yesu until other day. They rejected Yesu at Najaret

nama: Yesu nénangoi Galili yuwot Ngánján Mbérmbérene waftafé, si marat náyátoi yánemén méinyotio yuwomé. 15 Yémon tawatametau yéfenjo áumengégh méngomé, a méinyotio árém tuwetawét fá.
bt: Yesu went back to Galili region with the power of God Spirit, talk about him became wide through the whole area. 15 He taught them through their meeting houses(meeting houses), and every people praised him.

nama: Fá nuwanoi Najaretét, ánde fá nanotam, Safatan nuwanoi nélawai áumengégh méngot yáne túmén yam témorwén. Fá nokayoi wafghét. 17 Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane kanéghkaf buk témorwén yaramayénd. Yémon yéferyéng a yinjoyéng si tékayongérwén,
bt: He went to Najaret, where he grew up, on the sabbath he went and entered into the meeting house as his custom was. He stood up to read. 17 They gave him the scroll book of the God's man who make know(prophet) Aisaya. He unrolled it[scroll] and he found the talks[it is] written,

nama: "Yurane Mbérmbér siyém tafaf yém, ménamén yénd yémon wékafai mer si waitoghét yauyau árét. Yémon yénd kwamáfárete siot yéfeyot efe kwéfkwéf méngon elau wanjarghét, kwéfkwéf ár so kretangé, kérté téfnár so em ofé, 19 yéné yunjfan Ngánjánene ménde nufrotam."
bt: "The Spirit of the Lord is on me, because he anointed me to teach good talk to the poor. He sent me to speak one who put in the darkness house saving, the blind will see, people with problem will be light 19 In this year the Lord's wanting happen."

nama: Féyo yémon yéknam kénaghkaf buk, ewawangoi áumengégh méngo wanjengégh árét a námnjoyéng si waitogh sifayan. Méinyotio árfene ghékfam téfandawét fá áumengégh méngo kénjún. 21 Fá si orayégh nufngoi yéfefaf, "Sénonjo yéné si efalo náyáto féfene áyárégh kénjún."
bt: Then he rolled up the scroll, gave it back to the meeting house keeper and sat down in the teaching place. Everyone's eyes in the worshipping house was looking at him. 21 He began to say to them, "Today this talk become true in your hearing.

nama: Méinyotio korayawét yánemén frengégh si a sélngwélafé mer simén emormén yáne mbírmbírta njam nétoryéng. Yémofem namotayénd, "Yéné Josefene ambum yém?"
bt: All spoke well of him about blessing talk and were amazed at the good talk that came out from his lips. They asked, "This is the Josef's son."

nama: Yesum emndai fá, "Fémofem so tanangi yéné káfeté si tafaf, 'Jokté, fémyo káfrenda!' A Fémofem so kwémndangi, 'Tafrota yéna fenjo tesenan némé yénd náyárangém ndené fémo némé tafrote Kafenamén.'"
bt: Yesu said to them, "You will take this wise talk to me, 'Doctor, heal yourselfǃ' And you will tell me, 'Do here in your hometown what we have heard that you did in Kafernam."

nama: Yémon yasamngoi, "Efalo ewaufrotan, méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yau eumyoi yánjo méngotuot. 25 Yéndon fém mat eyátotan ndené kété tárfár kwiré tamorwén Israilén Elaijane efghon, njam nu yau kafamndau nambio yunjéf a mbarmbar yafrotai ámb yunjéf. Kété táf káukáu nuyai yuwon. 26 Wénde Elaija yau yáfáretaménd ámb Jumén ároefaf, wénde kwirafaftro Jarefatét Sidon kénjún. 27 Kété tamorwén tárfár Israilén yaufi ghéngan enjnefé Elisane efghon, efe ámb yau mer témorwén Naamanro Siriamén."
bt: He continued, "I will tell truth, all God's man who make know(prophet) don't be welcomed in his hometown. 25 I let you know that there are many widows in Israil in Elaija's day, when the sky shut down for three and half years. There was famine throughout land. 26 But Elaija was not sent to any of the Ju people, but to only a widow in Jarefat in Sidon. 27 There were many in Israil with leprosy[with skin disease] in the time of Elisa, yet not one of them was cleasend [but] only Naaman from the Siria.

nama: Méinyotio ár áumengégh méngo kénjún nékw tamorwén yéné sian njam yiyárayénd 29 Fá nékwafé nafghetaménd yifnayénd tesenta, yerayénd mband tunakéffaf ánde méngotu témorwén, kétándmé sái titawét yékwét. 30 Wénde fá tiotau ár mérén kénjúmé a kété néngwanoi. Yesum ewifnam yaufi mbérmbér
bt: All the people in the meeting house were angry when they heard this talks. 29 They got angry, drove him out of the town and hold him to the mountain where was the village, from there they tried to throw him off the hole/cliff. 30 But he walked through the people and went away. Yesu drove/chased out an evil spirit

nama: Féyo fá nuwanoi kétán Káfenam tesen Galili yu kénjún a Safatan ár watamegh ewafngoi. 32 Fá tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan, ménamén yáne si waitogh témorwén muyafé.
bt: Then he went to Kafernam town in Galili region, and on the Safat he began to teach the people. 32 They were surprised of his teaching, because his teaching were with authority.

nama: Áumengégh méngon kété témorwén ár tasérmbotau yaufi mbérmbéram. Fá nutnayéng minde tukén. 34 "A! Fém némat ménde ném téfefaf, Yesu Najaretmén? Fém téfe wasérmboghét kéném? Yénd mat wém fém efe ném. Fém ném Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár."
bt: In the meeting house there was a man spoiled by evil spirit. He shouted at the very high. 34 "Haǃ What do you want with us, Yesu of Najaret? [Have] you came to destroy us? I know who are you. You are the Without.dust man of Godǃ"

nama: Yesum yarnam, "Métar mé! Kéntor yá tambén." Féyo yaufi mbérmbéram ár yétarmai árfe ghékfan a néngtoryéng yéfrangoi ár wasérmboghofnar.
bt: Yesu ordered it, "Be guietǃ Come out of him." Then the evil spirit threw the man before[the eyes of] people and came out and left him without doing him [any] harm.

nama: Ár méinyotio sélngwél emormén a korayawét fáro, "Némé watamegh yéné yém? Muyafé a waftafé yémon yaufi mbérmbér ewitrote a fá néngtonat!" 37 A si yánemén marat namndai kaka méngotuamé Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár
bt: All the people were amazed and said to each other, "What teaching is this? With authority and power he ordered the evil spirits and they went outǃ" 37 And the talk about him became wide thoughout near town. Yesu healed many people

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi áumengégh méngo a nuwanoi kétán Saimonene méngot. Saimone yánat témorwén minde waftafé enjne, a yémofem Yesu yamnendayénd yá wáutárghét. 39 Fá náwefnoi yáfaf a enjne yémndai, "Kitér!" a yéfrangoi minde waftafé enjneyam. Fá nurtotam táf fété a yémon njamke ewaneyam yéfeyot. 40 Njam efogh ngironau, árém tánémnjawét Yesuefaf méinyotio efe tamorwén fénaté enjnefé, a ngángé tafayongai yéfefaf, mer káyátotawét. 41 Yaufi mbérmbér kétonawét tárfár ár tambén, kutnawét, "Fém ném Ngánjánene ambum!" Wénde Yesum ekmboi fá siofnar, ménamén fá mat tamorwén ndené Keriso yém. 42 Faurghan Yesu nuwanoi fanfne yuwot. Árém téronjawét Yesu a njam fá enmormén kétán ánde Yesu témormén, yémofem yékmboyénd fá ménát yau so tafrangongai fá. 43 Wénde yémon emndai, "Yéndon so yaitotan mer si Ngánjánene limánéghmén ámb tesenan, ménamén yénat yénd wémáfáretam." 44 Mé fá témorwén si waitogh áumengégh méngon Judian.
bt: Yesu left the meeting house and went to Saimon's house. Saimon's mother-in-law was sickness with a fever(cough), and they asked Yesu to help her. 39 He bent down to her and he told the sickness, "Move away!" and the sickness of fever left her. She got up immediately and cooked food for them. 40 When the sun was setting, the people brought to Yesu all who had various [kinds of] sickness, and he placed the hand on them, [and] healed them. 41 The evil spirit came out from many people, they shouted, "You are the Son of Godǃ" But Yesu stopped them speaking, because they knew that he was the Keriso. 42 At daybreak Yesu went to clear place. The people were looking for Yesu and when they came to where Yesu was, they stopped him(Yesu) not to leave them. 43 But he said, "I will(must) preach the good talk of the ruling of God to the other towns, because that's why he sent me." 44 He continued to preach in the meeting houses of Judia.

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu témorwén Genesaret arakaf téndon tákáyongérwén, ár mérénafé tamorwén yarendayénd a Buk sifaf káyáretawét. 2 Yémon ewinjeyai sómbio bout nu téndon, efrangeyayénd kété susi árém, efe tarwén yéfenjo net umbarghan. 3 Fá nuflai ámb boutan, árké témorwén Saimonene, yémndayéng bout witroghét kor némbnare. Féyo fá námnjoi a ár watamegh ewafngoi bout kénjúta. 4 Njam yémon si ewifoi, Saimonefaf norayai, "Sumbét tangérsa net a tanwam wagifot." 5 Saimoném yawangoi, "Watamegh ár, sémbár tombé téfé násáfotam a némé ámb yau ernyangém. Wénde ménamén fém té kés noraya, yénd so wéngém net tanwaman."
bt: One day Yesu was standing near the Lake of Genesaret, with group of people surrounding him and listening to the talk of God, 2 He saw two bouts at the side of water, left them.d there by the fishermen, who were washing their nets. 3 He got into one of the bouts, which was Saimon's, [and] said him to move the bouts littlebit [from the shore]. Then he sat down and began to teach the people from inside of the bout. 4 When he finished talk, he said to Saimon, "Take nets to the middle of water(deep water) and hang them for catching the fish." 5 Saimon answered, "Teacher, we worked all night and we didn't catch anything. But because you already said so, I will go to hang the nets."

nama: Njam yémofem yafrotaménd némat té engémndai, yémofem ereindaménd tárfár wagif a yéfene net aftéraréghétro tamorwén. 7 Yénémamén yémofem engwaunyeyayénd yéfe fútarfet ámb boutot wáutárghét, fá enmormén a sómbio boutan tawaflitawét minde tárfár wagif a olitoghétro tárwén.
bt: When they did what he had told them, they caught many fish and their nets was about to break. 7 So they made a surprising thing to the friends in the other bout to help them, they came and put so many fish in the two bouts and they were about to sink.

nama: Njam Saimon Fitam yinjoi yéné, yémon yáwefnoi Yesue budme a norayai, "Nguwano ta tambén, Yuré, yénd wém yaufiyamafé ár!" 9 Fá a méinyotio yáne wáutárégh ár yéné wagif arnyéghmén sélngwél emormén, 10 ndenéyameyo wéi Jems a Jon, Jebediene ambum a Saimonene fútaréf.
bt: When Saimon Fitè saw this, he bowed down to Yesu's knees and said, "Go away from me, Lord; I am a sinful manǃ" 9 He and all his helpers were astonised at catching of fish, 10 in a same way were Jems and Jon, the sons of Jebedi, Saimon's friends.

nama: Yémofem yéfenjo bout tunat engwimndangeyayénd a méinyotio rokar eureyayénd yéngwaitoyénd fá. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár
bt: They pulled their bouts to the shore, left everything and followed him. Yesu healed a man with leprosy

nama: Njamandio Yesu témorwén ámb tesenan, ámb ár yaufi ghéngan enjnefé témorwén. Yémo njam Yesu yinjoi, fá yáne sáfe nuyai mbandot a yamnendai, "Yuré, fém njam ménde ném, fémon mer kwiyáto yénd."
bt: While Yesu was in one of the town, a man [who] was with skin disease(leprosy). When he saw Yesu, he fell with his face to the ground and begged him, "Lord, if you want, you can make me clean."

nama: Yesum ngángé ewatembai a yiyánjai ár a norayai, "Yénd ménde fété wém. So mer ném!" A táf fété yaufi ghéngan enjneyam yéfrangoi.
bt: Yesu reached out his hand and touched the man and said. "I really want to do. You will be cleanǃ" And immediately the leprocy left him.

nama: Yesum yémndai fá, "Ende yau taufro, téu nguwano, kauyafo fémyo ghéngén wárogh téfnárafefaf a ghéngén taram némé Mosesene nákan noraye frengéghmén ánde árém so kémwinjongi ndené fene ghéngan mer té namndé."
bt: Yesu told him, "Don't tell anyone, you must go, show yourself to the burning sacrifice man and offer the sacrifices that Moses told you for your healing so that people will see that your skin is good.

nama: Wénde si yánemén marat náyátoi. Ár tárfár tanmorwén áyárghét yáfaf a tárfár frengégham tarsau enjne téfnár. 16 Wénde Yesu túmén kitérmbongai métar sifayat Ngánjánafé oraighét. Yesum mer yiyátoi akényégh ár
bt: But the talk about him became widely. Crowds came to hear him and he healed many sick people. 16 But Yesu often moved out lonely places to talk with God. Yesu healed a paralyzed man

nama: Ámb efghon njamandio Yesum tawatametau, Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár, efe té enmormén fénaté méngotuta Galili yumén, Judiamén a Jerusalemén tamorangérwén. Yurane wafté kété témorwén ménát enjne téfnár frengéghét. 18 Ámb árém térsawét aknyégh ár yame sutafé yéta résaghét téngrametawét kétán méngot Yesuene sáfrére kémghét. 19 Wénde yémofem yau ámb end yinjoyénd ménamén ár tárfármén, yénémamén tarmbotawét méngo sémsot tukét, a kend enendayénd némbne fénemé ángéghe tewénawét ár néndkfot Yesuene sáfrére.
bt: One day while Yesu was teaching, Farasi men and teaching men of the law, who had come from other towns of Galili region, from Judia and from Jerusalem staying. The power of the Lord was there to heal the sick. 18 Some men carried a paralyzed man with a mat and tried to put him into the house to lay him before Yesu. 19 But they didn't find any way because of the crowd, so they took him up on the roof, and they opened the roof and put him down with rope through the small hole into the middle of people in fornt of Yesu.

nama: Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, fá norayai, "Fútar, fene yaufi té wawalinda."
bt: When Yesu saw their big mind(faith), he said, "Friend, your sin are washed."

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár mwighé tawaitotawét yéfenjomén, "Efe yéné ár yém wanyogh si kés noraye? Efe yaufi so tawalindangé wénde Ngánjánamro?"
bt: Farasi men and the teaching men of the law discussed with themselves, "Who is this man who speak bad/wrong talk(blasphemy)? Who can wash sins but God alone?"

nama: Yesu mat té náyátoi fá némé kemnawét a emotai, "Fém némamén nemnati féfene tikfan? 23 Árkéméné áfrátaye yém sái korayangén, 'Fene yaufi sem wawalingéghkaf em,' o sái korayangén, 'Kokai a kuano'? 24 Wénde fém mat so em ndené Ároene Ambum muyafé yém yéné mbandan ménát yaufi wawalingéghét." Fá norayai akényégh ároefaf, "Yéndon némndetan fém, kokai, tané fenjo yame a kuano méngot." 25 Táfandio fá fété nénokayoi yéfe sáfrére, yékafai némayan té tékmangérwén a néngwanoi méngot Ngánján ténguwetau. 26 Méinyotio ár sélngwél emormén a Ngánjánoe áuwégh tawangotawét. Fá Ngánján férféram ewafoi a norayayénd. "Yéndfem téfé efandam sélngwélafé yam sénonjo!" Yesum yékafai Lefi
bt: Yesu knew what they were thinking and asked them, "Why are you thinking [these things] in your heart? 23 Which is easier to say; 'Your sins are wiped/washed,' o to say, 'Get up and go'? 24 But you may know that the Son of Man has authority on this world to forget sins." He said to the paralyzed man, "I tell you, get up, take your mat and go to the house." 25 Immediately he stood up in front of them, picked up what he had been lying and went back to the house praising God. 26 Everyone was amazed and praised God. They are full of the fear to God and said, "We have seen amazing things today!" Yesu called Lefi

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu néngwanoi a yinjoi mani kafégh ár yétkwén Lefi témorangérwén mani kafégh sifayan. Yesum yémndai fá, "Kwénmaito yénd." 28 A Lefi nokayoi, efrangoi méinyotio rokar a yáitoi fá.
bt: After this, Yesu went and saw a tax collector name Lefi sitting at tax collecting place(booth). Yesu told him, "Follow me." 28 And Lefi stood up, left everything and followed him.

nama: Kétándmé Lefim ndimbal téménd néusénam Yesueyot yánjo méngon, a ndimbal mérén mani kafégh ár a ámb kés em njamke tánetawét yémafé. 30 Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár káwatarnawét yáne waitogh árfefaf, "Némamén fémofem enetati njamke a nu mani kafégh árfé a yaufiyam wafrogh árfé?"
bt: From there Lefi made a big feast for Yesu at his house, and a large crowd of tax collectors and other people were eating with them. 30 But the Farasi men and the teaching men of the law complanied to his following men, "Why do you eat and drink with tax collectors and people doing sins (sinners)?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yau mer árém njokté yarawetat wénde enjne téfnáramro. 32 Yénd yau mbarkánd ár moghét wénmormén, wénde yaufiyam ár wengoghét." Yesu yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén
bt: Yesu answered them, "The healthy people don't look for a doctor but only the sick people [do]. 32 I didn't come to call straight people, but sinful people [come to call] to turn away. People asked Yesu About fasting

nama: Yémofem norayayénd yáfaf, "Jonene waitogh ár túmén awafarmanéghan a Ngánjánafé oraighan em a wéi ndenéyameyo Farasi árfene waitogh ár, wénde fene sem njamke a nu néneyanro em." 34 Yesum ewawangoi, "Féyotaro fémofem so taméindangi awerégh ároene wan téfnár awafarmanéghét njamandio yémafé em? 35 Wénde efogh yéna yéném njam awerégh ár so nguwanongé yéfe tambén, yéné efghon fá so nawafarmetat."
bt: They said to him, "Jon's following men often fast and talk with God, and also do the following men of Farasi men, but yours are in only eating and drinking." 34 Yesu answered, "Can you make the bridegroom's guest fast while he is with them? 35 But the day comes here when the bridegroom will leave from them, in those days they will fast."

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, "Emo yau so tétirarngé totér sálámeta mbékwbékwot tékayongé namghét tándáwár sálámeyan. Njam yémon yafrota, yémo so tétirarngé totér sáláme, a yau so katmangé tándáwár sálámeyan. 37 A emon yau so yararoté totér wéri nu tándáwár wéri nu ndimbayan. Njam yémon yafrota, totér wéri nu so tétembarngé a taghnangé wéri nu ndimbé, wéri nu so nasune a wéri nu ndimbé so taghnangé. 38 Yau, totér wéri nu fété so yararote totér wéri nu ndimbat. 39 A yau efe ámb tándáwár wéri nu néne soramé wéi ménde so yéngém totrot, ménamén fá ndené noraye, 'Tándáwár siyém merfifi.'"
bt: Yesu told them this parable, "No one will tear from [a bit ] new clothes and put on the old clothes. If he does, he will tear new clothes, and he will not put with old clothes. 37 And no one will fill new alcohol into old alcohol container. If he does, the new alcohol will spoil alcohol container, the alcohol will run out and the alcohol container will be spoiled. 38 No, new alcohol must fill into new alcohol container. 39 And no one wants the new after drinking old alcohol, because he says that, "[The] old is well."

nama: Ámb Safatan Yesu tiotau mbwe ndawan, a yánjo waitogh árém ámb wén mbwe kafégh ewafngoyénd, yéfenjo ngángaye tasénawét mbwe a tánetawét. 2 Ámb Farasi árém yémotayénd, "Némamén fémo nák eráfne Safatan?"
bt: One Safat Yesu was walking through the grainfields, and his following men began to pick some head of grain, rubbed them in their hands to eat the seeds(kernels) 2 Some of Farasi men asked, "Why are you breaking the law on the Safat?

nama: Yesum ewawangoi yéfeyot, "Fémofem yau yaftaménd némé Deifidém tafrotau njam fá a yánjo mérnafé siogh tamorwén? 4 Fá nélawai Ngánjánene méngot, a yékafai frengéghkaf féskaf flawé, yémon enetam árké nák témorwén yéfe ghéngén wárogh árfetro nénet. A yémon wéi ewaramai ámb yánjo mérnat." 5 Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Ároene Ambum siyém Safatoe Yuré."
bt: Yesu answered them, "Have you read what Deifid did when he and his groups were hungry? 4 He entered the house of God, and picked up blessed bread, he ate them which law is only burning sacrifice men to eat. And he also gave some to his friends." 5 Yesu said to them, "The Son of Man is Lord of the Safat."

nama: Ámb Safatan fá nénguwanoi áumengégh méngo kénjút a watamegh ewafngoi, a ár kété témorwén endene tambén ngángé akényégh áre tamorwén. 7 Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém téfén tronjawét Yesue éwighét, féyo yémofem ghékéf tafayotawét ménát yémon ámb frengégh ásáfogh kar so tawafrotau Safatan. 8 Wénde Yesu mat náyátoi yéfene mwighé némé kemnawét a norayai ngángé aknyégh ároefaf, "Kunjé a kokai méinyotio ár safan." Féyo fá nunjai a nokayoi kété.
bt: On another Safat he went into the meeting house and began to teach, and a man was there whose right hand was paralytic. 7 Farasi men and the teaching men of the law were looking for reason to accuse Yesu, so they watched him to see if he might do healing work on Safat. 8 But Yesu knew what they were thinking and said to the paralyzed man, "Get up and stand in fornt of all people." So he got up and stood there.

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndo emotan fém, árkéméné yém nák Safatan: mer wafroghét o yaufi wafroghét, ghérsé wanjarghét o wirorghét?"
bt: Then Yesu said to them, "I ask you, which is lawful on the Safat: to do good or to do evil, to save life or to destroy it?"

nama: Yémon ghékfe fá tafandau méinyotio, a norayai ároefef, "Fenjo ngángé tásáfo." Akényégh árom yafrotam ndené, a yáne ngángé táf mer namndai. 11 Wénde fá tamorwén nékwafé a warunyégh yafngoyénd yéfene kénjúnro némé so tafrotawét Yesuefaf. 12 Yesuene muyafé ár
bt: He looked at them all, and said to the man, "Stetch out your hand." Paralyzed man did that, and his hand became good. 11 But they were angry and began to discuss with each other what they might do to Yesu. The Twelve men with Yesu's authority

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu néngwanoi mband tunakéf téndot Ngánjánafé oraighét, a korayau Ngánjánefaf sémbár tombé faurghétio. 13 Njam akw efawéryéng, yémon emotai yánjo waitogh ár ewaferyéng 12ro, emo yéfe yétkwén ewaramai yánjo muyafé árét, 14 Saimon ende yétkwén yaramai Fité, yánngén Endru, Jems, Jon, Filif, Batolome, 15 Metyu, Tomas, Jems Alfesene ambum, Saimon efe ménde témorwén ndené Ju ár so kawanjetawét fáyo yau Rom waftayan, 16 Judas Jemsene ambum, Judas Iskariot efe namndai sén téfnár. Frengégh a tékrát
bt: One day Yesu went to the sid of a monutain to talk with God, and talked with God to God all night to dawn. 13 When morning came, he called his following men and chose only 12, [whom] he gave the name people with Yesu's authority(men with Yesu's authority(apostles)), 14 Saimon whom he name Fitè, his young brother Endru, Jems, Jon, Filif, Batolome, 15 Metyu, Tomas, Jems son of Alfes, Saimon who wanted to save Ju people with power against Roman, 16 Judas son of Jems, Judas Iskariot who became a man who give teeth(betrayer). Blessings and Woes

nama: Fá Yesufé néneworyénd tunakéfta a nokayoyénd fafat sifayan. Tárfár Yesuene waitogh ár kété tamorwén a tárfár wéi enmormén Judiamén, ndenáyo Jerusalem, Taire a Sidon arakaf téndomén, 18 efe té enmormén si áyárghét yáfaf a yéfene enjneta mer yátoghét. Efe yaufi mbérmbéram tawasérmbotau mer náyátoyénd, 19 a méinyotio árém yéta yanjaghét trametawét fá, ménamén wafté ngétonau Yesueta a mer ngáyátotawét.
bt: He went down with them and stood on level place. Many Yesu's following men was there and many [people] came from Judia, same way from Jerusalem, and from the coast of Taire and Sidon, 18 who had come to hear him and to be healed from their diseases. Who spoiled by evil spirit became good, 19 and all the people tried to touch him, because power was [coming] from Yesu and healing them.

nama: Yémon tafandau yánjo waitogh ár a norayai, "Frengégh yém féfeyot efe em yauyau, ménamén féfeyot siyém Ngánjánene limánégh.
bt: He looked his following men and said, Blessed are you who are poor, because yours is the ruling of God.

nama: Frengégh yém féfeyot efe em siogh sénonjo, ménamén fém so em remngoghkaf. Frengégh yém féfeyot efe ye nendat sénonjo, ménamén fém so em fénan.
bt: Blessed are you who are hunger now, because you will be satisfied. Blessed are you who weep now, because you will laugh.

nama: Frengégh yém féfeyot njam árém méndméndat efandat, njam árém ekarotat fém a ewasalitat, a ekenat fém emndetat yaufi mbérmbér em, ménamén Ároene Ambummén.
bt: Blessed are you when people see you with hate, when people exclude you and insult you, and reject you and said that you are evil spirit, because of the Son of Man.

nama: "Áuwégh yém yéné efghon a ermángégh áuwéghafé, ménamén fene fai siyém ndimbal njafaran. Ndenéyameyo yéfene ákifem takarotawét Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
bt: "Rejoice in that day and dance for joy, because your pay/reward is big in heaven. In a same way their ancesters treated God's people who make know(prophets)."

nama: "Wénde tékrát yém féfeyot efe em wemár, ménamén fém té tamorwén áfrát ghérsaye.
bt: "But How painful to you who are rich, because you aready have easy life.

nama: Tékrat yém féfeyot efe remngoghkaf sénonjo em, ménamén fém siogh so engém. Tékrat yém féfeyot efe em fénan sénonjo, ménamén fém so em ghérghérsisayan a yeyan.
bt: How painful to you who are satisfied now, because you will be hungry. How painful to you who laugh now, because you will be in sadness and in crying.

nama: Nderé mámáfi so yém féfeyot njam méinyotio árém norayat mer si féfenemén ndenáye yéfene ákifem tamndetawét unyégh mat yátogh ár. Euwetati mék téfnár
bt: How painful to you when all people speak good talk about you, in a same way their ancesters treated and said to the false God's people who make know(prophets). Love for Enemies

nama: "Wénde yéndon emndetan fém emofem wiyáretat yénd: Féfene mék téfnár euwetati, mer ewawafrotati yéfeyot emofem méndméndat efandat fém. 28 Efrendati fá emofem ewafángotat fém, Ngánjánafé orayégh yéfeyot emofem ekenat féfe. 29 Njam ámb árém fétkaman kénésmangé, kawengo wéi witmé yáfaf. Njam ámb árém kémawanangé fene sénjté sodé, yau táf tékmbo téngéumyo a ámb sodé téngwaram. 30 Ewarameta méinyotio árét emofem némamnendat fém, emo njam kémawanangé fene némé yém, yau táf tango. 31 Ámb árét ewafrotati fene méndefé némé em árfeyot wénde so némawafrotat. 32 Njam fémofem euwetati fá emofem fém némuwetat, némamén fémofem frengégh so tanangi? Ndenéyameyo yaufiyam árém euwetat emofem fá euwetat. 33 A njam fémofem ewawafrotati mer yéfeyotro efe mer em féfefaf, némamén fémofem frengégh so tanangi? Ndené yam yaufiyam árém yéné ewafrotat. 34 A njam fém méghmégh em yéfefaf kétamé emofem fai so kémawangongi, némamén fémofem frengégh so tanangi? Ndenéyameyo yaufiyam árém méghméghafé so némanjetat fai wangoghét. 35 Wénde euwetati féfene mék téfnár, mer ewawafrotati yéfeyot, yau nawanjetati fai wangoghétro. Féyo féfene fai so yém ndimbal, a fém so em Minde tuk Ngánjánene Ambum, ménamén fá siyém mer yéfefaf kánjo si emofem yau yawangotat a em yaufian. 36 Aem ghérghérsisafé, ndené fété Féferafé ghérghérsisafé kés yém. Wayamngogh ámb ár
bt: But I tell you who hear me: Love your enemies, do good to those who see you with hate. 28 Bless them who curse you, talk with God for those who mistreat you. 29 If someone strikes you on the cheek, turn to him to other side also. If someone takes your long coat, do not stop him from taking your other shirt. 30 Give to all people who asks you, if anyone takes what belongs to you, don't take it back. 31 Do to other people what you want them to do for you.

nama: "Árfene yaufi yau ewaftati ménamén Ngánjánam féfene yaufi yau so ewafte. Ár yau ewafalngotati emndetati ndené yaufiyamafé em ménamén yau wéi fém so ewafalngotat. Tawawalindangé yéfene yaufimén, a féfene so wéi fá tawawalindangé. 38 Ramégh ámb árét ménát Ngánjánam féfe wéi so tawaramangé. Fémofem njam yéné yam yafrotati so ewinjotati tárfár, so ewaramete kétán féfene ngángé afoghare so ewam a nasunat. Nderé tárfár fémofem njam ewarametati, ndenéyameyo féfe so ewaramete."
bt: Do not count people's sin because God will not count your sin. Do not say they are sinner to people, and them he will not say you are sinner. Forgive, and yours [sins] will also be washed. 38 Give to other people in order that God will give you again. If you do these things, you will see many, and he will give you until filled and poured your hand. How many do you give them, in a same way he will give it to you.

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, "Féyotaro kwéfkwéf árém so yémnje kwéfkwéf ár? Wét yau so kélawend yékwét? 40 Waitogh árém yau so taindangi yéfene watamegh ár, wénde efe njam ewatametat méinyotio yam, fá so em ndenáyo yéfene watamegh ár.
bt: Yesu told them this parable, "Can a blind man lead a blind man? Will they not [both] fall down a hole? 40 The followers will be not above their teaching man, but if who have learned everything, he will be same to his teaching man.

nama: "Némamén fémo yéfande fe fútarene ghékéf fémégh a yau nofande wén ténj féfenjo ghékfan? 42 Ndernáye fémo so fe fútar témnde, 'Fútar, kwumyo yénd fene ghékéf fémégh utorghét,' táf yéfande wén ténj fenjo ghékfan? Fém unyégh ár, fronde tutor wén ténj fenjo ghékfan, fém táf so kéreta kwayaghayan fe fútarene ghékéf fémégh utorghét. Wén a yáne mbwe
bt: Why do you look at dust in you friend's eye and do not see the log in your eye? 42 How [do] you say to your friend, 'Friend, let me take your dust in your eye,' when you don't see your log in your eye? You liar, first take out the log from your eye, and then you will see clearly to remove the dust from your friend's eye. A Tree and Its Fruit

nama: "Mer wénam yau efune yaufi mbwe, yaufi wénam yau efune mer mbwe. 44 Méinyotio wén so tawayamngo yéfenjo mbweyan. Árém yau so ekafetat wiwi kétándmé féfta o ás kétándmé mbita. 45 Mer árom efune meryam mer tikéfta, a wéi ndenéyameyo yaufi árom yaufiyam efune yaufi tikéfta. Tikfan némé afoghare yém yéné noraye. Sómbio méngo ramégh ár
bt: No good tree bears bad fruit, nor does a bad tree bear good fruit. 44 Every tree will bear their fruit. People do not pick mango from breadfruit tree o coconut from sego tree. 45 The good man produces good things(life) from good heart, and like this, the evil man produces bad things(sins) from evil heart. He speaks what [is] full in the heart. Two house builder

nama: "Némamén wét yénd wémndetati 'Yuré, Yuré,' a yau ewafrotati ndenáye yéndon némé norayan? 47 Yéndon so safén tékman fá nderé safot nérete efe tafaf yéném tane si áyárghét a wafroghan yékmete. 48 Fá siyém ndenanit méngo ramégh ár, emo kénjkam yétanam a wíman méngo yeitam. Njam kéfér nénengoi, méngo yéta yutaryéng, wénde yau yésámbnetai, ménamén sotafé raméghmén tétnongérwén. 49 Wénde emon njam tane si náyáreta a yau ekmete wafroghyaman, ndenanit yéné ár yém emo méngo yeitam faru mbandan. Njam kéfram yutaryéng yéné méngo, yiroryéng ambino."
bt: Why do you call me, 'Lord, Lord,' and do not do like what I say? 47 I will put in clear place(show) how he is like who comes to me and listens my talks and put them in an action. 48 He is like a house builder, who dug down deep and built it on rock. When a flood came, it struck that house, but could not shake it, because it was built strong. 49 But [the one] who hears my talks and does not put them in an action, this man is like who buid a house in the muddy place. When flood struck that house, fell down completely."

nama: Yesum njam si ewifoi árét, fá nuwanoi Káfenamét. 2 Rom fiyaré sénko ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, efe tutémndawét ndimbal kéráye, yéné ár enjne témorwén a kaka témorwén krotro. 3 Rom fiyaré sénko ár náyárai Yesuenemén, yémo ewáfáretam Ju ndimbal ár yamnendai Yesu álighét enjne téfnárfaf frengéghét. 4 Njam fá nénuwanoyénd Yesuefaf, féyo yamnendayénd, "Yéné árom nénémnde álighét fém yá frengéghét," 5 ménamén yémon yuwetam téfene ndimbal yu a áumengégh méngo yeitam téfeyot. 6 Féyo Yesuf nuwanoyénd yémafé.
bt: When Yesu finished talk to the people, he went to Kafenamèn. 2 The worker of the head man of Rom soldiers(centurion), who he(his owner) pleased him very high, this man was sick and was close to die. 3 The soldiers' head man heard about Yesu, he sent Ju head men [to him], they asked Yesu to go and heal the sick. 4 When they came to Yesu, then they asked him, "This man told him to go and heal him, 5 because he loves our nation and built a meeting house for us." 6 So Yesu went with them.

nama: Yéné téfnan yénd yau mer kafandan sái kwénmorwén fefaf. Wénde mé siro koraya táf tane faiofnar ásáfogh ár mer so káyátongé. 8 Yénd yéndio wém muyayan, fiyaré em tane mbanmbanan. Yéndon némat tafaretangén yénat, 'Kuwano,' so kuwanongé. Yénat njam tafaretangén 'kénaf,' a fá so yéném a njam tafaretangén tane faiofnar ásáfogh ár, 'Yéné tafrota,' a yémon so yafrote."
bt: In this reason I am not worthy to come to you. But you will just say and then my worker will be good. 8 I myself am a man under authority, [and there] are soldiers under me. I tell this, 'Go,' and he goes, 'Come,' and he comes. I say to my worker, 'Do this,' and he does it."

nama: Njam Yesum náyárai sélngwélafé si yá tambén, a fá nawengoi kétán ár mérénfaf táitotawét, "Yéndo emndetan fém, yéndon yau yinjon ndené ndimbal mwighé Israil yuwon." 10 Táf ár nénangoyénd méngot a yinjoyénd faiofnar ásáfogh ár merro. Yesum yanoi kwirane ambum
bt: When Yesu heard amazing talk from him, and he turned to the crowd following him, he said, "I tell you, I have not found such a big mind(faith) in Israil. 10 When the men [who were sent] returned to the house and found the worker well. Yesu raised a widow's son

nama: Ámb efghon Yesuf nuwanoyénd yánjo waitogh árfé a ár mérnafé kétán tesen yétkwén Nain. 12 Fá njam kaka ufarghétro témorwén tesen sésafnefaf, yémofem yinjoyénd kwirane féfét ambum kér fu ténérsawét, a tesenmén ár mérnafé tamorwén. 13 Yuram njam amaf yinjoi, fá ghérghérsisayam yifoi amafoefaf a yémndai, "Yau nenda."
bt: The other day Yesu went with his following men and a crowd to a town called Nain. 12 As he was about to arrive at the gate of the town, they saw [people] carrying out dead body of a widow's only son, and the crowd from the town was with her. 13 When the Lord saw her, he is full of mercy for the mother and he said, "Don't cry."

nama: Kaka nitroi taté yiyánjai, fá emofem ténérsawét nokayoyénd. Fá norayai, "Tot ambum, yéndon némndetan, kano!" 15 Kér ambum nanoyéng námnjoi a si nufngoi. Yesum yéngramai yatmafaf.
bt: He moved close and touch the carrier, those who carried it stood. He said "Young man, I say to you, get upǃ" 15 The dead son got up [and] sat down and started to talk. Yesu gave him to his mother.

nama: Fá sélngwél emormén a soramé áuwégh nufngoyénd a norayayénd, "Ndimbal Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár té nufar téfefaf. Ngánján té nufar yánjo ár wáutárghét." 17 Yéné si marat náyátoi Yesuenemén Judia yuwon a ámb yu kaka kés tamorwén. Yesu a Jon walitogh ár
bt: They were surprised and after they were happy and said, "A big God's man who make know(prophet) has arrived to us. God has arrived here to help his people. 17 This talk about Yesu became wide out to Judia and which close regions. Yesu and Jon the Baptist

nama: Jonene waitogh árém yaufroyénd yá yéné yammén. Joném sómbio emotangeyai, 19 yémon sómbio ár ewafareméng Yurafaf moghét, "Fém yénéf ném efe kéném, o so néngawanjetam ámb ároe?"
bt: Jon's following men told him about these things. Jon called two, 19 he sent two people to the Lord to ask, "Are you the one who is to come, or will(should) we wait for other people?"

nama: Sómbio ár njam enérmén Yesuefaf, fá korayangénd, "Jon walitogh árém tanmafarwe fefaf moghét. 'Fém yénéf ném efe kéném o so néngawanjetam ámb ároe?'"
bt: When two men came to Yesu, they said, "Jon the baptist sent us to ask to you, "Are you the one who comes, or we will wait for other people?"

nama: Ámb mer efghon Yesum tárfár ár efe fénataye enjnefé tanmorwén a yaufi mbérmbérafé mer táyátotau, a éregh ár náyátoyénd efe ghékéf kwéfkwéf tamorwén. 22 Féyo yémo ewawangeyai si résagh árfet, "Ngangend a taufrend Jone némé fémofem tafandet a fénáyáret. Kwéfkwéf ár éregh ár káyátotawét, yaufi kafkaf téfnár áligh ár náyátoyénd, yaufi ghéngan téfnár mer náyátoyénd, téngan méngu áyárégh ár náyátoyénd, kér téfnár kanotawét, a yauyau árét mer si tawawaitotawét. 23 Frengégh ár yénéf em efe yau nékmbotat efalo yátoghét tafaf."
bt: One good day Yesu healed many people who had different diseases and people with evil spirit, and make be people to see who were blind. 22 So he answered to the messengers, "Go back and say to Jon what you saw and heard. The blind became man [who] can see, the lame become walker, the leprosy are healed, the deaf become people [who can] hear, the dead are rasied, and the good talk is preached to the poor. 23 Blessed is the anyone who do not stop believing in me."

nama: Yéné soramé Jonene si résagh ár nuwaneyayénd, Yesum si yérnyai árfefaf Jonenemén, "Fém némé fandaghét néngtor fanfne yuwot? Yéné tombé yus mbormboram kés efnje? 25 Yau njam, némé fandaghét fém néngtor? Ár takayongérwén mer sáláme umaneghkaf? Yau, efe tawongérwén mer sáláme a efe tamorwén sotafé mer rokarafé warsagh ár sifayan fá tamorwén. 26 Wénde némé fandaghét fém néngtor? Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár? O, yéndon némndetan, fá ewainde méinyotio ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. 27 Yéné fiyém endenemén yéfarotaménd: 'Yéndon so yéngwáfáretan fronde si résagh ár, emon so fene end yéfrende.'"
bt: After this Jon's messengers.d left, Yesu began to talk to the people about Jon, "What did you go out into the desert to see? Are these long grass blowed by the wind? 25 If not, what did you go out to see? A man dressed in good clothes? No, those who wear good clothes and who had expensive things are in king's places(palaces). 26 But what did you go out to see? Prophet? Yes, I tell you, he surpassed all other God's man who make know(prophet). 27 This is the oneabout whom [it is] written, 'I will send the messenger ahead of [you], who will prepare your way.'

nama: Yesu kor norayai, "Yéndon emndetan, Jon walitogh árom ewainde méinyotio ár efe náráftat yéné mband maratan. Wénde efe yém némbnar ambumnit Ngánjánene limánéghan, yémo so taindangé Jon."
bt: Yeus said more, "I tell you, Jon the Baptist surpasses all men who have been born on this earth. But the one who is like a small child inside the ruling of God, he surpasses Jon."

nama: Yesuene si njam náyárayénd, méinyotio ár, kété tawafnyangérwén mani kafégh ár, mat namndayénd ndené Ngánjánene yam siyém efalo, ménamén Joném té tawawaitotau. 30 Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém yékenayénd Ngánjánene ménde yéfendio, ménamén fá nakenayénd Joném sái tawalitotau.
bt: When they heard Yesu's talks, all the people including to tax collects knew that God's way is true, because Jon baptized them. 30 But Farasi men and teaching men of the law rejected God's wanting for themselves, because they refused [that] Jon baptize them.

nama: "Némafaf yéndo so yétémndan yéné árfenemén? Némanit fá em? 32 Ndenanit em ambumtértér yénau emorang rokar térarégh sifayan a fárofáro námotat, "'Yénd nambnam sifraféré feyot, a fém yau neremndé Yénd neremndam ghérghérsisafé kérmén wagh, a fém yau nende.'
bt: To what, I (can) hard to find/compare about these people? What are they like? 32 They are like children sitting in the exchanging place(market place) and calling out to each other, "We played flute for you and you did not dance! We sang a funeral song, and you did not cry!"

nama: "Jon walitogh ár yénmormén, njamke a wéri nu yau tánetau, a fém norayati, 'Fá yaufi mbérmbérafé yém.' 34 Ároene Ambum yénmormén, njamke a nu nénet, a fém norayati, 'Yéna yém amanjarégh ár a wéri nu nénero, mani kafégh ár a yaufi árfene fútar.' 35 Káfeté mwighé siyém mbarkánd yiyátotat méinyotio yáne waitogh árém." Yesu yéfagharyéng yaufiyam kér ro amafom
bt: Jon the baptist came, he didn't eat food and didn't drink alcohol, and you say, 'He is with evil spirit.' 34 The Son of Man came, eating and drinking, and you say, "Here is a glutton and a alcohol drinker, a friend of tax collectors and sinners." 35 Wisdom is proved straight by her following men. Yesu Anointed by a Sinful Woman

nama: Ámb Farasi ároene waráuwégh yénmormén Yesueyot séite njamket, fá néngwanoi kétán Farasi ároene méngot námnjoi nénet. 37 Ámb amaf efe témorangérwén yaufi ghérsayan yéné tesenan mat náyátoi ndené Yesum njamke tánetau ámb Farasi ároene méngon, yéné amafom yénérsam séfkwénafé mer wimafé wékwér, 38 amaf nokayoi yá sémta Yesuene kafkafot a niyai yáfaf, yáne yengam kuitawét Yesuene kafkafot. Yémon wányányogh yawafngoi yánjo séfe, a esnetai a yawasuryéng mer wimafé wékwére.
bt: One of Farasi men invited Yesu for dinner, he went to Farasi man's house and sit to eat. 37 A woman had lived a sinful life in that town learned that Yesu was eating at one Farasi man's house, that woman brought a jar of the good smelling liquid(perfume), 38 woman stood behind him to [wash] his feet and knelt down to him, and wet Yesu's feet with her tears. She began to wipe them(2 feet) with her hair, and kissed them and poured special smelling liquid on them.

nama: Njam yéné Farasi árom yinjoi yéné yam, fá norayai yánjo kénjún, "Yéné ár njam Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yém, fá mat té yém emo fá yiyanje a nderé sáfot amaf yéné yém, fá siyém yaufiyamafé amaf."
bt: When this Farasi man who invited him saw this, he said to himself, "If this man is God's man who make know(prophet), he would know who is touching him and what kind of woman she is, she is a woman with sin."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Saimon, yéndon ámb si so kémaufron." Yémo korayangé, "Kwaufro, watamegh ár."
bt: Yesu answered him, "Saimon, I will say one talk [to you]." He said, "Tell me, teaching man."

nama: "Sómbio árét mani ewarameyai maniafé árém, ámb ároe 5,000 kina, ámb ároe 500 kina. 42 Sómbio ár maniofnar namndeyayénd wangoghét, féyo yémo mwighafnar ewawaineyai. Emo so minde méndefé yéfande?"
bt: Two men owed money to a moneylender, 5000 kina to one and the other 500 kina. 42 Both of them became no money to pay him back, so he forgave debt for both. Do you see who will very liking him?"

nama: Saimon nuwangoi, "Yénd ndené nemnan endene ndimbal fai mwighafnar yawitam." Yesum yémndai, "Fémo mer nuwango."
bt: Saimon answered, "I think that who had deleted big payment back." Yesu said, "You answered well."

nama: Féyo fá nawengoi amafoe tambén a yémndai Saimon, "Té yéfande yéné amaf?
