bt: Yesu went out as usual to the mountain name Olif, and his following men also followed him. 40 When they reached that place, he said to them, "Talk with God that you will not fall into temptation." 41 He walked on a little bit from them and he knelt down and talked with God, 42 "Father, if your wanting is, take this suffering from me, not my wanting, but your wanting will happen."

nama: Njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng yáfaf a yáutánam fá. 44 Yesum ndimbal tékrát yáyárai, fá minde tikfe Ngánjánafé koraiwét a yáne mélmél témorwén ndenanit férék njélkéfnit kasunau mbandot.
bt: An man carrying heavenly message appeared to him and helped him. 44 Yesu was in big pain, he talked with God with whole heart and his sweat fell down like drops of blood falling to the ground.

nama: Njam fá nokayoi Ngánjánafé orayéghta fá néngangoi yánjo waitogh árfefaf, yémon ewinjoi kémghan, yongnai ghérghérsisamén. 46 Yesum emotai fá, "Némamén fém kémégh ekém? Kanongi a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tawutfongé." Yesu yerayénd
bt: When he got up from talking with God and went back to his following men, he found them asleep, exausted because of sorrow. 46 Yesu asked them, "Why are you sleeping? Get up and talk with God so that you won't fall into temptation." Yesu held

nama: Njamandio Yesu mé sian témorwén, ár mérén enmormén a ár yétkwén Judas efe témorwén 12 waitogh ármén, yémon tanlimndau fá. Yémon yánetai Yesu a yésnetai. 48 Wénde Yesum yémotayéng fá, "Judas, fémon sénot yafngo Ároene Ambum ménaye séneghé?"
bt: While Yesu was still in talk, a crowd came and the man who was called Judas one of 12 following men, he led them. He came up Yesu and kissed him. 48 But Yesu asked him, "Judas, are you betraying the Son of Man with a kiss?"

nama: Njam Yesuene waitogh árém yinjoyénd némé ufroghétro témorwén, fá norayayénd, "Yuré, wét yéndfem so enfetam téfenjo naifaye?" 50 A ámb árom yanfai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ároene tambén téngan.
bt: When Yesu's following men saw what was about to happen, they said, "Lord, should we cut them with our knifes?" 50 And one man cut the right ear of the worker of the leading burning sacrifice man.

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Yéné yau yafrotatiǃ" A Yesum yéné ároene téngan yayanjai a mer yiyátoi fá.
bt: But Yesu said, "Don't this!" And Yesu touched man's ear and healed him.

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf, wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár a sénko ár, efe té enmormén yáyot, "Némé yénd áyárghofnar árfene sénko ár wém? Árkémamén fém taném naifayafé a timayafé? 53 Méinyotio efghon yénd fémafé ténmorwén wáwefnogh méngon, fémofem yénd yau kwéfandawét nékwafé. Wénde sénonjo féfene efogh té nawer, njamandio kwéfkwéfoene wafté féfefaf yém." Fitam yékenayéng Yesu
bt: Then Yesu said to the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests), worshipping house guarders and the head people, who had come to him, "Am I head man of people without hearing(the rebbellion)? Why you come with knifes and clubs? 53 Every day I was with you in the worshipping house, you did not find with anger. But now your day have come, when the power of darkness is to you." Fitè denied Yesu

nama: Yémofem yerayénd Yesu, yéngémnjoyénd kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene méngot. Fitam tangwaitotau nayu kéráye. 55 A njam yémofem fés yuwaroyénd mogh sifayé néndkéfan a fá námnjoyénd mérne, Fité wéi námnjoi yéfefaf. 56 Ásáfogh mérsom yinjoi fá fés kwayaghayan témorangérwén. Mérsom yáyamngoi fá a yémndai, "Yéné ár ámb fiyém Yesue waitogh ár."
bt: They held Yesu, [and] brought to the house of the chief burning sacrifice men. Fitè followed at a distance. 55 And when they had kindled a fire in the middle of courtyard and they sat down together, Fitè also sat with them. 56 A working girl saw him seated in the firelight. The girl recognised him and said, "This man is one of Yesu's following man."

nama: Wénde yémon yanyotayéng a yémndai, "Mérés, yénd mafina wém fá."
bt: But he dinied it and said, "Woman, I don't know him."

nama: Tekofnaye ámb árom wéi yinjoi fáyo a yémndai, "Fém ámb yéné fékéném." Yémon yawangoi, "Ár, yénd yauǃ"
bt: Little later other man also saw him and said, "You are one of them." He answered, "Man, I'm not!"

nama: Ámbiro efoghféneféne soramé ámb árom ménjtaye korayawét ndené, "Fá fété yém Yesue kaka ár, efe yém Galili yumén."
bt: About a hour later other man said strongly that, "He is Yesu's close man, who is from Galili region."

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Ár, yénd mafina wém fém némamén norayeǃ" Njamandio korayau, ghakér kowi táf nutnayéng. 61 Yuré nawengoi téfandangé Fité. Fité nawafarotayéng Yurane si ndernáye yénémndai fá, "Fémon so kwékenang yénd nambinotmé soramé ghakér kowi so kutnangé sénonjo." 62 A fá nétoryéng sáfét ndimbal ye nendam. Wanjengégh árém si tawafrotawét Yesue
bt: Fitè answered, "Man, I don't know what you're talking about!" As he was speaking, the rooster crowed. 61 The Lord turned and looked Fitè. Fitè remembered Lord's talk how he said to him, "You will denied me three times after [this] a rooster will crow today." 62 And he went out clear place and wept big tear. Watching man make fun of Yesu

nama: Árém emofem Yesu tanjetawét si tawafrotawét a ngi yafngoyénd. 64 Yémofem ghékéf yawamoyénd a témndetawét, "Koraya! Emon nésém fém?" 65 A yémofem korayawét tárfár yaufi si yáfaf. Yesu yém Failetene a Erodene sáfrére
bt: The man who were guarding Yesu made fun of him and beat him. 64 They blindfolded him and said, "Say! Who hit you?" 65 And they kept saying many bad talk to him. Yesu are in fornt of Failet and Erod

nama: Fauréghan árfene sénko ár náumendayénd limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár a yéfene sáfrére Yesu yéngémnjoyénd. 67 Fá norayayénd, "Fém njam Keriso ném, téfe ténmaufro."
bt: At daybreak the head people of the people and the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the teaching men of the law gathered and brought Yesu in front of them. 67 They said, "If you are Keriso, tell us."

nama: a yéndon njam fém tamotangén, fémofem yau so ta kwawangongi. 69 Wénde sénonjo yénandmé Ároene Ambum so kámnjongé Minde waftafé Ngánjánene tambén téndon."
bt: and if I asked you, you wouldn't answer to me. 69 But from now on, the Son of Man will be seat at the right side of the With Strong Power(Almighty) God."

nama: Fá méinyotio namotayénd, "Fém fété ném Ngánjánene ambum?" Yémon ewawangoi, "Fém sian mbarkánd em fété yénd wém."
bt: They all asked, "Are you the son of God?"

nama: Féyo yémofem norayayénd, "Yéndfem némé si so yéronjam ndenayu? Yéndfem téfendio té náyárangém yá tambén."
bt: Then they said, "What we will find other saying? We have heard it from him."

nama: Méinyotio árém Yesu yénémnjoyénd Failetefaf. 2 Yémofem Yesu usérmbogh yafngoyénd yéné sie, "Yéné árom ewarsote téfene ár yéné sie, 'Yau ekmetati mani Kaisarefaf, Rom tuk warsagh ároefaf a yéné yétkwénan nawarse nde yénd wém Keriso, warsagh ár.'"
bt: Everyone brought Yesu to Failet. 2 They began to accuse him with this talk, "This man tricked our people with this talk, 'Don't put money to Kaisar, Rom high ruling man and cliams with name to be Keriso, the ruling man(king).'"

nama: Féyo Failetém yémotayéng Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?" Yesum yawangoi, "A, fém némé noraye."
bt: So Failet asked Yesu, "Are you the ruling man(king) of Ju people?" Yesu answered, "Yes, you said that."

nama: Failetém marataye korayau limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a ár mérénafefaf, "Yéndon némé mámáfi yau yinjon yéné ároefaf."
bt: Failet said widely(announced) to the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the crowd, "I don't find this man what is bad."

nama: Wénde fá ménjtaye korayawét, "Yémon kértat taméinde ár méinyotio Judiamén yáne watameghe, kétándmé Galili yu a yénanotio Jerusalemǃ"
bt: But they said strongly, "He is causing trouble through all Judia by his teaching, from Galili region to Jerusalem here!"

nama: Njam Failetém náyárai yénémamén, fá namotai, "Yéné ár Galili yumén yém?" 7 Njam fá mat náyátoi nde Yesu témorwén Erodene limánégh mbanmbanan, Failetém yáfáretam Erodefaf, efe témorwén Jerusalemén yéné efghon.
bt: When Failet heard about this, he asked, "Is this man from Galili region?" 7 When he learned that Yesu was under the Erod's ruling, Failet sent him to Erod, who was in Jerusalem at that time.

nama: Njam Erodém Yesu yinjoyéng, fá ndimbal áuwégh káuwetau ménamén fá teke kawanjetau Yesue winjoghét. Kétándmé Erodém némé té káyáretau yánemén, fá ménde témorwén ámb sélngwélafé yam fandaghét. 9 Erodém tárfár ámogh si tarametau, wénde Yesum yau yawangoi. 10 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár tawakayongérwén kété, nékwafé témndetawét. 11 Féyo Erod a yánjo fiyaré si tawafrotawét a tasalitawét fá. Fá yamanetaménd Yesu warsagh árfene sáláme, yémofem táf kor yéngwangoyénd Failetefaf. 12 Yéné efghon Erod a Failet fá fútar namndeyayénd, fronde kété fá tanérwén mék téfnár.
bt: When Erod saw Yesu, he was so pleased because for a long time he had been waiting to see him. From what Erod heard about him, he wanted to see other surprising thing. 9 Erod asked him a lot of questions, but Yesu did not answer to him. 10 The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the teaching men of the law were standing there, they said with the angry(accused) him. 11 Then Erod and his soldiers made fun of him and insulted him. They dressed Yesu with the ruling man(king)'s clothes, they sent him back to Failet. 12 That day Erod and Failet became friends, before this they were been enemies.

nama: Failetém eumendai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, limánégh ár a ámb ár, 14 a norayai yéfefaf, "Fémofem ténémnjati Yesu tafaf efe témorwén kérté wafrogh ár. Wénde yéndon yéta témotan fá féfene sáfrére a ámb yaufi yau yinjon yáfaf árkémamén fém korayati yémo té tafrote. 15 Erodém yau yaufi yawinjoi féyo yénmangoi téfefaf, 'Yéné ár yau so tékém krot.' 16-17\~ Yénémaménnde yéndon so yéfmotan soramé téngéfrangon."
bt: Failet called together the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and head men and other people, 14 and said to them, "You brought Yesu to me who was a troublemaker. But I tried to ask him in front of you and I have not found him any sins which you say he has done. 15 Erod didn't find him guilty so he sent him back to us, 'He has not done anything to the death. 16-17\~ Therefore I will whip him after [this] let him go."

nama: Wénde ámbiro mwighayan fá nutnayénd, "Tésmetangi, Barabas ténmutorngi téfeyotǃ" 19 Barabas yélawayénd kétán kwéfkwéf sifayat ménamén fá stémorwén ámb ár mérén limánégh ár Jerusalemén yéné efe kásmetawét Rom gafamanafé a ár ngimén.
bt: But they shouted with a one mind, "Kill him, take Baraba out to us!" 19 Barabas was thrown to darkness house because he was a head man of group in Jerusalem that fight against Roman Government and for murder. 20 Failet wanted to take Yesu out, so he spoke again to the crowds. 21 But they kept shouting, "Crucify him! Crucify him!"

nama: Nambinotmé wéikor fá norayai, "Némamén? Némé yaufi yémon yafrotam? Yéndon ámb yau yáne fifi yinjon yáfaf krot. Féyo yéndon so yéfmotan soramé téngéfrangon fá."
bt: For the third time he said, "Why? What sins has he done? I have not found him the reason to put him to death. I will beat him after [it] set him free."

nama: Wénde fá minde kutnawét ménjtaye, "Téngwamendǃ" a yéfene minde ke efalo namndai Yesue waméghét. 24 Féyo Failetém yéfene ménde efalo yiyátoyéng. 25 Yémon yéngéumyoi Barabas efe yélawayénd kwéfkwéf sifayan gafamanafé ásméghmén a ár ngimén, Yesu yéngéumyoi yéfene méndefaf. Yesu wafatarégh wénan yénamndaménd
bt: But they shouted with loud, "Crucify him!" and with their loud shouts insisted that Yesu be put to death. 24 So Failet agreed to their wanting. 25 He released Barabas who had been thrown into darkness house for fighting with/against government and murder, permitted Yesu to their wanting. Yesu is nailed to the cross

nama: Njam fiyaram yéngémnjoyénd Yesu, kété ár yétkwén Saimon témorwén Sairene méngotumén, efe ténmorwén álighan ámb tesenot, a Yesuene wafatarégh wén yéfayoyénd yáne faderan térsawéng Yesue sémta. 27 Tárfár árém Yesu táitotawét, amaf tangwafnyangérwén efe ye kéngéndawét yánemén. 28 Yesu néngawengoi a emndai fá, "Jerusalemén amaf, fém yau ye nendati tanemén. Fém ye nendati féfenjomén a féfenjo ambumtértérafenemén. 29 Efogh yéna yéném njam fémofem so korayangi, 'Frengégh yém ambumofnar amafafet, árké kafkalam ambum yau yéráftam a ndenéyameyo nono yau tafamndawétǃ' 30 Fá so norayat mband tunakéfafefaf, 'Kénuyangi téfefafǃ' a némbne mband tunakéfafefaf, 'Ténmafarngi yéndǃ' 31 Ménamén njam árém yéné rokar ewafrotat njam wén ghérsé yém, némé so nufrote táf sértan?"
bt: When the soldiers led Yesu away, there a man name Saimon from Sairene village, who was traveling to the other city, and put the cross of Yesu him on his shoulder to carry it behind Yesu.

nama: Ámb sómbio ár, tárwén oro téfnár, ndenáyo tangémnjowét Yesufé naméghét kérotio. 33 Njam fá nufaryénd yu yétkwén Golgota, "Yáne fifi Sénko sot sifayé," kété yémofem enamndaménd Yesuf yémafé sómbio oro téfnárafé ámb yáne tambénta, ámb yáne fatrata. 34 Yesu norayai, "Afé, tawawalinda yéfene yaufi, fá mafina em némé yémofem yafrotat." A yémofem Yesuene sáláme kawaftawét ménaye dais kembneye.
bt: Two other men, were thiefs, also were led out to be put to death with Yesu. 33 When they came to the place called Golgota, which means "The skull," there they crucified Yesu with two thiefs, one on his right, the other on his left. 34 Yesu said, "Father, wash their sins, they do not know what they are doing." And they divided Yesu's clothes by throwing dice.

nama: Ár tárfár tawakayongérwén téfandawét yam ufroghan, limánégh árém sénkér tawafrotawét Yesue. Yémofem korayawét, "Yémon tawanjane ámb ár. Fáyo kawanjarngé, njam fá yém Ngánjánene Keriso, yáne waferghkaf ambum."
bt: Many people stood watching this happening, the head men made fun of Yesu. They said, "He saved other people; let him save himself, if he is God's Keriso, his chosen son."

nama: Fiyaré enmormén si tawafrotawét. Yémofem yénmarsaménd njérmat wéri nu yáyot, 37 a norayayénd, "Fém njam ném Ju árfene warsagh ár, fémyo kawanjarǃ" 38 Kété témorwén farogh férén yá tukén, árké yémndetat, "Yéné fiyém Ju árfene warsagh ár."
bt: The soldiers made fun of Yesu. They brought him sour alcohol, 37 and said, "If you are the ruling man(king) of the Ju people, save yourself."

nama: Ámb oro téfnár tamangérwén yá téndon, yémo yémndayéng Yesu, "Fém fété ném Keriso? Kawanjar fémyo a yénd ténmanjareǃ"
bt: One of thiefs hunged beside of Yesu, said to Yesu, "Are you Keriso? Save yourself and save us!

nama: Wénde ámb oro téfnáram yarnaméng fá a yémndai, "Fefaf Ngánján férfér té yém? Fém ndenéyameyo féu ném. 41 Yénd ámb rérero tékrátan yéném mérne, ménamén téfenjo yaufimén yéndfem tékrát yérsuwam. Wénde yéné árom yaufi yau yafrotam." 42 Féyo yémon yémndai, "Yesu, yénd táf wafarota fém njam néngém fenjo Ngánjánene limánghét."
bt: But the other thief rebuked him and said, "You should fear God, [because] you are under the same sentence. 41 We are punished justly because of our sin we did. But this man didn't do anything wrong." 42 Then he said, "Yesu, remember me when you come into your ruling of God."

nama: Yesum yawangoi yá, "Yéndon némndetan fém efalo, sénonjo yénd fémafé so yénre áuwégh méngotuan." Yesuene Kérmén
bt: Yesu answered him, "Truly I tell you, today I will be with you in rejoicing country(pradise). The death of Yesu

nama: Efoghméf témorwén, a kwéfkwéfam yu yafaryéng kétánotio séite karéf efogh náyátoi, 45 ménamén efogh nékmboi atremngogh. Wáwefnogh méngon sénjté sáláme tamangérwén nénatiraryéng tukta nde yuwot sómbio karéf. 46 Yesu minde nutnayéng, "Afé, fene ngángat tane mbérmbér yérametan." Njam yémon yéné si norayai, fá kér táf yémormén.
bt: It was about noon, and darkness come over the land until it became middle of the afternoon, 45 because the sun stopped shinning. The thick cothes [curtain] of the worshipping house was torn in two from top to bottom. 46 Yesu shouted loudly, "Father, I put my spirit in your hands!" When he had said this talk, he died.

nama: Rom fiyaré sénko árom yinjoi némé kufrotau, Ngánján tuwetau a norayai, "Efalo yiyátoi yéné ár témorwén mbarkánd." 48 Njam méinyotio ár efe káumendawét téfandawét néméyam kufrotau, ghérghérsisamén wéfan káutánawét a nénguwanoyénd. 49 Wénde méinyotio fá efe mat tamorwén yánemén a amaf tawafnyangérwén efe kuwaitotau yáfaf kétándmé Galili yu, nayu nénokayoyénd yam téfandawét ufroghan. Yesuene mband raméghmén
bt: Roman soldier head man saw what happened, he praised God and said, "Surely this was a straight man." 48 When all the people who had gathered see what happened, they beat their breasts in sorrow and went away. 49 But all those who knew him and women had followed him from Galili region, stood at a distance and watched these things. The burial of Yesu

nama: Kété témorwén ár yétkwén Josef, Ju sénko árfene áumengégh utmanégh ár, mer a mbarkánd ár, 51 emon yau yéfene mwighé wafroghyam efalo yiyátoi. Fá kétándmé yénmormén Judia árfene tesen Aramatiat a fá kawanjetau Ngánjánene limánégh ufarghét. 52 Fá yéngmormén Failetefaf ámoghét Yesuene fifimén. 53 Féyo yémon yeworyéng yuwot, sáláme fiyarghét ménát mbéwé méngon kémghét kété ámb ár ánde yau yélawayénd 54 Yéné ásáfogh tafrotau wékeye Fraide séiten ménamén Safat rényégh kaka témorwén.
bt: There was a man name Josef, Juwish Ju head men's meeting's respected man(a member of the Ju head men's meeting) a good and straight man, 51 who he did not agree their thinking(opinion/decision). He came from the judia people's town, Aramatiat and he was waiting for the ruling of God revealing. 52 He went to Failet to ask Yesu's body 53 Then he took it down, wrapped in cloth in order that place it in a grave there no one had yet been entered. 54 This work did quickly in Friday because Safat was about to began.

nama: Yéné amaf efe Yesufé enmormén kétándmé Galili yuta yéngwaitoyénd Josef mbéwé fandaghét a ndernáye yékmayénd yáne fifi. 56 Fá néngangoyénd méngot mer wimafé wékwér frengéghét. Wénde fá kenawét Safatan ndené fété Mosesene nák.
bt: This women who had come with Yesu from Galili region followed Josef and saw the grave and how his body was laid in it. 56 They went home to prepare good smelling liquid(perfumes). But they rested on the Safat like as Moses law.

nama: Sande tándái akwan, amafam tangérsawét mer wimafé wékwér árkéméné yénfrendaménd a néngwanoyénd mbéwafaf. 2 Yémofem yinjoyénd wím feghkaf mbéwata, 3 wénde fá njam nélawayénd, yémofem yau yinjoyénd Yuré Yesuene fifi. 4 Njamandio fá mwighayan kéwérsotawét Yesuene fifi árkamé yémorwén, tekofnaye sómbio ár nufaryayénd ghékéf waufaroghe kwayaghé sálámeyafé yéfene téndota nokayeyayénd. 5 Yéné férféran amaf ninyayénd mbandot, wénde yéné árém emndayénd fá, "Fémofem némamén yéronjati kér árfene sifayan efe yém ghérsé? 6 Fá siyém yéna yau yém! Fá té nénganoǃ Mé kawafarotangi fém ndernáye tamndetau, táf fémafé njam mé témorwén Galili yuwon, 7 'Ároene Ambum so téramangi yaufi árfene ngángat, wafatarégh wénan so yénamndat a nambio efghon so kanongé wéikor.'" 8 Táf nawafarotayénd yáne si.
bt: Sunday early morning, women carried special smelling liquids which they had prepared and went to grave. 2 They found the stone rolled away from grave enterance, 3 but when they entered, they did not find Lord Jesu's body. 4 While they were wondering where is Yesu's body, suddenly two men appeared in shining white clothes stood beside them. 5 In fear women bowed down to the ground, but these men said to them, "Why are you looking for who are living among the dead? 6 He is not here! He has risen! Remember how he told you, while he was with you in Galili region, 7 'The Son of Man will be handed over to the hand of sinners, be crucified and on the third day will be raised again.' 8 Then they remebered his talks.

nama: Njam fá nénangoyénd kétándmé mbéwata, yémofem ewaufroyénd méinyotio némé téfandawét 11 waitogh árét a méinyotio ámb árfet. 10 Meri Makdalin, Joana, Meri Jemse yátmé, ámb amaf efe tamorwén yémafé ewaufroyénd Yesuene muyafé árét. 11 Wénde yémofem efalo yau eyátoyénd yéfene si, ménamén yéfene si afrogh témorwén yéfeyot ndenanit onon ár kar korayawét. 12 Wénde Fité táf fété nurtotam a nétonam mbéwé yafoghét. Fité néngáwefnoi, engwinjoi sálámero tákmangérwén kénaghkaf, a fá néngwanoi uwérsoghan témorwén némé té nufrotam. Endmé áligh Emausét
bt: When they came back from the grave, they told all what they saw to 11 following men and all other people. 10 [It was] Meri Magdalin, Joana, Meri the mother of Jems other woman who was with them told to the men with Yesu's authority(apostles). 11 But they did not truly approve(believe) their talks, because their talks were to them like mad men might be speaking(nonsence). 12 But Fitè immediately got up and went out to the grave. Fitè bent over, [and] saw only cloth put stripped, and he went back wondering what had happened. Walking on the road to Emaus

nama: Yéné efghonyo sómbio ár tangérwén Jerusalemta kétán Emausét 11 kilomité 14 Yémofem téngwarunwét endmé yéfe kénjúnro némé yam kufrotau. 15 Njamandio fá ngoraiwét a téngwarunwét mérne, Yesu fáyo yénmormén a tayotau yémafé. 16 Wénde yémofem yau yayamngeyayénd Yesu.
bt: On that same day two [of them] were going from Jerusalem to Emaus about 11kilomitèrs. 14 They were talking on the road each other what had happened. 15 As they talked and discussed together, Yesu himself came and walked with them. 16 But they did not recognize him.

nama: Yémon emotangeyai fá, "Némamén fémofem yarunyét táf fém seyowé?"
bt: He asked them, "Why are you discussing as you walk?"

nama: Ámb témorwén yétkwén Klofas, yémotai fá, "Fém némé wan téfnár ném Jerusalemén a mafina ném némé yam nufrotat yéné efghon?"
bt: One [of them] name Klofas, asked him, "Are you what kind visiter to Jerusalem and who does not know what have happened in these days?"

nama: Yesum emotangeyai, "Némé yam nufrotat?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Yesu Najaretmén. Fá témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár wafté kér ro sian a sélngwélafé yam wafroghan Ngánján sáfrére a méinyotio ár. 20 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a téfene limánégh árém yémnjoyénd a yéramayénd krot, a yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan. 21 Wénde téfene méghmégh nafayoi nde fá so témorwén emo so tanjarngai Israil. Nambio efogh sénonjo yém yéné yam té kufrotat. 22 Féyo ámb amaf téfene mérénmén sélngwél yéramayénd. Fá tangém mbéwafaf sénonjo tándái akwan 23 wénde yau yinjoyénd Yesuene fifi. Fá nénangoyénd téfefaf yénmaufroyénd téfe ndené fá yinjongi njafar si résagh ár, efe noraya ndené fá siyém ghérsé yém. 24 Féyo ámb téfene mérénmén ár néngwanoyénd mbéwafaf a yinjoyénd ndené fété amaf némé kafrotawét, wénde Yesu yéné amafam yau yinjoyénd."
bt: "Yesu asked, "What happend?" They answered, "About Yesu from Najaret. He was a God's man who make know(prophet) [who was] powerful in talk and did a mirracles in the front of God and all the people. 20 The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and our rulers handed over him and gave to death, and they nailed him on the cross. 21 But we had hope that he would be the one who would save Israil. This is now three day since it was happened. 22 Then some women of our group amazed us. They went to the grave early this moning 23 but didn't find Yesu's body. They came back to us [and] said to us that they saw men carrying heavenly message(angels), who told them that he was alive. 24 Then some from our group went to the grave and found it just as women had said, but they did not see Yesu."

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Nderé mwighafnar fém em, a nderé táikér yéfandati efalo yátoghét tikfan méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém némé korayawétǃ 26 Kerisoe áfrat témorwén tékratot soramé fá nélawai yánjo ndimbal kwayaghat?" 27 Yémon sie yérnyai Moseseta a méinyotio ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, yémon tawawafenau yéfeyot némé té korayau méinyotio Ngánjánene sian yánjomén.
bt: He said to them, "How foolish(without thinking) you are, and how hard you saw big mind(faith) in heart all that the God's people who make know(prophets) have spoken! 26 Was it necessary for Keriso to suffer after [this] he enter his big light(glory)? 27 He began to talk from Moses and all the God's people who make know(prophets), he explained to them what was said in all the God's talks about him.

nama: Yémofem kaka méngotu yéngiyátoyénd ándan fá tangmorwén, Yesu awaingétro téngmorwén. 29 Wénde yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu ménjtaye, "Yéndfé kámnjongém ménamén yéférte." Féyo fá néngwanoi yéfefaf ámnjoghét.
bt: They approached the village where they were going, Yesu was about to pass over. 29 But they urged Yesu strongly, "Stay with us because it is nearly evening." So they went in to stay with them.

nama: Fá njam námnjoi njamke sifayan yémafé, yémon féskaf flawé yékafai, kánjo yéramai a yétfoi ewarametam yéfeyot. 31 Féyo táf yéfene ghékéf nasawéryénd a yáyamngoyénd efe Yesu témorwén, a fá néngolindai kétándmé yéfene ghékéfta. 32 Fá korayawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Téfene tikéf nakérnat téfene kénjún njamandio fá korayau téfefaf endén a si yénmasawéryéng téfeyot?"
bt: When he sat down in the eating place with them, he took flawè, gave thanks and broke it [and] gave it to them. 31 Then their eyes were opened and they recognized who was Yesu, and he disappeared from their eyes. 32 They said to each other, "Our hearts were burning in us while he said to us on the road and opened the Buk(scripture)s to us?"

nama: Fá wékeye nuwanoyénd a kangotawét Jerusalemét. Kété fá ewinjoyénd 11 waitogh ár a ámb ár emafé káumendawét 34 a korayawét, "Efalo yémǃ Yuré té nénano a nufar Saimonefaf." 35 Féyo sómbioyam ewaufreyayénd némé kufrotau yéfefaf endén, a ndernáye yémofem Yesu yayamngeyayénd Yesum njam féskaf flawé ewatfeyai. Yesu nufaryéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf
bt: They left quickly and returned to Jerusalem. There they found 11 following men and other people gathered together with them 34 and said, "It is true! The Lord has risen and has appeared to Saimon." 35 Then the two told what had happened to them on the road, and how they recognized Yesu when he broke the flawè. Yesu appeared to his the following men

nama: Njamandio fá mé korayawét yénémamén, Yesu fáyo nénokayoi yéfene kénjún a norayayéng yéfefaf, "Krufrat féfefaf so yémǃ"
bt: While they were still talking about this, Yesu himself stood among them and said to them "Peace be with you!"

nama: Yéné mérén férféram ewifoi ndené kemnawét nde yémofem kar yinjoyénd bérsebérse. 38 Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Némamén fém néworsotati, némamén féfene mwighé déudéu nanote? 39 Tafandangi tane sómbio ngángé a sómbio kafkaf. Yénd yéndio efalo fété wémǃ Kwiyánja yénd a kwéfandangi. Bérsebérse yau yém fifiyafé a sotafé, fémofem kés wéfandati yénd fété wém."
bt: This group were full of fear that they thought that they might see a ghost. 38 He said to them, "Why are you frightened, and why do doubts in your mind? 39 Look at my two hands and my two feet. It is I myself! Touch me and see me; a ghost was not with body(flesh) and bones, as you see I have.

nama: Njam fá korayau yénémamén, yémon tawauyafotau yáne ngángé kabu a kafkaf. 41 Yémofem mé tétambnawét efalo yau tiyátotawét ménamén áuwégh a sélngwélafé yammén, yémon emotayéng fá, "Féfene ámb némndafi té ewam yéna nénet?" 42 Yémofem yaramayénd Yesue bélamén wagif mbarmbar, 43 a yémon yékafai a yerai ténetau yéfene ghékfan.
bt: When he said about this, he showed his hands and feet. 41 They still did not truly approve(believe) it because of Joy and amazement, he asked them "Do you have a piece here to eat?" 42 They gave him a piece of roasted fish, 43 and he took it and ate it in their eyes.

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yéné fiyém némé yénd korayawén táf yénd njam mé ténmorwén fémafé. Méinyotio si efalo so náyátote némé yéfarotaménd tanemén Mosesene nák kénjún, Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene Buk a Sams."
bt: He said to them, "This is what I told you while I was still with you. Every talks must be fulfilled what was written in the laws of Moses, God's people who make know(prophets) and psalms."

nama: Féyo yémon ewasawéryéng yéfene mwighé mat áyátoghét Buk si némé yéfarotaménd. 46 Yémon ewaufroi yéfeyot, "Yéné fiyém némé yéfarotaménd tanemén. Keriso so tékrátan yém a kénanongé kétándmé kérta nambiomén efghon, 47 a yaufi awengoghmén a wányányéghmén so yaitotat yáne yétkwénan méinyotio yuwomé so térnyangi kétándmé Jerusalemta. 48 Fém em fandagh ár yéné yammén. 49 Yéndon ewáfáretan fém némat tane Afam unyéghofnar si norayai. Wénde tesenan so nawanjetati kétánotio njafar tukta waftaye kéneworngé féfefaf." Yesuene uyoghmén
bt: Then he opened their minds to understand God's talks(Scriptures) what is written. 46 He told them, "This is what is written about me. Keriso will be in suffering and rise from the death on the third day, 47 and the turning away [from] sin and the washing will be preached in his name to all nations, will begin from Jerusalem. 48 You are watching men about these things. 49 I am sending you what my father said without-lying saying(did without-lying talk). But you will wait in the city until the power from heaven comes down upon you. The ascension of Yesu

nama: Yémon njam elimai Betani tesenta, Yesum ngángé euyoi a efrendai fá. 51 Njamandio fá táfrendawéng, yémon engfrangoi fá táf nénguyoi njafarot. 52 Féyo yémofem yáwefnoyénd Yesue a kangotawét Jerusalemét ndimbal áuwéghafé. 53 A fá túmén kawanjetawét wáwefnogh méngon méinyotio efghon, Ngánján tuwétawét. |IB04179gr.tif|col||by Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide.|Yesu narmboi njafarot (Luk 24.50-51)|24.50-51
bt: When he led them to Betani town, Yesu lifted his hands and blessed them. 51 While he was blessing them, he left them and was taken up into heaven. 52 Then they worshiped Yesu and returned to Jerusalem with big joy. 53 And they kept waiting in the worshipping house every day, and praised God.

nama: Kété téfnan Si té kaketau; Si Ngánjánafé tárwén, a Si témorwén Ngánján. 2 Kétaméfifi téfén Si Ngánjánafé tárwén. 3 Yáne kénjúmé Ngánjánam ewafrotam méinyotio rokar; yau ámbiro rokar náláite méinyotio ufrogh kénjún yáyofnaye. 4 Si témorwén ghérsé téfén, a yéné ghérsé yam yénérsam kwayaghé kétán árét. 5 Kwayaghé nálále kwéfkwéfan, a kwéfkwéfam yau so taindangé.
bt: In the beginning(root) the Word already existed; the Word was(2 people was)with God, and the Word was God. 2 From the very beginning the Word was(between 2 people) with God. 3 Through his(him) God made everything; nothing appreared in every being made without him. 4 The Word was the source (of) life, and this life brought light to people. 5 The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness cannot pass/overcome it.

nama: Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam yánjo si résagh ár, ár yétkwén Jon, 7 efe yénmormén kafrotau árfefaf kwayaghamén, ménát méinyotio so náyáretat si a efalo tiyátongi. 8 Fá fáyo yau kwayaghé témorwén; fá yénmormén kafrotau kwayaghamén. 9 Yénéf témorwén efalofifi kwayaghé árké kwayaghé yéném mband maratot a nálále méinyotio árfefaf.
bt: God sent his word carrying people(messenger), a man name Jon, 7 who came, told to the people about the light, so that all will hear the talk and truly approve(believe) it. 8 He himself was not the light; he came told about the light. 9 This was very real light which the light comes into the world and shines (on)to all the people.

nama: Si té témorwén mband marat kénjún, a ndemamén Ngánjánam yafrotam mband marat yáne kénjúmé, wénde mband maratam yau yáyamngoyéng fá. 11 Fá yénmormén yá yuwot, wénde yánjo árém yau yumyoyénd fá. 12 Wénde ámb árém fété té yumyoyénd fá a efalo yiyátoyénd; yémon ewaramai muyé nénamndayénd Ngánjánene ambumtértér. 13 Fá yau náyátoyénd Ngánjánene ambumtértér fifie áráfghe o árfene méndeye o ménaye sái náráftat fifie afafe kénjúmé; wénde áráfégh árké yém Ngánjáneta.
bt: The Word was in the world, and though God made the world through his(him), but the world did not know him. 11 He came to his own land, but his own peole did not accepted him. 12 But some people had accepted him and truly approved(believed) in him; he gave them the authority to become God's children. 13 They did not become God's children by physical birth nor by human's will or being born through physical father; but birth which is from God.

nama: Si náyátoi ár a témorangérwén téfe kénjún, ngárám a efalo afoghkaf. Yéndfem yinjoyém yáne ndimbal kwayaghé, árké yémon yanai ndené fété Afane féfét Ambum.
bt: The Word became a man and lived among us, full of grace and truth. We saw his strong light(big light), which he received as the Father's only one Son.

nama: Jon korayau yánemén. Fá nutnai, "Yéné fá fiyém yénd endenemén kénorayan táf njam korayan, 'Fá yéném ta soramé, wénde yénd wainde yémo, ménamén fá fronde kaketau yénd soramé náráftamén.'"
bt: Jon spoke about him. He shouted, "This is the one I was talking about when I said, 'He comes after me, but he surpasses me, because he first existed I was born later(existed before I was born).'"

nama: Yáne afoghkaf ngáráme yémo té yénfrendai yénd méinyotio, a yénmaramete téfe ámb frengégh yénamayo wéi ámb. 17 Ngánjánam yéramai nák Mosese kénjúmé, wénde ngárám a efalo yénmormén yá kénjúmé Yesu Keriso. 18 Emo ámb yau yinjoi Ngánján. Féfét Ambumomro, efe yém Ngánjányo a efe yém kaka Afafaf, yémo té safén yékmai fá. Jon walitogh ároenemén si
bt: By his full grace he has blessed us all, and gave us one blessing after other again. 17 God gave the law through Moses, but grace and truth came through him Yesu Keriso. 18 No one has seen God. The only one Son, who is God himself and who is close to the Father, whom put him clear. Talk about Jon the baptisting man(baptist)

nama: Ju sénko árém Jerusalemén ewáfáretaménd ámb ghéngén wárogh ár a Lefi mérénmén Jone moghét, "Fém Efe ném?"
bt: The Ju head men(head men) in Jerusalem sent some sacrifice offering man(burning sacrifice men) and people from Lefi group(Levites) to Jon to ask [him], "Who are you.s?"

nama: Jon yau nakenai uwangoghét, wénde norayai marataye a safénro, "Yénd yau Keriso wém."
bt: Jon did not refuse to answer, but spoke openly and clearly, "I am not the Keriso."

nama: Fá námotayénd, "Féyo fém efe ném? Efe ném Elaija?" Joném ewawangoi, "Yau, yénd yau fá wém." Fá namotayénd, "Fém ném yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár?" Yémo ewawangoi, "Yau."
bt: They asked, "So who are you? Are you Elaija{m{ ...f* {m{1.21 Elaija explain who were waiting for by Ju ?" Jon answered them, "No, I am not him." They asked, "Are you the Prophet(man to making knowing God's knowledge)? He answered, "No."

nama: Fá korayangi, "Ténmaufro téfe fém efe ném? Yéndfem so uwangogh si yangotam yéfe emofem ténmáfáretat yénd. Némé fém noraye fenjomén?"
bt: They said, "Tell us who you are? We will take an answer to those who sent us. What do you say about yourself?"

nama: Jon nuwangoi Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane sian: "Yénd ámb ároene kém wém nutne fanfne yuwon: Tafrotangi mbarkánd end Yurai álighét!"
bt: Jon answered in the talk of the God's man who make know(prophet) Aisaya: "I am the voice of someone shouting in the clear place(desert){n{ ...f* {n{1.23 picture for printout : Make a straight way [for] the Lord to walk!"

nama: Farasi ár mérén efe enwáfáretaménd, 25 wéi yémotayénd Jon, "Fém yau njam ném Keriso o Elaija o Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, némamén fémon nuan walitogh ewafrote?"
bt: The Farasi men who had been sent, 25 asked Jon again, "If you are not Keriso or Elaija or the Prophet, why do you do washing with water(baptize)?

nama: Jon nuwangoi, "Yéndon ewalitotan nue, wénde féfefafényo yakai fá fiyém endenemén mat yau em. 27 Fá ta soramé yéném, wénde yénd féyotarofnar wém yáne sandol ángégh ferghét.
bt: Jon answered, "I put into(baptize) with water, but among you stands one who you do not know. 27 He is coming after me, but I am not enough to untie his sandol's rope."

nama: Méinyotio yéné kété kufrotau Betanin kété Joden wanjen wér tambén, ánde Joném tawalitotau. Ngánjánene Sif tosé
bt: All this happend there in Betani there the east side of the Joden River, where Jon was baptizing. God's Lamb

nama: Yénamayo efghon Joném yinjoi Yesu ténmorwén yáfaf, a norayai, "Téfandangi, yéné yém Ngánjánene Sif tosé, emo mband maratoene yaufi titrombongé! 30 Yéné fiyém fá yéndon efe tésérmbnan a yénd kénorayan, "Ár efe ta soramé yéném, yénd wainde yémo, ménamén fá fronde kaketau yénd soramé náráftamén." 31 Yénd yau mat náyátoyén yánemén, wénde yénd kwéném nue walitoghét ménát fá so safén kakmangé Israil árfefaf."
bt: The next day Jon saw Yesu coming to him, and said, "Look, here is God's Lamb, who takes away the sin of the world! 30 This is he who I was talking about and I said, "A man who is coming after me, he surpasses me, because he first existed I was born after." 31 I did not know about him, but I came batizing with water in order that it might put him clear to Israil people."

nama: A Joném yéné si korayau: "Yéndon yinjon Ngánján Mbérmbér nénewor ndenanit mamu kétamé njafarta a nafai yáfaf. 33 Yénd so mé yau mat namndayén ndené fá fété témorwén, wénde Ngánjánam, emo kwémáfárete yénd ménát walitoghét nue, té noraya tafaf, 'Fémon so tinjo Ngánján Mbérmbér so kéneworngé kafayongé ároefaf; fá fiyém emo so ewalitote Ngánján Mbérmbére.' 34 Jon norayai, "Yéndon té téfandan yéné yam a yéndon ewaufrotan féfe ndené fá yéné féyém Ngánjánene Ambum." Fronde Yesuene waitogh ár
bt: And Jon said this talk: "I saw the God Spirit(God Spirit) come down like as mamu/Note:looks like dove white bird/ from heaven and stay on him. 33 I did not know still that he was the one, but God, who sent me to baptize with water, had said to me, 'You will see the God Spirit come down [and] stay on a man; he is [the one] who will baptize with the God Spirit.' 34 Jon said, "I have seen this things and I tell you that he is the Son of God." The first Disciples of Yesu

nama: Yénamayo efghon Jon takayongérwén wéikor kété yémafé sómbio yáne waitogh ár kénjún, 36 njam yémo yinjoi Yesu álighan, fá norayai, "Téfandangi, ndené kés yém Ngánjánene Sif tosé!"
bt: The next day Jon was standing there again with two in/of his following men, 36 when he saw Yesu walking, he said, "Look That's the Lamb of God"

nama: Sómbio waitogh árém yiyáreyayénd fá norayai yéné a néngwanoyénd Yesufé. 38 Yesu nawengoyéng, ewinjeyai yá waitoghan, a namotai, "Némat fém nérét?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Ánde fém némorang, Rabai?" Yéné yétkwénoene fifi siyém "Watamegh ár."
bt: The two following men heard(dual) him say this and went with Yesu. 38 Yesu turned, saw them(2 of them) following him, and asked (to 2 of them), "What are you(dual) looking for?" They.d answered, "Where are you staying, Rabai? (This name's meaning is "Teaching man(Teacher.")

nama: Fá nuwangoi, "Awe a fandaghét." Yéné táf témorwén 4 aklokotro séiteyan. Féyo fá néwaneyayénd yémafé a yinjeyayénd ánde fá témorangérwén a yifeyayénd yéné efogh yémafé.
bt: He answered, "Come and to see." (It was 4 o'clock in the afternoon.) So they.d went with him and saw where he was staying and spent that day with him.

nama: Ámb fá témorwén Endru, Saimon Fita yánngén, emo yiyárai némé Jon té norayai a emo yáitoi Yesu, 41 Táf fété fá nuwanoi a yinjoi yánjo ané Saimon a yaufroi yá, "Yéndfem té yinjongém Mesaya." Yáne yétkwénoene fifi siyém Keriso. 42 Féyo yémon yéngémnjoi Saimon kétán Yesuefaf. Yesum yéfandai fá a norayai, "Fene yétkwén siyém Saimon Jonene ambum, wénde fém so némanmotat Sifas." Yéné sái yawengongi Fité a yáne fifi yém "wím." Yesum ewanmeyai Filif a Nataniel
bt: There is one of them was Endru, Saimon Fitè's younger brother, who heard what Jon had said and who had followed Yesu. 41 At once he went and saw his big brother Saimon and told him, "We have found Mesaya."(His name's meaning is "Keriso.") 42 Then he took Saimon to Yesu. Yesu looked at him and said, "Your name is Saimon son of Jon, but will be called Sifas." (This can translate Fitè and its meaning is "a rock.") Yesu called Filif and Nataniel

nama: Yénamayo efghon Yesu nemnai álighét Galili yuwot. Yémo yinjoi Filif a norayai yáfaf, "Kwénmaito!" 44 Filif témorwén Betsaidamén, tesen ánde Endru a Fité tamorarwén. 45 Filifém yinjoi Nataniel a yaufroi yá, "Yéndfem té yinjongém fá endenemén Mosesém té yéfarotam nák bukan a endenemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém wéi té yéfarotaménd. Fá yém Yesu Josefene ambum Najaretmén."
bt: The next day Yesu thought to go to Galili region. He found Filif and said to him, "Follow me!" 44 (Filif was from Betsaida, the town Endru and Fitè lived.) 45 Filif found Nataniel and told him, "We have found the one whom Moses wrote in the book of the law and who the God's people who make know(prophets) also wrote. He is Yesu the Josef's son from Najaret."

nama: Nataniel namotai, "Ámb némé mer rokar so yéném Najaretta?" Filif nuwangoi, "Awe a téfanda."
bt: Nataniel asked, "Can anything good come from Najaret?" Filif answered, "Come and see."

nama: Njam Yesum yinjoi Nataniel ténmorwén kétán yáfaf, Yesu norayai yánemén, "Siyém efalo Israil ár; yáfaf unyégh yau yém!"
bt: When Yesu saw Nataniel coming to him, Yesu said about him, "Here is a real Israil man; to him there is no deceit!"

nama: Natanielém yémotai fá, "Ndernáye fém mat ném yénd?" Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon néminjon fém njam wén yétkwén figh njaran ném soramayo Filifém némanmo fém."
bt: Nataniel asked him, "How do you know me?" Yesu answered, "I saw you when you were in the shadow of the breadfruit tree before Filif called you."

nama: Nataniel nuwangoi, "Watamegh ár, fém sném Ngánjánene Ambum! Fém sném warsagh ár Israilmén!"
bt: Nataniel answered, "Teacher, you are the Son of God! You are the ruling man(king) of Israil!"

nama: Yesu norayai, "Fene efalo yátogh té yém ménamén yéndon fém korayangén ndené yéndo néminjoyén wén yétkwén figh njaran? Soramé fémo so efande minde ndimbal yam nufrotat árkéménayam so ewainde némé sénonjo efande!" 51 A fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo: fémofem so tinjongi njafar so kasawérngé a Ngánjánene njafar si résagh ár so nénguyotat a nénewonat Ároene Ambum kénjúmé."
bt: Yesu said, "Your truly approve(believe) is it because I told you that I saw you in the shadow of the fig tree? Later you will look very big things happen that will surpass what you have seen now!" 51 And he said to them, "I am telling you the truth: you will find heaven open and God's men carrying heavenly message(angels)(heaven talk carring men) will go up and come down through the Son of Man."

nama: Sómbio efogh soramé kété témorwén awerégh téménd Kana tesenan Galili yu kénjún. Yesue yátmé kété témorwén, 2 a Yesu a yáne waitogh ár enwarawayénd kétán awerégh téméndfaf. 3 Njam wéri nu nefoi, Yesue yátmé norayai yáfaf, "Yéfene wéri nu té nefo."
bt: Two days later there was a wedding feast in Kana town in Galili region. Yesu's mother was there, 2 and they invited Yesu and his following men to the wedding feast. 3 When the alcohol finished, Yesu's mother said to him, "Their alcohol has already finished."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Amé, fémo némamén wémndete yénémamén? Tane efogh yau nawer."
bt: Yesu answered her, "Mother, why do you tell me this? My day has not come."

nama: Yesue yatmam emndai faiofnar ásáfogh ár, "Ewafrotati némé njam yémo emndeta."
bt: Yesu's mother told the workers, "Do if what he tells you."

nama: Ju árfene nák kété tamorwén ménamén téménd umbaréghmén, a yénémamén 6 wím séfkwén nu wékwéghmén tamorwén kété, ámbiroámbiroe yéné nu werégh féyotaroan 80 o 120 lita. 7 Yesu norayai faiofnar ásáfogh árfefaf, "Tawararotangi yéné séfkwén ménaye nue." Yémofem ewararotaménd kétán sénfnetio, 8 a wéi yémo emndai fá, "Sénonjo tukangi ámb nu a téngwanangi kétán yéné ároefaf emo yánjete téménd." Yémofem nu yéngwanayénd yáfaf, 9 árké té nawengoi wéri nuot, a yémon yufoyéng. Fá yau mat namndai árkandmé yéné wéri nu yénmormén (wénde faiofnar ásáfogh ár emofem nu enéukayénd mat tamorwén), féyo yémon yanmoi awerégh ár 10 a norayai yáfaf, "Méinyotio árém enérsaménd fronde merfifi wéri nu. Njam árém enetaménd tárfár, féyo yémofem tawarametawét yuwanyo wéri nu. Wénde fém ném fénataye. Fémo té tamnde merfifi wéri nu yénanotio sénonjo!"
bt: There were rules of Ju people about ritual washing, and so there were 6 stone jars for water carring, each one can hold between 80 litè or 120 litè. 7 Yesu said to the workers, "Fill these jars with water." They filled them to the brim, 8 and he told them again, "Now draw some water out and take it to the man who is looking after feast." They took him the water, 9 which had turned into alcohol, and he tasted it. He did not know from where this alcohol had come (but workers who had drawn out the water knew); so he called the bridgegroom 10 and said to him, "Everyone brings out the best alcohol first. When people have had plenty to drink, then they give people cheaper alcohol. But you.s are different. You.s have kept the best alcohol until now.’

nama: Yesum yafrotam yéné fronde ufarogh yam Kanan Galili yu kénjún; kété yémon yuyafoi yánjo ndimbal kwayaghé, a yánjo waitogh árém efalo yiyátoyénd fá.
bt: Yesu did this first surprising things in Kana in Galili region; there he revealed his strong light(big light), and his following men truly approved(believed) in him.

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu a yánjo amé, néngnéf a waitogh ár engmormén kétán Káfenamét a emorangérmén tárfárofnar efogh. Yesu yéngmormén kétán wáwefnogh méngot
bt: After this, Yesu and his mother, small brothers and following men went to Kafenam and stayed there not for a many days. Yesu went to the worshipping house

nama: Efogh kakafifi témorwén ménát Waingégh témndot, féyo yénémamén Yesu yéngmormén kétán Jerusalemét. 14 Kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan yémon ewinjoi ár tátérnawét kau, sif, a mamu a ndenáyo mani térarégh ár tamorangérwén yéfenjo kitarékitarayan. 15 Féyo yémon yafrotam téfél ángéghmén a wifarégh méinyotio ár ewafngoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayata, yéfene sif a kauafé; yémon tawatarnau yéfene mani mbwe a tawengotau yéfene mani térarégh kitaré, 16 a yémon emndai fá emofem tátérnawét mamu, "Tangéutorngi yénandmé! Kékmbongi tane Afane méngo yau yengotati marat sifayat!" 17 Yáne waitogh ár nawafarotayénd ndenénde si ménj noraye, "Tane uwégh fene méngot nakérne tafaf ndenanit fés."
bt: It was very close day for the Passover festival, so Yesu went to Jerusalem. 14 There in the worship house (worshipping house) area he found people exchanging cow, sheep and doves and also the money exchanging men sitting at their tables. 15 So he made a whip from the ropes and drove the all the people from the worshipping house, with their cows and sheep; he scattered their coins and turned over their money changing tables, 16 and he said to them who sold doves, "Take them out of here! Stop changing my Father's house a open space(market)!" 17 His following men remembered like that the verse says, "My love to your house burns in me like a fire."

nama: Ju sénko ár nénangoyénd ámoghafé yáfaf, "Némé ufarogh yam fémon so yafrote sái ténmauyafo téfe ndené fém waftafé ném yéné wafroghét?"
bt: The Ju head men came back at him with a question, "What surprising thing can you do to show us that you have the power(authority) to do this?"

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Tironangi yéné wáwefnogh méngo, a nambio efogh kénjún yéndon so tanongén yéné wéikor."
bt: Yesu answered, "Destroy this worshipping house, and in three days I will raise it up again."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Némé fémo so yéramete yéné wéikor nambio efogh kénjún? Yéné wáwefnogh méngo ramégham yérsam 46 yunjéf!"
bt: They asked him, "What are you going to build it again in three days? To build this worshipping house took 46 years!"

nama: Wénde Yesu njam norayai wáwefnogh méngo yánjo fifimén korayau 22 Féyo njam fá nanoi kérta, yáne waitogh árém nawafarotayénd nde fá té norayai yéné, a yémafem efalo yiyátoyénd Buk si a némé Yesu té norayai. Yesu mat yém árfene tikéf
bt: But when Yesu said the worshipping house he said his body. 22 So when he was raised from death, his following men remeberd that he had said this, and they truly approved(believed) the Buk(scripture) and what Yesu had said. Yesu know people's heart

nama: Táf Yesu témorwén Jerusalem kénjún táf Waingégh témndan, tárfáram efalo tiyátotawét fá ménamén yémofem téfandawét ufaroghafé yam tawafrotau. 24 Wénde Yesu yau kámyotau yéfefaf, ménamén fá mat témorwén méinyotio árfenemén. 25 Kété yau siot témorwén ménát yá sái taufrongayénd yéfenemén, ménamén fá fáyo mat témorwén némé yéfene tikfan tamorwén.
bt: While Yesu was in Jerusalem during the Passover festival, many truly approved(believed) in him because they saw the surprising things he did. 24 But Yesu did not depend on himself to them, because he knew all people. 25 There was no need any talk in order to say about them, because he himself knew what was in their hearts.

nama: Kété témorwén ámb Ju sénko ár yétkwén Nikodimas, efe témorwén Farasi mérénmén. 2 Ámb sémbár fá yéngmormén Yesuefaf a norayai yáfaf, "Watamegh ár, yénd mat yéném ndené fém ném watamegh ár efe nénmáfáretam Ngánjánam. Yau emo so ámb ufarogh yam ewafrote yéné fémon sewafrote táfandro Ngánjánafé njam fém ere."
bt: There was one Ju head man name Nikodimas, who was in a Farasi group. 2 One night he went to Yesu and said to him, "Teacher, we know that you are a teaching man who God sent. No one can perform the surprising things you are doing unless God were/Note:dual/ with you."

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon efalo némaufrotan fe: emo yau so tinjongé Ngánjánene limánégh táfandro njam wéikor náráfta."
bt: Yesu answered, "I am telling you the truth: no one can see the ruling of God(God's reigning) unless he is born again."

nama: Nikodimas namotai, "Ndernáye so anoghkaf ár náráfte wéikor? Fá yau so kélawangé yátmane kafkalot a sái náráfta sómbinotma!"
bt: Nikodimas asked, "How can a grown man be born again? He cannot enter his mother's womb and be born a second time!"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon némaufrotan efalofifi, efe ámb yau so kélawangé Ngánján limánéghét táfandro njam náráfta nue a Ngánján Mbérmbére. 6 Ár siyém náráfte fifiyan afafeta, wénde náráfte mbérmbéran Ngánján Mbérmbére. 7 Fém yau táf sélngwél ném ménamén yéndon némaufrotan fe ndené fém so fété méinyotio náráftati kor. 8 Mbormbor yéfnje kétán ándan té ménde yém; fémon yéné rér ke náyárete árké yafrote, wénde fém yau mat ném árké tambén yéném o ándan wéi yéngém. Yéné ndené fiyém yéfe méinyotio efe náráftat Ngánján Mbérmbére.
bt: Yesu answered him, "I am telling you the truth, no one can enter the ruling of God unless he is born by water and the God Spirit. 6 A man is born in body from parents, but is born in spirit by the God Spirit. 7 You should not be surprised because I tell you that you must all(of you) be born again. 8 The wind blows to where it wants; you.s hear its sound which it makes, but you.s don't know from which way it comes or where it is going again. It is like that to them every people who is born by the God Spirit.

nama: Nikodimas namotai, "Ndernáye yéné yém?"
bt: Nikodimas asked, "How this is?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fém sném ndimbal watamegh ár Israil kénjún, a fém yau mat ném yénémamén? 11 Yéndon némaufrotan fe efalo: yéndfem norayam némé yénd mat yéném a yufanam némé yéndfem té téfandam, wénde somé ámb yau fém ménde em téfene si umyoghét. 12 Fene efalo yátogh yau yém tafaf njam yéndon némaufrotan fe ménamén yéné mbandmén rokarmén; ndernáye so fémon efalo wiyátote yénd njam yéndon némaufrotan njafar rokarmén? 13 A yaufifi efe ámb yéngmormén tukét kétán njafarot mé Ároene Ambumro, efe yénmormén yuwot njafarta."
bt: Yesu answered him, "You.s are a big teaching man in Israil, and you.s don't know about this? 11 I am telling you the truth: we speak what we know and report what we have seen, but still none of you.p willing to accept our talk. 12 Your.s big mind(faith) is not to me when I tell you.s about things of this world; how will you.s truly approve(believe) me when I tell you about things of heaven? 13 And no one has gone upto heaven except the Son of Man, who came down from heaven."

nama: Ndené fété Mosesém kés yuyoi tot téfén kamban sérasrafé fanfne yuwon, ndenéyameyo Ároene Ambum so fété tuyongi tukét. 15 Yéné fifiyan, méinyotio emofem fá efalo yiyátotat so em tuot ghérsafé. 16 Ménamén Ngánjánam yuwetam mband marat mindefifi, féyo yémon yéramai yáne féfét Ambum, ménát méinyotio emofem fá efalo yiyátotat fá yau so kér em wénde so em tuot ghérsafé. 17 Ménamén Ngánjánam yau yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambum yénan mband maratot ménát sái yém mogh ár, wénde ménát sái fá yém yá wanjarégh ár.
bt: Just as Moses lifted up the steel/metal snake with a post in a desert, in the same way they must lift the Son of Man up/Note: there is no passive form in Nama/. 15 As a result, every people who truly approve(believe) him may have eternal life/note: literally they may be with eternal life/. 16 Because God loved the world so much, so he gave his only one Son, so that every people who truly approves(believes) in him may not die but have eternal life. 17 For God did not send his Son into the world in order to be his judging man, but to be his saving man.

nama: Fá emofem efalo yiyátotat Ambum yau moghan em; wénde fá emofem yau efalo yiyátotat em moghan, ménamén yémofem yau efalo yiyátongi Ngánjánene féfét Ambum. 19 Ndené yéné féyém ásáfogh moghan: kwayaghé té téném mband maratot, wénde árém méndefé yéfandat kwéfkwéf a yau kwayaghé, ménamén yéfene yam sem yaufi. 20 Emofem yaufi ewafrotat méndméndat yéfandat kwayaghé a yau so eném kwayaghfaf, ménamén fá méndefnar em yéfene yaufiyam sái kakmangi sáfét. 21 Wénde emofem ewafrotat némé em efalo eném kétán kwayaghafaf ménát ámb árém so efandat ndené yémofem yéné yafrotat némat Ngánján ménde yém. Yesu a Jon
bt: Those who truly approve(believe) the Son are not judged; but those who do not truly approve(believe) have in judgement, because they did not truly approve(believe) God's only one Son. 19 This is how the judgement works: the light has come into the world, but people like the darkness and not the light, because their deeds are evil. 20 Those who do evil hate the light and will not come to the light, because they do not want their sin to put clear. 21 But those who do what is true come to the light so that other people can see that they do what God wants. Yesu and Jon

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár enmormén kétán Judia yuwot, kété fá ámb efogh yémorangérmén yémafé a ewalitotam nuan. 23 Joném ndenáyo tawalitotau Aenon yu kénjún yau nayu kétándmé Salim yuta, ménamén kété tamorwén nu tárfár yéné sifayan. Ár tangmorwén yáfaf a yémon mé tawalitotau fá. 24 Táf yéné soramayo, Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngot.
bt: After this, Yesu and his dicsiples went to Judia area, there he stayed with them and washed them with water.(baptized them) 23 Jon like that(also) was baptizing in Aeron village not far from Salim village, because there were plenty of water in that place. People were going to him and he was baptizing them. 24 After this was, [they] put Jon into darkness house.

nama: Ámb Jonene waitogh ár nufngoyénd éwigh yémafé Ju árofé ménamén téménd umbaréghmén. 26 Féyo fá enmormén kétán Jonefaf a yaufroyénd yá, "Watamegh ár, fém kawafarota yéné ároenemén emofé fém tárwén kété wer tambén kété Joden wanje, fá fiyém fém endenemén korayau? Féyo yémon sénonjo ewalitote, a méinyotio ár yáfaf engém!"
bt: Some of Jon's following men began arguing with a Jew about the matter of ritual washing. 26 So they went to Jon and told him, "Teacher, you remember the man who was with you on the east side of the Joden river, he is the one you spoke about? So he is baptizing now, and every people is going to him!"

nama: Jon nuwangoi, "Efe yau rokarafé so yém táfandro Ngánjánam njam taramangé yáyot. 28 Fém fémyo em tane ghékéf fandagh ár ndernáye yénd norayayén, 'Yénd fá yau wém Keriso, wénde Ngánjánam yénd té frondeyo kwémáfárete yá fronde.' 29 Totér aweréghét ár yéné yém fá totér awerégh mérésoe, wénde awerégh ároene fútar, efe nawanjete a náyárete yáfaf, fá áuwéghan táf yém njam yémon náyárete awerégh ároene kém. Yéné áuwégh siyém tane té nafo. 30 Fá so káyátongé ndimbal wénde yénd so káyátongén yuwan. Fá efe yénmormén Njafarta
bt: Jon answered, "No one can have anything unless God gives him. 28 You yourselves are my watching men how I said, 'I am not him Keriso, but God sent me ahead of him.' 29 The new marrying man(bridgegroom) has new marrying woman, but the new bridgegroom's friend, who waits for and listens to him, he is joyful when he hears the new bridgegroom's voice. That joy is mine, is full. 30 He must become big but I must become low." He who comes from heaven

nama: Fá efe yénmormén tukta ewainde méinyotio rokar. Fá efe yém mband maratmén mband maratoene yém a noraye mband yammén, wénde fá efe yém njafarmén fá siyém méinyotio tukén. 32 Yémon nafrote némé yémon té téfande a káyárete, wénde yau emon ámb yumyong yáne si. 33 Wénde emon njam té yumyong yáne si yénaye efalo tiyátongé nde Ngánján siyém efalofifi. 34 Fá efe Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam noraye Ngánjánene si, ménamén Ngánjánam yaramete yá afoghkaf Ngánján Mbérmbér. 35 Yárefam yuwete yánjo Ambum a té ekmayéng méinyotio rokar yáne waftayan. 36 Emon efalo tiyátongé Ambum fá siyém tuot ghérsafé; emon njam tékenangé Ambum yáyot yau so ghérsafé yém, wénde so kafrangongi Ngánjánene nékwot.
bt: He who comes from above surpasses all things. He who is from the earth belongs the earth and speaks about land things, but he who comes from heaven he is above all. 32 He reports what he has seen and heard, but no one accept his talk. 33 But whoever accept his talk confirms by [this]that God is truthful. 34 He whom God has sent speaks God's talk, because God gives him the fullness of God Spirit. 35 His Father loves his Son and has put everything in his power. 36 Who truly approves(believes) in the Son he has eternal life; whoever denies the Son will not be with life, but will leave into God's anger.

nama: Farasi ár náyárayénd ndené Yesum taméindau ár yándio waitoghét a minde tárfár ár tawalitotau a yáne ár tárfár káyátotawét a tawaindawét Jonene waitogh ár. 2 Wénde, Yesum yémonyo yau efe ámb yálitotam; mé yáne waitogh árémro. 3 Njam Yesu náráyai yéné si, yémon yéfrangoi Judia a néngangoi kétán Galili yuwot; 4 yáne angogh témorwén yénamé Samaria yuamé.
bt: The Farasi men heard that Yesu made people following him and baptizing so many people and his people became many and was surpassing Jon's following men. 2 But, Yesu himself did not baptize anyone; only his following man [do] 3 When Yesu heard this talk, he left Judia and went back to Galili region; 4 his returning was through Samaria area.

nama: Kété Samaria kénjún nufaryéng kétán tesen yétkwén Sikar, árkéméné yau nayu témorwén kétándmé yéné mbandta Jeikofém árkéméné yaramai yánjo ambumoe Josefe. 6 Jeikofene nu yékw kétéf témorwén, féyo Yesu, fifi sakér nawerai ménamén álighmén, námnjoi kété nu yékwfaf efogh méf kakayan. 7-8\~ Yáne waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tesenot ménát njamke résaghét. Féyo Samariamén amaf ámb nénwanoi kétán nu ukwét, féyo Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Ta nu kwaram."
bt: There in Samaria he came to a town name Sikar, which was not far from the ground which Jeikof gave to his son Josef. 6 Jeikof's water hole(well) was there, then Yesu, tired out because of walking, sat down there by the well at close noon. 7-8\~ His following men went to the town in order to bring food. Then a woman from Samaria one came to draw water, then Yesu said to her, "Give me water."

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Fém sném Ju ár, a yénd swém Samariamén ámaf-yénémamén nde ndernáye so fémon wamnende yénd nuot?" Ménamén Ju ár yau so nafghetat Samaria árfé kafusi a merekinamé néneyan.
bt: The woman answered him, "You are a Ju man, and I am a woman from Samaria-then how can you asked me for a water? (Because Ju people will not share cups and bowls with Samaria people in eating.)

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Njam té fém mat kénmorwén némé Ngánjánene ramégh yém a efe fá yém emon némamnende nuot, fémon so támnenda fá, a yémon so kémaramangé ghérsé akegh nu."
bt: Yesu answered her, "If you knew what is God gift and who is he that is asking you for water, you will(would) ask him, and he will(would) give you living water."

nama: Amaf norayai, "Ndimbal, fém sném ukwégh rokarofnar, a yékw siyém kénjkam. Ánde so fémon ténman yéné ghérsé akegh nu? 12 Téfene ákim Jeikofém yénmaramai téfe yéné nu yékw; fá a yánjo ambumtértér a yánjo mánjarégh wérár mérén méinyotio nu yénaf tánetawét. Fémo yáinde afé Jeikof?"
bt: The woman said, "Bigman, you have no drawing tool, and the well is deep. Where you would you get that life living water? 12 Our ancestor Jeikof gave us this water hole(well), he and his children and his all farming animal group(livestocks) drank water here. You surpass father Jeikof?

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Méinyotio emofem yéné nu yénetat mé so em nu ménde, 14 wénde emon njam yéneta yéné nu yéndon sewarametan yaufifi so efinde nuam. Néméwét, nu yéné yéndon sewarametan yéfe so kamndangé éfnogh nu yéfene kénjún so efrone akegh ghérsé nue a so tawaramangé tuot ghérsé."
bt: Yesu answered her, "Everyone who drinks this water will still be seeking water, 14 but whoever.single drinks the water I give them will never feel thirsty. Yes, the water this I gave them will become a flowing water in them will flowing by living life water and will give them forever life."

nama: Amaf norayai yáfaf, "Ndimbal, kwaram ta yéné nu ménát yau yénd so nuam wéfinde a yau so wéném yénan nu ukéghét."
bt: The woman said to him, "Bigman, give me this water in order that I will never feel thirsty and I will not come here to draw water."

nama: Yesum yémndai amaf, "Kuwano, fenjar ténmasro a kénango."
bt: Yesu told her, "Go, bring your.husband and come back."

nama: Amaf nuwangoi, "Tanjar yau wém."
bt: She answered, "My.husband is not."

nama: Wénde efalo siyém, fém té némasroyénd 5 árém, a ár sénonjo emafé emorare yau fenjarfifi yém. Fémo efalo té waufro."
bt: But truth is, 5 husbands had brought you, and a man now who is not real your.husband. You have told me the truth."

nama: Amaf norayai, "Ndimbal, yénd mat namndan ndené fém sném Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. 20 Téfene ákifem yéné mband tunakfan táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, wénde fém Ju ár norayati ndené Jerusalem yéné yu fiyém ánde yéndfem so yáwefnotam Ngánjáne."
bt: The woman said, "Bigman, I know that you are a God's man who make know(prophet). 20 Our ancestors on this mountain worshipped God, but you Ju people say that Jerusalem is that place where we should worship God."

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Amaf, Efalo kwiyáto yénd, efogh yéna yéném ánde fémofem yau so yáwefnotati Afai yéné mband tunakfan o kété Jerusalemén. 22 Fém Samariamén ár yau mat em fémofem endefifi yáwefnotati, wénde yénd Ju ár mat yéném yéndfem ende yáwefnotam, ménamén wanjarégh siéném Ju árfeta. 23 Wénde efogh yéna yéném a té efogh nufar, ánde efalo wáwefnogh árém so yáwefnotat Afai ménaye Ngánján Mbérmbére a efaloe, ménamén ndené wáwefnogh árfaf Afé ménde fiyém. 24 Ngánján siyém Mbérmbér, yáne wáwefnogh árém so yáwefnotat Ngánján Mbérmbére a efaloe."
bt: Yesu said to her, "Woman, Believe me, the day comes here where you.p will not worship the Father not on this mountain or there in Jerusalem. 22 You.p the people from Samaria don't know whom you.p worship, but we Ju people know whom we worship, because salvation comes from Ju people. 23 But the day is coming here and the day already come, where real worship people will worship God by God Spirit and truth, because such like worshipping people the Father wants. 24 God is Spirit, his worshipping people will worship by God Spirit and by truth."

nama: Amaf norayai, "Yénd mat wém ndené Keriso so yéném. Njam fá yéném so yénmawafene méinyotio yam téfeyot."
bt: The woman said, "I know that Keriso will come. When he comes, he will tell everything to us."

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Yénd faf wém, efe yénd norayan fefaf."
bt: Yesu answered, "I am he, who I am talking to you."

nama: Yéné efghonyo, nénangoyénd Yesuene waitogh ár, a sélngwél emormén syinjoyénd amafofé skoraiwét. Wénde yau efe ámb namotai, "Némé ménde ném fém?" o "Némat fém norayet amafofé?"
bt: In this moment, Yesu's diciples came back, and they came surprise they found him talking with a woman. But no one asked him, "What do you want? or "Why are you talking with woman?"

nama: Féyo amafom noroi yánjo nu séfkwén, néngangoi kétán tesenot a ewaufroi árét, 29 "Awe, téfandangi yéné ár emon waufrote méinyotio yam yéndon árké té tawafrotan. Mé té fá yém Keriso?" 30 Féyo fá néwanoyénd tesenta a tayotau kétán Yesuefaf.
bt: Then the woman left her water jar, went back to the town and said to people, 29 "Come, see this man who told me everything which I have done. Could he be Keriso?" 30 So they came from the town and walked/went to Yesu.

nama: Yéné efoghféneféneyan waitogh árém yémndayénd Yesu, "Watamegh ár, njamke ámb koneta!"
bt: In this time the following men said to Yesu, "Teacher, Eat some food!"

nama: Wénde fá norayai yéfefaf, "Tane té njamke yém nénet yéné árkémamén fém mat yau em."
bt: But he said to them, "There is my food to eat that which you don't know about."

nama: Féyo waitogh ár kamotangi yéfenjo kénjún, "Mété emon táf yénmarsa yá njamke?"
bt: So the following men asked among themselves, "Has already someone brought him food?"

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane njamke yéné yém sái yáne ménde yafrotan emon kwémáfárete yénd a sái tifon yéné faiofnar ásáfogh árké té waramai ta wafroghét. 35 Fém túmén norayati, '4 ghérarero em kétán wau yu.' Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, tasawérngi féfenjo ghékéf téfandangi ndau sifayé! Fá sem wau em ménát targhét. 36 A fá emon etane wau yuwon fai tawanangé a euménde njamke rokar ndené eumendat ár kétán tuot ghérsat, féyo ménát yégh téfnár a tarégh ár so áuwéghan ere mérne. 37 Ménamén si ndenáye yém efaloe, 'Ámb árom eite a ámb árom wéi etane.' 38 Yéndon tanwáfáretan fém ménát fraréghét yéné árkéménát fém yau kásáfotati; ámb árém té tafrotat táikér ásáfogh, a fémofem yéfandati frengégh yéfene ásáfoghta."
bt: Yesu said, "My food is it is willing to do his will who sent me and willing to finish this work which he gave me to do. 35 You.p often say, 'It's 4 more months until harvest.' I tell you.pl, open your eyes look at the garden places! They are ripe in order to harvest. 36 And the one who digs out the harvest fields he gets pay and gathers the food things(crops) like to gather people for eternal life, so in order that the one who plants and the one who reaps will be(2 people) in happiness together. 37 Because the talk that is true, 'Some man plants and some man digs again.' 38 I have sent you in order to reap this which you have not worked for; other people had worked hard, and you.pl found the blessing from their work."

nama: Tárfár Samariamén árém yéné tesenan efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu ménamén amafoene efalo simén, "Yémon kaufrote ta méinyotio yam némé yéndon té tawafrotan." 40 Féyo njam Samariamén ár enmormén yáfaf, yémofem yamnendayénd ámnjoghét yémafé, a Yesu yémorangérmén sómbio efogh kété. 41 Tárfáram mé yém efalo yiyátoyénd ménamén yánjo simén.
bt: Many people from Samaria in that town truly approved(believed) in Yesu because the woman's trustful talk, "He told me everything I have done." 40 Then when people from Samaria came to him, they begged him to stay with them, and Yesu stayed there two days. 41 Many more truly approved(believed) him because his talk.

nama: Yémofem norayayénd amafofefaf, "Yéndfem yau efalo yiyátongém ménamén fémon némé noraya; sénonjo yéndio téfé náyáretam, a yénd mat yéném ndené yéné ár efalo fété yém mband maratoene Wanjarégh ár. Yesum mer yiyátoi gafaman ásáfogh ároene ambum
bt: They said to the woman, "We don't truly approve(believe) because of what you said, now we ourselves already heard him, and we know that this man is really the Savior of the world." Yesu makes good(heals) an Government worker's son

nama: Sómbio efogh soramé Yesu nuwanoi a yéngmormén kétán Galili yuwot. 44 Té Yesu fáyo norayai, "Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár sem yau eutémndat yéfenjo yuwon." 45 Njam fá nufaryéng Galili yuwot, árém kété yumyoyénd fá, ménamén fá té engmormén kétán Waingégh téméndfaf Jerusalemét a té téfandawét méinyotio yam némé yémon tafrotau téméndfaf.
bt: After the two days Yesu left and went to Galili region. 44 Yesu himself had said, "Prophets are not respected in their own area." 45 When he arrived at Galili region, the people there welcomed him, because they had gone to the Passover festival to Jerusalem and had seen everything what he had done to the festival.

nama: Féyo Yesu néngangoi kétán Kana Galili yu kénjút, ánde yémon té yengoi nu wéri nuot. Warsagh ároene ásáfogh ár kété témorwén endene ambum enjne témorwén Káfenamén. 47 Njam yéné árom náyárai nde Yesu té nufar Galili yuwot kétamé Judiata, fá yéngmormén kétán yáfaf a yamnendai Yesu ménát sái téngmorwén kétán a mer tiyátongai yáne ambum, efe témorwén kaka krotro.
bt: Then Yesu went back to Kana in Galili region, where he had turned the water into alcohol. A government worker was there whose son was sick in Kafenam. 47 When this man heard that Yesu had arrived at Galili region from Judia, he went to him and begged Yesu in order to come to there and make good(heal) his son, who are close to death.

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Emon ámb yau efalo so tiyáto táfandro fémon sái yéfanda ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam."
bt: Yesu said to him, "None of you will truly approve(believe) unless you may see happening thing(surprising things) and surprising things(surprising things)."

nama: Gafaman ásáfogh ár nuwangoi, "Ndimbal, awe yéndfé mété táf tane ambum kér yém."
bt: The government working man answered, "Bigman, come with me before my son dies."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Nguwano; fene ambum so ghérsé yém."
bt: Yesu answered him, "Go; your son will be life.(live)"

nama: Njam mé téngmorwén endmé, yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh árém yéfángoyénd fá yéné ghanyafé ndené yáne ghakér ambum ghérsé mé yém. 52 Yémon emotai fá árké efghe namndai mer, yémofem yawangoyénd, "Wawenagh enjneyam yéfrongé fá káye séite táf wan aklok."
bt: When he went through the way, his without.payment working man(servant) men met him with this news that your boy is still life. 52 He asked them in which time he became good, they answered to him, "The fever sickness left him yesterday afternoon one o'clock."

nama: Féyo yárefé nawafarotai nde yéné efghe fifi Yesum yémndai, "Fene ambum so ghérsé yém." Féyo fá a yánjo méinyotio mérén efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu.
bt: Then his father rememberd that in that exact time Yesu had told him, "Your son will be life." So he and his whole family truly approved(believed) Yesu.

nama: Yéné yémormén sómbiomén ufarogh yam Yesum árké yafrotam soramé táf sinmormén Judiata kétán Galili yuwot.
bt: This was the second surprising thing which Yesu did after coming from Judia to Galili region.

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu yéngmormén kétán Jerusalem ménát ámb Ju árfene témndot. 2 Sifafene sésafne kaka kété Jerusalem kénjún kété témorwén némbne arakaf, yéné árké yémndetat Ibru sie Betsaida a 5 rautoghkaf kitarékitaré méngo warengéghkaf tamorwén. 3 Yéné rautoghkaf kitarékitaré méngomé minde tárfár tákmangérwén-ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár, wawér enjne ár a aknyégh ár. 4 Njafar si résagh so ngéwérngai nu yékwfaf ámb efghon a térmenau nu. Njam yéné kufrotau, méinyotio enjne téfnár kufngongayénd némbne arakaffaf égharghét. Fronde ár efe kuwarngai némbne arakaffaf mer kamndangai, némé enjnefé njam témorwén.{p{ ...f* {p{5.4 Yéné siménj yau Joném yéfarote, wénde ámb watamegh ár nemnat yéné ende.
bt: After this, Yesu went to Jerusalem for one of the Ju people's festival. 2 Close to Sheep's Gate in Jerusalem there is a small lake, which it they called Betsesda in Ibru language, and [which] is surrounded by 5 covered without wall house. 3 Through the covered without wall house so many people were lying- the blind men, the lame men and the paralyzed men. 4 Aman carrying heavenly message of the Lord would come down some time and spin the waters. When this happened, all sick people started going into small lake. The first man who got into the small lake became good, which desease he had.{o{ ...f* {o{5.4 This talk is not Jon wrote, but some teaching people thought this way.

nama: Ár ámb kété témorwén efe 38 yunjéf témorwén enjne. 6 Njam Yesum yinjoi fá stékmangérwén kété a mat namndai ndené fá yéné enjne kértayan stémorwén yu tombé, yémon yémndai fá, "Té fém ménde ném sái mer kamndé?"
bt: One man was there who had been sick for 38 years. 6 When Yesu saw him lying there and knew that he had been in suffering this sickness for a long time, he asked him, "Do you want to become well?"

nama: Enjne téfnár nuwangoi, "Ndimbal, tayot efe ámb yau yém ménát yénd sái wáutána némbne sawét égharghét táf njam nu narémne. Njam yénd yéta kufngon kétán sái kégharén, ámb ár frondeyo táf nguwarngé."
bt: The sick man answered, "Bigman, to me nobody in order to help to put me in the small lake when the water is spinned. While I am trying to start to get into, other man goes down ahead of me."

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Kano! Tékaf fenjo yame a áligh." 9 Táf fété ár mer namndai; yémon yékafai yánjo yame a nuwanoi.
bt: Then Yesu said to him, "Get up, pick up your mat and walk." 9 Immediately the man became well; he picked up his mat and went.

nama: féyo Ju sénko árém norayayénd yéné ároefaf efe té mer yiyátoi, "Yéné siyém Safat; yéné siyém téfene nákan fémon yau so yérse fenjo yame."
bt: so the Ju head men said to this man who had became good, "This is the Safat; this is in our law you must not carry your mat."

nama: Wénde fá nuwangoi, "Ár emon yénd mer wiyáto wémnde yénd, 'Tékaf fenjo yame a kuwano.'
bt: But he answered, "The man who made me well told me , 'Pick up your mat and go.'

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Efe yéné ár yém emon némnde fém kafghét a álighét?"
bt: So they asked him, "Who is this man who told you to pick up and to walk?"

nama: Ár efe té mer namndai yau mat témorwén efe témorwén, ménamén Yesu té wékeyero yéngmormén ár mérén kénjút kété stamorwén.
bt: The man who became well did not know who it was, because Yesu had went quickly into the people group(crowd) there was.

nama: Soramé Yesum yinjoi fá kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a norayai yáfaf, "Téfanda, fém sném merot té nango. Kékmbo yaufiyam wafrogh o minde mámáfi mété nufrota fefaf." 15 Yéné ár néngwanoi a ewaufroi Ju sénko árét ndené Yesum mer yiyátoi fá. Ambumoene muyé
bt: Later Yesu found him there in the worshipping house place and said to him, "See, you are already turn to good. Stop doing sin or any bad [things] happen to you any more." 15 The man went away and told the Ju head men that Yesu made him good. The Son's power(authority)

nama: Féyo ménamén Yesum tawafrotau yéné yam Safatan yénémamén Ju sénko árém tusérmbotawét fá. 17 Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Tane Afé siyém túmén násáfote, a yénd wéi so fété násáfotan." 18 Yéné téfnan ndimbal kéráye térametawét ménát sái tésmetawét fá; yau ménaménro wéi yémon kés táráfnau Safat nák wénde té yémon korayau nde Ngánján yáne Afé témorwén a yéné ende té náyátoi fáyo ámb rérero Ngánjánafé.
bt: So because Yesu did this things in Safat for this Ju head men were spoiling him. 17 Yesu said to them, "My Father is always working, and I too must work." 18 For this reason they made it very much to kill him, not only was he breaking the Safat law but he was calling that God his Father was and in this way he had made himself equal with God.

nama: Yesum ewaramai yéfe yéné uwangogh, "Yéndon ewaufrotan efaloe ndené Ambumom yau so némé yafrote yambiyaye, yémon so yénaro ewafrote némé yémon efande Afam árké ewafrote, ménamén némé njam Afam yafrota wéi Ambumom fété so yafrote. 20 Ménamén Afam yuwete Ambum a yauyafote yá méinyotio yémon némé ewafrote. A Afam so yauyafote ndimbal yam yémo sái ewafrota, árkéménayam so yáinde ásáfogh yémo árké té ewafrote, a fém so sélngwél em. 21 Ndené fété Afam kés ewanote kér ár a tawaramangé yéfe ghérsé, ndenéyameyo Ambumom tawaramangé ghérsé yéfeyot yáne ménde endefaf em. 22 Ménamén Afam yau mogh yam yafrote endefaf, wénde té yéramai méinyotio mogh yam kétán Ambumoefaf, 23 ménát méinyotio árém so yutémndat Ambum ndené fété yémofem kés yutémndat Afé. Emon njam yau yutémnda Ambum yau yutémnde Afé, emon yénmáfáretam fá.
bt: Yesu gave them this answering, "I tell you truly that the Son can do nothing by himself, he can do only this what he sees which Father does, because whatever the Father does the Son also does. 20 Because the Father loves the Son and shows him all what he does. And Father will show him many big works that he [Jesu] will do, which will surpass the work he has already done, and you will be amazed. 21 Just as the Father raises the dead and give them life, in the same way the Son gives life to those who he wants to. 22 Because the Father does not do judgement to anyone, but he had gave all judgement to the Son, 23 in order that all the people may respect the Son just as they respect the Father. Whoever does not respect the Son does not respect the Father, who sent him.

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, emon njam káyárangé tane si a efalo tiyátongé fá emon kwénmáfárete yénd yéfe so yém tuot ghérsé a yau so em moghan wénde té néférmangi kérta kétán ghérsat. 25 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, efogh yéna yéném a té efogh nufar ánde so kér ár káyárangi Ngánjánene Ambumoene kém a emofem njam káyárangi, fá so ghérsafé kénáyátongi. 26 Ndené fété Afafaf kés yém ghérsé yánjo kénjún, ndenéyameyo yémon té yaramai Ambumoe ménát Ambumoefaf so yém ghérsé yánjo kénjún. 27 A yémon té yaramai yá muyé moghét ménamén fá siyém Ároene Ambum.
bt: I tell you the truth, whoever hears my talk and truly approves(believes) him who sent me for them will be eternal life and will not be in judgement but have already passed over from death to life. 25 I tell you the truth, the time is coming here and the day has already come where(when) the dead men will hear the voice of the Son of God, and those who hear it, they will become with life. 26 Just as the Father has life in himself, in the same way he has made his Son to have life in himself. 27 And he has given the authority to him to judge because he is the Son of Man.

nama: Yau táf sélngwélam erameta yénémamén, ménamén efogh yéna yéném ánde méinyotio efe em mbéwé méngo kénjún so káyárangi yáne kém, 29 a so nénurtotat yéfenjo mbéwata: fá emofem mer té tafrotat fá so nanotat ghérsat, a fá emofem tafrotat yaufi fá so nanotat a tákmangé kérot. 30 Yéndon féyotarofnar wém wafroghét tanjo muyayé yéndon mogh yafrotan yénaro Ngánjánam ndernáye kwémndangé yénd, yénémamén tane mogh siyém mbarkánd, ménamén yéndon yau yafrotan tanjo ménde wénde yáne emon wénmáfáretam yénd. Efalo si afrogh Yesuenemén
bt: Do not be surprised at this, beause the day comes here where(when) all who are in their graves will hear his voice, 29 and come out from their grave: those who have done good they will rise for life, and those who have done evil they will rise and put to punishment. 30 I can't do anything on my own authority; I do judgement only this how God tells me, therefore my judgement is straight, because I don't do my will but his [will] who sent me. Reporting the true talk(Testimony) about Yesu

nama: "Yénd njam nafrotan tanjomén, árém so nemnat ndené tane si yau efalo témorwén. 32 Wénde ámb ár yéna yém efe nafrote tane téfnan, a yénd mat wém ndené fá némé noraye tanemén siyém efalo.
bt: If I am going to report about mine, people would think my talk was not true. 32 But there is someone who reports on my behalf, and I know that what he says about me is true.

nama: Fémofem té téngwáfáretati si résagh ár kétán Jonefaf a yémon té norayai efalomén. 34 Yau wénde yénd námyotan árfene afroghfaf; wénde yénd norayan yéné ménát fém so wanjarégham tawanangé. 35 Jon témorwén lambefanit kánetau a kálálau kwayaghé, a fém kámyotawét tekofnar wayamneghét yáne kwayaghayan.
