bt: You have sent messengers to Jon and he had spoke about the truth. 34 But I don't accept people's reporting; but I say this in order that you may receive save. 35 Jon was like a lamp burning and shining light, and you were willing without-long(for a while) to rejoice in his light.

nama: Wénde yénd so norayan tanjomén ámbmén árkéméné so yáinde Jonene si, ménamén yéndon té tawafrotan némé Afam waramai wafroghét, a yéné yam árkéméné yéndon ewaufrotan efaloe si afrogh ndené Afam yénd fété kwénmáfárete. 37 A Afé, emon kwénmáfárete yénd, wéi efalo si nafrote tanemén. Fémofem té yaufifi káyáretati yáne kém a yaufifi téfandati yáne sáf, 38 a yau yáne si féfene tikfan yém, ménamén fémofem yau efalo yiyátotati fá efe yémon ténmáfárete. 39 Fémofem yaftati Buk si merkéráye, ménamén fém nemnati ndené yéné kénjún fémofem so tinjongi tuot ghérsé. Yéné Buk si noraye tanemén! 40 Wénde fém nakenati tafaf sái eném ménát tuot ghérsé résaghét.
bt: But I proclaim about myself something that surpasses Jon's talk, because I had done what Father gave me to do, and this things whch I did reporting the true talk that the Father has sent me. 37 And Father, who sent me, also reports the true talk about me. You have never heard his voice or seen his face, 38 and there is no his talk in your hearts, because you do not truly approve(believe) the one who he sent. 39 You.p read carefully the Buk(scripture), because you think that in that you will find eternal life. This Buk(scripture) speak about me! 40 But you refuse to come to me in order to take eternal life.

nama: Yénd yau néretan kétán árfene áuwéghfaf. 42 Wénde yénd mat wém féfenemén, yénd mat wém ndené féfefaf yau yém Ngánjánene uwégh féfene tikfan. 43 Yénd té kwéném tane Afane yétkwénan, a fémofem yénd yau wumyongi; wénde njam efe yéném fá yánjo yétkwénan, fémofem so tumyongi fá. 44 Fém ménde em fémro-fémro sái náuwetati. Árkéménáyam eméinde áuwéghét. Wénde fémofem yau ewafrotati meryam ménát efe fáro yém Ngánjánamro sái euwete fém. Yéné téfnan fémofem yau so efalo wiyátotati.
bt: I am not looking for human praise. 42 But I know about you.pl, I know that to you.pl [there] is no God's love your hearts. 43 I have come in my Father's name, and you do not accept me; but if someone comes in his name, you will accept him. 44 You.p like to praise each other. That causes you.p happy. But you.p do not do goodthings in order that one who alone is God will praise you.p. That is why you.p will not truly approve(believe) me.

nama: Wénde yéndo yau so témndan Afé ndené fémofem té yarsotangi. Yau ndené nemnati yéndo so yafrotan yéné. Yau, fá yémormén Moses emo so yafrote yéné. Fém kamnang em ndené Moses kar yém emo so ewáutáne féfe. Wénde fá yéné yém emo so tayauyafongé féfene awarsénégh. 46 Njam té efalo tiyátongayénd Moses, fémofem so efalo kwiyátongayénd yénd, ménamén yémon yéfarotam tanemén. 47 Wénde ndené yau kés kor yiyátotati némé yémon yéfarotam, ndernáye wéi so fémofem efalo tiyátongi némé yénd norayan?
bt: But I will no tell the Father that you have done wrong. Don't think that I will do that. No, he was Moses who will do that. You have hope that Moses is the one who will help you. But he is the one who will show you your wrong. 46 If you truly approved(believed) Moses, you would truly approve(believe) me, because he wrote about me. 47 But if you do not truly approve(believe) what he wrote, how are you going to truly approve(believe) what I say?"

nama: Yéné soramé kétamé Yesu néférmai kétán nayu arakaf téndot Galili arakafan, árkéméné yém Tiberias Arakaf. 2 A ndimbal ár mérnam táitotawét fá, ménamén yémofem té téfandawét yáne wafroghyam tawafrotau táf mer stayátotau fá efe enjne tamorwén. 3 Yesu néwanoi mband tunakfot a námnjoyénd yémafé yánjo waitogh árfé. 4 Ju árfene Waingégh témndot kaka témorwén.
bt: After this Yesu acrossed to far shore of Galili Sea(which is the Tiberias Sea). 2 And a big crowd followed him, because they had seen his doing things(special workings(miracles)) he made when he made good who was sick. 3 Yesu went up on the mountain/hill and sat down with them his following men. 4 The Ju people's Passover festival was near.

nama: Yesu néngretai a ewinjoi ndimbal mérén tanmorwén yáfaf, féyo yémotai Filif, "Ánde yéndfem so tawanangém féyotaroan njamke ménát sái emanjnam méinyotio yéné ár?" 6 Yémon norayai yéné ménát Filif yufotam, wénde fá mat témorwén némé yémon so tafrotau.
bt: Yesu looked around and saw a large crowd was coming to him, so he asked Filif, "Where are we possible to buy food in order to feed all this people?" 6 He said this in order to test Filif, but he knew what he would do.

nama: Filifém yawangoi, "Ménát méinyotio árém sái némbnare tánetangi, ndenanit yém ndené 200 Denarion{q{ ...f* {q{6.7 200 Denarion Yéné siyém 200 efoghmén fai , árké em 200 efoghmén fai so tawanangayénd flawé ménát sái féyotaro yém."
bt: Filif answered him, "For every people to eat a little, it looks it will be about 200 denarion, which are wages for 200 days to buy enough bread."

nama: Ámb yáne waitogh ár, Endru, efe Saimon Fitane yánngén, norayai, 9 "Ghakér ambum siyém yéna endefaf em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio némbnar wagif. Wénde yéné yau féyotaro so em yéné ár tárfárét.
bt: One of his following men, Endru, who is Saimon Fitè's small brother, said, 9 "Here is a boy with 5 bread and two small fish. But that will not enough for these many people.

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tamndangi ár ámnjoghét." Kété yéné sifayé témorwén yusafé ámnjoghét, féyo méinyotio ár námnjoyénd, ndené 5,000 ár ghakér ár mérénfaf. 11 Yesum ewerai féskaf flawé, yaramai kánjo Ngánjáne a tawawaftau árét efe tamorangérwén kété. Ndenéyameyo tawawaftau wagif, a yémofem méinyotio yam enetaménd kétán fá nderé ménde tamorwén.
bt: Yesu said, "Speak the people to sit down." There this place was with a grass to sit, so all the people sat down, about 5,000 adult men in the crowd. 11 Yesu took the bread, gave thanks to God and distributed it to the people who were there. In the same way he distributed the fish, and they all ate to which they wanted.

nama: Njam fá méinyotio eremngoi néneyan, Yesu norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Takafetangi a taumendangi mbarmbar. Yau némé ámb so ewaghnam." 13 Féyo yémofem eumendaménd méinyotio a ewafoyénd 12 mbaf yáf ménaye mbarmbar árkéméné nafrangoyénd 5 flawata árém árké enetaménd.
bt: When they all satisfied to eat, Yesu said to his following men, "Pick up and gather. Let nothing be wasted." 13 So they gathered them all and filled 12 baskets with the pieces which left over from the 5 bread which the people had eaten.

nama: Téfandawét yéné fénataye yam wafrogh Yesum árké yafrotam, ár kété norayayénd, "Efalo fété yéné siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár efe so ténmorwén mband maratot!" 15 Yesu mat namndai nde yémofem mwighaye tékwnawét fá ménát warsagh ár sái tiyátongayénd yéfenjo méndeye féyo fá néngwanoi wéikor mband tunakfot yambia. Yesu tiotau nu tukmé
bt: Seeing this special things doing(miracle) which Yesu had did, the people there said, "Surely this is the Prophet who will come into the world!" 15 Yesu knew that they intended to come in order that they make him king by their want; so he went off again to the mountain/hill by himself. Yesu walks on the water

nama: Njam séite nawerai, yáne waitogh ár engmormén kétán sawét, 17 kété fá nuflayénd boutan, a néngangoyénd witmé karéf arakaf Káfenamét. Sémbár yéfertai, a Yesu yau somé nufaryéng yéfefaf. 18 Féyo ndimbal mbormbor téfnjau a nu namndai manumanuafé. 19 Njam waitogh ár ngarayawét 5 o 6 kilomité nayu, yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu ténmorwén nu tukmé álighe bout kaka tényátoyau; a fá semormén férfér. 20 Yesum emndai fá, "Yau férfér em; yénd wém." 21 Féyo fá áuwéghafé tamorwén Yesu yaflayénd boutot, a táf fété bout néngaméghai tunat ándan fá tayotau. Árém téronjawét Yesu
bt: When evening came, his following men went to the lake, 17 there got into a bout, and went back across the lake toward Kafenam. Night came on, and Yesu still had not arrive to them. 18 Then a strong wind was blowing and the waters became rough. 19 When the following men had rowed 5 or 6 kilometers, they saw Yesu coming with a walk on the water; and they were afraid. 20 Yesu told them, "Don't be afraid; I am." 21 Then they were happy to let Yesu get into the bout, and immediately the bout reached the land where they were going. The people seek Yesu

nama: Yénamayo efghon ár mérén árké té efrangoyénd kété arakaf witmé karfan mat namndayénd ndené ámbiro boutro kété témorwén. Fá mat tamorwén ndené Yesu yau nuflai kété yánjo waitogh árfé, wénde yáne waitogh ár nuwanoyénd yéfembia yémafé yau. 23 Féyo ámb bout tamorwén Tiberiasmén nénamghayénd kaka kété yéné sifayafaf ánde árém tánetawét féskaf flawé yéné soramé Yuram njam kánjo yangoi. 24 Njam yéné ár mérnam mat namndayénd ndené Yesu a yáne waitogh ár yau tamorwén kété, fá nuflitaménd yéné boutamé a engmormén kétán Káfenamét Yesue ronjaghét. Ghérsé féskaf flawé Yesu
bt: On the next day the crowd which had left there on the other side of the lake knew that only one bout was there. They knew that Yesu had not entered in it with his following men, but following men themselves had left not with him. 23 Then some bouts from Tiberias landed near the place where the people had eaten the bread after the Lord had given thanks. 24 When this crowd knew that Yesu and his following men were not there, they got into those bouts and went to Kafenam seeking Yesu. The life bread Yesu

nama: Njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu kété arakaf witmé karfan, yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Watamegh ár, njam fém nufar yénan?"
bt: When they found Yesu there on the other side of the lake, they asked to him, "Teacher, when did you arrive here?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon ewaufrotan efaloe, fémofem yénd wéronjati, yau ménamén fémofem tafandati ufarogh yam yéndo tawafrotan wénde ménamén fémofem enetaménd féskaf flawé a fém eremngoi. 27 Yau táf násáfotati ménát njamket árkéméné so kamndangé yaufi, wénde násáfotati yéné njamket árkéméné nakete tuot ghérsat, árkéméné Ároene Ambumom so tawaramangé féfe. Ménamén yáfaf Afé Ngánjánam té yéfrendai yánjo efalo yátogh.
bt: Yesu answered them, "I am telling you the truth, you are looking for me, not because you saw the surprising things I did but because you ate the bread and you satisfied. 27 Don't work for foodwhich will become bad, but work for this food which lasts for eternal life, which the Son of Man will give to you. Because to him the Father God has prepared his true approval.

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némé yéndfem so yafrotam ménát sái yafrotam némé Ngánjánene ménde yém téfeyot wafroghét?"
bt: Then they asked Yesu, "What can we do in order that we do what is God's will for us to do?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Némé ménde Ngánján yém féfeyot wafroghét siyém efalo tiyátongi fá efe yémon ténmáfárete."
bt: Yesu answered them, "What God wants for you to do is to truly approve(believe) him who he sent."

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némé ufarogh yam so fémon yafrote ménát yéndfem sái tinjongém yéné a efalo kényátongém fém? Némé so fémon yafrote? 31 Téfene ákifem yénetaménd mana kété fanfne yuwon, ndené fété kés yéfarotaménd: 'Yémon ewaramai yéfe njafarmén féskaf flawé nénet.'"
bt: So they asked Yesu, "What surprising thing will you do so that we may see this and truly approve(believe) you? What will you do? 31 Our ancesters ate mana there in the desert, just as it is written: 'He gave them bread from the heaven to eat.'"

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, némé Mosesém ewaramai féfe yau njafarmén féskaf flawé, wénde tane Afam ewaramete féfe efalo féskaf flawé njafarmén. 33 Ménamén Ngánjánene féskaf flawé fá yém efe yénmewéryéng kétándmé njafarta a ghérsé yéramete kétán mband maratot."
bt: Yesu said to them, "I tell you the truth, What Moses gave you.p [was] not the bread from heaven, but my Father gives you.p the real bread from heaven. 33 For God's bread is he who comes down from heaven and gives life to the land/world."

nama: Fá norayayénd, "Ndimbal, túmén yénmarameta téfe yéné féskaf flawé."
bt: They said, "Bigman, always give us this bread."

nama: Féyo Yesum ewaufroi yéfe, "Yénd wém ghérsé féskaf flawé. Fá efe eném tafaf yaufifi so siogh em; fá emofem efalo wiyátotat fá yau so nuam efinde. 36 Wénde ndené fété yéndon kés tawaufrotan, fémofem té kwéfandati yénd wénde yau efalo wiyátongi. 37 Méinyotio efe Afam waramete ta so eném tafaf, a efe njam eném tafaf yaufifi so ewifnan. 38 Ménamén yénd té néneworyén njafarta yau ménát tanjo ménde wafroghét wénde ménát sái yafrotan yáne ménde emon kwénmáfárete. 39 A yéné féyém yáne ménde emon kwénmáfárete yénd, ndené yéndon yau so ámbiro yétarnan kétamé méinyotio Afam árké té waram ta wénde fá so tawanon kérta kerker efghon. 40 Ménamén tane Afane ménde ndené yém méinyotio ár efe néretat kétán Ambumefaf a yiyátotat efalo fá so em tuot ghérsafé, a yéndon so tawanon kérta kerker efghon."
bt: Then Yesu told them, "I am life bread. Those who come to me will never be hungry; those who truly approve(believe) me will never be thirsty. 36 But as I told you, you have seen me but you do not truly approve(believe). 37 Everyone whom the Father gives me will come to me, and whoever comes me I will never drive away. 38 For I have come down from heaven not to do my want but to do his want who sent me. 39 And this is his want who sent me, that I shall not lose any of all those he has gave me, but I will raise them up at the last day. 40 For my Father's will/want is that all the people who look to the Son and truly approve(believe) him will be with eternal life, and I will raise them up at the last day."

nama: Ju ár nufngoyénd áwátaranégh Yesuenemén ménamém fá norayai ndené, "Yénd wém féskaf flawé árkéméné nénewor njafarta." 42 Fá norayayénd, "Yéné ár fiyém Yesu, Josefene ambum, endene afé a amé yénd mat yéném. Ndernáye fá noraye sénonjo, 'Yénd néneworyén kétándmé njafarta?"
bt: The Ju people began to grumble about Yesu because he said that, "I am the bread which came down form heaven." 42 They said, "This man is Yesu, Josef's son, whose father and mother we know. How does he now say, 'I came down from heaven?'"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Kékmbongi áwátaranégh féfenjo kénjún. 44 Yau efe ámb mé so yéném tafaf táfandro Afam emon yénd kwénmáfárete so yénémnje tafaf, a yéndon so tawanon kérta kerker efghon. 45 Ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém té yéfarotaménd, 'Méinyotio ár so ewatamete Ngánjánam.'{r{ ...f* {r{6.45 Aisaya 54:13
bt: Yesu answerd them, "Stop grumbling among yourselves. 44 No one can come to me unless the Father who sent me draws them to me; and I will raise them from death at the last day. 45 The one of the God's people who make know(prophets) had written, 'God will teach every people.' All the people who listen to the Father and learn from him come to me. 46 No one has seen the Father only he who is from God; only he has seen the Father. 47 I tell you the truth, he who truly approves(believes) is with eternal life. 48 I am the life bread. 49 Your ancesters ate the mana there in the desert, but they died. 50 But this bread is which comes down from heaven, which people may eat of it and not die. 51 I am the living life bread which came down from heaven. Who eat this bread will live forever. This bread is my body, which I will give for the world to live the life.

nama: Féyo Ju ár nufngoyénd éwigh tékrátaye yéfenjo kénjún, "Ndernáye so yéné árom ténmaramangé téfe yánjo fifi ménát nénet?"
bt: Then Ju people began to argue heavily among them, "How can this man give us his body to eat?"

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, yau njam fémofem yénetati Ároene Ambumoene fifi a yénetati yáne férék, fém yau ghérsafé em féfenjo kénjún. 54 Emon njam té yéneta tane fifi a tane férék so tuot ghérsafé yém, a yéndon so tawanon kérta kerker efghon. 55 Ménamén tane fifi siyém efalo njamke a tane férék siyém efalo nu nénet. 56 Emofem yenetat tane fifi a tane férék fá so tane kénjún em, a yénd yéfene kénjún. 57 Ndené fété ghérsé Afam kwénmáfárete yénd a yénd naketan ménamén Afanemén, féyo emon wéneta yénd so fá nakete ménamén tanemén. 58 Yéné fiyém féskaf flawé árkéméné néneworyéng kétándmé njafarta. Féfene ákifem enetaménd mana a kér emormén, wénde fá emo yenete yéné féskaf flawé so nakete tuot." 59 Yesum norayam yéné táf watameghan áumengégh méngon Káfenamén. Tárfár waitogh árém yéfrangoyénd Yesu
bt: Yesu said to them, "I tell you the truth, if you.p do not eat the Son of Man's body and drink his blood, you.p will not be with life in yourselves. 54 Whoever eats my body and blood will be with eternal life, and I will raise them from death at the last day. 55 For my body is the real food, my blood is the real water for drinking. 56 Those who eat my body and my blood they will be in me, and I in them. 57 Just as the living Father sent me and I live because of the Father, so who feeds on me he will live because of me. 58 This is the bread which came down from heaven. Your ancesters ate mana and died, but those who eats this bread will live forever." 59 Yesu said this while in teaching in the meeting house in Kapenam. Many discipes left Yesu.

nama: Njam yéné náyáretaménd, tárfár yáne waitogh ár norayayénd, "Yéné siyém táikér watamegh. Efe so náyárete yéné sifaf?"
bt: When they heard this, many of his following men said, "This is a hard teaching. Who can listen to this talk?"

nama: Yesu mat namndai nde yáne waitogh ár káwatarnawét yénémamén a norayai yéfefaf, "Némé yéné yam fém eméinde ékmboghét ta waitoghét? 62 Ndernáye so yém táf fémofem njam tinjongi Ároene Ambum sái karmbongé kétán ánde fá témorwén fronde? 63 Ngánján Mbérmbéram yéramete ghérsé; fifioene wafté siyém fifiofnar. Si árké yénd té korayan féfefaf eném Ngánján Mbérmbérta a yéramete ghérsé. 64 Wénde fém ámb sem yau efalo yiyátotati." Yesu mat témorwén kétándmayo rényégh emofem yau efalo tiyátotawét a emo so sén téramangai fá. 65 A fá mé korayau, "Yénémamén yéndon tawaufrotan féfe nde yau ámb so yéném tafaf wénde táfandro Afam féyotaro táyátongé fá ménát wafroghét"
bt: Yesu knew that his following men were grubling about this and said to them, "What this thing make you to stop following me? 62 How will be if you see the Son of Man go up to [the place] where he was before? 63 The God Spirit gives life; body/human's power is without.meaning. The talks which I have spoken to you.p come from God Spirit and gave a life. 64 But some of you do not truly approve(believe)." Yesu knew from the beginning who do not truly approve(believe) and who would give teeth(betray) him. 65 And he said more, "This reason I told you.p that no one can come to me but unless the Father make it possible for them to do."

nama: Yénémamén tárfár yánjo waitogh ár nawengoyénd sémta a yau táitotawét fá.
bt: This reason many of his following men turned back and would not follow him.

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai 12, "Fém ménde em frangoghét wéi?"
bt: So Yesu asked 12, "Do you also want to leave?"

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi yá, "Yuré, endefaf yénd so yéngém? Fém tuot ghérsé siafé ném. 69 Yéndfem efalo niyátotam a mat yéném ndené fém ném Njúnnjúnofnar Ár Ngánjáneta."
bt: Saimon Fitè answered him, "Lord, to whom woud we go? You are with the talks of eternal life. 69 We truly approve(believe) and know that you are the Without.dust Man from God."

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon té ewaferyén fém 12. Wénde ámbiro yéna ném ndenanit Sáifér. 71 Fá korayau Judasenemén, Saimon Iskariotene ambum. Ndemamén fá témorwén 12 mén, soramé sén so téramangai fá.
bt: Yesu answered them, "I have chosen you 12. But one here is like a Sáifèr(Stan)!" 71 He spoke of Judas, Saimon Iskariot's son. Even though he was one of the Twelve, later he will give teeth(betray) him.

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu karendau Galili yumé. Fá yau ménde témorwén Judiat sái tiotau ménamén Ju sénko ár ménde tamorwén yá ngiot. 2 Wénde kétándmé Ju árfene Méngoméngo Téménd kaka namndai, 3 Yesuene yánngnéfem yémndayénd ndené, "Koro yéné yu a kuwano Judiat, ménát fene waitogh árém kété so efandat fene wafroghyam. 4 Árém yau etnotat némé yémofem ewafrotat njam fá ménde em sái em mat yéfenjomén. Njam fémo ewafrota yéné yam, mband marat so yém mat fenemén." 5 Yau yánjoyo yánngnéfem efalo yiyátoyénd.
bt: After this, Yesu went around Galili region. He did not want to go Judia because the Ju head men wanted to kill him. 2 But when from it the Ju festival of Shelters was near, 3 Yesu's small brothers said to him that, "Leave this area and go to Judia, so that your following men there will see your working things. 4 People don't hide what they are doing if they want to be known about theirs. If you do this things, the world will know about you. 5 Even his brothers did not truly approve(believe) him.

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Tane efogh yau nawer; wénde féfene efogh túmén em frengéghkaf. 7 Mband maratam yau so méndméndat efande fém, wénde yénd méndméndafé wéfande, ménamén yénd nafrotan ndené yáne yam srem yaufi. 8 Fém téu engém yéné témndot. Yénd yau so wéngém yéné téméndfaf, ménamén tane efogh yau nawer tayot." 9 Yesu yéné si norayai, a Galili yu kénjún mé témorangérwén. Yesum tawatametau marataye wáwefnogh méngo sifayan
bt: Yesu told them, "My day is not come yet; but your.p days are always ready. 7 The world cannot see you with hate, but it sees me with hate, because I reports that its ways are bad/evil. 8 You should go to this festival. I am not going to this festival, because my day has not come yet for me." 9 Yesu talked this talk, and he kept on stay in Galili region. Yesu taught them pubically in the worshipping house area

nama: Yéné soramé yánngnéf snéngwanoyénd téménd sifayat, Yesu wéi fété yéngmorméng, yau marataye, wénde átnoghe. 11 Téménd sifayé kénjún kété Yesu téronjawét Ju sénko árém a kamotawét, "Ánde yém fá?"
bt: After this his small brothers had gone to the place of festival, Yesu also went, not publicly, but secretly. 11 At the place of festival there the Ju head men were looking for Yesu and asked, "Where is he?"

nama: Mérén kénjún awawanjagh kété témorwén Yesuenemén.
bt: Among the groups/crowds there was whispering about Yesu.

nama: Emo yau marataye korayau ménamén fá férféram tafindau yéfenjo sénko árfenemén.
bt: No one talk about him openly because they felt fear about their head men.

nama: Téménd njam néndkéfan náyátoi, Yesu nuwanoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a ewafngoi watamegh. 15 Ju sénko ár sélngwél emormén a norayayénd, "Ndernáye yéné ár minde mat yém táf nák skulot yau yiotam?"
bt: When the festival became middle, Yesu went to the worshipping house area and began teaching. 15 The Ju head men were surprised and said, "How does this man know so much when he has never been to law school?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yau tanjo watamegh yém, wénde kétándmé yéném emo wénmáfáretam. 17 Efe ménde yém wafroghét némé Ngánján ménde yém fá so mat yém ndené tane watamegh siyém Ngánjáne tambén o tanjo wafroghmén. 18 Fá efe norayat yéfenjo mwighé wutmanégh yénérsat yéfendio, wénde fá emofem yéronjat yéné wutmanégh emo fá ténmáfárete fá siyém efalo ár; kété yau unyégh yém yánemén. 19 Mosesém ewaramai nák féfefaf. Wénde emo yau tawarawene nák. Némamén fémofem wafngongi yénd ngiot?"
bt: Yesu answered them, "[It] is not my teaching, but it comes from who sent me." 17 Who want to do what God wants will know that my teaching is from God or from my making. 18 Who speak of their thought take respect only for themselves, but he who seeks this respect who sent him he is a true man; there is no lying in him. 19 Moses gave the law to you. But none of you keeps the law. Why are you trying to kill me?"

nama: Árém yawangoyénd, "Fefaf syém yaufi mbérmbér! Emo némafngo fém ngiot?"
bt: People answered him, "Evil spirit is to you! Who is trying to kill you?"

nama: Yesum emndai fá, "Yéndon tafrotan ámbiro sélngwélafé yam a fém méinyotio sunsun tam. 22 Ménamén Mosesém tamndangai fém féfenjo ambumafene ghéngan néfghét ndemamén efaloe yéné siyém yau Mosese tambén yém, wénde féfene ákiafene tambén, fémofem tafrotati ambum ghéngén néfghét Safatan. 23 Njam ghakér ambum ghéngan tanfangi Safatan ménát Mosesene nák yau so erafnat, némamén fém nékw em tafaf ménamén yéndon ároene fifi mer yiyáton Safatan? 24 Yau wafénmanégh farun yaman, wénde wafénmanégh merkéráye. Némé fá Keriso yém?
bt: Yesu said to them, "I did one surprising thing(miracle) and you were all surprised. 22 Because Moses ordered you.p to cut the skin(circumcise) your.p sons though actually this is not from Moses, but from your.p ancesters , you do a circumcision sons in Safan. 23 If you.p cut skin(circumcised) a boy on the Safat so that you shall not break Moses's law, why are you angry with me because I made a man's body good on the Safat? 24 Don't examine by appearances, but examine by correctly. What he is Keriso(Is he Keriso)?

nama: Ámb ár Jerusalemmén korayawét, "Yéné ár fiyém efe ngiot yérametat. 26 Kéretangi! Fá noraye marataye, a némndafi si limángégh ár yau norayat yá tambén! O mété nemnat fá yém efalo Keriso. 27 Wénde Keriso njam yéném, efe ámb yau mat yém fá naimén yém. Wénde yénd méinyotio mat yéném árkamé yéné ár yéném."
bt: Some people from Jerusalem said, "Is this man who they are trying to kill?" 26 Look! He is speaking in public, and any talk head men don't speak to him! Perhapes they think that he is really the Keriso. 27 But when Keriso comes, no one will know from where he is. But we all know from where this man comes."

nama: Yesum njamandio tawatametau wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, fá norayai marat kéme, "Fém matfifi té em yénd efe wém a árkamé wénmormén? Yénd yau wénmormén tanjo mwighé faroréghan. Wénde fá emo wénmáfáretam siyém efalo. Fém mat yau em fá, 29 wénde yénd mat fá wém, ménamén yénd wénmormén yá tambén a yémon yénd wénmáfáretam."
bt: While Yesu was teaching in the worshipping house area, he spoke with a loud voice, "Do you really know who I am and from where I am? I have not come on my decision. But he who sent me is true. You do not know him, 29 but I know him, because I came from him and he sent me."

nama: Féyo yémofem yéta werghét térametawét, wénde emo ámb yau ngángé efayoi yáfaf, ménamén yáne efogh somé yau nawer. 31 Wénde tárfár árém yéné mérén kénjún efalo fá yiyátoyénd. Fá norayayénd, "Yéné árém ewafrote minde tárfár sélngwélafé yam. Efaloe fá yém Keriso. Sélngwélafé yam yémo némé ewafrote ewainde ámb árfene. Wanjengégh árém engwáfáretaménd Yesue werghét
bt: Then they tried to make to catch him, but no one laid a hand on him, because his day had not come yet. 31 But many people in the crowd truly approved(believed) in him. They said, ‘This man has done so many special workings(miracles). Surely he is the Keriso. Miracle he do surpasses other people's. They sent watching men(guards) to catch Yesu

nama: Farasi árém eyárayénd ár mérén Yesuenemén káwáwanjawét yénémamén, féyo fá a limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém engwáfáretaménd ámb wanjengégh ár ménát yá werghét.
bt: Farasi men heard the crowd whispering like that about Yesu, so they and the sacrifice burning head men(chief burning sacrifice men) sent some watching men(guards) in order to arrest him.

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yénd fémofé so yéném némbne efoghfénefénetro, a yénd so wéi ngangon kétán emon yénd wénmáfáretam. 34 Fémofem yénd so kwéronjangi, wénde fémofem yau so kwinjongi yénd, ménamén fém yau kétán so engém yénd ánde so wém."
bt: Yesu said, "I will be with you a only little time, and I will go back again to [him] who sent me. 34 You.p will seek me, but you.p can't find me, because you cannot go to where I will be."

nama: Ju sénko ár namotayénd yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Fá ándan nufngo yéndfem fá yau sái tinjongém? Fá so nguwanongé kétán Grik tesenot kétán téfene ár kés emor, a so ewatamete Grikmén ár? 36 Fá ndené noraye yéndfem so yéronjam wénde yau so tinjongém fá, a yénd yau so kétán yénéngém fá ánde so yém. Némé yémo yésérmbne?" Ghérsé ramégh wérér nu
bt: The Ju head men asked among themselves, "Where is he about to go [that] we shall not find him? Will he go to the Greek cities there our people live, and will teach the Greek people? 36 He says that we will seek him but we can't find him, and [that] we can't go where he will be. What does he mean? Life giving spring water

nama: Kété soramamén efghon ndimbalfifi témndan Yesu nokayoi a norayai marataye kéme, "Efe njam nuam néfinda, kénaf tafaf, 38 a emon njam efalo yénd kwiyátongé yémon so nu yénete. Ndené Buk si kés noraye, 'Ghérsé ramégh wérér nu so nasune yéfefaf kétándmé efalo árfene kénjúta.'" 39 Njam Yesu korayau yéné si, fá korayau ndené emofem efalo tiyátongi yémofem so tanangi Ngánján Mbérmbér. Yéné efghon Ngánján Mbérmbér yau yéramai yéfefaf, ménamén Yesu yau nénguyoi ndimbal kwayaghafaf. Afalogh ár kénjún
bt: There the last and very high(important) day in the festival Yesu stood and said in a loud voice, "Whoever feels thirsty come to me, 38 and whoever truly approves(believes) in me he will drink water. As the Buk(scripture) says, 'Life giving spring water will flow to them from belivers' inside.'" 39 When Yesu said this talk, he was saying that whoever truly approved(believed) would receive the God Spirit. At that day he did not give God Spirit to them, because Yesu was not lift to strong light(big light). Division among the people

nama: Ámb árém mérén kénjún yiyárayénd fá korayau yéné a norayayénd, "Yéné ár siyém efalo yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár!"
bt: Some people in the crowd heard him say this and said, "This man is really this Prophet!"

nama: Ámb korayawét, "Fá siyém Keriso!"
bt: Others said, "He is Keriso!"

nama: Buk si noraye ndené Keriso so yém Deifidene ákimén a so náráfte Betliemén kété Deifid ánde témorangérwén." 43 Kété mwighayan afalogh tamorwén ár mérén kénjún Yesuenemén. 44 Ámb ár ménde tamorwén werghét, wénde emon yau ngángé efayoi yáfaf. Efalo yátoghofnar Ju sénko ár
bt: The Buk(scripture) says that Keriso will be Deifid's descendant and will be born in Betliem there where Deifid lived." 43 There was a division in the thought in the crowd about Yesu. 44 Some people wanted to catch him, but no one laid a hand on him. Ju head men without big mind(faith)

nama: Njam wanjengégh ár nénangoyénd, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém emotayénd, "Némamén yau fémofem fyénémnjati fá?"
bt: When the guards went back, the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and Farasi men asked them, "Why did you not bring him?"

nama: Wanjengégh árém ewawangoyénd, "Efe ámb yau korayau ndené ende fá kés korayau!"
bt: The guards answered them, "Nobody has talked like that he said!"

nama: Farasi árém emotayénd, "Yémo wéi té tawaweinde. 48 Yau ámb sénko ár o Farasi árém efalo yiyátoyénd fá? 49 Wénde yéné ár mérén yau mat em Mosesene nákmén. Fá sem Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbanan!"
bt: Farasi men asked them, "He deceived you.p also? 48 None of the head men or of the Farasi men truly approved(believed) in him? 49 But this crowd does not know the Moses's law. They are under God's judgment!"

nama: Ámbiro Farasi ár kété témorwén fá Nikodimas, yéné ár efe yéngmormén a Yesu yinjoi fronde. Fá norayai kété ámb árfefaf, 51 "Téfene nákam yau yénmumyote nde ár kértat sái tékmangém, fronde so tiyárangém sian. Yau so yawaftam ámbro kétán mat kor kamndangém némé yam tawafrote."
bt: One of Farasi men there was he Nikodimas, this man who came saw Yesu before. He said there to the other people, 51 "Our law did not allow that put people in a punishment, before we hear talk. We wan't count other until we understand well what he did."

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Nikodimas, fém wéi ném Galili yumén! Buk si tayamngota fém mat so kamndé ndené Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yau kétándmé so yéném Galili yuta." 53 Méinyotio ár néngangotaménd méngot.{s{ ...f* {s{7.53 "Ámb matafé árém nemnat yéné si kété 7:53 kétán 8:11 Joném yau yéfarotam, wénde ámb árom yéfarotam soramayo."
bt: They answered him, "Nikodimas, you are also from Galili region! Examine the Buk(scripture)s [and] you will learn that God's man who make know(prophet) never come from Galili region." 53 All the people went home,{p{ ...f* {p{7.53 Some knowleding people thought that the talk in 7:53 to 8:11 was not written by Jon, but another man wrote it later.

nama: Wénde Yesu néngwanoi Olif Mband tunakfot. 2 Tándái ámb akwan fá yéngmormén wáwefnogh méngo sifayat. Tárfár ár yáfaf enmormén a Yesu námnjoi a watamegh ewafngoi. 3 Nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár yénémnjaménd amaf efe ewinjeyayénd ámb árofé efe yau yáne ár témorwén ár sáfan yakayoyénd. 4 Yémofem yémndayénd, "Watamegh ár, yéné amafom yafrote yaufi walot a yémofem yinjongi fá. 5 Mosesene nákam ndené yénmatamete, ndené sáfot amaf fiya wíme tafiyátotangi krot. Ndernáye so koraya?" 6 Yémofem ámogh si tarametawét ménát Yesu so terangayénd. Wénde Yesu náwefnoi a ngángaye farogh ewafngoi mbandan. 7 Njam yémofem mé témotawét fá, Yesu nokayoi a norayai yéfefaf, "Efe fém yaufiyam wafroghofnar ném tita fronde wím yáfaf." 8 Wéikor káwefnongé a mbandan afarogh kufnongé.
bt: but Yesu went to the Olif Mountain. 2 Early next morning he went to the worshipping house area. Many people came to him and Yesu sat and began to teach. 3 The law teaching men(teaching men of the law) and the Farasi men brought a woman who was found with other man who is not his husband(committing adultary) [and] made her stand before people. 4 They said to him, "Teacher, this woman had adultary and they saw her. 5 Moses's law taught us that, that kind of woman [people] must killed her with stone. How do you say?" 6 They gave the asking talk(asked) to trap Yesu. But Yesu bent down and began to write with hand on the ground. 7 When they were still asking him, Yesu stood up and said to them, "Who are you.s without doing sin throw a stone her first." 8 Again he bent and on the ground he began to write.

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yéné si, fá méinyotio nofarnayénd, ámbiroámbiroero, ár ndimbal fronde a totér ár, kétánotio Yesufro efrangeyayénd amafofé mé tawakayarwén kété. 10 Yesu nokayoi a yémndai, "Amaf, ánde fá em? Efe ámb nafrango fe waghanghét?"
bt: When they heard this talk, they all left, one by one, people big(adult) first to young people, until only Yesu left with woman still standing there. 10 Yesu stood up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Who is left to condemn you?"

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Ámb ár yau yém, ndimbal." Yesum yémndai, "Yéndon wéi yau so némaghnan fém. Nguwano, wénde yaufi yau ewafrota wéikor" Yesu kwayaghé mband maratoe
bt: Woman answered him, "There is nobody, bigman." Yesu said to him, "I will not also condemn you. Go, but do not sin again." Yesu the light of the world

nama: Njam wéikor Yesu korayau árfefaf, fá ndené norayai, "Yénd wém kwayaghé mband maratoe. Emon kwénmaitongé yénd yau so yiote kwéfitayan a yáfaf so yém kwayaghé árké yém ghérsat."
bt: When again Yesu spoke to the people, he said that, "I am the light of the world. Who follows me will not walk in the darkness and to him will have the light for giving life.

nama: Farasi ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Sénonjo fém té norayang fenjo yammén. Némé fém noraye muyafnar yém."
bt: Farasi men said to him, "Now you had spoken about your own things. What you are saying has no authority."

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yau, ndemamén yénd norayan tanjomén, yénd némé norayan efalo yém, ménamén yénd mat wém árkamé yénd wénmormén a ándan yénd wiota. Fém mafina em yénd árkamé wénmormén a ándan yénd wiota. 15 Fémofem mogh tafrotati mbandoene ende yéndon yau yafnamotan mogh ámb ároefaf. 16 Wénde yéndo njam yafrotan mogh, tane mwighé wafrogh em efalo, ménamén yénd yau tambia wém; Afam emo yénd wénmáfáretam yéndfé yénre. 17 Kété yéfarotaménd féfene nákan ndené sómbio fandagh árém njam efalo tiatend, némé fá norayangénd yéné siyém efalo. 18 Yénd nafrotan tanjomén, a Afam emon yénd wénmáfáretam fá ndenáyo nafrote tanemén."
bt: Yesu answered them, "No, even though I said about myself, what I said is true, because I know from where I came and to where I am going. You have no-knowledge(don't know) from where I came and to where I am going. 15 You do judgement in a worldly way; I don't do judgment to anyone. 16 But if I do judgment, my decisions are true, beacuse I am not alone; the Father who sent me [is] with me. 17 There is written in your.p law that when two watching men(watching men) agree, what they say this is true. 18 I told about myself, and the Father who sent me he also report about me."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ánde yém ferafé?" Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém mafina em tanemén o tane Afanemén. Fém njam mat em tanemén, fém mat so em Afanemén ndenáyo."
bt: They asked him, "Where is your.s father?" Yesu answered them, "You don't know about me and about my Father. If you know about me, you would know about my Father also."

nama: Yesum norayai méinyotio yéné si njam yémon tawatametau kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, kété yéné satayan ánde ramégh boks tékmangérwén. A emo yau yérai fá, ménamén yáne efogh yau somé nawerai. Fém yau kétán so engém yénd ándan wéngém
bt: Yesu said all this talk when he taught there in the worshipping house area, there in the room where the offering box was placed. And no one held him, because his day not come yet. You cannot go there where I am going

nama: Wéi Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yénd so kuwanongén; fémofem so wéronjati yénd, wénde fém so kér em féfenjo yaufiyan. Fém yau so engém kétán yénd ándan wéngém."
bt: Again Yesu said to them, "I will go; you.p will seek me, but you.p will die in your.p sins. You cannot go there where I am going."

nama: Ndenaye Ju sénko ár norayayénd, "Fá norayai yénd yau so wéngém kétán fá ándan yéngém. Némé yéné sioene fifi yém, fáyo so násmete?"
bt: Then the Ju head men said, "He says we cannot go there where he is going. What this talk's meaning is, he will kill himself?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém sem yéné mband maratmén em yéné yuwan, wénde yénd swém tukmén wém. Fém sem yéné mband maratmén em, wénde yénd yau yéné mband maratmén wém. 24 Yénémamén yéndon fém té tamndetawén fém so kér em féfenjo yaufi kénjún. A fém so kér em féfenjo yaufi kénjún yau njam efalo yiyátotati ndené Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém."{t{ ...f* {t{8.24 Eksodés 3:14
bt: Yesu answered them, "You.p are from this world here below, but I am from above. You.p are from this world, but I am not from this world. 24 That's why I already told you [that] you will die in your sins. And you will die in your sins if you do not truly approve(believe) that 'I Am Who I Am'."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Efe fém ném?"
bt: They asked him, "Who are you?

nama: Tane em tárfár mogh féfefaf, árkéménayam so tákmangé kértat. Wénde emo yénd wénmáfáretam fá siyém efalo, a yéndon yaufrotan mband maratoe yénaro némé yéndon náyárayén yá tambén."
bt: I have many judgement to you.p, which will put punishment. But who sent me he is true, and I tell to the world only that what I heard from him."

nama: Fá yau mat tamorwén ndené Yesu korayau Yárefanemén. 28 Féyo ndené norayai yéfefaf, "Njam fémofem tuyongi Ároene Ambum, fém so mat em ndené Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém; féyo fém so mat em ndené yéndon yau ewaufrotan tanjo muyaye, wénde yénd norayan mé yénaro Afam ndernáye wénémndetam siot. 29 Emon yénd wénmáfáretam fá siyém yéndfé yénré yémon yénd yau wéfrango tambia, ménamén yéndo túmén yáne ménde yawafrotan."
bt: They did not know that Yesu spoke to them about his Father. 28 Then hHe said to them that, "When you lift up the Son of Man, you will know that 'I Am Who I Am'; then you will know that I don't do with my power(authority), but I say only that how talk the Father told to me. 29 Who sent me he is with me; he has not left me alone, because I always do his will."

nama: Tárfár ár efe náyárayénd Yesu korayau yénémamén efalo yiyátoyénd fá. Efaloyam so yuwek kényátongé
bt: Many people who heard Yesu say this reason they truly approved(believed) in him. The truth will make you free

nama: Yesum ár emndai efe ndimbal mwighafé em yáfaf, "Fém njam námyotati tane watamegh sifaf, fém efalo tane waitogh ár so em; 32 fém mat so em efalo, a efaloyam so yuwek táyátongé."
bt: Yesu said to the people who is with big mind(faith) to him, "If you obey to my teaching talk, you will be true my following men; 32 you.p will know the truth, and the truth will make you free."

nama: Fá néwangoyénd yáfaf, "Yénd siéném Ebraamene ákiambum, a yénd yau ténmorwén ámb ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Ndernáye wét yém ndené fém kés noraye, 'Fém so káyátongi yuwek'?"
bt: They answered to him, "We are Ebraam's descendant, and we have never been anyone's without.payment working men(servants). How can you say that, 'You will become free'?"

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon emndetan efaloe: méinyotio ár emon yaufiyam sái yafrota fá siyém yaufiyamoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár yém. 35 Faiofnar ásáfogh ároene ambino sifayé yau yém mérén kénjún, wénde ambum yéné mérénmén fifi yém tuot. 36 Féyo Ambumom njam yuwek kényátongé, fém fété so yuwek kamndé. 37 Yénd mat wém ndené fém sem Ebraamene áki mérén. Wénde fémofem ngiot wérametati yénd, ménamén tane si yau féfene tikfan em. 38 Yéndon norayan tane Afam némé kwaufrongé ta, wénde fémofem yafrotati féferafam némé té fe némaufrotam."
bt: Yesu said to them, "I am truly telling you: every people who does sins he is without.payment working man(servant) of sin. 35 A without.payment working man(servant) has no permanent place in the family, but a son belongs to the family forever. 36 Then if the Son make you.s free, you.s will become really free forever. 37 I know that you are Ebraam's descendants. But you are making to kill me, because my talk are not in your heart. 38 I speak of what my Father showed me, but you do what your.p father has shown you."

nama: Fá nowangoyénd yáfaf, "Téfene afé siyém Ebraam!"
bt: They aswered him, "Our father is Ebraam!"

nama: Yéndon némé méinyotio tawafrotan yéndon efalo ewaufrotan féfe némé kénáyáretan Ngánjánta, wénde ngiot wérametati yénd. Ebraamém némé yau ndené tawafrotau! 41 Wénde fémofem ewafrotati némé féferafam tawafrotau. Fá nowangoyénd, "Ngánjánro siyém téfene Afé, a yénd siéném yáne efalo ambumtértér."
bt: What all I did [is] I tell you the truth what I heard from God, but you are making to kill me. What Ebraam did not do such a thing! 41 But you.p do what your.p father does. They answered, "Only God is our Father, and we are his true children."

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Ngánján njam féfene Afé yém, fémofem so yénd wuwetati, ménamén yénd wénmormén Ngánjáne tambén a sénonjo yénd yéna wém. Yénd yau kwéném tane mwighé faroréghan, wénde yémon kwénmáfárete. 43 Fémofem némamén yau kor ersati tane si némé norayan? Ménamén fémofem yau so kor tane si ersati. 44 Fém srem féfenjo afane ambumtértér, efe yém Sáifér, a fém ménde em féfenjo afane mwighé sái yaitotati. Kétándmé rényéghta fá témorwén ngi téfnár, fá yau efalo témorwén ménamén yáne kénjú efalo yau yém. Njam unyéghe noraye, fá nauyafote efe fá yém, ménamén fá unyégh ár yém a unyéghoe afé. 45 Wénde yéndo efalo si emndetan, a némamén fémofem efalo yau wiyátotati! 46 Emo ámb so kafrongé tane yaufimén? Efe ámb yau. Yéndon njam efalo si ewaufrotan, némamén yau efalo kwiyátongi? 47 Efe Ngánjánene em fá so náyáretat Ngánjánene si. Wénde fém efe yau Ngánjánene em, yénémamén fém yau náyáretati." Yesu a Ebraam
bt: Yesu said to them, "If God is your.p Father, you.p will love me, because I came from God and now I am here. I did not come on my decision, but he sent me. 43 Why do you not carry/understand well my talk what I say? [It is] because you cannot carry/understand my talk. 44 You are your father's children, who is Sáifèr(Satan), and you want to follow your father's thinking. From the beginning/note: this word use for creation/he was a murderer, he was not true because his inside is no truth. When he tells with a lie, he is showing who is he, because he is liar and the father of lies. 45 But I tell the truth, and you don't truly approve(believe) me! 46 Who one [of you] can report my sin? Nobody. If I tell the truth, why do you not truly approve(believe) me? 47 Who belong to God they will listen God's talk. But you who do not belong to God, that's why you do not listen." Yesu and Ebraam

nama: Yesu yémotayénd, "Némé yénd mbarkánd yéném ndené snorayangém nde fém sném Samariamén ár a ndenénde fefaf yaufi mbérmbér yélau!"
bt: They asked Yesu, " We are straight what we say that you are a Samaria man and to you a evil spirit came into!"

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane kénjún ámb yau yaufi mbérmbér yém. Yéndo yutémndan tane Afé, wénde féfene wutmanégh yau yém tafaf. 50 Yéndo yau yéronjan tandio wutmanégh, wénde Ngánjánam so wutémnde yénd. Fá fiyém efalofifi mogh ár. 51 Yéndo emndetan efalo si: emon náyárete tane si fá yaufifi kér so yém."
bt: Yesu said, "In me there is no evil spirit. I respect my Father, but your.p respect is not to me. 50 I am not seeking big light(glory) myself, but God is going to big light(glory) me. He is the true judge. 51 I am telling you the truth: who obeys my talk he will never die."

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd fá, "Sénonjo yénd mat yéném efalo fém sném yaufi mbérmbérafé ném! Ebraam kér té yémormén, a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár wéi kér té emormén, wénde fém noraye emo fene watamegh náyáreta fá yau so kér yém. 53 Fémo yáinde téfene afé Ebraam, efe kér té yémormén? Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kér té emormén. Fémo ndernáye nemne efe fém ném?"
bt: They said to him, "Now we know truly you are with evil spirit! Ebraam already died, and the God's people who make know(prophets) also already died, but you say who obeys your teaching he will not die. 53 You surpass our father Ebraam, who already died? The God's people who make know(prophets) died already. How do you think who you are?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Táf yéndo njam wutmanégh yangotan tandio, yéné wutmanégh siyém fifiofnar. Wénde emo yénd wutémnde siyém tane Afé, yéné efalo fifi yém fémon efe yémndete fene Ngánján. 55 Fém yau mat em fá, wénde yénd mat wém fá. Yénd njam té korayan ndené yénd yau mat wém yánemén, yénd táf unyégh ár sof wém ndené fém kés em. Wénde yénd mat wém fá a yénd námyotan yáne sian. 56 Fene afé Ebraam fá áuwéghan témorwén ménamén yémo efogh té yinjoi tane álighmén; yémo yinjoi a fá áuwéghan témorwén."
bt: Yesu answered them, "If I turn respect myself, that respect is without.meaning. But who respects me is my Father, this real meaning is [the one]who you say is your God. 55 You don't know him, but I know him. If I had said that I do not know him, I would be a liar like that you are. But I do know him and I obey his word. 56 Your father Ebraam was in joy because he would see the day of my coming; he saw it and was in joy.”

nama: Fá norayayénd yáfaf, "Fém ámb yau 50 yunjéf réran ném, a fémon kés yinjoi Ebraam?"
bt: They said to him, “You are not even 50 years old, and you have ever seen Ebraam?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon emndetan fém efalo, Ebraam náráftam soramayo, Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém{u{ ...f* {u{8.58 Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém Eksodés 3:14 ."
bt: Yesu answered them, “I tell you the truth, before Ebraam was born, I am who I am.”

nama: Féyo yémofem ekafayénd wím yáfaf wighét, wénde Yesu fá nofatoi a yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayé.
bt: Then they picked up stones to throw at him, but Yesu hid himself and left the worshipping house area.

nama: Njam Yesu téngmorwén, yémon yinjoi ár ghékéf kwéfkwéf kétándmayo áráfégh. 2 Yánjo waitogh árém yémotayénd Yesu, "Watamegh ár, endene yaufiyam yéméindai ghékéf kwéfkwéfot ndené fá kés náráftam? Yánjo yaufiyamam yéméindai o yárefafene yaufiyamam?"
bt: When Yesu he went, he saw him man blind from birth. 2 His following men asked Yesu, "Teacher, whose sin led to blind as he was born? His sin led or of his parent sins?"

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yau yánjo yaufiyammén o yárefafene yaufiyammén, wénde yéné nufrotam ménát Ngánjánene ásáfogh so yéfandat yáne kénjúmé. 4 Njamandio mé yém efogh, yéndfem so fété yafrotam yáne ásáfogh emon yénd kwénmáfárete. Sémbár siyém yéném, ánde yau efe so násáfote. 5 Njamandio yénd wém mband marat kénjún, yénd wém mband maratoene kwayaghé.
bt: Yesu said, "Not his sins or of his parent sins, but this happened in order that God's work will be shown through him. 4 While it is still day, we must do his work who sent me. Night comes, where no one can work. 5 While I am in the world, I am the world's light.

nama: Soramé norayai yéné, yémon yéfarndai mbérme mband, yafrotam ámb ngénd ménaye mbérme, a yasénam yéné ároene ghékéf. 7 Yémon yémndai, "Kénéngém, kumbar kété Siloam minde marat nu yékwén. Yéné yetkwnoene fifi siyém "Téngwáfáreta." Féyo yéné ár yéngmormén a nénumbnaméng, a nénangoi méngot ghékéf sauréghare a kénretau.
bt: After he said this, he spit on the ground, made some mud with spittle, and he put it on the man's eyes. 7 He say, "Go, wash in Siloam the very wide water hole(well)"(This name's meaning is, "he sent him." Then this man went and washed, and came back to the house with eyes opened and was seeing.

nama: Yáne kaka fútaréf a emofem té túmén téfandawét fá ómnengéghan namotayénd, "Yéné ár yém efe kámnjongai a kémnendau. Efalo fété yém? 9 Ámb korayawét, "Fá fété yém." Ámb korayawét, "Yau, fá yau; fá mé yanitro nérete." Wénde fá fáyo norayai, "Yénd féu wém yéné ár."
bt: His close friends/neighbors and [those] who had always seen him in begging asked, "This is a man who sat and begged. Is it true? 9 Some said, "Surely he is." Others said, "No, he is not; he just looks like him." But he himself said, "I am that man."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ndernáye wét fene ghékéf nasawéryénd?"
bt: They asked him, "How were your eyes opened?"

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéné ár yétkwén Yesu, yémon yafrotam ngénd a wasénam tane ghékéf a wémndai yénd kétán álighét Siloamét umbarghét. Yénd wéngmormén, a njamandio numbnamén, yéndon fandagh ewafngoyén.
bt: He answered them, "That man name Yesu, he made mud and put it on my eyes and told me to walk to Siloam to forget. I went, and as soon as I washed, I start seeing."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Ánde yém yéné ár?" Fá norayai, "Yénd yau mat wém." Farasi árém namotawét némé kufrotawét ghékéf kwéfkwéfefaf
bt: They asked him, "Where is this man?" He said, "I don't know." Farasi men ask about what happened to the blind man

nama: Yémofem yénémnjaménd kétán Farasi árfefaf yéné efe té témorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf. 14 Yéné efogh stémorwén Safat árké Yesum yafrotam ngénd a yasawéryéng yéné ároene ghékéf. 15 Féyo Farasi árém wéikor yémotayénd ndernáye té néretai. Yémon ewafroi, "Yémon yéfai ngénd tane ghékfan; yénd numbnamén a sénonjo yéndon efandan."
bt: They brought to the Farasi men this [man] who had been blind. 14 This day was Safat which Yesu mad the mud and opened the man's eyes. 15 Then Farasi men also asked him how he had saw. He told them, "He put mud on my eyes; I washed and now I see."

nama: Ámb Farasi norayayénd. "Yéné ár yau yéném Ngánjáneta, ménamén yémon yau yutémnde Safat nák." Wénde ámb namotayénd, "Ndernáye so yaufi árom yafrote ndené ufarogh yam?" Féyo fá fété mwighan afalogh nufngoyénd.
bt: Some Farasi men said. "This man cannot come from God, because he does not respect/keep Sabbath's law." But other people asked, "How can sinner do like this surprising thing?" Then they began to divide of thought .

nama: Féyo Farasi árém yémotayénd yéné ár wéikor, "Némé fém norayai ámb yánemén ménamén yémo esawéryéng fene ghékéf?" Yéné árom ewawangoi, "Fá siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
bt: Then Farasi men asked the man again, "What do you say anything about him because he opened your eyes?" This man answered them, "He is a God's man who make know(prophet)."

nama: Wénde yéné Ju árém mé so yau efalo tiyátotawét ndené fá témorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf a té néretai fandaghét, kétánotio yémofem emotayénd yáne yárefaf 19 a namotayénd, "Fété yéné féfene ambum yém? Fété yém fá fém snorayet ndené náráftam ghékéf kwéfkwéf? Ndernáye sénonjo efande?"
bt: But this Ju people people will not stoll truly approve(believe) that he was blind and had received for seeing, until they called his parents 19 and asked them, "Is this your.d son? Is this the one you.d say was born blind? How can he see now?"

nama: Yárefafem ewawangeyayénd, "Yénd mat yénre nde téfene ambum yém, a yénd mat yénre ndené ghékéf kwéfkwéf fá náráftam. 21 Wénde yénd yau mat yénre ndernáye fá siyém sénonjo féyotaro yém fandaghét, a yénd yau mat yénre emon yéfrendai fá yánjo ghékéf kwéfkwéfta. Témotangi fáyo; fá siyém ndimbal féyotaro, a fá so noraye yandio!" 22 Yáne yárefaf norayangeyayénd yéné ménamén fá tárwén férfér Ju sénko árfenemén, emofem té yiyátoyénd ndené emon korayau ndené Yesu témorwén Keriso so tutorngayénd áumengégh méngota. 23 Yénémamén yárefaf ndené norayangeyayénd, "Fá siyém ár ndimbal yém, témotangi fáyo."
bt: His parents answered.dual them, "We.dual know that he is our son, and we know that he was born blind. 21 But we don't know how he is now able to see, and we don't know who cured him of his blind. Ask himself; he is big enough, and he will say for himself!" 22 His parents said.dual this because they.dual were afraid of Ju head people, who already made that [anyone] who say that Yesu was Keriso will be expelled from meeting house(meeting house). 23 That's why parents say like, "He is big, ask himself!"

nama: Féyo limánégh téfnár norayayénd yéné ároefaf efe ghékéf kwéfkwéf témorwén. Yémofem yémndayénd fá, 'Ngánjánene sáfrére, unyéghofnar si koraya ndené fém so noraye mé efalo yamménro. Yénd mat yéném yéné ár yaufi ár.'
bt: So the head men again spoke to the man who had been blind. They said to him, ‘In front of God, without.lying talk(promise) that you will speak only true things. We know that this man is a sinner.’

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yénd yau mat wém fá yaufiyam ár yém o yau. Ámbiro yam yénd mat wém: yénd kwénmorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf wénde sénonjo yéndon efandan!"
bt: He answered them, "I don't know he is sinner or not. One thing I know: I was blind but now I see!"

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Némé yémon tafrote fefaf? Ndernáye yémon némasawér fene ghékéf?"
bt: Then they asked him, "What did he do to you? How did he open your eyes?"

nama: Yémon nuwangoi, "Yéndon té ewaufron fronde a fémofem yau náyárangi. Némat fém ménde em sái káyárangi kor? Té fém wéi ménde em sái kénamndangi yáne waitogh árot?"
bt: He answered, "I had told you before and you did not listen. Why do you want to hear again? Do you also want to become his following men?"

nama: Féyo yémofem sotafé si tawitawét yáfaf, a norayayénd, "Fém fai yéné ároene waitogh ár ném! Yénd siéném Mosesene waitogh ár! 29 Yénd mat yéném Ngánján korayau Mosesefaf, wénde yéné ároenemén, yénd yaufifi mat yéném árkandmé fá yénmormén."
bt: Then they insulted at him, and said, "You are that this man's following man! We are Moses' following men! 29 We know God spoke to Moses, but about this man, we don't know from where he comes!"

nama: Yéné árom ewawangoi, "Yéné sélngwélafé yém! Fém yau mat em naimén fá yém, wénde yémon wasawéryéng tane ghékéf. 31 Yénd mat yéném Ngánján táf yau náyárete kétán yaufiyam árfefaf. Fá náyárete kétán emofem yutémndat a yafrotat yáne ménde. 32 Yau emo ámb náyáretam ménamén ghékéf sawéréghmén ndené ároenemén efe té náráftam ghékéf kwéfkwéf. 33 Njam yéné ár yau ténmorwén Ngánjáneta, yémon yau so némé tafrotau."
bt: This man answered them, "That is surprising! You do not know from where he comes, but he opened me my eyes. 31 We know that God does not listen to sinners. He listens to [people] who respect him and do his will. 32 Nobody has ever heard of that eyes was opened of a man who had been born blind. 33 If this man were not from God, he couldn't what he did."

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fém náráftam a nanotam yaufi kénjún. Fémon yau so yénmatamete yénd!" Féyo yémofem yutoryénd. Mbérmbére ghékéf kwéfkwéf
bt: They answered him, "You were born and grew up in evil. You cannot teach us anything!" Then they drive him out. Spiritual blindness

nama: Yesu náyárai ndené yémofem té yitrongi fá, a njam yinjoi yéné ár, Yesum yémndai, "Té fémon yiyátote Ároene Ambum?"
bt: Yesu heard that they had cast him out, and when he found this man, Yesu said to him, "Do you truly approve(believe) the Son of Man?"

nama: Yéné árom yawangoi, "Efe yém fá, ndimbal? Ta kwaufro ménát yéndon so efalo tiyátongén fá."
bt: This man answered him, "Who is he, bigman? Tell me so that I can truly approve(believe) him."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fémon té téfande fá, a fá yéné féyém emofé fém norayet sénonjo."
bt: Yesu answered him, "You have seen him, and he is the one who is talking with you now."

nama: Féyo yéné árom yawangoi, "Yuré, yéndon efalo niyátotan sénonjo," a budme niyai yá sáfrére.
bt: Then this man answered him, "Lord, I truly approve(believe) now," and knelt down before Yesu.

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yénd kwéném yéné mbandot ménát moghét, ménát ghékéf kwéfkwéf árém so efandat a fá emofem efandat so káyátongi ghékéf kwéfkwéf."
bt: Yesu said, "I came to this world to judge, so that the blind men will/may see and those who see will/may become blind."

nama: Ámb Farasi ár efe tamorwén yémafé yiyárayénd fá snorayai yéné a namotayénd, "Némé fété yénd ghékéf kwéfkwéf yéném ndenáyo?"
bt: Some Farasi men who were with them hear him say this and asked, "Are we blind too?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Njam fém tamorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf, fém yau so tékmangé kértayan yaufimén, wénde fém mé norayati ndené fémofem fété efandati, féfene kérté mé so yém."
bt: Yesu answered them, "If you were blind, you.p would not put punishment about sin, but you.p still say that you still see, your punishment still is."

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yéndon fém efalo emndetan: efe yau kélawangé sifafene áráke sésafnemé, wénde narmbote ámb endmé, fá fiyém oro téfnár a résagh ár. 2 Ár efe kélawangé sésafnemé fá fiyém sifafene wanjengégh ár. 3 Sésafne wanjengégh árém tasawérngé sésafne yáyot, ndenáyo sifam káyárangi yáne kém njam yémon emote yétkwéne yánjo sif, a yémo so tangéutorngé. 4 Njam yémon méinyotio yánjomén tangéutorngé, fá fronde yéngém, sifam yénamayo taitongi, ménamén fá mat em yáne kém. 5 Yémofem yau so taitongi ámb ár, wénde fá so nérsat yéné ároeta, ménamén fá yau yáne kém mat em."
bt: Yesu said, "I tell you the truth: [anyone] who does not enter the gate of the sheep fence, but climbs in other way, he is a thief and a robber. 2 The man who eneters by the gate he is the watching man of the sheep. 3 The gatekeeper opens the gate for him, then the sheep listen to his voice when he call his own sheep by name, and he will lead them out. 4 When he brought all of his own out, he goes first, [and] his sheep next follow him, because they know his voice. 5 They will not follow other man, but they will run away from that man, because they do not know his voice.

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, wénde yémofem yau térsawét némé yémo korayau. Yesu mer sif wanjengégh ár
bt: Yesu told them this parable, but they did not carry/understand what he said. Yesu the good watching man

nama: Féyo Yesu kor wéi norayai, "Yéndon fém efalo emndetan: yénd swém sifafene sésafne. 8 Méinyotio ámb efe taném tane fronde fáfem oro téfnár a résagh ár, wénde sif yau káyáretat yéfefaf. 9 Yénd swém sésafne. Efe njam élawangé ta kénjúmé so kunjarngé; fá so nélawetat a néngtonat ménát mer yusafé sifayat. 10 Oro téfnár yéném résaghétro, ngiot a wirorghét. Yénd kwéném ménát yéfe ghérsé ramghét a wafoghkaf ghérsat.
bt: Then Yesu said again, "I tell you the truth, "I am the gate of the sheep. 8 All other people who came before me they are the thieves and robbers, but the sheep did not listen to them. 9 I am the gate. Whoever enters through me will be saved; they will come in and go out to find the place with good grass. 10 The thief comes only for stealing, and killing and destroying. I come to give life and for full of life themselves.

nama: Yénd swém mer sif wanjengégh ár, efe so kér yém sifafet. 12 Faikaf ár, efe yau wanjengégh ár yém a yuré yau yém siffaf, njam yémon tinjongé munjan ághé, yémon sif taurongé a kengongé; munjan ágham tawirorngi sif a kuférmongi. 13 Faikaf ár so kengongé ménamén fá mé fairo tafrote a fá yau so nemne ménamén sifmén. 14 Yénd swém mer sif wanjengégh ár; yénd mat wém tanjo sifmén a fá mat em tanemén, 15 ndené fété Afé mat kés yém tanemén a yénd mat wéi wém Afanemén, a yénd ménde fété wém kér sái wém yéfeyot. 16 Kété em ámb sif tane árké em árké yau em yéné sif áráke kénjún. Yéndon so enémnjan, fá so náyáretat tane kém, a fá wéi so kamndangi ámbiro mérén ámbiro wanjengégh árfé. 17 Afam wuwete yénd ménamén yénd ménde wém sái kér wém, a so ghérsé ténmangon wéi. 18 Emon ámb yau tane ghérsé so téngwanangé ta tambén. Yénd ménde wém sái kér wém. Yénd waftafé wém sái téngwangon a yénd waftafé wém sái ténmangon. Yéné fiyém némé tane Afam té kwénémndete yéndo sái yafrotan."
bt: I am the good watching man, who will die for the sheep. 12 The hired man, who is not a watching man and is not owner to sheep, whe he sees wild dog, he leaves the sheep and run away; wild dog destroys/attacks the sheep and [the sheep] scattered. 13 The hired man runs away because he works for payment and does not think about the sheep. 14 I am the good watching man; I know my own sheep and they know me, 15 as Father knows me and I know the Father, and I am willing to die for them. 16 There are other sheep which belong to me which are not in this sheep fence. I must bring them, they will listen to my voice, and they will become one group(flock) with one watching man. 17 The Father loves me because I am will to die, so that I may take it back again. 18 No one takes my life from me. I choose to die. I have power/authority to take it away and I have authority to bring it back. This is what my Father has commanded I should do.

nama: Wéikor mé kété mwighan afalogh témorwén Ju árfé ménamén yéné simén. 20 Tárfár ndené wéi korayawét, "Fá siyém yaufi mbérmbérafé yém! Fá siyém onon! Némat fémofem yiyáretati fá?"
bt: Again there was a division of thought among Ju people because of these talks. 20 Many people said like that again, "He is with a evil spirit(evil spirit possessed)! He is a crazy! Why you.pl listen to him?"

nama: Wénde ámb korayawét, "Mato ár wét sái yaufi mbérmbérafé yém yau ndené so noraye! Ndernáye yaufi mbérmbéram so mer tayátongé ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár?" Yesu té yékenayénd
bt: But other people said, "You.p must know the man with a evil spirit could not talk like this! How could a evil spirit can make blind people good?" They rejeted Yesu

nama: Yunjéfan témorwén wafarogh téménd ndené téfene áki téramayénd wáwefnogh méngo Ngánjánefaf kété Jerusalemén. 23 Yesu karendau Solomonene setset wáwefnogh méngo sifayé kénjún, 24 Ju árém njam yarendayénd a yémotayénd, "Nderé teke fémon so yale si afroghét téfeyot? Fémo efalo si ténmaufro: fém sném Keriso?" 25 Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon yénau ewaufroyén, wénde fémofem efalo yau wiyátotati. Yéné ásáfogh árké yéndon ewafrotan Afane yétkwénan ewauyafote féfeyot efe yénd wém, 26 wénde fémofem efalo yau wiyátoti, ménamén fém yau tane sif em. 27 Tane sif náyáretat tane kém; yénd mat wém fá, a yénd waitotat. 28 Yéndon ewarametan tuot ghérsé, a yau kér so em. Wéi emo yau so tawanangé tane ngángata. 29 Tane Afam té eramai tafaf. Yémon engwainde méinyotio rokar, emon yau so tautorngé Afane ngángata. 30 Afé a yénd ámbiro yénre."
bt: It was at winter[this Nama word means the time when there are heavy rain and it is hard for people to travel] the remembering festival the our ancesters gave the worshipping house to God was in Jerusalem. 23 Yesu was walking around Solomon's setset(it's like a veranda where people sit and walk around, without wall)in the worshipping house area, 24 when the Ju people gathered round and asked him, "How long will you delay reporting us? Tell us the truth: are you Keriso?" 25 Yesu answered, "I already told you, but you.p do not truly approve(believe) me. This works which I do in my Father's name shows you.p who I am. 26 but you do not truly approve(believe) me because you are not my sheep. 27 My sheep listen to my voice; I know them, and they follow me. 28 I give them eternal life, and they shall never die. No one can take them away from my hand. 29 My Father has given them to me. He surpasses everything, no one can take them away from my Father's hand. 30 the Father and I are one."

nama: Wéi Ju árém kor ekafayénd wím ménát Yesue laighét. 32 Yesum emndai fá, "Yéndon tawafrotan tárfár meryam féfene sáfrére árké Afam enramai wafroghét; árké ásáfoghmén wíme so wafiyátotati?"
bt: The Ju people again picked up stones to throw Yesu. 32 Yesu said to them, "I did many good things in your presence which the Father gave me to do; for which work are you.p going to stone me?"

nama: Fá nowangoyénd, "Yau yénd ménde yéném yéndfem wíme sái nénamndam ménamén méinyotio mer wafroghyammén, wénde ménamén fene wutmanghofnar si! Fém ném ár fifi, wénde fémyo náyátote nde Ngánján kar ném!"
bt: They answered, "[It is] not we are going to stone because of all of good things/deeds, but because of your without respecting talk(blasphemy)! You are only a body(man), but you yourself claim to be God!"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéna yéfarotaménd féfenjo nákan Ngánján norayai, 'Fém sém némbne ngánján.' 35 Yénd mat yéném ndené némé si noraye Bukan yéné siyém efalo a tuot; a Ngánjánam emndete yéné ár némbne ngánján, yéné ár endefefaf yánjo si eramai. 36 Ndené yénd, Afam yénd waferyéng ndené yánjomén a wémáfáretam yéné mband maratot. Némamén fém norayati ndené yéndon wutmanéghofnar si norayan, ménamén fété yénd norayan ndené yénd swém Ngánjánene Ambum? 37 Fémofem efalo yau wiyátotati ndemamén yéndon yafrotan tane Afane ásáfogh. 38 Wénde njam yéndo ewaufrotan yane ásáfogh, efalo yau wiyátotati, fémofem tane wafroghyam efalo táyátongi, ménát fém so mat káyátongi efaloe ndené Afé tane kénjún a yénd Afane kénjún."
bt: Yesu answered them, "It is written in your own law [that] God said, 'You are small gods.' 35 We know that what the Buk(scripture) says this is true and forever; and God called these people small gods, these people to whom he gave his talk. 36 As for me, the Father chose me as his own and sent me into this world. Why you said that I have a blasphemy(said a without respecting talk), because I said that I am God's Son? 37 Do not truly approve(believe) me unless I am doing my Father's work. 38 But if I do them, even though you do not truly approve(believe) me, truly approve(believe) my deed, in order that you may know truly that the Father [is] in me, and I in the Father."

nama: Wéikor Yesu yéta yerayénd, wénde Yesu néngfénmai yéfene ngángata.
bt: Again they tried to seize Yesu, but Yesu escaped from their hands.

nama: A Yesu wéikor néférmai Joden wanje kétán Joném ár ánde tawalitotau, a kété témorangérwén. 41 Tárfár ár tanmorwén yáfaf a korayawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Joném ámb ufarogh yam yau ewafrotam, wénde méinyotio yammén té korayau yéné ároenemén siyém efalo." 42 Tárfár árém kété efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu.
bt: And Yesu crossed the Joden again river to where Jon baptized, and there he stayed. 41 Many people came to him and said to each other, "Jon never did a special workings(miracles), but everything he had said about this man is true." 42 Many people there truly approved(believed) in him.

nama: Ár yétkwén Lajarus témorwén enjne. Fá témorwén Betanimén, yéfene méngotu Meri a yané Mata. 2 Yéné Meri, endene ghakér Lajarus tékmangérwén enjne, fáyo yéné témorwén emo soramé yasuryéng mer wimafé wékwér Yurane kafkafot a tawányányotau yánjo séfe. 3 Féyo yá mersofem si yéngwawatembayénd Yesue, "Yuré, fémon efe yuwete enjne yém."
bt: A man name Lajarus was sick. He was from Betani, their village of Meri and her big sister Mata. 2 This Meri, whose brother Lajarus laid sick, she herself was the same who later poured good smell's liquid(perfume) on the Lord's feet and wiped them with her hair. 3 So the sisters.dual sent talk to Yesu, "Lord, the one whom you love is sick."

nama: Njam fá náyárai yéné, Yesu norayai, "Yéné enjne siyém yau ménát krot. Yau, yéné siyém Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghat yém ménát Ngánjánene Ambum so yéngwiotat yéné kénjúmé."
bt: When he heard this, Yesu said, "This sickness will not to be death. No, it is for God's big light(glory) so that God's Son will be lifted through this. 5 Yesu loved Mata and her little sister and Lajarus. 6 But when he heard that Lajarus was sick, he still stayed that place for two more days. 7 Then he said to his following men, "Let us go back to Judia."

nama: Fá korayangi, "Watamegh ár, tekofnar efghon kété Ju árém fém wíme wafiyátoghét némafngoyénd a wéi kétán fém nangote?"
bt: They said, "Teacher, on short time ago there the Ju people tried to stone you and again to [there] you are going back?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Kété em 12 efoghféneféne em ámbiro efghon. Ár efe yiota efghon fá yau so náutáne, ménamén yémo so yéfande mband maratoene kwayaghé. 10 Fá njam eyota sémbáran fá so néngáutánat, ménamén yáne yau yém kwayaghé. 11 Soramé fá norayai, yémon tawaufrotau yéfe, "Téfene fútar Lajarus kémégh yékém; wénde yénd kétán wéngém ménát yá wanoghét."
bt: Yesu answered them, "There are 12 hours of one daytime. Person who walks in the daytime he will not fall down, because he can see it by this world's light. 10 If he walks at night he will fall down, because he has no light." 11 After he said, he told them, "Our friend Lajarus is sleeping; but I am going to there to wake him up."

nama: Yánjo waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Yuré, fá njam kémégh yékém, fá so mer káyátongé." 13 Yesu korayau yáne kérmén, wénde yáne waitogh ár kéma kemnawét fifie kéméghmén kar korayau.
bt: His following men answered him, "Lord, if he is sleeping, he will become good." 13 Yesu spoke of his death, but his following men thought an idea about bodily(natural) sleep he might speak.

nama: Yénémamén yémon kor ewaufroi mbarkándaye, "Lajarus fété kér tém, 15 a féfe téfnan yénd áuwéghan wém yénd yau kété kés kwém, ménát fémofem so efalo tiyátongi. Wénde so kuwanongém yénd yáfaf."
bt: That's why he told them again straightly, "Lajarus has died, 15 and for your.pl reason(sake) I am in happiness I was not there, in order that you may truly approve(believe). But let us go to him."

nama: Féyo Tomas efe yémndetat Didimas fá korayangé ámb waitogh árfefaf, "Yénd so kuwanongém, yénd wéi yémafé Yesufé kér so yéném." Yesu siyém anogh a ghérsé
bt: Then Tomas who is called Didimas he said to the other discipes, "We will go, we may die with him Yesu." Yesu is the ressurection and the life

nama: Yáne ufarghan Yesum yinjoi Lajarus té mband yaramayénd a náyátoyénd 4 efogh. 18 Betani 3 kilomitaro témorwén kétándmé Jerusalemta, 19 tárfár Ju ár enmormén yéfefaf Mata a Meri, tawáutárwét ménamén yéfene ghakér Lajarus kér té yémormén. 20 Njam Mata náyárai Yesu ténmorwén, fá néwanoi a yéfángoi, wénde Meri mé yémorangérmén méngon.
bt: On his arrival Yesu found [that] Lajarus has already been buried and has become 4 days. 18 Betani was only three kilomitè from Jerusalem, 19 many Ju people came to them Mata and Meri, help them because their brother Lajarus has died. 20 When Mata heard [that] Yesu was coming, she went and met him, but Meri stayed in house.

nama: Mata norayai Yesuefaf, "Yuré, fém yéna njam kénmorangérwén tane ghakér yau so kér témorwén. 22 Wénde yénd mat wém ndené sénonjo Ngánjánam so kémaramangé fém némat kómnenda."
bt: Mata said to Yesu, "Lord, if you were here my brother would not have died. 22 But I know that now God will give you what you ask."

nama: Yesum korayangé yáfaf, "Fene ghakér wéi so kanongé."
bt: Yesu said to him/her, "Your brother will rise again." 24 Mata answered him, "I know he will rise again on the last day." 25 Yesu said to him/her, "I am the rising and the life. For him who truly approves(believes) in me will be alive even though he potentially died, 26 and whoever lives and truly approves(believes) in me he will not die. Do you truly approve(believe) this?"

nama: Matam yawangoi, "Néméwét, Yuré, yéndo efalo niyátotan ndené fém ném Keriso, Ngánjánene ambum, efe té yénmorwén yéné mband maratot.
bt: Mata answered him, "Yes, Lord, I truly approve(believe) you that you are Keriso, God's Son, who has come to this world.

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam norayai yéné, fá nénangoi a yéngmotayéng yánngén Meri téndot a korayangé, "Watamegh ár yéna yém a fém nénémndete."
bt: After this when she said this, he went back and called her small sister Meri outside and said, "Teacher is here and he is calling you."

nama: Njam Meri náyárai, fá wékeye nokayoi a néngwanoi yáfaf. 30 Yau Yesu mé nufaryéng méngotuot, wénde kété mé témorwén yéné sifayan ánde Matam yéfángoi. 31 Njam Ju ár efe tamorwén Merifé méngon, tawamarowét, fá tinjongi nderé wékeye fá nokayoi a néngtoryéng, yémofem yéngwaitoyénd, kemnawét ndené mbéwat kar néngwanoi yeyot.
bt: When Meri heard, she quickly stood up and went to him. 30 Yesu has not arrived yet to the village, but there still was this on the place where Mata met him. 31 When Ju people who were with Meri in the house, supporting her, they saw how fast she stood up and went out, they followed her, thinking that to the grave she might go to cry.

nama: Njam Meri yéné sifayé nufaryéng ánde Yesu témorwén a yinjoi fá, fá nuyai yáne kafkafot a korayangé, "Yuré, fém yéna njam kénmorangérwén, tane ghakér yau so kér témorwén."
bt: When Meri arrived this place where Yesu was and found him, she fell to his feet and said, "Lord, if you were here, my brother would not die."

nama: Njam Yesum yinjoi fá yeyan, a Ju ár yémafé efe enmormén fá wéi ndenéyameyo kendawét, Yesu kénjkam ghérghérsisayam yifoi tikfan. 34 Yémo emotai, "Ánde fémofem mband yaramayénd?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kénaf a téfanda, Yuré."
bt: When Yesu saw her weeping, and Ju people who came with her they also in the same way weeping, he felt deep sadness in the heart. 34 He asked them, "Where have you make land(buried him)?" They answered him, "Come and see, Lord."

nama: Yesu ye nufngoi. 36 Féyo Ju ár norayayénd, "Téfandangi nderé uwégh tuwete fá!"
bt: Yesu started crying. 36 Then Ju people said, "See how much he loved him!"

nama: Wénde ámb korayawét, "Yémo ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár mer táyátote. Némamén yau Lajarus yanjaryéng kérta?" Yesum yanoi Lajarus kétándmé kérta
bt: But other people were saying, "He made the blind become good. Why he not protect Lajarus from dying?" Yesu raised Lajarus from the dead

nama: Yesu kénjkam ghérghérsisayam yifoi tikfan, nénaflai mbéwéfaf. Yékw témorwén a wím yéfayoyénd sésafnen. 39 Fá korayangé, "Titrembongi yéné wím." Mata, kér téfnárane mérés norayai, "Yuré, sénonjo yaufi wim so yém, ménamén fá té náyáto 4 efogh."
bt: Yesu felt deep sadness in the heart, came to the grave. It was a hole and stone covered on the door. 39 He said, "Take this stone away." Mata dead person's sister said, "Lord, now bad smell will be, because he has been 4 days."

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Yéndon ewaufrotamén fémon so yéfande Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé njam fémon efalo tiyáto."
bt: But Yesu said, "What I told you [that] you will see God's strong light(big light) if you truly approve(believe)."

nama: Yénémamén yémofem yitrémboyénd wím. Féyo Yesu néwewoi tukét a korayangé, "Afé, yéndon kánjo némarametan fémon yénd té wiyáré. 42 Yénd mat wém ndené fémon túmén wiyárete yénd, wénde yénd yéné néngorayan árfe téfnan swakai yéna, ménát yémofem so efalo yiyátotat ndené fémon yénd wénmáfáretam."
bt: This is why they took the stone away. Then Yesu looked up and said, "Father, I give thanks you have heard me. 42 I know that you always hear me, but I am saying this for the people are standing here, so that they may truly approve(believe) that you sent me."

nama: Njam fá norayai yéné, Yesu nutnai ndimbal keye, "Lajarus, kéntor!" 44 Kér téfnár néntoryéng, yáne ngángé a kafkaf mbéwé sáláme fiyaréghkaf tamorwén a sáláme umbéghkaf sénkoyamé warengéghare. Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Tafenangi mbéwé sáláme a tumyongi álighét." Kwankwane mwighé wafrogh Yesue ngiot
bt: When he said this, Yesu shouted with a loud voice, "Lajarus, come out!" 44 Dead person came out, his hands and feet were wrapped with grave clothes and with clothes tied around the head. Yesu said to them, "Untie grave clothes and let him walk." The secret thought made(plan) to kill Yesu

nama: Yénémamén tárfár Ju ár efe té enmormén yafoghét Meriefaf, a wéi tafandawét némé Yesum tawafrotau, efalo yiyátoyénd fá. 46 Wénde ámb ár engmormén Farasi árfefaf a tawaufrotawét némé Yesum tawafrotau. 47 Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém yanmoyénd Ju sénko árfene áumengégh.
bt: For this many Ju people who had came to visit Meri, and had seen what Yesu did, truly approved(believed) in him. 46 But some people went to Farasi men and told them what Yesu did. 47 Then the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and Farasi men called a Ju head men' gathering(meeting).

nama: Yéndfem njam mé yéngéumyotam engwafrota yéné yam, méinyotio árém fá so efalo yiyátotat, a wéi Rom ár so eném ewasérmbotat téfene wáwefnogh méngo a téfene yu."
bt: If we continue let him to do this things, all the people will truly approve(believe) him, and then Rom people will come destroy our worshipping house and our place(nation)

nama: Ámb ár yétkwén Kayafas, efe témorwén limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yéné yunjéfan, norayai yéfefaf, "Fém mafina em yénémén! 50 Fém mat yau em ndené ámbiro ár sái kér yém árét, ménaye ndené yau so méinyotio Ju ár nawaghne."
bt: A man name Kayafas, who was leading burning sacrifice men in that year, said to them, "You don't know about it! 50 You don't know that it is good for one man to die for the people, by that all Ju people will not be destroyed."

nama: Fá yau norayai yánjo méndeye, wénde ménamén fá témorwén limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yéné yunjfan, fá norayai soramé yumén si ndené Yesu kér so yém Ju árfeyot, 52 a yau Ju árfetro, wénde yémafayo wéi efe em éfáranégh ambum Ngánjánene ménát so enwangote a ámbiro tanyátongé. 53 Féyo kétánotio yéné efogh yémofem mwighé yéfrendaménd Yesue ngiot.
bt: He did not say this by his will, but because he was leading burning sacrifice men in that year, he said this talk for the future that Yesu will die for Ju people, 52 and not only for Ju people, but also for those scattered God's children to bring back and make them one. 53 So from that day they planned to kill Yesu.

nama: Yesu yénémamén kor yau marataye tiotau Ju árfefafmé. Wénde fá naweghai a nuwanoi kétán tesen yétkwén Efaraim, árké témorwén fanfne yu kaka, ánde fá tamorangérwén yánjo waitogh árfé.
bt: Because of this Yesu didn't openly walk among Ju people. But he retreated and went to town name Efaraim, which close to the desert, where they stayed with his following men.

nama: Kaka kénáyátotau Ju árfene Waingégh Téménd sái karnyangai. Tárfár ár tangmormén yéfene nayu sifayata kétán Jerusalemot. Fá kétán tangmormén ménát so káyátotawét fá njúnnjúnofnar Ngánjánene sáfrére soramé so tangmorwén téméndfaf. 56 Yémofem ménjtaye ronjagh yafngoyénd Yesu, a njam fá tawakayongérwén wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, fáro kénjún ámogh nufngoyénd, "Fém ndernáye nemnati? Némé fá so yéném yéné téménd kénjút efalo?" 57 Wénde limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém mat si yéramayénd ndené emo njam tinjongé Yesu ánde yém, yémo fété so ténmaufrongé ménát yémofem so terangayénd.
bt: It was almost time for the Ju Passover festival to begin. Many people were going from their long(country) places to Jerusalem. They were going there to make themselves clean in front of God before they went to the festival. 56 They kept looking for Yesu, and when they was standing in the worshipping house place, they started asking among themselves, "How are you thinking? What he will come in this feast really(true)?" 57 But the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and Farasi men gave announcement that whoever saw Yesu where he was, he must tell us in order that they would arrest.
