nama: 6 efogh frondeta kétán Waingégh téméndfaf Yesu nufaryéng Betanin, ánde Lajarus témorangérwén efe Yesum yanoi kérta. 2 Njamke kété efrendaménd Yesue, Matam tangwaflitau njamke a Lajaruséf ámb tamorwén efe tamorangérwén Yesufé njamke kitarafaf. 3 Merim yéngwanai ndimbal manimén botruafé mer wimafé wékwér yémndetat ámb mbumbu wén yétkwén nada yawasuryéng Yesuene kafkaf a tawányányotau yáne kafkaf yánjo séfe. Féyo mer méndefé wimam nofayoi méngo.
bt: 6 days before to the Passover fastival Yesu arrived in Betani, where Lajarus was staying whom Yesu raised from the death. 2 Food there they prepared for Yesu(Note: we can translate, Food was prepared there for Yesu), Mata was serving the food and Lajaris was one of them who was sitted at the food table. 3 Meri took with a big money bottle of good smell liquid from soem flowering tree named nad and poured it on Yesu's feet and wiping his feet with her hair. Then the sweet smell filled the house.

nama: Ámb yáne waitogh ár, Judas Iskariot, emo so sén térametau soramé, norayai, 5 "Némamén yéné mer wimafé wékwér yau yéramayénd 300 Denarion, árké em 300 efoghmén fai a tawaramangayénd mani yauyau árét?" 6 Fá ndené norayai, kor yau yémon tawanjete yauyau ár wénde ménamén fá témorwén oro téfnár. Yémon térsau mani yáf a fáyo kawáutánau yénaye.
bt: One of his following men, Judas Iskario, who will make teeth(betray) him later, said, 5 "Why don't this good smell liquid(perfume) sell for 300 Denarion, which are the wages for 300 days and the money given to the poor?" 6 He said this, he really did not take care of the poor but because he was a thief. He carried the money bag and helped himself from it.

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Téfrangongi fá yambiayo! Yémon té tamnde yéné mer wimafé wékwér yéné efghot tane mband raméghfaf. 8 Fém túmén so em yauyau árfé, wénde yénd yau kor so wém féfefaf."
bt: Yesu answered him, "Leave her alone! She keep this special smelling liquid for the day of my making land(burial). 8 You always will be with the poor, but I will not always be with you."

nama: Tárfár Ju ár té náyárayénd ndené Yesu témorwén Betanin, té engmormén kétán, ménát Yesue fandaghét a Lajaruse fandaghét ndenáyo, efe Yesum kérta yanoi. 10 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém mwighé téfaronawét Lajaruse ngiot ndenáyo, 11 ménamén yáne téfnan tárfár Ju ár kawewetawét Ju sénko árfaf a efalo tiyátotawét Yesu. Yesu nélawai Jerusalemét ndenanit warsagh ár
bt: Many Ju people had heard that Yesu was in Betani, so they went there, because to see Yesu and to see Lajarus like that, whom Yesu raised from death. 10 The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) made plan to kill Lajarus like that, 11 beacuse of his reason many Ju people were rejecting Ju head men and they were only believing in Yesu. Yesu entered into Jerusalem like the ruling man(king)

nama: Yénamayo efghon ndimbal ár mérén efe té enmormén Waingégh témndot náyárayénd nde Yesu yéném Jerusalemét. 13 Yémofem tangérsawét nginar árau, a néngwanoyénd yá wanfégh, ngutnawét, "Áuwégh Ngánjáne! Frengéghkaf fá yém efe yéném Yurane yétkwénan! Frengéghkaf yém warsagh ár Israilmén!"
bt: The next day the large crowd who had come for Passover festival heard that Yesu was coming to Jerusalem. 13 They took palm leaves, and went out to meet him, shouting, "Praise to God! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord! Blessed is the ruling man(king) of Israil!"

nama: Yesum tinjongé totér ndonki a nafayoi kété, ndené fété Buk si kés yéfarotaménd,
bt: Yesu found a young donkey and sat on there, as the Buk(scripture)s were written,

nama: "Yau férfér em, ndimbal yu Jaion{v{ ...f* {v{12.15 Jaion Yéné siyém Jerusalem ! kéretangi, féfene warsagh ár yéném, yénfayong totér ndonki tukén."{w{ ...f* {w{12.15 Jekaria 9:9
bt: "Don't be afraid, big place(city) of Jaion{q{ ...f* {q{12.15 Jaion This is Jerusalem ! See, your.p the ruling man(king) is coming, is sitting on the young donkey."

nama: Yesuene waitogh ár yau mat náyátoyénd méinyotio yénémamén yéné efghon. Wénde fá mat náyátoyénd soramé Yesu témorwén ndimbal kwayaghafé. Féyo fá mat táf náyátoyénd ndené ámb árom té efarotam yéné yammén Bukan.
bt: Yesu's following men did not understand all this at that time. They understood only after Yesu was with big light(glory). Then they remembered that someone had written these things about him in the Bible.

nama: Ár efe tamorwén Yesufé táf yémon njam Lajarus yémotai mbéwata a yanoi fá kérta nafroyénd némé té kufrotau. 18 Tárfár ár ménamén fá té náyárayénd Yesum té yafrotam yéné sélngwélafé yam, néngtoryénd a néngwanoyénd yá wanféghét. 19 Farasi ár korayangi yéfe kénjúnro, "Té yéfandati ámb yau ándan nufanam méinyotio árém yéné mband maratan yaitotat Yesu!" Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
bt: The people who were with Yesu when he called Lajarus from the grave and raised him from death were reporting/testifying what had happened. 18 Many people because they had heard Yesu had did this surprising thing, went out and go to meet him. 19 Farasi men said among themselves, "You.p see we can do nothing, all the people in this world are following Yesu!" Yesu told about his death

nama: Ámb Grikmén ár kété tamorwén yéfe kénjún efe engmormén wáwefnoghét téméndfaf. 21 Fá enmormén Filifefaf, efe témorwén kétamamén Betsaida Galili yuwon, fá norayayénd, "Ndimbal, yénd ménde yéném sái tinjongém Yesu." 22 Filif yéngmormén taufrongé Endrue, Endru a Filif nénwaneyayénd tauférend Yesue.
bt: Some Grik people were there among those who went to worship at the feast. 21 They came to Filif, who was from Betsaida in Galili region, they said to him, "Bigman, we want to see Yesu." 22 Filif went and told Endru, Endru and Filif came.dual, told.dual Yesu.

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Efogh té nawer Ároene Ambum sái yuyotat. 24 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, táfandro mbwe njam kuyangé flawane kétán mbandot a kér yém, mé so yém ámbiro mbwe, wénde njam kér yém, yémon so eráfte tárfár mbwe. 25 Árom emo yuwete yánjo ghérsé so yétarne, njam árké árom méndméndat yéfanda yánjo ghérsé yéné mband maratan so yamnde tuot ghérsat. 26 Emo njam tayot wásáfota so waitote. Féyo yémafé yénd so yénre kété yénd ánde wém. Tane Afam so yuwete fá emo ta kwásáfote.
bt: Yesu reply to them, "The days has come for the son of Man to be lifted up 24 I tell you the truth, unless the seed of flour fall into the ground and dies, it is still one seed, but if it dies, it will produce many seeds. 25 The man who loves his life will lose it, when which man hates his life in this world will keep it for eternal life. 26 Anyone who wants to be my without.payment working man(servant) must follow me. Then he will be with me, where I am. My Father will praise anyone who is my without.payment working man(servant).

nama: Sénonjo tane tikéf uwérsoghan yém, a némé so yénd norayan? Afé, kwanjar yénd yéné efoghta? Yau, mé yéné téfnan yénd wénmormén yéné efghot. 28 Afé, yuyota fenjo yétkwén!"
bt: Now my heart is in trouble, and what will I say? Father, save me from this day. No, for this reason I came for this day. 28 Father, lift up(glorified) your name!"

nama: Ár mérén kété efe tamorwén, náyáretaménd a norayayénd ndené aruruke tém; ámb norayayénd njafar si résagh árom séno yénémndete fá.
bt: The crowd that was there, heard and said that it was a thunder; other people said a man carrying heavenly message must have spoken to him.

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yéné kém stém féfe téfnan, yau tane téfnan. 31 Sénonjo efogh yém mbandoe moghét; sénonjo limánégh ár yéné mbandmén so yitat téndot. 32 Yénd njam wuyotat yéné mbandta, yéndon so eméindan méinyotio ár sái eném tafaftio." 33 Fá norayai yéné ménát yufarotai ndernáye ende fá so kér témorwén.
bt: Yesu said, "This voice was for your.p reason, not my reason. 31 Now is the time for judging to the world; now the ruler of this world will be thrown away/note: original word order-[they] will throw away the ruling man(king) of the world outside/ 32 When they lifted me up from this earth, I will cause all people to come to me." 33 He said this in order to show in which way he was to die.

nama: Ár mérén norayayénd, "Yénd té náyárayém Buk sita ndené Keriso so nakete tuot. Némamén fém noraye Ároene Ambum fété so yuyotat? Efe yém yéné Ároene Ambum?"
bt: The crowd said, "We had heard from the Scripture that Keriso will live forever. Why do you say they will lift the Son of Man up? Who is this Son of Man?"

nama: Féyo Yesum tamndangé, "Féfefaf so yém kwayaghé tekofnaye. Eyota njamandio féfefaf yém kwayaghé, ménát kwéfitayam yau ewainde fém. Ár efe yiota kwéfitayan yau mat yém ándan fá yéngém. 36 Ekmetati féfenjo mwighé kwayaghafaf njamandio féfefaf yém, ménát fém táf so kénamndangi kwayaghane ambum." Njam yémon si ewifoi, Yesum efrangoi a néngatnoi yéfe tambén. Ju ár mé katambnawét
bt: Then Yesu told them, "To you.p will be the light for a short time. Walk while the light is to you.p, so that the darkness does not surpass you. The man who walks in the darkness doesn't know where he is going. 36 Put your.p mind to the light while it is to you, so that you will become sons of the light." When he finished talking, Yesu left them and hid himself from them. The Ju people still did not truly approve(believe)

nama: Ndemamén Yesum méinyotio tawafrotau yéné sélngwélafé wafroghyam yéfe rére, wénde yémofem yau efalo tiyátotawét fá. 38 Yéné kufrotau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayam némamén té korayau: "Yuré, emo ámb téfene si té efalo eyáto? Fém té nauyafo nderé wafté kér ro ném fém, wénde efe ámb yau kor mat náyáto."
bt: Even though Yesu did all these special workings(miracles) in their presence, but they did not truly approve(believe) him. 38 This happened as what God's man who make know(prophet) Aisaya has said: Lord, who truly approved(believed) our talk? And to whom still did the Lord show his power?"

nama: Yéné téfnan yémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd, ménamén Aisayam wéi té korayau:
bt: For this reason they did not truly approve(believe) him because Aisaya had also said:

nama: "Yuram kwéfkwéf eyátoi yéfene ghékéf a tikéf táikér wéi ndenáyo, ménát fá yau so néretat yéfenjo ghékfe, yau so mat náyátotat yéfenjo tikfan, yau so nawengotat a yéndon sái mer eyátotan fá."
bt: "The Lord made their eyes blinded and hardened their heart again like that, in order that they will not see with their eyes, will not know in their hearts, will not turn and I would make them good."

nama: Aisaya norayai yéné ménamén yémon yinjoi Yesuene ndimbal kwayaghé a korayau yánemén.
bt: Aisaya said this because he saw Yesu's strong light(big light) and spoke of him.

nama: Wénde sénko ár kénjún tárfáram efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu. Wénde ménamén Farasi árfenemén yau yémofem kafrotawét yéfenjo ndimbal mwighamén férfér téfnan ménamén mété táf tautonawét áumengégh méngota, 43 ménamén yémofem áuwégh térsawét árta mindefifi yau Ngánjáneta.
bt: But many head men truly approved(believed) in Yesu. But because of Farasi men they did not report about their big mind(faith) for fear because they take them out from the meeting house(meeting house), 43 because they took praise from men so much not from God.

nama: Yesu norayai marat kéme, "Njam árom efalo kwiyátongé yénd, yémon yau yéndro efalo wiyátote, wénde fá wéi emon yénd wénmáfáretam. 45 Njam emo wefanda yénd, yémo yéfande fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam. 46 Yénd té wénmormén kwayaghé yéné mbandot, ménát emo njam efalo wiyátota fá yau so yém kwéfitayan.
bt: Yesu said with an loud voices, "When a man truly approves(believes) in me, he does not truly approve(believe) only me, but he also truly approve(believe) who sent me. 45 When he looks at me, he sees him who sent me. 46 I have came [as]a light to this world, so that whoever truly approves(believes) in me he will not be in the darkness.

nama: Árké árom náyárete tane si a yau ewarawene, yéndon yau mogh yafrotan yáfaf. Ménamén yénd yau wénmormén ménát mband marat moghét, wénde sái tawanjarén. 48 Kété fété yém mogh ár árét emo yénd wékene a yau efalo eyátote tane si; yéné si árké yénd kénorayan so tawafalngongé kerker efghon. 49 Yénd yau norayan tanjo si, wénde Afam emo yénd wénmáfáretam wénémndai yénd orayéghét némé té korayan. 50 Yénd mat wém nde yáne wafarégh siam yénlimnde kétán tuot ghérsat. Féyo némé yénd norayan mé ndené fété ndernáye Afam wénémndetam yénd siot.
bt: Which man hears my talk and does not obey them, I do not report him court/judgement. Because I did not come to judge the world, but to save them. 48 There is a judge for the one who rejects me and does not truly approve(believe) my talk; this talk which I have spoken will condemn them on the last day. 49 I don't say my own talk, but the Father who sent me told me to speak what I have spoken. 50 I know that his commanding talk leads us to eternal life. So what I only speak like as how Father told me to say.

nama: Kaka témorwén Waingégh téménd. Yesu mat náyátoi ndené efogh té nawer yáyot yéné mband marat frangoghét a angoghét Yárefaf. Yémon tauwetau yánjo waitogh ár yéné mband maratan, yémon tauwetau fá mindefifi kétánotio yatoghfaf.
bt: The passover feast was close. Yesu knew that the day has come for him to leave this world and to go back to his Father. He loved his followers in this world, he loved them very much to the end.

nama: Séite njamkeyan, Sáifram frondeyo té yéméindai Judas, Saimon Iskariotene ambum, emo mwighé yafrotam Yesue sén ramghét. 3 Yesu mat náyátoi nde Yárefam méinyotio rokar eramai yáne wafté mbanmbanot, a fá yénmormén Ngánjánta a álighétro témorwén Ngánjánefaf. 4 Féyo fá nokayoi njamke néne tambén, faru sáláme yéfitaryéng, a naumbai karatayan taberoe. 5 Yéné soramé, yémon nu yasuryéng disan a umbarégh ewawafngoi yánjo waitogh árfene kafkaf, féyo tawawányányotau yéné taberoe árké tumbangérwén yáfaf.
bt: In the afternoon meal, Sáifèr before caused Judas, Saimon Iskariot's son, who made a plan to give teeth(betray) Yesu. 3 Yesu knew that his Father gave all things under his power, and he came from God and was about to go to God. 4 Then he stood up from the meal, took off his outside clothing, and tied himself on the waist with a towel. 5 After this, he poured the water in the dish, and started washing his followers' feet, then wiped dried them with this towel which was tied him.

nama: Fá yénmormén Saimon Fitafaf, emo yémndai fá, "Yuré, fémon tane kafkaf so waumbne? Yénd yau ménde wém"
bt: He came to Saimon Fitè, who told him, "Lord, do you wash my feet? I don't want."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Sénonjo fémon yau yáyamngo yéndo némé yafrotan, wénde soramé fém mat so káyáto."
bt: Yesu answered him, "Now you do not know what I am doing, but later you will know"

nama: Fité norayai, "Yau, fémon yaufifi so waumbne tane kafkaf, yau sénonjo o tuot!" Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon yau njam némaumbnan fene kafkaf, fém tane waitogh ár yau so ném."
bt: Fitè said, "Never, you will not wash my feet not now or forever." Yesu answered him, "If I do not wash your feet, you will not be my follower."

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi, "Féyo, Yuré, yau mé tane kafkafro wénde tane ngángé a tane sénko ndenéyameyo."
bt: Saimon Fitè answered him, "Then, Lord, not only my feet but my hands and my head like that."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efe té kumbnat mé yéfene kafkafro umbarghét em; yéfene méinyotio fifi siyém njúnnjúnofnar. Fém njúnnjúnofnar em wénde yau fém méinyotio." 11 Fá norayai ndené ménamén fá mat náyátoi emo so sén téramangai fá, a yéné téfnan fá norayai méinyotio njúnnjúnofnar tamorwén wénde ámbiro yau.
bt: Yesu answered him, "Those who had been washed only their feet need to be washed; their whole body is without dirt(clean). You are clean but not all of you." 11 Hhe said that because he knew who would give teeth(betray) him, and for this reason he said all people were clean but not one.

nama: Njam yémon ewifoi yéfene kafkaf umbarégh, yémon yánjo sáláme nawoi a nangoi námnjoi yánjo sifayan. Yesum emotai, "Fém mat té namndangi némé yéndon féfe ewawafrotan? 13 Fémofem wémndetati, 'Watamegh ár' a 'Yuré,' a fém fété norayati mbarkánde, yénd yéné fété wém. 14 Ndené fété yénd, féfene Yuré a Watamegh ár, téfé ewaumbnan féfene kafkaf ndenéyameyo fémofem so ewambnatati kafkaf fémro fémro. 15 Yéndo ufarogh yam fiyafrotan ménát fémofem so ewafrotati ndenéyameyo yéndon némé fiyafrotan féfeyot. 16 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, faiofnar ásáfogh árom yau so yáinde yánjo yuré, a si résagh árom yau so yáinde fá emo ténmáfárete. 17 Sénonjo fém mat té namndangi yéné yammén, fém so frengan em njam fémofem ewafrotati. Yesu kafrotau yánjo sén raméghmén
bt: When he finished washing their feet, he wore his clothes and returned sat in his place. Yesu asked them, "Have you known what I have done to you? 13 You call me, 'Teacher' and 'Lord' and you say straight, I am really this. 14 Just like me, your.p Lord and Teacher, I have washed your.p feet in the same way you.p must wash one another's feet. 15 I did the surprising thing in order that you.p can do them in the same way what I did for you.p. 16 I tell you the truth, a without.payment working man(servant) will not surpass his owner, and messenger will not surpass him who sent him. 17 Now you know about these thing, you will be in blessing(blessed) when you do them. Yesu told about his betrayal

nama: Yénd yau norayan méinyotio féfenemén, yénd mat wém efe yéndon ekafayén. Wénde yéné ménát yém Buk si efalo sái káyátongé, 'Fá emafé tane féskaf flawé feném, fá yém tane sén téfnár.'
bt: I am not talk about all of you.p, I know whom I have chosen. But in order to become true this Scripture, 'He who eats my food, he is my man who give teeth(betrayer).'

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe sénonjo frondeyo soramé nufrota, ménát njam nufrota, fémofem so efalo kwiyátongi ndené Yénd yéné fwém efe Yénd wém. 20 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo: emon njam tumyongé ár efe yéndon yéngwáfáretan kumyongé yénd; a emo njam kumyongé yénd tumyongé fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam."
bt: I am telling you.p now before it happens, in order that when it happens, you will truly approve(believe) me that I am who I am. 20 I tell you the truth: whoever receives a man who I send receives me; and whoever receives me receives him who sent me."

nama: Soramé Yesu njam norayai yéné si, fá mbérmbéran nawayamngoi a norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, ámb féfene árom sén so kwéramangé."
bt: After when Yesu said this talk, he was trubled in sprit and said to his followers, "I tell you the truth, one of your man will give teeth(betray) me."

nama: Yáne waitogh ár afandagh nufngoyénd fáro fáro, ménamén fá mafina tamorwén efe Yesum tésérmbnau. 23 Ámb yánjo waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau témorangérwén Yesue kaka. 24 Saimon Fitam ngángaye yaunyai a norayai yéné waitogh ároefaf, "Témota fá árké ár yémon yésérmbne?"
bt: His following men started looking at each other, because they did not know whom Yesu spoke. 23 One of his follower whom Yesu loved was close to Yesu. 24 Saimon Fitè motioned with hands and said to this follower, "Ask him which man do he speak?"

nama: Féyo yéné waitogh ár néngamghai Yesuefaf, yémon yémndai Yesu, "Yuré, efe yéné ár yém?"
bt: Then this following man leaned to Yesu, he told Yesu, "Lord, who is this man?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fá yéné so fiyém ende sái taraman féskaf flawé karéfkaréf njam yukan disan. Féyo yémon yukai féskaf flawé karéfkaréf yaramai Judas, Saimon Iskariotene ambum. 27 Njamandio Judasém yanayéng féskaf flawé, Sáifér nélawai yáfaf. Yesum yémndai, "Némé fémon wafroghét yafngo, wékeye tafrota." 28 Wénde téménd kénjún emo yau yáyamngoi némamén Yesum yémndai fá. 29 Ménamén Judasém yéngérsam yéfene mani yáf, ámb kéma kemnawét ndené Yesum kar témndetau téménd rokar résaghét, o ámb rokar ramghét yauyau árét. 30 Njamandio Judasém yéngwanai féskaf flawé, fá néngtoryéng. A sémbár témorwén. Yesu kafrotau Fitane kenaghmén
bt: Yesu answered him, "He will be this to whom I will give bread piece when I will dip it in the dish. Then he dipped the bread piece [and] gave it to Judas, Saimon Iskariot's son. 27 As soon as Judas took the bread, Sáifèr entered him. Yesu told him, "What you begin to do, do it fast." 28 But in the feast no one know why Yesu told it to him. 29 Because Judas hold their money bag, one thought that Yesu might tell him to buy things for the feast, or to give some things to the poor. 30 As soon as Judas received the bread, he went out. And it was night. Yesu told him Fitè's denial

nama: Njamandio fá néngwanoi, Yesu norayai, "Sénonjo árém so tinjongi nderé ndimbal yém Ároene Ambum. Yéné téfnan, fá so wéi tinjongi nderé ndimbal yém Ngánján. 32 Njam Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé yém yáne kénjún, Ngánjánam so ndimbal kwayaghé yaramete Ambumoe yánjo kénjúnyo, a so ndimbal kwayaghé taramangé yá tekofnar.
bt: As soon as he went, Yesu said, "Now people will see how big the Son of Man is. In this reason they will see how big God is. 32 If God is glorifiedIbig light) in him,God will glorify the Son in himself, and will glorify him at once.

nama: Tane ambumtértér, yénd fémafé so yéna yéném tekofnaye. Fémofem so wéronjati, a sénonjo yéndon emndetan fém, némé yéndon tamndetan Ju ár: Ándan yénd wiota, fém kétán yau so eyota.
bt: My children, I will be here with you for a while. You.p will seek me, and I tell you what I told the Ju people: Where I am going, you cannot go there.

nama: Totér nák ewaraman féfe, euwetati ámb ár, ndené fété yéndon euwetamén fém, yénémamén fém náuwetati fémro fémro. 35 Yénayan méinyotio ár mat so kamndangi ndené fém sem tane waitogh ár, fém njam náuwetati fémro fémro.
bt: The new law/command I give you, love other people, just as I love you, therefore you love each other. 35 In this all people will know that you are my followers, if you love each other.

nama: Saimon Fitam yémotai fá, "Yuré, fém ándan niota?" Yesum yawangoi, "Ándan yénd wiote, fémo yau so kwénmaito sénonjo, wénde soramé so néngwaitote."
bt: Saimon Fitè asked him, "Lord, where are you going?" Yesu answered him, "Where I am going, you cannot follow me today, but later you will follow."

nama: Fitam yémotai, "Yuré, némamén yéndon yau so néngmaitotan fém sénonjo? Yénd afrengéghkaf wém feyot kérot."
bt: Fitè asked him, "Lord, why I cannot follow you now? I'm ready to die for you."

nama: Wénde Yesum yawangoi, "Fém so efalo tayot kér ném? Efaloe yéndo némndetan fe, fémon yénd fronde so kwékenang nambinotmé, soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé!"
bt: But Yesu answered him, "You really will die for me? With true I tell you, firstly you will deny me three times, later the chicken will shout!"

nama: Yau táf féfene tikéf néwérsotat. Efalo yiyátotati Ngánján a efalo wiyátotati ndenáyo yénd. 2 Tane Afane méngo siyém tárfár satafé; yau njam efalo témorwén, yénd yau so kafrotawén ndené yénd wéngém kétán ménát sifayé frengéghét féfeyot. 3 Yénd njam wéngém féfene sifayé frengéghét, yénd so nénangotan a tangwasron tafaftio ménát fém so em kété ánde yénd wém. 4 Fém mat em end yéné sifayat ándan yénd wiota." Yesu end yém kétán Afafaf
bt: Don't let your.p heart be trouble. Believe God and also truly approve(believe) me. 2 My Father's house has many rooms; if it was not true, I would not report that I am going there to prepare a place for you.p. 3 If I go to prepare your place, I will come back and take you to myself so that you will be there where I am. 4 You know the way to this place where I am going." Yesu is the way to the Father

nama: Tomasém yémndai fá, "Yuré, yénd mafina yéném ándan fém nuwanote, ndernáye yénd mat so yéném end?"
bt: Thomas said to him, "Lord, we don't know where you are going, how can we know the way?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd wém end a efalo a ghérsé. Yau tayofnaye ámb ár so yéngém Afafaf, mé ta kénjúmaro. 7 Njam fémofem yénd té wayamngoyénd, fémofem ndenéyameyo so tayamngongi tane Afé. Yénamé sénonjo fém mat em fá a té yinjongi."
bt: Yesu answered him, "I am the way and the truth and the life. Without me no one can go to the Father, only through me. 7 If you have known me, you will know in the same way my Father. From now you know him and have seen him."

nama: Filif norayai, "Yuré, téfeyot ténmauyafo Afé a yénd yénanotro ménde yéném."
bt: Filif said, "Lord, show us the Father and only this we want."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fém táf mat ném yénd, Filif, yénd fémafé ténmorwén tekefifi. Árké árom yénd té winjoi yémon té yinjo Afé. Fém némamén noraye, 'Téfe Afé ténmauyafo'? 10 Yau fémon efalo yiyátote nde yénd wém Afane kénjún, a Afé siyém tane kénjún? Si yénd kés norayan féfefaf yau tanjoyo em. Wénde yéné siyém Afé tane kénjún yémor, emo ewafrote yánjo ásáfogh. 11 Yénd efalo wiyátotati njam ndené norayan yénd wém Afane kénjún a Afé siyém tane kénjún. Njam yau, efalo wiyátotati ménamén yéndon tanwafrotan yam. 12 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, árké árom yénd efalo wiyátota so ewafrote yéné yam yéndon némé tanwafrotan. A wafroghyam yémo so ewafrote so engwainde minde ndimbal yam ndené yéndon kés tawafrotan, ménamén yénd nuwanotan Afafaf. 13 A yéndon so ewaufrotan némat fém njam nómnendati tane yétkwénan, ménát Afane ndimbal kwayaghé so nauyafote Ambumoene kénjúmé. 14 Fém so nómnendati tafaf némat téu tane yétkwénan, a yéndon so yafrotan. Unyéghofnar si Ngánján Mbérmbéroenemén
bt: Yesu answered him, "You should know me, Filif, I was with you for a long time. Which man has seen me have seen the Father. Why are you saying, 'Show us the Father'? 10 Don't you truly approve(believe) that I am in the Father, and the Father is in me? The talk I am saying to you.p are not my own. But this is the Father is staying in me, who is doing his work. 11 Believe me when I am saying that I am in the Father and the Father is in me. If not, truly approve(believe) me because of things I have done. 12 I tell you the truth, which man truly approves(believes) in me will do this things what I have done. The action he will do will surpass very big things that I continally do, because I am going to the Father. 13 And I will do whatever you.p ask in my name, so that Father's strong light(big light) will show through the Son. 14 You.p ask to me whatever you may in my name, and I will do it. Talk without lying(promise) about God Spirit

nama: Fémofem njam wuwetati yénd, fém so námyotati tane nákfaf. 16 A yéndon so tamnendangén Afé, a yémon so tawaramangé ámb Wáutárégh ár. Yéné Wáutárégh ár so yémor fémofafé tuot. 17 Fá siyém Efaloene Ngánján Mbérmbér. Mband maratam yau so tumyongé, ménamén yémon yau so yéfande o yau so tayamngongé fá. Wénde fém mat em fá ménamén fémafé emor a so yém féfene kénjún. 18 Yéndon yau so tauron séfarékw ambumnit, yénd so mé wéném féfefaf. 19 Mé tekofnaye, mband maratam yau so wéfande, wénde fémofem so wéfandati. Ménamén yénd naketan, fém ndenéyameyo so naketati. 20 Yéné efghon fém mat so em ndené yénd wém tane Afane kénjún, a fém em tane kénjún a yénd wém féfene kénjún. 21 Endefaf em tane nák a ewaitotat, fá yéné féyém emofem yénd wuwetat, méinyotio ár emofem yénd wuwetat so wéi euwete tane Afam, a yéndon so euwetan fá a yénd nauyafotan yéfefaf."
bt: If you.p love me, you will obey to my commands. 16 And I will ask the Father, and he will give you another Helper. That Helper will stay with you.p forever. 17 He is theGod Spirit of the truth. The world cannot receive him, because it cannot look at him or cannot know him. But you know him because he stays with you and will be in you.p. 18 I will not leave you like orphan children, I will still come to you.p. 19 In a little while, the world will not see me, but you.p will see me. Because I live, you.p will also live. 20 On that day you.p will know that I am in my Father, and you are in me and I am in you.p. 21 Those who have my laws and follow them, they are the one who love me, my Father will love every people who love me, and I will love them and show myself to them."

nama: Judas (yau Judas Iskariot) norayai, "Yuré, fém fémyo némamén so nauyafote téfefafro wénde yau mband maratfaf?"
bt: Judas(not Judas Iskariot) said, "Lord, why will you show yourself only to us but not to the world?"

nama: Yesum yéwawangoi, "Táf emo njam wuweta yénd, yémo so ewaitote tane watamegh. Tane Afam fá so yuwete, a tane Afé a yénd so yénre yáfaf a yénmor yémafé tuot. 24 Fá emo yau njam wuweta yénd yau so ewaitote tane watamegh. Yéné si fémofem kés náyáretati yau em tanjoyo, yáne em Afane emo yénd kwénmáfárete. 25 Yéné yammén yéndon té kénorayan féfefaf njam fémafé mé téném. 26 Wénde Wáutárégh ár, Ngánján Mbérmbér, efe Afam so yénmáfárete tane yétkwénan, so ewatamete méinyotio yaman. Yémon so eutáne fém sái ewafarotati méinyotio yéndon némé kénorayawén féfefaf. 27 Krufrat ghérsé norotan féfefaf; tane krufrát ghérsé yéndon ewarametan féfé yau ndené mband maratam kés ewaramete yéndon ewarametan. Yau eumyotati féfenjo tikéf uwérsoghan a yau férfér em.
bt: Yesu answered him, "If whoever loves me, he will follow my teaching. My Father will love him, and we will come to him and stay with him forever. 24 He who does not love me will not follow my teachings. These talk you.p hear are not my own, they are his my Father's who sent me. 25 I have spoken these things to you while I am still with you. 26 But Helper, The Spirit of God(God Spirit), whom the Father will send in my name, will teach all things. He will help you.p to remember all what I have said to you. 27 Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you; not as the world gives do I give to you. Do not allow your.p own hearts trouble and don't be afraid.

nama: Fémofem té kwiyáretati yénd korayan, yénd so kuwanon a so nénangotan féfefaf wéikor. Fémofem njam yénd wuwetati, fém so áuwéghan em tane álighmén kétán Afafaf; ménamén Afam wainde yénd. 29 Yéndon té tawaufrotan soramé so nufrote, ménát njam nufrota fémofem so efalo tiyátongi. 30 Yénd yau so norayan ndenayu, ménamén yéné mband maratoene limánégh ár yéném. Wénde fá siyém waftafnar yém tafaf, 31 wénde mband marat mat so yém ndené yéndon yuwetan tane Afé a ewaufrotan ndenéfifi ndernáye tane Afam wénémndetam yénd. "Kénaflangi, téfrangongém yéné sifayé.
bt: You.p have heard I said, I will go and will come back to you again. If you.p love me, you will be happy in my going to the Father; because the Father surpasses me. 29 I have told you later it will happen, in order that when it happens you.p may truly approve(believe). 30 I will not speak that long, because this world's head man is coming. But he is without power over me, 31 but the world must know that I love my Father and I do exactly how my Father told me. "Come, let us leave this place.

nama: Yénd wém efalo wénménj, a tane Afé siyém ndau téfnár. 2 Yémo enfete méinyotio kafekafe tane kénjún árkéménayam yau efunat mbwe, a yémon méinyotio kafe ewaine árkéménayam efunat mbwe, ménát so minde mbweyafé em. 3 Fém em wafroghkaf ménamén simén yéndon árké tanémndetawén fém. 4 Mia em tane kénjún, a yénd wéi mé so wém féfene kénjún. Yau ámb kafeyam mé so yéfune mbwe yémonyo táfandro wénménjan njam yurau. Ndenéyameyo fémofemyo yau so yéfunati mbwe táfandro ta kénjún njam mé em.
bt: I am the true vine, and my Father is a farmer. 2 He cuts every branches in me which does not produce fruit, and he prunes which one produce fruit, so that they will be very fruitful. 3 You are pruned because of the talk which I have spoken to you. 4 Remain in me, and I will still be in you.p. No other brance will just produce fruit by itself unless it joins to the vine. In the same way you.p yourselves cannot produce fruit unless you.p are still in me.

nama: Yénd wém wénménj, a fém em kafekafe. Ár njam mé yém ta kénjún a yénd wém yá kénjún, yémon so yéfune tárfár mbwe tayofnaye fémon yau némé so yafrote. 6 Fém yau njam mé ném ta kénjún, fém ndenanit ném kafekafe yénau engtarnat a sérét nufrotat. Árém ekafetat, ewitat kétán fését a nakernat. 7 Fém njam mé em ta kénjún, a tane si mé em féfe kénjún, namotati némat fém ménde em, a so yafrote féfe. 8 Yéné siyém tane Afane ndimbal kwayaghé ménaye fémofem efunati tárfár mbwe, a nauyafotati fémyo em tane waitogh ár.
bt: I am the vine, and you are branches. If a man still is in me and I am in him, he will produce many fruits; without me you cannot do anything. 6 If you still are not in me, you are like branches that they throw them away and it becomes dry. People pick them up, throw them to the fire and burn. 7 If you are still in me, and my talk still in you, ask whatever you.p want, and [God] will do it to you.p. 8 This is my Father's big light(glory) by that you produce many fruits, and you show yourselves are my followers.

nama: Ndené fété Afam yénd uwetam, a yéndon euwetamén fém, sénonjo mé aem tane uwéghan. 10 Njam fém námyotati tane sifaf, fém mé so em tane uwéghan, ndené fété yénd té kamyotawén Afane sifaf a mé wéném yáne uwéghan. 11 Yéndon té ewaufron yéné ménát tane áuwégh so yém féfefaf a ménát féfene áuwégh so wéi yém afoghare.
bt: Just like Father loved me, and I loved you.p, you must continually stay in my love. 10 If you obey my talk, you will still be in my love, just like I had obeyed Father's talk and I am still in his love. 11 I have told you this in order that my joy will be with you.p and in order that your.p joy may be full.

nama: Yéné siyém tane nák: Nauwetati fémro fémro ndené fété yéndon kés euwetamén fém. 13 Minde tukén uwégh fene fútarét siyém sái téram fenjo ghérsé yéfeyot. 14 Fém em tane fútaréf njam fémofem ewafrotati némat yéndon emndetan. 15 Yéndon yau ndené emndetan faiofnar ásáfogh ár, ménamén faiofnar ásáfogh ár yau so mat yém yáne yurane ásáfoghmén, wénde yéndo emndayén fútaréf, ménamén méinyotio némé mat nénáyátoyén Afata yéndon mat té tanyátotan fém. 16 Fémofem yau yénd wékafayénd, wénde yéndon ekafayén fém a ewaferyén ménát fém so engém mbwe funaghét, mbwe árkéméné so naketat. A némat fém njam nómnendati tane yétkwénan, Afam so tawaramangé féfe. 17 Yéné siyém tane nák: Nauwetati fémro fémro. Mbandam tékrát efande Yesuene waitogh ár
bt: This is my commandment; love each other just like I have loved you.p. 13 Very high love to your friends is to give your life for them. 14 You.p are my friends if you.p do what I said. 15 I do not call you without.payment working men(servants) without pay, because the without.payment working men(servants) will not know about his owner's work, but I call you friends, because everything what I have known from the Father I have made you.p known. 16 You.p did not choose me, but I chose you and appointed you in order that you will go to produce fruit, fruit which will exist. And for what you.p may ask in my name, the Father will give it to you.p. 17 This is my commandment: love one another. The world hates Yesu's followers

nama: Njam mband maratam méndméndat efanda, táf nawafarotati ndené yénd té méndméndat kwéfandau fronde. 19 Njam fém mband maratoene ném, so némuete ménamén fém yáne ném. Wénde fém yau mband maratoene em, a yéndon té ewaferyén kétamé mband maratta. Yéné téfnan mband maratam méndméndat efande fém. 20 Nawafarotati si yéndon kés tamndetawén fém: 'Faiofnar ásáfogh ár yáinde yánjo yuram.' Njam yémofem wasérmbotat yénd, wéi so ewasérmbotat fém ndenéyameyo. Njam tane watameghfaf náyáretat fá, wéi so náyáretat féfene watameghfaf. 21 Yémofem so ewasérmbotat ndenáye tane yétkwén téfnan ménamén fá mafina em emo yénd wénmáfáretam. 22 Yénd yau njam kwénmorwén a korayawén yéfefaf, fá yau so yaufiyam kértafé tamorwén; wénde sénonjo fá yau so norayat ndené yéndfem yau tawafrotam yaufi. 23 Emo yénd méndméndat wéfande wéi méndméndat yéfande tane Afé ndenéyameyo. 24 Yéndon yau njam tawafrotan ufarogh yam yéfefaf árké ámb árom yau ewafrotam, fá yau so tamorwén yaufiyam kértafé. Wénde ndenáye yém yémofem té yinjoyénd a yémafem mé méndméndat ténfandat yénd a tane Afé. 25 Wénde yéné siyém sái efalo tiyátongi némé yéfarotaménd yéfene nákan, "Yémofem méndméndat wéfandat mé fifiofnar."
bt: If the world hates you.p, you.p must remember that They had hated me first. 19 If you were of the world, it will love you because you are its own. But you are not of the world, and I have chosen you from the world. In this reason world hates you. 20 Remember the talk I had told you: 'The without.payment working man(servant) does not surpass his master. If they persecuted me, they will also persecute you in the same way. If they hear to my teaching, they will also hear to your teaching. 21 They will persecute you in what way because of my name because they do not know who sent me. 22 If I would not come and talk to them, they would not have been guilty of sin; But now they cannot say, we did not do wrong. 23 Who hates me also hates my Father in the same way. 24 If I had not done special workings(miracles) to them which no one did, they would not been guilty of sin. But in what way they have seen and they still hated me and my Father. 25 But this is to fulfill what they wrote in their law, 'They hated me without reason.'

nama: Njam Wáutárégh ár yéném, efe yéndon so yénmáfáretan kétamé Afata, Efaloene Njánján Mbérmbér efe so yéném Afata, fá so néngafrote tanemén. 27 Fém wéi ndenéyameyo so néngafrotati tanemén, ménamén yéndfé fém té téném rényéghta.
bt: When the Helper comes, whom I will send to you.p from the Father, God Spirit of truth who will come form the Father, he will report(testify) about me. 27 You.p also in the same way must report about me, because you.p have been with me from the beginning.

nama: Méinyotio yéné yéndon té tawaufrotan féfe ménát fém yau so kékmbongi ndimbal mwighata. 2 Yémofem so eutonat áumengégh méngota, efogh yéna yéném njam fá emo esmetat krot fém so nemne kar yéné yame ásáfogh yafrote Ngánjáneyot. 3 Yémofem so ewafrotat yéné yam ménamén fá mafina em Afé o yénd. 4 Yéndon té tawaufrotawén yéné, ménát njam yéné efogh kufarngé yéfeyot yéné yam wafroghét, fém so kawafarotangi némé yéndon tanémndetan. Ásáfogh Ngánján Mbérmbéroene
bt: I have told all this you in order that you.p will not stop from the big mind(faith). 2 They will take you.p out of the gathering house(meeting houses), the day is coming here when those who beat you.p to death will think by this way he is doing the work for God. 3 They will do these things because they do not know the Father or me. 4 I have told you this, in order that when this day arrives to them to do this things, you.p should remember what I told you. The work of the God Spirit

nama: Wénde sénonjo yénd nuwanotan yáfaf emo wénmáfáretam yénd, wénde ámb árom yau wémota, 'Ándan fém niota?' 6 A sénonjo yéndon té ewaufron yénémamén, féfene tikéf té ewafo ndimbal ghérghérsisam. 7 Wénde yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, yéné siyém féfene merot yénd kés nuwanotan. Ménamén yénd njam yau kuwanon, Wáutárégh ár mé yau so yéném féfefaf, wénde yénd njam kuwanon, yéndon so yénmáfáretan fá féfefaf. 8 A fá njam yéném, yémon so tawauyafongé yéné mband marat árét ndené fá ndernáye em. Yémon tawauyafongé ndené fá mámáfi em. Fá yau mat em némé yaufi yém, fá yau mat em efe mbarkánd em Ngánjánefaf, a fá yau mat em Ngánjánene moghmén. 9 Fá yau mat em mbarkánde némé yaufiyam yém, ménamén yémofem yau efalo wiyátotat yénd; 10 fá yau mat em mbarkándmén Ngánjánefaf, ménamén yénd nuwanotan Afafaf. A fémofem yau kor so wéfandati wéi. 11 A fá yau mat em moghmén, ménamén sénonjo yéné mbandmén limánégh ár té moghan yém.
bt: But now I am going to him who sent me, but no one asked me, 'Where are you going?' 6 And now I have told you.p about this, big sadness has filled your.p hearts. 7 But I tell you the truth, this is for your good that I am going. Because if I do not go, the Helper still will not come to you.p, but if I go, I will send him to you.p. 8 When he comes, he will show the people of this world what they are like. He will show that they are wrong. They do not know what sin really is, they do not know about who is straight with God and they do not know God's judgement. 9 They do not know correctly what sin is, because they do not truly approve(believe) me; 10 They don't know about straightness, because I am going to the Father and you.p will not see me again. 11 And they do not know about judgement, because now head man of this world is standing in judgement.

nama: Tafaf tárfár yamafé em sái norayan féfefaf, wénde sénonjo so em tárfárfifi féfeyot yátoghét. 13 Wénde njam fá, efaloene Ngánján Mbérmbér yéném, yémon so ewatamete méinyotio efalo fifiyamé. Fá yau so noraye yánjomén. Fá so yénaro noraye némé fá nénáyárete, a yémon so ewaufrote némé so néngufrotat soramé. 14 Yémon so yénérse ndimbal kwayaghé tafaf, ménamén yémon so engérse némé yéndon norayan a so ewaufrote féfe. 15 Méinyotio némé em Afane sem tane em. Yéné téfnan yénd norayan ndené Ngánján Mbérmbéram so engérse némé em tane a engwaufrota féfeyot. Ghérghérsisé so kawengongé áuwéghét
bt: I have many things to say to you.p, but now there are too much for you to truly approve(believe). 13 But when he, the God Spirit of truth comes, he will teach you in all the truth. He will not talk on his own. He will only say what he hears, and he will tell you what will happen later. 14 He will bring strong light(big light) to me, because he will take what I am saying and will tell it to you.p. 15 All what is of the Father are mine. That is why I say that God Spirit will take what is mine and tell it to you.p. Sadness will turn to joy

nama: Tekofnaye yénd yau so wéfandati, wéikor tekofnaye, a fémofem wéi so wéfandati. 17 Ámb yáne waitogh ár norayayénd fáro, "Némé yémon yésérmbne ndenáye kés noraye ndené, 'mé tekofnaye, fémofem yau so wéfandati wéikor a tekofnaye soramé so kwinjongi,' a 'ménamén yénd wiota Afafaf'?" 18 Fá mé kamotawét, "Némé yémon yésérmbne ndené mé tekofnaye? Yéndfem kor yau yérsam némé fá noraye!"
bt: In a little while you will not see me; again a little while, and you will see me again. 17 Some of his following men said themselves, "What does he mean by saying that, 'just for a little while you.p won't see me again and not long(a little while) after you.p will see me again,' and 'because I go to the Father'? 18 They were still asking, "What does he mean that just for a while? We can't carry what he is saying!"

nama: Yesu mat témorwén némamén fá ménde témorwén moghét térametawét fá, yénémamén fá norayai yéfefaf, "Némamén fém namotati fémro yéndon némé yésérmbnan táf yénd njam norayangén ndené, 'mé tekofnaye, fémofem yau so wéfandati wéikor a tekofnaye soramé so kwinjongi wéikor'? 20 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, fém so nendati a ghérghérsisé em wénde mband marat fá mé yém áuwéghan. Fém so ghérghérsisé em wénde soramé féfene ghérghérsisé so kawengongé áuwéghét. 21 Amaf njam náráfte ambum kété yém tékrát ménamén yáne efogh té nawer; wénde táf amafom njam ambum téráftangé, fá tawalindangé ndémke yáne áuwégh téfnan ménamén ambum té nufar yéné mband maratot. 22 Féyo féfefaf: Sénonjo siyém féfene ghérghérsisé efogh, wénde yéndon so tawinjon fém wéikor a fém so náuwétati, a árké árom yau tangwanangé féfene uwégh. 23 Yéné efghon fémofem yau so wémotati némé rokarot. Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo: tane Afam so ewaramete némat njam namotati tane yétkwénan. 24 Kétamayo sénonjo fém ámb yau kamotati tane yétkwénan; kamotangi a fémofem so tanangi a féfene áuwégh so afoghkaf yém.
bt: Yesu already knew that they wanted to ask him about it, because of this he said to them, "Why are you asking among yourselves what I mean when I said that, 'just for a little while, you will not see me and for a liitle while later you will see me again'? 20 I tell you.p the truth, you.p will cry and be sad but the world he is still be joy. You.p will be sad but later your.p sadness will turn to joy. 21 When woman is giving birth there is pain because her day has come, but when a woman gives birth a child, she forgets the pain because of her joy that the child has arrived to this world. 22 So with you: Now is your sad day, but I will see you.p again and you.p will rejoice, and no one takes your joy. 23 On that day you.p will not ask me for anything. I tell you the truth: my Father will give you.p whatever you.p ask in my name. 24 Until now you.p have not asked for anything in my name; ask and you.p will take and your joy will be full.

nama: Yéndon té korayan waufarogh si, ménát waferghét féfefaf yénd némamén té korayawén, efogh yéna yéném ánde yéndon yau so néngorayan yéné waufarogh si, wénde so ewaufrotan mé safénro tane Afanemén. 26 Yéné efghon fém so namotati tane yétkwénan, yénd yau ndené norayan yéndo sái yémotan Afé féfenemén. 27 Yau, Afam yémonyo euwete fém ménamén fémofem yénd té wuwetaménd a té efalo wiyátoyénd ndené yénd wénmormén Ngájáneta. 28 Yénd wénmormén Afata a nufaryén mband maratot, sénonjo yéndon yéfrangotan mband marat a nangotan kétán Afafaf."
bt: I have spoken eampletalk, in order to explain to you.p what I had spoken, the day is coming here where I will not speak this example talk but I tell you clearly about my Father. 26 On that day you will ask in my name, I did not say that I will ask the Father for you.p. 27 No, the father himself loves you because you.p have loved me and had truly approved(believed) me that I came from God. 28 I came from the Father and arrived to the world, now I am leaving the world and going back to the Father."

nama: Féyo Yesuene waitogh ár norayayénd, "Sénonjo fém noraye mé sáfanro téfefaf a yau waufarogh si noraye ánde yau kor kénérsawém. 30 Sénonjo yéndfem té yinjongém ndené fém mat ném méinyotio rokar, fém yau ménde ném efe yéramai amogh si fefaf. Yéné téfnan, yéndfem efalo niyátotam fém efaloe té nénmormén Ngánjáneta."
bt: Then Yesu's followers said, "Now you.s are speaking clearly to us and are not speaking example talk we did not understand it. 30 Now we have seen that you.s know everything, and you.s don't need anyone who give you.s asking talk. Because of this, we truly approve(believe) you truly have come from God.”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem té efalo wiyátongi sénonjo? 32 Wénde efogh yéna yéném, a yéna yém, ánde so fém nofarnati féfenjo méngotuot fémofem so kwéfrangongi tambia, wénde yénd yau tambia wém, tane Afafé yénd yénre. 33 Yéndon té tawaufrotan yénémamén ménát tane kénjún féfefaf so yém krufrát yam. Yéné mband maratan féfefaf so em kérté yam, wénde mwighé táikér aem! Yéndon té yáindayén mband marat.
bt: Yesu answered them, "Do you.p truly approve(believe) me now? 32 But the day is coming here, and it is here, where you.p will scatter to your own home, you will leave me alone, but I am not alone, I am with my Father. 33 I have told you.p about this in order that in me to you will be peaceful way. In this world to you will be heavy/hard thing, but be courageous! I have overcome the world.

nama: Soramé Yesu norayai yéné, fá néretai njafarot a norayai:
bt: After Yesu said this, he looked up to the sky/heaven and said:

nama: Fémon wafté yaramai yá méinyotio árét, ménát yémon so tawaramangé tuot ghérsé méinyotio yéfe fémon efe yaramai yáyot. 3 Tuot ghérsane fifi siyém fém mat sái kényátongi, mé efalo Ngánján, a mat sái káyátongi Yesu Keriso, efe fémon yénmáfáretam. 4 Yéndon té yénérsamén feyot ndimbal kwayaghé mband maratot ménáyan kés yifoyén ásáfogh fémon némé té waramai wafroghét. 5 Afé, kwaram ta ndimbal kwayaghé fene sáfrére sénonjo, ndené sáfétio ndimbal kwayaghé kwaram yéndfé kés yénmare fémafé soramé mband marat yafrotam. Yesuf koraiwét Ngánjánefaf yánjo waitogh árfenemén
bt: You gave him power/authority for all people, in order that he will give them eternal life to all those whom you gave him. 3 Eternal life's meaning is that they know you, the only true God, and know Yesu Keris, who you sent. 4 I have brought you big light(glory) to the world by finishing the work what you have given me to do. 5 Father, give me the big light(glory) in your present now, give me the same shape big light(glory) [that] you gave me [and] I had with you before the world was made. Yesu talked to God(talked with God) about the followers

nama: "Yéndon té kémuyafotan fém yéfefaf fémon efe té waramai yéné mband maratan. Fá tamorwén fené fémon eramai fá tafaf. Yémofem té tarawenat fene si. 7 Sénonjo fá mat em ndené méinyotio fémon kwaramete eném fe tambén. 8 Yéndon ewaramayén yéné si fémon waramai, a yémofem umyoyénd. Fá mat náyátoyénd ndené yéné siyém efalo yénd wénmormén fe tambén, a yémofem efalo wiyátoyénd ndené fémon yénd kwénmáfárete. 9 Yénd norayan Fefaf Ngánján yéfenemén. Yénd norayan Fefaf yau yéné mband maratmén, wénde yéfenemén fémon efe té waramai, ménamén fá sem fene. 10 Méinyotio tane némé em fene em, a fene méinyotio némé em tane em; a tane ndimbal kwayaghé nálále yéfe kénjúmé. 11 Yénd yau so yéné mband maratan ndenayu wémor, wénde fá mé so emor yéné mband maratan, a yénd angoghét nénufngon fefaf. Njúnnjúnofnar Afé, ewarawena fá fene waftafé yétkwéne, árké yétkwén ta waramai, ménát fá so em ámbiro ndené fété yénd ámbiro kés yénre. 12 Njam yénd ténmorwén yémafé, yéndon tawarawenawén fá ménaye fene wafté yétkwéne, fémon árké waramai. Yéndon tawarawenawén a ámb yau nolindai mé ámbiroro wénde efe té yékmayénd, ménát Buk siam sái efalo tiyátongé.
bt: I have shown you.s to those who you.s have given me from this world. They were yours; you.s gave them to me. They have obeyed your.s talk. 7 Now they know that everything you gave me came from you. 8 I gave them this talk you gave me, and they received. They know that this is true I came from you, and they truly approved(believed) me that you sent me. 9 I talk with God to You God for them. I am talking with God to You not for this world, but for those whom you.s have given me, because they are yours. 10 All what is mine are yours, and all what is yours are mine; and my big light(glory) shines through them. 11 I will not stay in this world that long, but they will still stay in this world, and I am about to go back to you. Without.dust Father, talk care of them with your power name, which name you gave me, in order that they will be one just as we are one. 12 When I was with them, I took care of them with your power name, which you gave me. I took care of them and none was lost only one but who was marked, in order that Buk(scripture) might become true.

nama: "Yénd angogh nénufngon fefaf sénonjo, wénde yéndon néngorayan yéné yammén njamandio mé wém yéné mband maratan ménát méinyotio tane áuwégh so yém yéfefaf. 14 Yéndon ewaramayén fene si, wénde mband maratam méndméndat tafandawéng fá, ménamén fá yau yéné mband maratmén em ndené fété yénd yau wém yéné mband maratmén. 15 Tane orayégh yau yém ménát fémon sái tawitrémb yéné mband maratta, wénde ménát so ewarawene yaufi ároe tambén. 16 Fá yau em yéné mbandmén, yénd wéi ndenáyo yau wém yéné mband maratmén. 17 Njúnnjúnofnar fá táyáto ménaye fene efalo sié fene si siyém efalo. 18 Fémon kés kwénmáfárete yénd yéné mband maratot, yéndon wéi engwáfáretan yéné mband maratot. 19 Yéfeyot yénd narametan yéndio fefaf, ménát fá wéi so efaloe taramangé fefaf. Yesu Ngánjánafé koraiwét méinyotio efalo yátogh árfenemén
bt: I am about to go back to you.s now, but I am saying about this things while I am still here in this world in order that all my joy will be with them. 14 I gave them your talk, but the world saw them with hate(hated them), because they are not of this world just as I am not of this world. 15 My talking with God is not in order that you take them out of this world, but in order that you will take care of them from the evil man. 16 They are not of this world, I am same not of this world. 17 Make them clean with your true talk; your talk is true. 18 As you have sent me to this world, I am also sending them to this world. 19 For them I give myself to you, so that they will also be truly given to you. Yeu talked to God(talked with God) about all truly approves(believes)

nama: "Tane orayégh yau yéfeyotro yém. Yénd wéi norayan yéfeyot emofem so efalo wiyátotat yéfene si waitogh kénjúmé, 21 ménát fá méinyotio so em ámbiro, Afé, ndené fété fém ném tane kénjún a yénd wém fene kénjún. Fá wéi so em téfene kénjún ménát mband maratam so efalo yiyátote ndené fémon té wénmáfáretam yénd. 22 Yéndon ewaramayén yéné ndimbal kwayaghayo árké fémo waramai, ménát fá so em ámbiro, ndené yénd ámbiro kés yénre. 23 Yénd yéfene kénjún a fém tane kénjún, ménát fá so kamndangi mé ámbirofifi, ménát mband marat sái mat yiyátotat ndené fémon yénd kwénmáfárete a euwetam fá ndenéyameyo yénd kés uwetam.
bt: My talking with God is not only for them. I also talk with God for those who will truly approve(believe) me through their preaching talk, 21 in order that they all will be one, Father, just as you are in me and I am in you. They may also be in us in order that the world will truly approve(believe) that you have sent me. 22 I gave them this big light(glory) which you gave me, in order that they will be one, just as we are one. 23 I in them and you in me, in order that they will really become one, in order that will let the world know that you sent me and loved them in the same way as you loved me.

nama: "Afé! Yénd ménde wém fá efe waramai ta so em yéndfé kété yénd ánde wém, a so yéfandat tane ndimbal kwayaghé, yéné ndimbal kwayaghé fémon árké té waramai ménamén fémon yénd uwetam, soramé yu yafrotam.
bt: Father! I want those whom you gave me will be with me there where I am, and they will see my big light(glory), this big light(glory) which you have given me because you loved me, before the world was made.

nama: "Mbarkánd Afé! Mband maratam yau némé yamngo, wénde yénd mat wém fém, a efalo yátogh ár mat em ndené yénd fémon kwénmáfárete. 26 Yéndon fém mat niyátoyén fene yétkwén yéfefaf, a mé so yéngwasamngotan mat sái néngayátotan ménát fene uwégh kés yém tayot so yém yéfene kénjún, a yénd yéndio wéi so wém yéfene kénjún."
bt: Righteous Father! The world do not know you, only I know you, and the approving truth people know that you sent me. 26 I made your name know to them, and I will still contine to make it known, in order that your love for me will be in them, and I myself will be also in them."

nama: Njam yémon yifoi Ngánjánafé orayégh, Yesuf nuwanoyénd yánjo waitogh árfé kéférmetawét Kidron tétkafe. Kétamé karfan témorwén olif wén ndaufaf, fá a yánjo waitogh ár engmormén kétán.
bt: When he finished talking with God, Yesu went with his followers going across Kidron creek. In the other side was a olif treegarden, he and his followers went there.

nama: Judas, emo sén yérametam, mat náyátoi yéné sifayé ménamén Yesuf yánjo waitogh árfé táf túmén kafángotawét yéné sifayan. 3 Féyo Judas yénmormén kétán olif wén ndaufaf tanlimndau fiyaré mérén a wáwefnogh méngo wambégh ár kétamé sénko ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árta. Yémofem tanérsawét lambefé, ghi a mék rokar.
bt: Judas, who gave teeth(betrayed) him, knew this place because Yesu used to meet in this place with his followers. 3 Then Judas came to the garden with soldiers and some worshipping house guards [who] chief burning sacrifice men and Farasi men sent. They were carrying lamps, bark torches and weapons.

nama: Yesu, mat témorwén méinyotio némé so kufrotau yáfaf, néngaflai a emotai fá, "Efe fémofem yénronjati?"
bt: Yesu, knowing all what was going to happen to him, went up and asked them, "Who are you.p looking for?"

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yesu Najaretmén." Yesu norayai, "Yénd féu Wém."
bt: They answered him, "Yesu of Najaret." Yesu said, "I Am."

nama: Táf njam Yesu norayai, "Ndené Yénd fété Wém," fá táf kwémbkwémbe nangoyénd a nuyáyénd mbandot.
bt: When Yesu said, "(That) I Am," they moved back and fell down to the ground.

nama: Wéikor Yesum emotai, "Efe fémofem yénronjati?
bt: Again Yesu asked them, "Who are you looking for?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon té ewaufron ndené yénd fété wém. Fémofem njam wéronjati yénd, tangéumyongi tane waitogh ár nguwanongi." 9 Yesu norayai yéné ménamén frondeyo té korayau yénémamén, "Yéndo yau ámb tétarnam yéné ár fémo efe ta kwaramai." Yénayam yafrote némé fá té korayau frondeyo yéné fété kufrotau.
bt: Yesu answered them, "I have told you that I am he. If you are looking for me, let my followers go." 9 Yesu said this because earlier he had said about this, "I have lost none of those people that you gave to me." This made what he had spoken earlier really happen.

nama: Féyo Saimon Fité témorwén witmafé sénté náifé. Yémo yérai a yéngwanetai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yémo yénfai tambén téngan yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ároene. Yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ároene yétkwén témorwén Malkus. 11 Wénde Yesum yémndai Fité, "Tango fenjo witmafé sénté náifé yánjo njénfaf. Yéndon téu yénetan yéné ndémkemén kafusita Afam árké té waramai." Yesu yéngwasroyénd Anasefaf
bt: Saimon Fitè had a sword. He took hold of it and he attacked the without.payment working man(servant) of the leading burning sacrifice man. He cut off the without.payment working man(servant)'s right ear. This without.payment working man(servant)'s name was Malkus. 11 Yesu told Fitè, "Put back your sword to it's sheath. I should drink this cup of pain which the Father has given me." They took Yesu to Anas

nama: Féyo fiyaré a yéfene sénko ár a wawefogh méngo wanjengégh ár yémofem yerayénd Yesu. Yémofem yumbetaménd. 13 A yénémnjoyénd fronde Anasefaf. Kayafasém endene mérés nawerai, Kayafas témorwén tuk wárogh ár yéné yunjéf. 14 Kayafas fá yéné témorwén emo tamndetau Ju ár ndené mer so yém njam ámbiro ár kér yém méinyotio árét. Fitane fronde kenagh
bt: Then the soldiers and their head man and worshipping house guards they caught Yesu. They bound him. 13 And they brought him first to Anas. Kayafas was married to daughter of Anas. Kayafas was leading burning sacrifice men that year. 14 Kayafas was the one who told Ju people that it will be good if one man dies for all people. Fitè first denial

nama: Saimon Fité a ámb yánjo waitogh ár yéngwaiteyayénd Yesu. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mat témorwén yéné Yesuene waitogh ároenemén, féyo fá engérmén Yesufé kénjút kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene méngo sifayat, 16 wénde Fité mé takayongérwén téndon sésafnefaf, wénde ámb Yesuene waitogh ár efe limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mat témorwén, fá nénangoi, témndangé mérés efe témorwén sésafne wanjengégh ár, a yényawai Fité kénjút.
bt: Saimon Fitè and another follower followed.dual Yesu. This leading burning sacrifice men knew this Yesu's following man, so he went with Yesu into leading burning sacrifice men's house yard, 16 but Fitè still waited outside at the door, but the other Yesu's following man who the leading burning sacrifice man knew, he came back, told the girl who was the door keeper, and brought Fitè in.

nama: Mérés efe témorwén sésafnefaf yémon yémotai Fité, "Fém ámb yéné ném yáne waitogh ár, efalo fété ném?" Wénde Fitam yawangoi, "Yénd yau."
bt: The girl who was at the door she asked Fitè, "You are one of his following men, true you are?" But Fitè answered him, "I am not."

nama: Krufér témorwén, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár nokayoyénd fés téndomé árké yétayaménd afaloghét. Fité fá takayogérwén kafalau fés árenjén. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom témotau Yesu
bt: It was cold, workers and the worshipping house guards stood on the side of the fire which they tried to keep warm. Fitè himself stood warming by the charcoal fire. The leading burning sacrifice men asked Yesu

nama: Yénamayo, limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai Yesu yánjo waitogh ármén a yánjo watameghmén.
bt: Next, the leading burning sacrifice man asked Yesu about his following men and about his teaching.

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd té korayan marataye yéné mband maratot, yéndon túmén tawatametan áumengégh méngomé a wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, ánde méinyotio Ju ár kénáumendawét ámbiro sifayat, yénd ámb yau korayan kwankwane. 21 Némamén wémote yénd? Emotati fá emofem kwiyáretawét yénd, fá mat em némé yénd korayawén."
bt: Yesu answered him, "I have spoken openly this world, I always taught in the gathering houses(meeting houses) and in the worshipping house area, where all the Ju people gathered one place, I did not speak anything secretly. 21 Why do you ask me? Ask those heard me, they know what I said."

nama: Njam norayai yéné, ámb wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár efe takayongérwén yá kaka ngángaye yésmai sáfan a norayai, "Fém yau táf noraya limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároe yéné ende."
bt: When he said this, one of the worshipping house guard who stood close to him hit him on the face and said, "You should not speak to the leading burning sacrifice man in that way."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd njam té norayayén mámáfie, mé koraya ánde yém mámáfi. Wénde táf yénd njam té norayayén efaloe, némamén fémon wesem yénd?"
bt: Yesu answered him, "If I have said wrongly, just say where is the wrong. But if I have said truly, why did you hit me?"

nama: Féyo Anasém yéngwafnamoi Yesu umbéghkaf Kayafasefaf limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároefaf. Fitam yékenai Yesu wéikor
bt: Then Anas sent Yesu bound to Kayafas the leading burning sacrifice man. Fitè's denied again

nama: Njamandio Saimon Fité takayongérwén fésén kafalau, fá yémotayénd, "Fém mété ném ámb yáne waitogh ár." Fá nawanyotai a norayai, "Yénd yau."
bt: While Saimon Fitè was standing warming by the fire, they asked him, "You must also be one of his follower." He denied and said, "I am not."

nama: Ámb ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, yá mérén endene téngan Fitam yanfai, yémon yémotai fá, "Némé yéndon yau fém ewinjeyayén yémafé kété ndawan?" 27 Wéikor Fité nawanyotayéng, yéné efoghféneféneyan ghakér kowi táf nutnayéng. Yesu Failete sáfrére
bt: One of leading burning sacrifice men's without.payment working men(servants), the family of whose ear Fitè cut off, he asked him, "What I did not see.dual you with him there in the garden?" 27 Again Fitè denied, at these time the rooster cried out. Yesu before Failet

nama: Féyo Ju árém yélimayénd Kayafasene méngota Rom gafanane méngofaf. Táf témorwén tándái akw, wénde fá mé yau nényawayénd méngo kénjút, ménamén fá táf so káyátongayénd mámáfi, yau táf so taumyongayénd Waingégh téménd njamke nénet. 29 Féyo Failet néntoryéng yéfefaf a namotai, "Némé mámáfi si fém noraye yéné árom tafrote?"
bt: So Ju people led him from the house of Kayafas to a Rom governor's house. It was early in the morning, but they still did not go into the house, because they would become unclean, they would not allow them for passover meal to eat. 29 Then Failet came out to them and asked, "What wrong thing do you say that this man has done?"

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fá yau njam témorwén yaufiyam wafrogh ár, yéndfem yau táf so téramangayém féfefaf."
bt: They answered him, "If he was not a wrong doer, we would not hand him over to you."

nama: Failet korayangé, "Téngwasrongi fémofemyo a yémotati féfenjo náke."
bt: Failet said, "Take him yourselves and ask him by your law. "

nama: Yéné kufrotau ménamén Yesu némé si korayau ndernáye kér so témorwén.
bt: This fulfilled what Yesu spoke how he will die.

nama: Failet táf néngangoi méngo kénjút, yanmoi yáfafétio Yesu a témotangé, "Némé fém warsagh ár ném Ju árfene?"
bt: Failet went back into the house, called Yesu to himself and asked him, "Are you the ruling man(king) of the Ju people?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némé yéné ámogh si fe tambén yéném, o té ámb árém kafrotat tanemén?"
bt: Yesu asked him, "What this asking talk came from you, or did other people report about me?"

nama: Failetém yawangoi, "Yénd yau wém Jumén. Fene áryo a yéfene limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yémofem nénramangi tafaf. Némé fémon tafrote?"
bt: Failet answered him, "I am not a Ju man. Your own people and your chief burning sacrifice men they handed you to me. What did you do?"

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane limángégh sifayé siyém yéné mband maratmén yau yém. Njam témorwén, tane faiofnar ásáfogh árém so kásmetawét a kwambetawét yénd kétamé Ju árfene weréghta. Wénde sénonjo tane limánégh sifayé siyém ámb yumén yém."
bt: Yesu said, "My reigning place is not of this world. If it was, my without.payment working men(servants) would fight and prevent me from Ju people arrest. But now my reigning place is of another place."

nama: Failet norayai, "Féyo, fém ném warsagh ár, féyotaro?" Yesum yawangoi, "Fém ném mbarkánd ndené kés noraya yénd fété wém warsagh ár. Mbarkándaye, yéné téfnan yénd náráftamén a wénmormén yéné mband maratot sái kafrotawén efalomén. Méinyotio efaloe tambénta ár efe em náyáretat tafaf."
bt: Failet said, "So, you are the ruling man(king), really?" Yesu answered him, "You are straight as you say that I am the ruling man(king). Rightly, for this reason I was born came to this world to report about the truth. All those are from the truth listen to me."

nama: Failetém yémotai, "Némé yém efalo?"
bt: Failet asked him, "what is truth?"

nama: Wénde yéné siyém féfenjo túmén yam tayot ménát yéndon sái téngutorén féfefaf ámbiro kwéfkwéf méngo ár yéné Ju árfene awafarogh Waingégh efogh. Fém ménde té em yéndon sái tutorén warsagh ár Ju árfene?"
bt: But this is your own custom for me in order that I will take out to you.p one darkness house man(prisoner) this Ju people's Passover day. Do you want I am going to take out the ruling man(king) of the Ju people?

nama: Yémofem keye yawangoyénd, "Yau fá, wénde Barabas!" Barabas témorwén usérmbogh téfnár.
bt: They answered him loudly, "Not him, but Barabas!" Barabas was a thief.

nama: Failetém ewáfáretai fiyaré Yesue fémoghét. 2 Fiyaram engérsaménd ámb tékértékérafé ménj a yémofem yafrotaménd ákiki Yesue. Yémofem yafayoyénd yáne sénkoyan. Féyo yémofem yéngwanayénd ndéndák ngarot sodé a yémofem yéné yéfayoyénd yáfaf. Yémofem yéné méinyotio yafrotaménd ndené fá kar témorwén warsagh ár 3 a tangmorwén, aférghe korayawét, "Ei, warsagh ár Ju árfene!" A yémofem mé yesmayénd sáfan.
bt: Failet sent soliders to whip Yesu. 2 The soldiers took some branches with thorns and they made a crown for Yesu. They put it on his head. Then they took a purple coat and they put that on him. They did all this as if he was the ruling man(king). 3 and came up to him, repeatedly saying, "Ei(making fun of him), the ruling man(king) of the Ju people!" And they continue to hit him on the face.

nama: Ambinomén Failet néntoryéng a korayangé Ju árfefaf, "Kénretangi, yéndon fá wéikor yénémnjan féfefaf ménát fém so mat táyáton ndené yéndon yau yinjon ámb mámáfi árkémamén fai so tanangé yémon." 5 Njam Yesu néntoryéng tafayongérwén wétwétafé ákiki sénkoyan a tawongérwén ndéndák ngarot sáláme, Failetém tamndangé fá, "Siyém yéné ár!"
bt: Once more Failet went out and said to the Ju people, "Look, I am bringing him again to you.p in order to let you know that I did not find anything bad from which he will get a payment/charge." 5 When Yesu came out wearing the crown of thorn on the head and wearing purple cloth, Failet said to them, "Here is the man!"

nama: Njam sénko ghéngén wárogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh árém yinjoyénd Yesu, fá nutnayénd, "Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan! Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!" Wénde Failetém ewawangoi, "Fémofem téngwasrongi a téngwamangi. Ndené tayot, yéndon yau yinjon ámb mámáfi árkémamén fai so tanangé yémon."
bt: When the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the worshipping house guards saw Yesu, they shouted, "Nail on the cross! Nail on the cross!" But Failet answered them, "You take him and hang him. As for me, I didn't find any badness which he should get a payment/charge."

nama: Ju ár yawangoyénd, "Téfefaf yéna nák yém, a yéné nákan fá so kér yém, ménamén fá kawarsau ndené fá kar témorwén Ngánjánene Ambum."
bt: The Ju people replied, "To us here is a law, and in this law he should die, because he claimed that he was God's Son."

nama: Njam Failet náyárai yéné, fá mindefifi férféram yifoi, 9 a fá táf néngnyawai méngot. Yémon yémotai Yesu, "Árkamé fém nénmormén?" Wénde Yesum yau ámb yaramai uwangogh. 10 Failetém yémndai, "Yau ménde ném siot tafaf? Nawafarotati tafaf yém muyé. Yéndon so ngémumyon fém nguwano, o yéndo so taumyon fá kémamangi wawatarégh wénan"
bt: When Failet heard this, he filled afraid very much, 9 and he went back into the house. He asked Yesu, "Where are you from?" But Yesu gave no answer. 10 Failet said to him, "You do not want to talk to me? Remember that I have authority. I can let you go free, or I can let them kill you on a cross.

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fefaf yau so témorwén yéné wafté ta waingéghét ndemamén kémaramangai fe njafarta. Yénémaménnde fá emo yénd wéram fefaf, yáne yaufiyamam yáinde fene yaufiyam."
bt: Yesu answered him, "You would not have this power to overcome me unless he(God) gave them to you.s from heaven. Therefore he who handed me to you, his sin surpasses your sin."

nama: Féyo yénamé Failetém yéta utorghét térametau Yesu, wénde Ju ár ménjtaye mé kutnawét, "Njam fémon téngéumyo yéné ár nguwanongé, fém yau so fútar ném ndimbal warsagh ár Kaisarene. Árké ár efe nawarsat ndené fá sái em warsagh ár yékarotat Kaisar."
bt: Then form there Failet tried to make take Yesu out, but the Ju people still continually shouting, "If you let this man go, you will not be a friend of big the ruling man(king) Kaisar! Which people who claim that they are the ruling man(king) oppose Kaisar!"

nama: Njam Failetém náyárai yéné, yémon yénémnjoi Yesu a námnjoi mogh árfene ámnjogh kitarayan. Yéné ámnjogh kitaré témorwén yéné sifayan yémndetat Marat wém, Ibru sie Gabata. 14 Yéné efogh témorwén afrengégh efogh Waingégh téméndmén; yéné témorwén efoghméfe. Failet korayangé Ju árfefaf, "Féfene warsagh ár siyém!"
bt: When Failet heard this, he brought Yesu and sat down a seat for judging man This seat was a place called the Wide stone, Gabata in Ibru talk." 14 This day was a preparing day for the Passover feast; it was midday. Failet said to the Ju people, "Your.p the ruling man(king) is here!"

nama: Wénde fá nutnayénd, "Tésmetangi! Tésmetangi! Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!" Failetém emotai, "Némé yéndon so yénamndan féfene warsagh ár wafatarégh wénan? Sénko ghéngén wárogh árém yawangoyénd, "Téfene ámb yau yém warsagh ár wénde Kaisarro!"
bt: But they shouted, "Kill him! Kill him! Nail him on the cross!" Failet asked them, "What I will nail the ruling man(king) on the cross?" The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) answered him, "To us are no other ruling man(king) but only Kaisar!"

nama: Ambinomén Failetém yéngwafamai yéfefaf ménát wafatarégh wénan namghét. Wamégh
bt: Finally Failet handed him over to them in order to be nail on the cross. The nailing

nama: Téngérsau yánjo wafatarégh wén, yéné sifayat yémndetat sénko sot sifayé, yéné Ibru árfene sie árké yémndetat Golgota. 18 Kété yémofem yénamndaménd Yesu wafatarégh wénan. Yémofem ekmeyayénd ámb sómbio ár wafatarégh wénan Yesue kaka. Fá tárwén Yesue téndota a Yesu yéfe néndkéfan.
bt: He was carrying his own cross, to this place called the Skull, (this is Ibru language which is called "Golgota." 18 There they nailed Yesu on the cross. They put two other men on crosses near to Yesu. They were on each side of him and Yesu was between them.

nama: Failetém wéi yéfarotam férén a yékayoyénd wafatarégh wénan. Ndenaye yéfarotam: "Yesu Najaretmén, Ju árfene Warsagh ár." 20 Tárfár Ju árém taftawét yéné férén, ménamén kété yéné sifayan ánde Yesu yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan kétamé nayuofnar témorwén tesenot, yéné férén yéfarotaménd Ibru sie, Latin sie a Grik sie. 21 Ju sénko ghéngén wárogh ár engmormén Failetefaf a korayat, 'Yau efarota ndené, 'Ju árfene warsagh ár.' Wénde, téfarota, 'Yéné ár korayé ndené fá yém warsagh ár Ju árfene.'"
bt: Failet also wrote a letters/notice and put it on the cross. He wrote like this; "Yesu of Najaret, the ruling man(king) of the Ju people." 20 Many Ju people read notice, because there on this place where they nailed Yesu on the cross was not far to the town, this notice was written in Ibru, Latin and Grik. 21 The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) of Ju people went to Failet and said, 'Do not write like, "The ruling man(king) of the Ju people." But, write, "This man said that he is the ruling man(king) of the Ju people."

nama: Failetém ewawangoi, "Némé yéndon téfarotan, yéndon yéné fété téfarotan."
bt: Failet answered him, "What I have written, I must have written."

nama: A njam fiyaram yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan Yesu, yémofem yéfitraryénd sáláme a efaloyénd fo mérne kénjún a ámbiroero nawaftamend fiyaré. Yémofem yéné yafrotaménd a féyo yémofem yanayénd tombé sáláme árkéméné tawongérwén kénjún a yinjoyénd ndené sáláme namofnar témorwén tárfár karfan, wénde yéné yafrotaménd ámbiro karéfta kétamé tuk kétán yu.
bt: And when the soldiers nailed Yesu to the cross, they removed the clothes and divided them into four groups and each soldier got one. They did that and then they got the long cloth worn inside and saw that cloth was not sewn from many pieces, but it was done from one piece from the top to the down.

nama: Fá norayayénd yéfe kénjúnro, "Yau so tétirarngém, yénd so nambnam dais kembne a nafandam emo so tanangé." Yéné nufrotam ménát si so efalo káyátongai árké noraye, "Yémofem kawaftawét tane sáláme yéfenjo kénjúnro a dais kembne kambnawét tane sálámeyot."{x{ ...f* {x{19.24 Sams 22:18 Féyo yéné fété fiyaram tafrotawét.
bt: They said among themselves, "We will not tear it, we will play dice game and see who will get it." This happened in order that it will become true which says, "They divided my garment among themselves and played dais game for my clothing." So like this the soldiers did.

nama: Yesuene wafatarégh wén kaka nokayoyénd yánjo yátmé, amafoene yánngényo, a Meri efe témorwén amaf Klofasene, a Meri Makdalin. 26 Njam Yesum yinjoi yánjo yátmé kété, yánjo waitogh ár efe yémon tuwetau takayongérwén yá kaka, fá norayai yánjo yatmafaf, "Amaf, fene ambum yéné féyém." 27 Féyo fá norayai yéné waitogh ároefaf, "Siyém fene amé." Kétamé yéné efoghta, yéné Yesuene waitogh árom tanjetau Yesue yátmé yánjo méngon. Yesuene Kérmén
bt: Near the cross of Yesu stood his own mother, his mother's younger sister, and Meri who was a wife of Klofas, and Meri Makdalin. 26 When Yesu saw his mother there, his following man whom he loved was standing close to them, he said to his mother, "Woman, this is your son." 27 Then he said to that following man, "Here is your mother." From that time, that following man of Yesu looked after Yesu's mother in his house. The Death of Yesu

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu mat náyátoi ndené yémo té ásáfogh yifo. A ménát sái Buk si efalo káyátongé, fá norayai, "Yénd nuam wéramete." 29 Kété témorwén ghafté wéri nu{y{ ...f* {y{19.29 ghafté wéri nu Mt, Mk, Lk checked it again
bt: After this, Yesu knew that he had finished the work. And in order to make the Scripture become true, Yesu said, "I am thirsty." 29 There laid a jar of sour alcohol; then they made a sponge there they soaked it and with a stick of Isof tree lifted it to Yesu lips. 30 When he drank this alcohol, Yesu said, "It is finished!" With that talk he bowed his head and died.

nama: Yéné témorwén afrengégh efghon, a yénamayomén efogh ténmorwén Safat. Ménamén Ju ár méndefnar tamorwén kérwén sái mé tawamangérwén wafatarégh wénan táf Safatan, yémofem yémotayénd Failet ménát ghambér rafarghét ménát wékeye kérot a fifi wewérghét. 32 Féyo fiyaré engmormén kétán. Yémofem ewarafareyayénd sómbio árfene ghambér efe Yesue téndon tarwén wafatarégh wénan. 33 Wénde njam fá nénaflayénd Yesuefaf a yinjoyénd ndené fá kér té yémormén yémofem yau yáne ghambér yarafaryénd. 34 Wénde ámb fiyaram yékunyai Yesu kwasayan fimbe, táf fété, férék a nu nasureyayénd. 35 Ár emo yinjoi yéné yam yéméindam afroghét, a yáne afrogh si siyém efalofifi. Fá mat yém ndené yémon nafrote efaloe, a fá wéi nafrote ménát fémofem wéi so efalo yiyátotati. 36 Yéné yam nufrotam ménát Buk si so efalo káyátongai: "Yau ámb yáne sot so tarafarngayénd,"{z{ ...f* {z{19.36 Eksodés 12:46; Némbérs 9:12; Sams 34:20
bt: There was on the preparing day, and the next day was Safat. Because the Ju people did not want dead bodies to hang on the cross on the Safat, they asked Failet to break the legs to die quickly and to take down the bodies. 32 The soldiers went there. They broke the legs of the two men who were on the crosses next to Yesu. 33 But when they went to Yesu and found that he had died they did not break his legs. 34 But one of soldiers pierced side of Yesu with a spear, at once, blood and water poured out. 35 The man who saw this thing made to report/testfy, and his report/testimony is true. He knows that he reports the truth, and he reports in order that you will also truly approve(believe). 36 This thing happened in order that the Buk(scripture) would become true: "Not one of his bones shall be broken," 37 and another Buk(scripture) says, "They will look on him whom they pierced with the spear." Making land for Yesu

nama: Soramé, Josef kétamamén Aramatia tesenmén yamnendai Failet Yesuene fifiot. Josef témorwén Yesuene waitogh ár, wénde kwankwane témorwén ménamén férférafé tafandau Ju ár. Failetene umyoghanyo, fá yénmormén a yéngwanai Yesuene fifi. 39 Nikodimas, efe fronde yéngmormén Yesuefaf sémbáran, yémo yénérsam ndené 34 kilogram mer wimafé wékwér miré a aloe wénmén. 40 Yéné sómbio árém téngérséwét a yéfyarménd Yesuene fifi sálámeye ménáyafé mer wimafé wékwérafé, yéné yafrotaménd ndenáye Ju árfene mband raméghan túmén témorwén. 41 Yéné sifayan ánde Yesu wafatarégh wénan yénamndaménd, kété témorwén ndau, yéné ndau kénjún témorwén totér mband raméghmén féne wíman, ánde ámb ároe yau mband yaramayénd. 42 Ménamén Ju árfene afrengégh efogh témorwén a kaka wéi témorwén mbéwé, yémofem Yesu yényawayénd kété.
bt: Later, Josef from Aramatia town asked Failet for the body of Yesu. Josef was a following man of Yesu, but secretly because he fell with fear the Ju people. With only Failet's permission, he came and took the body of Yesu. 39 Nikodimas, who at first visited Yesu in the night, he himself brought about(like) 34 kilogram mixtured special smelling liquid from mirè and aloe. 40 These two men took and wrapped Yesu's body with cloth with special smelling liquid, they did these in the way of the Ju's burial. 41 At this place where they nailed Yesu on the cross, there was a garden, in this garden was a new hole in the rock, where no one was made land(buried). 42 Because it was Ju people's preparing day and the tomb was close, they laid Yesu.

nama: Tándái Sande akwan, njam kwéfkwéf mé témorwén, Meri Makdalin yéngmormén kétán mbéwafaf a yinjoi wím té nitérmboi sésafneta. 2 Féyo fá kénérsau a yéfande Saimon Fité a ámb Yesuene waitogh ár, efe Yesum tuwetau, a norayai, "Yémofem Yuré yéngutorngi mbéwata, a yénd mafina yéném ánde yémofem yékmangi fá!"
bt: On early Sunday morning, when it was still dark, Meri Makdalin came to the tomb and saw the stone had been moved from the door. 2 Then she ran found Saimon Fitè and the other following men of Yesu, whom Yesu loved, and said, "They have taken the Lord out of the tomb, and we do not know where they have put him!"

nama: Féyo Fité a ámb waitogh ár nuwaneyayénd mbéwéfaf. 4 Fá mérne nengeyayénd, wénde ámb Yesuene waitogh árom yéngwaindam Fité a néngengoi frondeyo mbéwéfaf. 5 Fá náwefnoi a néngretai kénjút sáláme tékmangérwén kété wénde yau néngnyawai kénjút. 6 Féyo Saimon Fité efe yá soramé nguwaitotau néngufaryéng a nényawai mbéwéfaf yinjoi sáláme tékmangérwén kété. 7 Yémo wéi yinjoi sáláme árkéménaye yéfiyaryénd Yesuene sénko. Yéné sáláme naknam fáyo fénatayo kétándmé ámb sálámeta. 8 Féyo yéné waitogh ár, efe fronde nufaryéng mbéwéfaf wéi fá néngnyawai, yémo yinjoi a efalo yiyátoi. 9 Fá yau kor mat náyáteyayénd Buk si ndené Yesu so kanongé kétamé kérta. 10 Féyo Yesuene waitogh ár néngangotaménd yéfenjo méngot. Yesu nufaryéng Meri Makdalinefaf
bt: So Fitè and the other following man went to the tomb. 4 Both of them were running, but the other following man of Yesu passed Fitè and arrived first at the tomb. 5 He bent over and looked into, the clothes lying there but he did not go in. 6 Then Saimon Fitè who was following after him arrived and went into the tomb saw the cloths lying there. 7 He saw the cloth which Yesu's head was wrapped. This cloth rolled up itself differently from other cloth. 8 Then this following man who arrived first to the tomb also went inside, he saw and truly approved(believed). 9 They.d did not know Buk(scripture) that Yesu will rise from the death. 10 Then Yesu's following men went back to their house. Yesu appears to Meri Makdalin
