nama: Wénde Meri mé takayongérwén téndo mbéwata ye kendau. Njam mé kendau, fá néngáwefnoi fandaghét mbéwéfaf 12 a ewinjeyai sómbio njafar si résagh ár kafe ngarot sáláme umaneghkaf, tárwén kété Yesuene fifi ánde té tékmangérwén, ámb sénko tambén ámb kafkaf tambén.
bt: But Meri still stood outside the tomb crying. When she was still crying, she bent over looked into the tomb 12 and saw two men carrying heavenly message(angels) dressed in white, they.dual were there where Yesu's body had been laid, the other sat the head and the other at the feet.

nama: Yémofem yémotangeyayénd, "Amaf, némamén fém nende?"
bt: They.dual asked her, "Woman, why are you crying?"

nama: Yénamé, fá nawengoi a yinjoi Yesu takayongérwén kété, wénde yémo kor yau yáyamngoi ndené Yesu témorwén.
bt: From there, she turned around and saw Yesu there, but still she did not know that it was Yesu.

nama: Fá korayangé, "Amaf, némamén fém nende? Efe fémo yéronje?" Fá kéma kemnau nde ndau téfnár kar témorwén, fá norayai, "Ndimbal, táf fémon njam fá té yéngwan, kwaufro ánde fémon yékém fá a yéndo so ténmanan."
bt: He said, "Woman, why are you crying? Whom are you looking for?" She taught that it might be a farmer, she said, "Bigman, if you have taken him away, tell me where you have put him and I will bring him."

nama: Yesum témndangé fá, "Meri." Fá nawengoi Yesue tambén a norayai Ju árfene sie, "Raboni!" Yáne fifi watamegh ár.
bt: Yesu said to her, "Meri." She turned to Yesu and said in Ju people's language, "Raboni!"(it means teaching man)

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yau mé wereta yénd, ménamén yénd yau mé narmbon Afafaf. Nguwano tane mérnafefaf a tawaufro, 'Yénd armboghét nufngon kétán tane Afafaf a fene Afafaf, tane Ngánjánefaf a fene Ngánjánefaf."
bt: Yesu said, "Do not hold me, because I am not still ascending to the Father. Go to my group(brothers) and tell them, 'I am beginning to ascend to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God.'"

nama: Meri Makdalin yéngmormén a tawaufrongé Yesuene waitogh árét, "Yéndon té yinjon Yuré!" a yémon tawaufrotau yéfe yéné némé korayau Yesu yáfaf. Yesu nufaryéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf
bt: Meri Makdalin went and told Yesu's following men, "I have seen the Lord!" and she told what Yesu had said to her. Yesu arrived/appeared to his following men

nama: Njam séite témorwén yéné efghonyo Sandeyan Yesuene waitogh ár náumendaménd ámbiro sifayatro méngo kénjún namnaménd Ju árfene férfére, Yesu yénmormén nokayoi yéfe kénjún a norayai, "Krufrat so yém féfefaf!" 20 Soramé fá norayai yéné, yémon tauyafongé yéfefaf yánjo ngángé a kwasé. Yáne waitogh ár áuwégh nufngoyénd njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yuré.
bt: When it was evening on the same day on Sunday Yesu following men gathered only one place in the house and close the door in fear of the Ju people, Yesu came stood among them and said, "Peace be with you!" 20 After he said these, he showed his hands and his side to them. His following men started rejoicing when they saw the Lord.

nama: Wéikor Yesu norayai, "Krufrat so yém féfefaf! Ndené fété Afam yénd wénmáfáretam, yéndon wéi ewáfáretan fém." 22 Yénamé ambone téngwayangé yéfefaf a korayangé, "Téngwanangi Ngánján Mbérmbér. 23 Njam fémofem tawawainangi ámb ároene yaufiyam, yéné so tawainangé. Njam fémofem yau tawawainangi yéfene yaufiyam, yéné yau so tawainangé." Yesu nufaryéng Tomasefaf
bt: Again Yesu said, "Peace be with you.p! As the Father has sent me, I am also sending you.p." 22 With that he breathed to them and said, "Receive the God Spirit. 23 If you wash anyone's sin, [his sins] will be washed; if you do not wash their sin, this is not washed." Yesu appeared to Tomas

nama: Wénde Tomas(efe yémndetat Didimas), ámb Yesuene 12 mén waitogh ár, yau témorwén kété ámb Yesuene waitogh árfefaf njam Yesu yénmormén. 25 Féyo ámb Yesuene waitogh árém yaufroyénd, "Yéndfem té yinjongém Yuré!" Wénde fá norayai yéfefaf, "Táfandro yéndon njam tawinjon tot mbor yáne ngángayan a tane ngángaye tayanjangén ánde ténamndawét, a tanyawan ngángé yáne kwasayan ánde fimbe yékunyayénd, yéndon yau efalo so tiyáton."
bt: But Tomas(who they called Didimas), one of the 12 following men of Yesu, was not there when Yesu came to other following men. 25 So other following men of Yesu told him, "We have seen the Lord!" But he said to them, "Unless I see the nail marks on his hands and touch my finger where they nailed him, and touch my hand into his side where they pierced him with the spear, I will not truly approve(believe)."

nama: Ámb Safat soramé Yesuene waitogh ár témorwén méngo kénjút wéikor, a Tomas kété témorwén yéfefaf. Yéta fété sésafne emnaménd Yesu mé nényawai nokayoi yéfe néndkéfan a norayai, "Krufrat so yém féfefaf!" 27 Féyo korayangé Tomasefaf, "Tafai fene ngángé tot mboran yéna, tafanda tane ngángé tanwatemb. Fenjo ngángé a télau tane kwasayan. Yau natambna efalo tiyáto."
bt: A week later Yesu's following men were into the house again, and Tomas was there with them. They closed all the doors still Yesu went in stood in their mids and said, "Peace be with you!" 27 Then he said to Tomas, "Put your finger here, see my hands. Reach out your hand and put it into my side. Do not doubt [and] believing."

nama: Tomasém témndangé Yesu, "Tane Yuré a tane Ngánján!"
bt: Tomas told Yesu, "My Lord and my God!"

nama: Féyo Yesum témndangé Tomas, "Ménamén fémon té winjo yénd, fémon yénémamén efalo wiyáto, frengéghkaf em fá emofem yau wéfandat wénde ndimbal mwighaye mé efalo wiyátotat."
bt: Then Yesu told Tomas, "Because you have seen me, this is why you truly approve(believe) me, blessed are those who do not see me but by big mind(faith) they truly approve(believe) me."

nama: Yesum ámb tárfár ufrogh yam tawafrotau njam yánjo waitogh árfé tamorwén, árké yau ekai yéné Bukan. 31 Wénde yéné faroghmén em ménát fémofem so efalo yiyátoti ndené Yesu fété yém Keriso, Ngánjánene Ambum, a efalo njam yiyátotati, féfene so yém ghérsé yáne yétkwénan.
bt: Yesu did other many surprising things while his following men were with him, which I did not record them in this book. 31 But these writing are in order that you may truly approve(believe) that Yesu is Keriso, God's son, and if you truly approve(believe) him, you may have life in his name.

nama: Yéné soramé Yesu nufaryéng wéikor kétán yánjo waitogh árfefaf, kété Galili arakafan, a ndené nufrotam. 2 Saimon Fité, Tomas(ámb yétkwén Didimas), Nataniel kétamamén Kana Galili yuwon, sómbio ambum Jefediene a sómbio ámb Yesuene waitogh ár efe tamorwén méinyotio kété. 3 Saimon Fitam tamndangé fá, "Yénd nuwanotan wagif rényéghét." Fá korayangi yáfaf, "Yénd so wéngém fefaf." Féyo fá nénwanoyénd a nuflayénd boutan, wénde yéné sémbáran yémofem yau ámb ernayénd.
bt: After this Yesu appeared again to his following men, there by the sea of Galili, and it happened like this. 2 Saimon Fitè, Tomas(other name Didimus), Nataniel from Kana in Galili region area, two of the sons of Jebedi and the two other following men of Yesu who were all there. 3 Saimon Fitè told them, "I am going to catch fish."They said, "We'll go with you.s." So they went and got into the bout, but that night they catch nothing.

nama: Tándái akwan, Yesu nokayoi arakaf téndofaf, wénde yánjo waitogh árém yau yáyámngoyénd ndené Yesu témorwén.
bt: Early in the morning, Yesu stood on the shore, but his following men did not know that it was Yesu.

nama: Fá nénutnai yéfefaf, "Fútaréf, féfene wagif ámb té ewam? Yémofem yénmawangoyénd, "Yau."
bt: He called out to them, "Friends, do you any fish you catch?" They answered him, "No."

nama: Fá korayangé, "Titangi féfenjo net boutoene tambénta a so tarnyangi ámb wagif." Njam yafrotaménd, fá féyotarofnar tamorwén net okaughét boutot waflighét ménamén minde tárfár wagif numetaménd.
bt: He said, "Throw your net on the straight side of the bout and you will catch some fish." When they did, they were unable to pull the net into the bout because they caught so many fish.

nama: Waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau norayai Fitafaf, "Yéné siyém Yuré!" Njamandio Saimon Fité yiyárai norayai, "Yéné siyém Yuré," Saimon Fitam yumbayéng faru soda árké fá nafitraryéng ménát ásáfoghét naumbai yánjo fifiyamé a natnam nuot, a kakmetau masot. 8 Wénde ámb Yesuene waitogh ár kénwaitotawét boutafé ténroghawét net wagif afoghare. A fá nayuofnar tamorwén tunat a tamorwén ndené 100 mité arakaf téndot. 9 Njam fá namghayénd, yémofem yinjoyénd fés árenj wagif tafayongérwén, a ámb féskaf flawé.
bt: The following man whom Yesu loved said to Fitè, "This is the Lord!" As soon as Saimon Fitè heard him say, "It is the Lord," Saimon Fitè wrapped his outer garment which he took off for working tied it over his body jumped into the water, swam to shore. 8 But the other following men of Yesu followed with a bout they were dragging nets full of fish. And they were not far from the land, but about 100 mitè to the shore. 9 When they landed, they saw the charcoal fire with fish lying on it, and some bread.

nama: Yesu korayangé yéfefaf, "Ténmanangi ámb wagif árkéméné fémofem té ernyangi. 11 Saimon Fété nuflai boutot a roghau yénmafngoyénd net arakaf téndofaf. Yéné témorwén afoghare ndimbal wagifafé, 153 méinyotio wénde net yau naftéraryéng. 12 Yesum tamndangé fá, "Kénaflangi a tánetangi njamke." Wénde yánjo waitogh ár férfér tamorwén yá moghét, "Efe fém ném?" Fá mat náyátoyénd ndené fá témorwén Yuré. 13 Yesu nénaflai, yékafai féskaf flawé a tawaramangé yéfe, a wéi ndenéyameyo ewafrotam wagif. 14 Yéné fiyémormén nambiomén Yesu snufaryéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf, soramé kérta anoghan. Yesu a Fité
bt: Yesu said to them, "Bring some fish which you have caught." 11 Saimon Fitè got into the bout and started pulling the net to the shore. It was full of large fish, 153 of them but the net did not break. 12 Yesu told them, "Come and have food." But his following men were afraid to ask him, "Who are you?" They knew that it was the Lord. 13 Yesu came, held the bread and gave it to them, and also did with fish in the same way. 14 This was the third time Yesu appeared to his following men, after rising from the dead. Yesu and Fitè

nama: Njam yémofem ewifoyénd njamke néne, Yesu norayai Saimon Fitafaf, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fene uwégham tayot té ewainde yéné ámb waitogh árfene uwégh tayot?" Fá norayai, "Néméwét, Yuré, fém mat ném ndené yéndon némuwetan fém." Yesu korayangé, "Emanjna tane sif tosé."
bt: When they finished eating food, Yesu said to Saimon Fitè, "Saimon Jon's son, do your loving me surpass these other following men loving me?" He said, "Yes, Lord, you know that I love you." Yesu said, "Feed my lambs."

nama: Wéikor Yesu korayangé, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fémon efalo té wuwete yénd? Yémon yawangoi, "Néméwét, Yuré, fém mat ném ndené yéndon némuwetan." Yesum témndangé, "Ewanjeta kor tane sif."
bt: Again Yesu said, "Saimon Jon's son, do you truly love me?" He answered him, "Yes, Lord, you know that I love you." Yesu answered him, "Take care of my sheep."

nama: Nambiomén Yesum témndangé fá, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fémon efalo té wuwete yénd?" Fité ndémkefé yéfghetam ménamén Yesum yémotai fá nambinotma, "Té wuwete yénd?" Fá korayangé, "Yuré, fém mat ném méinyotio yam; fém mat ném yéndon némuwetan fém."
bt: The third time Yesu said to him, "Saimon Jon's son, do you truly love me?" Fitè felt pain because Yesu asked him third time, "Do you love me?" He said, "Lord you know everythings; you know I love you."

nama: Yéndon némndetan efalo, fém njam mé totér ár kénmorwén fém té kumanetau fémyo a kéngmorwén ándan fém ménde té kénmorwén. Wénde fém njam té kénamndé bulu fémo so ngángé tawio, a ámb árém so kémambangi fém a nélimndat fém ándan yau ménde ném álighét." 19 Yesu korayau yéné ménát tauyafotau ndernáye Fité kér so témorwén a ánde Fitam yéné kére so tuyotau Ngánján. Féyo fá norayai yáfaf, "Kwénmaito yénd!"
bt: I tell you the truth, when you were still young you had dressed youself and went where you wanted to go. But when you become old you will raise your hands, and other people will dress you and lead you where you do not want to go." 19 Yesu said this in order to show how Fitè would die and where Fite would glorify God by this death. Then he said to him, "Follow me!"

nama: Fité nawengoi a yinjoi Yesuene waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau tanwaitowéng fá. Yéné fá témorwén efe néngamghai Yesuefaf kété férégh njamke néneyan a té norayai, "Yuré, emo so sén néramete fém?" 21 Njam Fitam yinjoi fá, yémon kamotangé, "Yuré, ndernáye wét fá?"
bt: Fitè turned and show Yesu's following man whom Yesu loved following them. (This was he who leaned to Yesu there at the meal and had said, "Lord, who will give teeth(betray) you?) 21 When Fitè saw him, he asked, "Lord, how about him?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd ménde njam wém fá sái mé yém ghérsé kétánotio yénd nénangotan, ndernáye wét yém yéné fefaf? Fémon táf waitota yénd." 23 Yénémamén si marat náyátoi yánjo fútar kénjún ndené yéné Yesuene waitogh ár yau so kér yém. Wénde Yesu yau ndené norayai ndené fá sái kér témorwén, fá mé ndenáye norayai, "Yénd ménde njam wém fá sái yém ghérsé kétánotio yénd nénangotan yéné wét ndernáye yém fefaf?"
bt: Yesu answered him, "If I want him to be still alive until I return, how is this to you? You should follow me." 23 For that reason talk became wide among his friends that this Yesu's following man will not die. But Yesu did not say that he would not die, he only said, "If I want him to live untill I return, how is that to you?"

nama: Yéné Yesuene waitogh ár témorwén efe kafrotau yénémamén a emo téfarotau. Yénd mat yéném ndené yáne afrogh siyém efalo.
bt: This Yesu's following man was who told about this and who wrote them. We know that his report is true.

nama: Yesum tangwafrotau tárfár yam wéi ndenáyo, njam ményotio yammén téfarotawét, kété yau so témorwén féyotarofnar sifayé yéné mband maratan ménát sái Buk takmetawét
bt: Yesu did many things likewise, if everything they would have written, there would not be enough spaces in the earth to put the books.

nama: Tane fronde bukan, Tiafilus, yéndo yéfarotamén ménamén méinyotio Yesum némé wafrogh ewafngoi a watamegh 2 a tawarametau yánjo muyafé árét efe yémo té ewaferyéng watamegh yam Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé, a féyo efogh nawerai fá njam yéngwanayéng njafar tukét. 3 Yáne tékrát soramé, fá auyafogh nufngoi fáyo yéné árfefaf a efalo si waufrogh ewafngoi ndené yénd ghérsé wém. Fá njam nufaryéng yéfefaf safét 40 efogh soramé a korayau Ngánjánene limánéghmén. 4 Ámb efghon, yémofem njam njamke tánetawét yémafé, yémo emndai, "Yau téfrangongi Jerusalem, wénde nawanjetati yéné merot tane Afam némé unyéghofnar si té emndai, fémofem té káyáretawét némamén yénd korayawén. 5 Joném nuwan tawalitotau, wénde nambio efogh soramé fém so Ngánján Mbérmbére ewalitote."
bt: In my first book, Tiofilus, I wrote you about all [the things] what Yesu began to do and to teach 2 and he gave his teaching thing through the God Spirit to the men with his authority whom he had chosen, and then the day became when he was taken up/note: he(God) took him(Yesu) up/ to heaven. 3 After his suffering, he started showing himself to these people and he started saying true talk that I am alive. When he appeared to them clearly [during] next 40 days and spoke about the ruling of God. 4 In one day, when they was eating with him, he said, "Don't leave Jerusalem, but wait for this goodness(gift) what my Father had told without.lying talk, [which] you.p have heard what I spoke. 5 Jon baptized in the water, but after a few days you will be baptized by God Spirit."

nama: Féyo njam fá nafángoyénd Yesufé, yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Yuré, fém féyotaro ném yéné efghon Israil yu sái yérameta wéikor?"
bt: So when they met with Yesu, they asked him, "Lord, are you able to built again country of Israil in that day?"

nama: Yémo emndai fá, "Yéné féfeyot yau mat efogh o efoghféneféne em, wénde Ngánjánro mat yém. 8 Wénde fémofem so tawinjongi wafté táf Ngánján Mbérmbér njam yéném féfefaf, a fém so em tane si ghékéf fandagh ár Jerusalem kénjún, méinyotio Judian a Samarian a kétánotio mband marat árkamé yiyato."
bt: He said to them, "These are not for you.p to know the days and times, but only God knows. 8 But you.p will receive the power when the God Spirit comes to you.p; and you.p will be my watching people with eyes in Jerusalem, in all of Judia and Samaria, and to the ends of the earth."

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam yéné si norayai, fá táf nuwanoi yéfene méinyotio ghékfanro, njafar kwamkwamam yéngwamoi yéfene ghékéfta.
bt: After this when he said this talk, he left them in all their eyes, and a cloud hid him from their eyes.

nama: Fá mé tawewotawét njafarot fá njam téngmorwén, sélngwéle sómbio ár kwayaghé sálámefé nokayeyayénd yéfe téndota. 11 Fá norayangeyayénd, "Ár Galili yumén, fém némamén yéna ewakai néwewetati njafarot? Yéné Yesuyo efe té yéngwanang féfe tambén njafarot, so nénangote yéné endmayo fémofem kés yéfandati néngwano njafarot." Yémofem yaferyénd Matias
bt: They were still looking up to the sky when he was going, suddenly two men with white clothes stood beside them. 11 They.d said, "Men from Galili region, why are you standing here looking up to the heaven? This Yesu himself whom [God] took from you into sky, will come back in this same way you.p have seen him to go to heaven. They chose Matias

nama: Féyo fá nénangoyénd Jerusalemét kétándmé mband tunakéf Olif tambén nayuofnar kétán Jerusalemét. 13 Fá njam nufaryénd, narmboyénd ámb saté méngo kénjút ánde fá tamorangérwén. Fá kété tamorwén Fité, Jon, Jems a Endru, Filif a Tomas, Batolome a Metyu, Jems Alfasene ambum a Saimon efe ménde témorwén ndené Ju ár so kawanjetawét fáyo yau Rom waftayan, a Judas Jemsene ambum. 14 Fá méinyotio túmén káumendawét Ngánjánafé orayéghét méinyotio amaf a Yesuene amé Meri a Yesuene nénngnéf.
bt: Then they went back to Jerusalem from mountain of Olif without-far from Jerusalem. 13 When they arrived, they went up to the room into the house where they were staying. There they were Fitè, Jon, Jems and Endru, Filif and Tomas, Batolome and Metyu, Jems son of Alfas and Saimon who wanted that Ju will look after/rule by themselves not by Rom's power, and Judas son of Jems. 14 They all continued together in talking with God with all the women and Meri the mother of Yesu and his younger brothers.

nama: Yéné efghon Fité nokayoi 120 efalo yátogh ár mérén kénjún 16 a norayai, "Fútaréf, Buk si so nufrote árkéméné Ngánján Mbérmbér korayau fronde Deifidene mbírmbírta némé korayau Judasenemén, efe náyátoyéng wambégh ár yéfeyot emofem Yesu yerayénd, 17 Judas ámb tém téfene kénjún a si waitogh ár."
bt: In that day Fitè stood among 120 the approving truth people 16 and said, "Friends, the Scripture must be happened which God Spirit spoke before from Deifid's lips what he said about Judas, who became the guide for those who held Yesu, 17 Judas was one of ours and saying talk man(preacher)."

nama: Judasém mani ewanai yaufi ásáfoghmén, yémon yanayéng mband, kété numai yáne fifi néfnoi marataye a yáne ghérghér nétoryénd. 19 Méinyotio ár Jerusalemén náyárayénd yénémamén, féyo yémofem yéné sifayé témndetawét yéfenjo sie Akeldama, yáne fifi siyém "Férék sifayé."
bt: Judas received money for the evil work, he bought a field, there he hung himself his body and burst widely and his intestines went out. 19 Everyone in Jerusalem heard about this, so they called this place in their language Akeldama, its meaning is, Place of Blood.

nama: Fité norayai, "Fété yékai Sams bukan, 'Yáne sifayé so yém fanfnero, efe yau so yémor yáne sifayan,' a 'Ámb árom téngwanangé yáne limánégh sifayé.'
bt: Fitè said, "It is already written in the Book of Sams, 'May his place be only clear, no one who will live his place,' and May other man take his leading place."

nama: Yénémamén so fété tékafangém ámb ár efe yéndfé té téném méinyotio efghon njam Yuré Yesufé yénd tényotau, 22 kétamé yéné efghon Joném njam nue yálitotam Yesu kétánotio fá néngwanoi téfe tambén. Ámbiro so kénamndangé ghékéf fandagh ár yéndfé Yesuene anoghmén."
bt: Therefore someone will be picked who had been with us all the days when we were moving with the Lord Yesu, 22 from this day when Jon baptized Yesu until he went from us. One must become a watching man with us about Yesu's rising."

nama: Féyo sómbio ár euyafeyayénd, Matias a Josef Barsabas efe témorwén yétkwén Jéstus. 24 Féyo fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, "Yuré, fém mat ném méinyotio árfene tikéf. Ténmauyafo téfe yéné sómbiota fémo efe té yékaf 25 ménát téngwanangé Yesuene muyafé ásáfogh, árkéméné Judasém yéfrango a yéngém kétán ánde kérté so tanangé." 26 Féyo yémofem wén kembne yérnyayénd ménát so tinjongayénd efe Ngánjánam yafer, a wén nuyáyéng Matiasefaf, féyo fá nafghayéng kétán ámb 11 Yesuene muyafé ár kés tamorwén.
bt: So they chose two men, Matias and Josef Barsabas who was called Jèstas. 24 Then they talked with God, "Lord, you.s know all people's heart. Show us [one] from these two who you have chosen 25 to take over work of the people with Yesu's authority(apostlic work), which Judas left and went to the place he took the pain. 26 Then they began to play sticks to see whom God chose, and the stick fell to Matias, so he joined to the other 11 men with Yesu's authority(apostles).

nama: Njam Fentikost efogh yénmormén, fá náumendaménd ámbiro sifayat. 2 Sunsune ke yénmormén ndenanit ndimbal mbormbornit njafarta a yafoi méinyotio méngo ánde fá tamorangérwén. 3 Féyo yémofem yinjoyénd némé kéretau ndenanit fés kánkékánkénit árkéméné nófarnayénd a námnjoyénd ámbiroámbiro árfefaf kété. 4 Méinyotio ár tamorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf a Ngánján Mbérmbéram eméindai nufngoyénd si fénatayero orayégh. |IB04181gr.tif|col||Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide.|Fetikos efogh: fés kankékanké efalo yátogh árfene sénkoyan (Acts 2.3)|2.3
bt: When the day of Fentakost was, they gathered together in one place. 2 Suddenly a sound came like the big wind from heaven and filled the whole house where they were staying. 3 Then they saw what looked like tongues of fire(fire flames) which spread out and sat to each person there. 4 All people were full of the God Spirit and the God Spirit cause/made to began to speak differently.

nama: Kété tamorangérwén Jerusalemén Ngánján férférafé Ju ár fénaté ndimbal yumén mband maratan. 6 Yémofem njam yéné ke náyárayénd, ár mérén enmormén nafghayénd mwighé déudéuafé, ménamén ámbiroámbiro ár káyáretawét yéfenjo sie korayawét. 7 Minde sélngwélafé, fá korayangi, "Yéné ár efe norayat ndenanit Galili yumén ár em. 8 Ndernáye so náyáretam téfenjo si yéfe tambén? 9 Yénd yéné yéném Farsiamén, Medemén, Elammén, Mesofotamiyamén, Judiamén, Kafadokiamén, Fontosmén, Esiamén, 10 Frigiamén, Famfiliamén, Ijifmén, Sailen kaka Libiamén, wan ár kétándmé Rommén, 11 Ju ár a fénaté yumén wáwefnogh ár, Kéretamén a Arabmén, yéndfem eyáretam fá norayat téfenjo sie, yéné ndimbal yammén némé Ngánjánam tawafrotauǃ" 12 Sélngwélafé a mwighé déudéuafé, fá namotayénd ámbiroámbiroe, "Némé fifi yém?"
bt: There were staying in Jerusalem God-fearing Ju people from different nations in the world. 6 When they heard this sound, a people group(crowd) came together with confusion, because one and one heard them speaking in their own talk(languages). 7 With very amazed, they said, "These people who was talking are like from Galili region people. 8 How can we hear our own language from them? 9 We came from Farsi, Mede, Elam, Mesofotamia, Judia, Kafadokia, Fontos, Esia, 10 Frigia, Famfilia, Ijif, Libia near Sailen, visitors from Rom, 11 Ju people and worshippers from various nations, Kreta and Arab, we hear them speaking with our own language, about this big things what God had done. 12 With amaze and confuse, they asked one another, "What is meaning?"

nama: Wénde ámb árém tawértawét a emndayénd, "Yémofem tánetat totér wéri nu." Fitam si táitotau ár mérnat
bt: But some men made fun of them and said, "They drank new alcohol." Fitè preached to the crowd

nama: Féyo Fité nokayoi 11 waitogh árfé, yáne kém narmboi a si kafrotau ár mérnan, "Fém Judiamén ár a méinyotio efe emor Jerusalem kénjún, yéndon so ewawafenan yéné yam féfeyot, káyárangi merkéráye yéndon némé norayan. 15 Yéné ár sem wéri yau em, ndené kés nemnati. Sénonjo siyém 9 aklokro akwǃ 16 Wéndende, némé té kufrote téfefaf yém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Joel némé korayau,
bt: Then Fitè stood up with 11 following men, raised his voice and told to the crowd, "You men of Judia and all who stay in Jerusalem, I will explain these things to you, listen carefully what I say. 15 These people are not drunk, as you might think. Now is only 9 O'clock morning! 16 Instead, what has happened to us is what God's man who make know(prophet) Joel said,

nama: "Ngánján noraye, 'Sénonjo kerker efghon, yéndo so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér méinyotio árfefaf, a féfene ambum a mérésmérés so nafrotat Ngánjánene si, a féfene totér árém ghékéf waingégh yam so efandat, a féfene ákif onjo so ekém.
bt: God says. 'Now in the last days, I will pour my Spirit to all people, and your sons and daughters will tell God's talk, and your young men see eye passover things, your old men will have dreams.

nama: Wénde tane faiofnar ásáfogh árfet, ár a amaf, yéndon so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér yéné efghon, fá so nafrotat Ngánjánene si.
bt: But to my without.payment working people, men and women, I will pour my Spirit in those days, they will tell God's talk.

nama: Yéndon so sélngwélafé yam ewauyafotan njafaran a ufarogh yam mband mbanmbanan, férék, fés a sénjté kwam.
bt: I will show special workings(miracles) in the heaven surprising things on the earth below, blood, fire and thick smoke.

nama: Efogh so kawengongé kwéfitat a ghérare so kawengongé férkot yéné soramé Yurane efogh yéném ndimbal a ndimbal kwayaghafé.
bt: The sun will turn to darkness and the moon will turn to blood after this Lord's day comes with big and strong light(glory).

nama: A méinyotio ár efe kómnendangi Yurane yétkwénan, fá so kawanjarngi.'
bt: And every people who ask on the name of the Lord, they will be saved.'

nama: "Israilmén ár, káyárangi yénémamén, Yesu Najaretmén ár témorwén Ngánjánam efe yuyafoi féfeyot fénataye wafroghyamafé, sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yamafé, árkéméné Ngánjánam tawafrotau féfefaf yáne kénjúmé ndené fété fém mat em féfenjomén. 23 Ngánján fá mat témorwén némé kufrotau, a yáne fronde mwighé yanayénd njam Yesu ngi yafngoyénd, a fémofem yékmayénd krot yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan Téndo árém. 24 Wénde Ngánjánam yanoi kérta, yaloi kér tékrát tambén, ménamén kéram yau so terangé. 25 Deifid norayai yánemén, "'Yéndo yéfandan Yuré túmén ta frondeta. Ménamén fá tane kaka yém, yénd yau so nasambnetan.
bt: "Men of Israil, listen about this, Yesu from Najaret was a man who God proved to you by special workings(miracles), surprising things, and surprising things, which God did to you.p through him as you yourselves know. 23 God he knew what happen, and his first mind accepted(decided) when you.p began to beat Yesu, and you.p put him to death by nailing on the cross by Side people. 24 But God raised him from the death, releasing him from the pain of death, because death could not keep him. 25 Deifid said about him, "'I saw the Lord always before me. Because he is near me, I will not be shaken.

nama: Féyo tane tikéf siyém nasnete a tane kánké náuwete, tane fifi so ndenéyameyo nene kamnangan,
bt: Then my heart is glad and my tongue rejoices, my body in the same way will rest in hope,

nama: ménamén fémo yau so kwéfrango kér árfé, o tumyo fene njúnnjúnofnar ár sái nornda mbéwé méngon.
bt: because you will not leave me with dead people, or allow your without.dust(holy) man to rot in grave house.

nama: Fém mat té náyátoi tafaf ghérsé endmén, fémo yénd so kwafo ménaye áuwéghe fene sáfrére.'
bt: You had made known to me the paths of life, you will fill me with joy in front of you.'

nama: "Fútaréf, yéndon so ewaufrotan efaloe ndené áki Deifid kér yémormén a yiyatotaménd a yáne mbéwé méngo yéna yém yéné efghon. 30 Wénde fá témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a mat namndai ndené Ngánjánam némé yémndetam ndené yáne áki so kámnjongé yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. 31 Deifidém téfandau soramé yu a korayau Kerisoene anoghmén, fá ndené korayau Ngánjánam yau so téfrangongé kér kénjún o yau so tumyongé yáne fifi kérkfot mbéwé méngon. 32 Ngánjánam té yanoyéng Yesu ghérsat, a yénd yéné yéném fandagh ár efaloe. 33 Fá té yuyoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángat, ndené fété Ngánjánam némé té norayai, yémon té yumyoi Afé tambén Ngánján Mbérmbér a té yénmasuryéng némé fémofem sénonjo yéfandati a náyáretati. 34 Ménamén Deifid yau yáfáretam njafarot, wénde fáyo norayai, 'Yuré norayai tane Yurafaf, "Kámnjo tane tambén ngángata
bt: "Friends, I can tell you truly that ancester Deifid died and buried(Note: they buried him) and his grave house is here in this day. 30 But he was a God́’s man who make know God(prophet)and knew what God said that his descendant will be sit on his ruling sitting place. 31 Deifid saw next area(future) and said rising of Keriso, he said that God will not leave him into the death or he will not allowed his body rotten in the grave house. 32 God has raised Yesu to life, and we are really watching men by truth. 33 He has risen up to the right hand of God, like as what God had said, he has received God Spirit from the Father and has poured out what you.p now see and hear. 34 For Deifid did not send to heaven, but he himself said, The Lord said to my Lord, "Sit at my right hand

nama: kétánotio yéndo so tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan."'
bt: until I will make your enemies under your feet."

nama: "Féyo méinyotio Israil ár mat kamndangi ndené fémofem yéné Yesu té ténamndati wafatarégh wénan, wénde Ngánjánam té yiyátoi Yuré a Keriso."
bt: "So let all Israil know that you nailed this Yesu on the cross, but God had approved him Lord and Keriso."

nama: Njam árém Fité yiyárayénd yéné si snorayai, fá táf nuyáyénd tikfan a norayayénd Fitafaf a ámb Yesuene muyafé árfefaf, "Fútaréf, némé yéndfem so ewafrotam?"
bt: When people heard Fitè said this, that time they fell down in the heart and said to Fitè and the other men with Yesu's authority(apostles), "Friends, what shall we do?"

nama: Fitam ewawangoi, "Kawengongi walitoghét, fém méinyotio, Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan ménát féfene yaufiyam so mwighafnar tawayangé. A Ngánjánam so tawaramangé Ngánján Mbérmbér. 39 Yéné unyéghofnar si sem féfeyot a féfene ambumafet a méinyotio efe nayu em, ndenáyo méinyotio efe Yuram téfene Ngánjánam so tamotangé yandio."
bt: Fitè answered them, "Turn away(Repent) to be baptized, all of you, in the name of Yesu Keriso in order to throw without.mind(not keep in mind and throw away)your sins away. And God will give you the God Spirit. 39 These without-lying talk(promises) are for you.p and your children and for all who are far away, also all whom Lord our God will call to himself."

nama: Fitam tárfár sie tawawéngsotau fá, a yémon tamndetau, "Fém kawanjarngi yéné yaufi saté árta." 41 Fá emofem yáne si waitogh yumyoyénd walitogh ewafngoi, a táf 3,000 ár farun nafayoyénd yéné efghon. Efalo yátogh árfene áumengégh
bt: Fitè warned them with many talks, and he said, "You.p save from this wicked generation." 41 Those who accepted his preaching talk began to be baptized, and that time 3,000 people were added ontop in that day. The meeting of believers

nama: Fá naramayénd ámb efogh Yesuene muyafé árfefaf watameghét a áumengéghét, féskaf flawé faloghét a Ngánjánafé orayéghét. 43 Méinyotio ár férféram ewifoi a tárfár sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yam téfandawét Yesuene muyafé árfefaf. 44 Méinyotio efalo yátogh ár náumendayénd a tafalotawét yéfenjo rokar. 45 Yémofem tawafnamotawét yéfenjo ásáfogh sifayé a méndefé rokar, yémofem tawarametawét yéfeyot efe káronjawét. 46 Méinyotio efghon fá túmén káumendawét wáwefnogh méngo sifayan. Yémofem tatfotawét féskaf flawé yéfenjo méngo kénjún a mérne tánetawét áuwéghafé a mer tikfe, 47 Ngánjáne wagh tawerémndawét a tayamnetawét mer méinyotio árém. A Yuram farun ámb ár efayoi méinyotio efghon fá efe ewanjaryéng.
bt: They spent other time for learning from men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and for meeting together, for breaking bread and for talking with God. 43 Everyone was full of scaredness and saw many surprising things and surprising things by the men with Yesu's authority(apostles). 44 All the approving truth people gathered together and shared their things. 45 They were exchanging(sold) their working place and liking things(possessions), they gave to anyone who are needed. 46 In every day they continually met together in the worshipping house courts. They broke bread in their houses and ate together with joy and good hearts, 47 all the people were singing song to God and enjoying good. And the Lord added other people ontop evey day those whom he[God] saved.

nama: Ámb efghon Fité a Jon tayowéng wáwefnogh méngot Ngánjánafé orayéghét 3 aklok séite karfe. 2 Ámb ár aknyégh áre témorwén kétamayo áráfégh fá yénérsaménd kétán wáwefnogh méngo sésafnet yétkwén Merfifi, ánde fá tumnjongayénd túmén efghon ómnengét yéfefaf efe tangmorwén wáwefnogh méngot. 3 Yémo njam ewinjeyai Fité a Jon wáwefnogh méngo élaughétro tárwén, yémo emotangeyai ménát maniot. 4 Fitam yéfandayéng mbarkánde fá, ndenéyameyo Joném. Féyo Fitam yémndai, "Yénd ténfandangeǃ" 5 Féyo yéné árom ewarameyai utmanégh, ndené kemnau némndafi kar so tarameyayénd.
bt: One day Fitè and Jon went up to the worshipping house for talking with God at three o'clock in the afternoon. 2 A man was with a lame from birth they carried him to the worshipping house gate called Really good, where he sat on every day for begging to those who were going to the worshipping house. 3 When he saw Fitè and Jon were about to enter worshipping house, he asked them(two) for money. 4 Fitè looked at him straightly, also Jon. Then Fitè said, "Look at us!" 5 So this man gave them his respection/attention, as he thought they.dual will give something.

nama: Féyo Fitam yémndai, "Tane ámb yau yém manikéf o gol, wénde némé tane yém, yéndo so kémaraman fe. Yesu Keriso Najaretmén yáne yétkwénan, kokai áligh kufngoǃ" 7 Fitam yerai tambén ngángata, yémo yáutánam okayoghét, táfandio ároene kafkaf a kagh muyafé namndeyayénd. 8 Fá natnaméng yánjo kafkafe a áligh nufngoi. Féyo fá nuwanoyénd yémafé wáwefnogh méngot, tiyotawéng a kátnawéng tuwetau Ngánján. 9 Njam méinyotio árém yinjoyénd fá álighan a Ngánjánene waghan, 10 yémofem yáyámngoyénd fá yéné ár efe túmén témorangérwén ómnengéghan wáwefnogh méngo sésafne yétkwén Merfifi, a fá sunsun emormén a sélngwélafé yammén némé kufrotau yáfaf. Fité korayau wáwefnogh méngo sifayan
bt: Then Fitè said to him, "There are not have silver and gold in me, but what is mine, I will give you. In his name Yesu Keriso from Najaret, stand and start to walk!" 7 Fitè took him by the right hand, he helped him to stand, at once man's feet and ankles became.d strong. 8 He jumped to his feet and began to walk. Then he went with them to the worshipping house, walking and jumping and praising God. 9 When all the people saw him in walking and in singing God, 10 they recognized this man who always sat begging at the worshipping house' gate called Really good, and they came wonder and amazing things with surprise what had happend to him. Fitè spoke at the place of worshipping house

nama: Njamandio ómnengégh ár kaweretau Fité a Jonefaf, méinyotio ár sélngwél emormén kénérsawét yéfefaf yéné sifayat yétkwén Solomonene méngo sifayat. 12 Njam Fitam yéné yinjoi, fá norayai yéfefaf, "Israilmén ár, némamén yéné yammén fém sélngwél em? Némamén fémofem ghékfe yénmámnjotati yénd ndenanit téfenjo wafté a Ngánján wáwefnogh yame yéndfem kar yéné ár yéméindangem álighét? 13 Ebraamene Ngánján, Aisekene Ngánján, Jeikofene Ngánján, téfene ákifene Ngánján, tuwetawét yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár Yesu. Fémofem yéramayénd fá kétán ngiot a fémofem yékenayénd Failetene sáfrére, soramé yémon mwighé yáitoi yáyot umyoghét. 14 Fémofem yékenayénd Njúnnjúnofnar a Mbarkánd Ár a namotayénd ndené ngi téfnár tumyongi féfefaf. 15 Fémofem yésmetaménd ghérsé téfén ár, wénde Ngánjánam yanoyéng kérta. Yénd yéné yéném fandagh ár yénémamén. 16 Ndimbal mwighaye Yesuene yétkwéne, yéné ár efe fémofem yéfandati a mat em, fá muyafé náyáto. Yéné siyém Yesuene yétkwéne a ndimbal mwighaye árké yéném yá kénjúmé yéramayéng yéné mer yátoghét yáyot, árkéméné fémofem méinyotio yéfandati. |LB00248B.TIF|col||Louise Bass, © 1994 The British & Foreign Bible Society.|Wáwefnogh méngo, Solomonene méngo (Acts 3.11)|3.11
bt: While the beggar held on to Fitè and Jon, all the people were surprised, came ran to them this place name Solomon's house place. 12 When Fitè saw this, he said to them, "Israil people, why are you surprised at this thing? Why do you look straightly at us like as by our own power or worshipping God way(godliness) we caused/made this man walk? 13 Ebraam's God, Aisek's God, Jeikof's God, our father's God, has glorified his worker Yesu. You.p gave him for killing and you.p rejected in front of Failet, before he had decided to let him go. 14 You.p rejected the Without.dust and Straight One and asked that they accepted murderer to you. 15 You.p killed the originator of the life, but God raised him from death. We are watching men about this. 16 By big mind(faith) by the name of Yesu, this man who you.p see and know, he became with strength. This is by Yesu's name and the big mind(faith) which comes through him has given him truly healing for him, which all of you see.

nama: "Fútaréf, yénd mat wém ndené féfene wafroghyam siyém mwighé kwéfkwéf em, ndenéyameyo féfene limánégh ár tamorwén. 18 Wénde yéné yém ndernáye Ngánjánam efalo yiyátote némé fá korayau méinyotio yánjo Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé, korayawéng ndené yéné Kerisom tékrát so yéfande. 19 Kakenangi yaufita a kawengongi Ngánjánefaf, ménát féfene yaufi so tawawayangé, ménát Yurata frengégh so yéném, 20 wamarogh efogh so kawerangé kétamé Yurata a Ngánjánam Yesu so ténmáfáretangé, efe yém Keriso efe té yuyafoi féfeyot. 21 Yesu nawanjete njafaran kétán yéné efogh kawerangé Ngánjáneyot ménát Ngánjánam so ewafarnje méinyotio rokar, némé unyéghofnar si norayayéng tándái yánjo njúnnjúnofnar Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé. 22 Moses norayai, 'Yuré féfene Ngánjánam so tunjangé Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár ndené fété yénd swém féfenjo ár kénjún, fémofem táf yiyáretati némat fém njam emndeta. 23 Efe yau náyáretat yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároefaf Ngánjánam so titérmbongé yéfenjo árta.'
bt: Friends, I know that your doing things are in the darkness of thinking(ignorance), as your head men were. 18 But this is how God approved what he said through his God's people who make know(prophets), saying that his Keriso will see a pain. 19 Turn away from sin and turn to God, so that he may take away your.p sin, so that blessing come from God, 20 times of supporting you from Lord and God will send Yesu, who has appointed for you.p, Yesu. 21 Yesu is waiting in heaven until this day comes for God in order that God will restore everything, what without-lying talk(promise) said long ago through his without.dust(holy) God's people who make know(prophets). 22 Moses said, "The Lord your God will raise up a God's man who make know(prophet) like as I am among your.p people, you.p must listen to what he tells you. 23 Whom do not listen to that man who make know(prophet) God will destroy/remove them from their people.

nama: "Kétándmé Samuel yénanotio sénonjo, méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénorayawét némé ufroghan sénonjo em. 25 A fém srem Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene ambum a fém ewafnyang Ngánjánefaf némé mwighé yéréindam féfekifé. Yémon norayai Ebraamefaf, 'Fene áki ambum kénjún méinyotio ár yéné mbandan frengéghan so em.' 26 Njam Ngánjánam yuyoi yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár, yémo yénmáfáretam fá fronde féfefaf Ju árfefaf frengéghét ménát awengogh féfenjo yaufita ámbiroámbiroe."
bt: Since Samueluntil now, all the God's people who make know(prophets) spoke about what is happening today. 25 And you are sons of the God's people who make know(prophets) and you involved in what[agreement] God agree mind your ancestors. He said to Ebraam, 'In your.s offspring all peoples on earth will be in blessing.' 26 When God raised up his without.payment working man(servant), he sent him first to you.p to Ju people for blessing [you] in order to turn from your.p sin.

nama: Ghéngén wárogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh sénko ár a Saduki ár enmormén Fité a Jonefaf njamandio koraiwét árfefaf. 2 Fá nékwan tamorwén ménamén Yesuene muyafé árém tawaufrowét árét Yesuene kénjún ndernáye kér ár so nanotat. 3 Yémofem ewereyayénd Fité a Jon. Fá kwéfkwéf méngon elaweyayénd. Fá so kawanjengwét kaitau, ménamén férégh témorwén 4 Wénde tárfár ár efe náyárayénd si efalo yiyátoyénd, a yéné efghon áyárégh ár náyátoyénd 5,000 ár.
bt: The men who sacrifice and headmen of the worshipping house guard and the Saduki men came to Fitè and Jon while they.dual were talking to the people. 2 They were angry because the men with Yesu's authority(apostles)(men with authority of Yesu) were reporting/preaching to the people how people will rise from dead in Yesu. 3 They held Fitè and Jon. They put them in darkness house. They should wait until tomorrow, because it was evening. 4 But many people who heard talk truly approved(believed), and in this day beliving men became 5,000 people.

nama: Ámb efghon, limánégh ár, sénko ár a nák watamegh ár nafángoyénd Jerusalem kénjún. 6 Anas limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár kété témorwén, a Kayafas, Jon, Aleksendé a ámb efe limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mérénmén tamorwén. 7 Yémofem enémnjéménd yéfene sáfrére Fité a Jon a mogh ewafngeyayénd fá, "Némé waftaye o némé yétkwéne yéné ásáfogh ewafrot?"
bt: The next day, leading people, head people and teaching men of the law met in Jerusalem. 6 Anas the leading burning sacrifice man were there, and were Kayafas, Jon, Aleksendè and the other people of the leading burning sacrifice man's family. 7 They brought Fitè and Jon before them and began to ask them, "By what power or by what name did you.dual do this work?"

nama: Féyo Fité, Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf, norayai yéfefaf, "Limánégh ár a árfene sénko árǃ 9 Njam té yénd yénmot mer ásáfoghmén aknyégh ároenemén efe mer namndai a ndernáye mer náyátoi, 10 fém fái mat kamndangi, a méinyotio Israilmén ár. Yéné siyém Najaretmén Yesu Keriso yáne yétkwénan, efe fémofem yénamndaménd wénde efe Ngánjánam yanoyéng kérta, yéné ár yakai féfene sáfrére merro. 11 Yesu siyém ndenanit wím, "'wím fémofem méngo ramégh árém yékenayénd, árké té namndé néndkéf sérasér.'
bt: Then Fitè, filled with the God Spirit, said to them, "Rulers and head people of the peopleǃ 9 If you ask me about good work for the lame who became good and how he became good, 10 you should know, and all the people of Israil. This is by the name of Yesu Keriso from Najaret, whom you nailed but [whom] God raised him again from the dead, this man stands before you well(healed). 11 Yesu is the stone you.p house builders rejected, which has become the middle post.' 12 Salvation will not be found to anyone, because there is no other name in the world given to people by which he will save us."

nama: Yémofem njam ewinjeyayénd Fité a Jon férférofnar koraiwét a mat náyátoyénd ndenénde fá tárwén skulofnar o ménd ár, fá sélngwél emormén a fá mat tamorwén ndenénde yéné ár Yesufé tamorwén. 14 Wénde ménamén yémofem yinjoyénd aknyégh ár efe mer namndai tawakayongérwén yémafé, féyo némé si yau norayayénd. 15 Féyo Ju sénko árém ewafáretangeyayénd téndot Ju sénko árfene áumengéghta, mérne nafghayénd a si taruindawét.
bt: When they saw Fitè and Jon said without-fear and knew that they are without schooling or ordinary men, they were amazed and they knew that these men was with Yesu. 14 But because they saw a lame who had become good standing with them, then they had nothing to say. 15 So Ju head men sent them.d to outside from the Ju head men meeting (Sanedrin), they gathered and discussed together.

nama: Fá namotayénd, "Yéndfem némé yam so yafrotam yéné sómbio árfefaf? Méinyotio ár tamorangérwén Jerusalemén fá mat em nde némé yémofem sélngwélafé yam yafroménd árkéméné yéndfem yau so tékenangém. 17 Wénde yéné yam kémboghét marat mété káyátongé árfe kénjún, féyo yénémamén yéndfem mat yéné ár so táyátem yau so norayét yéné yétkwénan ámb árfefaf."
bt: They asked, "What will we do to this two men? Everyone living in Jerusalem they know that what they.d did a surprising thing(miracle) which we cannot deny it. 17 But for stopping this thing keep on making know wide among the people, so that we let/make these men.dual know not to speak anymore in this name to any people."

nama: Féyo wéikor emotangeyayénd yéné sómbio ár a táikér si emndéménd fá yau so norayét o ewatamet Yesuene yétkwéne. 19 Wénde Fité a Jonfem ewawangeyayénd, "Fém kemnangi kor ndené mbarkánde Ngánjánene ghékfan yém ár so tiyáré o Ngánján. 20 Yénd yau so kékmbongém sian téfén yéndfem némé tafandam a káyáretam."
bt: Then they called these two men again and said strong talk(commended) them not to speak or teach by the name of Yesu. 19 But Fitè and Jon answered them, "You think well/carefully that is straight in God's eyes to listen(obey) to people or God. 20 We cannot stop talk the reason/basis of what we had seen and heard."

nama: Kémbogh si soramé, yémofem engéumieyayénd. Yémofem ámb yau end ewinjoyénd ndernáye so fá tékrátan takmeyayénd, ménamén méinyotio árém Ngánján tuwetawét ménamén némé nufrotam. 22 Yéné ár efe Ngánjánam mer yiyátoi 40 yunjéf té yáindai. Efalo yátogh árfene Ngánjánafé orayégh
bt: After stopping talk, they let them go. They could not find any way how to put guilty(to punish) them, because all the people were praising God for what had happened. 22 The man who became good was forty years old. The believers' talking with God

nama: Fá njam engéfrangeyayénd, Fité a Jon néngangeyayénd kétán yéfenjo árfefaf a tawaufrowét méinyotio limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limángégh árém némé korayawét yéfefaf. 24 Fá njam káyáretawét yénémamén, féyo yémofem kém efghayénd mérne oraighan Ngánjánefaf, fá norayayénd, "Yurafene Yuré, fémo yafrotam njafar, mband a arakaf, a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún. 25 Fém korayau Ngánján Mbérmbére fenjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár, téfene afé Deifidefafmé, "'Némamén mband marat nékw em a némamén árém fifiofnar mwighé nemnat?
bt: When they released them.d, Fitè and Jon went to their people and told everything what the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the head people had said to them. 24 When they heard this, so they raised voices together in talking with God, they said, "Lord of Lords, you made the heaven, the earth and the sea, and everything in these. 25 You said by God Spirit to your worker, our father Deifid, "Why do the nations angry and why do the peoples think without.meaning thought?

nama: Mbandmén warsagh ár kafrendawét ngiot a limángégh ár náumendat mérne Yurafé ásméghét a wéi yémafé Keriso.'
bt: The ruling men(kings) of the earth prepared for battle and head men gathered together for fighting [against] the Lord and also with him Keriso.'"

nama: Efalo yátogh ár mé Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, "Erod a Fontius Failet kafángotawét mérne yémafé Téndo árfé a Israilmén árfé yéné ndimbal tesen kénjún ménát fene njúnnjúnofnar ásáfogh ár Yesue ngiot, efe fémon té yiyátoi Keriso. 28 Yémofem méinyotio yam tawafrotawét, fém mat kénmorwén frondeyo fene waftaye a méndeyan soramé nufrotam. 29 Yuré, kéreta yéfene nékw téfanda a fémon taméinda fenjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár fene siot so norayat férférofnar. 30 Fenjo ngángé tásáfote ménát mer yátoghét a ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam wafroghét, Yesuene yétkwén kénjúmé, fene njúnnjúnofnar faiofnar ásáfogh ár."
bt: The believers were still talk with God(pray), "Erod and Fontius Failet met together with the Side people and the people of Israil in this city in order to kill your without.dust(holy) worker Yesu, whom you have made Keriso. 28 They did everything, you knew with your power and in your will it would happend later. 29 Lord, hear and see their angers and allow your without.payment working man(servant) to speak your talk without-fearing. 30 Work your hand to heal and perform surprising things and surprising things through Yesu's name, your without.dust(holy) worker."

nama: Soramé fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, yéné sifayan ánde kafángotawét kété kásámbnetau. Féyo fá Ngánján Mbérmbéram ewafoi a Ngánjánene si táitotawét férférofnar. Efalo yátogh árém tafalotawét yéfenjo rokar
bt: After they talked with God, that place where they were meeting was shaken. So the God Spirit filled them and they spoke the talk of God without.fear. The approving truth people were distributing their own things(possessoins)

nama: Méinyotio efalo yátogh ár tamorwén ámbiro tikfan a mwighayan. Efe ámb yau korayau ndené yéfene rokar yéfendro tamorwén, wénde yémofem tafalotawét yéfene némé tamorwén. 33 Minde waftafé Yesuene muyafé ár ménjté tamorwén afroghan Yuré Yesuene kér anoghmén. Ngánjánene ngárám kafamndau méinyotio árfefaf. 34 Kété ámb ár yau káronjau rokarot yéfene kénjún. Efe mband a méngo yuré tamorwén yémofem tatérnawét a térarégh mani tanérsawét 35 a takmetawét Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot, a tawarametawét yéfeyot efe káronjawét maniot.
bt: All the approving truth people were one in heart and mind. No one said that their possessions were their own, but they were distributing what were theirs. 33 With big power the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) kept on tell to the rising of the Lord Yesu, God's grace was rained on all the people. 34 There was no one was in need materials among them. Who owned land and houses were exchanging(selling) [for money]and brought them exchanged money 35 and put it at the men with Yesu's authority(apostles)' feet, and it was gave to anyone who had need money.

nama: Josef, Lefi mérénmén kétamamén Sáifres, efe Yesuene muyafé ár tanmotawét Banabas, yáne yétkwénone fifi siyém "Wawéngsogh ár ambum," 37 yéramai yánjo mband maniot a yékmai mani Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot.
bt: Josef, belong to a Lefi tribe from Saifres, who men with Yesu's authority(apostles) called Banabas, his name's meaning is "Son of Encouragement,'" 37 gave his field for [making] the money and put it to the men with Yesu's authority(apostles)' feet.

nama: Ámb ár yétkwén Ananias, yátnofé tárwén Safairafé, yémofem mband yérameyayénd maniot. 2 Yémon ámb mani ewerai yandio, a yatén mat témorwén méinyotio yénémamén, a wénde enwanai ámbro a ekmai Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot.
bt: A man name Ananias, with his wife Safaira, they sold land for money. 2 He kept some for himself, and his wife knew all about it, but he brought only some and put it at the men with Yesu's authority(apostles)' feet.

nama: Féyo Fité norayai, "Ananias, ndernayan Sáifram fene tikéf yafoi ménát fémon tawinde Ngánján Mbérmbéroe a fémon ewer fendio ámb mani fémon árké ewan mbandmén? 4 Fronde fene mband témorwén, soramé fémon yétérnai maniot. Mband résagh soramé, yéné mani náyátoi fene. Némayam fém néméindam yéné yamot? Fém yau kuinde árfefaf wénde Ngánjánefaf."
bt: Then Fitè said, "Ananias, how has Sáifèr filled your heart so that you deceived the God Spirit and held for yourself some of money from which you took for the land? 4 Land was yours before you exchanged/sold it for money. After land selling, that money became yours. Why did you cause this way? You did not lie to people but to God."

nama: Njam Ananias náyárai yéné si, fá táf fété nuyai krotio. A ndimbal férféram ewanai méinyotio efe náyárayénd némé yam nufrotam. 6 Féyo totér ár nénuwanoyénd yáne fifi yéfinaménd, a yéngwanayénd a mband yaramayénd.
bt: When Ananias heard this talk, he immediately fell down and died. And big fear held all who heard what had happened. 6 Then young men came and wrapped his body, and carried it and they made land(buried).

nama: Nambio efoghféneféne soramé yáne amaf yénmormén, yau mat náyátoi némé nufrotam. 8 Fitam amaf yémotai, "Ta kwaufro, yéné fai fiyém fém a Ananias yéné mbandmén sewaneyayénd?" Amafom yawangoi, "A, yéné fai fété yém."
bt: Three hours later his wife came, she didn't know what happened. 8 Fitè asked woman, "Tell me, is this payment you and Ananias received for the land? Woman said, "Yes, that is the payment."

nama: Fité norayai amafoefaf, "Némamén fémofem yéné mwighé kemarét Yurane Mbérmbér ufoghét? Kéretaǃ Yéné totér ár emofem fene ár tiyatotat kété ewakai méngo sésafneyan, a fém yémofem ndenéyameyo so nérsat."
bt: Fitè said to woman, "Why did you.think this mind to put Lord's Spirit for trial? Listen! That young men who buried your husband there stand in the door of house, and they will also carry you." 10 At once woman fell down at his feet and died. Then those young men entered in and found deadbody, carried her and buried her with her husband. 11 Big fear held all Yesu's family(church) and all who heard about what happened. The men with Yesu's authority made good(healed) many people

nama: Yesuene muyafé árém tawafrotawét tárfár ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam árfene sáfan. A méinyotio Yesuene efalo yátogh ár túmén kafángotawét Solomonene méngo sifayan. 13 Fá férfér tamorwén ufényéghét yéfefaf, wéndende árém mer si korayawét yéfenemén 14 Tárfár árém a amafam efalo tiyátotawét Yuré a yéné téfnan ndimbal mérén kénáyátotau. 15 Yéné téfnan, árém tanérsawét enjne téfnár endét a takmetawét tatayafé a yameyafé ménát Fitane mbanmban so kuitau yéné árfefaf táf Fité njam kawaindau endmé. 16 Ndenayo ár mérén náumendaménd Jerusalem tesenmén, tanérsawét yéfenjo enjne téfnár a efe yaufi mbérmbéram tawasérmbotau a méinyotio mer káyátotawét. Yesuene muyafé árét tékrát tawarametawét
bt: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) did many surprising things and surprising things before the people. And all the approving truth people met regularly in the Solomon's house place. 13 They were afraid to join them, but people spoke good talk about them. 14 Many men and women truly approved(believed) in the Lord and so large group became. 15 Therefore, people brought the sick people into the streets and put them with the stretcher and with mats so that Fitè's shadow might fall on to those people when Fitè passed by the road 16 Then people group also gathered from the Jerusalem city, brought their sick people and whom evil spirits spoiled and all became good. They were giving suffering to the men with Yesu's authority(apostles)

nama: Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a ámb yáne wáutárégh ár Saduki mérénmén waramnjagh ár náyátoyénd. 18 Yémofem Yesuene muyafé ár ewerayénd a elawayénd marataye kwéfkwéf méngon. 19 Wénde yéné sémbáran Yurane njafar si résagh árom kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne esawéryéng a enéutoryéng. 20 Yémon emndai, "Nguwanongi, kokayongi wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, a árét yéné tawaufrongi méinyotio totér ghérsamén si."
bt: Then the high burning sacrifice man(high priest) and some his helping people from Saduki group became jealous people. 18 They held the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and put them into the public darkness house. 19 But during that night a man carrying heavenly message of the Lord opened the doors of the darkness house and took them out. 20 He said to them, "Go, stand in the worshipping house courts, and tell the people all about this new life's talk."

nama: Táf njam akw yéfawéryéng fá nélawayénd wáwefnogh méngo sifayat, ndernáye té njafar si résagh árom emndai, a ár watamegh ewafngoyénd.
bt: When morning started(At daybreak) they entered into the worshipping house, how a man carrying heavenly message(angel) had told them, and began to teach the people.

nama: Wénde njam nufaryénd kwéfkwéf méngofaf, yémofem yau ewinjoyénd. Féyo fá néngangoyénd a nafroyénd, 23 "Yéndfem yinjongém kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne manéghkaf, kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh árfé tawakayongérwén sésafnefaf, wénde yéndfem njam esawérngém, efe yau ámb yinjongém kénjún." 24 Njam wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh sénko ár a limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár káyáretau afrogh si, fá katambnawét némé mété nufrota Yesuene muyafé árfefaf.
bt: But when they arrived at the darkness house, they did not see them. So they went back and told, 23 "We saw the door of the darkness house locked, with the guards standing outside, but when we opened them, we couldn't see anyone inside." 24 When the headman of the worshipping house guard and leading burning sacrifice men heard telling talk, they wondered what had happened to the men with Yesu's authority(apostles).

nama: Ámb ár yénmormén norayai, "Kéretangiǃ Yéné ár efe elawangi kwéfkwéf méngon ewakai wáwefnogh méngo sifayan ár ewatametat." 26 Wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh sénko ár nuwanoi yánjo ásáfogh árfé Yesuene muyafé ár enwasroyénd. Yémofem yau wauwirorghe enwasroyénd ménamén fá férfér tamorwén árém mété wíme tawafiyátowét.
bt: A man came said, "Listen! These men who you put in darkness house are standing in the worshipping house courts teaching the people." 26 Woshipping house guarders' headman went with his workers [and] brought the men with Yesu's authority(apostles). They brought them without force because they were afraid the people might stone them.

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár njam enémnjoyénd, yémofem ewakayoyénd Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengégh sáfrére ménát limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom sái tamotau. 28 Fá norayai, "Yéndfem ewaramangém táikér si féfeyot ménát yau sái ewatametat yéné yétkwénan, wénde fémofem féfenjo watameghe Jerusalem té yafongi a yéné téfnan féfenjo mwighaye yényátongi Yesuene krot."
bt: When they brought men with Yesu's authority(apostles), they made them stand before the Ju people's head men's meeting so that the leading burning sacrifice man will asked them. 28 He said, "We gave you.p hard talk(orders) not to teach in this name, but you.p have filled with your teaching in Jerusalem and you make us this reason/resposibity about Yesu's death."

nama: Fité a ámb Yesuene muyafé árém yawangoyénd, "Yénd so kámyongém wafroghét Ngánjánefaf yau árfefafǃ 30 Téfene ákiafene Ngánjánam yanoi Yesu kétándmé kérta-efe fémofem yésmetaménd wafatarégh wénan yamayénd. 31 Ngánjánam yuyoyéng fá yánjo tambén ngángat ndené fété warsagh ár a wanjarégh ár ménát yémon yéné yafrote Israilmén ár so nakenat yéfenjo yaufita a Ngánján so tawalindangé. 32 Yénd fandagh ár yéném yéné yammén, a ndenáyo Ngánján Mbérmbér efe Ngánjánam yéramai yéfeyot efe námyotat yáfaf áyárghét."
bt: Fitè and other men with Yesu's authority(apostles) answered, "We must obey to do to God not to people! 30 The God of our ancestors raised Yesu from the dead-whom you.p killed him by hanging on the cross. 31 God lift him up to his right hand as the ruling man(king) and saving man so that he did this so that Israil people might turn away of their sin and God will forget them. 32 We are watching men about these things, and God Spirit also whom God gave to those who obey to hear him.

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yéné si, fá nékwafé namndayénd a ménde tamorwén krot sái tákmangayénd. 34 Wénde Farasi ár yétkwén témorwén Gamaliel, nák watamegh ár, efe tutémndawét méinyotio árém, fá nokayoi Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengégh kénjún a si ewaramai yéné ár so tautoreyayénd téndot ménát fáro kénjún so korayangayénd. 35 Féyo nokayoi siot yéfefaf, "Israilmén ár, kor kemnangi merkéráye némé fémofem wafroghét yafngongi yéné árfefaf. 36 Ámb efghon, ár kété témorwén yáne yétkwén Téudas, efe kuindawéng nde ndimbal kar témorwén, 400 ár nufnyayénd yáfaf. Wénde fá yésmetaménd, méinyotio yáne waitogh ár nófarnayénd a yáne imángégh yamot nefoi. 37 Yá soramé, Judas Galili yumén nufaryéng yétkwén kayogh efghon, ár mérén tanlimndau nékwafé. Fá wéi yésmetaménd krotio, a yáne méinyotio waitogh ár semormén nófarnayénd. 38 Yéné téfnan yéndo ewawéngsotan fém. Yéné ár tafrangongiǃ Fá so nguwanongi. Némé yau so yafrotamǃ Njam yéfene mwighé o wafroghyam yém árfe tambén, so kefongé. 39 Wénde njam Ngánjáneta yéném, fémofem yéné ár yau so takmbongi, fém fémyo so kawinjongi Ngánjánafé ásmégh ár."
bt: When they heard this talk, they became with anger and wanted to put them to death. 34 But a Farasi man name was Gamaliel, law teaching man, who was respected by every people, he stood up in the Ju people's head people's meeting and gave talk these men be sent outside in order that they will talk in only themselves. 35 Then he stood to say them, "Men of Israil, think carefully what you begin to do these men. 36 One day, there was a man name Tèudas, who deceived that he might be big [head man], 400 people joined him. But he was killed/Note: they killed him/, all his following people were scattered and his movement finished. 37 After him, Judas from Galili region appeared in the days of writing name(census), [and] led the crowd with anger(revolt). He was also killed, and all his followers were scattered. 38 In this/these reason(s) I'm advising you.p. Leave these men! Let them go! Don't do anything! If their thought or action is from people, it will finish. 39 But if it comes from God, you can't stop these men, you will find yourselves [to be] enemies with God.

nama: Yáne si ewanayénd yémofem. Yémofem emotayénd Yesuene muyafé ár kénjút ényawéghét a fá fémogh ewafngoyénd. Féyo yémofem emndayénd fá yau so norayat Yesuene yétkwénan, a fá tangéumyend a nguwanongi.
bt: They took his talk. They called the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) to enter inside and began to whip. Then they said to them not to say in the name of Yesu, and they allowed and they go.

nama: Yesuene muyafé árém yéfrangoyénd Ju sénko árfene áumengégh áuwéghafé ménamén fá Yesuene yétkwén téfnan tékrátan tamorwén. 42 Méinyotio efghon wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a méngomé, fá yau nékmboyénd watameghan a mer si waitoghan Yesu Kerisoenemén.
bt: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) left the Ju head people's meeting(Sanedrin) with joy because the name of Yesu was the reason for their suffering. 42 Every day in the worshipping house courts and house to house, they didn't stop teaching and preaching good talk about Yesu Keriso.

nama: Yéné efghon njam efalo yátogh ár wékeye tárfár káyátotawét, Grik si téfnár tawafnyangérwén yéfefaf káwatarnawét Ibru si téfnárfefaf. Fá korayawét, "Njam fémofem Ibru si téfnár tafénawét njamke kétán kwirafefaf méinyotio efghon, fémofem yau ewarametati féyotaroyan njamke Grik si kwirafet." 2 Féyo yénémamén 12am eumendayénd méinyotio efalo yátogh ár a norayayénd, "Kor yau mbarkánd yém téfeyot Ngánjánene si ásáfogh sái nawaneta ménáyan njamke faloghan. 3 Fútaréf, tawaferngi sefen ár féfenjo kénjúmén efe féfene matkaf em a Ngánján Mbérmbér afoghkaf a káfeté mwighafé. Yéndfem yéné ásáfogh so tawaramangém yéfeyot. 4 Yénd yéndio so karamangém méinyotio efogh Ngánjánafé oraighan a si waitoghan."
bt: In those days when the approving truth people became many quickly, Grik speaking included them people began to complain to the Ibru speaking people. They were saying, "When you.p Ibru speaking people distribute food to widows every day, you are not giving enough food to Grik speaking widows." 2 So the 12 gathered together all approving truth people and said, "It is not straight for us to neglect the ministry of the talk of God in order to share the food. 3 Friends, choose 7 men from among you who are known to be full of the God Spirit and wisdom. We will give this work to them. 4 We ourselves will give our full time in talking with God and in preaching."

nama: Yéné si orayéghmén méinyotio ár náuwetaménd. Yémofem Stifen yaferyénd, yéné ár ndimbal mwighé afoghkaf a Ngánján Mbérmbérafé, ndenéyameyo Filif, Frokorus, Nikanor, Timon, Farmanas a Nikolas kétamamén Antiok yumén efe témorwén Téndo ár soramé náyátoi Ju árfé wáwefnogh ár. 6 Yémofem eramayénd yéné ár Yesuene muyafé árfene ngángat, efe Ngánjánjafé korayawét a ngángé efayoyénd yéfefaf.
bt: Everyone pleased this talk saying. They chose Stifèn, this man full of big mind(faith) and the God Spirit, also Filif, Frokorus, Nikanor, Timon, Farmanas, Nikolas from Antiok region who was outside man become worshipper with Ju people. 6 They gave these men to the men with Yesu's authority(apostles)' hand, who talked with God and laid hands on them.

nama: Féyo Ngánjánene si marat náyátoyéng. Efalo yátogh ár Jerusalemén wékeye tárfár káyátotawét, a ndenéyameyo tárfár ghéngén wárogh ár námyoyénd áyárghét kétán ndimbal mwighafaf. Stifen yerayénd
bt: So the talk of God became wide. Believers in Jerusalem became many quickly, and also many burning sacrifice men(priests) obeyed to the big mind(faith). They held Stifèn

nama: Stifen, yéné ár Ngánjánene ngárám afoghkaf a waftafé, yémon tawafrotau ndimbal sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yam árfene kénjún. 9 Wénde ámb Ju ár kétamamén tamorwén Sairene a Aleksandriamén a Silisia a Esia yumén efe korayawét ndené yénd siyéném Yuwek ár. Yéné ár éwigh nufngoyénd Stifenfé, 10 wénde fá féyotarofnar tamorwén yémafé éwighét ménamén Stifen témorwén káfeté mwighafé a Ngánján Mbérmbéroene muyayan korayau.
bt: Stifèn, this man full of God's grace and power, he did big special workings(miracles) and surprising things among the people. 9 But some Ju people from Sairene and Aleksandria, Silisia and Esia people who called that we are Free men. These men started arguing with Stifèn, 10 but they could not argue with[against] him because Stifèn was with wisdom and spoke in the God Spirit's authority.

nama: Yémofem kwankwane ewaferyénd ámb ár ndené siot, "Yéndfem té yiyárayém Stifen yaufi si korayau Mosesefaf a Ngánjánefaf."
bt: They secretly chose some men to say that, "We have heard Stifèn said wicked talk against Moses and God."

nama: Féyo yéné ende yémofem ewasemnayénd ár, sénko ár, a nák watamegh ár. Yémofem yénmerayénd Stifen yénémnjoyénd Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengégh sáfrére. 13 Yémofem yéfunayénd unyégh si, efe norayayénd, "Yéné ár yau kékmbongé wanyogh si orayégh yéné wáwefnogh méngo sifayamén a nákmén. 14 Yéndfem fété tiyáretawém fá korayau ndené yéné Najaretmén Yesum so yirone yéné sifayé a so ewengote ákiafene nák Mosesém árkéméné té ewafnamoi téfefaf."
bt: So in this way they directed people, the head people, and the teaching men of the law. They held Stifèn and brought before the Ju people' head men's meeting. 13 They produced lying talk, who told, "This man didn't stop talking denying talk for this worshipping house courts and against the law. 14 We already heard him say that this Yesu of Najaret will destroy this place and will change ancester's law which Moses have handed over to us."

nama: Méinyotio efe tamorangérwén Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengéghan Stifen yémofem téfandawét yáne sáf náyátoi ndenanit njafar si résagh árnit.
bt: All who were sitting in the Ju people's head men meeting they looked Stifen [that] his face became like of a man carrying heavenly message.

nama: Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai Stifen, "Yéné wátaranégh efalo em?"
bt: Then the leading burning sacrifice man asked Stifèn, "Are these complaints true?"

nama: Yéné ámoghmén yémo yawangoi, "Fútaréf a afaf, kénáyárangi tafafǃ Minde kwayaghafé téfene Ngánján nufaryéng kétán téfene áki Ebraamefaf njam fá mé témorwén Mesofotamiyan, táf fronde njam fá témorangérwén Aranan. 3 Ngánjánam yémndai, 'Téfrango fenjo yu a fenjo ár, a kuwano kétán árké mband yéndon so kémauyafon.'
bt: To this question he answered, "Friends and fathers, listen to me! With strong light(glory) our God appeared to our ancestor Ebraam when he lived in Mesofotamia, before he lived in Aran. 3 God said to him, 'Leave your land and your people, and go to the land which I will show you.'

nama: "Féyo yémon yéfrangoi Kaldia árfene mband a námnjoi Aranan. Yárefane kér soramé, Ngánjánam yéngwáfáretam fá yéné mbandot ánde fém sénonjo emor. 5 Ngánjánam yau yaramai ámb mband yéna. Wénde Ngánjánam unyéghofnar si yémndai fá, 'Fém a fene ákif fe soramé mband so tawaramangé.' Yéné efghon Ebraam ambumofnar témorwén. 6 Ngánján korayau yáfaf yéné ende, 'Féfene ákif so em dabi ár ámb árfene ndimbal yuwon yau yéfenjo ndimbal yuwon, fá so em árfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a so taftawét 400 yunjéf. 7 Wénde yéndon so tékrátan tékman yéné ndimbal yu faiofnar ásáfoghétro ár eyátotat, a soramé yuwon fá so kéntorngi yéné ndimbal yuta a so wáwefnotat ta yéné sifayan.' 8 Ngánján a Ebraam si yéreinyéménd ghéngan néféghmén. Ebraam nénamndai Aiseke yárefé a ghéngan yanfai 8 efogh yáne áráfégh soramé. Soramé Aisek nénamndai Jeikofe yárefé, a Jeikof nénamndai 12 ambumafene yéferafé.
bt: So he left Kaldia people's land and stayed Aran. After his father died, God sent him to this land where you.p are now living. 5 God did not give any land here. But God said true talk him, 'To you and your descendants after you [God] will give the land.' At that time Ebraam had without-child. 6 God spoke to him in this way, 'Your.p descendants will be foreigner in other people's land, not in your.p land, they will be people's workers and they will mistreat you.p 400 years. 7 But I will put the pain that country that they were workers, and afterward they will come out of that country and will worship me in this place.' 8 God caused/made Ebraam to cut skin. Ebraam became Aisek's father and he cut skin(circumcised) him on the 8 day after his birth. Later Aisek became Jeikof's father, and Jeikof became their father of 12 sons.

nama: "Jeikofene ambumam waramnjagh yafngoyénd yéfenngén Josef, yémofem fá yéramayénd Ijifét faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Wénde Ngánjánafé fá tárwén 10 a Ngánjánam tambetau fá kétándmé méinyotio yánjo kértata. Farawa Ijifmén warsagh árom méndefé téfandau Josef ménamén Ngánjánam yaramai káfeté mwighé, yéné téfnan Farawam yémndai Ijif yu limánéghét a méinyotio yáne méngo.
bt: Jeikof's sons started being jealous of their yonger brother Josef, they gave/sold him to Ijif as without.payment working man (slave). But He was with God 10 and God helped him from all his troubles. Farawa, the ruling man(king) of Ijif liked Josef because God gave him wisdom, in this reason Farawa ordered him to rule Ijif and all his household(palace).

nama: "Féyo káukáu nuyai Ijif a Kanan yuwon, káukáuam yénérsam ndimbal yauyau njamke téfnan a téfene ákif njamkefnar náyátoyénd. 12 Njam Jeikof náyárayéng ndené rais kété tamorwén Ijifén, yémo ewáfáretam yáne ambum efe téfene náyátoyénd ákif fronde yafoghan. 13 Yéfene yénamayo yafoghan, Josefém ewaufroi yánafet efe fá témorwén, a Farawa mat náyátoi Josefene mérénmén. 14 Yéné soramé, Josefem ewáfáretam yárefé Jeikofeyot a yáne méinyotio mérén, 75 méinyotio. 15 Féyo Jeikof néwanoi Ijifét, ánde Jeikof a téfene ákif kér emormén. 16 Yéfene fifi enwangotaménd kétán Sekemét a ekmayénd mbéwé méngon Ebraamém árké yanayéng Amorene ambumta Sekemmén manie.
bt: Then a famine came in Ijif and Kanan area, famine brought big lack of food and our ancestors became without-food. 12 When Jeikof heard that there were rice in Ijif, he sent his sons who became our ancestors on first visit. 13 Their second time, Josef said his big brothers who he was, and Farawa learned about Josef's family. 14 After this, Josef sent them to his father Jeikof and his all family, 75 in all. 15 So Jeikof went to Ijif, where Jeikof and our ancestors died. 16 They brought back their bodies to Sekem and placed them in the grave which Ebraam took/bought from Amor's son at Sekem with money.

nama: "Efogh kaka kénáyátotau Ngánjánam yánjo si efalo sái tiyátongai Ebraamefaf, téfene ár marat té náyáto Ijifén. 18 Féyo totér warsagh ár efe mat yau témorwén Josefenemén nénamndai warsagh ár Ijifén. 19 Yémon yaufiyam tawafrotau téfene ár a tawasérmbotau téfene ákif wáfareghe tawáfáretau ménát yéfene totér ráfégh ambumtértér wighét krot.
bt: The day became near when God would become true(fulfill) his talk(promise) to Ebraam, our people had become widely in IJif. 18 Then a new ruling man(king) who did not know about Josef became the ruling man(king) of Ijif. 19 He mistreated our people and destroyed our ancesters by forcing sent/ordered them to throw out their newborn baby to die.

nama: "Yéné efghon Moses náráftam a Ngánjánene ghékfan fá kéretau mer ambum. Nambio ghérare kénjún yémon tarawenau yárefane méngon. 21 Njam yémon yénmutoryéng, Farawane mérsom yérnyai yandio ambumot. 22 Moses méinyotio káfeté mwighé yatametaménd Ijif árém a témorwén wafté kér ro sian a wafroghan.
bt: At that time Moses was born and he looked a good child in God's eyes. In three months he was cared for in his father's house. 21 When he was put outside, Farawa's daughtor adopted him her son. 22 Moses was taught all the wisdom by Ijif people and he was really powerful in talk and action.

nama: "Njam Moses témorwén 40 yunjéf, yémon mwighé yaitotam yafoghét yánjo Israil árfefaf. 24 Mosesém yinjoi ámb ár Israilmén Ijifmén árom tusérmbotau, féyo fá nuwanoi yá wáutárghét a fai wangoghét Ijifmén ár yésmetam. 25 Moses kéma kemnau ndené yánjo árém kar so tayamngongayénd ndené Ngánjánam fá télimndau yéfe wanjarghét, wénde yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd. 26 Ámb kwéfon Moses yénmormén sómbio Israilmén ár ewinjeyai ásméghan. Yémon yéta krufrát taramwéng yéné sie, 'Ár sómbár, fémro ere fútarfé, fém némamén nawaghanét?'
bt: When Moses was 40 years old, he decided to visit his Israil people. 24 Moses saw Ijif man destroyed(mistreated) Israil man, so he came for the man's helping and avenging him, [and]killed the Ijif man. 25 Moses thought that his people might understand that God led him to save them, but they didn't understand. 26 The next day Moses came to see two Israil men fighting. He tried to make peace them between them by this talk, 'Men, you are friends, why are you hurt yourselves?'

nama: "Wénde yéné árom efe tusérmbotau yá fútar, yémon yéférngotai Moses téndot a norayai, 'Emo fém niyátoi limánégh árot a téfe ghékéf fayoghét? 28 Fémo yénd krot wafngo ndenéyame Ijifmén ár káye fémon yénau tésmete?' 29 Njam Mosesém yéné si náyárai, fá nuwanoi Midian mbandot dábi náyátoi nawerai amaf sómbio ambumafé náyátoi.
bt: But that man who spoiled his friend, he pushed Moses aside and said, "Who made you a ruler and judge over us? 28 Are you going to kill me like as you killed Ijif man yesterday?' 29 When Moses heard this talk, he went to the land of Midian and he became foreigner married and became with two sons.

nama: "40 yunjéf soramé, njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng Mosesefaf kéghat fés kánkékánké kénjúmé fanfne yuwon mband tunakéf yétkwén Sainai kaka. 31 Njam Mosesém yéné fés yinjoyéng, fá sélngwél yémormén. Njamandio fá yéngmormén kaka fandaghét, yémon náyárai Yurane kém: 32 'Yénd wém Ngánján endeyot táwefnotawét féfene ákiam, Ebraam, Aisek, a Jeikof.' Moses ngernger témorwén férférafé fandaghét.
bt: Forty years later, a man carrying heavenly message(angel) appeared to Moses through the flame of bush fire in the desert near Mount name Sainai. 31 When Moses saw this fire, he was amazed. As he went close to see, he heard Lord's voice: 32 'I am the God whom your ancestors, Ebraam, Aisek and Jeikof, worshipped' Moses trembled with fear to look.

nama: "Féyo Yuram yémndai, 'Tafitrar fenjo sandol, yéné sifayé ánde fém némakai siyém njúnnjúnofnar mband. 34 Yéndon té téfandan tane árfene tékrát Ijifén tekfifi. Yénd té kénáyáretan yéfene ye ke a yéné téfnan yénd néneworén yéfe wanjarghét. Sénonjo kuwano, yéndon so kémangon Ijifét.'
bt: Then the Lord said to him, 'Take off your sandols, this place where you are standing is without.dust(holy) ground. 34 I have seen my people's suffering in Ijif in a long time. I have heard their crying sound and in this reason I came down to rescue them. Now go, I will send you to Ijif.

nama: "Yéné Mosesyo féu yém efe yémofem yékenayénd yéné siafé, 'Emo fém téfene limánégh ár a ghékéf fayogh ár niyáto?' Ngánjánam yáfáretam yéfe limánéghét a wanjarghét, njafar si résagh ár kénjúmé efe nufaryéng yáfaf kéghatan. 36 Mosesém enéutoryéng Ijifta, sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yam tawafrotau Ijif kénjún, kété Férkat Árákafan a fanfne yuwon 40 yunjéf.
bt: This was same Moses who they rejected with talk, 'Who made you our head man and judge?' God sent him leading them and saving them, through the man carrying heavenly message who appeared to him in the bush. 36 Moses brought them out of Ijif, did special workings(miracles) and surprising things in Ijif, at there Red Sea and for forty years in the desert.

nama: "Yéné Moses fiyém emo tawaufrotau Israil árét, 'Ngánjánam so yénmáfárete féfeyot Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár ndené yénd swém féfenjo árta.' 38 Fá fiyém efe témorwén Israil árfé káumendawét fanfne yuwon; fá témorwén téfene ákiafé njam njafar si résagh ár efe korayau yáfaf Sainai Mband tunakfan, a yémon Ngánjánene akegh si ewinjoi a téfeyot ewafnamoi.
bt: This is the Moses who told the Israil people, 'God will send you.p a God's man who make know(prophet) like me from your people.' 38 He is the one who was with the people of Israil assembled in the desert; he was with our ancestors when the man carrying heavenly message who spoke to him on Mount Sainai, and he received God's living talks and passed on to us.

nama: "Wénde téfene ákif yau námyoyénd wafroghét a yémofem yékenayénd a fá ménde tamorwén Ijifét angoghét.
bt: But our ancestors didn't obey him and they rejected him and wanted to return to Ijif.

nama: "Yémofem yémndayénd Aron, 'Téfe ténmawafrota némbne ngánján efe so yém téfene limánégh ár. Ménamén yéné ár Moses emo yénmutoryéng yénd Ijifta, yénd mat yau yéném némé nufrotam yáfafǃ'
bt: They told Aron, 'Make us small gods who will be our head man. Because this man Moses who brought us out of Ijif, we don't know what has happened to him.'

nama: "Yéné efghon yémofem yafrotaménd unyéghunyégh mewang ndenanit kau. Yémofem ghéngén tanérsawét kétán a téménd yafrotaménd utmanéghafé némé yéfenjo ngángaye tafrotawét. 42 Wénde Ngánjánam sém ewawengoi a engéumyoi kénd, ghérare, a efogh wáwefnoghét. Ndenaye fété nátém némé té yéfarotaménd Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene bukan, "'Fém Israilmén ár! Fémofem ta yau kwémarsati ghéngén a ramégh rokar 40 yunjfan fanfne yuwon.
bt: On that day they made an lying idol like a cow. They brought sacrifice to it and had a feast in honor of what they made by their hands. 42 But God turned back from them and abandoned them/letted them go to worship the stars, moon and sun. This matches with what is written in the book of the God's people who make know(prophets), 'You Israil people! You didn't bring me sacrifices and offerings during forty years in the desert.

nama: Fémofem té térsati Molek mewangoene némbne farai méngo a féfenjo ngánján Réfan kénd, árké mewangoe fémofem tawefnotati. Féyo yéndon so tawitrombon kétán Babilonét.'
bt: You have taken up the small canvas house of idol Molek and your god of star Rèfan, which idoles you worshipped. So I will remove/send you into exile to Babilon.

nama: "Téfene ákifem térsawét Farai méngo Ngánján ánde korayau fanfne yuwomé. Yéné ásáfogh témorwén Ngánjánam némé yauyafotam Mosese wafroghét. 45 Ámb yunjéf soramé, téfene ákifem emofem yanayénd farai méngo kétándmé yéferafafeta térsawét yémafé fá njam tayotau Josuwafé a yanayénd mband kétándmé ndimbal yuta árké Ngánjánam ewitérmboi yéfene sáfrére. A kété tékmangérwén kétánotio Deifidene efogh nawerai. 46 Deifidém tayamnetau Ngánjánene ménde a yémotai ndené yéndon so yéfrendan Jeikofene Ngánjánene ámnjogh sifayé. 47 Wénde Solomon yémormén emo méngo yérametam yáyot.
bt: "Our ancesters carried the canvas house(Tabernacle) where God say through the desert. It was made according to what God showed Moses. 45 Some years later, our ancestors received canvas house from their fathers when walked with Josuwa and took over the land from the nations which God removed before them. And it stayed there until the time of Deifid came. 46 Deifid knew God's favor and asked that I will prepare living place for God of Jeikof. 47 But Solomon came who built a house for him.

nama: "Wénde Minde tukén Ngánján yau yémor ár wafroghmén méngon. Ndené Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár noraye,
bt: "But the Most High God does not live in houses built by human. As God's man who make know(prophet) says,

nama: "'Yuré noraye, 'Njafar siyém tane limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, a yéné mband siyém tane kafkaf enaghfaf. Fém féyotarofnar em méngo sái yérametati tayot. Yénd méndefnar wém tane enagh sifayat.
