bt: "'The Lord says, "Heaven is my sitting place, and this land is my footstool. You are not able to built my house. I don't need my resting place.

nama: Tane ngángayam ewafrotam méinyotio rokar.'
bt: My hands have made all the things.'

nama: "Fém áyáréghofnar árǃ Fém sem tikéf táikér a téngan dudu efalo sifaf. Fém ndené fété em féferafaf kés em. Fémofem túmén Ngánján Mbérmbér yékarotatiǃ 52 Féfene ákifem esmetaménd méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árǃ Ndenéyameyo yémofem esmetaménd fá efe korayawét Mbarkánd Ároene álighmén, Keriso efe fémofem yékenangi a yesmangi krotio. 53 Fém yéné féyém Ngánjánene nák ewanayénd njafar si résagh ároene kénjúmé wénde yau námyoyénd wafroghét." Stifen wíme yafiyátotat
bt: "You without-hearing people! You have hard heart and ears deaf to the true talk. You are just like your fathers. You have always oppose the God Spirit! 52 Your anscestors killed all God's men who make know(prophets)! Like that they killed them who spoke the coming of the Straight One, Keriso who you.p rejected and killed. 53 You are the ones who received God's law through men carrying heavenly message(angels) but you have not obeyed to do it!" They hit Stifèn with stone

nama: Njam stifén noyarai ndené, Ju sénko ár nékw nawérayénd a sén tangsotawét. 55 Wénde Stifen témorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér afoghkaf, njafar tuk téfandau a Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé yinjoi, a Yesu takayongérwén Ngánjáne tambén. 56 Fá norayai, "Kéretangi, yéndon yéfandan njafar tuk sauréghkaf a Ároene Ambum yakai Ngánjáne tambénǃ"
bt: When Sifèn said that, Ju head men were angry and ground teeth. 55 But Stifèn was full of the God Spirit, looked up to heaven and saw God's strong light(glory), and Yesu standing at the right side of God. 56 He said, "Look, I see heaven opened and the Son of Man standing at the right side of God.

nama: Féyo Yémofem ngángaye ewamoyénd téngan a kutnawét tukén, méinyotio ár nénguférmoyénd yáfaf, 58 tutonawét tesenta a wíme tafiyátotawét. Yéné efghon ghékéf fandagh árém yéfenjo farun sáláme tafitérnawét a totér ambum Solene kafkaf mbanmbanan takmetawét.
bt: Then they put [their] hands over [their] ears and shouted loudly, every people rushed at him, 58 led him out of the town, and throw stones him. In this day the eye watching men(witnesses) took off their own outside clothes and put them at the feet of a young man Sol.

nama: Njam fá tafiyátotawét wíme, Stifen Ngánjánafé koraiwét, "Yuré Yesu, tane mbérmbér tumyo." 60 Féyo Stifen budme niyai nutnai, "Yuré, kémawalindangé yéfene yaufiyam." Fá njam norayai yéné, kér yémormén. |IB04183gr.tif|col||Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide.|Árém wíme tafiyatotawét Stifen, Solém téfandau (Acts 7.58-60)|7.58-60
bt: When they were stoning him, Stifèn talked with God, "Lord Yesu, receive my spirit." 60 Then Stifèn knelt and shouted, "Lord, forget their sin." When he said this, he died.

nama: Sol namyoi stifén tésmetawét kérotio. Yesuene mérén ngimén niroryénd
bt: Sol approved of their killing Stifèn. Because of persecution of Yesu's family(church) they scatterd

nama: Ngánján férférafé árém Stifen yiyatotaménd mbandan a ghérghérsisé tamorwén minde. 3 Wénde Solém yiroréng Yesuene mérén. Fá téngmorwén méngot a ámb méngot, ár a amaf, taweretau a talawetau kwéfkwéf méngot. Filif Samaria kénjún
bt: God fearing men buried Stifèn in the land and were very sad. 3 But Sol was destroying the Yesu's family(church). He went from house to other house, he caught men and women, held them and put into darkness house. Filif in Samaria

nama: Fá efe nófarnayénd si táitotawét yénamé árkamé fá tayotawéng. 5 Filif nuwanoi tesenot Samaria yuwot a si táitotau Kerisoenemén kété. 6 Njam tárfár árém tiyárawét Filif a téfandawét ufarogh yam yémon tawafrotau, fá káyáretawét merkéráye fá némé korayau. 7 Yaufi mbérmbér kétonawét ár tárfár tambén kefé, a tárfár aknyégh ár a wawér ár mer táyátotau. 8 Féyo ndimbal áuwéghafé tamorwén yéné tesenan. Saimon ghar téfnár
bt: Those who were scattered and preached the talk wherever they were travelling. 5 Filif went to cities in Samaria region and preached about Keriso there. 6 When many people were listening to Filif and saw the surprising things he did, they were hearing well what he said. 7 Evil spirits went out from many people with a voice, a many paralyzed people and lame people became good(were healed). 8 So there was big joy in that city. Saimon the sorcery man

nama: Ár yétkwén Saimon kété témorwén emo ghar ngiyam tawafrotau ndimbal tesenan a méinyotio ár tawarsotau sélngwélafé yame Samarian. Fá kawarsau ndené minde waftafé kar témorwén, 10 a méinyotio ár yéné ndimbal tesenan, waftafé ár a waftafnar ár, yémofem tiyáretawét a yéné si korayawét ndenáye, "Yéné ár siyém minde waftafé yém Ngánjánam yéné wafté yaram." 11 Yémofem fá táitotawét ménamén yémon sélngwélafé yam tawafrotau túmén yánjo ghar yame. 12 Wénde njam yémofem efalo yiyátoyénd Filif Ngánján limánéghmén mer si waitoghan a Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénmén, féyo ár a amaf nuan walitogh ewafngoi. 13 Saimoném efalo yiyátoi a nuwan yálitotam. A Filif táitotau méinyotio yuwomé, árkamé tiotau sélngwél témorwén ménáyan ndimbal ufarogh yam a fénaté wafroghyam yémon tafandau.
bt: There was a man name Saimon who did sorcery in the city and deceived them with surprising thing all the people in Samaria with surprising things. He boasted that he was with strong power, 10 and all the people in that city, with.power people and without.power people, they heard and said this talk like that, "This man is with strong power God gave this power to him." 11 They followed him because he did continually surprising things with sorcery. 12 But when they truly approved(believed) in Filif's teaching of good talk of God's kingdom and the name of Yesu Keriso, so men and women began to be baptized with water. 13 Saimon truly approved(believed) and was baptized. And he followed Filif everywhere, surprised by big surprising things and special workings(miracles) he saw.

nama: Njam Yesuene muyafé ár Jerusalemén náyárayénd nde Samaria méngotu árém Ngánjánene si té yumyongi, yémofem engwáfáreménd Fité a Jon kétán Samaria. 15 Njam fá nufareyayénd, Ngánjánafé orayégh tafrowét totér efalo yátogh árfet ménát yémofem Ngánján Mbérmbér so tanangayénd, 16 ménamén Ngánján Mbérmbér yau somé yénmormén yéné árfefaf, fronde fá té árém ewalitotaménd Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan. 17 Fité a Jon ngángé fáyo ewafngeyayénd sénkoyan, yumyoyénd Ngánján Mbérmbér.
bt: When the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) in Jerusalem heard that the people of Samaria country had accepted God's talk, they sent Fitè and Jon to Samaria. 15 When they.d arrived, they.d talked with God for new approving truth people so that they.p will receive the God Spirit, 16 because the God Spirit had not yet come on those people, firstly they had been baptized by people in the name of Lord Yesu. 17 Fitè and Jon began to put their hands upon their.p head, they.p received God Spirit.

nama: Njam Saimoném yinjoi nde Ngánján Mbérmbér té yumyoyénd táf Yesuene muyafé árém ngángé efayeyayénd yéfefaf, yémon mani ewauyafeyai, 19 ndené siafé, "Kwaramend yéné wafté ménát endefefaf yéndon téu efayotan tane ngángé so Ngánján Mbémbér ndenáyo yumyotatǃ"
bt: When Saimon saw that they received the God Spirit when men with Yesu's authority(apostles) laid their hands on people, he offered them.d money, 19 with talk that, "Give me this power so that anyone I lay my hands on people will also receive the God Spirit!"

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Fém fenjo maniafayo so néngém tuot fését fémafayo, ménamén fém nemne Ngánján ramégh wafté kar manie résaghét yém! 21 Fene sifayé yéna yau yém yéné ásáfoghan, ménamén fene tikéf yau yém mbarkánd Ngánjánene sáfrére. 22 Kawengo yéné yaufita a orayégh kufngo Yurafaf ménát so tawalindangé fene yaufi mwighamén. 23 Yéndon fém néfandan waramnjagh ár ném a fenjo yaufiyam némumbetat."
bt: Fitè answered him, "May your money be put to eternal fire(hell)with you, because you thought to buy the gift of God with money! 21 Here is no your place in this work, because your heart is not straight before God. 22 Turn away of this sin and start to talk with God to the Lord, maybe he forget what you have evil thought in your heart. 23 I see you are jealous man and bound by your sins."

nama: Saimoném yawangoi, "Orayégh kufngo Yurafaf tanemén ménát némé fém noraye yau so nufrote tafaf."
bt: Saimon answered him, "Start to talk with God to the Lord for me so that what you said will not happen to me.

nama: Yéné soramé fá Yurane si kafrowét, Fité a Jon nangeyayénd Jerusalemét, mer si taitowét tárfár Samaria méngotuamé. Filif a Etiofiyamén ár
bt: After they.d told Lord's talk, Fitè and Jon went back to Jerusalem, preaching the good talk through many villages of Samaria. Filif and Etiofia man

nama: Yurane njafar si résagh ár norayai Filifefaf, "Kuwano náikái endét, yéné fanfne end kétándmé Jerusalemta kétán Gasa." 27 Féyo yémon áligh yérnyai, a néndkéfan yémon yéfángoi Etiofiyamén ár, mani wanjengégh sénko ár Kandake, yáne fifi warsagh amaf Etiofiyamén. Yéné ár téngmorwén kétán Jerusalemét wáwefnoghét, 28 a fá néngangoi méngotuot téfayongérwén osafene roagh kitarayan, taftau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane buk. 29 Ngánján Mbérmbéram yémndai Filif, "Kuwano kétán yéné osafene roagh kitarafaf a kaka kété fai némor."
bt: An man carrying heavenly message of the Lord said to Filif, "Go south road, that clear(desert) road from Jerusalem to Gasa." 27 So he began to walk, and on the middle he met Etiofia man, head man of watch of moneys of Kandake, its meaning ruling woman(queen) of the Etiopia. This man had gone to Jerusalem for worshipping, 28 and he went back to home was sitting in the chair horse carrier(carriot), he was reading the book of the God's man who make know(prophet) Aisaya. 29 The God Spirit told Filif, "Go to this carriot and stay close to it."

nama: Féyo Filif táf néngenngoi osafene roagh kitarafaf a yiyárayéng ár taftau Aisaya Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároene buk. Filifém yémotai, "Fém mat té náyátote némamén fémon yafte?"
bt: Then Filif ran up to carriot and heard the man reading a book of Aisaya the God's man who make know(prophet). Filif asked him, "Do you understand what you are reading?"

nama: Fá norayai, "Yénd ndernáye mat so káyáton, táfandro ámb árom njam ta wawafena?" Féyo yéné téfnan yémon yumyoi Filif armboghét yémafé ámnjoghét.
bt: He said, "How can I know, unless some man explains it to me?" So in this reason he allowed Filif to come up and to sit with him.

nama: Yéné Buk saté siyém yémo taftau, "Fá télimndawét sifnit kétán ngifaf, a sif tosanit síf néfégh téfnároene sáfrére siofnar, yémon yau yáne mbírmbír yasawéryéng.
bt: This part(passage) of Scripture he was reading, "They led him like a sheep to killing, and as a lamb before the fleece cutting people without-saying, he did not open his mouth.

nama: Fá yewonaménd a yanayénd yáne mbarkánd. Fá ambumofnar yémormén, féyo efe yau so noraye yáne ákiambumafenemén. Ménamén yáne ghérsé té yanayénd yéné mbandta."
bt: They put him down and took his straight/justice away. He was without.children, so no one can speak of his descendants. Because his life was taken from the land."

nama: Árom yémotai Filif, "Ta kwaufro, endenemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár norayai, yánjomén o ámb ároenemén?" 35 Féyo Filifém waitogh yawafngoi yéné Aisayane Buk satayan a yaufroi mer si Yesuenemén.
bt: The man asked Filif, "Tell me, who is the God's man who make know(prophet) talking, about himself or other man?" 35 So Filif began to preach with that passage of Scripture of Aisaya and told him the good talk about Yesu.

nama: Njamandio fá tangérwén endmé, fá nufareyayénd nufaf a árom norayai, "Kéreta, nu siyém. Yénd ménde wém walitoghét." 37 {b{ ...f* {b{8.37 Ámb matyam ár néngemnat: yéné simén si té yém yéna ámb si, wénde tárfár matyam ár yau nemnat. Yéné si siyém, "Filif norayai yáfaf, 'Njam fémo efalo yiyátota Yesu fene kénjúe, fém so táf némalitotan.' Yémo yawangoi, 'Yéndo efalo yiyátotan ndené Yesu Keriso siyém Ngánjánene Ambum.'"
bt: As they.d travelled along the road, they.d reached to some water and the man said, "Look, water is. I'd like to be baptized"{r{ ...f* {r{8.37 Some knowledge men think this: another part of this talk is here in this verse, but many knowledge men think not. This talk is, "Filif said to him, 'If you believe Yesu with all your heart, I can baptize you.' He answered, 'I believe that Yesu Keriso is the Son of God.'

nama: A yémon yémndai wawerégh ár ose résaghmén kémboghét. Féyo Filif a ár nuwot neworeyayénd, a Filifém nuan yalitoyéng fá. 39 Njam fá nénurteyayénd nuta, Yurane Mbérmbéram Filif táf fété yéngwanayéng, a ár yau yinjoi wéikor, wénde néngwanoi endmé áuwéghafé. 40 Wénde Filif nufaryéng Ajotus tesenot a téngmorwén mer si téngwaitotau méinyotio tesenamé kétánotio fá nufaryéng Kaisariat.
bt: And he said to driver to stop the chariot. Then Filif and the man went down into the water, and Filif baptized him. 39 When they.d came out of water, the Lord's Spirit suddenly took Filif away, and the eunuch did not see him again, but went on his way with joy. 40 But Filif arrived at Ajotus town and he went preached the good talk in all the towns until he arrived at Kaisaria.

nama: Sol ménj térnyangérwén Yesuene waitogh ár ngiot. Fá néngwanoyéng limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároefaf 2 a yémon yémotai férénot áumengégh méngofaf Damaskos ndimbal tesenan, ménát yémon njam tinjongai ámb ár a amaf emofem Yesuene End táitotawét, yémon so tangémnjau ndené fété kwéfkwéf méngo ár kétán Jerusalemét. 3 Yémon njam kaka Damaskos yéngiyátoi álighan, táf fété njafarmén kwayaghayam yétremngoi a yarendai fá. 4 Fá nuyáyéng mbandot a sioene kém náyárai ndené, "Sol, Sol, némamén yénd fémon wesmete?" |CN01934B.tif|col||© 1996 David C Cook. Used by permission.|Nambio ár budmé neitat ghékéf wafaréghkaf (Acts 9.4)|9.4
bt: Sol kept on start to kill the Yesu's following people. He went to the leading burning sacrifice man 2 and he asked him for letters to the meeting houses in Damaskos city, so that if he found any men and women who followed the Way of Yesu, he will take them immediately as darkness house men(prisoners) to Jerusalem. 3 When he became close Damaskos, suddenly a light from heaven flashed and surrounded him. 4 He fell to the ground and heard a sound of talk that, "Sol, Sol, why are hitting me?

nama: Sol namotai, "Yuré, efe fém ném?"
bt: Sol asked, "Lord, who are you?"

nama: Sénonjo kokai a kuwano ndimbal tesenot, a ár kété yém yémon so kénémndangé némé so fémon yafrote."
bt: Now get up and go into the city, and there is a man he will tell what you must do."

nama: Yéné ár emafé endmé tangmorwén Solfé nokayoyénd siofnar; fá náyárayénd sioene kém wénde yau efe yinjoyénd. 8 Sol nurtotam mbandta, wénde njam yémon ghékéf esawéryéng yémon némé yau ámb yinjoi. Féyo yémofem ngángayan yerayénd a téngémnjawét Damaskosét. 9 Nambio efogh fá ghékéf kwéfkwéf yémorangérmén, njamke nu yau enetam.
bt: Those men were going through the road with Sol stood there speechless; they heard the sound of talk but did not see any[one]. 8 Sol got up from the ground, but when he opended his eyes he could not see anything. So they took him by the hand and led him to Damaskos. 9 For the three days he was blind, and did not eat or drink anything.

nama: Damaskosén kété témorwén waitogh ár yétkwén Ananias. Yuram yémotai ghékéf waingéghe, "Ananiasǃ" Yémon yawangoi, "Wai, Yuré."
bt: In Damaskos there was a following man name Ananias. The Lord called to him in a eye passover thing, "Ananias!" He answered him, "Yes, Lord."

nama: Yuram yémndai, "Kuwano Judasene méngot Mbarkánd Endmé a kamota Tarsusmén ár yétkwén Sol, fá Ngánjánafé oraighan yém. 12 Ghékéf waingéghe yémon téfandau ár yétkwén Ananias ténmorwén yáfaf a ngángé efayoi a yáne ghékéf nasawéryénd a nawafarnjaménd wéikor."
bt: The Lord told him, "Go to the Judas' house on Straight streets and asked for a man from Tarsus name Sol, there he is in talking with God. 12 In a eye passover thing he saw a man name Ananias came to him and [his]put hands and his [Sol's]eyes opened and got sight again."

nama: Ananiasém yawangoi, "Yuré, yéndon káyáretawén tárfár si yéné ároenemén ménamén yémon tékrát tawarametau fene árfet Jerusalemén. 14 A fá téném yénan si muyafé limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároe tambén ménát yéfe werghét méinyotio efe norayat fene yétkwénan."
bt: Ananias answered him, "Lord, I've heard many talk about this man because he gave the pains to your people in Jerusalem. 14 And he came here with authority from the leading burning sacrifice man in order to arrest them all who says your name."

nama: Wénde Yuré norayai Ananiasefaf, "Kuwanoǃ Yéné ár siyém tane waferéghkaf ménát tane si résaghét Téndo árét a yéfene warsagh ár a Israilmén ár. 16 Yéndon so yauyafotan yáyot nderé mámáfi yémon so yáyarete tane yétkwén téfnan."
bt: But the Lord said to Ananias, "Go! This man is my chosen to carry my talk to the Side people and their ruling men(kings) and to the people of Israil. 16 I will show him how bad he must feel for my name's sake."

nama: Féyo Ananias néngwanoi a nénglawayéng méngo kénjún. Ngángé efayoi Solefaf, fá norayai, "Fútar Sol, Yuré Yesu, efe nufar fefaf endén fém njam kéném endmé yénan, yénd yémon kwémáfárete ménát fém so ghékéf kéreta a kémafongé Ngánján Mbérmbéram." 18 Táf fété ndélindnit nuyai Solene ghékéfta, a néretai. Fá nokayoi a nuan yálitotam, 19 a yáne njamke soramé, yáne muyé nawafarnjam kétánotio. Sol témorangérwén Damaskosén a Jerusalemén
bt: So Ananias went and entered into the house. He put hands on Sol, he said, "Friend Sol, the Lord Yesu, who appeared to you on the road when you were coming here, he sent me so that you might see again and be filled with the God Spirit." 18 Immediately, something like a scale fell from Sol's eyes, and saw. He stood up and was baptized, 19 and after (he ate) his food and his strengh recovered. Sol stayed in Damaskos and Jerusalem

nama: Yémon táf fété si waitogh yérnyai áumengégh méngon ndené Yesu siyém Ngánjánene Ambumǃ 21 Efe méinyotio náyárayénd sélngwél emorméng a namotayénd, "Yéné ár fiyém emo tásmetau Yesuene waitogh ár Jerusalemén. Fá fété téném waitogh árfet werghét ndené fété kwéfkwéf méngo ár limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf." 22 Solene si waitogh minde waftafé káyátotau a Ju ár féyotarofnar tamorwén Fole wawangoghét Damaskosén ménamén yémon tawauyafotau Yesu siyém Keriso.
bt: Immediatly he began to preach in the meeting houses that Yesu is the Son of God!" 21 All who heard him amazed and asked, "This man is the one who was killing Yesu's following people in Jerusalem. He came here to arrest following men as darkness house men(prisoners) to the leading burning sacrifice man. 22 Sol's preaching became very powerful and Ju people in Damaskos without.possible to answer to Fol because he showed Yesu is Keriso.

nama: Tárfár efogh soramé, ámb Ju árém mwighé táitotawét Sole ngiot, 24 wénde Sol mat náyátoi yéfene mwighé. Efogh sémbár fá kumnjotawét tesen sésafnen Sole ngiot. 25 Wénde yánjo waitogh árém yanayénd Sol sémbáran a ndimbal yáfe tewonawét tesen áráke sémta.
bt: After many days, some of Ju people made plans to kill Sol, 24 but Sol learned of their thought/plan. Day and night they watched on the city gates to kill Sol. 25 But his following people took him at night and lowered Sol with a big basket from back of the town fence(wall).

nama: Njam Sol yénmormén Jerusalemét, fá yéta karametau ufnyéghét waitogh árfefaf, wénde fá méinyotio férfér tamorwén yánemén, yémofem efalo yau tiyátotawét nde fá fété yém waitogh ár. 27 Wénde Banabasém yénmasroi Sol kétán Yesuene muyafé árfefaf. Banabasém ewaufroi yéfe ndernáye Solém endén yinjoi Yuré a norayai Yuré yáfaf, a ndernáye Damaskosén yémon si táitotau férférofnar Yesuene yétkwénan.
bt: When Sol came to Jerusalem, he tried to meet with the following men, but they were all afraid of him, they did not truly approve(believe) that he is already a following man. 27 But Banabas brought Sol to the men with Yesu's authority(apostles). Banabas told them how Sol saw the Lord on the road and how Lord said to him, and how he preached without.fear in the name of Yesu in Damaskos.

nama: Sol a Yesuene muyafé árfé tamorangérwén kimndawét férférofnar Jerusalemén, korayau férférofnar Yurane yétkwénan. 29 Sol korayau a kéwitawét Grik si Ju árfé, wénde yémofem yéta ngiot térametawét. 30 Njam efalo yátogh ár mat náyátoyénd yénémamén, yémofem yéngwasroyénd Sol Kaisaria tesenot a yéngwatembayénd Tarsus tesenot.
bt: Sol stayed with men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and moved around without fear in Jerusalem, saying without fear in the name of the Lord. 29 Sol talked and argued with the Greek-speaking Ju people, but they tried to kill him. 30 When approving truth people learned of this, they took Sol to Kaisaria city and sent him away to Tarsus city.

nama: Féyo Yesuene mérén yénamé Judia, Galili yu a Samaria, yémofem tayamnetawét krufrát yéné efghon. Ngánján Mbérmbéram tawáutánau muyafé sái kamndangayénd, ár tárfár káyátotawét a Yurane férférafé tamorangérwén. Enias a Dorkas
bt: Then the Yesu's family(church) throughout Judia, Galili region and Samaria, they enjoyed the peace in that time. There were strengh and encouragement of the God Spirit, many people added and lived with the fear of the Lord. Enias and Dorkas

nama: Njamandio Fité karendau ámb yuwomé, fá kété néngwanoi Ngánjánene efalo yátogh ár yafoghét Lida méngotuot. 33 Kété yémon yinjoi ár yétkwén Enias, aknyégh ár efe yéknyangérmén 8 yunjéf. 34 Fité norayai yáfaf, "Enias, Yesu Kerisom fém mer so kényátonga. Kokai a fenjo yame tékna." Táf fété Enias nokayoi. 35 Méinyotio efe kété tamorangérwén Lidan a Saronén, fá yinjoyénd a awengogh nufngoyénd Yurafaf.
bt: While Fitè went around some area, he went there to visit God's approving truth people to Lida village. 33 There he saw a man name Enias, paralyzed man who was paralyed for 8 years. 34 Fitè said to him, "Enias, Yesu Keriso will make you good. Get up and rolled up your mat." Immediately Enias stood up. 35 All those who lived in Lida and Saron, they saw him and began to turn into the Lord.

nama: Jofa tesenan kété témorwén waitogh ár amaf yétkwén Tabita, Grik yétkwéne siyém Dorkas, emo túmén tawafrotau mer yam a tawáutánau yauyau ár. 37 Yéné efghon amaf enjne nawerai kér yémormén, a yáne fifi nue yumbnaménd a yarmboyénd méngo kénjút. 38 Lida méngotu témorwén Jofa tesen kaka, féyo njam waitogh ár náyárayénd ndené Fité témorwén Lida méngotuan, yémofem ewáfáreménd sómbio ár yáfaf a taufrend yá, "Wékeye álighét."
bt: In Jofa city there was a following man(disciple) woman name Tabita, Greek name is Dorkas, who was always doing good things and helping the poor. 37 At that time woman felt sick and died, and they washed her body with water and laid it up in the house. 38 Lida village was near Jofa city, so when the following men heard that Fitè was in Lida village, they sent two men to him and told him, "Come quickly!"

nama: Fitaf néngwanoyénd yémafé, a njam fá nufaryénd, fá néngarmboi méngo kénjút. Méinyotio kwiram yarendayénd fá, ye kendawét a tauyafongi sáláme a ámb sáláme Dorkasém árké enamndam njam yémafé mé ghérsé tamorwén.
bt: Fitè returned with them, and when he arrived, they took him up into the house. All the widows surrounded him, crying and showing him clothes and other clothing which Dorkas made while she was still alive with them.

nama: Fitam fá méinyotio eutonam méngo saté kénjúta, féyo fá budme niyai a Ngánjánafé koraiwét. Nde fá néngawengoi kér amafoefaf, fá norayai, "Tabita, kano." Táf fété Amafom ghékéf ensawéryéng, a féyo amofom yéfandayéng Fité a námnjoi. 41 Yémon ngángayan yérai a yamarotai okayoghét. Féyo yémon emotayéng Yesuene efalo yátogh ár a kwiré, ewauyafoi yéfeyot ghérsé amaf. 42 Kér anoghmén si marat náyátoi yénamé Jofa tesenamé a tárfár árém efalo Yuré yiyátoyénd. 43 Fité yémorangérmén Jofa tesenan tárfár efogh yémafé wérár ghéngan watorégh árfé yétkwén Saimon.
bt: Fitè sent them all out from the inside of the room, then he knelt down and talked with God. Then he turned toward the dead woman, he said, "Tabita, get up." Immediately woman opened [her] eyes, and then woman saw Fitè and she sat up. 41 He hold her with hand and supported her get up. Then he called the approving truth people and wodows, showed them living woman. 42 The story about raising from the death became wide to all over Jofa city and many people truly approved(believed) in the Lord. 43 Fitè stayed in Jofa city for many days with a man [who] took the skin animal skin(tanner) name Saimon.

nama: Kaisaria tesenan ár yétkwén témorwén Konelias, Rom fiyarafene sénko ár emo tawanjetau 100 fiyaré yéné yétkwén siyém Italiamén fiyaré mérén. 2 Fá méinyotio yánjo mérnafé tamorwén Ngánján férférafé ár a wáwefnogh ár; yémon tawarametau rokar marataye yéfe áronjagh árfet a túmén Ngánjánafé koraiwét. 3 Ámb efghon séite witmé karéf 3 aklokan yáfaf nofatanam ghékéf waingégh yam. Yémon yinjoi Ngánjánene njafar si résagh ár, efe yénmormén yáfaf a yémndai, "Koneliasǃ"
bt: At Kaisaria city there was a man name Konelias, a Rom solidiers' headman who was taking care of 100 soldiers this name is Italia soldiers group. 2 He was God-fearing man with all his family and was worshipper; he gave things widely to those in need and always talked with God. 3 One day afternoon about three o'clock, he had a eye passover thing(vision). He saw a man carrying heavenly message(angel) of God, who came to him and said to him, "Konelias!"

nama: Koneliasém yinjoi férférafé a yémotai, "Némé yém, Yuré?"
bt: Konelias saw him in fear and asked him, "What is this, Lord?"

nama: Sénonjo ár tawáfáreta Jofa tesenot ár yétkwén Saimon yá wangoghét efe ámb yétkwén yanmotat Fité. 6 Fá tamorarwén Saimonfé, wérár ghéngan watorégh árofé, endene méngo arakaf téndon témorwén."
bt: Now send men to Jofa city to bring back a man name Saimon who people call other name Fitè. 6 He is staying with Saimon, a leather maker with animal skin(tanner), whose house is by the sea."

nama: Njam njafar si résagh ár efe korayau yáfaf néngolindai, Koneliasém ewanmeyai yáne sómbio faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Ngánján férférafé fiyaré. 8 Koneliasém si ewaufrotam yéfeyot méinyotio némé kufrotau yáfaf a soramé engwáfáretai fá Jofa tesenot. Fitam yéfandam ghékéf waingégh yam
bt: When the man carrying heavenly message(angel) who spoke to him disappeared, Konelias called his two without.payment working men(servants) and a God fearing soldier. 8 Konelias told them all what happened to him and sent them off to Jofa city. Fitè saw eye passover thing(a vision)

nama: Ámb efghon séite karéfta Koneliasene faiofnar ásáfogh ár tangmorwén endmé a kaka tengiyátotawét Jofa ndimbal tesen, Fité narmbotam méngo semsotot ámnjogh sifayat Ngánjánafé orayéghét. 10 Fité siogham yifoi njamke nénet, a njam njamke frengéghkaf tamorwén, yémon ghékéf waingéghe téfandawéng ámb yam Ngánjáneta. 11 Yémon yinjoi njafar nasawéryéng a ámb yam ndené kéretau marat sálámenit kénewonau fo mband kwéndkwénd féyotaroyan. 12 Yéné marat sálámeyan kété tamorwén méinyotio fénataye wérár a fute aroghagh wérár a men. 13 Féyo Ngánján norayai yáfaf, "Kokai, Fité. Fémon tásmeta a eneta." |IB04195gr.tif|col||Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide.|Fitane ghékéf waingégh (Acts 10.9-12)|10.9-12
bt: The next day about noon Konelias's without.payment working men(servants) were on the way and coming near the town, Fitè went up on sitting place on the roof to talk with God. 10 There he felt hungry, and wanted something to eat, and while food were preparing, he saw a eye passover thing from God. 11 He saw the heaven opened and something looked like wide clothes coming down by 4 corners to the land. 12 In this wide clothes there were all different animals and animals crawling with belly(reptiles), and birds. 13 Then God said to him, "Get up, Fitè. kill and eat."

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yau, Yuré. Yéndo yaufifi enetamén tayot ufi yém."
bt: Fitè answered him, "No, Lord. I never eat somethings to bad to me."

nama: Ngánján norayai yáfaf wéikor ndené, "Yau. Fémo so enete. Yau noraya ndené mámáfi em némé Ngánjánam ewafrota mer."
bt: God spoke to him again that, "No. You should eat it. Don't say that bad what God has made them good."

nama: Yéné yam nufrotam nambinotma, a táf fété yéné sáláme yénamayo nangoi njafarot.
bt: These things happened three times, and suddenly this clothe went back into heaven.

nama: Njam Fité mé katambnau ghékéf waingéghoene fifimén, ár engwáfáretam Koneliasém fá namotayénd ánde Saimonene méngo yém a nékmboyénd méngo sésafnefaf. 18 Fá namotayénd, "Yéna wan téfnár yém yáne yétkwén Saimon Fité?"
bt: When Fitè was still confusing about the meaning of the eye passover thing(vision), the man sent by Konelias they asked where Saimon's house was and stopped at the gate of house. 18 They called, "Is there a guest here his name of Saimon Fitè?"

nama: Njam Fité mé kemnau yéné ghékéf waingéghmén, Ngánján Mbérmbéram yémndai, "Saimon, nambio árém fém néronjat. 20 Féyo kokai a kewor. Yau nautémnda yémafé álighét, ménamén yéndon tanwáfáretan fá."
bt: While Fitè was still thinking about the eye passover thing, the God Spirit said to him, "Saimon, three men are looking for you. 20 So get up and go down. Don't hesitate to go with them, because I have sent them."

nama: Fité néneworyéng a yéné ár emndai, "Yénd yéné fwém fémofem efe yéronjati. Némamén fém taném?"
bt: Fitè came down and said to this men, "I am the man who you are looking for. Why have you come?"

nama: Yéné árém yawangoyénd, "Yénd téném kétándmé Konelias Rom fiyaré sénko ároe tambén. Fá siyém mbarkánd a Ngánján férférafé ár, efe yutémndat méinyotio Ju árém. Njúnnjúnofnar njafar si résagh árom yémndai ár tangwáfáreta yáne méngot ménát yémon so niyárete némé fém so noraye." 23 Féyo Fitam eumyoi yéné ár yáne méngot. Féyo yáne wan téfnár náyátoyénd. Fité kété Koneliasene méngon
bt: These men answered him, "We came from Konelias Roman soldiers head man(the centurion). He is a straight and God-fearing man, who all the Ju people respect. A without.dust(holy)/holy man carrying heavenly message told him to send people to his house so that he can hear what you will say." 23 So Fitè invited these men to his house. So they became his guests. Fitè there at Konelias's house

nama: Ámb efghon Fité nufaryéng Kaisaria tesenot. Konelias kawanjetau yáyot a eumendai méinyotio yáne mérén a kaka fútaréf. 25 Njam Fité nénglawai méngot, Koneliasém yéfángoi a yáwefnoi yáne kafkafot utmanéghafé. 26 Wénde Fitam yéméindai fá anoghét a yémndai, "Kokai, yau wáwefnota tayot. Yénd ndené fété wém fém yéf ném."
bt: The next day he arrived at Kaisaria city. Konelias was waiting for him and called all his family and close friends. 25 When Fitè entered his house, Konelias met him and fell at his feet with respect[worshiped him]. 26 But Fitè caused/made him rise and said to him, "Got up, don't worship me. I'm definitely just as you are."

nama: Fité a Konelias koraiwét, yéné soramé Fité nénglawai méngo kénjút ewinjoi ár mérén. 28 Fité norayai yéfefaf, "Fém Téndo ár mer mat em téfene Ju árfene nák, Ju ár yau so Téndo árfene méngot nélawetat a nawaréindat Téndo árfé. Wénde Ngánjánam ta té wauyafoi yéndon efe yau so kénkarotangén ndené fém ném yaufi o njúnnjúnafé. 29 Yénémamén njam fémofem tangwáfáretati tafaf, yénd kwéném ámoghofnar. Yénd namotan féfefaf, 'Némamén yénd fémofem kwarawetati?'"
bt: Fitè a Konelias were talking [together], after this Fitè went inside and found people group. 28 Fitè told them, "You Side people know well our Ju people's law, Ju people should not enter a outside man's house and should not associate with Side people. But God has shown me that I should not reject that you are bad or with dirty. 29 So when you.p sent for me, I came without question. I ask you.p, "Why did you.p call me?"

nama: Koneliasém yawangoi, "Fo efogh soramé yénd kwémorwén tanjo méngo kénjún Ngánjánafé oraighan yéné efoghféneféneyan, 3 aklok séite karéf. Sunsune ár nufaryéng álálégh sálámeyafé tane sáfrére. 31 A njafar si résagh ár norayai, 'Konelias, Ngánján té náyáré fene Ngánjánafé orayéghmén a némawafarote fene rokar raméghmén yauyau árét. 32 Ár tawáfáreta Jofa tesenot Saimonefaf efe yanmotat Fité. Fá siyém wan téfnár Saimon, wérár ghéngan watorégh ár, endene méngo yém arakaf téndon.' 33 Féyo yéndon tangwáfáretan feyot táf fété, a nderé mer yém fém kés kéném. Sénonjo yénd méinyotio yéna yéném Ngánjánene sáfrére ménát méinyotio si áyárghét Yuram fém kénmáfárete téfe waufroghét."
bt: Konelias answered him, "Before four days I was talking with God in my house this time, 3 o'clock in the afternoon. Suddenly a man appeared with shining clothes in front of me. 31 And the man carrying heavenly message(angel) said, "Konelias, God heard your talking with God and remembered your giving things(gifts) to the poor. 32 Send people to Jofa city to Saimon who they call Fitè. He is a guest of Saimon animal skin tanning man, who is(lives) beside the sea.' 33 So I sent for you at once, and it was good of you to come. Now we are all here before God to listen every talk what the Lord sent you to tell us."

nama: Féyo Fitam si yérnyai: "Yéndon sénonjo yáyamngon efalo yém Ngánjánam yau yuyafote witmaro ménde yam 35 wénde eumyote ár méinyotio yumén emofem férférafé yéfandat fá a ewafrotat némé yém mbarkánd. 36 Fém si mat em Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam Israil árfefaf, táitotau mer si krufrátmén Yesu Keriso kénjúmé, efe Yuré yém méinyotio árét. 37 Fém mat em némé kufrotawét Judia kénjúmé, nénarnyai kété Galili yuwon walitogh soramé Joném si táitotau. 38 Ndernáye Ngánjánam yaferyéng Yesu Najaretmén Ngánján Mbérmbére a waftaye, a ndernáye fá tiyotawéng mer tawafrotau a mer táyátotau méinyotio fá efe tamorwén Sáifroene wafté mbanmbanan, ménamén Ngánjánafé fá tárwén.
bt: Then Fitè began to speak: "I now realize [that] it is true God does not show way only some part like 35 but accepted from every nation those who fear him and do what is straight. 36 You.p know the talk God sent to the people of Israil, preached the good talk of the peace through Yesu Keriso, who is Lord of all people. 37 You.p know what has happened throughout Judia, beginning in Galili region after the baptism Jon preached. 38 How God chose Yesu of Najaret with God Spirit and power, and how he went around doing good and healing all who were under the power of the Sáifèr(Satan), because God were.d with him.

nama: "Yénd fandagh ár yéném méinyotio yammén yémon stawafrotau Ju yuwon a Jerusalemén. Yémofem yésmetaménd fá yénamayo yamayénd wafatarégh wénan, 40 wénde Ngánjánam yanoi fá kérta nambio efogh soramé ménát fandaghét, 41 méinyotio árém yau yinjoyénd, wénde fandagh árémro efe Ngánjánam tándái ewaferyéng, ndené yénd emafé tánetawém njamke a nu yémafé soramé fá nanoi kérta. 42 Yémon yénémndayéng yénd si waitoghét árét a afroghét ndené fá siyém ámbiro efe Ngánjánam yaferyéng ndené fété mogh ár ghérsé a kér árét. 43 Méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém nafrotat yánemén ndené méinyotio árém emofem efalo yiyátotat fá tawalindangé yéfene yaufimén yáne yétkwén kénjúmé."
bt: We are watching men of everything he did in the land of Ju people and in Jerusalem. They killed him through that they hung him on a cross, 40 but God raised him from dead three days later to be seen, 41 all the people did not see him, but only watching men whom God appointed long time ago saw, that is, we ate and drink with him after he rose from dead. 42 He commanded us to preach to the people and to tell that he is the one who God appointed as judging man of the living and the dead. 43 All the prophers tell about him that every people who truly approves(believes) in him found he forget sins through his name."

nama: Njamandio Fité mé korayau yéné si, Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng yéfefaf efe méinyotio káyáretawét yéné si. 45 Ju efalo yátogh ár efe té nénuwanoyénd Fitafé sélngwél emormén ndené Ngánján Mbérmbéroene tambén té nasuryéng ndenéyameyo Téndo árét, 46 ménamén yémofem táyáretawét fá ámb yumén sie korayawét a tuwetawét Ngánján.
bt: While Fitè was still speaking these talk, the God Spirit came down to them all who heard this talk. 45 The Ju approving truth people who came with Fitè were amazed that the gift of the God Spirit in the same way had been poured out on the outside men, 46 because they heard them speaking in other talks(languages) and praising God.

nama: "Yémofem té yanangi Ngánján Mbérmbér ndené fété yéndfem. Árké árom yau so takmbongé nu walitoghét." 48 Yénémaménnde yémon emndai fá fété so ewalitote Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan. Féyo yémofem yamnendayénd Fité ámnjoghét yémafé nambio efghotro.
bt: "They had received the God Spirit just as we did. No one can stop them from being baptized with water." 48 Therefore told them be baptized in the name of Yesu Keriso. Then they asked Fitè to stay with them for a three/few days.

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár a efalo yátogh árém Judia yuwomé náyárayénd ndené Téndo árém ndenéyameyo yanangi Ngánjánene si. 2 Njam Fité néngwanoyéng Jerusalemét, Ju efalo yátogh árém tanangotawét fá 3 a norayai, "Fém tangém Téndo árfene méngot a yémafé tánetati njamke."
bt: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and the approving truth people thoughout Judia region heard that the Side people also received the talk of God. 2 When Fitè went back to Jerusalem, Ju approving truth people rebuked him 3 and said, "You.s went to the house of Side people and ate food with them."

nama: Fitam tawaufrotau méinyotio si yéfefaf némé kété kufrotau kétándmé ufrogh, 5 "Yénd kwémorwén ndimbal tesenan Jofan Ngánjánafé oraighan, a yéndo yinjoyén ghékéf waingégh yam. Yéndon yinjoyén ámb rokar ndenanit marat sáláme kénewonau kétándmé njafarta fo kwéndkwéndafé, a kénewonau kétán yénd ánde kwémorwén. 6 Yénd néngretayén kénjút ewinjoyén fo ghambérafé wérár, munjan wérár, fute aroghagh wérár a men. 7 Yénd náyárayén si kwémndetau ndené, 'Kokai, Fité. Tásmeta a táneta.'
bt: Fitè said all talk to them what had happened there from the beginning. 5 "I was in the town of Jofa in talking with God, and I saw a eye passover thing. I saw something like a wide clothes coming down from heaven by 4 corners, and it came down to where I was. 6 I looked into it [and] saw animals with 4 legs, wild animals, crawling animal with belly(reptiles) and birds. 7 I heard talk telling me that, "Get up, Fitè. Kill and eat them.'

nama: "Yénd nuwangoyén, 'Yau, Yuré. Njúnnjúnafé a fenjfenjafé wérár yau nélawai tane sénfnet.'
bt: I answered, "No, Lord. With dirty and with dust animal has not entered my mouth."

nama: "Ngánján norayai kétamé njafarta wéikor, 'Yau. Fémo so enete. Yau noraya ndené mámáfi em némé Ngánjánam ewafrota mer.' 10 Yéné yam kufrotau nambinotma, a yéné sáláme yénamayo nangoi njafarot wéikor.
bt: God said from heaven again, "No. You should eat it. Do not say what God has made them good." 10 This happened three times, and that clothes went up to heaven again.

nama: "Táf fété nambio ár efe enwáfáretaméng tafaf kétándmé Kaisaria tesenta nékmboyénd méngon ánde yénd kwémorangérwén. 12 Ngánján Mbérmbéram wémndayéng yau nautémnda álighét yémafé. Yéné siks fútarfé ndenáyo nénuwanoyém yéndfé, a yénd nénglawayém Rom fiyaré sénko ár Koneliasoene méngot. 13 Koneliasém yénmaufroi téfe ndernáye yémon yinjoi njafar si résagh ár yane méngon a yéné njafar si résagh ár norayai, 'Ár ewáfáreta kétán Jofa tesenot Saimonefaf efe yanmotat Fité. 14 Fitam so féfe enwarse si árké kénjúmé fém a méinyotio mérén so kawanjarngi.'
bt: Suddenly three men who had been sent from Kaisaria city stopped at the house where I was staying. 12 The God Spirit told me not hesitate to go with them. These 6 friends also went with me, and we entered Rom soldier's head man Konelias's house. 13 Konelias told us how he saw a man carrying heavenly message in his house and that man carrying heavenly message said, 'Send the people to Jofa town to Saimon who they called Fitè. 14 Fitè will carry you.p talk through which you and all your family/household will be saved.'

nama: "Njamandio yéndon yérnyayén si, Ngánján Mbérmbér yénmormén yéfefaf ndenéyameyo ndernáye yémormén téfefaf frondeyan. 16 Féyo yénd nawafarotayén némé Yuré norayai, 'Joném tawalitotau nue, wénde fém so ewalitote Ngánján Mbérmbére.' 17 Kwayaghayan yéné yém ndené Ngánjánam ewaramai yéfe ndené sáfot tambén téfe sinmaramai, emofem efalo yiyátoyém Yuré Yesu Keriso; yénémamén yéndo yau so tékmbongayén némé Ngánjánam tafrotau."
bt: "As I began to speak, the God Spirit came to them in the same way how it came to us at first. 16 Then I remembered what Lord said, 'Jon baptized with water, but you.p will be baptized with the God Spirit.' 17 It is in the light(clear) that God gave them the same kind gift he gave us, who truly approved(believed) in the Lord Yesu Keriso; therefore I was not going to stop what God was doing.

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yénémamén, fá nékmboyénd éwigh a Ngánjánro tuwetawét, korayawét, "Féyo Ngánjánam mwighé ewaramai Téndo árét yaufita awengoghét ghérsat." Yesuene mérén Antiok tesenan
bt: When they heard this, they stopped objecting [and]only praising God, said, "So then God gave thought to the Side people to turn away from sins to life." The Yesu's family(church) in Antiok city

nama: Fá efe té nófarnayénd ménáyan Stifenene ngian soramé eyotaméng ndenáye Fonisiya, Sáifras, a Antiok, tawaufrotawét si Ju árfetro. 20 Wénde ámb ár kétamamén Sáifras a Sairene tesenmén, nuwanoyénd kétán Antiokét a si yérnyayénd Téndo árét, yéfe tawaufrotawét mer si Yuré Yesuenemén. 21 Yurane ngángé témorwén yéfefaf, a tárfár téndo árém efalo yiyátoyénd a nawengoyénd yéfene yaufita Yurafaf.
bt: Those who had been scattered by Stifèn's death went like as Fonesia, Saifras, and Antiok, telling talk to Ju people only. 20 But some people from Saifras and Sairene cities, went to Antiok and began to speak good talk to Side people about the Lord Yesu. 21 The Lord's hand was with them, and many Side people truly approved(believed) and turned from their sins to the Lord.

nama: Njam Yesuene mérén náyárayénd Jerusalemén yénémamén ndené tárfár téndo ár nawengoyénd Yurafaf, féyo yémofem yéngwáfáretaménd Banabas kétán Antiok tesenot. 23 Njam fá néngufaryéng a yinjoyéng Ngánjánene frengégh, fá áuwéghan témorwén a tawawéngsotau fá méinyotio ménát efalo sái em Yurafaf méinyotio yéfenjo tikfe. 24 Banabas témorwén mer ár, Ngánján Mbérmbérafé a ndimbal mwighé wafoghkaf, yémon tárfár ár tánémnjau kétán Yurafaf.
bt: When the Yesu's family(church) in Jerusalem heard about this [that] many Side people turned to the Lord, so they sent Banabas to Antiok city. 23 When he arrived and saw God's blessing, he was in joy and he encouraged all of them to be true to the Lord with all their hearts. 24 Banabas was a good man, full of God Spirit and big mind(faith), he brought many people to the Lord.

nama: Féyo Banabas nuwanoyéng kétán Tarsus tesenot Sole ronjaghét, 26 a yémon njam yinjoi Sol, Banabasém yénmasroi fá kétán Antiok tesenot. Ámbiro méinyo yunjéf, Banabas a Sol tafángowét Yesuene mérén a tawatamewét tárfár ár. Waitogh ár tawanmotawét árém frondefifi Kerisoene ár Antiok tesenan.
bt: Then Banabas went to Tarsus city to look for Sol, 26 and when he found Sol, Banabas brought him to Antiok city. For a whole year, Banabas and Sol met with Yesu's family(church) and taught many people. People called the following men first as Keriso's People(Christian)at Antiok city.

nama: Yéné efghon ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár tanmorwén kétándmé Jerusalemta Antiok tesenot. 28 Ámb ár yétkwén Agabus nokayoyéng Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé norayai ndené minde káukáu so marataye yém Rom yuwon. (Yéné nufrotam táf Klaudiusene limánégh efghon) 29 Waitogh árém mwighé yéfaronaménd wáutárghét yéfe fútarét efe tamorangérwén Judia yuwon. 30 Yémofem eumendaménd mani a eramayénd kétán Banabas a Sol, emofem engérsaménd kétán sénko árfefaf Judia yuwon.
bt: At that day some God's people who make know(prophets) came from Jerusalem to Antiok city. 28 One of them name Agabus stood up [and] through the God Spirit he said that a big famine would spread over Roman county. (This happened during the time when Klaudius was leading.) 29 The following men wrote mind(decided) to help their friends who lived in Judia area. 30 They collected the money and gave it to Banafas and Sol, who took it to the head men in Judia area.

nama: Yéné efghon warsagh ár Erodém ewerai ár Yesuene mérénmén kemnau yéfe ngiot. 2 Erodém fiyaré ewafáretai Jone yánngén Jemse ngiot witmafé sénté naifaye krot. 3 Njam Erodém Jems kérotio yésmetam káuwétawét Ju ár, féyo néngwanoi Fité werghét wéikor. Yéné kufrotau táf Minaghofnar flawé témndan. 4 Werégh soramé, Erodém yénglawai Fité kwéfkwéf méngot, yéngwafnamoi 4 fiyaré mérén kénjúmé ámbiro mérnan 4 fiyaré tamorwén, méinyotio 16 fiyaré. Erod nemnai yá utorghét moghét yéné Waingégh téménd soramé.
bt: At that time the ruling man(king) Erod caught people from the Yesu's family(church), thinking to kill them. 2 Erod sent/ordered soldiers to kill Jems, the brother of Jon with a sword to death. 3 When Erod killed Jems make happy Ju people, so he also went to arrest Fitè. This happened during the festival of bread [made] without yeast. 4 After arresting, he put him in darkness house, guarding with 4 groups of soldiers which one group had 4 soldiers, totally 16 soldiers. Erod thought to bring him out for asking(trial) after the Passover feast.

nama: Féyo Fité kwéfkwéf méngon télawangérwén, wénde Yesuene mérén ndimbal kéráye oraighan Ngánjánefaf tamorwén yánemén.
bt: So they put Fitè into darkness house, but the Yesu's family(church) was really big talking with God for him.

nama: Yéné sémbáranyo Erodém mwighé yéfaronam yáfaf sái ténémnjawét moghét, Fité tékmangérwén sómbio fiyarafene néndkéfan, sómbio seinafé, ámb ghékéf fayogh ár tawakayarwén sésafneyan. 7 Sunsune Yurane njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng kwayaghé natremngoi kwéfkwéf méngo kénjún. Yémo yésmai Fité kwasayan a yanoyéng a témndangé "Kano wékeyeǃ" a sein nuyáyénd Fitane ngángata.
bt: That same night Erod thought mind(decided) to bring him to the court, Fitè was sleeping between the two soldiers, with two chains, and some guards stood at the door. 7 Suddenly a man carrying heavenly message of the Lord appeared and a light shone into the darkness house. He struck Fitè on the side and woke him up and said, "Get up quickly!" and the chains fell off his hands.

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh árom témndangé fá, "Kawo fenjo sáláme a sandol." A Fitam ewafrotam yéné yam. Njafar si résagh árom yémndai, "Fenjo sálámeye káfyar a kwénmaito." 9 Fitam yéngwaitoi néngtoreyayénd kwéfkwéf méngota, wénde fá yau mat témorwén némé njafar si résagh árom tafrotau wénde fété kufrotau; fá kéma kemnau nde ghékéf waingégh kar témorwén. 10 Yémofem engwaindangeyayénd frondemén a yénamayomén ghékéf fayogh ár mérén a nénafleyayénd tot téfén sésafnefaf árké end témorwén ndimbal tesenot. Fáyo nasawéryéng yéfeyot, a néngwaneyayénd endmé. Fá njam tangérwén yéné endmé, sélngwéle njafar si résagh árom yéfrangoi.
bt: Then the man carrying heavenly message(angel) said to him, "Tie/Put on your clothes and sandols." And Fitè did these things. The man carrying heavenly message said, "Put on your clothes and follow me." 9 Fitè followed him they.d went out of the darkness house, but he did not know what the man carrying heavenly message was doing but really happened; he thought it might be a eye passover thing. 10 They.d passed the first and second guarding people group and came to the iron gate which was road to the city. It opened them by itself for them.d, and they.d went through the road. When they had walked through that road, suddenly the man carrying heavenly message left him.

nama: Fité mwighat nangoi a norayai, "Sénonjo mat náyáton atambaréghofnar nde Yuram ténmáfárete njafar si résagh ár ta wanjarghét kétándmé Erodene ngángata a kétándmé méinyotio Ju árfene kamnangta."
bt: Fitè came back to his senses and said, Now I know without a doubt that the Lord has sent his man carrying heavenly message to rescue to me from Erod's hands and from every Ju people's hope."

nama: Njam yémon yéné yáyamngoi, fá nuwanoi Meriene méngot Jon Make yátmé, ánde tárfár ár káumendawét Ngánjánafé orayéghét. 13 Fité áutárégh kufngongé sésafneyan, a ásáfogh mérés yétkwén Roda néngaflai sésafnefaf uwangoghét. 14 Njam mérsom yáyamngoi Fitane kém, mérés yémormén áuwégham yáindai, fá néngangoi wérseye sésafne sauréghofnaye a néngorayai, "Fité sésafnefaf yémǃ"
bt: When he realized this, he went Meri's house, the mother of the Jon Mak, where many people gathered for talking with God. 13 Fitè began to knock in the gate, and working girl name Roda came to answer it. 14 When girl recognized Fitè's voice, joy came surpassed her, she ran back quickly without opening door and told, "Fitè is at the door!"

nama: Yémofem témndangi, "Fe mwighayam némauwéinde!" Njam fá mé kafrotau ndené efalo fété yém, fá norayayénd, "Mété táf njafar si résagh ár yém yá wáutárghét."
bt: They told her, "Your mind is tricking you." When she kept talking that it is true, they said, "It must be a man carrying heavenly message(angel) for helping him."

nama: Wénde Fité ménjtaye mé káutanau. Njam yémofem sésafne yésawéryénd a yinjoyénd Fité, fá sélngwél emormén. 17 Fitam ngángaye engwaunyai métar a tawawalinjotau ndernáye Yuram yénmutoryéng kwéfkwéf méngota. Fá norayai, "Tawaufrongi Jems a ámb fútarét yénémamén." A féyo fá táf nuwanoi ámb yuwot.
bt: But Fitè kept on knocking. When they opened the door and saw Fitè, they were amazed. 17 Fitè motioned with hand for them to be quiet down and described them how the Lord had brought him out of darkness house. He said, "Tell Jems Yesu's younger brother and the other friends about this." And then he went to another place.

nama: Ámb akwan kété ndimbal atambarégh témorwén fiyarafefaf némé nufrotam Fitafaf. 19 Soramé Erodém yéta ronjagh yafngoi wénde yau yinjoi Fité, yémon mogh ghékéf fayogh ár ewafngoi a krot takmetau. Erod kér yémormén
bt: The next morning there was big counfusion among the soldiers what had happened to Fitè. 19 Later Erod tried to start to find Fitè but did not see him, he started to ask/court to the guards and put them to death. Erod was died

nama: Erod nékw témorwén Taire a Sidon Yumén árfefaf, yénémamén fá nuwanoyénd mérne Erode fandaghét. Fronde yémofem yamnendayénd Blastus, Erodene méngo wanjéngégh sénko ár ménát yéfe wáutárghét. Féyo fá nuwanoyénd Erodefaf a yamnendayénd yau so ménjtaye tékmbotau njamkemén ménamén túmén Taire a Sidon Yu tarsawét njamke warsagh ár Erodene ndimbal yuta.
bt: He was angry to the people of Taire and Sidon country, so they went together to see Erod. Firstly they asked Blastus, the chief of guard of Erod's house in order to help them. Then they went to Erod and asked not keep on stopping food because the country of Taire and Sidon always were taking food from the ruling man Erod's country.

nama: Ufoghmén kwéfon Erod numanetaméng yáne yétkwén sáláme, námnjoi yánjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a marataye si térametau árfefaf. 22 Fá nutnayénd, "Yéné siyém ngánjánene si kém, yau ároene." 23 Táfandio, ménamén Erodém áuwégh yau tawangotau Ngánjáne, féyo Yurane njafar si résagh árom yésmai fá, féyo Erod ndéndam néne yafngoyénd a kér yémormén.
bt: On the appointed day Erod dressed in his titlename cloth; sat on his ruling sitting place and gave a public talk(speech) to the people. 22 They shouted, "This is the voice of god, not of a man." 23 Immediately, because Erod did not give praise to God, so a man carrying heavenly message of the Lord struck him, so worms began to eat Erod and he died.

nama: Wénde Ngánjánene si mulmulafé kanotau a marat káyátotau.
bt: But the talk of God grew with healthy and became wide.

nama: Njam Banabas a Sol yéfenjo ásáfogh yifeyayénd, fá kénangowét kétándmé Jerusalemta kétán Antiokét yémafé Jon Mak.
bt: When Barabas and Sol had finished their.d work, they returned from Jerusalem to Antiok with Jon Mak.

nama: Antiokén Yesuene mérén kénjún kété tamorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a watamegh ár. Fá tamorwén Banabas, Saimon kwéfité ár, Luses Sairia tesenmén, Manayen(efe Erodene kaka fútar témorwén), a Sol. 2 Yémofem njam táwefnotawét Yurai awafarmanéghafé, Ngánján Mbérmbér norayai, "Tafalend tayot Banabas a Sol ménát ásáfoghét yéndon árké ménát ewafereyayén." 3 Féyo yéfene awafarmanégh a Ngánjánafé orayégh soramé, yémofem ngángé efayoyénd yéfefaf a nuwaneyayénd. Fol a Banabasfem mer si taitowét Saifrusén
bt: In the Yesu's family(church) of Antiok there were God's people who make know(prophets) and teaching men. They were Banabas, Saimon [called] black [skin]man, Luses from Sairia city, Manaen(who was close relatives of Erod), and Sol. 2 When they were worshiping the Lord with fasting, the God Spirit said, "Set apart Banabas and Sol for me for the work which I chose for them.d." 3 So after their fasting and talking with God, they laid hands on them and sent them.d off. Fol and Banabas preached them good news at Saifrus

nama: Fá sómbio nuwaneyayénd yéfenjo endmé Ngánján Mbérmbéran, nuwaneyayénd kétán Selusia tesen a karaiwét kétándmé kétán Saifrus tesenot. 5 Njam fá nufareyayénd kétán Salamis tesenot, yémofem Ngánjánene si waitogh yafngeyayénd Ju árfene áumengégh méngomé. Jonfé tamorwén yéfene wáutárégh ár. |nmx_195wbt - Paul journey 1 [bwf-light] @en_v3.tif|col||© 2025 Wycliffe Bible Translators, Inc.|Folene fronde áligh (Acts 13.4—14.28)|13.4—14.28
bt: They two went on their way in the God Spirit, went to Selosia town and traveled to Saifrus town from there. 5 When they.d arrived to Salamis town, they.d began to preach the talk of God through the Ju meeting houses(meeting houses). They were with Jon [as]their helper.

nama: Fá karendawét méinyotio yuwomé kétánotio nénufaryénd Fafos méngotuot. Kété yémafé nafángoyénd Bar-Yesu. Fá témorwén Ju ghar téfnár a unyégh si afrogh ár. 7 Fá yáyot kásáfotau Sargius Faulus, efe témorwén minde matyamafé a témorwén Rom fiyarafene sénko ár yéné yuwon. Sargius Faulus ménde témorwén Ngánjánene si áyárghét a yémon ewáfáretam yéfefaf Banabas a Sol. 8 Wénde ghar téfnár Elimas (yéné siyém Bar-Yesuene yétkwén fifi yém) taufotau a yéta tawengotau gafanane ndimbal mwighé. 9 Féyo Sol, efe tanmotawét Fol, Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf, néretai mbarkánde yáfaf Elimas a korayangé, 10 "Fém sném Sáiférene ambum a méinyotio mbarkándoene mék téfnárǃ Fém sném méinyotio yaman warsogh ár a unyégh ár. Kékmbo, Yurane mbarkánd yamta yau ewasemna ár unyéghe! 11 Sénonjo Yurane nékwam so kémanangé. Fém so ném ghékéf kwéfkwéf, a yéné efghétro fémon yau so yéfande efghoene kwayaghé."
bt: They traveled around whole region until they arrived at Fafos village. There they met Bar-Yesu. He was a Ju sorcery man and false word telling man(prophet) name Bar-Yesu. 7 He worked for Sergius Faulus, who has many knowledge and was the head man of Rom soldiers in this land. Sergius Faulus wanted to hear the talk of God and he sent them to/for them Banabas and Sol. 8 But sorcery man Elimas(this is meaning of Bar-Yesu's name) told him and tried to turn away from the big mind(faith) of the big man. 9 Then Sol, who was also called Fol, filled with the God Spirit, looked straight him at Elimas and said, 10 "You are the child of Sáifèr and the fighting man(enemy) of all straight! You are full of all kinds of deceit and liers. Stop, do not turn away people from Lord's straight way with lying! 11 Now the Lord's anger will get you. You will be blind, and for a while you can't see the light of the sun.

nama: Njam Rom fiyarafene sénko árom yinjoi némé kufrotau, fá sélngwél yémormén Ngánjánene si watameghan, yémon táf efalo yiyátoi Yuré. Fol a Banabasfem mer si taitowét Antiok tesenan Fisidia ndimbal yuwon
bt: When the Rom soldiers' head man saw what had happened, he was amazed at the teaching of the God's talk, he truly approved(believed) in the Lord. Fol and Banabas preached them good news at Antiok city in Fisidia big area(district)

nama: Kétándmé Fafosta, Fol a yáne mérnafé tayotawét ndimbal boute kétán Fargat Famfilia kénjún, wénde Joném efrangoi a kangotau kétán Jerusalemét. 14 Kétamé Fargata fá nuwanoyénd Antiok tesenot Fisidia ndimbal yuwon. Safatan fá nélawayénd áumengégh méngot a námnjoyénd. 15 Mosesene nák a Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene si wafégh soramé, Ju árfene áumengégh méngo limángégh árém si yéngwatembayénd yéfefaf, "Fútaréf, njam féfefaf wawéngsogh si yém yéné árét, féyotaro korayangi."
bt: From Fafos, Fol and with his group traveled with big boat to Fargat in Famfila, but Jon left them and went back to Jerusalem. 14 From Fargata they went on to Antiok city in Fisidia big area. On the Safat they endered Ju people's meeting house(synagogue) and sat down. 15 After reading the law of Moses and the God's man who make know(prophet)'s talk, the head men of meeting house sent the talk to them, "Friends/Brothers, if you have any talk of encouragement for these people, please speak."

nama: Fol nokayoyéng, ngángé euyoi a tamndangé, "Israilmén ár a fém Téndo ár emofem Ngánjáne yáwefnotati, kénáyárangi tafafǃ 17 Israil árfene Ngánjánam ewaferyéng téfene ákif a marat ár eyátoyéng táf fá stamorangérwén Ijif kénjún, a Ngánjánam yánjo waftaye eutoryéng, elimai fá yéné yuta, 18 fá mé kawamarotau yéfene yaufiyaman kétánotio 40 yunjéf fanfne yuwon, 19 yémon ewasérmbotam sefen ndimbal yu Kananén a mband ewaramai yuré náyátoyénd. 20 Méinyotio yéné yamam yénérsam 450 yunjéf.
bt: Fol stood, lift up his hand and said, "People of Israil and you Side people who worship God, listen to me! 17 The God of the Israil people chose our ancesters and made the people wide during their staying in Ijif, and God took them out and led from that country with his power, 18 he kept on enduring their sins until 40 years in the desert, 19 he destroyed 7 nations in the land of Kanan and gave the land and make them become the owners. 20 All of this way took about 450 years.

nama: Fá nómnendayénd warsagh árot, a yémon ewaramai Kisene ambum Sol, Benjamin mérénmén, emon elimndam 40 yunjéf. 22 Wénde Ngánjánam Sol yitérmboi a yémon yasoi Deifid yéfene warsagh árot. Fá norayai yánemén, 'Yéndon yinjoyén Deifid Jesiene ambum, yéné ár efe tane tikéfmén yém, yémon so ewafrote méinyotio yam tane ménde némat yém.'
bt: The people asked for the ruling man(king), and he gave them Sol son of Kis, from the tribe of Benjamin, who ruled 40 years. 22 But God removed Sol and he made Deifid their the ruling man(king). He said about him, "I found Deifid son of Jesi, this man who is with my heart, he will do everything I want him to do.'

nama: "Kétándmé yéné ár mérénta Ngánjánam enwarsam Israil árét Ghérsé urtogh ár Yesu, ndené fété fá nénorayai unyéghofnar si. 24 Soramé Yesuene ufarégh, Joném fronde si táitotawéng yaufiyam awengoghmén a nu walitoghmén méinyotio Israil árfefaf. 25 Joném njam yáne ásáfogh tifotau, yémon tamndangé, 'Fém ndernáye nemnati yénd efe wém? Yénd yau wém Keriso. Wénde fá siyém ta soramé yéném, endene sandol ferghét yénd féyotarofnar wém.'
bt: From this man's family God has brought to Israil poeple the life saving Man(Savior) Yesu, as he said without lying talk(promise). 24 Before appearing of Yesu, Jon first preached turning away from sin and washing with water(baptism) to the all the people of Israil. 25 When Jon was finishing his work, he said, 'Who do you think I am? I am not Keriso. But he is coming after me, whose sandols I am not enough to untie.'

nama: "Fútaréf, Ebraamene ambumtértér, a fém Ngánján férférafé Téndo ár, téfeyot yéné wanjarégh si ténmáfáretat. 27 Jerusalemén ár a yéfene limánégh árém yau yáyámngoyénd Yesu endenemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénorayawét. Wénde yémofem ngi yafngoyénd Yesu, yéné si efalo káyátotau némé Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém kénorayawét árké taftawét méinyotio Safatan. 28 Yémofem yau yinjoyénd téfén yáne krot, wénde yémofem yamnendayénd Failet yá ngiot.
bt: "Friendly/Brothers, Ebraam's children, and you God fearing Side people, they sent this mssage of salvation to us. 27 The people in Jerusalem and their head men did not recognized Yesu as the one the God's people who make know(prophets) had spoken about. But they started to kill Yesu, [and] this talk became true what the God's people who make know(prophets) said which are read every Safat. 28 They could not find the reason for his death, but they asked Failet to kill him.

nama: "Njam yémofem ásáfogh yafrotaménd méinyotio yéné bukan árké tékayarwén yánemén, yémofem yeworyénd wafatarégh wénta a yélawayénd mbéwé méngon. 30 Wénde Ngánjánam yanoi fá kétándmé kérta, 31 a tárfár efogh fá nufaryéng yéfefaf emafé tayotau kétándmé Galili yu kétán Jerusalem. Fá fem sénonjo yáne ghékéf fandagh ár Israil árét.
bt: When they had done all in this books which were written about him, they took him down from the cross and put him in a grave house. 30 But God raised him from death, 31 and for many days he appeared to those who hade traveled with him from Galili region to Jerusalem. They are now his eyes.watching men to the people of Israil.

nama: "Yéndfem ewaufrotam féfe mer si, Ngánjánam némé nénorayam unyéghofnar si téfene ákifefaf 33 Ngánjánam té tawafrote téfeyot, yéfene ákiambumat, ménaye Yesu kés yanoi. Ndené fété kés yékai yénamayo Sams bukan, "'Fém ném tane Ambum, sénonjo yénd nénáyáton fene Afé.'
bt: We tell you.p the good talk, what God said without lying talk(promise) to our ancestors 33 God has done(fulfilled)for us, for their descendants, by raising up Yesu. As it is written in the second Sams buk, 'You are my Son, today I have become your Father.'

nama: Ngánjánam fá yanoi kérta, yénémamén yau so nornde, némé noraye yéné sian, "'Yéndon so tawaraman njúnnjúnofnar a efalo frengégh némé té nénorayam Deifidefaf.'
bt: God raised him from death, then will not be decayed, what he said in this talk, "I will give the without.dust(holy) and true blessing what had said to Deifid."

nama: Ámb Sams bukan yéné yékai, "'Fémon yau so tumyo fenjo Njúnnjúnofnar Ambum kérkfot.'
bt: In another Sams buk it is written, "You will not allow your Without.dust Son to be rotten."

nama: "Njam Deifidém Ngánjánene ásáfogh tawafrotau yánjo ár satafaf, fá táf kémégh nakmai, fá esareyayénd yákifé a yáne fifi norndam. 37 Wénde ámbiro ár efe Ngánjánam yanoi kérta yau norndam.
bt: "When Deifid did God's work to his generation, he died, he was buried with his ancestors and his body spoiled. 37 But the one man who God raised from death did not be spoiled.

nama: "Yénémaménnde, tane fútaréf, yénd ménde wém fém mat kamndangi ndené Yesuene kénjúmé wawalingégh yém féfene yaufimén. 39 Emo efalo yiyátota Yesu, Ngánjánam so tanmongé fá siyém mbarkánd ár, yau Mosesene náke so yém. 40 Kor nawarawenati fémǃ Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém árké yammén korayawét yau so féfefaf nufrote:
bt: "Therefore, my brothers, I want you.p to know that through Yesu the forgetting of sins is told to you.p. 39 Who truly approves(believes) in Yesu, God will call him straight man, it won't by the law of Moses. 40 Be careful! Don't let which thing the God's people who make know(prophets) have said happen to you.p,

nama: "'Fém Ngánján karogh ár, sunsunan kér so em, némamén yéndon so ewafrotan ámb yam féfene efghon fémofem efalo yau so eyátotati, ndemamén ámb árom so kémaufrongé feyot.'"
bt: " You people [who are]rejecting God, will die in wondering , because I will do something in your days [that] you would not truly approve(believe), even though someone will tell you."

nama: Njamandio Fol a Banabasfem téfrangowét Ju árfene áumengégh méngo, árém eumieyayénd fá kor ámb Safatot siot. 43 Njam ár mérén kófarnawét, tárfár Ju ár a Téndo árém ewáiteyayénd Fol a Banabas, efe korayawét yémafé a ewamnendangeyayénd fá ménát mé sái engérnyang Ngánjánene ngárám kénjún.
bt: As Fol and Banabas left the Ju people's meeting house, the people invited them.d to speak again on the next Safat. 43 When crowds was spreading, many of Ju people and outside men followed Fol and Banabas, who talked with them and urged them to stay in the grace of God.

nama: Ámb Safatan ndenanit témorwén méinyotio tesen kar káumendawét Yurane si áyárghét. 45 Njam Ju árém ewinjoyénd ár mérén, fá waramnjagh mwighayam ewafoi a si karogh yafngoyénd némé Fol korayau. 46 Féyo Fol a Banabasfem ewawangeyayénd yéfe férférofnaye, "Yénd so fété noraiwam Ngánjánene si féfefaf Ju árfefaf fronde. Ménamén fémofem yékenati a nawafénmetati fémyo féyotarofnar em tuot ghérsé résaghét, yéndfem fém so tafrangem a kuwanem Téndo árfefaf. 47 Yénat yénd ténmafarewé Yuram, "'Yéndon fém té eyáteyayén kwayaghé yéfe téndo árét, ménát fémofem so yérset wanjarégh kétánotio mband ánde yiyato.'"
bt: On the next Safat almost every people in town gathered to hear the talk of the Lord. 45 When Ju people saw the crowds, they were filled with jealousy and began to argue against what Fol said. 46 Then Fol and Banabas answered them withour fear, "We have to speak the talk of God to you Ju people first. Because you reject it and judge yourselves are not able to to receive eternal life, we.d will leave you.p and go the Side people. 47 The Lord gave us this , I have made you a light to them the Side people, in order that you will take salvation to the ends of the earth."

nama: Njam Téndo árém náyárayénd yéné si, fá áuwéghan tamorwén a kánjo tarametawét Yurane simén; a efe méinyotio ewaferyéng tuot ghérsat efalo yiyátoyénd.
bt: When the Side people heard this talk, they were in joy and gave thanks the Lord for the talk; and all who [God] chose for eternal life truly approved(believed)."

nama: Yurane si marat náyátoi méinyotio yuwomé. 50 Wénde Ju árém sénanégh ewafngoyénd tesenmén limánégh ár a Ngánján férférafé ndimbal amaf. Yémofem Fol a Banabas ngi ewafngeyayénd a ewitreyayénd yéfene yuta. 51 Féyo yéné téfnan yémofem kafkaf ngwérméng esenangeyayénd matyamot yéfefaf a nuwaneyayénd Ikonium méngotuot. 52 A waitogh ár áuwégham ewafoi a Ngánján Mbérmbéram.
bt: The talk of the Lord became wide through the whole region. 50 But Ju people began to be against head men in the city and God fearing big women. They started a persecution against Fol and Banabas and threw them out of their region. 51 So in this reason they.d shook the dust from their feet as a warning to them and went to Ikonium village. 52 And the following people were filled with joy and with the God Spirit.

nama: Ikonium yu kénjún Fol a Banabas túmén tangérwén Ju árfene áumengégh méngot. Kété fá koraiwét sotafé Jumén a téndo yumén ndimbal ár mérnafefaf Ngánján efalo yiyátoyénd. 2 Wénde yéné Ju ár efe nakenayénd Ngánjáne efalo yátoghét norayayénd Téndo árfefaf a tawasérmbotawét yéfene mwighé sénanégh ewafngeyayénd Fol a Banabas. 3 Féyo Fol a Banabas teke kété tárwén, koraiwét férférofnar Yurai, a Yuramyo ngárámmén si tékmetau safén ndené efalo yém ménáyan tawafrowét ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam. 4 Tesenmén ár nafaloyénd; ámb Ju árfeta, ámb Yesuene muyafé árfeta. 5 Féyo Téndo ár a Ju ár mérne nafghayénd yéfenjo sénko árfé ménát Fol a Banabasfe ngiot. 6 Njam Yesuene muyafé ár mat náyáteyayénd yénémamén, fá nitreyayénd kétán Likonia yuwot Listran a Derbe tesen a ámb kaka yuwomé, 7 kété wéikor yéngérnyeyayénd mer si waitogh. |CN01961B.tif|col||© 1996 David C Cook. Used by permission.|Fol si táitotau Ju árfene áumengégh méngon (Acts 14.1)|14.1 Fol a Banabas taitowét mer si Listran a Derbe tesenan
bt: At Ikonium area Fol and Banabas continually went to the Ju people's meeting house. There they.d spoke strongly to a big number of Ju people and Side people [so] they truly approved(believed) God. 2 But these Ju people who rejected to truly approve(believe) God said to the Side people and were spoiling their mind to began to be against Fol and Banafas. 3 So Fol and Banabas stayed there a long time, spoke for the Lord without fear, and the Lord himself made clear that the talk of the grace is true by they.d were doing showing things(signs) and surprising things(wonders). 4 The people of the city were divided; some with the Ju people, other people with the people with Yesu's authority. 5 Then Side people and Ju people gathered together with their head men in order to kill Fol and Banabas. 6 When the (two)men with Yesu's authority(apostles) knew about it, they.d fled to the cities of Likonia in Listra and Derbe country and the other close area, 7 there they started again to preach the good talk. Fol and Banafas preached the good talk In Listra and Derbe city

nama: Listra tesenan kété ár témorangérwén aknyégh ár, efe tékmangérwén wawér kétándmayo áráfégh yau tiyotawéng. 9 Yémon tiyáretau Fol sian. Fol néngretai mbarkánde yáfaf, a yawinjoi yáne ndimbal mwighé mer yátoghét 10 a témotangé, "Kokai mbarkánde fenjo kafkafeǃ" Táf fété ár natnam tukét a áligh nufngoyéng.
bt: In Listra city there was a man crippled, who had been lame from birth and had never walked. 9 He listened to Fol's talk. Fol was looking directly him, saw that he had big mind(faith) to become good 10 and called out, "Stand up straightly with your feet!" Immediately the man jumped up and began to walk.

nama: Njam ár mérnam yinjoyénd sélngwélafé yam némé Folém yafrotam, fá kutnawét Likonia sie, "Efalo sómbio ngánján té néneworend téfefaf árnitǃ" 12 Banabas témndangi Jeus, yáne fifi Grik sie ndimbal ngánján a Fol témndangi Ermes yáne fifi Grik sie si sénko ár. 13 Jeusene wáwefnogh méngo témorwén tesen téndota, ghéngén wárogh ár enwanai kau a mbumbu kétán tesen sésafnefaf ménamén fá a ár mérén ménde tamorwén ghéngén ramghét yéfeyot.
bt: When the crowds saw the surprising thing what Fol did, they shouted with Likonia language, "Two real gods have came down to us like men!" 12 Banabas they call Jeus, its meaning in Greek language big God and Fol they called Ermes, its meaning in Greek language is word head man. 13 Jeus's worshipping house was outside the city, burning sacrifice men(priest) brought cows and flowers to the city gates because he and the crowds wanted to offer sacrifices to them.

nama: Wénde njam Yesuene muyafé ár Banabas a Fol náyáreyayénd yénémamén, yémofem eftráreyayénd yéfenjo sáláme a néngenngeyayénd ár mérnafefaf, kutnawét, 15 "Fútaréf, némamén fémofem yéné yafrotati? Yénd yénre ár, ndené fété fém sem. Yéndfem enwarsuwam féfeyot mer si, ménát awengoghét kétándmé fifiofnar yamta kétán akegh Ngánjánefaf, emo ewafrotam njafar, mband, arakaf a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún. 16 Tándái yémon engéumyoi méinyotio ár yéfenjo méndeye néngwanoyénd, 17 wénde yémon yau efrangoi ambino wénde yémon mé tawauyafotau meryam ménaye nu raméghe kétándmé njafarta a njamke raméghe yéfenjo wérwéran a yémon mé nouséne yéfeyot tárfár njamke a yéfene tikéf yafote áuwéghét." 18 Ndemamén yéné sie, Fol a Banabas emnyangménd ár mérén yau so ghéngén tarametawét yéfeyot, wénde yau témorwén afrát yéfeyot ménát sái tawanauwét kétamé sái tafrowét.
bt: But when the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) Banabas and Fol heard about this, they.d tore their clothes and ran out among the people, shouting, 15 "Friends, why are you.p doing this? We are only human, just like you.p are. We have come to bring you good talk, in order to turn from these without.meaning ways to the living God, who made the heaven, the earth and the sea and everything in these. 16 A long time ago he allowed all the people to go by their own will, 17 but he never left them forever but he showed good ways continually by giving you rain from heaven and food in their season and he kept on providing you with plenty of food and filled your hearts with joy." 18 Even with these talks, Fol and Banabas caused the crowds not to offer a sacrifice to them, but it was not easy to block them from doing it.

nama: Féyo ámb Ju ár enmormén kétándmé Antiok a Ikonium tesenta a ár ewasemnaménd Fol a Banabasfé ngiot. Yémofem wíme tafiyátotawét Fol a téroghawét fá tesenta yutoryénd, kéma kemnawét fá kér kar yémormén. 20 Wénde yéné soramé waitogh árém yarendayénd Fol, fá nurtotam a néngwanoi tesen kénjút. Ámb efghon Fol a Banabas néwaneyayénd Derbe tesenot. Fol a Banabas kangowét Antiokét Sirian
bt: Then some Ju people came from Antiok and Ikonium city and directed people to kill Fol and Banabas. They hit Fol with stone and dragged him, took him from the city, thought he might die. 20 But after this following men surrounded Fol, he got up and went back into the town. The next day Fol and Banabas went to Derbe city. Fol and Banabas went back to Antiok in Siria

nama: Yémofem taitowét mer si Derbe tesenan a tárfár ár náyátoyénd waitogh ár. Féyo fá kangowét Listra, Ikonium a Antiokét, 22 muyé tawaramwét waitogh árét a tawawéngsowét ménát fá mé sái efalo em ndimbal mwighayan. Yémofem tamndend, "Yénd mé so yénngém tárfár táikér yam kénjúmé ménát Ngánján limánégh élaughét." 23 Fol a Banabasfem ekafeyayénd Yesuene mérén wáutárégh ár yéfeyot fénatayero Yesuene mérnot. Orayéghe a awafarmanéghe, fá ewateménd Yurafaf endefaf yéfene méghmégh témorwén. 24 Soramé tangérwén Fisidia yuwomé, fá enérmén kétán Famfilia yuwot, 25 a yémofem si waitogh yafngeyayénd Ferga yuwon, yéné soramé fá néngwaneyayénd Atalia tesenot.
bt: They preached the good talk in Derbe city and many people became following men. Then they went back to Listra, Ikonium and Antiok, 22 strengthened following men and encouraged them in order that they continue to be in true big mind(faith)(faith). They.d said, "We must go through many troubles continually to enter the ruling of God." 23 Fol and Banabas appointed Yesu's family(church) helpers(head people) for them in each Yesu's family(church). With talking with God and fasting, they committed them to the Lord in whom they had put their hope. 24 After going through Fisidia area, they came to Famfilia area, 25 and they.d started to preach in Ferga area, after that they.d went to Atalia city.

nama: Kétándmé Ataliata fá ndimbal boute kangowét Antiokét. Antiok yéné sifayé témorwén ánde fronde efalo yátogh ár karamangayénd fá ménát Ngánjánene ngárám ngángayam so tawafrotau Ngánjánene ásáfogh. Yéné sómbio árém ewifeyayénd ásáfogh némé té ewarameyayénd. 27 Antiok nufareyayénd, yémofem eumendangeyayénd Yesuene mérén a tawaufrowét méinyotio Ngánjánam némé tawafrotau yéfe kénjúmé a ndernáye Ngánjánam yésawéryéng ndimbal mwighé sésafne Téndo árét. 28 A fá kété teke emorarmén waitogh árfé.
bt: From Atalia they went back to Antiok by big boat(ship). Antiok was the place where before believers gave/committed them to God's grace hand to do God's work. These two people completed the work which was given to them. 27 They.d arrived at Antiok, they.d gathered Yesu's family(church) and told all what God had done through them and how God had opened the door of big mind(faith) to the Side people. 28 And they.d stayed there a long time with following men.

nama: Ámb ár enmormén Judiata Antiokét a efalo yátogh ár tawatametawét: "Táf féfene ghéngan yau njam tánfangi, ndené Mosesene nákam yénémndete, yau so kawanjar." 2 Yéné watamegh yamam eméindangeyai Fol a Banabas éwighét yémafé yéné watameghmén. Fol a Banabas ekafeyayénd a ámb efalo yátogh árfé, angoghét Jerusalemét Yesuene muyafé ár fandaghét a ámb sénko árfé yéné watameghmén. 3 Yesuene mérénam engwatembayénd Fol a Banabas tangmorwén yénamé Fonisiya a Samariamé, a yémofem ewaufroyénd ndernáye Téndo ár té kawengotat. Yéné siam eméindayéng méinyotio efalo yátogh ár áuwéghét. 4 Fá njam nufaryénd Jerusalemét, Yesuene mérénam a Yesuene muyafé ár a ámb sénko árém eumieyayénd Fol a Banabas, endefet yémofem tawaufrowét méinyotio yammén Ngánjánam némé tafrotau yéfe kénjúmé.
bt: Some men came from Judia to Antiok and was teaching approving truth people: "If you didn't be cut your skin(circumcised), as Moses's law said, you cannot be saved." 2 This teaching caused/brought Fol and Banabas arguing with this teaching. Fol and Banabas were appointed with other approving truth people, to go to Jerusalem to see the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and other head people about this teaching. 3 The Yesu's family(church) sent Fol and Banabas through Fonisia and Samaria, and they.d told how the Side people had turned [to God]. This talk made all approving truth people to be happy. 4 When they.d arrived at Jerusalem, Yesu's family(church) and men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and other head people welcomed Fol and Banabas, to whom they.d told everything what God had done through them.(d).

nama: Féyo ámb efalo yátogh ár efe tawafnyangérwén Farasi mérénmén nokayoi a tamndangé, "Téndo ár so fété ghéngan enfetat ndenáye Mosesene nákam kés noraye."
bt: Then some of approving truth people who belonged to Farasi group stood up and said, "The Side people must be cut skin(circumcised) just as the law of Moses said."

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár a ámb sénko ár náumendayénd yéné watamegh simén. 7 Yéné watamegh si tombé warunyégh soramé, Fité nokayoi a korayangé yéfefaf: "Fútaréf, fém mat em ndené tándái Ngánjánam waferyéng féfene kénjún ménát téndo árém sái káyárangi tane mbírmbírta mer si a efalo tiyátongi. 8 Ngánján, efe mat yém árfene tikéf, ewauyafote ndené yémon eyátote téndo ár ménaye Ngánján Mbérmbér raméghe ndené fété téfe kés yénmaramai. 9 Yémon mwighé yéfaronam ménát ámbiro so tényátonga téndo árfé, ménamén yémon ewáwáine yéfene tikéf ménaye ndimbal mwighaye. 10 Féyo fémofem yau so ufoghan Ngánján yékmetati sénonjo ménaye kérté fayoghe téndo efalo yátogh árét ndenéyameyo téfene ákifet a téfeyot árkéméné yau so tanangém. 11 Yéndfem efalo yiyátotam ndené téfene Yuré Yesuene ngárám kénjúmé yénd nawanjanam, ndenéyame fá kés em."
bt: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and other head people gathered together because of this teaching. 7 After long debating this teaching, Fitè stood and said to them: "Friends/Brothers, you know that a long time ago God appointed me among you in order that Side people might hear good talk from my lips and truly approve(believe). 8 God, who knows people's heart, showed that he approved Side people by giving them the God Spirit just as he gave it to us. 9 He split.mind(planed) to make us one with Side people, because he wiped their hearts by big mind(faith). 10 So you.p should not put God in test by puting them today by carrying difficulty to the side approving truth people in the same way to our ancesters and to us that we cannot take them. 11 We truly approve(believe) and saved through the grace of our Lord Yesu, just as they are."

nama: Ár mérén métar nufrotaménd fá káyáretawét yéfefaf Banabas a Fol kafrowét ménamén ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam Ngánjánam tawafrotau Téndo árfefaf yéfe kénjúmé. 13 Njam Banabas a Fité yifeyayénd si, Jems nokayoi siafé: "Fútaréf, yénd kwiyárangi. 14 Saimon Fitam tafenau téfefaf ndernáye Ngánjánam fronde yuyafotam yánjo mwighé ménaye ndernáye Téndo ár té eyátoi yáyot. 15 A yéné téndo árfene awengogh siyém yénayanfifi némé Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénorayawét. Ndené kés yékai:
bt: The people group became silent as they heard Banabas and Fol telling about miraculous showing things(signs) and surprising things(wonders) what God had done through them to the Side people. 13 When Banabas a Fol finished the talk, Jems stood with talk: "Friends, listen to me. 14 Saimon Fitè explained us how God first showed his mind how he made Side people for him. 15 And this conversion of Side people is exactly what God's people who make know(prophets) said. As it is written:

nama: 'Yéné soramé yénd so nénangotan, a kor so yafarnjan Deifidene méngotu. Yéndon kor so yérametan wasérmboghkaf yém, a yéndon so kor yafrotan,
bt: "After this I will go back and restore the kingdom of Deifid. I will build again its ruins, and I will make it again,

nama: ménát méinyotio árém so yéronjat Yuré, so tanéfghangé Téndo ár emofem tane yétkwén so yuyotat, Yuré noraye, emo ewafrote yéné yam
bt: so that all the people will seek the Lord, including Side people who lift up my name, the Lord says, who made these things

nama: tándái árkéméné mat náyátoyénd.'
bt: which they knew long times ago.
