nama: "Yénémaménnde tane mwighé yém yéndfem yau so táikér yiyátotam ménát ghéngan néfghét yéfe Téndo árét efe nawengotat Ngánjánefaf. 20 Wénde yéndfem férén so yéfarotam yéfeyot a engwaufrotam ménát yau so enetat njamke árkéméné mewang sifayamén em, yau táf téndo wal, yau táf enetat férék eréghofnar wérár a férék yau táf enetati. 21 Ménamén Mosesene nák si téngwaitotawét méinyotio tesenan fronde efghon a taftawét Ju árfene áumengégh méngon méinyotio Safatan." Férén yéfeyot téndo efalo yátogh árfefaf
bt: Therefore my thought is that we should not make it difficult them to cut skin for the Side people who turned to God. 20 But we should write a letter for them and tell them not to eat food which were from the idols' place, not to have sexual relation out of marriage, not to eat the animal which is not drained blood and not to eat blood. 21 Because they were preaching the law of Moses in every city from the ancient times and read them in the meeting houses on every Safat." The letter for them to the side approving truth people

nama: Féyo Yesuene muyafé ár a sénko ár yémafé méinyotio Yesuene mérén mwighé yéfaronaménd yéfenjo ár kafghét álighét kétán Antiok yémafé Fol a Banabas. Yémofem ekafayénd Judas efe tanmotawét Barsabas a Sailes, yéné ár efe tárwén limánégh ár efalo yátogh árfene kénjún. 23 Yéfe kénjúmé yémofem yatembayénd yénamayo férén: "Yesuene muyafé ár a sénko ár, fene fútaréf Jerusalemén, Kétán téndo efalo yátogh árfefaf kétán Antiok, Siria a Silisia: Áuwégh si.
bt: Then the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and the head people together with whole Yesu's family(church) decided to choose their people to go to Antiok with Fol and Banabas. They chose Judas who is called Barsabas and Sailès, these men.d were head men among the approving truth people. 23 Through them they sent the following letter: "The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and head people, your friends in Jerusalem, To the side approving truth people in Antiok , Siria and Silisia: Greetings.

nama: Yénd té náyárangém ndené ámb té nétorngi téfe tambén téfene matofnaye a fene mwighé kémawasérmbotat, ménaye fá némé korayat. 25 Yénémamén yéndfem méinyotio efalo yiyátongém ekafangém ámb ár a engwatembangém féfefaf yémafé téfene tikfafé fútar Banabas a Fol, 26 ár emofem yéfenjo ghérsé kértat ekmend Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénot. 27 Yénémaménnde yéndfem Judas a Sailes engwáfárewam féfefaf ménát yémofem yénayo si so efalo yiyátot mbírmbíre némé yéndfem yéngwafnamotam.
bt: We have heard that some went out from us without our knowing and spoiled your minds by what they said. 25 So we all agreed [and]chose some men and send them to you.p with our with heart(dear) brothers Banabas and Fol, 26 men/men.d who put.d to danger their/their.d lives for the name of Lord Yesu Keriso. 27 Therefore we are sending Judas and Sailès to you in order that they will confirm by [talk of] mouth what we are writing.

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér a yénd efalo té yiyátongém ndené yéndfem yau so kérté ewarametam táikér yame wénde mé nambio yamero: 29 Fém so nafrangotati kétándmé njamke árkéméné mewang sifayamén em, férékta, férék eréghofnar wérárta a téndo walta. Merfifi yém yéné yamta kékmbongi. Yénaro fai."
bt: The God Spirit and we have agreed that we will not give difficult things but only few things: 29 You must leave from food which was from Idols' place, from blood, and from animal/meat without bleeding blood, from outside sex(sex out of marriage). It is good you.p stop these things. That's all.

nama: Ár ewatembayénd a tayotau Antiok yuwot. Kété fá káumendawét Yesuene mérén mérne a kété férén yéramayénd. 31 Árém njam taftawét áuwéghan tamorwén yéné wawéngsogh simén. 32 Judas a Sailes, efe tárwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, ndimbal wawéngsogh a muyé si koraiwét efalo yátogh árfefaf. 33 Ámb efogh soramé kété, Judas a Sailes ewatembeyayénd fútarfem frengéghafé a áuwéghafé kangowét yéfefaf emofem enwáfáreménd. 34-35\~ Wénde Fol a Banabas mé tamorarwén kété Antiokén, ánde fá a tárfár árfé Yurane si táitotawét a tawatametawét. Fol a Banabas nafaleyayénd
bt: They sent the men off and they went down to Antiok area. There they gathered the Yesu's family(church) together and there gave them the letter. 31 When people read it and were in joy for this encouraging talk. 32 Judas and Sailès, who were God's people who make know(prophets), said big encouraging and powerful talk to the approving truth people. 33 After some days there, Friends/brothers sent off Judas a Sailès with blessing and greeting to go back to those who sent them. 34-35\~ But Fol and Banabas stayed more there in Antiok, where they and with many people preached and taught the talk of the Lord. Fol and Banabas divided

nama: Ámb efogh soramé Folém yémndayéng Banabas, "So nangowam kétán a eyafowam efalo yátogh ár méinyotio tesenan ánde yéndfem Yurane si taitowém a tanwinjem némé yémofem ewafrotat." 37 Banabas ménde témorwén Jon Make wasroghét yémafé, 38 wénde Fol yau ndené kemnau sái tasrongai fá, ménamén Jon Makém efrangoi kété Famfilia yuwon a nékmboyéng kétamé ásáfogh tambén. 39 Kété ewarmén ndimbal éwigh a nafalotaménd. Banabasém yasroi Mak a tayowéng ndimbal boute kétán Sáifras, 40 wénde Folém yaferyéng Sailes a efalo yátogh árém erameyayénd Fol a Sailes Yurane ngárám kénjút. Féyo sómbio nuwaneyayénd. 41 Fá nuwaneyayénd yénamé Siria a Silisia yu, yémofem taitoghwét si ménát muyé tawaramwét Yesuene mérnat. |nmx_205wbt - Paul journey 2 [bwf-light] @en_v4.tif|col||© 2025 Wycliffe Bible Translators, Inc.|Folene yénamayo áligh (Acts 15.36—18.22)|15.36—18.22
bt: At another later time Fol said to Banabas, "Let us.d go.d back to [there] and visit.d the approving truth people in every towns where we preached.d the talk of Lord and see.d what they are doing." 37 Banabas wanted to take Jon Mak with them, 38 but Fol did not think that they will take him, because Jon Mak left them in Famfilia area and stopped from working. 39 There they had a big argument, and they seperated. Banabas took Mak and traveled by big boat(ship) to Saifras, 40 but Fol chose Sailès and the approving truth people gave.d them into the grace of the Lord. Then two of them left.d. 41 They went.d through Siria and Silisia area, they were speaking.d talk to give strength to the Yesu's families(churches).

nama: Fol yénmormén Derbe tesenot a yénamé kétán Listra tesen, ánde waitogh ár yétkwén Timoti témorangérwén. Yátmé témorwén Ju amaf a efalo yátogh ár, wénde yárefé témorwén Grikmén ár. 2 Efalo yátogh ár mer si korayawét Timotienemén Listran a Ikoniummén. 3 Fol ménde témorwén yémafé álighét, féyo yémo ghéngan yanfai ménamén Ju árfenemén efe tamorangérwén yéné yuwon, ménamén fá méinyotio mat tamorwén ndené yárefé témorwén Grikmén ár. 4 Yéfene áligh yam kétándmé ámb tesen kétán ámb tesen, yémofem tawawéngsotawét efalo yátogh ár ménát so táitotawét yéné férén árké yéfarotaménd Yesuene muyafé árém a ámb sénko árém Jerusalemén. 5 Féyo Yesuene mérén táf káyátotawét muyafé ndimbal mwighayan a kanotawét méinyotio efghon. Folene ghékéf waingégh Makedonia ároenemén
bt: Fol came to Derbe city and next to Listra city, where a following man(disciple) name Timoti lived. His mother was Ju woman and man/woman who truly approve, but his father was a Greek man. 2 The approving truth people spoke well of Timoti in Listra and Ikonium. 3 Fol wanted to walk/trip with him, so he cut skin(circumcised) him because of the Ju people who lived in that area, because they all knew that his father was a Greek. 4 Their trip was from one town to other town, they urged the belivers to follow the letter which Yesu's authority and other head people in Jerusalem wrote. 5 So the Yesu's familys(churches) became with strength in the big mind(faith) and grew [in number] every day. Fol's eye passover thing of the man of Makedonia

nama: Fol yánjo mérnafé tayotau yéné yuwomé Frigia a Galasia, Ngánján Mbérmbéram yau eumyoi si waitoghét Esia yuwon. 7 Fá engmormén Misia mbandot néngufaryénd, féyo fá ménde tamorwén sái kényawangai Biténiat, wénde Yesuene Mbémbéram yau eumyoi élaughét. 8 Féyo yémofem yéngwaindayénd Misia a néngaflayénd kétán Troasot. 9 Yéné sémbáran Folém téfandau ghékéf waingéghe Makedoniamén ár takayongérwén tamnendau fá, "Kénaf Makedonia ndimbal yuwot téfe wáutárghét." 10 Folene ghékéf waingégh fandagh soramé, yénd wékeye káfrendawém álighét kétán Makedoniat. Ménamén mat náyátoyém ndené Ngánjánam yénmanmoi yénd mer si waitoghét kétán yéfefaf. Lidiane awengogh yaufita Filifiyan
bt: Fol went with his group throughout the region of Frigia and Galasia, the God Spirit didn't allow them preaching the talk in the Esia region. 7 They came arrived to the border of Masia, they wanted to enter Biténia, but Yesu's Spirit did not allow them to enter. 8 So they passed by Masia and went to Troas. 9 That night Fol saw the eye passover thing of a man of Makedonia standing and begging him, "Come to Makedonia big area to help us." 10 After Fol's seeing the eye passover thing, we got ready quickly to go to Makedonia. Because we knew that God called us to preach the good talk to them there. Lidias turns form sin in Filifi

nama: Yénd ndimbal boute tényotau Troasta kétán Samotrasét, a ámb efghon néngufaryém Neafolisét. 12 Kétamé yénd néngwanoyém kétán Filifi, Rom mwighafé yu a limánégh tesen Makedonia ndimbal yuwot. Kété yénmorangérmén tárfár efogh.
bt: We traveled by big boat(ship) from Troas to Samotras, and the next day arrived to Neafolis. 12 From there we went to Filifi, a Roman with mind(important) area and ruling city of that big area of Makedonia. We stayed there many days.

nama: Ámb Safatan yénd néngtoryém tesen sésafneta kétán wanjet, yéné mwighafé Ngánjánafé orayégh sifayé kété so yém. Yénd námnjoyém a si yérnyayém yéné amafafefaf efe nénáumendayénd kété. 14 Ámb amaf efe káyáretau yáne yétkwén Lidia, efe témorwén Tayatira tesenmén. Yémon ndéndák ngarot sáláme faian yékmai a fá témorwén Ngánjánene wáwefnogh amaf. Yuram yasawéryéng yáne tikéf áyárghét kétán Folene sifaf. 15 Amaf a yáne mérén ewalitotam, yéné soramé amafom yénumyoi yánjo méngot. Amafom témndangé, "Njam fém nemnati ndené yénd wém efalo yátogh ár Yurane kénjún, kénaflangi tane méngon so emor." Féyo amafom yénmamnendai yénd, féyo yénd kété yénmorangérmén. Fol a Sailes kwéfkwéf méngot elaweyayénd
bt: On the Safat we went out of the city gate to the river, with this thought there will be a place of talking with God. We sat down and began to speak to the women who had gathered there. 14 One woman who heard us her name was Lidia, who was from the city of Tayatira. She was a dealer in purple cloth and she was a worshipping woman of God. The Lord opened her heart to hear to Fol's talk. 15 Woman and her family were baptized, after that she invited us to her house. Woman said, "If you.p think that I am a true truly approving man(believer) in the Lord, come to my house and stay." So woman asked us, so we stayed there. They put.d Fol and Sailès into Jail

nama: Ámb káye yénd ténngérwén Ngánjánafé orayégh sifayat, yénd yénfangeyai faiofnar ásáfogh mérsom efe yaufi mbérmbéroene waftaye korayau soramé yumén. Yémon tawinjotau ndimbal mani árfe tambén ménamén korayau soramé yumén. Yémon tawarametau mani yánjo wanjengégh téfnárat. 17 Yéné mérsom Fol a yénd yénmaitoyéng ndené keyafé, "Yéné ár fem Minde Tukén Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, emofem ewafrotat end féfe wanjarghét." 18 Mérés ménj mé térnyangérwén tárfár efogh yéné sian. Kerkeran Fol nékwafé náindam nawengoi a témndangé mbérmbér, "Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan fém kétor yá tambénǃ" Táf fété mbérmbéram mérés yéfrangoi.
bt: One day we were going to the place of talking with God, we met a without.payment working girl(servant girl) who said about the future with the power of evil spirit. She found/earned big money from people because she said about future. She gave money to his own looking.after people(owners) 17 This girl followed Fol and us with talk that, "These men are without.payment working people(servants) of the Most High God, who are telling to you the saving way." 18 Girl kept do this for many days. Finally Fol became angry and turned and said to the spirit, "In the name of Yesu Keriso you to come out of her!" Immediately the spirit left girl.

nama: Njam faiofnar ásáfogh mérésoene yuram yáyámngoyénd ndené mani winjo end té nefo, yémofem Fol a Sailes ngi ewafngeyayénd taroghwét fá marat sifayamé kétán sénko árfefaf. 20 Yémofem enémnjéménd yéné yumén gafanane sáfrére a norayayénd, "Yéné ár sere Jumén, yémofem ár mwighayan ewanjmengét, 21 yémofem ár ewatamet fénaté si yéné mbarkánd yau árké nérete téfe Rom árét wafroghét."
bt: When without.payment woking girl's owners recognized that the way to find money finished, they began to hit Fol and Sailès and dragged them into the marketplace to the head people. 20 They brought them before the governor of this area and said, "The men are.d from Ju, and they.d confused people, 21 they.d are teaching people different talk which is not straight for us Romans seem to do.

nama: Ár mérén nafghayénd Fol a Sailes yéfe ngiot, a yéné ndimbal yumén mogh árfene wáfáreghan so yéfene sáláme tawaftérarwét a tafmowét. 23 Féyo yaufi fémogh efmoménd, a fá ewiménd kétán kwéfkwéf méngot, a yéné sifayé wanjengégh ár yémndayénd merkéráye wanjengéghét. 24 Njam fá náyárai wáfaregh si, yémon ewármbneyai sómbio ár a ewangseyayénd wéne yéfene ghambér. |IB04207gr.tif|col||Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide.|Fol a Sailes tarwén kwéfkwéf méngon (Acts 16.24)|16.24
bt: The crowd combined in thier striking Fol and Sailès, and the judging man of this big area ordered them tore their clothes and whipped. 23 Then they whipped them.d several whipping, and they were put them.d in darkness house, and they said to the darkness house guarding man to guard them.d carefully. 24 When he heard this order, he threw into two men and stocked their feet by woods.

nama: Sémbár néndkéfan Fol a Sailes Ngánjánjafé korayawét a wagh kermangwét Ngánjánefaf, a ámb ár kwéfkwéf méngon talawangérwén táyárwét waghan. 26 Sunsune ndimbal sokrereyam kwéfkwéf méngo sérasér esámbnetam. Táf fété méinyotio kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne kasaunawét, a méinyotio árfene sein naferyénd.
bt: In midnight Fol and Sailès were paraying and singing to God, and other [who] were in darkness house listened song. 26 Suddenly big earthquake shook the posts of the darkness house. At once all the darkness house doors were opened and every people's chains fell off.

nama: Kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh ár nanoi, a njam néngretai kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne sauréghkaf tamorwén, fá witmafé sénté naifaye akunyéghét féf nufngoi krotio ménamén fá kéma kemnau nde kwéfkwéf méngo ár kar té nétoryénd. 28 Wénde Fol nutnai, "Yau nawaghna fémyoǃ Yénd méinyotio yéna mé yénémǃ"
bt: The darkness house guarding man woke up, and when he saw the darkness house doors open, he drew this sword and about to kill himself because he thought the darkness house men(prisoners) might have escaped. 28 But Fol shouted, "Don't spoil yourself! We are all still here!"

nama: Kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh ár néngutnai kwayaghat a soramé ewawanayénd kwayaghé, néngénngoi kwéfkwéf méngo kénjút a nénguyai ngerngerafé Fol a Sailesfene sáfrére. 30 Féyo yémon enutoreyai kénjúta a emotangeyai, "Ndimbal, yéndon némé so yafrotan awanjarghét?"
bt: The darkness house guarding man called for lights and after they brought right, he ran into the darkness house and fell down with trembling before Fol and Sailès. 30 Then he brought them.d out and asked, "Bigmen, what must I do to be saved?"

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Yuré Yesu efalo tiyáto, a táf fém so kawanjar fene mérnafé." 32 Féyo fá kafrowét Yurane si yáfaf a méinyotio ámb árfefaf yáne méngon. 33 Yéné sémbáranyo kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh árom emnjéméng a yéfene fénend tawaumbarwéng; féyo táf fété fá yánjo mérnafayo nuan ewalitoménd. 34 Kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh árom emnjéméng yáne méngot a ewémnjeyai nénet; fá áuwégham yafoi ménamén yémon Ngánján efalo yiyátoi yánjo méinyotio mérnafé.
bt: They.d answered him, "Believe in the Lord Yesu, and that time you will be saved with your family." 32 Then they told the talk of the Lord to him and to all the other people in his house. 33 At that night darkness house guarding man took them and washed their wounds; then immedately he and his family were baptized. 34 The darkness house guarding man brought them into his house and set a meal; he was filled with joy because he truly approved(believed) in God with his whole family.

nama: Njam akw yéfauwéryéng, Rom mogh árém ewáfáretayénd yéfene ásáfogh ár kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh ároefaf: "Tautorend yéné ár nguwanend." 36 Kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh árom taufrongé Fole, "Rom mogh árém nénorayangi ndené fém a Sailes so tautorend. Sénonjo fémofem yéné sifayé téfrangend kuwanend krufráte."
bt: When it was daybreak, Rom court workers(magistrates) sent/ordered their workers to the darkness house guarding man, "Let those men.d go out." 36 The darkness house guarding man told Fol, "The Rom court workers(magistrates) said that you and Sailès will go out. Now you.d leave this place and go in peace."

nama: Wénde Folém korayangé ásáfogh árfefaf: "Yémofem yénd ténsémét marataye moghofnar yuwon, ndemamén yénd yénre Rom yumén ár, a yénmiménd kwéfkwéf méngo kénjút. Sénonjo yénd yémofem métare yénmutorend? Yauǃ Fá fáyo táf kénaflangi a téngémnjend yénd."
bt: But Fol said to the working people: "They beat us.d pubicly without a court/trail, even though we.d are Roman citizens, and threw us into darkness house. Now do they want to go out us quietly? No! They themselves must come and let us.d out."

nama: Ásáfogh árém njam ewaufroyénd Rom mogh árfet ndené Fol a Sailes tárwén Rom yumén ár, fá férféram ewifoi. 39 Fá nénaflayénd yéfefaf ghérghérsisé siot a enémnjeyayénd kétándmé kwéfkwéf méngota, ewamnendangeyayénd tesen frangoghét. 40 Soramé Fol a Sailes néntoreyayénd kwéfkwéf méngota, fá néngwaneyayénd Lidiane méngot, ánde nafángoyénd efalo yátogh árfé tawawéngsowét fá. Féyo yémofem táf efrangeyayénd.
bt: When workers told to the governors that Fol and Sailès were Roman citizens, they were full of fear. 39 They came to them.d with apologizing talk and led them.d out of the darkness house, asked them to leave town. 40 After Fol and Sailès came out of the darkness house, they.d went to Lidia's house, where they met the approving truth people and encouraged them. Then they.d left.

nama: Njam Fol yáne fútarfé nawaindayénd Amfifolis a Afoloniamé, fá enmormén Tesalonikat, kété témorwén Ju árfene áumengégh méngo. 2 Yáne túmén yam témorwén, Fol téngmorwén Ju árfene áumengégh méngo kénjút, a nambio Safat efghon yémon yérnyai warunyégh árfé, 3 a Buk si tawawafenau ndené Keriso tékrátan so yém a kérta kanongé. Fá norayai, "Yéné Yesu siyém Keriso yéndon endenemén yaitotan féfeyot." 4 Ámb Ju árém efalo yiyátoyénd a nufnyayénd Fol a Sailesfefaf. Kété tamorwén tárfár Téndo ár Ngánján férférafé a tárfár sénko amaf.
bt: When Fol and his companions passed through Amfifolis and Afolonia, they came to Tesalonika, there was a Ju meeting house. 2 There was his customs, Fol went into the meeting house, and on three Safat he began to discuss with the people, 3 a explained the Buk(scripture)s that Keriso had to be in suffering and rose from death. He said, "This Yesu is Keriso about whom I am preaching to you." 4 Some of Ju people truly approved(believed) and joined Fol and Sailès. There were many God fearing Side people and many head women.

nama: Wénde ámb Ju ár kawaramnjawét, yénémamén yémofem eumendayénd kérté wafrogh ár mérén marat sifayan, awifarégh yérnyayénd tesenan. Fá néngenngoyénd Jasonene méngot Fol a Sailes yéfe ronjaghét a wasroghét ár mérénfaf. 6 Wénde njam yémofem yau ewinjeyayénd Fol a Sailes, yémofem Jason a ámb efalo yátogh ár tesenmén tawafaretawét gafanane sáfrére, yéné keyafé, "Yéné ár fem emofem yéfunat kérté méinyotio mband maratan sénonjo yéna em, 7 a Jasoném eumyoi fá yáne méngot. Fá fem emofem méinyotio Rom tuk warsagh ár Kaisarene nák erafnat ndené siafé Yesu siyém ámb warsagh ár." 8 Njam fá náyárayénd yéné si, ár mérén a tesenmén gafana fá nékw nawerayénd. 9 Féyo yémofem fai ewafrotaménd Jason a ámb efalo yátogh ár utorghét. Fol a Sailesfem mer si taitowét Bereya kénjún
bt: But other Ju people were jealous, so they gathered bad acting people group in the marketplace, started chasing/arguing (each other) in the city. They went to Joson's house to find Fol and Sailès to bring them to the crowd. 6 But when they did not find Fol and Sailès, they forced Jason and other approving truth people before the governor of the city, with this voice, "These men who caused trouble all over the world now are here, 7 and Jason allowed them into his house. They who all broke the law of Roman Imperor Kaisar with saying that Yesu is another ruling man(king)." 8 When they heard this talk, the crowd and governors of the city they were angry. 9 Then they made Jason and other approving truth people pay money to be release. Fol and Sailès preached good news in Berea

nama: Yéné sémbáranyo, ámb efalo yátogh árém engwatembeyayénd Fol a Sailes Bereya tesenot. Ufarghan Fol a Sailes, fá néngwaneyayénd Ju árfene áumengégh méngot. 11 Ménamén Bereyamén Ju ár tamorwén minde mer ár, yéfene wafroghyamam ewaindayéng Tesalonika yumén ár, yémofem yumyoyénd si áuwéghafé a tafénmetawét Buk si túmén efghon téfandawét némé Fol efalo korayau. 12 Tárfár Ju árém efalo yiyátoyénd si a ámb ndimbal yétkwén amafam a ámb Grikmén árém.
bt: That very night, some approving truth people sent Fol and Sailès to Berea town. On Fol and Sailès arriving, they went to the Ju people's meeting house. 11 Because the Ju people of Berea were very good, their.p behaviour surpassed the Tesalonaika area people, they received the talk with joy and examined the Buk(scripture)s every day, were looking for [if] what Fol said true. 12 Many Ju people truly approved(believed) in talk and other big name women and other Greek men [did]

nama: Njam Ju ár mat náyátoyénd Tesalonika kénjún ndené Folém táitotau Ngánjánene si Bereyan, ámb ár wéi kétán néngwanoyénd a amrorégh yérnyayénd ár mérén tawanjmetawét.
bt: When Ju people in Tesalonika learned that Fol was preaching the talk of God in Berea, some people also went there and started arguing crowds and were congusing them.

nama: Táf fété efalo yátogh árém Fol yáfáretaménd arakaf tambén, wénde Saileséf Timotifé tamorarwén Bereyan. 15 Njam yéné árém yénémnjaménd Fol Atenét, Fol norayai yéfefaf ndené, "Sailes a Timoti tafaf táf enre wékeye." Féyo táf néngwanoyénd. Folém mer si táitotau Aten kénjún
bt: At once the approving truth people sent Fol to the sea area, but Sailès and Timoti stayed in Berea. 15 When those people escort Fol to Aten, Fol said to them that, "Sailès and Timoti should join us quickly." Then they left. Fol preached good news in Aten

nama: Njam Fol kawanjetau yéfeyot Sailes a Timoti Aten tesenan, fá áuwéghofnar témorwén ménamén yinjoi yéné tesen mewang afoghare. 17 Yémon éwigh yérnyai yémafé Ju árfene áumengégh méngon Ju ár a Ngánján férférafé Téndo ár. Fá wéi táf téngmorwén marat sifayat méinyotio efghon a ár kété tamndetau. 18 Mérén tárwén sómbio, ámb Efikuria mérén a ámb Stoik mérén ndimbal matyamafé ár éwigh yérnyayénd Folfé. Ámb kamotangi, "Némé siot yéné waréwaré nufngo?" Ámb korayangi, "Fá mété noraya ámb ngánjánmén." Fá korayawét yéné si ménamén Folém táitotau mer si Yesuenemén a yáne anoghmén. 19 Yémofem yéngwasroyénd fá sénko árfene áumengégh sifayé yétkwén Areyofagus, ánde yémofem fá témndetawét, "Féyotaro fémo so ténmaufro matot némé totér watamegh fémo yaitote? 20 Fémon téfe yénérse fénataye watamegh náyáretam, a yénd ménde yéném mat sái káyátongém némé yáne fifi yém." 21 (Méinyotio Atenmén ár a ámb yuta ár efe tamorangérwén kété efogh tifotawét ámnjoghanro wénde korayawét a káyáretawét soramamén siot)
bt: While Fol is waiting for Sailès and Timoti in Aten city , he was without joy, because saw that city was full of idols. 17 He started discussing with Ju people in the Ju people's meeting house(synagogue) and God-fearing Side people. He also went to the marketplace everyday and he talked to the people there. 18 There were two groups, one of Efikuria group and other people of Stoik group with big knowledge(philosophy) began to discussing with him. Some asked, "What is this nonsence talking?" Others said, "He seems to be preaching about other gods." They said this talk because Fol preached good talk about Yesu and his rising. 19 They took him the head men's meeting name Areofagus, where they said to him, "Would you tell us knowldge what new teaching you are preaching? 20 You brought us different teaching we heard, and we want to know what is this meaning." 21 (All the Aten people and the people from other region who lived there spent time only sitting for talking and listening to the latest messages.)

nama: Féyo Fol nokayoi sénko árfene áumengégh sifayé yétkwén Areyofagus a tamndangé, "Atenmén árǃ Yéndon tawafandan fémofem ewáwefnotati tárfár ngánjánafet mindefifi. 23 Ménamén yénd njam karendan táf kor ewawinjon féfene wáwefnogh rokar. Yéndon tawafandan kitarékitaré yéné yétkwénafé: Kétán Mat Yátoghofnar Ngánján. Fém mat yau em némayoe fémofem yáwefnotati, sénonjo yéndon so ewaufrotan féfeyot yánemén.
bt: So Fol stood up head men's meeting place name Areofagus and said, "People of Aten! I see you are worshipping (to)many gods very much. 23 Because when I walked around even found your worshipping things. I saw the shelter(alter) with this name: To without. knowing God. You don't know it to what you are worshipping, now I will tell you about him.

nama: "Ngánján emo yafrotam mband marat a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún. Ménamén yémo elimnde méinyotio rokar njafaran a mbandan, fá yau yémor ár ngángé raméghmén wáwefnogh méngon. 25 A fá yau náronje yéné rokarot árém árké ewafrotat yáyot, ménamén fá fáyo méinyotio árfene ghérsé ramégh ár yém a méinyotio rokar kés. 26 Rényéghan Ngánjánam yafrotam ámbiro ár, Yá tambén Ngánjánam ewafrotam méinyotio ár mérén efe sénonjo emorang méinyotio mband maratan. A yémon wéi mwighé yéfaronam ánde fénatayero ár mérén so emor a nderé teke fá so emor. 27 Ngánján ménde yém árém sái yéronjat. Ménamén fá yau nayu yém téfeta, féyo yémofem mété táf yéronjat fá a tinjongi. 28 'Ménamén yáne waftayan yénd ghérsé yénmor a nimndam a naketam.' Ndenanit féfenjo ár efe mat em férénafene fifi, fá norayat ndenanit, 'Yénd yéném yáne ambumtértér.'
bt: "The God made the world and everythings in it. Because he rules over all things in heaven and on earth, he does not live in the worshipping houses built by man's hands. 25 And he is not expecting/looking for this thing [which] people made for him, because he himself is life giver to all the people's and everything. 26 In the beginning God made/created one man, from him God created all the people who now live all the place in the world. And he also decided where each people group should live and how long they should live there. 27 God wanted people to search for him. Because he is not far from us, then they might seek him and find him.

nama: "Ménamén yénd Ngánjánene ambumtértér kés yéném, yénd yau so nemnam ndené árém so ewafrotat Ngánján kétamé gol o silfé o wím yéfenjo matyame. 30 Tándái ár njam yau mat tamorwén némé Ngánján ménde témorwén yéfefaf wafroghét, Ngánjánam yau kértayan tákmangai ménamén yéfene matyam yau, wénde sénonjo Ngánjánam emndete méinyotio ár méinyotio yuwomé yaufita awengoghét. 31 Efogh té yaferyéng njam mband so moghan tékmangé. Yémo té yékafai ár emo so moghan ténékmangé mbarkánde. Ngánjánam té yuyafoi yéné ár, efe Ngánjánam té yékafai ménát sái emota mband marat, yémo so moghan tékmangé mband marat ménamén Ngánjánam yanoi kérta."
bt: Because we are God's children, we should not think that people can make God from gold and silver or stone with their knowledge. 30 In the past when people did not know what God wanted them to do, God did not put them into pain because they have no knowledge, but now God says every people everywhere to turn away from sins. 31 God has appointed a day when he will judge the world. He has appointed a man to judge us straightly. God has shown this man, whom God has appointed to judge the world, he is able to judge the world because God raised him from death."

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd ároene kér anoghmén si, ámb árém turtawét, wénde ámb korayawét, "Yénd ménde yéném fém sái kor koraya téfefaf yéné si téfén." 33 Yéné áumengégh soramé Folém efrangoi. 34 Ámb ár namndayénd Folene waitogh ár a efalo yiyátoyénd. Yéfene kénjún tafnyangérwén Dionisus, efe témorwén Areyofagus mérénmén, ndenáyo amaf yétkwén Damaris, a ámb ár kés.
bt: When they heard about a man's rising from the death, some made fun of him, but some said, "We want you talk to us again about this talk's meaning." 33 After this meeting Fol left. 34 Some people became followers of Fol and truly approve(believe). Among them was Dionisus, who was from the group of Areofagus, also woman name Damaris and also other people.

nama: Yéné soramé, Folém yéfrangoi Aten tesen a néngwanoi Korint tesenot. 2 Kété yémon yéfángoi Ju ár yétkwén Akwila Fontusmén. Fá yénmormén kétándmé Italia yánjo amafafé yétkwén Frisila, ménamén Rom tuk warsagh ár Kaisar Klaudiasém emndai "Fém Ju ár, fémofem so téfrangongi Rom." Fol néngaflai Akwila a Frisila fandaghét, 3 a ménamén Fol témorwén farai méngo ramégh ár ndené fá kés tamorwén, Fol námnjoyéng a kásáfotawét yémafé. 4 Méinyotio Safatan Folfem taruindawét Ju árfene áumengégh méngon, ménát sái tikéf áfrat táyátongayénd Ju ár a Téndo ár.
bt: After this, Fol left Aten city and went to Korint city. 2 There he met a Ju man name Akwila from Fontus. He came from Italia with his wife Frisila, because Rom high leading man(Emperor) Kaisar Klaudias said, "You Ju people, you.p should leave Rom." Fol went to see Akwila a Frisila, 3 because Fol was a canvas huose making man(tentmaker) as they were, Fol srayed and worked with them. 4 Every Safat Fol discuss with them in meeting house, in order that he make heart soft(convince) the Ju people and Side people.

nama: Njam Sailes a Timoti nufareyayénd kétándmé Makedoniata, yéna Folém yéta Ju ár matot tarametau ndené Yesu siyém Keriso. 6 Wénde Ju árém tékarotawét Fol a yaufi si témndetawét. Féyo yénémamén yémon ngwérméng yétnendai yánjo sálámeta a tamndangé fá, "Njam Ngánjánam tékratan tákmangé, so yém féfenjo téfnan, yau so yém tane téfén. Yénd nawafenan féfefaf yénd yau kérté so wém. Yénandmé yénd so kuwanon sénonjo Téndo árfefaf."
bt: When Sailès and Timoti arrived from Makedonia, here Fol was trying to make known Ju people that Yesu was Keriso. 6 But Ju people opposed Fol and said to wicked talk. So he shook the dust from his clothes and said, "If God put you in suffering/pain, it will be your fault, not my fault. From now I will go to the Side people."

nama: Féyo Folém yéngéfrangoi Ju árfene áumengégh méngo a néngaflai kaka méngot, Taitus Jéstusene méngot efe témorwén Ngánján wáwefnogh ár. 8 Krisfus, Ju árfene áumengégh méngo limánégh ár, a yánjo mérnam Yuré efalo yiyátoyénd a tárfár Korintmén ár efe káyáretawét, efalo yiyátoyénd a nuwan ewalitotam.
bt: Then Fol left the Ju people's meeting house and went to next house, to Taitus Jèstus' house who was a worshipper of God. 8 Krisfus, the head man of Ju people's the meeting house, and his family truly approved(believed) in the Lord and many of Korint people who heard him, truly approved(believed) and we baptized them.

nama: Ámb sémbáran Yuré norayai Folefaf ghékéf waingégh kénjún, "Yau férfér ném, sian miya néngém, yau métar ném a nékmbo. 10 Ménamén yénd fémafé yénre, a emo yau so nékmbote a némasérmbote fém, ménamén tane tárfár ár em yéné tesenan." 11 Yéné téfnan Fol yémorangérmén Korintén ámbiro yunjéf ámb yunjéf rér yéramai fá tawatametau Ngánjánene si.
bt: One night the Lord said to Fol in a eye passover thing, "Don't be afraid, keep on talking, do not be silent and not stop. 10 Because I am with you, and someone cannot make stop and spoil/harm you, because there are many my people in this city." 11 In this reason Fol stayed in Korint for a year and a half he taught them the talk of God.

nama: Njam Galio témorwén gafana Akaya ndimbal yumén, ámb Ju ár nafghayénd Fole kékmboghét a yénmasroyénd moghét. 13 Yémofem yémndayénd, "Yéné árom elimnde ár Ngánján wáwefnoghét yéné ende téfene nák eráfne."
bt: When Galio became governor of Akaya big area, some Ju people got together to stop Fol and brought him to the court. 13 They said, "This man is leading the people to worship God in different way in this way he broke our law."

nama: Fol siotro témorwén, Galio norayai Ju árfefaf, "Fém Ju ár njam nawatarnati yéné kértamén tayot mer nérete, fém so eyáretan sian. 15 Wénde yéna ewafnyang ámogh ménamén orayaghmén a yétkwénmén a féfenjo nákmén, táfrendangi yéné yam fémofemyo. Yénd yau so yéna wém féfene moghan yéné yammén." 16 Féyo yémon engéutoryéng moghta. 17 Féyo méinyotioyam yerayénd Sostenes Ju árfene áumengégh méngo limánégh ároefaf ngi yafngoi mogh méngo safén. Wénde Galiom yau kemnau yénémamén. Frisila, Akwila a Afolos
bt: Fol was about to speak, Galio said to ju people, "If you Ju people made a complaint about this problem, show me well, I will listen to you.p. 15 But this included about a question of speakings and names and your.p law, settle/solve this things by yourselves. I will not be in your.p court about this things. 16 So he took/sent them off from the court. 17 Then they all caught/hold Sostenes the Ju people's meeting house leading man [and] began to beat him in front of the court. But Galio did not think about it. Frisila, Akwila and Afolos

nama: Fol yémorangérmén Korintén tárfár efogh. Féyo yémon engéfrangoi fútaréf kété, a nuwanoyénd yémafé Frisila a yánjar Akwila. Fá néngwanoyénd kétán Senséri. Kété Fol séf natértam ménamén yane unyéghofnar simén Ngánjánefaf. Fá ndimbal boute nénguwanoyénd Siria yuwot. 19 Fá nékmboyénd Efesos tesenan, Folém efrangeyai Frisila a Akwila. Fá yambia néngwanoi Ju árfene áumengégh méngot a tarundawét Ju árfé. 20 Njam yémofem yaunendayénd ámb efogh ámnjoghét yémafé, yémon yékenai. 21 Wénde njam Folém engéfrangoi, yémon unyéghofnar si emndai, "Yénd so kénangon Ngánjánene méndeyan." Féyo yémon yéfrangoi Efesos a mé tanmorwén Kaisariat. 22 Njam fá nufaryéng Kaisaria yuwot, fá néngwanoi Jerusalemét a áuwégh si ewaramai Yesuene mérnat, a néngangoi kétán Antiok yuwot.
bt: Fol stayed on with the believers in Korint for many days. Then he left the people who truly opprove(believers) there, and went with Frisila and her husband Akwila. They went down to Sensèri. There Fol had his head shaved in order to follow his without.lying(promise) to God. Then they went to Siria area with big bout. 19 They stopped at Efesos city, Fol left Frislia and Akwila. He himself went into the Ju people's meeting house and was discussing with Ju people. 20 When they asked him to stay with them, [but] he declined. 21 But when Fol left, he said without lying talk(did without-lying talk), "I will come back in the God's willing." Then he left Efesos and was coming to Kaisaria. 22 When he arrived at Kaisaria area, he went to Jerusalem and gave a greeting the Yesu's family(church), and went back to Antiok area.

nama: Ámb efogh ámnjogh soramé, Antiokta kétamé Fol néngwanoi yéné yuwomé karendau Galasia yu a Frigia yu, muyé tawarametau méinyotio waitogh árét. |nmx_215wbt - Paul journey 3 [bwf-light] @en_v4.tif|col||© 2025 Wycliffe Bible Translators, Inc.|Folene nambiomén áligh (Acts 18.23—21.17)|18.23—21.17
bt: After staying some days, Fol walked from Antiok around the region of Galatia area and Frigia area, gave strength to all the following men.

nama: Jumén ár yétkwén Afolos Aleksandria yumén yénmormén Efesos. Fá témorwén Buk si matyamafé. 25 Fá yatametaménd Yurane ende, korayau tikéf fésafé a tawatametau Yesuenemén merkéráye, wénde fá mat témorwén Jonene nu walitoghménro. 26 Yémon si yafngoi férférofnaye Ju árfene áumengégh méngo kénjún. Njam Frisila a Akwilafem yiyáreyayénd fá, yémofem yumyeyayénd kétán yéfenjo méngot a tawaferwét Afolose mbarkánde Ngánjánene end.
bt: Ju people name Afolos from Aleksandria region, came to Efesos. He was with the knowledge of the Buk(scripture). 25 He taught the way of the Lord, spoke with buring heart and taught about Yesu well, but he knew only the baptism of Jon. 26 He began to speak without.fear in the Ju people's meeting house. When Frisila and Akwila heard him, they invited him to their house and explained to Afolos the way of God straightly.

nama: Njam Afolos ménde témorwén Akaya ndimbal yuwot álighét, fútarém yawéngsotaménd fá a yéfarotaménd férén waitogh árfefaf Akaya ndimbal yuwon yá umyoghét. Yáne ufarghan, fá náyátoi ndimbal wáutárégh yéfeyot emofem efalo yiyátoyénd ménaye Ngánjánene ngáráme. 28 Fá kéwitawét marataye Ju árfé, yémon yéta safét tawakmetau Buk sita ndené Yesu témorwén Keriso.
bt: When Afolos wanted to go to Akaya big area, friends encouraged him and wrote the letter to the following men in Akaya big area to accept him. In his arriving, he became a big help to those who had truly approved(believed) through God's grace. 28 He discussed with the Ju people in public, he tried to put clearly from the Buk talk(Scripture) that Yesu was Keriso.

nama: Njam Afolos témorwén Korint tesenan, Fol tiotau mband tunamé kétán Efesos tesen néngufaryéng. Kété yémon ewinjoi ámb waitogh ár 2 a yémon emotai, "Fémofem Ngánján Mbérmbér té yanayénd njam fémofem efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yau, yénd yau náyárayém ndené yéna yém Ngánján Mbérmbér."
bt: While Afolos was in Korint city, Fol walked through the bank/interior and he arrived at Efesos city. There he found some following men 2 and he asked them, "Did you.p receive the God Spirit when you truly approved(believed) Yesu?" They answered him, "No, we did not hear that there is a God Spirit."

nama: Féyo Folém emotai, "Endene walitogh fémofem yanayénd?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Jonene nu walitogh."
bt: So Fol asked them, "What baptism did you.p receive?" They answered him, "Jon's Baptism."

nama: Folém norayai, "Jonene nu walitogh yémormén yaufita awengoghét. Joném tamndetau ár efalo yátoghét Yesu efe so yéném yá soramé." 5 Yéné si áyárghan, Folém ewalitotam Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan. 6 Njam Folém ngángé efayoi yéfefaf, Ngánján Mbérmbér táf yénmormén yéfefaf, a ámb sie korayawét a táitotawét Ngánjánene si. 7 Kété mété tamorwén 12 ár.
bt: Fol said, "Jon's baptism was to turn from sins. Jon told the people to truly approve(believe) Yesu, who was coming after him." 5 On hearing this, baptized them in the name of Lord Yesu. 6 When Fol placed his hands on them, the God Spirit came to them, and they spoke with other talks(languages) and proclaimed God's talk. 7 There were perhaps 12 men.

nama: Fol nénglawai Ju árfene áumengégh méngot a férférofnar korayau kété nambio ghérare. Yémo taruindau yémafé a yéta taméindau ménát sái efalo tiyátongayénd Ngánján limánéghmén. 9 Wénde ámb ár namndayénd tikéf táikér; fá kakenawét efalo yátoghét a marataye yaufi si korayawét Ngánjánene endmén. Féyo yéné yammén Folém efrangoi fá. Yémon engwasroi waitogh árfé téngwaruindawét si méinyotio efghon yétkwén Taranusoene watamegh méngon. 10 Fá yérsam sómbio yunjéf sian, féyo méinyotio Ju ár a Téndo ár Esia kénjún efe tamorwén náyárayénd Yurane si.
bt: Fol went into the Ju people's meeting house and spoke without fearing there for three months. He was discussing with them and tried to cause to truly opprove(believe) about ruling of God. 9 But some men became heart-harden(stubborn); they rejected to truly approve(believe) and publicly said evil talk about the way of God. So for this reason Fol left them. He took the following men with him [and] discussed everyday in the teaching house of Taranus. 10 He spend two years in talk, so that all Ju people and Side people who lived in Esia heard the talk of Lord.

nama: Ngánjánam yéramai Fole wafté sélngwélafé ásáfoghét. 12 Árém muku o sáláme Folém árké tiyánjangai tafayotawét enjne téfnárefaf, táf mer káyátotawét a yaufi mbérmbér kitérmbotawét.
bt: God gave Fol the power to do special workings(miracles). 12 People put handkerchiefs or clothes that Fol touched to the sick people, they became good and evil spirits were going out.

nama: Ámb Ju ár nuwanoyénd yéta yaufi mbérmbér tawifnawét Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan fá efe yaufi mbérmbéram tawasérmbotau. Ámb árém norayai, "Yesuene yétkwénan, endenemén Folém yaitote, yéndo némndetan, 'Kéntor.'" 14 Jumén limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár Skefane sefen ambumam yéné ásáfogh tafrotawét. 15 Ámb efghon yaufi mbérmbéram ewawangoi yéfe, "Yénd mat wém Yesu a yénd mat wém Folenemén, wénde fém efe em?" 16 Féyo yéné yaufi mbérmbérafé ár néngatnam yéfefaf a ewifnai méinyotio tásmetau. Fá méngota néngenngoyénd firo kérsawét férkafé.
bt: Some Ju people went [and] tried to chase out evil spirits in the name of Lord Yesu over those who evil spirit possessed. One [of them] said, "In the name of Yesu, whom Fol preaches, I command, "Come out." 14 A Ju chief burning sacrifice men(chief priest) Skefa's seven sons were doing this work. 15 One day the evil spirit answered them, "I know Yesu and I know Fol, but who are you.p?" 16 Then the man with the evil spirit jumped on them and chased them all and beated them. They ran from the house naked and bleeding.

nama: Kété Efesosén njam Ju ár a Téndo árém náyárayénd yénémamén, fá férfér tamorwén, yémofem tuwetawét Yuré Yesuene yétkwén. 18 Tárfár efe efalo yátogh ár náyátoyénd afrogh nufngoyénd yéfenjo yaufi wafroghmén. 19 Ámb ár efe kotametawét ghar yémofem tanérsawét yéfenjo ghar buk a tawarotawét maratan. Njam yémofem taftawét árfene bukmén fai kétán narsam tárfár milion kinat. 20 Féyo táf Yurane si marat káyátotau a kamndetau waftafé. |CN02003B.tif|col||© 1996 David C Cook. Used by permission.|Safén warogh ghar si fefé (Acts 19.19)|19.19
bt: There Efesos when the Ju people and Side people in the Efesos heard about this, they were afraid, they honored Lord Yesu's name. 18 Many who bacame truly appove people(believers) started to report(confess) their evil things. 19 Some people who learned/practiced sorcery they brought thier sorcery books and burned them publicly. When they counted the price of people's books was several million kina. 20 So the talk of the Lord became widely and became with power.

nama: Méinyotio yéné yam njam kufrotau soramé, Folém mwighé yaitotam yafoghét Makedonia a Akaya a Jerusalemét. Fol norayai, "Yénandmé yénd so kuwanon kétán Rom." 22 Féyo yémon ewáfáreméng yáne sómbio wáutárégh ár, Timoti a Erastus, kétán Makedoniat, wénde fá mé témorangérwén Esian. Kérté Efesos kénjún
bt: After all this had happened, Fol decided to go to Makedonia and Akaya and Jerusalem. Fol said, "After that I must go to Rom." 22 So he sent his two helpers, Timoti and Erastus, to Makedonia, but he stayed more in Esia. Trouble in Efesos

nama: Yéné efghon Efesos yuwon kérté yéfunayénd Ngánjánene Endmén. 24 Kété témorwén ár yétkwén Demetrios, emo tawafrotau silfé wáwefnogh méngo Artemis mewangoe. Fá efe kásáfotawét yémofem tawinjotawét tárfár mani. 25 Demetriosém eumendai yánjo ásáfogh ár a tamndangé, "Fútaréf, káyárangi, fém mat em yéndfem tawinjotam tárfár mani yéné ásáfoghmén. 26 Fémofem té yinjongi a yáyamngongi ndernáye Folém áfrat yényátote a ámb watameghe tárfár ár elimnde Efesos tesenan a méinyotio Esia yuwomé. Yémon noraye ndené ár wafroghmén ngánján yau em ngánján. 27 Yéné yam siyém áuwéghofnar yém ménamén téfene mani winjogh end so kefongé. Ndenéyameyo ndimbal amaf ngánján Atemisene wáwefnogh méngo so kamndangé fifiofnar, endeyot táwefnotat Esia a mband maratan. Árém yau so nemnat ndené amaf ngánján Atemis siyém ngánján."
bt: At that time trouble developed in Efesos because of God's Way. 24 There was a man name Demetrios, who made silver models of the worshipping house of the Artemis the goddess. Those who worked they found/earned a lot of money. 25 Demetios gathered his workers and said, "Friends, listen, you.p know we find/earn a lot of money for this work. 26 You.p have seen and knew how Fol has make them inside softly/convinced and led many people to other teaching in Efesos city and through whole Esia area. He said that gods made by man are not god. 27 This thing is without.joy because our way to find money will finish. Like that the worshipping house of the big woman god Atemis will be without.meaning, to whom they worship in Esia and the world. People will not think that the woman god Atemis is god."

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yéné si, fá nékw tamorwén a ke kutnawét ndené siafé, "Ndimbal ngánján amaf siyém Atemis Efesosén." 29 Ndimbal tesen nufnyai a ke kutnawét ménamén ámbiro mwighayan tamorwén. Árém ewanetangeyayénd Gayus a Aristakus, Folene arengégh fútaréf kétamé Makedonia yuta, a árém tawafarewét kétán áumengégh sifayat. 30 Fol ménde témorwén álighét áumengégh sifayat, wénde waitogh árém yau yéngéumyoyénd kétán álighét. 31 Ámb gafanane ásáfogh ár efe tamorwén Folene fútar, si wékeye yénmawatembayénd yau álighét kétán áumengégh sifayat.
bt: When they heard this talk, they were angry and started shouting like with talk, "Great is big woman god Artemes of Efesos." 29 The city joined and shouted because there were one mind. People grabbed Gayus and Aristakus, Fol's travelling friends came from Makedonia area, and people forced them to the meeting place. 30 Fol wanted to go meeting place, but following men did not allow him to go to there. 31 Some government workers who were Fol's friends, they sent talk him urgently not to go to the meeting place.

nama: Ár mérén kéwérsotawét ménamén fénatayero ke kutnawét. Tárfár ár yau mat tamorwén némamén fá kété tamorwén. 33 Ju árém yéngwáfáretayénd Aleksenda yéfefaf siot. Yémon árét ngángaye ewaunyai métar ekmboghét. Fá ménde témorwén ménát sái tamndangai fá ndené Ju ár yau kérté yéfunayénd. 34 Wénde njam yémofem yáyámngoyénd nde fá témorwén Ju ár, fá kutnawét sómbio efoghféneféne ndené keyafé, "Ndimbal yém Atemis Efesosménǃ"
bt: The crowds were wondering because they were various shouting. Many people did not know the reason/why they were there. 33 The Ju people sent Aleksandè to them to say. He motioned for silence with hand. He wanted to tell them that Ju people had not developed the problem. 34 But when they realized that he was a Ju, they were shouting for two hours like that, "Big is Atemis of the Efesos!"

nama: Tesenmén gafanane ásáfogh árom ekmboi a norayai, "Efesosmén ár, fém mat em ndené Efesos tesen siyém wanjengégh ár ndimbal amaf ngánján Artamisene wáwefnogh méngo a yéné amafoene sáf mbanmban árké néneworyéng njafarta. 36 Efe yau so korayangé fá yau nénui njafarta. Fém métar. Némé yau yafrotati namname. 37 Fémofem yéné ár tánémnjati yénan, yémofem yau yaufi si korayat téfene ngánjánefaf a yau némndafi oroe tarsat téfene ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngota. 38 Féyo njam Demetrios a yáne ásáfogh árfé kérté ewam, mogh siyém sauréghkaf yém a yéna em mogh ár. Féyotaro fá so norayat yéné yammén. 39 Njam kérté mé em, so tanwanangi kétán moghfaf. 40 A féyo mat ayéném yéné, ndené njam sénko ár káyárangi némé yéndfem tafrotam sénonjo, yémofem mété yénémndetat ndimbal kérté funaghmén. Yéndfem yéné tafrotam fifiofnar, féyo némé yénd so norayam njam yénd yénmotat yénémamén." 41 Féyo yéné si soramé, yémon ár ewáfárnayéng.
bt: A city government working man stopped them and said, "People of Efesos, You.p know that the city of Efesos is guarding man of the worshipping house of the big woman god Artemis and this woman's face image came down from heaven. 36 Nobody can say that she did not come down from heaven. Be calm. Do not rush into anything. 37 You brought these men here, they did not say badly to our god and they did not steal anything from our god's worshipping house. 38 Then if Demetrius and his worker have a case against them, the court are open and there are a judge. They can say about this things. 39 If there are more complaint, they take to the court. 40 And so we know, that if head people hear what we did today, they will still talk to us about creating big trouble. We did it without.reason, so what we will say if they ask us about this. " 41 After saying this, he sent people.

nama: Njam tesenan sarake nefoi, Fol néngwanoi kétán waitogh árfefaf, a tawawéngsotau yéfe. Féyo fá emndayéng "Yao" a táf néwanoi Makedonia yuwot. 2 Fá ngrendau yéné yuwomé, ngorayau tárfár wawéngsogh si árfefaf soramé Fol néngufaryéng Grik yuwot, 3 kété fá yémorangérmén nambio ghérare. Féyo mwighé yaitotam Siria yuwot angoghét ndimbal boute, wénde fá náyárai ndené ámb Ju árém yá ngiot mwighé táitotawét. Féyo yémon mwighé yaitotam tunamé angoghét Makedoniamé. 4 Sofata Firusene ambum kétándmamén Bereya yumén, Aristakus a Sekundus kétándmamén Tesalonika yumén, Gaius kétándmamén Derbe yumén, Timoti ndenéyameyo, Tukikus a Trofimus kétándmamén Esia marat yumén yémafé Folfé tayotau. 5 Yéné ár engmormén frondeyo ténmanjetawét yénd Troas tesenan. 6 Wénde yénd ndimbal boute ténngmorwén kétamé Filifi tesenta Minaghofnar flawé téménd soramé. Ámb 5 efogh soramé yénd nufnyayém kété Troas tesenan, ánde yénd yémorangérmén sefen efogh. Yutikus kérta nanoi Troas tesenan
bt: When the noising ended in the city, Fol went to the following people, and encouraged them. Then he said, "Goodbye" and went to Makedonia region. 2 He traveled through those regions, after speaking many talks of encouragement to the people Fol arrived in Grik country, 3 there he stayed three months. He decided to go back with big boat(ship) to Siria region, but he heard that some Ju people decided to kill him. So he decided to return through land [through] Makedonia. 4 Sofata Firus's son from Berea area, Aristakus and Sekudus from Tesalonika area, Gaius from Derbe area, Timoti also, Tukikus and Trofimus from province of Eisia went with Fol. 5 These men went on ahead and waited for us at Traus town. 6 But we came from Filifi city after the Festival of without.yeast bread. 5 days later we joined them at Traus city, where we stayed 7 days. Yutikus raised from the death at Traus town

nama: Sande efghon yénd yénngmormén mérne ménát féskaf flawé nénet. Folém korayau árfefaf a sian mé téngmorwén kétánotio sémbár néndkéf, ménamén ámb efghon álighét karametawét. 8 Yéné méngo kénjún kété kánetawét tárfár kwayaghé ánde yénd káumendawém. 9 Kété ámb totér ár yétkwén Yutikus témorangérwén mbormbor sésafneyan, njamandio Fol mé korayau teke, Yutikus kémégham térametau. Kerkeran, fá kémégh nakmai nambio kitaré satayan kétándmé nénuyai mbandot. Yémofem yékafayénd kérwén.
bt: On Sunday we came together to eat bread . Fol spoke to the people and kept on speaking until midnight, because he was making to go the next day. 8 There was many lights in the house where we gathered. 9 There a young man name Yutikus sitting on the window. As Fol continued talking for a long time, Yutikus was feeling sleepy. Finally he felt a sleep on the third floors and from there fell down to the ground. When they picked him up, he was dead.

nama: Fol néngeworyéng yuwot, néngáwefnoi ngángé efayoi yáfaf. Féyo Folém tamndangé, "Yau mámé mwighé em, fá mé ghérsé yémǃ" 11 Féyo Fol wéikor néngarmboi tukét, a ténetau féskaf flawé. Fol mé korayau kétánotio akw yéfawéryéng soramé yémo efrangoi. 12 Árém totér ár yéngwanayénd méngot a yéfeyot ndimbal áuwéghafé témorwén ménamén kérta nanoi. Folfé nafángoyénd Efesos sénko árfé
bt: Fol went down to the ground, bent over [and] put his hand to him. So Fol said, "Don't worry, he is alive!" 11 Then Fol went up again ontop, and ate bread. After Fol continued to talk until daybreak, he left. 12 The people took the young man to the house and were very happy because he raised from the death. Fol meets the Efesos head people

nama: Fol té norayai ndené yémo so ténfángongai kété Asosén, ménamén fá tiyotau álighe. Féyo fronde yénd nénguwanoyém Boutfaf a ngérsawém kétán Asos tesenot. Kété yénd ménde ténmormén sái téfángongayém fá a téngwanangayém bout. 14 Njam yémon yénfángoyéng Asosén, yéndfem fá yéngwaflayém a néngwanoyém Mitilan tesenot. 15 Ámb efghon yéndfem yéfrangoyém yéné a néngwanoyém ndimbal boute kétán Kios tesenot. Yéné efogh soramé wéi néngurtoyém Samos tesenot, sómbio efogh soramé néngufaryém Miletus tesenot. 16 Fol yau ménde témorwén ménát sái témorangérwén Esia marat yuwon, féyo mwighé yéfaronam yau so kékmbongai Efesosén. Ménamén fá ménde témorwén wékeye ufarghét Jerusalemét wafarogh téménd yétkwén Fentikost
bt: Fol had said he would meet us at Asos, because he was travelling by walking. So firstly we went on to the boat and travel to Asos town. There we wanted to meet him and to take him on the boat. 14 When he met us at Asos, we took him aboard and went on to Mitilan town. 15 The next day we left from there and went to Kios town with big boat(ship). The day after we crossed again to Samos, two days later we arrived at Miletus town. 16 Fol does not want to stay on the province of Esia, so he decided not to stop Efesos. Because he wanted to go Jerusalem quickly in time for the remembering festival name Fentikost.

nama: Kétándmé Miletus tesenta, Folém si yatembai kétán Efesos yumén Yesuene mérén sénko árét álighét yémafé siot. 18 Njam sénko ár nufaryénd, Fol norayai yéfefaf, "Fém mat em ndernáye yénd kásáfotan féfe kénjún kétándmayo frondefifi efghon yénd njam nufaryén Esia marat yuwon. 19 Yénd kásáfotan ndimbal yuwan mwighaye a yengamafé. Yénd tékrátan kawamarotan ménamén Ju árém ngiot kwérametawét. 20 Fém mat em ndené yénd yau férfér kwém si waitoghét árkéméné féfe wáutárghafé tém wénde tawatametawén fém marataye méinyotio méngomé. 21 Yéndon táitotawén si yéfe Ju ár a Grikmén árét ménát fá so nawengotat yaufita Ngánjánefaf a efalo so yiyátotat téfene Yuré Yesu.
bt: From Miletus town, Fol sent a talk to Yesu's family(church) head people from Efesos city to come to talk with him. 18 When head people arrived, Fol said to them, "You know how I worked among you from first day when we arrived the province of Esia. 19 I worked with big low mind( humility) and with tear. I have endured pains because the Ju people made plots to kill me. 20 You know that I was without fearing preaching which were helping you but I taught you publicly all through the houses. 21 I preached them, to [both] Ju people and Grik people in order that they must turn from sins to God and truly approve(believe) our Lord Yesu.

nama: "Sénonjo Ngánján Mbérmbéroene sian, yénd so kuwanon Jerusalemét, mat yau wém némé yam so nufrote kété tafaf. 23 Wénde yénd yénaro mat wém méinyotio tesenan Ngánján Mbérmbéram waufrote ndené Jerusalemén árém so kwényawangi yénd kwéfkwéf méngon a yénd so tékratan kwékmangi. 24 Wénde tane fifie ghérsé siyém fifiofnar yém, wénde yéné fifiyafé tafaf yém: ndené yéndo so tifon wérse Yuré Yesum árké waramai, mer si waitogh ásáfoghét Ngánjánene ngárámmén
bt: Now in the talk of the God Spirit, I will go to the Jerusalem, I don't know what will happen to me there. 23 But I only know this in all cities God Spirit said that in Jerusalem people will put me into the darkness house and will put me in suffering. 24 But my bodily life is without.meaning but this is meaningful to me: that I will finish the race which the Lord Yesu gave me, of the work/task of preaching to the good talk about the grace of God.

nama: "Yénd mat wém féfefafmé té karendan Ngánján limánéghmén si táitotan. Wénde sénonjo yénd mat wém ndené fémofem yau so wéikor kwinjongi. 26 Yénémamén sénonjo yénd sotafé si norayan. Njam fém ámb kér ném Yesu efalo yátoghofnar, fémofem yau so kwéfayongi yénd yénémamén. 27 Yénd yau férfér kwém méinyotio Ngánjánene ménde waitoghét féfefaf. 28 Fém kor nawarawenati fémyo a méinyotio Yesuene mérén árké Ngánján Mbérmbéram té ewaferyéng ár wanjengét. Ngánjánene Yesuene mérén wanjengégh ár aem, yémon yánjo férke té yénmanai. 29 Yénd ndené mat wém, yénd njam kuwanon munjan ághé so kufarngi féfene kénjúnyo a yau so ewarawenat wénde so esmetat krot. 30 Yénémamén féfenjo mérén kénjúmén ár so kénokayongi a elimndat efalo yátogh ár ménát so ewaitotat yéfene unyégh watamegh. 31 Aya kor fém nawarawenatiǃ Té nawafarotati ndené nambio yunjéf yéndon tawawéngsotawén ekmboghofnar fém ámbiroámbiroe yengamafé méinyotio efogh a sémbár.
bt: I have gone among you.p, preached the talk of the kingdom of God. But now I know that you will not see me again. 26 Therefore now I talk strong talk(declare) to you.p. If some of you die truly without.opprove(without trusting)Yesu, you will not able to blame me for that. 27 I was not afraid to proclaim to you whole will of God. 28 Keep watch yourselves and all the Yesu's family which God Spirit has appointed you looking.after people(caretakers). Be God's Yesu's family(church) guarding people, [which]he bought them with his own blood. 29 I know that, when I leave wild dogs will arrive in among you and will not spare you but strike to kill. 30 So some men from your group will arise and lead the approving truth people to follow their false teaching. 31 Carefully watch guard yourselves! Remember that for three years I warned each of you without.stop with tears all day and night.

nama: "Yénémamén sénonjo yéndon ewatetan fém kétán Ngánjánefaf a kétán ngárám sifaf, árké siam fém so ewanote a efrende méinyotio efe té efaloi yandio. 33 Yéndon yau féfene sáláme o mani mwighaye takwnan tayot. 34 Fém méinyo mat em ndené yénd tanjo ngángaye kásáfotawén tanjo sálámet a maniot a ndenéyameyo tane fútarat. 35 Yéné ende yéndo té tawauyafotan ndernáye fém so emor. Fém so násáfotati táikrataye ménát yauyau ár so ewáutánati, so nawafarotam Yuré Yesuene si fá árké korayau: 'Ramégh ároene áuwégham yáinde yáne áuwégh emo rokar tanangé.'"
bt: Therefore now I commit you.p to God and to the talk of the grace, which talk can stand you up and bless all of you.p whom has set apart for himself. 33 I did not desire your clothing or money to me. 34 You yourselves know whole that I worked with my hands for my clothes and money and also for my friends. 35 In everything I did, I showed work to you.p in order that we should help poor people, we should remember the talk of the Lord Yesu said: '‘The happiness of the man who gives things surpasses the happiness of the man who gets things.’ '

nama: Njam Folém si ewifoi, fá méinyotio budme neitaménd Ngánjánafé orayéghét. 37 Féyo táf yémofem yengamafé yambnayénd a Fol tésnetawét. 38 Fá áuwéghofnar tamorwén ménamén Fol árké norayai ndené ámb káye tane sáf yau so kor yéfandati. Féyo yémofem engémnjoyénd ndimbal boutfaf.
bt: When Fol finished talk, they all knelt and talked with God. 37 Then they hugged with weeping and kissed Fol. 38 They were without joy because which Fol said that later you.p will not see my face again. Then they accompanied him to the big boat(ship).

nama: Yéndfem yao si engwaramayém yéfeyot, yéné soramé yénd boutan nénguflayém a tényotau kétán Kos férot. Ámb efghon yénd nénguflayém kétán Rodas férot a kétándmé kétán Fatara yuwot. 2 Yéndfem ndimbal bout yinjoyém kéférmetau kétán Fonisia yuwot, wéi nénguflayém ténngmorwén. 3 Soramé Saifrus yu yéngwinjoyém, yéngwaindayém náikáita kétán Siria yuwot. Yénd nurtoyém Taire yuwon, kété árém turtotawét rokar ndimbal boutta. 4 Yesuene waitogh ár ewinjoyém kété, yémafé yénmorangérmén sefen efogh. Ngánján Mbérmbér waftayan yémofem yémndayénd Fol yau álighét kétán Jerusalemét. 5 Efogh njam nawerai frangoghét, yéndfem yéfrangoyém a néngwanoyém boutfaf mérne méinyotio waitogh ár a yéfene amaf a ambumtértér tesenta. Kété arakaf téndon yénd budme niayém Ngánjánafé korayawém. 6 Yao si soramé norayayénd yéfendio, yénd nénguflayém ndimbal boutan, a fá nénangoyénd méngot.
bt: We said goodbye to them, after this we went aboard the big boat(ship) and were traveling to island of Kos. The next day we went to island of Rodas and from there to Fatara area. 2 We found a big boat(ship) crossing to Fonisia area, we went on board and went again. 3 After we saw Saifrus area, and passing to the south to Siria area. we landed at Taire area, there people unloaded cargo from big boat(ship). 4 We saw the following men there, [and] stayed with them 7 days. By the power of the God Spirit they said to Fol not to go Jerusalem. 5 When it was time to leave, we left and went to boat with all the following men and their wives and children from the city. There in the beach we knelt and talked with God. 6 After they said goodbye to each other, we went aboard the big boat(ship) and they went back homes.

nama: Yéné soramé yéndfem áligh yéngwasamngoyém kétándmé Taireta a néngamghayém Tolemais tesen. Kété yénd áuwéghafé nawinjoyém fútarafé kété yénmorangérmén ámbiro efogh. 8 Ámb efghon yénd néngufaryém Kaisaria tesen a yénmorangérmén Filifene méngon. Yéné Filif siyém si waitogh ár a ámb sefenmén efe yékafayénd ménát kwiré amafat wáutáréghét. 9 Yáne awerghofnar mérés tamorwén fo emofem Ngánjánene si táitotawét.
bt: After this we continued to travel from Taire and landed at Tolemais town. There we saw with joy with friends there we stayed for a day. 8 The next day we arrived Kaisaria city and stayed at the Filif's house. This Filif was a preacher and one of 7 men who had been chosen to help widows. 9 He had 4 single/unmarried daughters who proclaimed God's talk.

nama: Yénd kété yénmorangérmén tárfár efogh, Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yétkwén Agabus yénmormén kétándmé Judiata. 11 Téfefaf nénaflai, yémon tékafangé Folene beles. Féyo yémo yánjo ngángé a kafkaf eumbai yéné siafé, "Ngánján Mbérmbér norayai, 'Yéné ende Jerusalemén Ju árém so yumbetat yéné beles yuré a so téramangi Téndo árfene ngángat.'"
bt: We had been there many/several days, the God's man who make know(prophet) name Agabus came from Judia. 11 He came to us, he took Fol's belt. The he tied up his own hands and feet and said this talk, "The God Spirit said, 'Like this Ju people in Jerusalem will tie the owner of this belt up and will give him the Side people's hands.'"

nama: Yénd njam náyárayém yéné si, yénd a ámb ár norayayém Fol, "Fém yau so niota Jerusalemét." 13 Féyo Folém yénmawangoi, "Némamén fém ye nendati tane tikéf karéfkaréf yafrotati? Yénd wém afrengéghkaf umbghét a kérot Jerusalemén Yuré Yesuene yétkwénot." 14 Yéndfem ndernáye ende yau so áfrat kényátongém, féyo yénd nékmboyém a norayayém, "Yurane méndero so nufrote."
bt: When we heard this talk, we and other people said to Fol not to go Jerusalem. 13 Then Fol answered us, "Why are you weeping and making pieces(breaking) my heart? I am ready to be bound and to die in Jerusalem for the name of Lord Yesu." 14 How could not we make soft(persuade) him, so we stop and said, "The Lord's will be done."

nama: Yéné soramé, yénd nafrendamém a néngwanoyém Jerusalemét. 16 Ámb waitogh ár kétamamén Kaisaria yénngmaitoyénd a yénngémnjoyénd kétán Nasonene méngot ánde yénd so ténmorangérwén kété. Fá témorwén Saifrusmén ár a ámb fronde waitogh ár. Fol nufaryéng Jerusalemét
bt: After this, we prepared and went to Jerusalem. 16 Some of the following men from Kaisaria followed us and took us to the house of Nason, where we were to stay there. He was a man from Saifros and one of the early/first following men. Fol arrived at Jerusalem

nama: Njam yénd néngufaryém Jerusalemét, efalo yátogh árém yénmumyoyénd yénd áuwéghafé. 18 Ámb efghon Fol a ámb ár néngaflayém kétán Jemsefaf, méinyotio sénko ár kété tamorwén. 19 Folém áuwégh si ewaramai a tawaufrotau méinyotio yam némé Ngánjánam tafrotau Téndo árfefaf yáne ásáfoghan.
bt: When we arrive at Jerusalem, the belivers welcomed us with joy. 18 The next day Fol and other people went to Jems, and all the head people were there. 19 Fol greeted them and told everything what God had done to the Side people in his work.

nama: Yémofem njam káyáretawét yéné si, yémofem Ngánján tuwetawét. Féyo yémofem korayangi Folefaf, "Fútar, téfanda nderé tárfár 1,000 Ju árém efalo yiyátoyénd, yémofem méinyotio sote mé táitotawét nák. 21 Yéné Ju ár té náyárangi fémon némé taitote Ju árfefaf efe tamorangérwén Téndo árfefafmé. Fá ndené kemnawét fémo kar tamndetau, 'Fém yau táf náyáretati Mosesene nákfaf ndenayu. Fémofem yau táf ghéngan enfetati féfene ambumtértér. Fém yau so emor ndené ende Ju ár kés emor.' 22 Némé yéndfem so yafrotam? Fá so káyárangi ndené fém té kéném. 23 Féyo tafrota némé yéndfem némndetam. Yéna em yéndfé fo Ju efalo yátogh ár emofem unyéghofnar si norayayénd Ngánjánefaf. 24 Tangémnjongi yéné ár wáwefnogh méngot, so ngufnyangi yéfenjo wányányégh téméndfaf a so fai nufrotat ghéngén raméghmén. Yéné soramé yémofem so yéfenjo sénko séf ewérnat. Féyo méinyotio ár mat so em kété siyém efalo si yau yényau afrogh sian fenemén, wénde fém fémyo némor ndernáye nák noraye. 25 Ndenaye téndo efalo yátogh árfenemén, yéndfem téfarotam yéfe téfene mwighé ndené yémofem yau táf enetat mewang njamke, a férék, a férék eréghofnar wérár, ndenéyameyo téndo wal."
bt: When they heard this talk, they praised God. Then they said to Fol, "Friend, you.s see how many thousands of Ju people have truly approved(believed), they all follow the law very strongly. 21 These Ju people heard what you preached Ju people who live among the Side people. They think that you.p say to them, "You must not obey Moses's law any longer. You must not cut skin of your children. You must not live in the way that Ju people usally live." 22 What shall we do? They will hear that you have come. 23 So do what we are telling you.s. Here are with us 4 Ju men who truly opprove(believers)who said without.lying talk to God. 24 Take these men to the worshipping house, join in their washing ceremony(ceremony of purificaton) and pay for the offering sacrifice. After that they will shave their heads. Then every people will know there is not truth in their reporting talk about you.s, but you.s yourself are living as how law said. 25 As for the side approving truth people, we wrote to them our thought that they must not eat food for idols, and blood, and meat without taking out blood, and also sex out of (marriage)."

nama: Ámb efghon Foléf engmormén ámb árfé a yémofem yafrotaménd yéné téméndmén yam ndernáye témorwén wányányéghmén. Yéné soramé, fá néngwanoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a tamndetau ghéngén wárogh ár, "Kétán árké efghot so em sái kénamndangi njúnnjúnofnar yam so kefongé, yéndfem so enérsam ghéngén yénat." Fol yerayénd
bt: The next day Fol went with the men and they did what was spoken for washing. After they did that, he went to the worshipping house area and told the man who burn the sacrifice(priest), "When the amount of days for becoming without.dust are finished, we will bring sacrifices for that." They held Fol

nama: Njam sefen efogh awaingétro tamorwén, ámb Ju ár kétándmé enmormén Esia marat yuta Fol yinjoyénd wáwefnogh méngo sifayan. Fá nékwafé naindaménd ár mérén eumendayénd a Fol yerayénd. 28 A fá korayawét ndené, "Israil ár, ténmáutánangiǃ Yéné ár fiyém emo ewatamete méinyotio ár méinyotio yuwomé téfene ár ewasérmbote a téfene nák a yéné wáwefnogh méngo. Yémon enwasroi Grikmén ár wáwefnogh méngot a taghnawét yéné njúnnjúnofnar sifayé." 29 Méné téfnan fá norayayénd ndené ende ménamén yémofem té ewinjeyayénd Téndo ár Trofimus Efesosmén Folfé tesenan a fá nemnayénd ndené Folém ténémnje wáwefnogh méngot.
bt: When the 7 days passed almost, some Ju people from the province of Esia saw Fol in the worshipping house area. They get angry and gathered the crowd [and] grapped Fol. 28 And they said that, "Men of Israil, help us! This is the man who teaches every people everywhere spoiled our people and our law and this worshipping house. He brought Grik men into the worshipping house and defiles this without.dust(holy) place." 29 For the reason they spoke this way was because they had seen outside man Trofimus from Efesos with Fol in the city and they thought that Fol escorted him into the worshipping house.

nama: Méinyotio tesen ár néngenngoyénd wéla end kafemé. Kété Fol yerayénd, yémofem téngroghawét kétándmé wáwefnogh méngota. Tekofnaye wáwefnogh méngo sésafne emnayénd. 31 Yémofem ngiot yafngoyénd Fol njam Rom fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom náyárai ndené méinyotio Jerusalem tesen sarakeyan témorwén. 32 Yémon táf fété ámb fiyaré sénko ár a fiyaré ewerai a néngenngoyénd kétán ár mérnafefaf. Njam ngi téfnáram yinjoyénd fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár a yáne fiyaré, fá nékmboyénd Fole ngita.
bt: The whole city people ran from all directions. There they caught Fol, they dragged him from the worshipping house. Immediately they closed the worshipping house gate. 31 They began to strike Fol when the Roman soldiers big head man heard that the whole city of Jerusalem was in the noise. 32 He at once took some soldier's head men and soldiers and ran to the crowd. When the killers/riots saw the soldiers' big head man of soldier and his soliers, they stopped striking Fol.

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár nénaflai a yerai Fol a ewáfáretai umbghét ménaye sómbio seine. Féyo fá namotai, "Efe fá yém a némé yémo tafrote?" 34 Ámb yéné mérén kénjún kutnawét, yémo tafrotau yéné yam a ámb fénatayam tafrote. Wénde ménamén fá ménjtaye kutnawét minde ke, fiyaré ndimbal sénko árém efalo si yau yékafai. Féyo yémo emndai, "Téngémnjongi yéné ár kétán fiyarafene sifayat!" 35 Njam Fol raté kaka namndai, ár mérén minde nékwafé nafghetaménd. Yénémamén fiyaram yuyoyénd ménát yambayénd. 36 Ár mérén efe kuwaitotawét ménjtaye mé kutnawét, "Téngésmangiǃ Téngésmangiǃ" Fol korayau ár mérnafefaf
bt: The Soldiers big head man went and held Fol and commanded him to bind with two chains. Then he asked, "Who is he and what he did?" 34 Some in the crowd shouted he did this thing and others he did different things. But because they continued shouting so loudly, soldiers' big head man could not pick the truth. So he said to them, "Take this man into the soldier place." 35 When Fol came to the steps, the crowd became very angry. So soldiers lift him to protect him. 36 The crowd who were following [and] kept shouting, "Kill him, Kill him!" Fol spoke to the crowd

nama: Njam Fol ménjághétro témorwén kétán fiyarafene sifayat, yémo témotangé fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár, "Féyotaro yénd so korayangén ámb si fefaf?"
bt: When the soldiers were about to take Fol into the soldier's place, he asked the soldiers' big head man(commander), "May I say something to you?"

nama: Fém yéné ném Ijifmén ár emo yérnyai awifarégh nambétio elimai 4,000 fiyaré kétán fanfne sifayat?"
bt: Are you the Ijif man who led arguing recently [and] led 4,000 soldiers into the desert?"

nama: Folém yawangoi, "Yau, yénd yau! yénd swém Ju ár, kété náráftamén Tarsus tesenan, árké yém mer marataye matkaf tesen Silisia kénjún. Féyotaro yénd so kwumyo yéné árfefaf siot."
bt: Fol answered him, "No, I am not! I am a Ju man, there I was born in Tarsus city, which is famous city in Silisia. Please let me speak to these people."

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom yumyoi siyot, Fol nokayoi ratayan a ekmboi ár. Fá njam métar náyátoyénd, fá korayangé yéfefaf Ibru sie.
bt: The soldiers' big head man allowed him to talk, Fol stood on the steps and stop/make silent people. When they became quiet, he spoke to them in Ibru language

nama: Njam yémofem yiyárayénd Fol korayau Ibru sie, fá métar namndayénd.
bt: When they heard Fol speak to them in Ibru language, they became quiet.

nama: "Yénd swém Ju ár, náráftamén Tarsus tesenan Silisia yuwon, wénde nanotamén Jerusalemén. Wémormén watametaménd afafene náke a Gamaliel siyém tane watamegh ár. Yénd ménde kwémorwén sái tiyáretawén Ngánján merkéráye ndené méinyotio fémofem sewafrotati sénonjo. 4 Yéndon tásmetawén ár kérotio efe kuwaitotawét yéné Endén, taweretawén ár a amaf a tangwitawén kwéfkwéf méngot. 5 Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a méinyotio Ju sénko árfene áumengégh téfnáram so nafrotat yéné simén efalo yém. Yémofem kwaramangayénd férén Ju árfefaf Damaskos kénjún. Féyo yénd kwéngmorwén kétán yéné ár tánémnjawén ndené fété kwéfkwéf méngo ásáfogh ár kétán Jerusalemét kértayan kémghét.
bt: "I am Jew, born in Tarsus city in Silisia region, but grew up in Jerusalem. I learned the law of our fathers and Gamalel is my teacher. I have wanted to obey God carefully as all of you do today. 4 I hit to death the people who followed this Way, [and] held men and women and threw them into darkness house. 5 The leading burning sacrifice man and all the Ju head men's meeting can testify of this talk is true. They gave me letters to Ju people in Damaskos. So I went there to bring these men as darkness house men(prisoners) to Jerusalem to put punishment.

nama: "Ámb efogh sotan, njam kaka yéngyátoyén Damaskos, sélngwéle njafarmén ndimbal kwayaghayam wélálái yénd. 7 Yénd nuyáyén mbandot a náyárayén kém a norayai tafaf ndené, 'Solǃ Solǃ Fémo némamén yénd wésmete?'
bt: One day about noon, when I was getting close to Damaskos, suddenly strong light from heaven shone around me. 7 I fell to the ground and heard a voice and said to me that, 'Sol! Sol! Why are you hitting me?'

nama: "Yénd namotayén, 'Fém efe ném, Yuré?'
bt: I asked, "Who are you, Lord?"

nama: Tane mérnam yinjoyénd kwayaghé, wénde yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd yáne kém efe korayau tafaf.
bt: My companions saw the light, but they did not understand his voice who was speaking to me.

nama: "Yéndon yémotayén, 'Némé so yéndon yafrotan, Yuré?'
bt: I asked him, "What shall I do, Lord?"

nama: Tane mérnam kwémnjawét Damaskos kénjút, ménamén ndimbal kwayaghayam ghékéf kwéfkwéf wiyátoi.
bt: My groups/companions led me by the hand to Damaskos, because strong light had me blind.

nama: "Ár yétkwén Ananias yénmormén ta fandaghét. Fá témorwén Ngánján wáwefnogh ár a ndimbal kéráye tutémndawét Ju árém efe méinyotio kété tamorangérwén. 13 Fá nokayoi ta kaka korayangé, 'Fútar Sol, kéretaǃ' Táf fété néretayén yinjoyén Ananias.
bt: A man name Ananias came to see me. He was God worshipper and highly respected by the Ju people who were all living there. 13 He stood close me and said, 'Brother Sol, see!' At once I saw [and] found Ananias!

nama: "Féyo Ananias norayai, 'Téfene ákifene Ngánjánam némafer fém ménát yáne mwighé mat fém so ném a ménát so tinjo mbarkánd ár a náyáreta si yáne mbírmbírta. 15 Fém so ném yáne fandagh ár méinyotio árfefaf némé té téfandau a káyáretau. 16 Sénonjo némat fém nawanjete? Kokai, so némálitotat a Ngánján so tawalindangé fene yaufi táf njam Ngánjánafé oraighan ném Kerisoene yétkwénan.'
bt: Then Ananias said, 'The God of our fathers chose you to know his will and to see straight man and to hear talk from his mouth. 15 You will be his watching man to all people of what you have seen and heard. 16 Now why are you waiting? Get up, they will baptize you and God will forgive your sins by talking with God in Keriso's name."

nama: "Yéné soramé yénd néngangoyén Jerusalemét a Ngánjánafé koraiwém wáwefnogh méngon. Yéndon yinjoyén ghékéf waingégh yam 18 a Yuram kwémndetau, 'Wékeye kuwano Jerusalem téfrango ménamén yémofem yau so tumyongi fene afrogh si tanemén.'
bt: After this I went back to Jerusalem, I was talking with God in the worshipping house. I saw a eye passover thing 18 and the Lord said me, "Quickly go & leave Jerusalem because they will not accept your reporting/testifying talk about me.'

nama: "Yéndon yawangoyén, 'Yuré, yéné ár mat em tanemén ndené yénd kwiotau tárfár Ju árfene áumengégh méngomé. Yéndon taweretawén kwéfkwéf méngot élaughét a tásmetawén ár emofem efalo kényátotawét fém. 20 Njam árém yésmetaménd Stifen ménamén fá korayau árfefaf fenemén, yénd kété kwakayongérwén a ámbiro tikéfan ténmorwén yémafé. Yéndo tawanjetawén yéfene sáláme emofem tésmetawét kérot Stifen.'
bt: I answered him, "Lord, these people know about me that I went from one meeting house to another. I held them to put in the darkness house and beat people who truly approve(believe) you. 20 When people killed Stifèn because he said to people about you, I stood there and was one mind with them. I took care of the clothes of those who were killing Stifèn.'

nama: "Féyo Yuré norayai tafaf, 'Kuwano, yéndon so némáfáretan fém nayu yuwot kétán Téndo árfefaf.'" Fol naufaryéng yénd swém Rommén ár
bt: Then the Lord said to me, "Go, I will send you far away to the Side people." Fol reported I am a Rom man

nama: Ár mérnam kor merkéráye káyáretawét Folefaf kétánotio njam fá norayai téndo árfenemén. Yémofem kém euyoyénd nékwan a kutnawét, "Yéné ár titérmbongi yéné yutaǃ Fá yau féyotaro yém mé ghérsé sái yémǃ"
bt: The crowd were listening carefully to Fol until (when) he spoke about Side people. Then they raised voices with angry and shouted, "Remove this man from this land! He is not fit to live!"

nama: Fá ke kutnawét a tafnendawét yéfenjo sáláme a ngwérméng tétnendawét tukét. 24 Fiyaré ndimbal sénko árém yánjo ár ewáfáretai Fole wasroghét kétán fiyarafene sifayat. Yémon emndai yánjo ár Fole ngiot. Yéné ende fá ménde témorwén yáne árém so tinjongayénd némamén ár mérén kutnawét Folefaf. 25 Njam fiyaram ngiot yafngoyénd, yémon yémndai fiyaré sénko ár, "Yufi yém Rommén ár ngiot endene yaufi yau yinjongi!"
bt: They were shouting and shaked his clothes and threw dust into the air. 24 The soldiers' big head man sent his men to take Fol to the Soldiers' place(fortress). He told his men to beat Fol. In this way he wanted his men to find out why the crowd shouted at Fol. 25 When the soldiers were about to beat Fol, he said to the soldiers' head man, "It is illegal to beat a Roman people whose evil they has not found!"

nama: Njam fiyaré sénko ár náyárai yéné si, fá naflai kétán fiyaré ndimbal sénko ároefaf a yémndai, "Yau yafrota yéné yam yéné árofefaf. Yéné ár siyém Rommén ár."
bt: When the soldiers' head man heard this talk, he went to the soldiers' big head man(commander), asked him, "Do not do this to this man. This man is a Roman citizen."

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár néngaflai Folefaf a yémotai, "Kwaufro ta, fém fété ném Rommén ár?" Folém yawangoi, "A, yénd fété wém."
bt: The soldiers' big head man(commander) went to Fol and asked him, "Tell me, are you really a Roman citizen?" Fole answered him, "Yes, I am really."

nama: Féyo fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár norayai, "Yéndo ndimbal mani té ekman so kamndangé Rommén ár." Folém yawangoi, "Wénde yénd náráftamén Rommén árot."
bt: Then the soldiers' big head man(commander) said, "I paid a lot of money for becoming Rom people." Fol answered him, "But I was born as a Roman citizen."

nama: Fiyaré efe ngiot a ámoghétro femormén Folefaf, táf fété yau yafrotaménd. Fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár férféram yifoi, ménamén yémon emndai yánjo ár Fole umbghét, wénde Fol témorwén Rommén ár. Fol yakai Ju sénko árfene áumengégh sáfrére
bt: Soldiers who were about to whip and to ask Fol, at once they didn't do it. The soldiers' big head man was afraid, because he told his men to bind Fol, but Fol was a Roman citizen. Fol stood before Ju head men's meeting

nama: Ámb efghon, fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom téronjau téfén némamén Fol tékarotawét Ju árém. Féyo ámb efghon fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom Folene sein yaferyéng. Fá wéi emndai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a méinyotio Ju sénko ár áumengéghét. Yémon yéngémnjoi Fol a Ju sénko árfene sáfrére nokayoi. |CN02020B.tif|col||© 1996 David C Cook. Used by permission.|Foléf korayawét Ju árfene limánégh árfé (Acts 22.30)|23.30
bt: The next day, the soldiers' big head man were looking for the reason why the Ju rejected Fol. So the next day the soldiers' big head man take the chains off Fol. He also said to/ordered the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and whole Ju head men to gather. He brought Fol and had him stand before Ju head men.

nama: Efe tawakayongérwén Fole kaka norayayénd, "Fémon yasalite Ngánjánene limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár!"
bt: Those who were standing near Fol said, "You are insulting God's leading burning sacrifice men!"

nama: Folém ewawangoi, "Fútaréf, yénd yau mat kwémorwén ndené fá siyém limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár. Ménamén si ndené yékai, 'Yaufi si yau norayati féfenjo limánégh ároefaf.'"
bt: Fol answered them, "Friends, I didn't know that he was leading burning sacrifice men. Because it is written, 'Don't speak evil to your leading man.'"
