bt: As God's talk carrying men, I give you.p this knowing talk: Don't deceive yourselves and proud yourselves by without.meaning. You.p should decide you.p will be by the big mind(faith) God has given you.p 4 Just as each of us has one body with many body parts, and these body parts do not all have the same work, 5 to Keriso's body. We are its working people on one body, and for us have different work to do, and just as we are really one in Keriso, we bless each other, and we needs the other people. 6 We have different gift, these possiblity by the grace given to us. If man's gift is saying this thing happen(prophesying), do it possibly in his big mind(faith). 7 If work for helping people, should help them. If it is for teaching, should teach. 8 If it is for encouraging, should encourage them. If it is giving to those people who need, should give generously. If it is leading man, must work hard man. If it is to show mercy, do it happily. Love

nama: Uwégh ayém unyéghofnar. Méndméndat yéfandati yaufi. Kawerangi kétán némé yém mer. 10 Nauwetati fémro kénjún ménaye mérén áuwéghe. Eutémndati méinyoto ár féfenjo kénjún. 11 Yau sakér aem féfenjo ásáfoghmén, wénde mbérmbére ásáfogh ayafrotati Yurane muyaye. 12 Áuwéghafé aem méghméghan. Métar aem kértayan, a túmén aem oraighan Ngánjánefaf. 13 Erametati rokar Ngánjánene árfé efe ménde em, a merot frengégh yam ewarametati.
bt: Love must be without.lying. Hate evil. Hold to what is good. 10 Love one another by family love. Respect all the people in yourselves. 11 Never be lazy for your.p work, but do spiritual work with Lord's power. 12 Be joyful in hope. Be patient in trouble, and be always in talking with God. 13 Give things with the Godʼs people who are in need and give for good preparing things.

nama: Efrendati fá emofem némusérmbotat fém. Frengéghro tawaram yau tawafalngo. 15 Náuwétati yémafé efe náuwetat, a nendati yémafé efe nendat. 16 Emor ámbiro mwighaye méinyotio árfé. Yau tuktuk yéngfandé, wénde yéné árfé táf nawareindati efe em yuwon ghérsafé. Yau nemnati fém mat kar em méinyotio.
bt: Bless those who persecute you.p. Give only blessing and do not curse. 15 Rejoice with those who rejoice, and weep with those who weep. 16 Live by one mind all the people. Do not be proud, but must associate with people of low life(humble). Don't think you.p know it all.

nama: Yau tawango yaufie yaufi téfnan ámb ároe. Kor aem yam wafrogh némé mbarkánd yém méinyotio ár ghékéf kénjún. 18 Féfendio ásáfogh yafrotati njam féyotaro em ménát so mer emor méinyotio árfé krufrátaye. 19 Tane fútaréf, yau fai tawawangongi korongi Ngánjánefaf, ménamén ndené Buk si noraye, "Yéndon so fai yangotan, yéndon so fai yangotan yéfefaf emofem tafrotat, Yuré noraye."
bt: Do not pay back anyone evil for evil to other people. Be careful to do what is straight in the eyes of every people. 18 Do work for yourselves if it is possible in order to live at peace with every people. 19 My friends, never pay back yourselves leave that to God, because the scripture says, “I will pay back, I will pay back to those who do it,” says the Lord.

nama: Wénde ewafrotati yéné yam ndenáye Buk si noraye, "Féfene mék téfnár njam siogh em, emanjnati njamkeye. Njam nuam erameta, tawaramangi nu yéfe nénet, a fá so wáiwáiyam eramete ménamén némé yam té tafrotat féfefaf."
bt: But do these things as the Buk(scripture) says: “If your.p enemies are hungry, feed them with food. If they are thirsty, give them a water for drink, and he will give them shame what they have done to you.p .”

nama: Yau taumyongi yaufiyamam sái fene ghérsé tawainde, wénde tawaindangi yaufiyam meryam wafroghe.
bt: Don't allow evil thing conquer your life, but conquer evil thing by doing good things.

nama: Méinyotio ár táf náyáretat gafanafefaf, ménamén yéné muyé yau em fáyo ufroghmén wénde Ngánjáneta yéné muyé árké násáfotat Ngánjánam té ekmetam. 2 Fá efe nakenat sái náyáretat muyé yéné mbandmén yékenat Ngánján sái yiyáretat, a kérté yam so mé ewaitote. 3 Limánégh árém yau férférafé eyátotat meryam wafrogh ár, wénde fá emofem ewafrotat yaufi. Fém ménde té em sái yuwek em férférofnar yéné limánégh árfe tambén? Táf ewafrotati merro táf yémofem so euwetati. 4 Ménamén fá siyém Ngánjánene ásáfogh ár merot sái násáfotati. Wénde fémofem njam ewafrotati yaufi, férfér so em ménamén mé téfnofnar yau so témanangi witmafé sénté náifé. Fá siyém Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a nékw résagh ár ménát tákmangi tékrátan kérté yam wafrogh ár. 5 Yénémaménnde, mbarkánd yém sái náyáretam limánégh árfefaf, yau ménaménro tékrát yammén, wénde wéi fété mer mwghata.
bt: Every people must hear to Governors, because these authorities are for themselves about happening but this authorities from God which work God had put them. 2 They who reject to hear authority from this world is rejecting God to hear him, and touble(judgment) will still follow them. 3 Ruling people do not become fearful to the people doing good thing, but to those who do wrong. Do you.p want to be free without.fear from this ruling people? Must do well and they will praise you.p. 4 Because they are Godʼs working men(servants) working for good. But if you.p do evil, be afraid because they do not bear the sword for without.reason. They are Godʼs without.payment working men(servants) and carrying people of anger in order to put in suffering the people doing trouble things. 5 Therefore, it is straight to hear to the ruling people, not only because of punishment, but also as a matter of conscience.

nama: Yéné téfnan mani ekametati gafamanefaf. Limánégh ár em Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yémofem kakmangi méinyotio efogh ásáfoghan. 7 Tawaramangi méinyotio árfene némé fém ewaweretati yéfeyot. Njam gafaman mani kémghét féfeyot em, tékmangi gafaman mani. Njam ámb mani kémghét, féyo taramangi ámb mani. Njam em utmanégh, so fété em utmanégh, a yuyofotati wútmanégh a wafarerégh. Uwetati féfenjo kénjún
bt: In this reason put the moneys to the government. The ruling people are Godʼs without.payment working men(servants). They put every days in working. 7 Give to every people what you.p owe them. If government money put to you.p, put government money. If they put other money, then give other money. If they are respectful, must respect, and if they are honorable, must be honor. Love each other

nama: Yau táf árfene wafángogh mani{d{ ...f* {d{13.8 wafángogh mani what is meaning? ekmang féfefef, yanaro túmén fai so yém sái euwetati féfe kénjún, {e{ ...f* {e{13.8 Yau táf árfene wafángogh mani ekmang féfefef, yanaro túmén fai so yém sái euwetati féfe kénjún, need be BT and check the meaning.
bt: Must not put people's pay backmpney to you.p, let no debt remain outstanding, only this continuing debt to love each other, because people who love other friends has become true(fulfilled) the law. 9 The law, “Do not commit adultery,” “Do not kill the people. Do not steal. Do not take people's things by mind. Other law might go this, all are summed up in this one law, “Love your.s friend as yourself.” 10 Love does not produce bad to a friend. Therefore in love law become true(fulfill).

nama: A ndené fété mat sái yéném sénonjo efghon. Yéné efoghféneféne té téném féfeyot sái nanotati féfenjo kéméghta. Yéné ménamén yéné efghon wanjarégh mé témorwén nayu. Wénde sénonjo yéné efogh té téném a ndenanit yém kaka. 12 Sémbár siyém awaingétro yém, a efogh siyém kaka yém. Yénémamén yéndfem so ekmetam téndot kwéfitane yam wafrogh a tawerangém kwayaghane mék sáláme. 13 Yénd so nawarawenam efalofifie, ndené fété efghon kar yéném, yau yaufiyamafé téménd yam a wéri nu néne, yau máméghéraye wal, yau ásmégh a waramnjagh. 14 Wénde tumyongi Yuré Yesu Keriso limánégh kémafngongé fém, a yau eronjati end ménát sái yaufiyam ménde yifotati.
bt: And as you.p know the present time. This time has already come for you.p to wake up from your.p sleep. That is because at this time salvation was still far. But now that day has come and is like close. 12 The night is almost passing away, and the day is close. So let us put aside the deeds of darkness and put on the fighting clothe of light. 13 We should really watch out just as the daytime might come, not in doing sinful feast(orgy) and drunkenness, not in sexual immorality, not fighting and jealousy. 14 But allow Lord Yesu Keriso start ruling you, and do not look for the way in order to fill sinful desires.

nama: Tumyongi ámb efalo yátogh ár efe em muyafnar ndimbal mwighé, wénde yau nawasálitati fá némamén fá nemnat siyém mbarkánd o yau. 2 Ámb ár efe ndimbal mwighé yém sái eneta méinyotio njamke, wénde ámb ár endene ndimbal mwighé muyafnar yém enete mé ndau njamkero. 3 Yéné ár emo enete méinyotio rokar yau táf néreta yuwon yáfaf emo yau enete, a yéné ár emo yau enete méinyotio rokar yau táf yasalita yéné ár emo enete, ménamén Ngánjánam té yumyo. 4 Fém efe yém sái yasalita ámb árfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár? Yurafafétro yém yéfenemén, yémon so emndete némé mbarkánd fá em o yau, Yurane waftayam so ewáutáne fá sái ewafrotat féyotaroe.
bt: Accept other believers who has without.strong faith, but don't criticize them about what they think is straight or not. 2 One man who has big mind(faith) allows them to eat all foods, but other man whose big mind(faith) is without.power eats only garden foods. 3 This man who eats everything must not look down to him who does not eat, and this man who does not eat everything must not criticize this man who eats, because God has accepted him. 4 Who are you.s to criticize other people's without.payment working man(servant)? Only to their own owner, he can say what they are straight or not, Lord's power will help them to do possibly.

nama: Ndené yameyo, ámb ár nemnat ndené ámb efgham yáinde ámb efogh, táf ámb ár nemnat ndené méinyotio efogh fá ndenaro fété em. Méinyotio ár so fété efalo náyátotat yéfenjo mwighan. 6 Endefene yém fénaté efogh Ngánjáne wáwefnoghét yém yá utmanéghét. Fá emofem enetat fénatafénaté njamke ewafrotat mé Yurai utmanéghe, ménamén té Ngánján kánjo si taramangi fronde soramé enetat. A fá emofem yau enetat méinyotio rokar wéi ndenáyo yutémndat Yuré a kánjo yarametat Ngánjáne. 7 Yénd yéndio yau yémor ghérsé téfendio, a yénd yau kér yéném téfendio. 8 Njam yénd ghérsé yéném, yénd ghérsé ménát yéném sái yutémndam Yuré, a njam yénd kér yéngém, yénd so kér yéném Yurafé. Yénémaménnde, njam mé ghérsé yéném o kér yéném, yénd yéném Yurane. 9 Yéné téfnanfifi, Keriso kér yémormén a nanoi ghérsat ménát fá nénamndai Yuré kér árfet a ghérsé árfet. 10 Féyo, fém, némamén fémo moghan ekmete fenjo fútar? O némamén fém néretati yuwon fenjo fútarefaf? Ménamén yénd méinyotio so kokayongém Ngánjánene mogh ámnjogh kitarayan. 11 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Yuré noraye,'Yénd kés ghérsé wém, méinyotio ár budme so néneitat tafaf, méinyotio kankayam so yuyotat Ngánján.'"
bt: In the same way, some men think that one day compasses other day, other men think that every day are same. All people should become truly(convinced) in their own mind. 6 Whose special day to worship God is for honor him. They who eat different food do still to the Lord, because they give thanks to God and then eat. And they who do not eat everything are also same for respecting Lord and gives thanks to God. 7 We do not live for ourselves only, and we do not die for ourselves only. 8 If we live, we live so that we are respect the Lord, and if we die, we die with the Lord. Therefore, whether we still live or die, we are of the Lord. 9 In this very reason, Keriso died and rosed to life so that he might be the Lord for the dead people and for the living people. 10 So you.s, why do you.s put your.s friend in judgment? Or why do you.s look down on your.s friend? Because we will all stand before Godʼs judgment sitting table. 11 As the scripture says, “ The Lord says, ‘I might live, every people's knee will bow to me, every tongue will praise God.’ ”

nama: Néméwét, yéndfem méinyotio so yarametam wangogh téfenjomén yáyot Ngánjáne.
bt: Yes, we will all give an account of ourselves to God.

nama: Yénémaménnde, yéndfem yau táf moghan ekmetam ár ndenayu. Wénde nemnati sái emor yéné ende fémofem yau ánde so yanawetati ámb efalo yátogh ároe end. 14 Yénd mat wém a safénro yéfandan Yuré Yesuene waftaye ndené njamkefaf yau yém mámáfi nénet, wénde ámb ár njam nemna ndené mámáfi yém, féyo yéné ároe yém mámáfi. 15 Njam fene fútarém tanang sotot ménamén fémo némé eneta, fém yau kor násáfota uwéghan. Yau mé fene njamke néneménro yasérmbotati fene fútar endeyot Keriso kér yémormén! 16 Yénémaménnde yau táf yumyotati fém némé nemnati ndené mer em yénamé ár kés norayat ndené mámáfi kar em. 17 Ngánján limánégh yau yém njamke néneye a nu, wénde mbarkánd yam, krufrát a áuwégh Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjún, 18 ménamén emo njam yiyátota Keriso ndené yam wafrogh yém áuwéghafé Ngánjáne a árém wéi efalo yiyátota.
bt: Therefore, we must not put people in judgment anymore. But think to live in that way that you.p will not block in another truly approving people(believers)'s way. 14 I know and see clearly the power of Lord Yesu that there is no bad food, but if anyone thinks as it is bad, then for that man it is bad. 15 If your.s friend is distressed because of what you.s eat, you.s are no longer acting in love. Do not destroy by your.s eating food your.s friend for whom Keriso died. 16 Therefore do not let what you.p know is good be spoken of as evil. 17 The ruling of God is not a matter of eating and drinking, but of straight thing, peace and joy in the God Spirit, 18 because anyone who serves Keriso in this way is pleasing to God and people approve of you too.

nama: Yénémaménnde yéndfem méinyotio yam yénamé so ewafrotam árkéménayam yénlimnde krufrátfaf a ewáutána ámbiroámbiroe. 20 Yau yironati Ngánjánene ásáfogh mé njamke téfnanro. Méinyotio njamke sem mer, wénde yéné mámáfi yém ároe sái yéneta yéné njamke árkéménayam eméinde ámb ár yaufiot. 21 Merfifi yém yau so enetam wérárafene fenjén o wéri nu néne o ámb yam kés em árkéménayam so yéméinde fe fútar wighét. 22 Némé fémo njam efalo eyátota yéné yammén tané fenjo kénjút a Ngánján kés. Frengéghkaf yéné ár yém efe fáyo yau nawaghne ménáyan némé yémon taumyongé. 23 Wénde fá efe yém sómbio mwighafé nawaghne njam eneta, ménamén yáne njamke néne yau ndimbal mwighata yém, a méinyotio yau njam eném kétamé ndimbal mwighata siyém yaufiyam.
bt: Therefore we make every effort to do what leads us to peace and to help each other. 20 Do not destroy the work of God for the sake of food. All foods are clean, but it is wrong for a person to eat anything that causes someone else to fall into sin. 21 It is very good not to eat meat or drink alcohol or to do anything else that will cause your.s friend to fall. 22 Whatever you.s truly approve(believe) about these things keep between yourself and God. Blessed is the one who does not condemn himself by what he approves. 23 But whoever has two minds is condemned if he eats, because his eating food is not from big mind(faith), and everything that does not come from big mind(faith) is sin.

nama: Yénd efe yéném muyafé ndimbal mwighayan so fété ewáutánam yéné efalo yátogh ár endene ndimbal mwighé yém muyafnar a yau yéndro so méndefé nafandam. 2 Yéndfem so fété mer ewawafrotam téfe kaka árfet yéfene merot, ménát ár muyafé eyátotam ndimbal mwighayan. 3 Yau Keriso fáyo méndefé kafandau. Ndené Buk si noraye, "Wasáligh yéfene emofem ewasalitat fem té nafayongi tafaf." 4 Méinyotio némé té efarotaménd tándái efarotaménd watameghét téfeyot. A Buk siam yénmarameta méghmégh a uwangsogh ndené fété yéndfem ewanjetam métare Ngánjánene unyéghofnar si ménát sái efalo eyátote. 5 Ngánján emo ewaramete wamarogh a uwangsogh tawaramangé féfe mérne afégh mbérmbér féfenjo kénjún njam yaitotati Keriso Yesu, 6 ménát ámbiro tikfe a mbírmbíre fémofem so yuyotati Ngánján a téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene Yárefé.
bt: We who are strong in big mind(faith) ought to help those truly approving men(believers) who are without.power and not to please ourselves. 2 We should please our close people(neighbors) for their good, to build them up in the big mind(faith). 3 Even Keriso did not please himself. As the scripture say, “The insults of those who insult you.p have fallen on me.” 4 Everything that was written in the past was written to teach us. And the scripture give us hope and encouragement as we wait patiently for God's promises to be fufilled.

nama: Eumyotat ámbiroámbiro, ndené Kerisom ndernáye eumyoi fém, ménát áuwégh sái yérsati Ngánjáne. 8 Yéndon emndetan fém Keriso té nénamndai faiofnar ásáfogh ár Israil árfeyot Ngánjáne efalo si téfnan, ménát sái efalo táyátongai si mbarkánd yéfene ákiafefaf árké eramai, 9 ménát ndené Téndo árém so yuyotat Ngánján yáne ghérghérsisamén, ndené Buk si noraye, "Yénémaménnde yéndon so némarsan Téndo árfefafmé. Yéndon so wafnyagh wagh engrametan fene yétkwénot."
bt: Then accept one another, just as Keriso accepted you.p, in order to bring praise to God. 8 I tell you.p that Keriso has become a without.payment working man(servant) of the Israil people on behalf of Godʼs truth, so that the without.lying talks(promises) made to the anscestors might be confirmed 9 and so that the Side people might praise God for his mercy. As the scripture says, “Therefore I will praise you.p among the Side people. I will give the sing of praise of your.s name.”

nama: Wéikor ndené noraye, "Náuwétati, fém Téndo ár, Ngánjánene árfé!"
bt: Again, it says, “Rejoice, you.p Side people, with God's people.”

nama: A wéikor, "Yarsati Yuré, méinyotio fémofem Téndo árém, Yuyotati fá, fém méinyotio ár."
bt: And again, “Praise the Lord, all you.p Side people. Praise him, all you people.”

nama: A wéikor, Aisaya noraye, "Ámb ár kétamé Jesiene mérénta so kénamndangé waftafé, efe so kokayongé sái elimnda méinyotio mband marat, Téndo ár so em méghmégh yáfaf."
bt: And again, Aisaya says, “One man from Jesi's family will became with power, one who will arise to rule over all the nations; the Side people will hope to him.”

nama: Méghméghafé Ngánjánam so ewafote méinyotio áuwéghe a krufrát ménamén fémofem yiyátotati fá, ménát fém so afoghare em méghméghan Ngánján Mbérmbér waftayan. Folene misi ásáfogh Téndo árfeyot
bt: May the God of hope fill you.p with all joy and peace because you.p trust in him, so that you.p may overflow with hope by the power of the God Spirit. Fol the minister to the Side people

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd yéndio mat wém ndené fém fémyo em meryam wafrogh kér ro, méinyotio mat yémafé a féyotaro watameghét féfe kénjún méinyotio yéfenemén. 15 Yéndon té tangwafarotan marataye ámb sifayamén, sái mat táyátongayén yéfenemén wéikor, ménamén ngárámafé Ngánjánam árké waramai ta 16 sái wém misi Keriso Yesuene yéfe Téndo árfeyot ghéngén wárogh yémafé Ngánjánene si waitoghan, ménát Téndo ár so kénamndangi njúnnjúnofnar ghéngénghéngén umyoghafé Ngánjánefaf. Ngánján Mbérmbéram té ewafrote njúnnjúnofnar.
bt: My friends, I myself know that you.p yourselves are full of goodness with all knowledge and you.p are able to teach each other all about them. 15 I have written you.p quite boldly on some points, to make them know again, because of the grace God gave me 16 to be a minister of Keriso Yesu to the Side people like the burning sacrifice man(priest)'s duty of proclaiming the good talk of God, so that the Side people might become an offering acceptable to God. The God Spirit has made them holy.

nama: Yénémamén yénd nawarmbotan Keriso Yesuene kénjún tane ásáfoghmén Ngánjáneyot. 18 Yénd yau so nawarmbotan sái norayan némamén wénde némé Kerisom yafrotam ta kénjúmé Téndo árét limánéghét kétán Ngánján áyárghét Ngánján ménáyan némé yéndon té korayan a tawafrotan, 19 ménaye sélngwélafé wafroghyam a fénaté wafroghyame, Ngánján Mbérmérene wafté kénjúmé. Féyo kétamé Jerusalem méinyotio yénamé kétán Ilirikum, yéndon té méinyoe ténmaitotam Kerisoene mer si. 20 Tane ménde túmén yém ménát sái yaitotan mer si Kerisoenemén ánde yau kor náyárayénd yánemén, a kété ámb árom ánde Yesuene mérén yeitam. 21 Wénde ndené yéné noraye Buk siyan, "Endefeyot yau ewaufrotaménd yánemén so néretat a fá efe yau káyáretat so mat káyátongi." Folene mwighé álighét Romét
bt: Therefore I am proud in Keriso Yesu in my service to God. 18 I will not boast to speak of anything but what Keriso did through me to lead the Side people to obey God by what I have said and done, 19 by the power of surprising things(signs) and special things(wonders), through the power of the Spirit of God. So from Jerusalem all the way around to Illirikum, I have fully proclaimed the good talk of Keriso. 20 My always wanting is to preach the good talk about Keriso where they did not hear about him, and where someone did not build on the Yesu's family(church). 21 But, as it is sait in the scripture, “Those who were not told about him will see, and those who have not heard will understand.” Folʼs Plan to Visit Rom

nama: Yéné téfnan, tárfár mbinotmé, yénd kénawanetan kétamé sái kwénmorwén féfefaf. 23 Wénde sénonjo yéndon té tifon tane ásáfogh yéné yuwon, a soramé yéndon té wanjetan yéné tombé yunjfan, yénd yéta ménde wém féfe fandaghét. 24 Féyo, yéndon té mwighé téfaronan sái wéngém Sfeinét. Njam té wéngém, yénd so kékmbon Romén, a njam fémofé ménde téngwifongém tekofnaye, fémofem so kwénmatembangi kétamé. 25 Wénde soramé so wéném, fronde so yénd wéngém Jerusalemét sái engwarsan rokar ramghét efalo yátogh árét kétán. 26 Makedoniamén ár a Akayamén ár náuwétaménd rokar aféghét yéfeyot ronjagh árét efe tamorwén Ngánjánene ár kété Jerusalemén. 27 Fá áuwéghan tamorwén wafroghét, a so fété yémofem fai yáfángotat yéfeyot. Ménamén Ju árém té tawaftat Téndo árét yéfene mbérmbér frengégh a yéné fao so yáfángotat fifiye frengégh awafégh Ju árfet. 28 Njam yéndon tawaraman yéné mani a ténmifon yéné meryam yéfene, yénd so wéném fandaghét féfefaf tane álighan kétán Sfeinét. 29 Yénd mat wém njam yénd wéném féfefaf, yénd so wéném Kerisoene ndimbal frengéghafé féfeyot.
bt: That is why, many times, I have been hindered from coming to you.p. 23 But now I have finished my work in these regions, and after I have waited this long years, I want to see you.p. 24 So, I plan to go to Sfain. When I go, I will stop in Rom, and when I want to stay with you.p for a while, you.p will send me from there. 25 But before I come, I must go to Jerusalem to take offering things to the truly approving people(believers) there. 26 Makedonia people and Akaya people were pleased to make a contribution for the poor people who are the Lordʼs people in Jerusalem. 27 They were pleased to do that thing, That thing is very good, because it's like their repayment to Ju people. Because if the Side people received the spiritual blessings from Ju believers, so the Side people should reture to Ju people with their bodily blessings. 28 When I have delivered this money and completed this good deed of theirs, I will come to see you on my way to Sfein. 29 I know when I come to you.p, I will come with big blessing of Keriso to you.p.

nama: Fútaréf, yéndon ewamnendan fém téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoe a Ngánján Mbérmbéroene uwéghan, ménát sái kényufnyangi tafaf tane ásméghfaf Ngánjánafé orayégh tayot. 31 Ngánjánafé norayati ménát yénd so kwanjarngé kétamé efalo yátoghofnar árfetambén kété Judian. Ngánjánafé norayati wéikor ndene efalo yátogh ár kété so ménde yém sái yumyoyénd yéné ramégh yéndo yérsan Jerusalemét. 32 Féyo Ngánjánene méndeyan yénd so wéném féfefaf áuwéghafé a yénd so nenam fémafé. 33 Krufrátafé Ngánján so yém féfefaf méinyotio. Efalo.
bt: Friends, I urge you.p by our Lord Yesu Keriso and by the love of the God Spirit, to join me in my fighting by talking with God(praying) for me. 31 Talk with God that I may be saved from the people who do not truly approve(unbeliever) in Judia. Also talk with God that believers there are willing to accept this giving I am taking to Jerusalem. 32 Then, by the will of God, I will come to you.p with joy and I will rest with you.p. 33 The God of peace be with you.p all. Amen.

nama: Yéndon yérametan féfefaf téfene mérés Fobe, efe yém ásáfogh ár yéné Yesuene mérnan árké yém Kenkrian. 2 Yéndon ewamnendan fém sái tumyongi Fobe Yurane kénjún minde tukén utmanéghafé fémofem Kerisoene árém a yáutánati némé wáutárégh ménde njam yém yáyot féfeta, ménamén mérés fáyo témorwén ndimbal wáutáréghafé tárfár árfefaf, a yénd wéi kwáutánau.
bt: I give to you.p our sister Fobe, who is worker in Yesu's family(church) which is in Kenkria. 2 I ask you.p to receive Fobe in the Lord with very high respect among Keriso's people and to help her what help if she need from you.p, because she herself has been the big help to many people, and also helped me.

nama: Áuwégh tawaraménd Frisila a Akwila, tane mérne ásáfogh ár Keriso Yesuene kénjún. 4 Yémofem ekmetat yéfenjo ghérsé ta wanjarégh téfnan. Yénd erametan kanjo si yéfefaf, yau yéndro, wénde méinyotio Téndo árfene Yesuene mérén wéi. 5 Áuwégh wéi si tawaramangi Yesuene mérnot sái náumendat yéfene méngon.
bt: Give greetings to Frisila and Akwila, my fellow workers in the Keriso Yesu. 4 They put their lives behalf to help me. I give thank talk to them, not only I, but all the outside man's Yesu's families(churches) as well. 5 Give greetings also to the Yesu's family(church) that meet in their house.

nama: Áuwégh si taramangi Merie, efe kásáfote mindefifi féfeyot. 7 Áuwégh si tawaraménd yéfe Andronikus a Junias, tane sómbio mérénmén emofé yéndfé mérne tényawangérwén kwéfkwéf méngon. Fá ámb em utmanéghafé Yesuene muyafé ár kénjún, a fá frondeyo tamorwén Keriso kénjún yénd soramé.
bt: Give greetings to Meri, who has worked so hard for you.p. 7 Give greetings also to Andronikus and Junias, my two relatives who were in darkness house with me. They are highly respected among the men with Yesu's authority(apostles), and they first came into Keriso I did after.

nama: Áuwégh si taramangi Ámbliatuse, efe yéndon yuwetan Yurane kénjún. 9 Áuwégh si taramangi Urbanuse, téfene mérne ásáfogh ár Kerisoene kénjún, a tane áuwéghafé fútar Stákis. 10 Áuwégh si taramangi Afelese, mer ár efe yém efalo yátoghkaf Kerisoene kénjún. Áuwégh si tawaramangi yéfe efe em Arostobulusene méngon. 11 Áuwégh si taramangi Erodion, tane mérénmén. Áuwégh si tawaramangi yéfe efe em Narkisusene méngon efe em Yurane kénjún.
bt: Give greetings to Ámbliatus, whom I love in the Lord. 9 Give greetings also to Urbanus, our co-worker in Keriso, and to my loving friend Stákis. 10 Give greetings to Afeles, a good man who is approved in Keriso. Give greetings to those who are in the family of Aristobulus. 11 Give greetings to Erodion, my realtive. Give greeting to them who are in the family of Narkisus who are in the Lord.

nama: Áuwégh si tawaraménd yéfe Trifena a Trifosa, yéné amaf efe mindefifi kásáfotat Yurane kénjún. Áuwégh si taramangi tane áuwéghafé fútare Fersis, ámb amaf efe mindefifi kásáfotau Yurane kénjún. 13 Áuwégh si taramangi Rufuse, yékafayénd Yurane kénjún, a yáne amé, efe témorwén tayot amanit wéi. 14 Áuwégh si taramangi Asinkrituse, Flegon, Ermas, Fatrobas, Ermas, a yéfene mérén kés em yémafé. 15 Áuwégh so taramangi Filologus, Julia, Nereus a yáne mérés, a Olimfas a méinyotio Yurane ár kés em yémafé.
bt: Give greetings to Trifena and Trifosa, these women who work in the Lord. Give greeting to my loving friend Fersis, another woman who worked very hard in the Lord. 13 Give greetings to Rufus, chosen in the Lord, and to his mother, who has been a mother to me, too. 14 Give greetings to Asinkritus, Flegon, Ermes, Fatrobas, Ermas, and all the other friends who are with them. 15 Give greetings to Filologus and Julia, to Nereus and his sister, an to Olimfas and to all of Lord's people who are with them.

nama: Áuwégh tawaramangi féfe kénjún ménaye njúnnjúnofnar sénéghégh. Méinyotio efalo yátogh árfene Yesuene mérnam yénan engwawatembangi yéfene áuwégh si.
bt: Give greeting one another with a without.dust(holy) kiss. All Yesu's families(churches) of believers here send you.p their greetings.

nama: Tane fútar, yéndon emndetan fém ménát sái nawarawenati yéfe tambén emofem yéfunat afalogh yam a yéru yénawetat fene ghérsé áligh kénjún fénataye watamegh kétamé fém némé mat em. Nayu aem yéfetambén. 18 Ndené árém yau yásáfotat téfene Yuré Keriso, wénde yéfenjo amanjarghét futot. Ménaye méndefé sie a frengéghafé sie yémofem ewarsotat ménd ár. 19 Méinyotio ár té káyáretawét féfene áyárégh kér ro mer simén, yénémamén minde áuwéghafé wém féfefaf. Yénd ménde wém fém sái em káfeté kétán némé yém mer a ménd ár so kétán némé yém yaufi. 20 Krufrát Ngánjánam wékeye so tésenangé Sáifér féfene kafkaf mbanmbanan. Téfene Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
bt: My friends, I urge you.p to watch out from those who cause divisions and put obstacles in your walking from the different teaching what you.p know. Keep away from them! 18 Such people are not serving Keriso our Lord, but their own appetites. By fine talks and flattering talk they deceive innocent people. 19 Everyone has heard of your.p obedience to the good talk, so I rejoice very much about you.p. I want you.p to be wise about what is good, and innocent to what is evil. 20 God of peace will quickly crush Sáifèr under your.p feet. The grace of our Lord Yesu will be with you.p.

nama: Timoti, yéndfé mérne ásáfogh ár, engwawatemb yánjo áuwégh si féfeyot, ndenáyo wéi yémofem Lukius, Jason a Sosifata, tane mérnam.
bt: Timoti, my co-worker, sends you.p his greetings, as do Lukius, Jason, and Sosifata, my relative.

nama: Yénd, Tertius, emo yéfarotam yéné férén ménat Fol, áuwégh si ewarametan Yurane kénjún.
bt: I, Tertius, who wrote down this letter for Fol, give greeting to you.p in the Lord.

nama: Gaius, endene waráuwéghan yénd a méinyotio Yesuene mérén yéna náuwétam, yémon engwawatemb yánjo áuwégh si. Erastus, efe yém ndimbal tesenan mani wanjángégh ár, a téfene fútar Kuartus engwatembangi féfeyot yéfene áuwégh si. 24 Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém méinyotio féfefaf. Efalo.
bt: Gaius, whose hospitality I and whole Yesu's family(church) here enjoy, sends you.p his greetings. Erastus, who is the city's manager of money(treasurer), and our friend Kuartus send you.p their greetings. 24 May our Lord Yesu Keriso's grace be with all of you.p. Amen.

nama: Ngánjánam so eyátote muyafé, ndené fété mer si ndernáye noraye. Yéné si Yesu Kerisoenemén té nákmang safét yáne mwighé farorégh féfe Téndo árét, yéné mwighé farorégh árké tétnongérwén kétamé rényégh. 26 Wénde sénonjo safén yém a mat náyátoyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene farogh férnan ndené akegh Ngánjánam té tawafaretam ménát méinyotio ár yéné mband maratan so efalo yiyátotat a yiyáretat fá. {f{ ...f* {f{16.26 Wénde sénonjo safén yém a mat náyátoyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene farogh férnan ndené akegh Ngánjánam té tawafaretam ménát méinyotio ár yéné mband maratan so efalo yiyátotat a yiyáretat fá. check it again.
bt: God will make you.p strong, according to the good talk says. This talk about Yesu Keriso has revealed his plan for you.p Side people, this plan which was hidden from the beginning. 26 But now become clear and make known through the writings of the men who make God's knowledge(prophets) that the eternal God has commanded so that all the people in the world will truly approve(believe) and obey him.

nama: Mé yáfafetro káfeté Ngánjánefaf so yém ndimbal kwayaghé tuot yáne kénjúmé Yesu Keriso! Efalo.
bt: To the only wise God will be big light(glory) forever through Yesu Keriso! Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétándmé Fol, efe té yémotayéng sái yém Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, a kétándmé téfene fútar Sostenes,
bt: This letter is from Fol, who was called to be a a man with Keriso Yesu's authority(apostle) by the will of God, and from our friend(brother) Sostenes,

nama: Yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén kétán Ngánjánene Yesuene mérnot Korint kénjún, yéfefaf efe efghayéng Keriso Yesu kénjún a efe té emotayéng yáne njúnnjúnofnar ár sái em mérne yémafé méinyotio árfé, emofem yáwefnotat téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoe, yéfene Yuré a téfene.
bt: I am writing this letter to the Yesu's family(church) of God in Korint, to all who are called to be his without.dust(holy) people with all the people, who worship our Lord Yesu Keriso, their Lord and ours.

nama: So Ngánján téfene Afam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. Frengégh Keriso kénjún
bt: May God our Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso give to you.p grace and peace. Blessings in Keriso

nama: Yéndon túmén kánjo yarametan tane Ngánjánoe féfeyot ménamén ngárámmén féfe té ewaramayéng Keriso Yesue kénjúmé. 5 Ménát Keriso kénjún fém té namndangi wemár méinyotio rokar kénjún, yéné efghangi méinyotio orayégh a méinyotio matyam. 6 Yéné si Kerisoenemén té efalo namndai féfe kénjún 7 ndené fém yau náláitayénd umyoghét ámbiro frengéghét, ndené fété fém kawanjetati téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoe ménát sái kufarngai. 8 Yémon so ndenéyameyo ewerete fém taikrataye kétánotio yatogh, ménát fém so em téfnofnar téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene efghon. 9 Ngánján siyém ndimbal mwighé kér ro yém, emo emotai yémafé fútar yamot yáne Ambum Yesu Keriso téfene Yuré. Afalogh yam Yesuene mérén kénjún
bt: I always give thanks to my God for you.p because of the grace he has given you.p through Keriso Yesu. 5 For in Keriso you.p have become rich in all things, including all talk and all knowledge. 6 This talk about Keriso has become true in you.p 7 that you.p have not missed to receive a single blessing, as you.p wait for our Lord Yesu Keriso to be revealed. 8 He will also keep you.p strongly until the end, so that you.p will be without.blame in the day of our Lord Yesu Keriso. 9 God is full of big mind(faithful), who called you.p to have friendship with his Son Yesu Keriso our Lord. Divisions in the Yesu's family(church)

nama: Tane fútaréf, ménaye téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene si muyaye, yénd nómnéndan méinyotio féfefaf ménát ámbiro mwighé tiyátongi némé fém norayati, ménát kété yau so afalogh yém féfefaf. Mé méinyotio kafghangi ámbiro mwighé aem, a ámbiro emarghafé. 11 Tane fútaréf, ámb ár kétándmé Kloene mérnam waufroyénd ta ndené mé safénro kété em éwigh yam féfe kénjún. 12 Yéndon ndené ende so tékman, ámbiroámbiro árém norayat fénatayero. Ámb noraye, "Yéndon yaitotan Fol," ámb, "Yéndon yaitotan Afolos," ámb, "Yéndon yaitotan Fité", a ámb "Yéndon yaitotan Keriso." 13 Keriso té téfalotati mérénmérnot? Wét Fol yamayénd wafatarégh wénan féfeyot? Némé fém ewalitotaménd Folene yétkwénan? Yau. 14 Yéndon kánjo yarametan Ngánjáne ndené yéndon efe ámb yau ewalitotamén mé Krisfus a Gaius, 15 féyo efe ámb yau so noraye nde fém némaritotamend tane yétkwénan. 16 (Néméwét, yéndon ndenéyameyo yalitotamén Stefanas a yáne mérén, wénde yénd yau nawafrotan té o yau yéndon té namalitotamén efe ndafi.) 17 Kerisom yau kwémáfárete yénd walitoghét. Yémon kwémáfárete yénd mer si sái nafrotan yau árfene matyam sie, ménát Kerisoene kér wafatarégh wénan yau so sotro tiyátongi yánjo waftata. Keriso wafté a káfeté mwighé Ngánjáneta
bt: My friends, by the power of our Lord Yesu Keriso's talk, I ask you.p to make one agreement what you.p say, so that there won't be dividing among you.p. All of you, be of one mind, and with one thought. 11 My friends, some people from Kloe's family told me clearly there are arguments among you.p. 12 I will put it this way, each one of you.p says differently. One says, “I follow Fol,” another, “I follow Afolos.” the other, “I follow Fitè,” and the other, “I follow Keriso.” 13 Keriso has been divided into groups! Did Fol died on the cross for you.p? What you.p were baptized in the name of Fol? No.

nama: Yéné si Kerisoene kérmén wafatarégh wénan siyém fifiofnar yém yéfeyot efe olingéghkaf em, wénde téfeyot siyém efe té nunjaryém yéné siyém Ngánjánene wafté. 19 Buk si noraye, "Yéndon so yironan káfeté mwighé yéfene endefene matyam ewam a yéndon so tafalon yéfene efe mwighé sénté em wafénmanégh ár em."
bt: For this talk about Keriso's death on the cross is without.meaning to those who are being lost, but for us who are being saved this is God's power. 19 The scripture says, “I will destroy the wisdom of those who has knowledge and I will seperate of those who are sharp mind(wise) of studing men.”

nama: Ánde wét káfeté mwighé ár yém? Ánde wét nák watamegh ár yém? Ánde wét matyam kér ro éwigh ár yém yéné mband maratan? Ngánjánam té yuyafoyéng yéné mbandoene káfeté mwighé siyém fifiofnar!
bt: Where is the man with wisdom? Where is the teaching man of the law? Where it is arguing man with full of knowledge in this world? God has shown this world's wisdom is without.meaning!

nama: Ngánjánam yánjo káfeté mwighé kénjúmé yafrotam táikér árét yá wayamngongét ménaye fai yéfenjo káfeté mwighaye. Wénde ménaye "fifiofnar" sie yéndfem kafrotam, Ngánjánam mwighé yaitotam yéfe ghérsé urtoghét emofem efalo yiyátoyénd. 22 Ju ár ménde em sélngwélafé yam ufaroghét, a Grik ár néretat káfeté mwighat. 23 Wénde ndené téfeyot siyém, yéndfem marataye si yaitotam Kerisoenemén efe yénamndaménd, yéné si siyém nétér Ju árfet a Téndo árfet siyém fifiofnar, 24 wénde yéfe siyém efe Ngánjánam té emotayéng, sómbio mérén Ju ár a Téndo ár, yéné si siyém Keriso, efe yém Ngánjánene wafté a Ngánjánene káfeté mwighé. 25 Mbandmén ár túmén nemnat ndene Ngánjánene emarégh yém fifiofnar, wénde Ngánjánene emargham ewainde mbanmén árfene emarégh, a némé ndené nérete Ngánjánene njangénnjangén kar yém, wénde yáne wafroghyam árké em minde muyafé ewainde árfene muyé.
bt: God through his wisdom made it hard for people to know him by means of their own wisdom. But by means “without.meaning” talk we preach, God decided to save those who truly approve(believe) him. 22 Ju people want to see surprising things(signs), and Greek people look for wisdom. 23 But as for us, we tell talk publicly about Keriso who was nailed, this talk is a obstacle for Ju people and without.meaning to the Side people, 24 but for those whom God has called, two group Ju people and Side people, this talk is Keriso, who is the power of God and the wisdom of God. 25 Earthly men habitually think the thinking of God is without.meaning, but God's thought surpass earthly people thought, and what seems to be God's weak, but his actions that are very bigly strong surpass the strengths of men.

nama: Tane fútaréf, kawafarotangi némé fém tamorwén njam Ngánjánam emotayéng fém. Kétándmé árfene matyam wafroghta tárfárofnar fém em káfeté mwighafé o wafté kér ro o tukén yétkwénafé. 27 Wénde Ngánjánam takafangé mwighafnar rokar yéné mbandmén ménát wáiwáiot sái tékmangé matyam téfnár, a yémon takafangé muyafnar rokar yéné mbandmén ménát wáiwáiot sái tékmangé muyé kér ro ár. 28 Yémon takafangé yuwan rokar yéné mbandmén a kenaghkaf rokar a yéné rokar árkéméné yau em ménát sái tawirorngi yéné rokar árkéméné mbandam nemne yéné mer yém. 29 Yéné sioene fifi ndené yém efe yau so nawarmbote Ngánján sáfrére. 30 Wénde Ngánjánam té nénmanai fém ámbiro namndayénd Keriso Yesufé, a Ngánjánam té yiyátoi Keriso sái yém téfene káfeté mwighé. Ménamén fété fá, Ngánjánam yénd té yénékmai mbarkánd yémafé a yénd nénamndangém njúnnjúnofnar a yénmanjaryéng. 31 Yénémaménnde, Buk siam noraye ndené, "Efe njam ménde yém sái nawarmbote so nawarmbote ménamén Yuram némé té yafrotam."
bt: My friends, remember what you.p were when God called you.p. Not many of you.p were wise from people's knowledge or powerful or of high names. 27 But God chose without.mind(foolish) things of the world to put to shame the wise people, and he chose the without.power things of the the world to put to shame the powerful people. 28 He chose the lowly things of this world and despised things and the things that are not in order to destrory what the world thinks is good. 29 This talk's meaning is that no one can boast in God's presence. 30 But God has accepted you.p and became one with Keriso Yesu, and God has made Keriso to be our wisdom. Because of him, God put us straight with himself and he made us without.dust(holy) and he saved us. 31 Therefore, as the scripture says, “Whoever wants to boast must boast of what the Lord has done.”

nama: Tane fútaréf, njam yénd nénaflayén féfefaf Ngánjánene warambnogh efalo afroghét, yénd yau korayan minde wafté kér ro si a ndimbal matyame. 2 Yénd njam kwémorwén fémafé, yénd nemnayén tane mwighayan méinyotio rokarmén wawalighét wénde mé Yesu Keriso, emo yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan. 3 Féyo njam yénd nénaflayén féfefaf, yénd kwémorwén njangénnjangén a ngernger kwémorwén a férfér. 4 A tane watamegh a si ramégh tamorwén yau árfene káfeté mwighé tambnafé, wénde tafrotawén ufrogh yamafé Ngánján Mbérmbér waftaye, 5 ménát fene ndimbal mwighé yau so namyote ároene káfeté mwighayan, wénde Ngánjánene waftayan. Ngánjánene káfeté mwighé
bt: My friends, when I came to you.p to preach God's secret truth, I did not use very strong talks and big knowledge. 2 While I was with you.p, I made up my mind to forget everything except Yesu Keriso, the one who was nailed on the cross. 3 So when I came to you.p, I was weak and trembled and fear. 4 And my teaching and talk were not with talent of human wisdom, but I did it with happening things of the power of God Spirit, 5 so that your big mind(faith) does not depend on human wisdom, but on God's power. God's wisdom

nama: Wénde yénd norayam káfeté mwighafé si anoghkaf árfefaf. Wénde yéné yau yém káfeté mwighé yéné mbandmén o yáne limánégh árfeta, efe eyota yauyawét. 7 Yéné káfeté mwighé yénd nafrotam Ngánjánene warambnogh káfeté mwighé yém, árké té yétnoi árfe tambén, wénde Ngánjánam yékafai téfeyot ndimbal kwayaghat soramé mband marat yafrotam. 8 Efe ámb yau limánégh ár yéné mbandmén mat náyátoyénd yéné. Fá njam mat tamorwén, yémofem yau so yénamndamén ndimbal kwayaghé Yuré wafatarégh wénan. 9 Wénde, bukam noraye, "Némé ghékfam yau té yinjoi, némé ténganam yau náyárai, a némé yau ároene mwighayam yáyamngoi nde so yéné nufrote. Wénde yéné yém némé Ngánjánam yéfrendam yéfeyot emofem yuwetat fá."
bt: But we speak a talk of wisdom among the mature. But it is not the wisdom from this world or from rulers of this, who are coming to nothing. power. 7 This wisdom we proclaim is God's secret wisdom, which is hidden from human, but which God had already chosen for our big names before the world was made. 8 None of the rulers of this world knew this. If they had known it, they would not have nailed the Lord of big light(glory) on a cross. 9 But, the scripture says, “What no eye has seen, what no ear has heard, and what no man's mind has recognised that this could happen. But this are what God prepared for those who love him.”

nama: Wénde yéné syémormén téfeyot Ngánjánam safén yékmayéng yáne warambnoghmén yam Ngánján Mbérmbére. Ngánján Mbérmbér náronje méinyotio yamot, fá wéi mat yém Ngánjanene warambnoghmén mwighé. 11 Mé téfene mbérmbérero mat yém méinyotio téfene kénjúmén. Ndené endeyo mé Ngánjánene Mbérmbérero mat yém méinyotio Ngánjánenemén. 12 Yéndfem yau yanayém yéné mbandmén mbérmbér, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbér Ngánjánam árké yénmáfáretam, ménát yénd mat so náyátotam méinyotio Ngánjánam té yénmaramai téfe.
bt: But it was to us that God put clear(revealed) his secret by God Spirit. The God Spirit searches everything, He even knows God's the hidden thinking. 11 Only our own spirit knows all about our inside. In the same way only God's Spirit knows all about God. 12 We have not received this world's spirit, but God Spirit sent by God, so that we may know all that God has given us.

nama: Yénd yau korayawém ár watamegh káfeté mwighé, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbér watamegh sie. Yéné ende yéndfem tafénawén mbérmbére efalo si yéfe Ngánján Mbérmbérafé em. 14 Efe Ngánján Mbérmbérofnar em yau so tawanangi ramégh tambén árké eném kétándmé Ngánjánene Mbérmbérta wénde yéné yam yém fifiofnar yéfefaf a féyotarofnar em wayamngoghét ménamén fá féyotaro em wayamngoghét Ngánján Mbérmbérero. 15 Efe Ngánján Mbérmbérafé em, yémofem so yafénmetat méinyotio yam, wénde fá emon yau so yafénmete. 16 Ndené fété buk kés noraye, "Efe mat yém Yurane mwighé? Efe so kamndangé yá wawanjaghét? Wénde yénd yéném Kerisoene mwighafé.
bt: We do not speak in talks taught by human wisdom, but in talks taught by God Spirit. In this way we explain spiritual truths to those who have God Spirit. 14 Whoever does not have God Spirit cannot receive the gifts that come from God's Spirit but these things are without.meaning to them and cannot understand them because they can understood them only through God Spirit. 15 Whoever has God Spirit is able to evaluate everything, but no one is able to evaluate him. 16 As the scripture says, “Who knows the mind of the Lord? Who is able to give him advice?” But we have the mind of Keriso.

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd yau so norayan féfefaf ndené árfefaftro yénd fété so norayan efe em Ngánján Mbérmbéran, wénde yénd fété so norayan féfefaf ndené fété fém kar em yéné mbandmén, o ndené fété fasri Keriso kénjún. 2 Yéndon fété so emanjnam fém nono wékwre, yau táikér njamkeye, ménamén fém yau afrengéghkaf yénat. Efalo yéné yém, fém téfé yau afrengéghkaf em yénat. 3 Ménamén fém mé emor ndené yéné mbandmén ár. Njam kété yém waramnjagh féfe kénjún a fém namronati féfe kénjún. Yéné yamam eufane ndené fém em yéné mbandmén. A fém emor yéné mband matyame emor. 4 Njam ámb fém koraya, "Yéndon yaitotan Fol," a ámb, "Yéndon Afolos yaitotan,"féfene wafroghyam ndenanit yém mband ár.
bt: My friends, I could not talk to you.p as I talk to people who have God Spirit, but I had to talk to you.p as though you.p belonged to this world, as infants in Keriso. 2 I had to feed you.p milk, not strong food, because you.p were not ready for it. This is true, you.p are not ready for that. 3 Because you.p still live as the people of this world live. When there is jealousy among you.p and you.p quarrel with inside you.p. This prove that you.p belong to this world. And you.p are living by its standards. 4 When one of you.p says, “I follow Fol,” and another, “I follow Afolos,” your.p action is like worldly people.

nama: Némnat mbarkánde, efe yém Afolos? A efe yém Fol? Yénd siyénre mé Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh árro, emofem fém elimánménd kétán efalo yátoghfaf. Yéndfem ásáfogh yafrowam árké Yuram taramangé yá wafroghét: 6 Yéndon mbwe eitamén, Afolos wén nue ewasune, wénde Ngánján témorwén emon téméindau wén anoghét. 7 Emon eite a emon nue ewasune némndafi yéné yau yém, wénde mé Ngánjánro, ménamén yémon eméinde wén anoghét. 8 Kété fénaté yau yém yéfe kénjún emon eite a emon nue ewasuné. Ngánjánam so fai ámbiro ewafrowam yéné ásáfoghan ndernáye yémofem té tawafrowam. 9 Yénd siyénre mérne ásáfogh ár Ngánjáneyot a fém sem Ngánjánene ndau a Ngánjánene méngo.
bt: Think straightly, who is Afolos? And who is Fol? We.d are only God's without.payment workers, by whom you.p were led to truly approve(believe). We.d do the work which the Lord gave him to do: 6 I planted the seed, Afolos poured out water the tree, but God is the one who made the tree grow. 7 The one who plants and the one who waters really do not matter, but only God, because he makes the tree grow. 8 There is no difference between the one who plants and the one who waters. God will reward each one in the work how they have done. 9 We are co-workers for God and you.p are God's garden and God's building.

nama: Ngánjánam waramai ta ngárám wafroghét, yéndon tafrotan ásáfogh ndené fété káfeté mwighafé méngo ramégh ár a sérasér taitan, a ámb árém téu yarametat yéné tukén. Wénde ámbiroámbiro so fété nawarawenat ndernáye so méngo yéramete. 11 Ngánjánam tándái té yékmai Yesu Keriso ámbiro a mé fáro sérasér, a yau ámb sérasér so tékmangé. 12 Ámb árém so yarametat méngo gole, silfaye o tukén faimén wíme sérasér tukén, ámb árém so yarametat wéne o yuse a tafaye. 13 Ámbiroámbiro árfene ásáfogh sáf so yéfandat njam Kerisoene efogh kufarngé. Yéné efghon fésam so safén ekmete ámbiroámbiro árfene ásáfogh, fésam so eufote a tauyafongé ásáfogh kémbun. 14 Táf némé té tamorwén raméghan sérasér tukén fés wakraran kinamongé, méngo ramégh árom fai so tanangé. 15 Wénde fene ásáfogh njam té kakerne, fémo so yétarné wénde fém fémyo té nawanjar, táf fém té nawanjar fés kénjúmé.
bt: God gave me grace to use, I did the work as an wise builder and laid the post, and other people are building on it. But each one must be careful how he should build. 11 God has already put Yesu Keriso as the one and only post, and no other post can be put. 12 Other people will build the house on top of the post with gold or silver or very expensive stones, other people will build with wood or grass or straw. 13 And the type of each person's work will be seen when the day of Keriso reveals it. On that day fire will put clear(reveal) the type of every people's work, the fire will test it and show the result of work. 14 If what was built on the posts survives on the fire, the builder will receive a reward. 15 But if your work is burnt up, you.p will lose it but you.p yourself will be saved, as if you.p had escaped through the fire.

nama: Efaloe fém mat em ndené fém Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo em a Ngánjánene Mbérmbér yémor féfene kénjún! 17 Ngánjánam so tirorngé fá emon tirorngé yáne wáwefnogh méngo. Ménamén Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo siyém njúnnjúnofnar, a fém fémyo em yáne wáwefnogh méngo.
bt: Surely you.p know that you.p are God's worshipping house and that God's Spirit lives in you.p! 17 God will destroy anyone who destroys God's worshipping house. Because God's worshipping house is without.dust(holy), and you.p yourselves are his worshipping house.

nama: Fém yau nawawinda fémyo. Táf fété fém njam nemna ndené fém káfeté mwighafé ném mband yamoene mate, fém so kamndangé fifiofnar, ménát so kamndangé efalo káfeté mwighafé. 19 Ménamén némé yéné mbandam mwighé yekwne nde káfeté mwighé yém táf fifiofnar yém Ngánjanene ghékfan. Buk si noraye, "Ngánjánam tawerangé káfeté mwighafé ár yéfenjo matyaman."
bt: You should not deceive yourself. If you.s think that you.s are wise by this world's knowledges, you.s should become a without.meaning(foolish), so that you.p will be really wise. 19 Because what this world considers which is wise is without.meaning in God's sight. As the scripture says, “God catchs the wise men in their knowledge." 20 And another scripture says, “The Lord knows that the thoughts of the wise men are without.meaning.” 21 So no one should boast about what man can do. Everything belongs to you.p. 22 Fol or Afolos or Fitè, this world, life and death, the present and the future, all of these are yours, 23 and you.p belong to Keriso, and Keriso belongs to God.

nama: Fém so nemnati téfenemén ndené Kerisoene ásáfogh ár, efe té ekmayénd ásáfoghét Ngánjánene warambnoghmén efalo si afroghét. 2 Ár emo yásáfota yáne yurane ásáfogh fété so em ndimbal mwighé kér ro. 3 Yénd yau méinyotio mwighayan ménamén féfene moghmén o ámb fénataye árfene matyame yénd yéndio yau wékman moghan. 4 Tane emarégh siyém safén, wénde yéné yamam yau efalo yiyátote ndené yénd mbarkánd wém. Yuramro kwafrote mogh yénd. 5 Féyo fémofem yau yafrotati mogh ámb árfefaf táf mbarkánd efogh wufarégh frondeta. Nawanjeta féfene wifoghmén mogh ámb árfefaf kétánotio Yuré nénangota. Yémon so enérse kwayaghat némé atnogh yém kwéfkwéfan a yufarote árfene ménde tikfan. A féyo yémofem so ewinjetat Ngánjáneta áuwégh.
bt: You.p should think of us as Keriso's workers, who have been put in telling of God's secret truths. 2 A man who is doing the work a master of his must be faithful. 3 I am not at all concerned about being judged by you.p or by other people's knowing, I do not put myself in the judgement. 4 My conscience is clear, but that thing does not prove that I am straight. Only Lord do judgment me. 5 So you.p should not do judgment on anyone before the straight time comes. Wait your.p final judge to other people until the Lord comes. He will bring to light what is hidden in the darkness and expose people's motive in the heart. And then they will receive their praise from God.

nama: Tane fútaréf, féfene téfnan yéndon té ewangen méinyotio yam Afolosefaf a yéndio, yéndfem sómbioyam ewafrowém féfe ufénmanéghét, ménát fém so wéi notametati téfefafta orayéghoene kémbun, "Tékém kaka némé nák efrotaménd." Féyo fém efe yau so nawarmbotati ámb ároenemén a ámb yékarotati. 7 Emon fém eyáto ndimbal ámb árét. Ngánjánam ewaramai némé méinyotio fene em. Féyo, ndernáye fém so nawarmbotati, a ndenanit némé té fene em yau kar ramégh yém?
bt: My friends, for your sake I have brought back all things to Afolos and me, we use the two of us as an example, so that you.p may learn what the saying means, “Keep close what rules are written.” None of you.p should be proud of one person and despise another. 7 Who made you.p big to other people? God give you.p everything what you.p have? Then, how can you.p boast, as if what you.p have were not a gift?

nama: Fém tándái méinyotio fene méndefé rokarafé té namndangi! Fém nemnati fém wémár tém! Fém té limánégh yérnyangi téfeyofnaye! Yénd ménde wém fém sái yém limángéh ár efaloe. Fém njam témorwén, yénd so wéi yéném limánégh ár a yéndfem fémafé so yélimndam méinyotio rokar. 9 Ndené nérete tafaf Ngánjánam té yénmaramai kerker sifayé téfeyot Yesuene muyafé ár, ndenanit ár tékmangi krot marat sifayan ménát méinyotio mband maratam a njafar si résagh árém a árém so yafandat. 10 Kerisoene téfnan yénd yéném fifiofnar, wénde fém em káfeté mwighafé Keriso kénjún! Yénd njangénnjangén yéném, wénde fém em muyafé! Yénd kenagh ár yéném, wénde fém eutémndat! 11 Yénanotio sénonjo yénd yényota siogh a nuofnar, yénd siyéném sáláme féndérféndér yénmawo, yénd yénésmetat, yénd noyamndam kétándmé ámb yu kétán ámb yu. 12 Yénd taikrataye násáfotam téfenjo ngángaye. Njam yénd yénmafalngotat, yéndfem téfrendangém. Njam yénd yénésmetat, yénd tawaindangém. 13 Njam yénd yénmasalitat, yéndfem tawangongém mer sie. Yénd namndayém ndenanit wérár a mérmér yéné mband maratmén yénanotio sénonjo.
bt: You.p already have all you.p want! You think you.p have become rich! You have begun to reign without us! I want you to be really leader. If you.p were, we would also become leader and rule over all things with you.p. 9 It seems to me that God has given the last place to us men with Yesu's authority(apostles), like people put to die in public place so that the whole world, men carrying heavenly message(angels) and people will watch. 10 For Keriso's sake we are without.meaning, but you.p are wise in Keriso! We are weak, but you.p are strong! We are despised, but you.p are honored! 11 To this very moment we go hungry and thirsty, we are clothed in rags; we are beaten, we wandered from place to place. 12 We work hard with our own hands. When we are cursed, we bless. When we are persecuted, we endure. 13 When we are insulted, we answer back with kind talks. We have became like animals and rabbish in this world to this very moment!

nama: Yéndon yéné yéfarotan féfefaf, yau ménát yéndon sái tákman wáiwáiot, wénde fém ewawanjan ndené fété tane tikfafé ambumtértér. 15 Téu fene 10,000 watamegh ár em Keriso kénjún, féfene afé siyém mé ámbiro. Ménamén Yesu Keriso kénjún yénd té nénamndan féfene afé mer si kénjúmé. 16 Yéndon ewanendan fém ménát so ewaitotati tane waufarogh. 17 Yéné téfnan yéndon yánmatembetan féfefaf Timoti, efe yém tane tikfafé a ndimbal mwighé kér ro ambum efalo yátogh árfene ghérsé kénjún. Yémon so kor mwighé ewangote fém tane wafroghyammén árké yéndon yaitotan totér ghérsé kénjún Yesu Keriso kénjún a méné yéndon tawatametan méinyotio Yesuene mérén kénjúmé marataye.
bt: I am writing this to you.p, not because I want to make you.p feel ashamed, but to advice you.p as my heartful children. 15 Even if you.p have ten thousand teaching men in Keriso, you.p have only one father. Because in Keriso Yesu I have become your father through the good talk. 16 I beg you.p to follow my example. 17 For this reason I am sending to you.p Timoti, who is my own heartful and faithful son in the life of the truly approving man(believer). He will remind you.p of the action ways which I follow in the new life in Yesu Keriso and which I teach in all the Yesu's families(churches) everywhere.

nama: Ámb ár namndangi tuktuk ménamén fá té kemnati nde yénd kar yau so kénaflangayén féfefaf yafoghét. 19 Wénde táf njam Yuré ménde yém, yénd so kénaflen tekofnaryo, a féyo yéndon so táronjangé tandio yéné waftamén árkéméné yéné tuktuk árfene ewam, yau mé siero némé fá norayat. 20 Ngánján limánégh siyém yau mé siero, wénde wafté. 21 Árké ménde em? So wét kénaflen féfafaf téfélafé, o uwégh a métar mbérmbérafé?
bt: Some people have become proud because they have thought that I would not be coming to visit you.p. 19 But if the Lord is willing, I will come to you.p not.far, and then I will find out for myself that power which people have proud, and not just what they say. 20 The kingdom of God is not a matter of talks but of power. 21 Which do you.p want? Shall I come to you.p with a whip, or in a spirit of love and gentleness?

nama: Efaloe korayat ndené kété siyém yaufi wal féfe kénjún yaufi kéráye ndené yau yém yéné yaufi wal efalo yátoghofnar árfefaf. Ta waufroyénd ndené ár ekmare yárefane amafofé! 2 Féyo ndernáye fém so nawarmbotati? Fém fiya ghérghérsisayam tawafongé, a fété tutorngi féfenjo mérénta ár emon té tafrote yéné yam. 3 A ndemamén yénd wém nayu kétándmé féfe tambén fifie, yénd mé wém kété féfefaf mbérmbére. Ndené nde kété kar kwémorwén fémafé, téfene Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan yéndon té yáindayén mogh yam yifoyén yéné ároefaf emon té yafrotam yaufi wal. 4 Féyo njam fém kafángongi a yénd ngafghangén fémafé mbérmbéran, a téfene Yuré Yesuene wafté yéna yém, 5 téramangi yéné ár kétán Sáiféroene ngángat ménát ndené yáne fifi wasérmboghét, ménát ndené yáne mbérmbér so kunjarngé Yurane efghon.
bt: They said actually that there is sexual immorality among you.p so terrible that even unbelievers do not have. They told me that a man is sleeping with his father's wife! 2 Then how can you.p be proud? You.p should be filled with sadness, and you.p should expel the man who had been doing this from your group. 3 And even though I am far away from you.p bodily, I still am there with you.p in spirit. I were there with you.p, I have in the name of our Lord Yesu already passed judgment on the man who has done this sexual immortality. 4 So when you.p gathered and I am with you.p in spirit, and the power of our Lord Yesu is present, 5 hand this man over to Sáifér for his body to be destroyed, so that his spirit may be saved in the day of the Lord.

nama: Yau mbarkánd yém féfeyot sái nawarmbotati! Fém mat em si, "Némbne fénjfénj flawé minaghmén fakam yémine flawé kofékofé." 7 Fémofem so titrombongi tándáwár flawé minagh fak ménát fém so em njúnnjúnofnar. Féyo fém ndenanit so em totér flawé minagh fakofnaye, ndené fém fété em. Téfene Waingégh téménd frengéghkaf yém, sénonjo Keriso, téfene Waingégh Sif tosé, té tésmetat. 8 Kamyongém yénd téfene Waingégh témndot, yau minagh fakafé flawé árké yém mámáfi yamafé a yaufiyamafé, wénde fak minaghofnar flawé árké yém njúnnjúnofnar a efalo.
bt: It is not straight for you.p to be proud! You know the saying, “A little bit of yeast makes the whole flowé rise.” 7 You.p must remove the old yeast so that you.p will be without.dust. Then you.p will be like a new batch of flawé without any yeast, as you.p really are. Our Passover festival is ready, now Keriso, our Passover lamb, has been sacrificed. 8 Let us celebrate our Passover feast, not with bread with yeast which is with wickedness and evil, but without yeast bread which is without.dust and true.

nama: Ámb férénan yéndon yéfarotamén féfeyot a engemndayén fém ndené yau nawarendati yémafé yaufi wal kér ro árfé. 10 Wénde yéndon yau esérmbnan efalo yátoghofnar ár efe em yaufi wal téfnár, o kwanjté ár o oro téfnár, o mewang wáwefnogh ár. Ménát etérmbogh ndené méinyotio árta, fém so fété kétorngi yéné mband maratta. 11 Sénonjo yéndon norayan féfefaf ndené fém yau nawarendati yéné árofé efe namndete féyo ndené efalo yátogh ár wénde yém yaufi walyam téfnár o kwanjté o mewang wáwefnogh ár o unyégh ár o wéri téfnár o oro téfnár. Yau táf námnjotati nénet ndené árfé.
bt: In the other letter I wrote you.p, I told you.p not to associate with sexually immoral people. 10 But I'm not talking about that unbelievers who are sexually immoral, or greedy or are thieves, or who worship idols. To avoid from all people like that, you.p would have to get out of the world. 11 What I meant was that you.p should not associate with a person who calls himself a truly approving man(believer) but is sexual immorality or greedy or worships idols or a liar or a drunkard or a thief. Don't even sit down to eat with such a person.

nama: Tane ásáfogh yau yém sái norayan efe Yesuene mérén kénjún yau em. Ngánjánam mogh so yafrote yéfefaf. Wénde yau mogh yafrotati fenjo mérénmén árfefaf. 13 Ndené fété Buk si noraye, "Tawitrombongi yaufiyamafé ár fenjo mérénta."
bt: My work is not to saying who are not inside of Yesu's family(church). God will do judgment them. But you.p should not do judgment the people of your group. 13 As the scripture says, “Remove the evil person from your group.”

nama: Njam ámb fém éwighan ere ámb efalo yátogh árfé, ndernáye fém kuwano ngánjánofnar sénko árfé sáfrére moghét némamén yau namyo Ngánjánene árfefaf kérté frengéghét? 2 Fém mat yau em nde Ngánjánene árém mband marat moghan so tékmangi? Féyo njam fémofem mband moghan tékmangi, fém yau féyotaro em némbne kértamén moghét? 3 Fém mat yau em ndené yéndfem njafar si résagh ár moghan so tékmangém? Féyo nderé tárfár kérté yéndfem so efrendam yéné ghérsamén! 4 Féyo njam ndené kérté eném, fémofem so engérsati frengéghét yéné árfefaf efe yau ewakai Yesuene mérnan? 5 Wáiwái aem! Yéna fété em ámbiro káfeté mwighé ár yéfnayéng féfene mérnan emon so ewafrende éwigh kérté féfe kénjúnro. 6 Yau ndené, ámb fútar kuwanongé ámb árfé moghét a tumyongé efalo yátoghofnar kérté moghét!
bt: If any of you.p have a dispute with another truly approving man(believer), how dare you.p go before ungodly leaders for judgment about that instead of letting God's people settle the problem? 2 Don't you.p know that God's people will judge the world? Then, if you.p are to judge the world, aren't you.p capable of judging small problems? 3 Don't you.p know that we shall judge the men carrying heavenly message(angels)? So how much more problem we will settle about this life! 4 If such problems come up, are you.p going to take them to be settled by people who have no standing in the Yesu's family(church)? 5 Shame on you.p! Surely there is at least one wise person in your group who can settle a dispute between truly approving people(believers). 6 Instead, one of truly approving man(believer) goes to court with another man and lets people who do not truly approve(unbelieving) judge the problem!

nama: Yéné yam ndené fém snufrotati moghét féfe kénjúro nauyafote ndené fém té kawewonati. Yau mer nérete fém mámáfi náyátotati? Yau mer nérete fém néwáwendati? 8 Yau fém fémyo mámáfi náyátotati ámbiroámbiroe a néwáwendati féfenjo efalo yátogh ár! 9 Fété fém mat em ndené yaufiyamafé ár yau so tanangé Ngánján limánégh. Yau nawawérsotati fémyo. Ár efe em yaufi walwalro o ewáwefnotat mewangat o em amafanyo o áranyo walwalro a ár ghakér ro wal téfnár 10 o efe oro téfnár o em nité o em wéri téfnár o efe unyégh ár or ngi téfnár-yéné yam wafrogh árém yau so tanangi Ngánján limánégh. 11 Ámb fém ndenanit tamorwén. Wénde fém té eumbaryéng kétándmé yaufita, fém té eramayéng Ngánjánefaf, fém té eyátoyéng mbarkánd Ngánjánafé Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwén kénjúmé a ménaye fai téfene Ngánjánene Mbérmbére. Fenjo fifi yérametat Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghat
bt: This thing that you.p have lawsuits among yourselves shows that you.p have already failed. Doesn't it look good for you.p to become wrong? Doesn't it look good for you.p to be robbed? 8 You.p yourselves make wrong one another and rob your.p truly approving people(believers)! 9 Surely you.p know that wicked people will not receive God's kingdom. Do not fool yourselves. People who are sexual immoral or who worship idols or adulterers or men who have sex with men(homosexual perverts) 10 or who steal or greedy or drunkards or who slander other people or thieves—doing these things will not receive God's kingdom. 11 Some of you.p were like that. But you.p have been washed from sin, you.p have been given to God, you.p have been put straight with God by the Lord Yesu Keriso and by the Spirit of our God. Use your bodies for God's big light(glory)

nama: Ámb ár so korayangé, "Yénd namyotan némndafi rokar wafroghét," wénde yau méinyotio rokar mer em feyot. Yénd so korayangén, "Yénd namyotan némndafi rokar wafroghét," wénde yénd yau so kamndan némndafioene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 13 Ámb árom so korayangé, "Njamke siyém fútoe, a fút siyém njamkeyoe." Yéné efalo yém, wénde Ngánjánam so ewasérmbowé sómbio. Ároene fifi siyém yau so yimndé yaufi wal yamot, wénde ménát Yurane ásáfoghét, a Yuram so wéi násáfote fifioe. 14 Ngánjánam yanoyéng Yuré kétándmé kérta, a yémon so ndenáyo ténmanongé yénd yáne waftaye.
bt: Someone will say, “I am allowed to do anything.” but not everything is good for you.p. I could say, "I am allowed to do anything," but I will not going to let anything make me its without.payment working man(servant). 13 Someone else will say, “Food is for the stomach, and the stomach is for food. ” That's true, but God will destroy them both. People's body is not to be used for sexual immorality, but to serve the Lord, and the Lord will also work for the body. 14 God raised the Lord from death, and he will also raise us by his power.

nama: Fém mat té em nde féfenjo fifi sem Kerisoene fifioene kafe. So wét yéndon tanén Kerisoene fifi kafe a tiyáton yaufi walot? Féyotarofnar! 16 Fém mafina em ndené yéné ár emon fifi yánjo tékayongé amafaf kamndend ámbiro yémafé? Buk si noraye mé safénro, "Sómbio so kamndend ámbiro fifi." 17 Wénde fá efe kakayongé fáyo Yurafaf kamndangé mbérmbére ámbiro yémafé.
bt: You.p know that your.p bodies are parts of the body of Keriso. Shall I take a part of Keriso's body and make it part of the body of a prostitute? Impossible! 16 You don't know that that man who joins his body to a prostitute becomes physically one with her? The Buk(scripture) says very clearly, “The two will become one body.” 17 But he who joins himself to the Lord becomes spiritually one with him.

nama: Witérmbogh yaufi wal yam. Méinyotio ámb yaufiyam árom sewafrote yau yaghne yáne fifi; wénde yaufiyam ár emon amafanyo wal ewafrote, yaghne yánjo fifi. 19 Fém mat té em ndené féfene fifi sem Ngánján Mbérmbéroene wáwefnogh méngo, efe yémor féfene kénjún, a yaramayéng féfeyot Ngánjánam. Fém yau fenjoyo em. 20 Ngánjánam té nénmayayéng faye, féyo fenjo fifi yérametati Ngánjánene ndimbal yétkwénat.
bt: Avoid sexual immorality. All other sin a man commits does not destroy his body, but sin a man who does sexual immorality, destroy his own body. 19 You.p know that your body is the worshipping house of the God Spirit, who lives in you.p and who was given to you.p by God. You do not belong to yourselves. 20 God bought you.p for a price, so give your bodies for God's big name.

nama: Sénonjo, so yéfandam yéné yammén fémofem árké yéfarotaménd: "Mer nérete árom yau sái yafrota walyam amafofé." 2 Wénde ménamén kété siyém minde yaufi wal, ámbiroámbiro ár fété so yém yáténafé, a ámbiroámbiro amaf fété so yém yánjarafé. 3 Yánjarém so yafrote yáne ásáfogh ndené fété yánjar, a ndenéyameyo yátnom ndené fété yátén. 4 Amaf yau yáne yuré yém yánjo fififaf, wénde yánjar yém, ndenéyameyo yánjar siyém yau yuré yém yáne fififaf, wénde yátén yém. 5 Yau so fém nakarot fémro, táfandro fémofem fronde mwighé so téfghend wafroghét tekofnaye ménát efoghféneféne so ténfend Ngánjánafé orayéghét, wénde térnyénd awarnyégh. Ménát fém yau so Sáiféroene wufoghan ere ménamén féfene awamaroghofnarmén.
bt: Now, let's see this things which you.p wrote about: "It is good for a man not to have sexual relations with a woman." 2 But because there is so much immorality, each man should have his own wife, and each woman should have her own husband. 3 The husband should do this work as a husband, and likewise the wife to her husband. 4 A wife is not the master of her own body, but her husband is, in the same way a husband is not the master of his own body, but his wife is. 5 Do not deny yourselves, unless you.p first agree to do so for a while to spend your time in talking with God; but begin being together. In this way you.p will protect yourselves from the tempation of Sáifér because of your without.self-control.

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yéné yau wáfaregh yém, wénde mé mwigharo yém. 7 Yénd nemnan méinyotio fém kar ndené yam yénd kés wém. Wénde ámbiroámbiro féne fénataye fok Ngánjánam árké té yéramai yá, ámb ároe ámb fok, ámb ároe yéné.
bt: I tell you.p this not as an order, but simply as a thinking. 7 I think all of you.p were as I am. But each one has a special gift which God had given to him, one person one gift, another one that gift.

nama: Sénonjo, yénd norayan aweréghofnar árfefaf a kwirafefaf, mer nérete féfeyot miya engérnyang ámnjoghan féfembia ndené fété yénd swém. 9 Wénde njam yau fém nawamarotati, féyo mer yém téu naweretati, yau táf mwighayan nuitati.
bt: Now, I say to the unmarried people and to the widows, it looks good for you.p to continue to live by yourselves as I do. 9 But if you.p cannot control yourselves, so it is good to marry, should not fall down in thought.

nama: Awerégh árét táfaf yéna sotafé si em árkéméné tanjoyo yau em wénde Yurane. Yátén yau so kafalongé yánjarta. 11 Wénde téu téfrangongé, fá so yémor strewar ámnjogh o kawafarotangé fá yánjarefaf. A yánjarém yau so tatembangé yatén.
bt: For married people I have a strong talk(command) which is not my own but the Lord's. A wife must not seperate from her husband. 11 But if she divorces, she must remain single or be reconciled to her husband. And a husband must not send away his wife.

nama: Ámb árfefaf yénd norayan. Yéné si yau yém Yurata, wénde yénd norayan tane mwighé. Yéné yém, njam efalo yátogh ár yém yáténafé efe yau efalo yátogh amaf yém a fá kuwanongé ménát sái mé engmorare yémafé, yémon yau táf tatembangé fá. 13 A njam efalo yátogh amaf aweréghkaf yém árfaf efe yau efalo yátogh ár yém a kuwanongé ménát sái mé engmorare yémafé, amafom yau táf tatembangé fá. 14 Ménamén efalo yátoghofnar yánjar Ngánjánam tumyongé ménáyan fá sái kafghend efalo yátogh yátnofé, a efalo yátoghofnar amaf Ngánjánam tumyongé ménaye sái kafghend fá efalo yátogh yánjarfé. Yau njam yéné yam yém, yéfene ambumtértér ndenanit so em ngánjánofnar ambumtértér, wénde ndené kés yém, fá sem umyoghkaf em Ngánjánefaf. 15 Wénde njam efalo yátoghofnar ár kuwanongé, ndenáye so fété yém. Efalo yatogh ár a amaf yau so taumbe ndené yamam. Ngánjánam té ewanmoi fém krufrát ámnjoghét. 16 Ndernáye wét mat so kamndang, efalo yátogh yatén, ndené fémon so ghérsé turto fenjo fenjar? O ndernáye wét fém mat so kamndang, efalo yátogh yánjar, ndené fémon so ghérsé turto fetén? Ndenaye aemor Ngánjánam emotai fém
bt: To the other people I say. This talk is not from the Lord, but I speak my own thinking. It is this, if a truly approving man(believer) has a wife who is not truly approve woman(believing woman) and she is willing to live with him, he must not send away her. 13 And if a truly approving woman(believing woman) is married to a man who is not a truly approving man(believer) and he is willing to live with her, she must not send him away. 14 Because God allow the truly approving(unbelieving) husband by being united to his truly approving wife, and God allow the truly without.approving(unbelieving) wife by being united to her truly approving(believing) husband. If this were not so, their children would be like godless children, but as it is, they are acceptable to God. 15 But if the truly without.approving man(unbeliever) leaves, let it be so. The thruly approving man and woman is not bound in such things. God has called you.p to live in peace. 16 How do you.p know, truly approving(believing) wife, that you.p would save your husband? Or how do you.p know, truly approving(believing) husband, that you.p would save your wife? Live as God called you

nama: Ámbiroámbiro fém so yémorang ndenáye Yuram némé ghérsé ewarametam féfe, a ndené fété fém Ngánjánam té emotai. Yéné fiyém si téfén yéndon árké táitotawén méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé. 18 Njam ghéngan néfégh árom tumyongé Ngánánene mogh, yémo yau so titérmbongé ghéngan néfégh mbor. Njam ghéngan néféghofnar árom tumyongé Ngánjánene mogh, fá yau so ghéngan yénfetat. 19 Téu o yau ár ghéngan yénfetat wénde yéné siyém fifiofnar. Némé mwighé yém siyém amyogh Ngánjánene náknák wafroghét. 20 Ámbiroámbiro fém so mé kámnjo ndenáye fém kés témorwén njam fémofem yumyoyénd Ngánjánene mogh. 21 Fém táf témorwén faiofnar ásáfogh ár njam Ngánján némotai fém? Mwighayam yau ewawérsota, wénde fémo njam yanai yuwek ghérsé, mé yafrotati. 22 Faiofnar ásáfogh ár efe Yuram té emotai siyém Yurane yuwek ár, ndené endeyo yuwek ár efe Kerisom té emotai siyém yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 23 Fém sem Ngánjánam té ewanai faye, féyo yau kamndangi árfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 24 Tane fútaréf, ámbiroámbiroero fém ménj mé so ernyangé Ngánjánafé awarnyéghan ndené yamot fém témorwén njam fém emotai. Ámogh si aweréghofnar árfenemén a kwirafenemén
bt: Each of you.p should live a life what Lord had given to you.p, and as God has called you.p. This is the original talk I tell in all the Yesu's families(churches). 18 If a cutting skin(circumcised) man has accepted God's call, he should not try to remove the marks of cutting skin. If an without.cutting skin(circumcised) man has accepted God's call, he should not cut skin(circumcised). 19 Whether or not a man is cut skin(circumcised) is without.meanin. What matters is to do God's commandments. 20 Each of you.p should remain as you.s were when you.p accepted God's call. 21 Were you.s a without.payment working man(servant) when God called you.s? Don't let it trouble you, but if you.s can take free life, do so. 22 For a without.payment working man(servant) who has been called by the Lord is the Lord's free person, in the same way a free person who has been called by Keriso is a without.payment working man(servant) of Keriso. 23 You.p are God have bought for a price, so do not become without.payment working men(servants) of people. 24 My friends, each of you.p should remain in fellowship with God in the same way that you.p were when you.p were called. Asking talks about the unmarried people and the uidows

nama: Ámb si némé fémofem yafarotaménd aweréghofnar árfenemén. Yénd wafaréghofnar wém Yurata, wénde yéndon yarametan tane mwigharo, ménamén yáne ghérghérsisayan Yuram yénd té wiyátoi efe nafrotan efalo si.
bt: Another talk what you.p wrote about unmarried people. I do not have a command from the Lord, because in his mercy Lord made me become one who proclaim true talk.

nama: Ménamén sénonjo kértamén, yénd ndené nemnan mer yém ár sái yémor ndernáye fá yém. 27 Fém feténafé ném? Féyo yau nemna fetén watembéghét. Fém aweréghofnar ném? Féyo yau néreta ménát fetnot. 28 Wénde njam fém kawer, fémon yau yaufi yafrote, a njam aweréghofnar amaf kawerangé, yémon yau yaufi yafrote. Wénde yémofem efe naweretat so efángotat tárfár kérté yéné ghérayan, a yénd ménde wém ménát féfe wambghét.
bt: Because of the present problem, I think that it is good for a man to stay as he is. 27 Do you.p have a wife? Then don't try to send her away. Are you.p unmarried? Then don't look for a wife. 28 But if you.s marry, you.s haven't committed a sin, and if an unmarried woman marries, she hasn't committed a sin. But those who marry will face many troubles in this life, and I want to ptotect you.p this.

nama: Fútaréf, ndené yéndon norayan yéné si, yau tárfár efoghféneféne ninamongi, a yénandmé sénonjo awerégh ár fiya tamorang ndené fá yau kar amaf naweretaménd. 30 Fá efe ye nendat, ndené fété fá yau kar, a fá efe áuwéghafé em, ndené fété fá yau kar. Fá emofem rokar ersat, ndené fété yau kar yéfene wamangét ewam. 31 Fá efe ernyang mband marat mer rokarfaf, ndenanit yau kár eremngotat yéné rokaram. Ménamén nderé sáfot yéné mband sénonjo yém yau so nakete teke.
bt: My friends, what I say this talk, there is not much time left, and from now on married people should live as though they were not married. 30 Those who mourn, as if they did not, and those who are happy, as if they were not. Those who buy something, as if it were not theirs to keep; 31 Those who enjoy in the things of this world, as if they are not satisfied by its things. For this world in its present form will not last long.

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái em yuwek kétándmé mwighé uwérsoghta. Aweréghofnar ár fáyo nemne Yurane ásáfoghménro, ménamén fá ménde yém áuwéghét Yuré sái yéméinda. 33 Wénde awerégh ár fáyo nemne mband marat yamménro, ménamén fá nemne yáténoene ménde so yawifoté. 34 Féyo yénémamén fá siyém sómbio mwighayam yélimnde. Aweréghofnar o yuwagia mérés fáyo nemne Yurane ásáfoghménro, ménamén fá ménde yém araméghkaf sái sómbio kénjún yém fifiyan a mbérmbéran. Wénde awerégh amaf fáyo nemne mband marat yamménro, ménamén yémon ménde yánjarene yawifote.
bt: I want you.p to be free from worry. An unmarried man thinks himself with only the Lord's work, because he wants to cause to please the Lord. 33 But a married man thinks himself with only earthly things, because he wants to please his wife. 34 So he is led in two thought. An unmarried woman or a virgin thinks herself with the Lord's work, because she wants to be dedicated both in body and spirit. But a married woman thinks herself with earthly things, because she wants to please her husband.

nama: Yénd norayan yéné ménamén yénd ménde wém féfe wáutárghét. Yéndon yau kémbogh yénérsan féfefaf. Wénde yénd ménde wém fémofem sái yafrotati némé yém mbarkánd a utmanéghafé, a sái fémyo karamangi méinyotio Yurane ásáfoghét ékmboghofnaye.
bt: I am saying this because I want to help you.p. I am not carrying stopping on you.p. Instead, I want you.p to do what is straight and respectful, and to give yourselves completely to the Lord's work without any stopping.

nama: Njam ár noraye unyégh si sai amaf kawerangé méroefaf a kemnangé ndené fá yau merkéráye yuyafote mérsefaf, a njam yáne méndeyam minde tanangé ndené fá so kawerangé, féyo fá fété so kawerend, ndenáye fété fá ménde kés yém. Yémo yau yaufi yafrote. Fá fété so káwerend. 37 Wénde njam ár taikrataye nemna yau yaweréghét ménaye wawérmanoghofnar wafroghét, a njam yémon téu yánjo ménde yamarota a némé té yaito yánjo mwighayan némé wafroghét, féyo yémon mer yafrote yau awerghét totér amafot. 38 Féyo ár emon kawerangé mer yafrote, wénde ár emon yau kawerangé yafrote ménde merfifi.
bt: If a man is promised to be married to a young woman and he thinks he is not showing her properly, and if his passions are too strong that he should marry, then they should get married, as he wants to. He do not sinning. They should get married. 37 But if a man thinks strongly not to marry without being forced to do so, and if he has his will under complete control and has already decided in his own mind what to do, then he does well not to marry the young woman. 38 So the man who marries does well, but the one who doesn't marry does even better.

nama: Awerégh amaf siyém yau yuwek yém táf njam yánjar ghérsé yém. Wénde njam yánjar kér yém, féyo fá so yuwek yém fá so kawerangé ámb ár yáne méndefé, wénde fá táf efalo yátogh ár njam yém. 40 Wénde tane mwighé kénjún fá so yém minde áuwéghafé yém njam fá yémor ndené fá yém. Yénd nemnan yéndon wéi wém Ngánjánene Mbérmbérafé.
bt: A married woman is not free as long as her husband lives. But if her husband dies, then she is free to be married to any man with her wishing, but only if he must be a truly approving man(believer). 40 But in my thought, she will be very happy if she stays as she is. I think that I too have the Spirit of God.

nama: Sénonjo yénd so norayan ménamén njamke raméghmén mewangfaf.
bt: Now I am going to speak about food offered to idols.
