Wénde soramé yéné ár nufaryénd, Fité nimndai a njamke yau tánetawét Téndo árfé, ménamén fá férfér témorwén Jemsene ármén efe ménde tamorwén téndo efalo yátogh árém sái tanfetawét ghéngan. 13 Ámb Ju efalo yátogh ár nyufnyayénd Fitafé a Banabas wéi nyufnyai Fitane sómbio mwighafaf.
bt: When Fitè came to Antiok, I rebuked him in crowd, because he did wrong openly. 12 When he first arrived in Antiok, Fitè had been eating with the Side people believers. Then Jems sent other Ju believers from Jerusalem to Antiok. But after these people arrived, Fité withdrew and did not eat with the Side people, because he was afraid of Jems' people who wanted the side people should cut skin. 13 The other Ju people who truly approve(Ju believers) joined Fitè and Banabas also joined Fité's two minds.

nama: Njam yénd néretayén ndené yémofem yau yaitotat mer sioene efalo end, yénd norayan Fitafaf méinyotio ár sáfrére, "Fém ném Ju ár, wéndende fém kénmor ndenanit Téndo árnit, yau ndené Ju árnit. Ndernáye wéi fémon ewáfárete Téndo ár sái emor Ju árfene túmén yame?"
bt: When I looked that they were not following the truth way of the good talk, I spoke to Fitè in face of all the people, “You.s are a Ju man, but you live like a Side people, not like a Ju people. How do you command Side people to live like Ju always doing(customs)?”

nama: Yénd náráftamém ndené Ju ár a yau yaufiyamafé Téndo ár. 16 Wénde yénd mat yéném ndené ár yaufifi mbarkánd kakmangé Ngánjánafé wafroghe némé nák noraye, wénde mé ndimbal mwighaye Yesu Keriso kénjún. Yéndfem wéi efalo yiyátongém Keriso Yesu ménát mbarkánd kakmangém Ngánjánafé téfene ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé Keriso kénjún, a yau yéné wafroghe némé nák noraye. Ménamén efe yau so kakmangé mbarkánd Ngánjánafé ménaye wafroghe némé nák noraye. 17 Njam yénd kufngongém mbarkánd sái kamndangém Ngánjánafé Keriso kénjún, yénd so kawinjongém ndené yaufiyamafé ár yéném. Wét yéné fifi ndené yém Kerisom ásáfogh yafrote yaufi funaghét? Yaufifi! 18 Njam yéndo tafngon wéikor ramghét nákmén yam yéndon árké té yiroryén, yénd yéndio nauyafon sái wém ámb nák rafarégh ár. 19 Nák kénjúmé yénd kér yémormén nákfaf ménát yénd Ngánjáneyot so wémorang ghérsé. 20 Yénd té kér wémormén Kerisofé yáne wafatarégh wénan, a yénd yéné yau féwém efe ghérsé wém, wénde Keriso efe tafaf yémor. Yéné ghérsé yénd wémor sénonjo fifiyan, yénd swémor ndimbal mwighaye Ngánjánene Ambum kénjún, emon wuwetam yénd a waramai yánjo ghérsé tayot. 21 Yéndon yau yékmetan Ngánjánene ngárám téndot. Wénde njam nák ewéretam sái yényátota mbarkand Ngánjánafé, Kerisoene kér siyém fifiofnar!
bt: We were born as Ju people and not Side people with sins. 16 But we know that a man is never be put straight with God through obeying the law that says, but only faith in Yesu Keriso. We also truly approved(believed) in Keriso Yesu to be put straight with God through our faith in Keriso, and not these works what law says. Because no one will be put straight with God by doing what the law says. 17 If we want to become straight with God in Keriso, we must see ourselves as sinners. Does this meaning that Keriso is doing work to cause sin? Never! 18 If I start to build again the way of law which I have destoyed, I show myself to be a law breaker. 19 Through the law I died to the law so that I can live for God. 20 I have died with Keriso on his cross, and I am not who lives, but Keriso who lives in me. This life I live now bodily, I live by big mind(faith) in the Son of God, who loved me and gave his life for me. 21 I do not put aside God's grace. But if keeping the law could make us straight with God, Keriso's death is without.meaning!

nama: Fém mwighé ongén Galasia ár! Efe norayai ngamé si féfefaf? Féfene ghékfan safénro témorwén Yesu Kerisoene kér wafatarégh wénan. 2 Kwaufrongi ta yéné ámbiro yammén: Fémofem Ngánján Mbérmbér sianayénd ménaye nákoene ásáfoghe, o efalo yátoghe némé fém káyáretati? 3 Fém ndernáye minde mwighé ongén em! Fém njam fronde namndayénd Yurane ár, fém táf tamorangérwén Ngánján Mbérmbéroene waftaye, wénde sénonjo fém nufngongi ménát sái emor wéikor fifioene waftaye? 4 Méinyotio féfene matyam fifiofnar emormén? Efalofifi yéna fété yém! 5 Ngánjánam Ngánján Mbérmbér yéramai féfefaf a sélngwélafé yam tawafrotau féfene kénjún. Ngánjánam ewafrotam yéné ménamén fémofem ewaitotati nák, o ménamén fém náyárayénd mer si a efalo yiyátoyénd? 6 Kemnangi Ebraamenemén. Buk si noraye, "Yémon Ngánján efalo yiyátoi, a ménamén yáne ndimbal mwighamén Ngánjánam yumyoi fá mbarkánd ármén. 7 Féyo fém fiya kawayamngongi ndené Ebraamene efalo áki ambum yéné ár em endefene ewam ndimbal mwighé. 8 Buk si noraye ndené, soramé yuwon Ngánjánam so tákmangé Téndo ár mbarkánd yéfene ndimbal mwighamén. Buk si norayai yéné soramé yumén mer si Ebraamefaf, "Fe kénjúmé Ngánjánam so efrende méinyotio ár." 9 Yénémaménnde Ebraamém efalo yiyátoi a Ngánjánam yéfrendai, yénémamén méinyotio emofem efalo yiyátotat frengéghan em ndené Ebraam kés témorwén.
bt: You without-head(foolish) Galasi people! Who places this spell to you? In your eyes is clearly the death of Yesu Keriso on the cross. 2 Tell me this one thing: You receive God Spirit by the works of the law, or by believing what you heard? 3 How are you so without.head(foolish)! When you.p first became the Lord's people, you.p used to live according to the power of the Holy Spirit, but now are you.p trying to live again according to the power of body? 4 Were all your knowledge(Note. knowledge is from the experience) without.meaning? Really there should be! 5 God give you.p God Spirit and makes surprsing things(miracles) in you. Does God do these because you follow law, or because you heard and believe good talk? 6 Think about Ebraam. The Buk(scripture) says, “He truly approved(believed) God, and because result of his big mind(faith) God accepted him as straight man.” 7 So you should realize that the real descendants of Ebraam are the people who have big mind(faith). 8 The Buk(scripture) told that, in the future God will put the Side people straight because of their big mind(faith). The Buk(scripture) told this future good talk to Ebraam, “Through you.s God will bless all the people.” 9 Therefore Ebraam truly approved(believed) and God blessed him, therefore all who truly approve(believe) are in blessing as Ebraam was.

nama: Fá efe námyotat nák áyáréghan so emor Ngánjánene wafalngogh mbanmbanan. Féyo Buk si noraye, "Emon yau túmén náyárete méinyotio yam árké ekai nák bukan siyém Ngánjánene wafalngogh mbanmbanan!" 11 Mé safénro yém árké ár yau so Ngánjánam mbarkánd táyátongé yémafé ménaye náke, ménamén Buk si noraye, "Mbarkánd ár so emor ndimbal mwighaye." 12 Wénde nák yau yékai ndimbal mwighafaf. Wéndende Buk si noraye, "Emo njam ewafrota méinyotio yam nák ndernáye noraye so ghérsé yém." 13 Kerisom yénmanjaryéng kétamé nákoene wafalngoghta ménaye fá nénamndayéng wafalngogh téfeyot, ménamén Buk si noraye, "Efe njam tamangi wénan fá siyém Ngánjánene wafalngoghan." 14 Yémon yénmanjaryéng yénd ménát ndené frengégh árké yéramai Ebraame so yéném Téndo árfefaf Keriso Yesue kénjúmé, ménát ndimbal mwighaye yéndfem sái tanangém Ngánján Mbérmbér Ngánján árké unyéghofnar si norayai. Nák a unyéghofnar si
bt: Those who rely on obeying the law will live under God's curse. So the Buk(scripture) says, “Whoever does not always obey everything that is written in the book of the law is under God's curse!” 11 It is very clear that God puts no one become straight with himself by the law, because the Buk(scripture) says, “The straight people will live by big mind(faith).” 12 But the law does not stand(base) on the big mind(faith). Instead the Buk(scripture) says, “Whoever does everything how the law says will live.” 13 Keriso saved us from the curse of the law by he became a curse for us, because Buk says, “Anyone who they hang on a tree he is in God's curse." 14 He saved us in order that the blessing which he gave to Ebraam might come to the Side people through Keriso Yesu, so that by big mind(faith) we will receive God Spirit which God said without.lying talk(promised) The law and the without.lying talk(promise)

nama: Tane fútaréf, yéndon so ténmanan méinyotio efoghmén wafroghyam. Njam sómbio ár kuwangend némé mwighé ámbiro tiyátend, emo yau so térafarngé o yau so téminangé. 16 Ngánjánam unyéghofnar si korayau Ebraamefaf a yánjo áki ambumoefaf. Buk si yau ndené noraye, "áki ambumafefaf, " yáne fifi tárfár ár, wénde 'áki ambumoefaf,' yáne fifi ámbiro ár efe yém Keriso. 17 Némé yéndon norayan yém ndené Ngánjánam norayai unyéghofnar si Ebraamefaf, a 430 yunjéf soramé, Ngánjánam yaramai nák Mosese, nákam yau so tengongé o talindangé Ngánjánene unyéghofnar si. 18 Raméghyam yau yém kétamé árém ewaitotat nák, wénde raméghyam yéném kétamé unyéghofnar sita. Ngánjánam yéramai yánjo raméghyam Ebraamefaf unyéghofnar si kénjúmé.
bt: My friends, I will take an everyday doing. If two people answer what make one mind(agree), no one can break it or add it. 16 God said his without.lying talks(promises) to Ebraam and to his descendant. The Buk(scripture) does not say, “to descendants,” its meaning many people, but “to descendant,” its meaning one man who is Keriso. 17 What I am saying is that God gave Ebraam the promise and 430 years later, God gave the law to Moses, the law does not change or remove God's without.lying talk(promise). 18 The gift is not from people obeying the law, the gift comes from the promise. God gave his gift to Ebraam through a promise.

nama: Yénd so namotam: Némamén Ngánjánam eramai yánjo nák kétán yáne árét? Yémo eramai yéné nák yéfeyot ménát so tawauyafotau yéfe némé yam tamorwén mámáfi. Ngánjánam ewaramai yéné nák kétánotio Ebraamene ámbiro ákiambum nufaryéng. Ngánjánam yéramai yéné nák njafar si résagh ár kénjúmé kétán Mosesefaf. Ngánjánam témndetau Moses, a Mosesém tawarametau Ngánjánene si árét. Fá namndai néndkéf ár Ngánján a ár. 20 Wénde Ngánjánam yaramai yánjo unyéghofnar si Ebraame mbarkánde. Fá méndefnar témorwén néndkéf ár.
bt: I will ask: Why God gave his law to his people? He gave this law to them to show them what was bad. God gave this law until Ebraam's one descendant appear. God gave the law through men who carring heavenly message(angels) to Moses. God told to Moses, and Moses gave God's talk to the people. He became a middle man between God and people. 20 But God gave his without.lying talk to Ebraam straightly(directly). He didn't need a middle man.

nama: Némé yáne fifi yém ndenénde nák siyém Ngánjánene unyéghofnar siafé nasmét? Yaufifi! Ngánjánam yau ewaramai nák árkéménayam féyotaro so ghérsé yénérse, féyo ár yau so mbarkánd kamndangi Ngánjánafé ménaye nák áyáréghe. 22 Wénde Buk si noraye ndené mband marat siyém yaufioene wafté mbanmbanan, ménát Ngánjánam so tawaramangé némé unyéghofnar si norayai yéfe emofem efalo yiyátotat Yesu Keriso.
bt: Its meaning is that the law fights God's without.lying talks(promises)? Never! God didn't give a law which it can bring life, so people cannot become straight with God by obeying law. 22 But the Buk(scripture) says that the world is under the power of sin, so that God could give what he said without.lying talk(promised) to those who truly approve(believe) Yesu Keriso.

nama: Soramé yéné ndimbal mwighé yénmormén, nákam ténmeretau ndené fété kwéfkwéf méngo ár kétánotio yéné ndimbal mwighé sái safén kakmangé. 24 Féyo nák témorwén téfefaf waftafé kétánotio Kerisoene ufarégh, ménát mété yénd ndimbal mwighaye mbarkánd tényátongé Ngánjánafé. 25 Sénonjo ndimbal mwighé té yéném, yénd yau nák wanjengégh mbanmbanan yéném.
bt: Before this big mind(faith) came, the law hold us strongly as darkness house men(prisoners) until this big mind(faith) should be put clearly. 24 So the law was with power to us until Keriso's arriving, in order that he might make us straight with God by big mind(faith). 25 Now big mind(faith) has come, we are not under guiding of law.

nama: Féyo méinyotio fém em Ngánjánene ambumtértér njam fémofem efalo yiyátotati Keriso, 27 ménamén fém méinyotio efe té ewalitotaménd Keriso kénjút té numanetaménd sáláme fémyo yémafé Kerisofé. 28 Féyo kété ámb yau fénataye yém yéfe kénjún Ju ár a Téndo ár, yéfe kénjún faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, yéfe kénjún ár ghakér a amaf. Fém méinyotio sem ámbiro Keriso Yesue kénjún. 29 Ménamén fém Kerisoene em, féyo fém sem Ebraamene ákiambum a so tanangi némé té Ngánjánam unyéghofnar si norayai.
bt: So all of you are God's children when you.p believe Keriso, 27 because all of you who they baptized into Keriso have clothed yourselves with [him] Keriso. 28 So there is no difference in them Ju people and Side people, in them without.payment working men(servants) and free people, in them men and women. You are all one in Keriso Yesu. 29 Because you are of Keriso, then you are the descendants of Ebraam and will receive what God has said without.lying talk(promise).

nama: Wénde némé yénd korayan siyém ndené, njam ámb ár ambumafé yém, soramé yéné ambumom sái tawanangé afane rokar. Yéné rokar so yém yane ambumoene, wénde ménamén ambum siyém tosé mé yém, fá féyotarofnar yém sái ewarawena yéné rokar, féyo fá ndenanit so yém faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 2 Yárefam so tékafangé ár ménát so ewarawene ambum a rokar, a fá so yém kétán karamangé kétánotio árké efogh yárefam yéfrendam. 3 Yéné endeyo, njam yénd ndenanit ténmorwén ambumtértér matyamofnar, yénd faiofnar ásáfogh ár ténmorwén limánégh mbérmbéran mband maratan. 4 Wénde njam yéné efogh yémo árké yéfrendam nawerai, Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam yánjoyo Ambum fifie amé kénjúmé a témorwén Ju árfene nák mbanmbanan. 5 Yéné ende yémo yényátoi yuwek nák muyata, ménát yénd sái kénamndangayém Ngánjánene ambumtértér. 6 Ménamén yénd yéném yáne ambumtértér, Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambumoene Mbérmbér téfene tikéf kénjút, yéné Mbérmbér nutne, "Afé, tane Afé." 7 Yénémaménnde, fém yau ném faiofnar ásáfogh ár, wénde yáne ambum. Ndené fété fém kés ném yáne ambum, fémo so tawan méinyotio mer rokar árkémamén Ngánjánam norayai unyéghofnar si. Folene mwighé Galasia árét
bt: But what I am saying is that, when someone had a son, later that child would get his father's things. Those things would be his son's, but because the son is still child, he would not able to look after these things, then he would be like a without.payment working man(servant). 2 His father would select a man to take care of the son and things, and he would be commited to until which day his father had prepared/set. 3 This same way, when we were like children without.knowledge, we were without.payment working men(servants) by leading spirits of the world. 4 But when that time he prepared/set come, God sent his own Son through physical mother and was under the Ju people's law. 5 In this way, he made us free from the power of the law, so that we can become God's children. 6 Because we are his children, God sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts, this Spirit shouted, “Father, my Father.” 7 Therefore, you.s are not a without.payment working man(servant), but his child. Just as you are his son, you.s will receive everythings which God speoke without.lying talk. Fol's mind(concern) for the Galasia people

nama: Yéné efghon njam fém yau mat tamorwén Ngánján, fém tamorwén faiofnar ásáfogh ár kétán ámb akeghofnar ngánjánngánjánfaf. 9 Sénonjo fém mat namndangi Ngánján. O yénd korayangén, sénonjo ndené Ngánján mat namnda fém efe em. Némamén fém so ngangongi wéikor a wéi kénamndangi faiofnar ásáfogh ár kétán muyafnar a fifiofnar mbérmbérfaf yéné mband maratan? 10 Fémofem eutémndati wafarerégh kwéf, ghérare, wéréwéré, a yunjéf. 11 Yénd mámé mwighé kwém féfenemén. Yénd méndefnar wém tane kérté ásáfogh féfeyot sái yém fifiofnar.
bt: At that time when you.p did not know God, you.p were just without.payment working men(servants) to other without.existing gods. 9 Now you.p know God. Or I say, now that God knows who you.p are. Why you will go back again and become without.payment working men(servants) again to the without.power and meaningless spirits of this world? 10 You.p respect selective days, months, seasons and years. 11 I worry about you.p. I don't want to be my hard work for you.p without.meaning.

nama: Tane fútaréf, ndené aem yénd swém. Yéndon ewamnendan fém, ménamén yénd njam fémafé ténmorwén, yénd náyátoyén ndené fém. Fémofem némé yaufi yau tafrotati tafaf. 13 Fém táf nawafarotati ndené yénd wénmormén féfefaf fronde ménamén enjne kwémorwén. Yéné táf yémormén yéndo fronde yaitotamén mer si féfefaf. 14 Yéndo kértat ekmayén fém ménáyan enjne kwémorwén, fémofem yénd yau tékrátaye wéramayénd a wékenayénd. Wénde fémofem wumyoyénd ndené kar kwémorwén njafar si résagh ár Ngánjáneta, ndené yénd kar kwémorwén Keriso Yesu. 15 Fém minde áuwéghan tamorwén! Némé yam nufrotam? Yénd yéndio so korayangén ndené, yéné efghon, fém njam féyotaro tamorwén tautorngayénd féfenjo ghékéf, fémofem so tanramangayénd tafaf. 16 Wénde sénonjo yénd namndan féfene mék téfnár ménaye efalo si afroghe?
bt: My friends, be like me. I beg you.p, because when I was with you.p, I became like you.p. You.p have not done any bad to me. 13 You.p must remember that I came to you.p first because I was sick. That was done when I first preached good news to you.p. 14 I gave you burdon because I was sick, you did not hate me and or reject me. But you welcomed me like I was a man carrying heavenly message(angel) from God, I was like Keriso Yesu. 15 You.p were overjoyed! What has happened? I myself will say that, at that time, if you.p could have taken out your.p own eyes, you.p would have given them to me. 16 But now I became your enemy by telling you.p the truth?

nama: Yéné árém yuyafotat kénjkame tikéf féfene kénjún, wénde yéfene mwighé farorégh siyém yau kor mer yém. Yéfene ménde siyém fém sái tafalongi ta tambén, ménát fémofem so eyáretati fáro. 18 Efe njam ménde yém féfefaf meryam wafroghét, yéné féyotaro yém, a yémofem ayafrotat méinyotio efghon, yau táfandro yénd fémafé njam yéném. 19 Tane tikfafé ambumtértér, yénd nemnan ndené yénd wéikor wém ndenanit ambum áráfégh tékrát kénjún féfeyot kétánotio fém té nénamndayénd Kerisoene efalo waitogh ár. 20 Yénd minde ménde wém sái wém kété féfefaf sénonjo. Féyo yénd so mer mat wém némé so norayan féfefaf. Ndené fété, yénd mafina wém ndernáye so kor nemnan féfenemén. Ufarogh si yéfenemén Agar a Sara
bt: Those people show a deep(disguise) heart in you.p, but their splitting thought(plans) are not good. Their desire is to seperate from me, so that you.p will only listen to them. 18 If someone want to do good things to you.p, that's alright, and they must do it all the time, not only when I'm with you.p. 19 My heartful children, I am thinking that I am again like in the pains of childbirth for you until you.p beocme true following people of Keriso. 20 I really want to be there with you.p now. Then I will really know what to speak to you.p. Just as, I do not know how could I be thinking about you.p. The showing talk(example) of Agar and Sara

nama: Kwaufrongi, fém efe ménde em nák mbanmbanan sái em, fém yau mat em ndernáye nák noraye? 22 Ndené noraye Ebraam témorwén sómbio ambumafé, ámb faiofnar ásáfogh amamén, ámb amaffifimén. 23 Faiofnar ásáfogh amamén ambum náráftam fifi ende, wénde yuwek amafmén ambum náráftam Ngánjánene unyéghofnar si kénjúmé. 24 Yéné sómbio amafam yufarot sómbio árnyégh. Fronde amaf, Agarém, yufarote Sainai mband tunakéf ánde árém nák ewanayénd yéné nák árkéménayam táyátotau faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 25 Agar, emo yufarote Sainai mband tunakéf Arabia yuwon, a yufarote sénonjo ndimbal tesen Jerusalem, ménamén fá yánjo ambumafé emor nákoene faiofnar ásáfoghan. 26 Wénde njafarmén Jerusalem siyém yuwek, a fá siyém téfene amé 27 Buk si noraye, "Áuwéghan aném, fém ambumofnar amaf! Nutna minde áuwéghafé, fémo emon ndémke yau yáraretam ambum áráfghan! Ménamén mwinu amafom so eráfte ambum a so ewainde amaf efe árafé yém."
bt: Tell me, you.p who want to be under the law, don't you.p know how the law says? 22 It says [that] Ebraam had two sons, one from a without.payment working mother(servant mother), the other from real mother. 23 The without.payment working mother(servant mother)'s son bore a child in bodily way, but the free wife bore a child through God's without.lying talk(promise). 24 These two wife represents two agreements. The first wife, Agar, represents Mount Sainai where people received the law which made [them] without.payment working men(servants). 25 Agar, who represents Mount Sainai in Arabia, and represents the present great town(city) of Jerusalem, because she and her children live in without.payment working to the law. 26 But the heavenly Jerusalem is free, and she is our mother. 27 The scripture says, “Be happy, you.s without.child woman! Shout with great joy, you.s who did not experienced the pains in giving birth to be a child! Because the barren woman will have birth and will surpass the woman who has husband.”

nama: Tane fútaréf, fém em unyéghofnar simén ambum, ndené Aisek. 29 Yéné efghon ambum efe náráftam fifie tasérmbotawét ambum efe náráftam Ngánján Mbérmbér waftaye, wéi sénonjo ndenéyameyo fiyém. 30 Wénde ndernáye Buk si noraye? Ndené noraye, "Téngwatem faiofnar ásáfogh amaf a yánjo ambum, ménamén faiofnar ásáfogh amafoene ambumom yau so tawanangé yárefane rokar yémafé amaffifioene ambumofé." 31 Yénémaménnde, tane fútaréf, yénd yau yéném faiofnar ásáfogh amafoene ambum wénde amaffifioene ambum.
bt: My friends, you are children of the without.lying talk(promise), as Aisek. 29 At that time the child who was born physically persecuted the child who was born by the power of God Spirit, and today is like this. 30 But how is the scripture saying? It says like this, “Send the without.payment working woman(servant woman) and her son, beause the son of the without.payment working woman(servant woman) will not receive the father's things together with the son of the real woman.” 31 Therefore, my friends, we are not the children of a without.payment working woman(servant woman) but of a real woman's children.

nama: Kerisom té efalo yényátoyéng yuwek. Sénonjo kamndangi fém yuwek, a yau wéikor kaumbangi nákoene faiofnar sifayat.
bt: Keriso has truly set us free. Now you must become free, and don't tie up again in without.payment working to the law

nama: Káyárangi! Yéndo, Folém, emndetan ndené fém njam karamangi ghéngan néfghét, yáne fifi siyém Keriso so yém fifiofnar féfefaf. 3 Ámbirotaro yéndon emndetan efe ár kamyongé ghéngan néfghét, yémo so ewaitote méinyotio nák. 4 Fém efe njam kufngongi mbarkándot Ngánjánafé nák waitoghe, fém té nanfangi kétamé Kerisoe tambén. Fém sem téndon Ngánjánene ngárámta. 5 Wénde téfeyot, téfene méghmégh siyém Ngánjánam so mbarkánd yémafé tényátongé yénd. Yéné fiyém némat yénd nawanjetam ménaye Ngánján Mbérmbér násáfota téfene ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé. 6 Táf yénd njam yéném Keriso Yesue kénjún, Ngánján yau mwighé yém kétán yénd téu ghéngan yénénfetat o yau. Ndimbal yam siyém ndené téfene ndimbal mwigham Keriso kénjún so yéfune ménát sái euwetam ámb ár.
bt: Listen! I, Fol, tell you that if you.p submitted yourselves cutting skin(be circumcised), its meaning is Keriso will be without.meaning to you.p. 3 Once more I am talking to you any person accept cutting skin(circumcised), he must obey all the law. 4 You.p who want to be straight with God by following the law, you.p have been cut off from Keriso! You are outside from God's grace. 5 But for us, our hope is God will make us straight with him. This is what we are waiting for by God Spirit working through our big mind(faith). 6 When we are in Keriso Yesu, God does not mind whether we are to cut skin(circumcised) or not. Great thing is that our believing in Christ should show that we love other people.

nama: Fém stam mere kérsati! Emo eméindai ekmboghét efalo waitoghta? 8 Ngánjánam, emo fém emotai, yéné yau yafrotam. 9 Ár norayayénd, "Némbne flawé minaghmén násáfote méinyotio flawayan." 10 Yéndo mwighafé yéfandan Yuré ménát sái ewarawena kétamé unyégh watameghta. Ngánjánam so moghan tékmangé yéné ár, efe njam yém, emo fém tawarsote.
bt: You were running well! Who caused you to stop following the truth? 8 God, who calls you, didn't do this. 9 People say, “A little yeast works through the whole flour.” 10 I am trusting the Lord to protect you.p from false teachings. God will judge that person, whoever he is, who has deceived youp.

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd mé njam néngorayan ndené fém so ghéngan enfetat, némamén Ju árém wasérmbotat? Njam yénd mé néngorayan ndené fém so ghéngan enfetat, féyo tane si waitogh Kerisoene wafatarégh wénmén yau so téfunau kérté. 12 Yénd ménde kwémorwén ndené fá emofem kérté efunat a erametat fém ghéngan néfghét fiya tanfetangi yéfenjo njénafayo.
bt: My friends, if I am still talking that you must be circumcised, why the Ju people persecute me? If I am still talking that you must be circumcised, then my preaching about the cross of Keriso will not cause problem. 12 I wish that those people who are causing problem and want to cut skin you should cut their balls(castrate).

nama: Tane fútaréf, Ngánjánam emotai fém sái em yuwek. Wénde yau eumyotati féfene yuwek ménát sái ewifotati féfene fifioene ménde. Wénde kásáfotati féfenjo kénjún uwéghan. 14 Méinyotio nák ewafne yéné ámbiro nákam: "Yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fété fémyo snáuwete." 15 Fém njam féfenjo kénjún ménjté em amrorghan a amndéghan, kor aem o fém fémyo so nawironati. Ngánján Mbérmbéroene end a fifioene end
bt: My friends, God called you to be free. But don't let your freedom to satisfy your bodily desire. But, serve one another in love. 14 All the law covers by one law: “Love your.s neighbor as you.s love yourself.” 15 If you.p continue to argue in yourselves and hurting, be careful o you yourselves will destroy each other. The way of the God Spirit and the way of the body

nama: Némé yénd norayan: aemor Ngánján Mbérmbéran, féyo fémofem yau so ewafrotati fifioene ménde. 17 Ngánján Mbérmbéroene méndayam yékarote fifioene ménde a fifioene méndeyam yékarote Ngánján Mbérmbéroene ménde. Fá túmén násmét yéfenjo kénjún, féyo fémofem yau so ewafrotati némat fém ménde em. 18 Wénde njam fém elimnda Ngánján Mbérmbéram, fém nák mbanmbanan yau em.
bt: What I am saying: live in the God Spirit, so you.p will not do the bodily desires. 17 The desires of God Spirit are against bodily desires and the desires of body are against the desire of God Spirit. They always fight each other, so you.p will not do what you.p want to do. 18 But if God Spirit leads you.p, you.p are not under the law.

nama: Fifioene wafroghyam safén em: yaufi walyam, wáiwáiyafé yam, yuwek wal, 20 mewang wáwefnogh, ghar, méndménd, amrorégh, waramnjagh, nékwro, a yandro yémanjone, ásnanégh, afalogh, 21 karogh, wériyam, yaufi téménd, a ámb mé kés engém. Yéndon ewawéngsotan sénonjo, ndené kés ewawéngsotamén fronde: emofem ewafrotat yéné yam Ngánjánam yau so tawaramangé Ngánjánene limánégh.
bt: The bodily desires are clearly shown: evil sexual relationship, shameful thing, free sexual relationship, 20 worshipping idols, sorcery, hatred, argument, jealousy, only angerness, selfish, dispute, division, 21 envy, drunkenness, evil feasts, and some more. I am encouraging you.p now, as I have encouraged you.p at first: to whom are doing these things God will not give the kingdom of God.

nama: Wénde Ngánján Mbérmbéroene mbwe sem uwégh, áuwégh, krufrát, métar, ramégh, mer, ndimbal mwighé kér ro. 23 ngárámngárám, a yéndio awamarogh. Kété ámb nák yau yém ánde noraye ndené yéné yam sem mámáfi. 24 Fá efe em Yesu Kerisoene té enamndaménd kérot fifi yánjo méinyotio méndefé. 25 Ngánján Mbérmbéram té yénmaramai téfe ghérsé, yénémamén yéndfem fiya táitotangém Ngánján Mbérmbér. 26 Wénde yénd yau so nawarmbotam o nékwot naméindam o nawaramnjam téfe kénjún.
bt: But the fruit of the God Spirit are love, joy, peace, patience, giving, goodness, great mind(faithfulness), 23 gentleness, and self-control. There is no law that says these things are bad. 24 Those who belong to Keriso Yesu have nailed the flesh to death with all its desires. 25 The God Spirit has given us life, so we must follow the God Spirit. 26 But we won't boast or become angry or be jealous in ourselves.

nama: Tane fútaréf, njam efe terangé yaufiyamam, fém efe em Ngánján Mbérmbéran so yangotati fá métare. Wénde kor fété, fém wéi so em ufoghan. 2 Mérne ersati ndimbal kérté, a yéné ende fémofem so efalo táyátongi Kerisoene nák. 3 Njam efe nemna ndené fá yém ár táf fá yéné yau yém, fá fáyo nawawinde. 4 Ámbiroámbiro árém so ewafénmetat yéfenjo wafroghyam. Féyo yémofem yéfenjo kénjún áuwégh so yéfandat, ménayofnar fáyo sái naufotat ámb árfefaf, 5 ménamén ámbiroámbiro árém so fété ersat yéfenjo kérté. 6 Emo njam ewatameta fém Ngánjánene si, fémofem so efénati méinyotio mer rokar yémafé.
bt: My friends, if a sin hold somebody, you who are in the God Spirit will bring him back patiently. But be careful, you.p also will be in temptation. 2 Together carry great burdens, and in this way you.p will fulfill the law of Keriso. 3 If anyone thinks that he is a man when he is not that, he deceives himself. 4 Each one will examine their own works. Then they will see joy in themselves, without they themselves compare with other people, 5 because each one should carry their own burdon. 6 Whoever teaches you.p God's talk, you.p will share all the good things with him.

nama: Fém fémyo yau nawawindati, emo yau so Ngánjáne yaweinde. Árom so yéférne némé yémo yeite. 8 Emon njam yeita yanjo fifi ménde wifoghét, kétamé yéné fifi méndeta so téfrarngé kérté. Emon njam yeita Ngánján Mbérmbéroene méndeyan, kétamé Ngánján Mbérmbérta so téfrarngé tuot akegh ghérsé. 9 Yénd ménj té so yéngém ménát meryam wafroghét a yau so sakér yéném, efogh so kufarngé wau yuwot. 10 Yénémaménnde, ánde yém téfeyot féneféne, yéndfem so mer ewafrotam méinyotio árfet, yéfeyot fifi efe em efalo yátogh ár mérén. Folene ambinomén wawanjagh si
bt: Do not deceive yourselves, no one can deceive God. A man will get fruits from what he plants. 8 Whoever plants to satisfy his bodily desires, from that bodily desire will harvest trouble. Whoever plants in God Spirit's will, from the God Spirit will harvest eternal life. 9 We will continue to do good things and must not be tired, the day will come for the harvest. 10 Therefore, where is the spaces(opportunities) for us, we will do good to all the people, especially to those who are to the family of who truly approve(believers) Fol's final encouraging word

nama: Téfandangi némé ndimbale férén yéndon tafarotan njam yéndon tafarotan féfefaf tanjo ngángaye. 12 Fá emofem yéta ewáfáretat ménát ghéngan néfghét ménde em mer sái néretat ámb árfefaf. Fá yau ménde em sái ewasérmbotat ménamén Kerisoene wafatarégh wénmén. 13 Fá fété ghéngan néféghkaf em, wénde yémofem yau ewaitotat nák. Fá ménde em fém sái ghéngan enfetat ménát fá so nawarsat ndené fém té námyo yéné fifi yamfaf. 14 Wénde tayot, yénd so nawarsan ménamén téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene wafatarégh wénménro. Ménamén ménaye yáne wafatarégh wéne mband marat kér té tém tayot, a yénd té kér kwém mband maratoe. 15 Féyotaro mé yém njam fém té ghéngan enfayénd o yau, ndimbal yam siyém ndené fém té namndangi totér ár. 16 Yéfeyot emofem ewaitotat yéné si yéfene ghérsayan, so yém krufrát a ghérghérsisé yéfefaf wéi méinyotio Ngánjánene árfefaf!
bt: See what big letters I wrote as I write to you.p with my own hand. 12 Those who are forcing you to cut skin(be circumcised) want to look good to other people. They don't want someone to persecute them because of the cross of Keriso. 13 They have cut skin, but they are not following the law. They want to cut your skin so that they can boast that you had accepted to these bodily things. 14 But for me, I will boast because of the cross of our Lord Yesu Keriso only. For by his cross the world had dead to me, and I am dead to the world. 15 It is still alright whether you cut skin or not, the big thing is that you are new people. 16 For those who follow this talk in their lives, will be peace and mercy be with them and with all of God's people!

nama: Sénonjo yénandmé, yau emo táf kérté warameta, ménamén yéndo ersan tane fifiyan Yesuene mbor.
bt: From now on, let no one give me problem, because I carry on my body the marks of Yesu.

nama: Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfene mbérmbérfaf, tane efalo fútaréf. Efalo.
bt: The grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso will be with your.p spirit, my true friends. Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár efe yém Ngánjánene méndeyan. Yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén féfefaf, Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar árfefaf Efesos kénjún, efe em ndimbal mwighafé Keriso Yesue kénjún.
bt: I am Fol, man with Keriso Yesu's authority(apostle) who is in God's will. I am writing this letter to you, God's without.dust(holy) people in Efesos, who are with big mind(faithful) in Keriso Yesu.

nama: Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. Ngánjánam té ewafrote téfeyot mer yam Keriso kénjún
bt: God our Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso will give you.p grace and peace. God had done good things for us in Keriso

nama: Yuyotam Ngánján efe yém téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene Afé, emo yénéfrendai yénd méinyotio njafarmén mbérmbére frengéghe Keriso kénjún. 4 Kété frondeyan soramé mband marat yafrotam, Ngánjánam yénmaferyéng Keriso kénjúmé, ménát yénd so yéném njúnnjúnofnar a téfnofnar yáne sáfrére. Ménamén Ngánjánam yénmuwete, 5 Ngánjánam té mwighé yéfaronam Yesu Keriso kénjúmé yémon so tényátongé yáne ambum. Ngánjánam yáitoi yánjo áuwégh a ménde. 6 Yéndfem yuyotam Ngánján yáne ndimbalfifi ngárámmén, ménamén yémon yénmaramai ramégh maratae téfe yánjo áuwéghafé Ambum kénjúmé! 7 Kerisoene férke yénd yuwek yényátoi, a wéi téfene yaufiyam yawalindai yénamé Ngánjánene ndimbal ngáráme. 8 Yémon yénmaramai ndimbal kéráye ngárám méinyotio yánjo káfeté mwighaye a matyame. 9 Ngánjánam yafrotam némé yáne ménde témorwén, a safét yékmai téfefaf kwankwane mwighé farorégh yémon árké té yékmai wifoghét Kerisoe kénjúmé. 10 Ngánjánene mwighé farorégh so tifongé táf efogh njam kawerangé. Yéné efghon yémon so táyátongé ámbiro méinyotio rokar njafar a mbandan Kerisoene limángégh mbanmbanan.
bt: We praise God who is the Father of our Lord Yesu Keriso, who blessed us with every spiritual blessing from the heaven in Keriso. 4 There at first later he created the world, God chose us through Keriso, so that we might be without.dust(holy) and without.blame before his face(presence). Because God loves us, 5 God had made a plan through Yesu Keriso he will make us his children. God followed his pleasure and will. 6 We praise God for his very big grace, because he gave us the gift widely(generously) through his loved Son! 7 With the blood of Keriso he make us free, and also forgot(forgave) our sin accordingly by God's big grace. 8 He gave us grace very much with all his wisdom and understanding. 9 God did what his plan was, and put clearly to us the secret plan which he had put to finish it through Keriso. 10 God's plan will fulfill when the time caught up(arrived). At that time he will make one to everything in heaven and on earth under Keriso's ruling.

nama: Méinyotio yam nufrotat Ngánjánene mwighé faroréghan a méndeyan. Kerisoe kénjún Ngánjánam yénmaferyéng yánjo árot yánjo méndeyan. Yéné témorwén némé yémon mwighé yafrotam kétándmé rényéghan, 12 ménát ndené yénd yénmormén fronde ekmayém téfene méghmégh Keriso kénjún, yénd mété yéném Ngánjánene ndimbal yétkwén uyoghét!
bt: All things happened according to God's plan and will. In Keriso God chose us to be his people by his will. It was what he had decided from the beginning, 12 so that we were the first to put our hope in Keriso, we might be the one to lift up God's big name.

nama: A fém namndayénd Ngánjánene ár táf fém njam náyárayénd efalo si, mer si árké ménáyam yénérse féfeyot wanjarégh. Fémofem efalo yiyátoyénd Keriso, a Ngánjánam yékmai yánjo yéru féfefaf, árké yém Ngánján Mbérmbér yémon árké té unyéghofnar norayai. 14 Ngánján Mbérmbér yéné féyém ménát yéndfem so tawanangém némé Ngánjánam té unyéghofnar si emndai yánjo ár, a yéné yam yénd yényátote efalo Ngánjánam so téramangé méinyoe yuwek kétán yéfeyot efe em yáne. Yéndfem so yuyotam yáne ndimbal yétkwén! Fol Ngánjánafé norayet efalo yátogh árfenemén Efesos kénjún
bt: And you.p became God's people when you heard the true talk, which the good talk brought you.p salvation. You.p truly approved(believed) in Keriso, and God put his yèru(stamp of ownership) on you.p, which is the God Spirit which he had said without.lying talk(promise). 14 The God Spirit is the one that we will get what God said without.lying talk(promise) to his people, and this makes us true(gurantees) God will give us full grace to those who are his. We will lift up his big name! Fol talked with God(prayed) for truly approving people(believers) in Efeso

nama: Yéné téfnan, kétándmayo yénd náyárayén féfene ndimbal mwighamén Yuré Yesue kénjún a féfene uwéghmén méinyotio Ngánjánene árét, 16 yéndo túmén kánjo tarametan Ngánjáne féfenemén. Njam yénd Ngánjánafé koraiwém, yéndo túmén yamnendan féfe wáutárghét, 17 téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene Ngánján, minde ndimbal Afé, sái tawaramangé Ngánján Mbérmbér féfe. Ngánján Mbérmbéram so táyátongé fém káfeté mwighafé a safot tékmangé Ngánján féfefaf, ménát fémofem mat so tiyátongi. 18 Yéndon nómnendan ménát féfene mwighé so kásáwérngi, ménát fém so mat em némé méghmégh yém kétán fém kés emotai, nderé mer frengégh yém yémo unyéghofnar si kés norayai yánjo árfaf. 19 Fém wéi so mat em nderé minde ndimbal yém yáne wafté ásáfoghan téfe kénjún efe efalo yátogh ár yéném. Yéné wafté snásáfote téfe kénjún siyém ndenéménayo wafté kér ro muyé 20 árkéménaye Keriso yanoi kérta a yumnjoi fá yánjo tambén ngángata njafar limánéghan. 21 Kété, Kerisom elimnde méinyotio njafarmén limánégh ár, si muyé, wafté, a yuré. Yáfaf yém minde tukén yétkwén kétándmé méinyotio tukén waftafé yétkwénta yéné mband maratan a wéi soramé mband marat. 22 Ngánjánam méinyotio rokar ekmai Kerisoene wafté mbanmbanan. Yémo yékmai Keriso limánégh téfnár méinyotio rokaran. Yémo yéné yafrotam yánjo ár wáutárghét, Yesuene mérnat. 23 Yesuene mérén yém Kerisoene fifi, yáne wifoghmén emo méinyotio rokar ewifote méinyotio sifayamé.
bt: In this reason, since I heard about your.p big mind(faith) in the Lord Yesu and about your love for all of God's people, 16 I always give thanks to God because of you.p. When(ever) I was talking with God(praying), I always ask him to help you, 17 the God of our Lord Yesu Keriso, very big Father will give you the God Spirit. God Spirit will give you wisdom and put to God clear to you, so that you.p will know him. 18 I am asking that your.p minds will open, so that you.p will know what is the hope to which he were called you.p, how much blessings is he promised to his people. 19 You will also know how very big is his power at work in us who are the approving truth people. This power is working in us is the same as the powerful strength 20 which he raised Keriso from death and seated him at his right side in the heavenly kingdom. 21 There, Keriso leads all heavenly ruling people, word power(authority), power, and lords. He has a very high name from all very high names in this world and also future world. 22 God put everything under the power of Keriso. He put Christ the ruler over all things. He made this to help his people, Yesu's family(church). 23 The Yesu's family(church) is Keriso's body, his completion who completes everything everywhere.

nama: Tándái fém tamorwén kérwén féfenjo áyárghofnar a yaufiyammén. 2 Kété yéné efghon fémofem táitotawét mbandoene yaufi end, a fémofem tiyáretawét yaufi mbérmbér, waftafé limánégh ár fandaghofnar mband maratan, yéné mbérmbér emo sénonjo elimnde ár emofem yau yiyáretat Ngánján. 3 Frondeyo, Efaloe méinyotio yénd ténmorwén ndené fá kés em a ténmorangérwén téfenjo fifi méndeyan, tawafrotawém némé katémndawét téfene fifiyan a mwighayan. Téfene fifie yaman yénd, méinyotio ndené ámb kés em, Ngánjánene nékwan so yéném.
bt: In the past you.p were dead because of your without.hearing and sins. 2 There on that time you.p followed the world's evil way, and you.p obeyed the evil spirit, powerful ruling man in the unseen world, this spirit who now leads the people who does not obey God. 3 Formerly, really we all were like that they are and we lived in our physical desires, we did what match with our body and minds. In our body ways we, like every people else are, will be God's anger.

nama: Wénde Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé siyém wáfáyoghofnar, a yáne uwégh téfeyot siyém minde ndimbal, 5 táf njam yénd kérwén ténmorwén téfene áyáréghofnar yam kénjún Ngánjánam yénmangoi ghérsat Kerisofé. Ngánjánene ngárámero ewanjaryéng fém. 6 Keriso Yesue kénjún Ngánjánam yénmanoi yénd yémafé ménát sái yélimndam yémafé njafaran. 7 Ménát yufarotam soramé yumén árét yáne témghofnar ndimbalfifi ngárám, yémon yuyafote yáne uwégh téfeyot Keriso Yesue kénjún. 8 Ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé, Ngánjánene ngáráme ewanjaryéng fém. Yéné wanjarégh siyém yau féfene wafroghyammén, wénde yéné wanjarégh siyém Ngánjánene ramégh. 9 Yémo yau ewanjaryéng fém ménamén féfene ásáfoghmén. Féyo efe ámb yau so tuktukan yém. 10 Ngánjánam té yénmafrotam yénd efe yéném, a Keriso Yesu kénjún Ngánjánam yénmafrotam yénd ménát mer ghérsé wafroghyamot, yéné Ngánjánam árké té efrendam téfe wafroghét. Kerisom té eyátotai Ju ár a téndo ár ámbiro
bt: But God's mercy is without.counting(countless), and his love for us is very big, 5 when we were dead in our without.hearing God brought us to life with Keriso. Only by God's grace he saved you.p. 6 In Keriso Yesu God called us with him in order to lead with him in the heaven. 7 In order to show for future people the without.comparable bigness of his grace, he showed his love to us in Keriso Yesu. 8 Through the big mind(faith), by God's grace he saved you.p. This salvation is not from your doing, but this salvation is God's gift. 9 He did not save you because of your working. So no one can boast. 10 God has made us what we are, and in Keriso Yesu God made us for a life of good deeds, which this God has prepared for us to do. Keriso has made Ju people and Side people(Gentiles) one

nama: Yau táf ewawalinda fém em téndo ár. Mbarkánde, ghéngan néfégh téfnaram ewanangotat ménamén fém ghéngan néféghofnar em. Yémofem yérsat tuktuk ghéngan néféghmén. 12 Yéné efghon fém nayu tamorwén Kerisoeta. Fém stanmorwén dábi a fém yau tawafnyangérwén Ngánjánene waferégh árfefaf. Féfene sifayé yau yém árnyéghan, árkéméné térnyangérwén Ngánjánene unyéghofnar si yánjo árfefaf, a fém stamorangérwén yéné mband maratan méghméghofnar a Ngánjánofnar. 13 Wénde sénonjo Keriso Yesuene kénjún fém, efe tamorwén táf nayu, Kerisoene férkam kaka té enwanai Ngánjánefaf.
bt: Don't forget that you are Gentiles. In fact, circumcised people insult you because you are uncircumsed people. They take pride in being circumcised. 12 At that time you.p were far from Keriso. You.p were foreigners and you were not included in God's chosen people. Your.p place was not in the covenants, which were in God's without.lying talks(promises) to his people, and you.p were in this world without hope and without God. 13 But now in Keriso Yesu you, who were far away, the blood of Keriso brought you.p close to God.

nama: Kerisom yénmarsam krufrát ménaye Ju ár a Téndo ár ámbiro eyátoi. Yémon yiroryéng yéné mbákw árkéménayam tafalotau a awifarégh ár tamorwén. 15 Yánjo kére, yémo ewitérmboi Ju árfene nák yénayafé yánjo wafareghafé a náknákafé a sómbio mérén eyáteyai ámbiro totér mérén yánjo kénjún. Yéné ende Kerisom yafrotam krufrát Ju ár a Téndo ár kénjún. 16 Yáne kére wafatarégh wénan Kerisom yiroryéng yéfene mék yam a ámbiro eyáteyai sómbio ár mérén kétán ámbiro fifi a enwangotam Ngánjánefaf. 17 Keriso yénmormén a mer si táitotau krufrát ghérsamén méinyotio árfefaf. Fá korayau fém Téndo ár efe tamorwén nayu Ngánjáneta, a Ju ár, efe tamorwén kaka yáfaf. 18 Kerisoe kénjúmé, Ngánján Mbérmbéram yénmáutáne yénd méinyotio, Ju ár a Téndo ár, sái engém kétán Afafaf.
bt: Keriso brought us peace by making Ju people and Side people one. He destroyed that wall which seperated them and were enemies. 15 By his death, he removed the Ju people's law with its commandments and laws and made two group one new family in himself. In this way Koriso made peace in(between) Ju people and Side people. 16 By his death on the cross Keriso destroyed their fighting thing(enemity) and made one two people groups into one body and brought them back to God. 17 Keriso came and preached the good talk about peaceful life to all the people. He said you.p Side people, who were far away from God, and the Ju people, who were near to him. 18 Through Keriso, God Spirit helps all of us, Ju people and Side people, to go to the Father.

nama: Féyo fém Téndo ár yau em dábi o wan téfnár ndenayu. Fém sem sénonjo efghang yéné yu árfé yémafé Ngánjánene árfé a Ngánjánjene mérén em. 20 Fém ndenanit em méngo árké Ngánjánam yéramete yandio. Yesuene muyafé ár a yáne mat yátogh ár em ndenanit méngo sérasér. Yesu Keriso siyém ndenanit néndkéf sérasér. 21 Yémo yerete méinyo méngo a yiyátote anoghét ménát sái yém njúnnjúnofnar wáwefnogh méngo Yurai. 22 Yesuene kénjúmé fém Téndo ár wéi méinyotio raméghan em yémafé Ju efalo yátogh árfé kés em ménát sái káyátongi Ngánjánene ámnjogh méngo yánjo Mbérmbér kénjúmé.
bt: So you.p Side people are not foreigners or strangers any longer. You.p are now members with this nation's people with God's people and the family of God. 20 You.p are like a house that God is building for himself. Yesu's strength people and his people know the knowledge(prophets) are like the house posts. Yesu Keriso is like the center post. 21 He holds the whole house and makes it grow to be a without.dust(holy) worshipping house for the Lord. 22 Through Yesu you.p Side people also are part in building together with the Ju truly approving people(believers) in order to become God's dwelling house through his Spirit.

nama: Yéné téfnan, yénd, Fol, noraiwam Ngánjánafé. Yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon wényau ménamén yénd násáfotan Yesu Kerisoe ménát wáutárghét féfe Téndo árét. 2 Fém té náyárangi ndené Ngánjánam yánjo ngáráme té waramang yéné ásáfogh sái ewawaitotan mer si féfe Téndo árfét. 3 Ngánjánam yékmai safét yánjo kwankwane mwighé farorégh a kwayaghayan yékmai tafaf. Fémofem njam yaftati némé té yéndon téfarotan ndémbndémbe yénémamén, 4 fém so mat náyátotati tane kénjkam mwighé Kerisoene kwankwane yam. 5 Tándái Ngánjánam yau tawaufrotau yéné kwankwane yam árfefaf, wénde sénonjo yémon té yékmai safét Ngánján Mbérmbére yánjo njúnnjúnofnar Yesuene muyafé árfefaf a Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfefaf. 6 Kwankwane yam yéné yém: mer si kénjúmé Téndo ár a Ju ár ámbiro mérén eyátoyéng. Féyo Keriso Yesuene kénjúmé Téndo árém so tawanangi Ngánjánene frengégh árké té norayai unyéghofnar si.
bt: In this reason, I, Fol, pray for you. I am in prison because I work for Keriso Yesu to help you Gentiles. 2 You.p have heard that God in his grace has given me this work to preach the good talk to you.p Side people. 3 God revealed his secret plan and put it clearly to me. When you.p read what I have written shortly about this, 4 you will know my deep mind(insight) of the secret of Keriso. 5 In the past God did not tell this scret thing to the people, but now he has revealed it through the God Spirit to his without.dust(holy) men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and God's people who make know(prophets). 6 The secret thing is that: through the good talk he made the Side people and Ju people one group. So through the Keriso Yesu Side people will receive the God's blessing which God told the without.lying talk(promised).

nama: Yénd náyátoyén mer sioene faiofnar ásáfogh ár Ngánjánene ramghe, yémon waramai ta yánjo waftafé ásáfogh kénjúmé. 8 Yénd wém némbnarfifi kétándmé méinyotio Ngánjánene árfeta, wénde Ngánjánam waramai yéné ngárám ménát Téndo árfefaf mer si résaghét ndimbal frengéghmén Yesu Kerisoeta, 9 a méinyotio árfet fandaghét ndernáye Ngánjánene kwankwane mwighé farorégh kakmangé ásáfoghan waftafé. Ngánján, efe yém méinyotio rokar Wafrogh ár, tarambnotau yánjo kwankwane mwighé farorégh rényéghta. 10 Wénde sénonjo fá ménde yéném, Yesuene mérén kénjúmé, limánégh ár a tukén waftafé ár njafar mband maratan so mat náyátotat yáne tárfár fénatarero káfeté mwighé. 11 Ngánjánam yéné yafrotam ndené fété yáne tuot mwighé farorégh témorwén, yémon árké té yifoyéng Keriso Yesu téfene Yuré kénjúmé. 12 Keriso kénjún a yáfaf téfene ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé yénd kaka so yéném Ngánjánefaf férférofnar a táikér mwighafé. 13 Féyo yéndon ewamnendan fém yau táf nuitati mwighayan ménamén yéndon tékrat yéfandan féfeyot, yéné méinyotio siyém féfene merot. Fol Ngánjánafé koraiwét Efesos árfenemén
bt: I became a without.payment working man(servant) of the good talk by God's gift, [which] he gave me through his powerful working. 8 I am very little from all God's people, but God gave me that grace to carry to the Side people the good talk about the big blessing from Keriso, 9 and for all the people to see how God put into work his secret plan with power. God, who is the Creator of everything, kept his secret plan hidden from the beginning. 10 But now he wants, through the Yesu's family(church), the leading people and strong powerful men in the heavenly world will know his many various wisdom. 11 God made this just as his eternal plan was, which he has finished through Keriso Yesu our Lord. 12 In Keriso and through our big mind(faith) to him we will be close to God without fear and with strong mind(confidence). 13 Then I urge you.p not to fell down in mind because I see the hardship(I am suffering) for you.p, it is all for your. good. Fol talked with God(prayed) for the people in Efesos

nama: Ménamén Ngánjánam té yafrotam méinyotio yéné féfeyot, yénd neitan budme a Afé Ngánjánafé noraiwam, 15 kétándmé endeta méinyotio mérnam njafaran a mband maratan ersat yéfenjo efalo yétkwén. 16 Yéndon yamnendan Ngánján yáne ndimbal yétkwén wemárta so tawaramangé féfe wafté yánjo Mbérmbér kénjúmé ménát muyafé so em kénjúe féfenjo kénjún. 17 A yénd ndené norayan Kerisom so yafrote yáne méngo féfene tikfan ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé. Yénd norayan ndené féfene so ewam sérémb a téfén uwégh kénjún, 18 ménát fém, mérne yémafé méinyotio Ngánjánene árfé, so em waftafé ménát mat so káyátongi nderé marat a tombé, nderé tuk a kénjkam, yém Kerisoene uwégh. 19 Yénd yau so mat kamndangém yáne uwégh méinyoe. Wénde yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam fém so fété mat kamndangi Kerisoene uwégh, a yénémamén fém so tawafongé kétán méinyotio Ngánjánene afoghkaf kénjút.
bt: Because God has done all this for you, I fall on my knees and talk with God the Father, 15 from whom every family in heaven and on earth get their true name. 16 I am asking God from the wealth of his big name will give you power through his Spirit to be strengthen inside in yourselves. 17 And I talk [with God] that Keriso will make his home in your.p hearts through big mind(faith). I talk [with God] that you.p will have roots and base in love, 18 so that you, will be with the power to know, along with all truly approving people(believers), how wide and long, how high and deep, is Keriso's love. 19 We cannot know this love fully. But I talk with God you will know Keriso's love, and then you will be filled to all the fullness of God.

nama: Yuyotam Ngánján. Yáne wafté násáfote téfene kénjún. Yéné waftayam ewainde téfene matyam. Yéné wafté árkéméné nemnam a yamnendam yau so taindangé Ngánjánene wafté. 21 Yuyotam Ngánján ndimbalkéraye Yesuene mérnan a wéi Keriso Yesuene kénjún méinyotio ár sata kénjúmé, tuot! Efalo.
bt: Praise God. His power works in our inside. That power surpasses our knowledge. The power which we think and ask him [to do] does not surpass God's power. 21 Praise God very much in Yesu's family(church) and in Keriso Yesu through all generations, forever! Amen.

nama: Ndené yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngo ár ménamén yéndon Yurane ásáfogh yafrotan, yéndon ewamnendan fém, aemor yéné ghérsaye mere ndené Ngánjánam té yékmai njam fém ewanmoi. 2 Yuwan aem túmén, mer, a métar. Féfenjo uwégh euyafotati ménaye awarnyéghe ámbiroámbiro árfé. 3 Féfenjo mer ewafrotati ménát mé so yém ámbiro áyátogh Ngánján Mbérmbéram árkéméné yéramete krufrát kénjúmé árkéménayam táyátongé fém mérne. 4 Ámbiro fifi a ámbiro Ngánján Mbérmbér yém, ndené fété ámbiro méghmégh yém njam Ngánjánam té emotai fém. 5 Ámbiro Yuré yém, ámbiro ndimbal mwighé, ámbiro nu walitogh, 6 ámbiro Ngánján yém a ámbiro Afé méinyotio árfene, efe Yuré yém méinyotio árfene, fá násáfote méinyotio ár kénjúmé, a fá yém méinyotio ár kénjún.
bt: As I am a darkness house man(prisoner) because I am doing Lord's work, I ask you.p, live in this life well as God had set when he called you. 2 Be always underneath(humble), good, and patient. Show your.p love by being tolerant with one another. 3 Do your.p good so that there could be oneness which the God Spirit gives through the peace which binds you.p together. 4 There is one body and one God Spirit, just as one hope when God called you.p. 5 One Lord, one big mind(faith), one baptism, 6 One God and one Father of all people, who is Lord of all the people, he works through all the people, and he is in all the people.

nama: Yénd ámbiroámbiroam té ewanayém tambén fénatayero Kerisoeta. 8 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Fá njam tukét nénguyoi, yémon engwasroi tárfár ár efe yémon té eumbai, yémon ewarametam tambén yáne árét."
bt: Each one has received different gift from Keriso. 8 As the Buk(scripture) says, “When he went up, he took many people whom he had tied, he gave gifts to his people.”

nama: Némé yáne fifi yém, "fá nénguyoi tukét"? Yáne fifi ndené yém fá fronde néneworyéng mband maratot minde yuwot. 10 Féyo fá efe té néneworyéng fáyo yéné féyém efe nuyoi tukét, minde tukét a engwaindai méinyotio njafar tuk, ménát yémon so tafarngé méinyotio mband marat yandio. 11 Fá yéné féyém emon "ewaramete tambén árét," ekafetam ámb Yesuene muyafé ár, ámb ménát Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, ámb marataye si afrogh ár, ámb misi a watamegh ár. 12 Yémon méinyotio Ngánjánene ár efrendam Ngánjánjene ásáfogh wafroghét, ménát Kerisoene fifi sái yérametat. 13 Féyo yénd méinyotio so kamndangém ámbiro ndimbal mwighé kénjún a matyaman Ngánjánene Ambumoenemén. Yénd so kamndangém anoghkaf ár. Yénd so féyotaro yéném ndené Ngánjánene ménde ndernáye yém téfeyot sái yém, ndené fété Keriso fáyo kés yém. 14 Féyo yénd yau so yéném ndené ambumtértér. Yénd yau sái sófam yénérsa a mbormboram yéngérsa yéné warsogh kér ro árfene watameghan, emofem elimndat ámb ár kértat yéfenjo wafroghmén unyéghe. 15 Wéndende, yénd efalo sái norayam uwégh mbérmbére, yénd táf so nanotam Kerisoefaf méinyotio yaman, efe yém sénko. 16 Ndené fifioene sénko, yémo yáutáne méinyotio fifi ménát so nanote merkéraye. Ámb fifikafe eurau ámb fifikafefaf ménát méinyotio fifi so yém muyafé. Njam fénatafénaté kafekafeyam yéfenjo mer ásáfogh ewafrotat, yénd so náuwétam ámbiroámbiro kénjún mindefifi ndimbalkéráye. Yénmor totér ghérsaye Keriso kénjún
bt: What is its meaning, “he went up”? Its meaning is that first he came down to very low [place] into the earth. 10 So the one who came down is that one who had ascended high, very high and surpassed all high heavens, so that he could cover the entire world for himslef. 11 He is the one who “gave gifts to people,” he appointed some [to be]with Yesu's authority(apostles), other people [to be] God's people who make know(prophets), other people [to be] preachers widely(evangelist), other people [to be] pastors(misi) and teaching men. 12 He fixed all God's people to do God's work, in order to build up the body of Keriso. 13 Then we all will become one in the big mind(faith) and in the knowledge of the Son of God. We will become mature people. We will be completely as God wants us to be, just like Keriso himself. 14 Then we won't be like children. We should not be taken away by the waves and blown by wind in the teaching of these deceitful people, who lead other people into problem by their own lies. 15 Instead, we will say the truth by a spirit of love, we must grow up to Keriso in every way, who is the head. 16 As body's head, he helps the whole body to grow well. Each body part joins with the other parts so that the whole body becomes strong. As each separate part does its good work, we love each other greatfully. Live in the new life in Keriso

nama: Yurane yétkwénan, yéndon emndetan fém: Yau táf emor ndenanit Ngánján matofnar ár, endefene mwighé em fifiofnar 18 a endefene mwighé em kwéfkwéfan. Fá sifayafnar em yéné ghérsayan Ngánjánam árké yéramete, ménamén yéfene tikéf kwéfkwéf em a tikéf táikér. 19 Wáiwái mwighé té ewawalinda a fá túmén karamangi kétán yaufiyam wafroghét a ewafrotat fénaté sáfot mámáfi yam ékmboghofnar.
bt: In the Lord's name, I am talking to you.p: Don't live like people without.knowldge of God, whose minds are without.meaning 18 and whose minds are in the darkness. They have no part in this life which God gives, because they are completely their heart is darkness and strong heart(stubborn). 19 They have forgot the mind of shame and they always give themselves doing evil things and do all kinds of evil things without.stopping.

nama: Yau ndené fém notametaménd Kerisoenemén! 21 Fém té náyárayénd yánemén, a ndené fété yáne waitogh ár fém ewatametaménd efalomén árké yém Yesue kénjún. 22 Yénémamén, tándáwár ghérsé yam titérmbongi, árkéménayam fém taméinde ndené fété fronde ndernáye tamorangérwén-tándáwár ghérsé árké té yiroryéng yánjo yaufi wawérsogh mwighafayo. 23 Féfene tikéf a mwighé so fété káyátongi totér méinyoe, 24 a fémon tané totér ghérsé yam, árké yém Ngánjánene sáfot a nauyafote fáyo efalo ghérsayan árké yém mbarkánd a njúnnjúnofnar.
bt: You.p did not learn like that about Keriso! 21 You.p had heard about him, and just as his following people you were taught the truth which is in Yesu. 22 Therefore, remove the old life, which caused you live as you lived—the old life which was being removed by its corrupive doing. 23 Your hearts and minds must become completely new, 24 and you take the new life attitude, which is for God's shape and shows itself in the true life which is straight and without.dust(holy).

nama: Féyo unyégh yau ndenayu! Fém ámbiroámbiro so nafrotati efalo si ámb efalo yátogh árfefaf, ménamén yénd méinyotio Kerisoene fifiyan ámbiro yéném. 26 Fém njam nékwam kémifongé, yau fenjo nékwam nélimnda yaufiyamot, a yau emor nékwafé kétán efogh kuyangé. 27 Yau Sáiféroe sifayé yarameta. 28 Fém njam oro kufrote, fém so kékmbo oro a térnyé ásáfogh, ménát mbarkánd ghérsé so némor a so ewáutáne yauyau ár. 29 Yau waghanéghafé si norayati, wénde wáutáréghafé siro, árkéménayam yafrote a yéramete, ménát fém némé noraye mer so yafrote yéfefaf emofem niyáretat fém. 30 Yau yéméindati Ngánján Mbérmbér áuwéghofnarot. Ngánjánam yéramayéng Ngánján Mbérmbér ménát yékmai yéru féfefaf korayau ndené fém em yáne kétánotio Ngánjánene wanjarégh efogh so yéném. 31 Ewitérmbotati méinyotio njérmat ghérsé, kwérnar a nékw. Yau ndenayu awaranégh{a{ ...f* {a{4.31 awaranégh what is meaning
bt: Then don't lie more! Each of you.p must tell the true talk to the other approving truth people(believers), because we all are one in the body of Keriso. 26 If you get angry, do not let your anger lead you into sin, and do not stay with anger until the sun goes down. 27 Don't give the space to the Sáifèr. 28 If you.s have been stealing, you.s must stop srealing and start working, so that you live straight life and to be able to help the poor people. 29 Do not say harmful talks, but only helpful talks, which makes it and builds it up, so that what you say will make good to those who hear you.p. 30 Do not make God's Spirit without.joy(sad). God gave you God Spirit in order to put a mark of ownership on you sayig you.p were his until God's saving day comes. 31 Get rid of all bitter life, rage, and anger. Don't continue to shout or insult, don't continue in hatred in this all sinful activity. 32 Instead, be good and with merciful heart with other people, and forget without.mind sins each other, just as God forgot your sins through Keriso.

nama: Fém Ngánjánene tikfafé ambumtértér em, fémofem so fété ewafrotati ndené Ngánjánam kés ewafrote. 2 Féfene ghérsé ayélimnda uwégham, ndené fété Kerisom yénmuwetam yénd a yéramai yánjo ghérsé téfeyot nénamndai méndefé wimafé ghéngén ramégh Ngánjánene áuwéghafé.
bt: You.p are God's heartful children, you.p must do like God does. 2 Must be your.p life led by love, just as Keriso loved us and gave his life for us as a sweet-smelling sacrifice offered with God's pleasure.

nama: Fém sem Ngánjánene ár, yau mbarkánd yém yaufi walyam, awasérmboghe yam o nité. Mété ámb árém emndetat fémofem yéné ewafrotati. 4 Yau mer yém sái norayati wáiwáiafé si, fifiofnar si o fénaté yaufi si wafrogh. Wénde fémofem so Ngánjáne kánjo yarametati. 5 Fém so fété mat em ndené efe em yaufiyamafé, njúnnjúnafé o kwénjtafé(ménamén nité siyém mewang yam yém) fá yau so kényawangi Keriso a Ngánjánene limánégh kénjút.
bt: You.p are God's people, it is not straight sexual immorality, destroying actions or greed. Other people might talk you are doing these. 4 It is not good for you to say shameful talk, without.meaning talk or making various bad talks. But you.p should give thanks to God. 5 You.p should know that who is with sins, with.dirty, or greedy (because greed is an idolatry) they will not ever enter into the kingdom of Keriso and of God.

nama: Emo yau némarsota fém fifiofnar sie yéné téfnan Ngánjánene nékwam so tawanangé fá emofem yau yiyáretat fá. 7 Ndené árfé yau némé táf ewafrotati. 8 Fém té táf kwéfkwéfan tamorwén, wénde fém té namndangi Yurane ár, fém sem kwayaghayan. Yénémamén fém so fété emor ndené kwayaghane ambum. 9 Kwayaghane mbwe sem méinyotio mer yam, mbarkánd yam, a efalo. 10 Mato téronjangi Yuré árké yaman náuwete. 11 Némndafi yau ewafrotati kwéfkwéfoene mbwefnar yam, wénde ekmetati kwayaghat. 12 Wáiwáiafé yém sái norayat ménamén némé áyáréghofnar árém ewafrotat kwankwane. 13 Wénde méinyotio yam njam kénakmangi kwayaghan, méinyotio yam kénamndangi safén, 14 ménamén kwayaghayam eufane méinyotio yam. Yénémamén yéné si noraye, "Kano, kémégh téfnár, a kano kérta, a Keriso so nálále fefaf."
bt: Do not be fooled by without.meaning talks, in this reason God's anger will come upon those who do not obey him. 7 Do not do anything with such people. 8 You.p had been in the darkness, but since you have become the Lord's people, you are in the light. Therefore you must live as children of light. 9 The fruit of the light are all good way, straight way, and truth. 10 Find out which thing the Lord pleases. 11 Don't do anything of the fruitless deeds of darkness, but put them in the light. 12 It is shameful to talk about what without.obeying people do in secret. 13 But when all the things come to the light, and everything becomes clear, 14 because light shows up everything. Therefore say like this, “Get up, sleeping man, and rise from death, and Keriso will shine on you.s.”

nama: Yénémaménnde, kor so fété em ménamén ndernáye fém emor. Yau emor ndenanit káfetafnar árnit, wénde káfeté árnit. 16 Ewafrotati merkéráye méinyotio ásáfogh féfene kés em, ménamén yéné sem yaufi efogh. 17 Yau aem fifiofnar, fété so mat náyátotati Yurane ménde némé yém féfe wafroghét.
bt: Therefore be careful how you live. Don't live like without.wisdom people, but as wise people. 16 Do carefully all the work that you.p have, because these are evil days. 17 Don't be without.meaning, [but] understand what the Lord wants you.p to do.

nama: Yau wéri nu enetati wériot, yéné yamam fém so ewasérmbote, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbéram atawafongé. 19 Norayati féfenjo kénjún samse, wafnjagh waghe, a mbérmbére waghe. Wafnjagh wagh a sams wagh erametati Yurafaf áuwégh tikfe. 20 Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan, Ngánján Afai túmén kánjo yarametati méinyotio yammén. Amaf a ár
bt: Do not drink alcohol for drunkardness, this will ruin you.p, instead, be filled with the God Spirit. 19 Speak to one another with the sams, with voice songs, and spiritual songs Sing voice songs and sams to the Lord with your joyful hearts. 20 In the name of our Lord Yesu Keriso, always give thanks for everything to God the Father. Wives and husbands

nama: Náyáretati féfe kénjún ménamén fémofem yutémndati Keriso ndené fété féfene Yuré.
bt: Listen one another because you.p honor Keriso as your Lord.

nama: Amaf, náyáretati fém féfenjo árfefaf ndené fété Yurafaf kés náyáretati. 23 Ménamén yánjar siyém sénko yatnoefaf ndené fété Keriso siyém sénko Yesuene mérénfaf, a Keriso siyém fáyo Yesuene mérnoene Wanjarégh ár yém, yáne fifi. 24 Ndené fété Yesuene mérén kés fáyo náyárete Kerisoefaf, so fété amaf fáyo náyáretat yéfenjarfefaf.
bt: Wives, listen to your.p husbands just as you.p listen to the Lord. 23 Because husband is the head over his wife just as Keriso is the head of the Yesu's family(church), and Keriso is himself the Savior of the Yesu's family(church), his body. 24 Just as the Yesu's family(church) listens itself to Keriso, the wives must listen themselves to their husbands.

nama: Ár, euwetati féfetnof, ndené fété Kerisom yuwetam Yesuene mérén a yéramai yánjo ghérsé yáyot. 26 Yesum yafrotam yéné ménát yiyátoi Yesuene mérén njúnnjúnofnar. Yéné yémormén ndenanit yémo kar yénd yénmumbaryéng nue, njam yémo yénérsam Ngánjánene si téfefaf. 27 Yémo yafrote yéné ménát Yesuene mérén yénmanai yánjo sáfrére sariafé a njúnnjúnofnar a téfnofnar, mborofnar o ámb féréngférngofnar. 28 Árém so fété euwetat yéfetnof ndené fété kés euwetat yéfenjo fifi. Ár emon yuwete yátén náuwete fáyo. 29 Emon yau so méndméndat yéfande yánjo fifi. Wénde yéndfem emanjnam a ewarawenam, ndené fété Kerisom ndernáye yafrote Yesuene mérén, 30 ménamén Kerisoene fifi kafe yénd yéném. 31 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Yéné téfnan árom so téfrangongé yárefé a yátmé a yátnofé ámbiro káyátend, a sómbio so kamndend ámbiro." 32 Kété yém kénjkame kwankwane efalo yam yéné Buk sian yufane safét, wénde yénd norayan Kerisoenemén a Yesuene mérénmén. 33 Wénde yéné si wéi siyém féfeyot: méinyotio yéfenjarfem so euwetat yéfetnof ndené fáyo kés náuwetat, a méinyotio yéfetnofem so eutémndat yéfenjaréf.
bt: Husbands, love your.p wives, just as Keriso loved the Yesu's family(church) and gave his life for it(her). 26 Yesu did this to make Yesu's family(church) without.dust(holy). It was like he washed us with water, as he brought God's talk to us. 27 He did this in order to bring the Yesu's family(church) stand in front of him with beauty, without.dust(holy) and without.fault, without.spot or without.wrinkle. 28 Husbands must love their wives just as they love their own bodies. Husband who loves his wife loves himself. 29 No one hate our own body. But we feed them and take care of them, just as Keriso does the Yesu's family(church), 30 because we are parts of Keriso's body. 31 As the Buk(scripture) says, “In this reason a man will leave his father and mother and become one with his wife, and the two will become one.” 32 There is a deep secret truth revealed in this Buk(scripture), but I speak about Keriso and the Yesu's family(church). 33 But this talk is also for you.p: All the husband must love their wives as they love themselves, and every [his] wives must respect their husbands.

nama: Ambumtértér, eyáretati féfene afaf a amaf Yurane kénjún, yéné siyém mbarkánd. 2 Yéné siyém fronde nák unyéghofnar siafé "Eutémanwé fenjo afé a amé 3 ménát feyot merro so yéngém, a fémon so yayamnete tombé ghérsé ámnjogh mbandan."
bt: Children, obey your.p fathers and mothers in the Lord, [for] this is straight. 2 This is the first law with a without.lying talk(promise), “Respect your.s father and mother 3 so that it will go well for you.s, and you.s may enjoy long life staying in the land.”

nama: Afaf a amaf, yau eusérmbotati féfene ambumtértér yéné yame árké yamam so eméindat nékwot. Wénde ewanotati Yurane watameghe a wawéngsoghe. Faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuraf
bt: Fathers and mothers, do not mistreat your.p children in this way as to cause them angry. But raise them with teaching and encouragement of the Lord. Without.payment working men(slaves) and masters

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh ár, eyáretati féfenjo mbandmén yuré utmanéghafé a férférafé, utmanégh tikfe yafrotati ndené fété ndernáye fémon Keriso so yiyárete. 6 Yau ewafrotati yéné táfandro njam yémofem efandat, ménát fém ménde em yémofem sái efalo eyátotat, wénde méinyotio tikfe fémofem táf ewafrotati némat Ngánján ménde yém, ndené fété Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 7 Ewafrotati féfenjo ásáfogh ndené fété faiofnar ásáfogh ár áuwéghafé, ndené fété fémofem Yurane ásáfogh yafrotati, yau árfene. 8 Nawafarotati Yuram so fai yénmafrote yénd ámbiroámbiroe, faiofnar ásáfogh ár o yuwek ár, mer ásáfoghmén árké yéndfem ewafrotam.
bt: Without.payment working men(slaves), obey your earthly masters with respect and fear, [and] do it with a respecting heart as you.p will obey Keriso. 6 Don't do this only when they are watching you.p, so that you.p want they will approve you.p, but with all your.p heart you.p do what God wants, as without.payment working men(slaves) of Keriso. 7 Do your.p work as without.payment working men(slaves) with joy, as if you.p are doing the Lord, and not people. 8 Remember the Lord will give reward us individually, [whether] without.payment working men(slaves) or free people, for the good work which we do.

nama: Yuraf, ndenéyameyo nawarawenati féfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árfefaf a yau eusérmbotati. Nawafarotati ndené fém a féfene faiofnar ásáfogh árfé ámbiro Yuré ewam njafaran, emo yau yuyafote witmaro ménde yam a mogh. Méinyotio Ngánjánene asmégh rokar
bt: Masters, in the same way save guard yourselves from your.p without.payment working men(slaves) and do not threaten them. Remember that you.p and your.p without.payment working men(slaves) have the same Lord in heaven, who do not see only some part and judges. The whole fighting tools of God

nama: Ambinomén, muyafé aem Yurane kénjún a yáne minde tukén wafté kénjún. 11 Numanetati Ngánjánene méinyotio asmégh rokare, ménát fém mé so ewakai Sáiféroene yaufi unyéghta. 12 Ménamén yénd yau nasmetam árfé, wénde ménáyafé yaufi mbérmbérafene waftafé njafar maratan, limánégh mbérmbér, muyafé mbérmbér, a mbérmbérafene wafté árkéménayam elimndat ár yéné kwéfkwéf mband maratan. 13 Yénémamén numanetati sénonjo Ngánjánene méinyotio asmégh rokare, ménát yaufi efogh njam yéném, fém mé so ewakai taikrataye. Njam fémofem méinyotio ewifongi, fém mé so ewakai taikrataye féfenjo sifayan.
bt: Finally, be strong in the Lord and in his very high power. 11 Clothe with all God's fighting things, so that you.p will be able to stand up from the Sáifèr's evil lyings. 12 Because we are not fighting with people, but with the evil spirit powers in the heavenly world, the ruling spirits, spirits with authorities, and spiritual powers that rule over people in this dark world. 13 Therefore now clothe yourselves with all the fighting tools of God, so that when the evil day comes, you will be able to stand firm. When you have finished everything, you will still be standing firm in your place.

nama: Méinyotio fém aewakai, ménáyafé efaloyafé ndené fété beles umbéghkaf féfene karatamé, mbarkánd yam ndené fété féfene wéf wambégh sáláme, 15 a ndené fété féfene sandol afrengéghkaf so em ménát krufrat mer si waitoghét. 16 Túmén efghon ersati ndimbal mwighé ndené fété awambégh mbakw, yénaye fém so féyotaro em yaufi ároene méinyotio fésafé fimb. 17 Tawanangi wanjarégh ndené fété asmégh walaf, a Ngánjánene si ndené fété Ngánján Mbérmbéroene witmafé sénté náifé. 18 Yafrotati méinyotio yéné Ngánjánafé orayégh kénjún nómnendati Ngánjánene wáutáréghét. Ngánjánafé norayati méinyotio yaman Ngánján Mbérmbéroene limánéghan. Yéné téfnan mwighé sénté aem a yau kékmbongi méinyotio Ngánjánene árét Ngánjánafé norayati. 19 Ngánjánafé norayati wéi tayot, ménát Ngánjánam so kwaramangé si táf njam yénd afrengéghkaf wém siyot, a ménát yénd so norayan férférofnar a sái mat eyátotan mer siyoene kwankwane yam. 20 Ngánjánam yénd wénmáfáretam ménát so tawaufrotawén árét mer si yánemén. A yéné téfnan yénd sénonjo kwéfkwéf méngon wélau. Ngánjánafé norayati ménát yénd férférofnar so mer si nafrotan ndené yéndon so fété. Ambinomén áuwégh si
bt: You.p all stand, with the truth as a belt around your.p waist, with straight way as your.p protecting chest clothe. 15 and as your shoes will be ready to preach the good talk of peace. 16 Everyday, carry big mind(faith) as a protecting barktree skin, with this you will be able to put out all the burnning arrows shot by the evil one. 17 Take salvation as a fighting cap, and the talk of God as the sharpening knife with both side(sword) of the God Spirit. 18 Do all these in talking with God asking for God's help. Talk with God on every things in the leading of the God Spirit. In this reason be sharpen mind(brave) and never stop to talk with God for all God's people. 19 Also talk with God for me, so that God will give me a talk when I am ready for the message, and so that I can talk without.fear and make them known the good talk's secret things. 20 God sent me to tell people the good news about him. And for this reason I am now in prison.Talk with God so that I may be without.fear in speaking the good talk that I should do. Final greetings

nama: Tukikus yém téfene tikfafé fútar a Yurane ndimbal mwighé kér ro faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yémon so ewaufrote méinyotio si tanemén, ménát mat so em yéndon némé yafrotan a yénd ndernáye wém. 22 Yéné téfnan yéndon yénmáfáretan fá féfefaf, ndené fém mat so em yénd ndernáye yéném, a ndené fém so ewawéngsote.
bt: Tukikus is our heartful friend and faithful without.payment working man(servant) in the Lord. He will tell you all talks about me, so that you.p will know what I am doing and how I am. 22 In this reason I am sending him to you.p, so that you will know how we are, and that he will encourage you.p.

nama: Ngánján Afam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom méinyotio efalo yátogh árfet so tawaramangé krufrát a uwégh ndimbal mwighafé. 24 Ngánjánene ngárám so yém méinyotio yéfefaf emofem yuwetat téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kérofnar uwéghe.
bt: God the Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso will give to all truly approving people(belivers) peace and love with big mind(faith). 24 God's grace will be to all those who love our Lord Yesu Keriso with without.dying love.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Timoti a yénd yénre Keriso Yesuene faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár. Yénd, Fol, yéfarotan yéné férén kétán méinyotio Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár Yesu Keriso kénjún kété Filifi, mérne yémafé Yesuene mérnafene sénko árfé a ndikun.
bt: I am Fol, Timoti and I are the without.payment working men(servants) of Keriso Yesu, I, Fol, write this letter to all God's without.dust people in Yesu Keriso at Filifi, together with Yesu's family(church)'s head people and deacons.

nama: Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so ewaramete ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Folém kánjo yaramai Ngánjáne efalo yátogh árfenemén Filifiyan
bt: God our Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso will give grace and peace to you.p. Fol thanks giving to God for the believers at Filifi

nama: Méinyotio efoghfénefénean yéndon ewafarotan fém, yéndon kánjo yarametan tane Ngánjáne féfenemén. 4 Méinyotio efoghfénefénean yénd noraiwam Ngánjánafé féfeyot, yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam áuwéghafé 5 ménamén fém tamorwén tane áwárnyégh ár mer sian kétamé fronde efogh yénanotio sénonjo. 6 Yénd efaloe mat wém ndené Ngánjánam yafngo mer ásáfogh féfene kénjún, a so mé yafrote yáne ásáfogh a so tifongé Yesu Kerisoene angogh efghon.
bt: Every time I remember you.p, I give thanks to my God about you.p. 4 Every time I talk with God for you.p, I talk with God with joy 5 because you were my partners in the good talk from the first day until now. 6 I really know that God has begun a good work in you.p, and will continue his work and he will finish on the returning day of Yesu Keriso.

nama: Yéné yém mbarkánd ménamén yénd nemnan yéné ende ménamén méinyotio féfenemén, ménamén fém em tane tikfan. Fém em Ngánjánene ngáráman yéndfé njam yénd wém umbéghkaf seine o yamarotan a efalo yiyátotan mer si. 8 Ngánján mat yém ndernáye yénd náronjan méinyotio féfenemén ménáye Yesu Kerisoene uwéghe.
bt: This is straight that I think this way all about you.p, because you.p are in my heart. You.p are in God's grace with me when I am tied with chains or defending and confirming the good talk. 8 God knows how I long for all of you.p with love of Yesu Keriso.

nama: Yénd túmén Ngánjánafé noraiwam ndené féfene uwégh mé so nénganote matyaman a kénjkam mwighéyan. 10 Féyo fém so mat náyátotati némé merfifi yém a so em njúnnjúnofnar a téfnofnar Kerisoene angogh efghon. 11 Fém túmén so em mbarkánd yam mbwe afoghkaf yéné árké Yesu Kerisom efune. A árém so yéfandat yéné a yuyotat Ngánjánene yétkwén. Némé ghérsane fifi yém Folefaf
bt: I am always talking with God that your love keep on growing in knowlede and deep minds. 10 Then you.p will know what is very good and will be without.dust and without.blame on the returning day of Keriso. 11 You will always be bearing the fruit of straightness which Yesu Keriso produce. And people will see that and praise the God's name. What is the meaining of life to Fol

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd ménde wém fém mat sái em ndené némé kérté té kufrote tafaf té kwáutáne ménát mer si waitoghét. 13 Méinyotio ár yéna yémafayo méinyotio fiyaré warsagh árfene sifayé wambéghfaf, mat em ndené yénd wém seine umbéghkaf Kerisoene téfnan. 14 A tane seine umbéghmén, tárfár efalo yátogh ár nénamndangi mwighé kér ro a férférofnar ewaufrotat si.
bt: My friends, I want you.p to know that what problem had happened to me had helped in order to preach the good talk. 13 All the people here with all the soldiers guarding people in the ruling man(king)'s place(palace), know that I am tied with chains because of Keriso. 14 And because of my being tied by chains, many approving truth people(believers) have become brave and without.fear telling the talk.

nama: Yéné efalo yém ndené ámb árfem yéngwaitotat si Kerisoenemén kétamé áwáramnjaghta a awaingéghawaingégh ghérsata tanemén, wénde ámb árfem yéngwaitotat si Kerisoenemén ménaye mer tikfe. 16 Yéné árém yaitotat si ménamén yémofem uwetat yénd, ménamén fá mat em Yuram wénmuyafo yénd ménát sái yamarotan mer si. 17 Wénde ámb árém yéngwaitotat si Kerisoenemén nité ende, yau mer ende, nemnat ndené yémofem kérté so yéfunat tayot táf yénd seine umbéghkaf swém. 18 Wénde ámb yau némé yém! Ndimbal yam siyém ndené méinyotio ende téu mer o mámáfi téfnan, yémofem kés yéngwaitotat Kerisoenemén. Féyo yénd náuwetan a yénd mé so wéngém áuwéghan. 19 Ménamén yénd mat wém ndené fém norayati Ngánjánafé tayot a Yesu Kerisoene Mbérmbéram siyém wáutáne ta, Ngánjánam yénd so kwutorngé kwéfkwéf méngota. 20 Yénd nawanjetan a méghmégh wém ndené yénd yau so wáiwáiafé wém, wénde tafaf so yém awamarogh ndené yénd skwémorwén frondeyan. A yéndon efalo yiyátotan ndené tane ghérsaye so yuyotan Keriso, téu ghérsé wém o kér wém. 21 Keriso siyém tane méinyotio endeyot yénd so wémor. Wénde téu kér wém, yéné yém minde mer, ménamén yénd so yénre Yesufé. 22 Yénd njam mé wéngém ghérsé fifie, yéné so nérete mbwefé ásáfogh tayot. Wénde yénd mafina wém némé yéndo so taferén? 23 Yéné siyém táikér yém waferghét: Yénd ménde wém krot ménát Kerisofé so yénre, árké yém mindefifi mer. 24 Wénde féfeyot mer so yém ndené yénd ghérsé sái mé wém. 25 Yénd nemnan ndené yéné siyém efalo, féyo yénd mat wém ndené yénd so néngaketan, a fémafé yéngmor mé méinyotio ménát fém so nanotati a náyátotati áuwéghafé féfene ndimbal mwighayan. 26 Féyo, njam yénd nénangotan féfefaf, fém minde so náuwetati Keriso Yesu kénjún a yuyotam yáne yétkwén tane téfnan.
