bt: This is true that some people preach talk about Keriso from jealousy and competition life of me, but other people preach talk about Keriso with good heart. 16 These people preach talk because they love me, because they know the Lord appointed me to defend the good talk. 17 But the other people preach talk about Keriso for selfish way, not good way, thinking that they will create a trouble for me while I am tied with chains. 18 But it does not matter! The big thing is that in every way should be good or wrong reason, they are preaching about Keriso. So I am happy and I will still be happy. 19 Because I know that as you.p are talking with God for me and the Spirit of Yesu Keriso is helping me, God will take me from the prison. 20 I am waiting and hoping that I will not be shame, but I will have endurance, just as I was at first. And I believe that with my life I will praise Keriso, whether I live or die. 21 Keriso is mine to whom I will live. But if I die, it is very good, because I will be with Jesu. 22 If I'll still alive in the body, this will look fruitful work for me. But I don't know what will I choose? 23 This is difficult to choose: I want to die so that I will be with Keriso, which is really very good. 24 But it is good for you.p that I should still live. 25 I think that this is true, so I know that I will live, and we will continue with all of you.p so that you.p will grow and become joyful in your.p big mind(faith). 26 Then, when I come back to you.p, you.p will greatly rejoice in Keriso Yesu and praise his name because of me.

nama: Ndimbal yam siyém ndené féfene ghérsé so yém ndené Kerisoene mer siam ndernáye emndete, ménát, téu o yau yénd wéngém a tawinjon fém. Yénd so káyáran ndené fém ewakai taikrataye ámbiro mwighayan a ámbiro méndeyan fém násmetati mérne ménát ndimbal mwighat mer simén. 28 Fém yau férfér em emofem ekarotat mer simén, túmén aem muyafé, a yéné so yém ufarogh yam yéfeyot ndené fá so kuyangi a fém so kawaindangi, ménamén Ngánján emo ewaramete féfe waingégh. 29 Ngánjánam ewaramai féfe yéné muyé ménátotro Keriso efalo yátoghét, wénde wéi tékratot yáne téfnan. 30 Féfefaf yém ásmégh ndenényameyo tafaf siyém. Njam yénd ténmorwén fémafé, fémofem téfandawét tane ásmégh, a fém náyáretati ménamén tane ásmégh sénonjo.
bt: The big thing is that your.p life should be like the good talk of Keriso how its talking to you, so that, whether or not I go and see you.p. I will hear that you.p are standing firm in one mind and in one choice you.p are fighting together for the big mind(faith) because of the good talk. 28 Don't be afraid of those who are against you because of Good talk, always be strong, and this will be a showing thing(sign) to them that they will fail and you.p will win, because [it is] God who gives you.p the victory. 29 God gave you.p the strength only for approving truth(trusting) of Keriso, but also for suffering because of him. 30 You.p have the same fighting like with me. When I was with you.p, you.p saw my fighting, and you hear about my fighting now, .

nama: Ménamén féfene ghérsé Keriso kénjún káyátongé muyafé, a yáne uwégham ewamarota. Fém em awarnyéghan Ngánján Mbérmbérafé, fém em kwénjtafnar a ghérghérsisé ámbiroámbiro árfefafmé. 2 Yénémaménnde, yéndo ewamnendan fém yénd áuwéghafé kwiyátongi ménaye ndené sáfotio mwighaye, a ndené sáfotio uwégh, a ámbiro káyátongém mbérmbéran a mwighayan. 3 Yau ewafrotati ámb nité yam o tuktuk yam, wénde sái em yuwan ghérsafé féfe kénjún, a túmén efandati ámb ár em merfifi, yau fémyo. 4 Yau táf nemnati féfenjo ghérsaménro, wénde nemnati wéi kétán ámb árfene ghérsamén.
bt: Because your life in Keriso becomes strong, and his love comfort you.p. You.p are in friendship with the God Spirit, and you.p have without.selfish and compassion for one another. 2 Therefore, I urge you.p to make me happy by having the same kind of thinkings, and the same love, and become one in spirit and mind. 3 Don't do other things selfish thing or pride thing, but to be low in life in yourselves, and always see other people are so good, not yourselves. 4 Don't think about only your.p life, but think about the lives of other people too.

nama: Féfene yam wafrogh ndenéyameyo fiya tam Keriso Yesuene:
bt: Your.p doing way should be like Keriso Yesu's:

nama: Keriso témorwén efalofifi Ngánján, wénde fá yau kaneghau fáyo ménát ámbrérero sái tárwén Ngánjánafé.
bt: Keriso was truly God, but he didn't force himself to be equal with God.

nama: Wénde yémo yénéfrangoi yánjo sifayé Ngánjánefaf a nénamndai fáyo yauyau. Fá té náráftam sái témorwén ár a nénamndai ndenanit faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár.
bt: But he left his place to God, and became himself poor. He had being born to be a man and became like a without.payment working man(servant).

nama: Fá nénamndai árfifi a témorwén yuwan ghérsafé, yémo taitotatau Ngánjánene ménde ndemamén kér tésérmbnau, fá kér yémormén wafatarégh wénan.
bt: He became human and he was with lowly life, he obeyed God's will even though it meant death, he died on a cross.

nama: Féyo Ngánjánam yaramai Kerisoe tukénfifi sifayé a yaramai yétkwén árkéménayém ndimbalfifi, yéné yétkwénam ewainde ámb méinyotio yétkwén.
bt: Then God gave Keriso the very high place and gave him a name which is very big, that name surpasses all other names.

nama: Yénémamén, Yesuene yétkwénoe méinyotio ár so budéme yawefnetat, efe em njafaran, mbandan, a mbandoene mbanmbanan,
bt: So, for the name of Yesu every people will worship with knee, who are in heaven, on earth and beneath the earth,

nama: a méinyotio kankayam so yémndetat, "Yesu Keriso siyém Yuré!" ménát Afé Ngánjánene minde ndimbalot. Natremngotati ndenanit kénd kwayaghé mband maratan
bt: and all the tongues will say, "Yesu Keriso is Lord!" for the very bigness of God the Father. Shine like lights of star in the world

nama: Yénémaménnde, áuwéghafé fútaréf, ndené fém túmén káyáretawét tafaf njam yénd kwémorwén féfefaf, minde mer yém ndené fém náyáretati tafaf sénonjo njamandio yénd wém nayu féfeta. Mé néngásáfotati férférafé a ngerngerafé ménát so tifongi féfenjo wanjarégh. 13 Ngánján túmén násáfote féfene kénjún, tawaramangé ménde a wafté árkéménayam téremngongé fá.
bt: Therefore, loving friends, as you.p always obeyed me when I was with you.p, it is so good that you.p obey me now while I am far from you.p. Continue to work with fear and trembling to finish your.p salvation. 13 God always works in you.p, giving you the willingness and the power which satisfy him.

nama: Ewafrotati méinyotio yam áwátaranéghofnar o amroréghofnar. 15 Féyo fém so em kértafnar a njúnnjúnofnar ndené Ngánjánene féwénféwénofnar ambumtértér, efe emor yéné wasnengégh mband maratan a yaufi ár. Fém táf natremngotati yéfefaf ndenanit kénd nanetat njafaran. 16 Naweretati taikrataye kétán ghérsé sifaf. Njam fémofem ewafrotati, yénd so minde áuwéghan wém féfenemén Kerisoene angogh efghon, ménamén yéné yam so yuyafote ndené méinyotio tane ásáfogh féfe kénjún yau so yém fifiofnar. 17 Wénde Yénd so náuwetan njam yéndo ghérsé yétarnan, nasuna ndenanit ghéngén ramégh wékwér Ngánjánefaf, ndené fété féfene ndimbal mwighé kér ro ásáfoghmén yém ramégh Ngánjáne. 18 A fém fiya káuwetangi yénémamén a náuwetam yéndfé. Timoti a Efafroditus
bt: Do all the things without.complaining or without.arguing, 15 Then you.p will be without.guilt and without.dust(holy) as God's without.fault children, who live in these corruped world and evil people. You.p must shine to them like stars lighting up the heaven, 16 Hold strongly to the talk of life. If you.p do these, I will be very happy about you.p on the returing day of Keriso, because this will show that all my work in you.p have not been without.meaning. 17 But I will be happy if I lose my life, pour it out like a liquid sacrifice to God, as your faithful work is an offering to God. 18 And you.p should be glad about this and rejoice with me. Timoti and Efafroditus

nama: Yénd méghméghan wém Yuré Yesuene kénjún sái yafáretan Timoti kétán féfefaf wékeye, ndené tayot wéi so yém wawéngsogh njam fá nénangota a kwaufrongé féfenemén. 20 Tane ámb ár yau yém ndené Timoti kés yém, emo efalofifi ewarawene fém. 21 Méinyotio ámb ár néretat mé yéfenjo méndefafétro, yau Yesu Kerisoene méndefaf. 22 Wénde fém mat em ndené Timoti té kauyafote fáyo. Ndenanit yárefafé yénau ambumofé násáfot, yénd té kásáfowam mer sian. 23 Yénd méghméghan wém sái yéngwáfáretan Timoti féfefaf wékeye. Wénde fronde, yénd mat wém némé so nufrote tafaf. 24 Yéndo efalo yiyátotan Yuré ndené yénd yéndio so wéném wékeye féfefaf.
bt: I am in hope in the Lord Yesu to send Timoti to you.p quickly, that I also will be encouraged when he comes back and tells me about you.p. 20 I have no other man like Timoti is, who really cares for you.p. 21 All other people look for their own desires, not the desires of Yesu Keriso. 22 But you.p know that Timoti has proved himself. Like a son with his father, we worked in the good talk. 23 I am in hope to send Timoti to you.p quickly. But first, I know what will happen to me. 24 I trust the Lord that I myself will come to you.p quickly.

nama: Yénd nemnan yéndo táf so yéngwáfaretan Efafroditus sái néngangota féfefaf. Fá yém efalo fútar Keriso kénjún. Yéndfé té kásáfowam ménát Ngánjáneyot ásáfogh tafrowam mérne. Yénd kásáfowam minde, ndenanit fiyaré kés em. Njam yénd ménde kwém wáutárghét, fémofem té ténmáfáretati tafaf. Yémo té kwáutáne féfene téfnan. 26 Ménamén fá ménde yém mindefifi ménát sái tawinjongé méinyotio fém, fá siyém mwighayam yawérsote ménamén fém náyárayénd ndené fá enjne témorwén. 27 Néméwét, fá enjne témorwén, a kaka krotro, wénde Ngánján ghérghérsisé yémormén yáfaf a yénd wéi, ménát tafaf yau so yém minde ghérghérsisé. 28 Féyo yénd ménde wém mindefifi ménát sái yéngwáfáretan fá kétán féfefaf ménát njam fémofem tinjongi táf fém so áuwéghafé em, a yénd yau so wawérsote mwighayam féfenemén. 29 Tumyongi fá Yurane kénjún mindefifi áuwéghafé a taramangi utmanégh ndené ároe fá siyém. 30 Ménamén fá kér kaka yémormén Kerisoene ásáfogh téfnan, ménát sái kwaramangé ta wáutárégh ásáfoghét, ménamén fémofem yau so wáutánati ta.
bt: I think I must send Epaphroditus to come back to you. He is true friend in Keriso. He has worked with me to do the work for God together. We have worked hard, like soldiers. When I needed help, you sent him to me. He has helped me because of you.p. 26 Because he wants very much to see all of you.p, he is worried because you.p heard that he was sick. 27 Yes, he was sick, and almost died, but God had mercy on him and me too, so that I would not have in sadness so much. 28 So I really want to send him to you.p so that when you.p see him, you.p can be happy, and I will not be trouble in mind about you.p. 29 Welcome him in the Lord joyfully and give respect people like him. 30 Because he almost died for the work of Keriso, to give me the help to the work, because you.p could not help me.

nama: Ambinomén, tane fútaréf, náuwetati Yurane kénjún! Yénayam yau mwighat wawinde ta ménát yéfarotan ndenéyameyo yammén féfefaf yéndon kés yéfarotamén fronde, efaloe, yéné siyém féfenjoyo merot. 2 Kor aem yéfefaf emofem ewafrotat yaufi, efe ndenanit em ághé, efe norayat ménát sái enfetat ghéngan. 3 Wénde yénd yéném efalo Ngánjánene ár. A yau yéné yém ménamén ámb árém kar ghéngan ténénfetawét. Yéné siyém Ngánján Mbérmbéram árké yénlimnde ménát sái yáwefnotam Ngánjáne. Yéndfem kánjo yarametam Ngánjáne ménamén némé Keriso Yesum té yafrotam téfeyot. Yénd yau nemnam téfene fifi néféghét siyém ndimbalfifi. 4 Njam fifioene yam yém ndimbalfifi, féyo yénd táf so korayangén yénd wémor merkéráye. Yénd njam kwémorwén ámb ár emofem mwighé taikre yérsat fifioene yamta, yéndo so tawaindangén méinyotio fá. 5 Yénd ghéngan wénfayénd njam yénd 8 efogh namndayén, a yénd kétamamén wém Israil yumén a Benjaminene mérénmén a yénd wém efalofifi Ibru ár. Ndené fété Farasi ár, yéndon kor merkéráye ewaitotamén Mosesene nák. 6 A yénd ménde kwémorwén ndené yéndon tasérmbotawén Yesuene mérén. Yéndon tawafrotawén méinyotio ndernáye nák témorwén, yénd kwémorwén téfnofnar. 7 Yéné méinyotio yam tamorwén ndimbalfifi tayot, wénde sénonjo yéndon efandan fifiofnar ménamén Kerisoene téfnan. 8 Yau yéné yamro, wénde yénd mat wém ndené efalo yiyátotan tane Yuré Yesu Keriso siyém ndimbalfifi, féyo yéndo efandan méinyotio ámb rokar fifiofnar. Yéndo efalo yiyátotan Yesu, féyo yéndon té tatarnan méinyotio yéné rokar. Yéndon yéné tafandan mérmérnit a taikrataye kawaretan Yesu Kerisoefaf. 9 Yénd sái wém yáne, sénonjo yénd mbarkánd yénre Ngánjánafé, yau ménamén yéndon tanwaitotan nák, wénde ménamén yéndon efalo yiyátoyén Keriso. Ngánjánam tényátongé mbarkánd yémafé ndimbal mwighaye. 10 Méinyotio yénd ménde wém ménát mat so káyáton Keriso a sái térnon anogh wafté, a sái wafnyang yáne tékrátan a kamndan ndené fá yáne kéran, 11 yéné méghméghan yénd yéndio so kanon kétamé kérta. Ménjté ayéngém kétán fai résaghfaf
bt: Finally, my friends, rejoice in the Lord! This doesn't bother me to write the same things to you.p I wrote at first, in fact, this is for your.p good. 2 Watch out for those who do evil, who are like dogs, who say to cut the skin. 3 But we are truly God's people. And this is not because someone has circumcised us. It is God Spirit that leads us to worship God. We thank God because of what Keriso Yesu has done for us. We don't think cutting our bodies is important. 4 If things of the body were important, I could say I am living very well. If I were like some men who get their.p strong mind(confidence) from the things of the body, I would surpass every one of them.p 5 I was cut the skin when I was 8 days, and I am from the nation of Israil and the family of Benjamin and I am a real Ibru man. As a Farasi man, I carefully followed the law of Moses. 6 And I wanted that I persecuted the Yesu's family(church). I did everything how the law were, I was without.fault. 7 These all things were important to me, but now I see them without.meaning because of Keriso. 8 Not only those things, I know that believing in my Lord Yesu Keriso is important, so I see all other things as without.meaning. I believe in Jesu, so I have thrown away all of those things. I saw these as rubbish and hold strongly onto Yesu Keriso. 9 I am his, now I am straight with God, not because I followed the law, but because I truly approved(believed) in Keriso. God makes me straight with him by faith. 10 All I want is to know Keriso and to taste the power of his rising, and to take part in his sufferings and become like him in his death, 11 in this hope [that] I myself will rise from death. Continue to get the price

nama: Yénd yau namndetan ndené yéndon té eyanjangén yéné yam o té nénamndan féwénféwénofnar. Yénd mé nawarafnan waingéghét ménát sái tanan fai árké Keriso Yesum té wiyátoi yénd yandio. 13 Tane fútaréf, yénd yau nemnan ndené yéndo té yanan, wénde ámbiro yam yéndon yafrotan siyém sái kwawalindangé némé yém tane sémta a yénd nufotan ménát tiyánjangén némé yém fronde. 14 Yénd nérsan mbarkánde yafarenan yatogh ménát sái kawaindangén fai résaghét, árkéménát Ngánjánam té wanmoi yénd Keriso Yesue kénjúmé kétán yéné ghérsat yémafé njafaran.
bt: I do not say that I have already reach to these things or become without.flaw(perfect).I am still striving to win to get the prize which Keriso Yesu has made me for him. 13 My friends, I do not think that I have already got it, but the one thing I am doing is to forget what is at my back and I try to reach what is first(ahead). 14 I run straight toward the end to win to get the prize, which God has called me through Keriso Yesu for the living with him in heaven.

nama: Méinyotio efe yénd yéném mbérmbére anoghkaf fai kemnangém yéné ende wéi. A njam fémofem nemnati fénatayero yéné yammén, Ngánjánam so ekmete safén féfeyot. 16 Wénde yéndfem fiya mé táitotangém efalo si árkéméné Ngánjánjam té yénmaramai.
bt: All of us who are spiritually grown up should think this way too. And if you.p think differently about these things, God will put them clear to you.p. 16 But we should continue to follow the true talk which God had given us.

nama: Tane fútaréf, méinyotio fém fiya kuwaitotangi tane wafrogh yamamé, a merkéraye efandati ámb ár efe tamorangérwén yéné ende yéndfem ewaufarotam féfe. 18 Yéndon tawaufrotan féfe yénémamén tárfár mbinotmé fronde, a sénonjo yéndon yéfértan yengamafé: yéna em tárfár ár emorang ndené mék téfnárnit Kerisoene wafatarégh wénfaf. 19 Kétán wifoghfaf, Ngánjánam so ewirone fá, yémofem ewafrotat yéfene fifioene ménde némat em, fá em tuktuk ménamén yéfene wáiwáiafé wafroghyammén, a fá nemnat mé ménamén mbandmén rokarménro. 20 Wénde téfene méngotu siyém njafar, a yénd nawanjetam yáyot téfene Wanjarégh ár Yuré Yesu Keriso, sái yéném kétamé njafarta. 21 Ménaye yáne waftaye sái elimnda méinyotio yam, yémon so tawengongé téfene njangén fifi a táyátongé ndené yánjoyo minde mer fifi.
bt: My friends, all of you.p should try to follow thing I am doing, and watch well other people who lived that way we showed you. 18 I have told you.p this many times before, and now I repeat it with tears: here are many people living as enemies to Keriso's the cross. 19 To the end, God will destroy them, they do whatever their bodies want, they are proud of the shameful acts, and they think only about earthly things. 20 But our village is heaven, and we are waiting for him our Saving man the Lord Yesu Keriso, will come from heaven. 21 By his power to rule all things, he will change our weak bodies and change them like his own very good body.

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane fútaréf, fém yéndon efe euwetan a karonjan fandaghét, tane áuwégh a ákiki, yakai taikrataye Yurane kénjún yéné endén.
bt: Therefore, my friends, you.p whom I love and long to see, my joy and crown, stand strongly in the Lord in this way.

nama: Yéndon emotangén Euodia a Sintike sái kamyeyayénd Yurane kénjún. 3 A yéndon emotangén fém, tane ndimbal mwighafé fútar, ménát sái ewáutárét yéné sómbio amaf, ménamén fémafé kásáfotam yéndfé mer si kénjún, mérne yémafé Klement a ámb ár emofé kásáfotawém yéndfé, endefene yétkwén ekai kété ghérsé bukan.
bt: I ask Euodia and Sintike to agree in the Lord. 3 And I ask you.s, my big mind friend, to help these two women, because they.d worked with us in the good talk, together with Klement and other people who worked with me, whose names are written in the book of life.

nama: Túmén miya náuwetati Yurane kénjún! Yénd norayan wéikor: Náuwetati! 5 Yuyafotati métare yam wafrogh ámb árfefaf a féyo méinyotio ár so mat káyátongi yénémamén. Yuré yéném tekofnar. 6 Yau mwighayam ewawérsotat rokarmén, wénde méinyotio féfene Ngánjánafé orayéghan yamnendati Ngánján némat fém ménde em, túmén yamnendati fá kánjo tikfe. 7 A Ngánjánene krufrátam, árké yém minde tukén yém árfene matyamta, so ewarawene féfene tikéf a mwighé Keriso Yesuene kénjún.
bt: Always rejoice in the Lord! I say it again: Rejoice! 5 Show doing patient things to others and so all the people recognize this. The Lord is coming not.far(soon). 6 Don't be trouble in mind(worry) about anything, but in all your talking with God(prayers) ask God for what you.p want, always ask him with thankful hearts. 7 And God's peace, which is so high from people's understanding, will protect your.p hearts and minds in Keriso Yesu.

nama: Wifoghétro, tane fútaréf, tawafongi féfenjo mwighé mer yame. Nemnati yéné yammén árké em efalo, utmanégh, mbarkánd, féwénféwénofnar, uwégh a wafarerégh. 9 Mé ekmetati wafroghyaman méinyotio fém némé kotametati a tarsati yénamé ta tambén, tane sian a tane wafroghyaman. Féyo Ngánjánam emo yénmaramete téfe krufrát so yém féfefaf. Folene kánjo yéfene raméghmén
bt: Finally, my friends, fill your.p minds about good things. Think about these things which are true, respectful, straight, without.fault, lovely and honorable. 9 Keep putting into action all what you.p learned and received from me, both in my talks and in my actions. Then God who gives us peace will be with you.p. Fol's thanks for their gifts

nama: Yénd minde náuwetan Yurane kénjún ndené fém ménde em ménát tá sái wáutánati wéikor. Fém ménde tamorwén ta wáutárghét frondeyan. Wénde féfeyot yau ámb end yém tá wáutárghét. 11 Yénd yau norayan ménamén yénd náronjan. Yénd té notametamén remngoghét yénayan némé tane wam. 12 Ánde yau em rokar, yénd mat wém yénémén. Ánde em tárfár rokar, yénd wéi mat wém yénémamén. Yénd té notametamén yéné kwankwane yam, ménát méinyotio sifayan, árké efghon, yénd wém féyotaro, téu wém suafé o siogh, sái wam tárfár o nambioro. 13 Yéndon so ewafrotan méinyotio yéné Keriso kénjúmé emo waramete ta muyé.
bt: I so rejoiced in the Lord that you.p want to help me again. You wanted to help me before. But you have no other way to help me. 11 I am not talking because I am in need. I have learned to be satisfied with what I have. 12 When there is nothing, I know about that. When there is plenty, I know about that too. I learned this secret thing, so that all the places, at any time, I am enough/o.k, whether I am full or hungry, whether I have plenty or only few. 13 I can do everything through Keriso who gives me strength.

nama: Wénde yéné témorwén merfifi féfeyot sái tawafnyangérwén tane kértayan. 15 Fém Filifimén ár mat em ndené fémofem té wáutánaménd ta fronde. Yéné efghon njam yéndon yérnyayén mer si waitogh. Njam yéndon yénéfrangoyén Makedonia marat yu, fémro Yesuene mérén emormén emofem ta wáutánaménd manie. Yau ámb Yesuene mérnam ndené wafrotaménd. 16 Njam yénd Tesalonikan kwémorwén, tárfár mbinotmé fémofem ngwawatembetawét rokar njam yénd káronjawén wáutárghét kété. 17 Yéné yau ndenáye yém yéndon sái tawinjon féfene ramégh, wénde yénd ménde wém fémofem sái ewafrotati mer yam ménát Ngánjánam so efrende fém fai sái tawangongé. 18 A sénonjo tane em méinyotio rokar a minde tárfár! Tane em méinyotio yénd némé ménde kwém, ménamén Efafroditusém tanérse féfene ramégh yénan tafaf. Yéné ndenanit em méndefé wimafé ghéngén ramégh kétán Ngánjáne emo taumyongé, a em méndefé Ngánjánefaf. 19 A tane Ngánjánam so tawaramangé méinyotio némat fém ménde em yáne minde ndimbal wemárta Keriso Yesue kénjún. 20 Téfene Afé Ngánjánene yétkwén so yém ndimbalfifi tuot! Efalo. Folene ambinomén ásneghafé si
bt: But this was really good for you.p to involve in my troubles. 15 You people in Filifi know that you.p already helped me first. That was the time when I started to preach good talk. When I left Makedonia province, you were the only Yesu's group(church) who helped me with money. No other church did that. 16 When I was in Tesalonika, many times you.p sent me things I need to help. 17 This is not that I want to receive gifts from you.p, but I want you to do good things so that God will bless you through rewarding you back. 18 And now I have everything and plenty! I have all what I need, because Efafroditus brought your.p gift to me. These are like the sweet smelling sacrifice offered to God who accepts, and are pleased to God. 19 And my God will give you all your.p needs from very big riches in Keriso Yesu. 20 God our Father's name should be very big forever. Amen. Fol's final greeting talk

nama: Tawaramangi tane ásneghafé si yéfe méinyotio efe em Ngánjánene ár Keriso Yesue kénjún. Efalo yátogh árém yéna yéndfé siéném engwawatembangi féfe yéfene ásneghafé si. 22 A méinyotio ámb Ngánjánene árém engwatembangi yéfenjo ásneghafé si wéi, fénataye yéfe efe násáfotat kété Tukén warsagh ár Kaisarene méngo sifayan.
bt: Give my kissing(greeting) talk to all those who are God's people in Keriso Yesu. People who truly approve(believers) here with me send you.p their greeting talk. 22 And all the other God's people send their greeting talk too, especially to those who work in High king Kaisar's house place.

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio. Efalo.
bt: The grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso be with you.p all. Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, Timoti téfene fútarfé yénre.
bt: I am Fol, a man who is with Keriso Yesu's authority(apostle) in the will of God, and Timoti our friend is with me.

nama: Yéndfem yéfarowam yéné férén kétán Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar árfefaf Kolosia kénjún, efe em téfene ndimbal mwighafé fútar Kerisoene kénjún: Téfene Afé Ngánjánam so tawaramangé ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Folém kánjo si tarametau Ngánjáne Kolosia efalo yátogh árfenemén
bt: We.d write this letter to Godʼs without.dust(holy) people in Kolosia, who are our friends with big mind(faith) in Keriso. Our father God will give grace and peace to you.p. Fol gives thank to God about true approving men(believers) in Kolosia

nama: Njam yénd Ngánjánafé norayam, yéndfem túmén kánjo si yaramwam téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene Afé Ngánjáne. 4 Yéndfem kánjo si yaramwam Ngánjáne ménamén yénd té náyáreyayém féfene ndimbal mwighé Keriso Yesuene kénjún a féfene uwégh yém méinyotio Kerisoene árét. 5 Féfene ndimbal mwighé a uwégh yéném kétamé méghmégh árké nawamnde kété njafaran féfeyot árkéméné fém té náyárayénd yéné efalo mer sian. 6 Yéné yénayo mer si árké yénmormén féfefaf té yéngém méinyotio mband maratamé, a mbwe néngafote méinyotio sifayamé engwengote árfene ghérsé, ndené fété tawengote féfene ghérsé kétamé yéné efoghta njam náyárayénd fronde a mat namndayénd efaloe Ngánjánene ngárám. 7 Fém té notametaménd yéné mer si yáfafta Efafras.Fá yém téfene uwéghafé faiofnar ásáfogh ár, efe yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro Kerisoene ásáfogh ár yéndfé. 8 Fá yém emo wéi ténmaufrote téfe ménamén uwégh ámb árét árkéméné Ngánján Mbérmbéran yéramai féfe.
bt: When we.d talk with God, we.d always give thanks to the Father God of our Lord Yesu Keriso. 4 We.d give thanks to God because we.d have heard of your.p big mind(faith) in Keriso Yesu and of your love is for all Keriso's people. 5 Your big mind(faith) and love comes from the hope which is kept in heaven for you.p which you.p have heard in this true good talk. 6 This same good talk that came to you is going around all the world, and bearing fruit all the place by changing lives, just as it changed your lives from the day when you first heard and know God's grace truly. 7 You.p have learned this good talk from Efafras. He is our beloved without.payment working man(servant), who is a big mind(faithful) working man of Keriso with us. 8 He is also who told us of your.p love for other people which is given through the God Spirit for you.

nama: Yéné téfnan, kétándmé yéné efogh yénd njam náyáreyayém féfenemén, yénd yau nékmbeyayém Ngánjánafé orayégh féfenemén. Túmén tamnengéwém Ngánján ménát sái tawafotau yáne méndeyoene matyame a Ngánján Mbérmbéram so ewaramete káfeté mwighé a mat yátogh yam. 10 A yénd Ngánjánafé norayam ménát fém so emor ndené Yuré ménde kés yém a so yéremngote méinyotio yaman. Fémofem efunati mbwe ménáyan méinyotio meryam wafroghan, a nanotati Ngánjánene matyaman. 11 A yénd Ngánjánafé wéi norayam ndené muyé raméghkaf so em Ngánjánene méinyotio ndimbal waftaye ménát féfefaf so yém ndimbal awamarogh a métar, 12 a kánjo ramégh áuwéghafé Afai. Fá fáyo té efalo eyátoi sái tawanangi méinyotio rokar némé ewáfrendam yánjo njúnnjúnofnar árét efe emor kwayaghane limánéghan. 13 Yémon té yénmanjaryéng yénd kétamé kwéfitane limánéghta a yénmufaryéng yénd kétán Ambumoene limánégh kénjút yémon efe yuwetam. 14 Yáne Ambumoene ásáfogh kénjúmé, Ngánjánam yénmanjaryéng a ewaindai téfene yaufi. Emofé yau so etmét Ngánjánene Ambumofé
bt: In this reason, from that day when we.d heard about you.p, we.d have not stopped talking with God for you.p. We.d always ask God to fill you.p with the knowledge of his will and God Spirit will give all the wisdom and understanding. 10 And we.d are talking with God so that you.p may live as the Lord wants and will please him in in all things. You.p produce fruit by every good work doing, and grow in the knowledge of God. 11 And we.d are also talking with God that you.p will be strengthened with God's all big power so that you.p will have big endurance and patience, 12 and giving thanks with joy to the Father. He himself enable you.p to receive everthing what he prepared for his without.dust(holy) people who live in the ruling(kindom) of light. 13 He has saved us from the kingdom of darkness and brought us into the kingdom of the Son whom he loved. 14 Through the work of his Son, God saved us and forgot our sins. With whom you.p cannot compare the Son of God

nama: Ambum siyém mbanmban yém fandaghofnar Ngánjánene, fronde-sénko méinyotio ufroghmén rokarta. 16 Yáne kénjúnro Ngánjánam méinyotio rokar tawafrotau: rokar njafaran a mbandan, fandaghmén a fandaghofnar, némé téu limánégh ámnjogh sifayé o waftafé ár o limánégh ár o si muyé ár. Ngánjánam méinyotio rokar tawafrotau yáne Ambum kénjúmé a mé yáne Ambumotro. 17 Keriso siyém frondeyo yém méinyotio rokar sem soramé, a mé yáne kénjúnro méinyotio rokar naweretat. 18 A Keriso siyém Yesuene mérnoene sénko, yáne fifi. Fá wéikor siyém rényégh a fronde-sénko efe té nanoi kétamé kérta, ménát méinyotio rokaran fáro so yém fronde sifayan. 19 Ngánján ménde témorwén méinyotio yáne afoghkaf sái témorwén Keriso kénjún. 20 A yáne kénjúmé Ngánjánam sái tanwangongai yandro méinyotio rokar, némé rokar em mbandan o njafaran. Yesu kér yémorwén wafatarégh wénan a nertam yáne férék yéné kénjúmé yémo yafrotam krufrát yam.
bt: The Son is the shadow(image) of the without.seeing God, the firstborn among all the creation. 16 Only in him God made all the things: things in heaven and on earth, seen and without.seen, whether ruling chairs or powers or ruling people or people with authorities. God made all the things through his Son and only for his Son. 17 Keriso is first [and] all things are after, and only in him he hold together all the things. 18 And Keriso is the head of the Yesu's family(church), his body. He is also the beginning and the firstborn who has being raised from death, so that in whole things he alone will be at the first place. 19 God wanted to be all his fullness in Keriso. 20 And through him God should bring back everything to himself, what things are on earth or in heaven. Yesu died on the cross tree and poured out his blood through that he make peace.

nama: Tándái fém nayu té tamorwén Ngánjáneta a mék téfnár ménamén féfenjo mwighamén a féfenjo yaufi wafroghyammén. 22 Wénde sénonjo yémon té eyátoi fém yánjo fútar ménaye Kerisoene fifie kér kénjúmé ménát sái táyátongé njúnnjúnofnar Ngánjánene sáfrére, féwénféwénofnar a téfnofnar. 23 Féyo fém táf ménjté em ndimbal mwighayan a taikrataye ewakai. Yau násámbnetati féfene méghméghta ánde nawerayénd mer sian. Yéné mer si fiyém fémofem árké té náyárayénd a árké té téngwaitotawét méinyotio árét mband maratan, a árkéménaye yénd, Fol, nénáyátoyén faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Folene ásáfogh Yesuene mérnot
bt: In the past you.p were far from God and were enemies because of your.p minds and your.p evil actions. 22 But now he has made you his freinds through Kerisoʼs bodily death to make you.p without.dust(holy) before God's sight(presence), without.blame and without.fault. 23 So you.p must continue in big mind(faith) and stand strongly. Don't be shaken from your.p hope which you hold on the good talk. This good talk is which you.p heard and which has been preached to every people in the world, and with that I, Fol, have become a without.payment working man. Folʼs work for the Yesu's family(church)

nama: Yénd náuwetan tane tékrátmén ménát féfe wáutárghét, tane fifie tékrat kénjúmé yéndo ewáutánan wifoghét némé mé yém Kerisoene tékrat yáne fifi, Yesuene mérén téfnan. 25 Ngánjánam wékafai yénd sái kénamndangayén yáne faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár ménát wáutárghét Yesuene mérnot. Tane ásáfogh siyém sái ewatametan fém Ngánjánene si afoghare. 26 Tándái Ngánjánam yéné si yétnoi kwankwane méinyotio fronde ár satata, wénde yéné si sénonjo sauréghkaf yém Yurane árfefaf. 27 Ngánjánene mwighé farorégh siyém sái mat eyátota yánjo kwankwane yam yánjo árét, yéné wemár a minde ndimbal kwankwane yam árké yém yáne méinyotio árét. A kwankwane yam siyém ndené Keriso siyém féfene kénjún. A yéné téfnan, fém mat em ndené fém so emor Ngánjánjafé njafaran ámb kaye.
bt: I rejoice for my suffering in order to help you.p, through my bodily sufferings I am helping to finish what is still Keriso's sufferings for his body, the Yesu's family(church). 25 God chose me to become without.payment working man(servant) to help Yesu's family(church). My work is to teach to you.p the talk of God fully. 26 In the past God hid this talk in secretly for all before generations, but this talk is now opened to the Lordʼs people. 27 God's to split mind(plan) is to make known his secret to his people, this rich and secret with very big which is for all peoples. And the secret thing is that Keriso is in you.p. And because of that, you know that you will live with God in heaven one day.

nama: Féyo yéndfem yéngwaitotam Keriso méinyotio árfefaf. Yéndfem ewawéngsotam a ewatametam méinyotio káfeté mwighafé ménát yéndfem so enérsam Ngánjánefaf féwénféwénofnarot Keriso kénjún. 29 Yéné téfnan yénd násáfotan minde taikrataye a násmetan méinyotio muyaye árké Kerisom yéramete a árké yém ásáfoghan tane kénjún.
bt: So we preach Keriso to every people. We encourage and teach them with all wisdom so that we may bring them to God, without.flaw(for perfection) in Keriso. 29 That is why I work very hard and fight with all the power which Keriso gives and which is working in me.

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái mat em nderé ndimbal kéráye násmetan féfeyot a fá Laodikia yuwon efe em, a méinyotio yéfeyot emofem yau yéfandat tane sáf. 2 Tane ménde siyém fá sái em wawéngsoghkaf tikfan a ámbiro uwéghan, féyo fá so em afoghare wemár árké efalo matyamam yénérse. Yéné ende fá so mat em Ngánjánene kwankwane yam, árké yém Keriso fáyo. 3 Fá siyém ki emo esaune méinyotio ténoghmén ngonjél Ngánjánene káfeté mwighé a matyam. 4 Yéndon ewaufrotan yéné ménát emo yau so ewasote. Yémofem téu ewatametat yéné mwighé árké mernit néretat, wénde yau eyáretati fá. 5 Ndemamén yénd yukér wém féfefaf fifie, wénde yénd fémafé yéném mbérmbére. A náuwetan njam yéndon efandan ndernáye fém so ámbiro féfenjo kénjún watameghan em a nderé muyafé féfene ndimbal mwighé yém Keriso kénjún. Ndernáye efalo yátogh ár so emor
bt: I want you.p to know how much I am struggleing for you.p and for those who are at Laodikia place, and for all those who have not seen my face. 2 My desire is that they will be encouraged in heart and one in love, so they will be full in riches which the true knowledge brings. In this way they will know God's secret thing, which is Keriso himself. 3 He is the key who opens all the hidden treasures of God's wisdom and knowledge. 4 I tell you.p this so that no one will deceive you.p. They may teach that mind which look like good, but do not listen to them. 5 Even though I am absent you.p in body, but I am with you.p in spirit. And I am happy when I see how you.p are united with each other and how strong your.p big mind(faith) is in Keriso. How truly approving people must live

nama: Fémofem té yanayénd Keriso Yesu ndené fété Yuré. Yénémaménnde, ménjtaye aemor yáne kénjún. 7 Sérémb yéghkaf aem a erametati féfenjo ghérsé yáne kénjún, muyé résagh ndimbal mwighayan ndernáye fém té enwatametamén, a túmén aem kánjo ramégh ár.
bt: You.p have received Keriso Yesu as Lord. Therefore, continue to live in him. 7 Be planted root and built up your.p life in him, get strength in the big mind(faith) how I taught you.p, and always be thankful people.

nama: Kor aem emo yau táf elimnda ménaye unyéghe a fifiofnar watameghe, árké em árfene wafroghmén a yéné mband maratmén wénde yau yéné eném Kerisoe tambén.
bt: Watch out no one leads you.p by lying and without.meaning teaching, which are from man's made and from this world but this does not come from Keriso.

nama: Méinyotio Ngánjánene afoghare yam yém Keriso kénjún, yáne fifiyan 10 a Keriso kénjún fém té ewanayéng kétán wafogh ghérsafaf. Keriso siyém sénko méinyotio waftafé ár a si muyé ár. 11 Kerisoene kénjún fém té enfayénd ghéngan, yau yéné ghéngan néfghe syafrotaménd árém, wénde yéné ghéngan néfghe syafrotam Kerisom, árké yém yuwekot kétamé yéné yaufiyamoene waftata. 12 Njam fém ewalitotaménd, fém té eyatotaménd Kerisofé, a walitogh kénjún fém wéi té nanoyénd Kerisofé féfenjo ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé Ngánjánene waftayan, emo yanoi kérta. 13 Njam fém kérwén tamorwén féfenjo yaufiyam kénjún a ghéngan néfghofnar féfenjo fifiyan, Ngánjánam ghérsafé eyátoi mérne Kerisofé. Ngánján yawalindai téfene méinyotio yaufiyam. 14 Yémo yitérmboi téfene yaufiyammén férén a yénamndam wafatarégh wénan. 15 A wafatarégh wénan Kerisom engwayai wafté mbérmbére limánégh árta a si muyé árta. Fá nauyafoi kwayaghaye ndené yémo méinyotio té ewaindayéng. Sénonjo méinyotio árém té efandat ndené yéné yaufi mbérmbérafefaf yau yém wafté.
bt: All the fullness of the God is in Keriso, in his body, 10 and in Keriso he(God) have received you.p to full life. Keriso is the head over every powerful man and authority man. 11 In Keriso they cut skin of you.p, not the cutting skin is made by people, but the cutting skin made by Keriso, which is for freedom from this sinful power. 12 When you.p were baptized, you.p were buried with Keriso, and in baptism you.p were also raised with Keriso through your.p big mind(faith) in the power of God, who raised him from death. 13 When you.p were dead in your.p sins and in the without.cutting skin of your.p body, God made you.p alive with Keriso. God forgot all our sins. 14 He removed our sins's list and nailed it to the cross. 15 On the cross Keriso threw away the power from the bad spirits and authority people. He showed with light(clearly) that he has defeated them all. Now all the people are seeing that those bad spirits have no power.

nama: Yénémaménnde emo yau táf nák ewafrota ménamén fémofem némé enetati njamke o nu, o njúnnjúnofnar efoghmén o totér ghérare téméndmén o Safatmén. 17 Yéné yam em mbanmbanro kétán efalo némé so ténmorwén, wénde efalofifi siyém Keriso. 18 Yau eumyotati yéné ár efe norayat yaufi si féfefaf. Fá so norayat ndené yémofem efandat fénaté ghékéf waingégh a fémofem táf ewáwefnotati njafar si résagh árét. Fá nemnat fá kar em mer mat, wénde yéfene emarégh yéném yéné mbandmén. 19 Fá yau em Kerisoene, efe yém méinyotio fifioene sénko. Yesum ewáutáne yáne ár ménát sái karnyangi yémafé ndené fété fifioene sénkoyam méinyotio fifi kafekafe ewáutáne ménjérménjér árkamé em. Ndené ende yénd nanotam ndernáye Ngánján ménde yém yénd sái nanotam.
bt: Therefore do not let anyone make rules about what you.p eat or drink, or about without.dust(holy) days or the new moon feast or the Safat. 17 These things are only a shadow to what truly may come, but the reality is Keriso. 18 Do not let those people speak evil things against you.p. They will say that they saw other eye passing(vision) and you. must worship the heaven messengers(angels). They think they know better but their thought comes from the earth. 19 They are not of Keriso, who is the head of the whole body. Yesu helps his people to join with him as the body's head helps all the body part where veins are. In that way we grow how God wants us to grow.

nama: Fém kér té emormén Kerisofé a eyátoi yuwek kétamé limánégh mbérmbérafeta yéné mband maratmén. Yénémaménnde, némamén fém so emor ndené fém em yéné mband maratmén? Némamén fémofem ewaitotati yéné nák ndené, 21 "Yau yereta yéné! Yau tufo yéné! Yau tiyánja!"? 22 Yéné náknákam yufarotat ndenanit em mband maratmén rokar yénau engnetam a ngawaindangi, ménamén yéné sem ár wafroghmén náknákro, a watamegh em. 23 Yéné náknák ndenanit em kar nufrotat káfeté mwighayan, yéfenjo fifi ménde wáwefnogh yamafé, yéfene unyégh yuwan mwighafé a ewafrotat yaufi yéfene fifiyan, wénde ámb yau ewam yéfene wafté fifioene méndefaf waingéghét.
bt: You.p have died with Keriso and he set you.p free from the ruling spirits of this world. Therefore, why will you.p live like as you.p belong to this world? Why will you.p follow these rules as, 21 “Do not hold this! Do not taste this! Do not touch it!”? 22 These laws shows like a worldly things are used and passed, because these are only man made laws and teachings. 23 These rules are happening like from wisdom, with their body desiring worship, with their false low mind and they did bad to their bodies, but they have no power to overcome physical desires.

nama: Fém té nanoyénd Kerisofé, yénémaménnde ewafarenati tikfe njafarmén rokar, ánde Keriso námnjoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. 2 Ewafarenati féfenjo mwighaye njafarmén rokar, yau yéna mband maratmén rokar, 3 ménamén fém kér té emormén, a féfene ghérsé siyém etnong Kerisofé Ngánjánene kénjún. 4 Táf Keriso, efe yém féfene efalo ghérsé, njam kufarngé, fém wéi so em yémafé ndimbal kwayaghayan.
bt: You.p have been raised with Keriso, therefore set your heart on heavenly things, where Keriso sat down on the right hand of God. 2 Set your.p minds on heavenly things, not here earthly things, 3 because you.p died, and your.p life is hidden with Keriso in God. 4 When Keriso, who is your.p real life, appears, you.p will also be with him in big light(glory).

nama: Ekmetati krot féfene mband tikéf: yaufi wal, wáiwáiyam, méndméndro, yaufi mwighé a kwénjté, árké yém mewangot. 6 Yéné téfnan, Ngánjánene nékw so yéném. 7 Fém té tayotau yéné yaufi yamamé, fronde fém kés tamorwén. 8 Wénde sénonjo fém kékmbongi yéné yamta: nékw, kwérnar, méndménd, wasaligh, a yaufi si orayégh mbírmbíre. 9 Yau táf engwawinda ámb árfet, ménamén fémofem té ewitaménd féfene tándáwár ghérsé yéfenjo wafroghyamafayo. 10 Nawamanetati totér ghérsaye, árkéméné té nénamndai totér matyam kénjún yáne Wafrogh ároene mbanmbanan. 11 Yéné totér ghérsayan némé ámb yau yéna yém Téndo ár or Ju ár, ghéngan néfégh ár o ghéngan néféghofnar ár, dábi ár, áronjagh ár, faiofnar ásáfogh ár o yuwek ár, wénde Keriso siyém méinyotio, a fá yémor méinyotio kénjún.
bt: Put to death your.p earthly heart: bad sex, shameful things, hatred, evil thoughts and greedy, which is idolatry. 6 Because of these things, the anger of God will come. 7 You.p have being going through these bad things, first you.p used to be. 8 But now you.p stop from these things: anger, rage, malice, insult, and bad talk saying with your.p lips. 9 Do not tell lies to other people, because you.p have threw away your.p old life with its practices. 10 Put on the new life, which has become new in knowledge in the image of its Creator. 11 In this new life, there is nothing Side man or Ju man, cutting skin or without.cutting skin, foreigner, people walking around without house or farm(poor), without.payment working man(servant) or free, but Keriso is all, and he lives in all.

nama: Yénémaménnde, ndené fété Ngánjánene kaféghmén ár, njúnnjúnofnar a mindefifi uwéghkaf, nawamanetati fémyo yénaye ghérghérsisé, mer, yuwan ghérsé, merafé yam a métar. 13 Njam ámb féfene té ewam áwátaranégh ámb árfé, tawawalindangé yéfene yaufi ndené fété Yuré kés yawalindai féfene yaufi. Ámyogh ár aem ámb árfé a tawawalindangé yéfene yaufi. 14 A méinyotio yéné meryamfaf téfghangi uwégh, árké ménáyam taumbangé méinyotio yam ámbiro tikfan.
bt: Therefore, as Godʼs chosen people, without.dust(holy) and dearly loved, clothe yourselves with mercy, kindness, low life(humility), gentleness and patience. 13 If any of you has a complain with other people, forgive their sins just as the Lord forgave your sins. Be acceptable with other people and forget(forgive) their sins. 14 And to all these good things add love, which binds all the things in one heart.

nama: Kerisoene krufrátam so elimnde féfene tikéf, ménamén fém fifikafe em ámbiro fifiyan fém té enmotai yéné krufrátfaf féfe kénjún. A so em kánjo raméghafé. 16 Kerisoene si so yémor féfene kénjún afoghare ndené fété nawatametati a nawáutanati fémyo méinyotio sáfot káfeté mwighaye. Wagh yérametati Ngánjánefaf ménaye samse, wafnjagh wagh, a wagh Ngánján Mbérmbérta kánjo ramégh tikéfafé. 17 A némé fémofem njam ewafrotati o norayati, ewafrotati méinyotio Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan, yarametati kánjo ramégh Ngánján Afai yá kénjúmé. Efalo yátogh árfene mérén ghérsé
bt: The peace of Keriso will lead your.p hearts, because you.p are parts in one body he called you.p to this peace with one another. And should be thankful. 16 The talk of Keriso will live in you.p fully as you.p teach and help one another by all kind of wisdom. Give song to God with sams, holy songs(hymns), and songs from the God Spirit with thankful hearts. 17 And what you.p do or say, do all in the name of the Lord Yesu, giving thanks to God the Father through him. Family life of the approving truth people

nama: Amaf, náyáretati féfenjo árfefaf, yénéfai fémofem tawafrotangi ndené fété efalo yátogh ár.
bt: Wives, listen to your.p husbands, you.p should do this as approving truth people(believers).

nama: Ár, euwetati féfenjo amaf a yau táf tékrát em yéfefaf.
bt: Husbands, love your.p wives and do not make them suffer.

nama: Ambum, eyáretati féfene afaf a amaf méinyotio efghon, yénayan náuwete Yuré.
bt: Children, listen to your.p fathers and mothers in all the days, in this pleases the Lord.

nama: Afaf a amaf, yau nékwot eméindati ambumtértér, o fá so kuwembangi.
bt: Fathers and mothers, do not make children angry, or they will be discouraged.

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár, eyáretati féfenjo mbandmén yuré méinyotio yaman, a násáfotati, yau táfandro yéfene ghékfanro ménát yéfene ménde wifoghét, wénde násáfotati efalo tikfe árké yém Yuré férfér. 23 Némé ásáfogh njam yafrotati, násáfotati méinyotio féfene tikfe, ndené fété násáfotati Yurai, yau mbandmén yurai. 24 Nawafarotati ndené Yuram so tawaramangé fai féfe némé yémo té tawamnde yáne árét. Ménamén Keriso siyém efalofifi Yuré fém násáfotati yáyot. 25 Árké árom yafrote mámáfi so tinjongé wéndefai yánjo yaufimén, ménamén Ngánjánam moghan ekmete méinyotio ár ámbrérero.
bt: Without.payment working people(slaves), listen to your.p earthly owners in all the things, and work, not only in their eyes to satisfy their want, but work with true heart which is afraid of the Lord. 23 Whatever you.p do, work with all your.p heart, as working for the Lord, not for earthly lords, 24 Remember that the Lord will give you.p a reward what he has reserved for his people. Because Keriso is the true Lord you.p work for him. 25 Anyone who does wrong will see result of his sin, because God put every people in question(judgement) fairly.

nama: Yuré, ewawafrotati féfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árét mbarkándaye a ámbrérero, ménamén fém mat em ndené féfene Yuré wéi kété yém njafaran. Wéikor waufarogh yam
bt: Owners, do your.p without.payment working men(slaves) with straight and fair, because you.p know that you.p also have a Lord in heaven. Further telling things

nama: Kétan karamangi Ngánjánafé orayégh kénjút, ghékéf éregh aem a kánjo ramégh. 3 A Ngánjánafé norayati téfeyot wéi, ménát Ngánjánam so tésawérngé sésafne téfene si waitoghét, ménát yéndfem so yéngwaitotam Kerisoene kwankwane yam, yéné téfnan yénd wényau kwéfkwéf méngon. 4 Ngánjánafé norayati ménát yéndon so néngafrotan safénro, ndené yéndon so fété. 5 Kor káfeté mwighaye nawarawenati wafroghyaman yéfe tambén efe em efalo yátoghofnar, ewafrotati mere méinyotio ásáfogh féfene sem yémafé. 6 Féfene si fia túmén tam méndefé a wayamneghafé, ménat fémofem so tawaramangi mbarkánd uwangogh méinyotio árét. Ambinomén ásneghafé si
bt: Give yourselves into talking with God, holding eyes and giving thanks. 3 And talk with God for us too, so that God will open the door for our preaching the talk, so that we will preach the scret thing of Keriso, that is why I am in darkness house. 4 Talk with God that I can speak clear, as I should. 5 Be careful your action wisely toward those who are not approving truth people(believers), do good every working you.p have with them. 6 Your.p talk should always be pleasant and joyable, so that you will give the straight answer to every people. Final kissing(greeting) talk

nama: Tukikusém so ewaufrote méinyotio si tanemén. Fá siyém tane fútar, ndimbal mwighafé faiofnar ásáfogh ár yéndfé Yurane kénjún. 8 Yéndon yéngwáfáretan fá féfefaf ménát fém mat so em yénd ndernáye yénmor yéna a yémon so ewawéngsote féfene tikéf. 9 Fá enre yémafé Onesimusfé, téfene ndimbal mwighé kér ro fútar, efe wéi yém féfenjoyo. Yémofem so ewaufrot méinyotio némé nufrote yéna.
bt: Tukikus will tell you.p all the talk about me. He is my friend, a without.payment working man(servant) with big mind(faith) with us in the Lord. 8 I am sending him to you.p so that you.p will know how we.p are living here and he will encourage your.p hearts. 9 He is coming with Onesimus, our faithful friend, who is also one of you.p. They.d will tell you.p everything what is happening here.

nama: Aristakusém, emafé yénlaware yéndfé kwéfkwéf méngon, engwawatembete ásneghafé si, a Makém wéi, efe yém Banabasene yákal. (Fémofem té náyárayénd si yánemén, fá njam yéném féfefaf táf tumyongi.) 11 Yesu, efe yémndetat Jéstus, wéi engwawatembete ásneghafé si. Yéné nambio ár fáro Ju ármén em tane ásáfogh árfefaf Ngánjánene limánégh kénjút, a fá té tam ndimbal wáutárégh ár tayot. 12 Efafras, efe ámb yém féfenjoyo a Keriso Yesuene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, engwawatembete ásneghafé si. Fá túmén yakai Ngánjánafé oraighan féfe téfnan, ménát fém so taikrataye ewakai Ngánjánene méndefaf, ndené fété sotafé efalo yátogh ár Keriso kénjún. 13 Yénd nafrotan yánemén fá minde násáfote féfeyot a yéfeyot efe em Laodikia yuwon a Ierafolis yuwon. 14 Téfene fútar Luk, efe yém njokté, a Demas, yémofem ásneghafé si engwawatembend féfe. 15 Tawaram tane ásneghafé si yéfe fútarét Laodikia yuwon, a amaf Nimfa a Yesuene mérnat efe náumendat yáne méngon.
bt: Aristakus, who entered in darkness house with me, sends greeting talk, and Mak also, who is the cousin of Banabas. (You have heard the talk about him, when he comes to you.p, welcome him.) 11 Yesu, whom they call Jèstus, also sends greeting talk. These three people are the only Ju people among my working men into the ruling of God, and they have been a big helpful men to me. 12 Efafras, who is one of you.p and a without.payment working man(servant) of Keriso Yesu, sends greeting talk. He always stands in talking with God(prayer) for you.p, so that you.p will stand strongly to the will of God, as strong people who truly approve(believers) in Keriso. 13 I testify about him he is working hard for you.p and for those who are at Laodikea place and Ierafolis place. 14 Our friend Luk, who is a doctor, and Demas, they.d send greeting talk to you.p. 15 Give my greeting talk to them friends at Laodikea place, and to woman Nimfa and the Yesu's family(church) who gather in her house.

nama: Soramé fémofem yaftati yéné férén, mat aem ndené yaftati wéi Laodikia Yesuene mérnan. Yéné efghonyo, yaftati tane férén efalo yátogh árét Laodikia yuwon yémofem so tawawatembangi féfe.
bt: After you.p read this letter, you.p must know that it is also read in the Yesu's family(church) at Laodikea. At the same time, read my letter to the approving truth people(believers) in Laodikea place they will send it to you.p.

nama: Taufrongi Akifuse: "Sia tifongé yéné ásáfogh árké Yuram yéramai fe."
bt: Tell Akifus: “Finish that work which Lord give you.s.”

nama: Yénd, Fol, yéfarotan yéné ásneghafé si tanjo ngángaye. Wafarotati Ngánjánafé orayégh tayot njam yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon. Ngárám so yém féfefaf.
bt: I, Fol, write this greeting talk in my own hand. Remember to pray for me while I am in the darkness house. Grace be with you.p.

nama: Yéné férén siyém yéfeta Fol, Sailes a Timoti. Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné kétán Tesalonika árfefaf efe em Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún. So ngárám a krufrát yém féfeyot. Kánjo ramégh yéfeyot Tesalonika árfeyot ndimbal mwighamén
bt: This letter is from them Fol, Sailès and Timoti. We are writing this to Tesalonika people who is in the Father God and the Lord Yesu Keriso. May Grace and peace be for you.p. Thanksgiving for them Tesalonika people's big mind(faith)

nama: Yéndfem túmén kánjo Ngánjáne yarametam méinyotio féfenemén a engwafarotam téfene Ngánjánafé orayégh kénjún. 3 Yéndfem túmén ewafarotam téfene Afé Ngánjánene sáfan fémofem ndernáye féfene ndimbal mwighé yékmetati wafroghyaman, féfene uwégham ndernáye yékém táikér ásáfoghét, a ndernáye féfene méghmégh sotafé yém téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún.
bt: We always give thanks to God because of all of you.p and remember you.p in our talking with God. 3 We always remember in face of our Father God how you.p put your.p big mind(faith) into action, how your.p love put you.p work hard, and how your.p hope is strong in our Lord Yesu Keriso.

nama: Fútaréf, yénd mat yéném Ngánjánam euwete fém a ewaferyéng fém yandio. 5 Njam yéndfem enwarsamém féfeyot mer si, mé siro yau wénde waftafé a Ngánján Mbérmbérafé a kénjkam efalo yátoghafé. Fém mat em yénd ndernáye ténmorangérwén féfene kénjún féfe téfnan. 6 Fém nufénmetati téfeta a Yuré. Ndemamén fém tamorwén minde kérté yaman, fémofem yumyoyénd si áuwéghafé árké yéramai Ngánján Mbérmbéram. 7 Yénémaménnde, fém nénamndayénd waufarogh ár méinyotio efalo yátogh árét Makedonia a Akaya yuwon. 8 Yurane si marat náyátoi féfeta, yau kétándmaro Makedonia a Akaya yuwon, wénde féfene ndimbal mwighé Ngánján kénjún té namndai marat méinyotio yuwomé. Féyo yénd yau so némé norayam yénémamén. 9 Méinyotio ár norayat ménamén ndernáye fémofem yénd yénmumyoyénd yéndfem njam eyafoyém, a ndernáye fém nawengoyénd kétándmé mewang wáwefnoghta akegh a efalo Ngánjáne ásáfoghét 10 a sái yánjetam ménát yáne Ambum sái nénangota njafarta- yáne Ambum Yesu, fá efe yanoi kérta a emo yénmanjane yénd Ngánjánene nékwta árkéméné yéném.
bt: Friends, we know God loves you.p and has chosen you.p to be his. 5 When we brought the good talk for you.p, not with only talk but with power and the God Spirit and deep true approving. You.p know how we lived among you.p for your.p reason. 6 You.p imitated us and Lord. Even though you were strong suffering things, you.p received the talk with joy that God Spirit gave. 7 Therefore, you.p became the showing people for all the believer in Makedonia and Akaya region. 8 The Lord's talk became wide from you.p, not only Makedonia and Akaya, but your.p big mind(faith) in God has become wide everywhere. So we don't need to say about it. 9 Every people speak that how you.p received us when we visited you.p, and how you.p turned away from worshipping idols to work for living and true God 10 and to wait for his Son to come from heaven- his Son Yesu, whom he raised from death and who saves us from God's anger which is coming.

nama: Fútaréf, fém fémyo mat em ndené téfene yafogh féfefaf yau témorwén fifiofnar. 2 Fém mat em nderé mámáfie yénd ténmanjetawét Filifi yuwon, soramé yénd nénwanongém féfefaf minde tékrát tayaretam yéndfem kété. Wénde téfene Ngánjánam muyé yénmaramayéng yáne mer si waitoghét féfefaf marataye férférofnar ndemamén yénd mék téfnáram yénmarendayénd. 3 Fémofem té yéfandati yéndfem yau si táitotam unyégh a yaufi mwighafé o tawasotam. 4 Yénd korayawém ndené fété si résagh ár efe Ngánjánam efalo té yényátoi mer si waitoghét. Téfene téfén siyém Ngánján áuwéghét sái yéméindam, yau ár, mé Ngánjánamro yénmamanyote téfene tikfan. 5 Fém mer mat em ndené yénd yau awarmbogh si korayam ámb ároenemén, yénd yau kawafnam téfene fútaréf ménát fémofem mani sái ténmarametawét. Ngánján mat yém ndené yéné siyém efalo. 6 Yénd yau ménát néretam árém sái yénmuwetat, yau fémofem o ámb árém, 7 ndené fété Kerisoene muyafé ár, yénd féyotaro yéném ámb emnengégh sái yafrotam féfefaf. Wénde yénd téném métar féfene kénjún, ndenéyame amam nau yánjo ambum ewarawene. 8 Yéndfem táuwetam fém mindefifi, yénémamén yéndfem tawarametam féfeyot Ngánjánene mer siro yau, wénde téfene ghérsé ámnjoghmén ndenáyo. 9 Fútaréf, nawafarotati nderé mélmélafé yénd kásáfotam féfefaf. Sémbáran a efghon yéndfem mani ásáfoghan mélmél téfandawém téfendio mer ghérsé ámnjoghét ménát yéndfem yau so kérté féfe ewarametam Ngánjánene mer si waitoghan féfeyot.
bt: Friends, you.p yourselves know that our visit to you.p was not without.meaning. 2 You.p know how badly they treat us in Filifi region, before we came to you.p we had held strong suffering there. But our God gave us power to preach his good talk to widely to you.p without.fear even though we enemy surrounded us. 3 You.p had seen we didn't preach lying or bad mind or trick you.p. 4 We speak as people carrying talk who God had approved to preach the good talk. Our reason is making God happy, not people, only God [who] checks our hearts. 5 You.p know well that we didn't say lifting talk about other man, we didn't cover up our friends in order that you.p give money to us. God knows that this is true. 6 We were not looking people praise us, not you.p or other people, 7 as men who has Keriso's authority(apostle), we can demand so to you. But we were quiet in you.p, like that a mother takes care of her children. 8 We loved you.p so much, so we gave you.p not only God's good talk, but our lives as well. 9 Friends, remember how with sweat we worked for you.p. In the night and day we saw sweat in working for money for our good life so that we would not give a burden to you in preaching the good talk to you.p.

nama: Fém fété téfene fandagh ár em, a ndenéyameyo Ngánján wéi, téfene wafroghyam yém mbarkánd, mer a téfnofnar féfefaf emofem efalo yiyátoyénd. 11 Fém mat em yéndfem efrendam fém méinyotio ndenéyame afam ambum nau efrende. 12 Yéndfem fém ewamnendam, fém ewawongsótam a ewendam féfene mer ghérsé ámnjoghét yéné ende Ngánján ndernáye ménde yém. Ménamén Ngánjánam emotai fém yáne limánégh a ndimbal kwayaghafaf.
bt: You.p are our watching man, and also is God, our actions is straight, good and without.blame to you.p who truly approved(believed). 11 You.p know we treated all of you.p just as a father treat with [his] children. 12 We begged you.p, we encouraged you.p and urged you.p to live good lives in this way how God wants. Because God called you.p into his kingdom and big light(glory).

nama: Yénémamen, yénd yau so kékmbongém kánjo si Ngánjáne, njam fémofem yumyoyénd yáne mer si téfe tambén, fém yau kemnawét téfene simén ndené árfene mwighamén si kar yém, wénde efalo fété Ngánjánene si yém, árké yém ásáfoghan féfene kénjún emofem efalo yiyátotat. 14 Fútaréf, fém ufénmanégh ár náyátoyénd Yesuene mérnan Judia kénjún, árké em Keriso Yesu kénjún. Fém tékrátan takmetawét féfenjo yumén árém ndenéyameyo yéné Yesuene mérén kés tékrátan takmetawét Ju árém. 15 Yémofem esmetaménd Yuré Yesu a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, a wéi yénésmetat yénd. Yémofem Ngánján áuwéghofnar yiyátoyénd a ndenéyameyo ár wéi áuwéghofnar. 16 Yémofem yéta yénékmbotat mer wanjarégh simén Téndo árfeyot waitoghét. Yéné ende yémofem túmén farufaru efayotat yéfenjo yaufi. Wénde Ngánjánene nékwam soramé ewerai. Folene ménde Tesalonika ár fandaghét
bt: Therefore, we will not stop thanks talk to God, when you.p received his good talk from us, you.p didn't think about our talk as the talk from people's thought, but really the talk of God is, which is at work in you.p who truly approve(believe). 14 Friends, you.p became imitating people of Yesu's families(churches) in Judia, which are in Keriso Yesu. Your.p people put in suffering to you the same things those the Ju people put the Yesu's families(churches). 15 They killed the Lord Yesu and the God's people who make know(prophets), and also have persecuted us. They became without.joy to God and also people without.joy. 16 They tried to stop preaching good saving talk to the Side people. In this way they always piled up their sin on top. But God's anger has come on them later. Fol's desiring to see the Tesalonika people

nama: Fútaréf, yénd soramé nófárnayém féfe tambén némbne efoghfénefénetro(wénde téfene tikfam fém yau efrangoyéng), yénd yéta kénufotam angoghét ménát féfe fandaghét. 18 Yénd ndimbal ménde ténmorwén féfefaf álighét, yénd, Fol yéta kufotawén angoghét féréghféréghe, wénde Sáifram yénd mé ténékmbotawéng. 19 Ménamén némé yam téfe yénmaramete méghmégh a áuwégh, a némé so yém téfene fai a ákiki árkéménáyan yénd mérne so yénmakai táf téfene Yuré Yesu njam nénangota? Féfefaf yéné yémǃ 20 Néméwét, fém em téfene ndimbal kwayaghé a áuwégh.
bt: Friends, after we were seperated from you.p for a short time(but our heart don't leave you.p), we try to make effort to go to see you.p. 18 We really wanted to go to you.p, I, Fol tried to go back again and again, but Sáifèr were stopping us. 19 For what gives hope and joy to us, and what will be our reward and the crown in which we will stand together when our Lord Yesu comes? It is you.p. 20 Yes, You.p are our big light(glory) and joy.

nama: Wénde njam Timoti té nénangotam, yémon yénérsam téfeyot mer si féfene ndimbal mwighamén a uwéghmén. Fá kafrotau ndené fémofem túmén yénmawafarotati téfene yafogh áuwéghafé, ndené fém ménde em téfe fandaghét ndené fété yénd ménde yéném féfe fandaghét. 7 Yénémaménnde, fútaréf, méinyotio téfene ndémke a tékrát kénjún, yénd muyafé namndayém féfenemén ménamén féfene ndimbal mwighé. 8 Ménamén sénonjo yénd efalo ghérsaye yénmor njam fém mé taikrataye enwakai Yurane kénjún. 9 Ndernáye yéndfem kánjo yarametam Ngánjáneyot féfeneménǃ Ménamén féfenemén téfefaf yém ndimbal áuwégh ndené kés nényawetam Ngánjánene sáfrére. 10 Sémbáran a efghon yéndfem yamnendam fá méinyotio téfene tikfe ménát yéndfem sái kor tawinjongém fém a tawaramangém némé féfene ndimbal mwighé kénjún náláite.
bt: But when Timoti had come back, he brought good talk to us about your.p big mind(faith) and love. He told that you.p always remembered our visit with joy, that you.p want to see us just as we want to see you.p. 7 Therefore, friends, in all our pain and suffering, we have became strong about you.p because of your.p big mind(faith). 8 Because now we really live if you.p are standing strongly in the Lord. 9 How we thank God for you! Because of you we have great joy as we enter God's presence. 10 In night and day we ask him with all our heart to let us see you.p again and give what is lacking in your.p big mind(faith).

nama: So téfene Afé Ngánjánam yémonyo a téfene Yuré Yesum end yéfrende téfeyot ménát féfefaf sái yéném. 12 So Yuram yanote a yafarne féfene uwégh fémrofémro kénjún a méinyotio árét, ndené fété téfene uwégh féfeyot kés yafarnam. 13 Ndené yameyo yémon so muyé ewaramete, a fém so em téfnofnar a njúnnjúnofnar téfene Afé Ngánjánene sáfrére táf njam téfene Yuré Yesu yéném yémafé méinyotio efe yáne em.
bt: May our Father God himself and our Lord Yesu prepare the way for us to come to you.p. 12 May the Lord make your.p love increase and spread out for each other and for every people, just as our love spread out for you.p. 13 In the same way he will make you.p strong, and you.p will be without.reason and without.dust(holy) in the presence of our Father God when our Lord Yesu comes with all who belong to him.

nama: Fútaréf, wifoghan yéndfem ewatametamém ndernáye fém so emor ménát Ngánján áuwéghét sái yéméindati, ndené fété fém kés emor. Sénonjo yéndfem ewamnendam fém a ewendam fém Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan ménát sái yafrotati túmén. 2 Ménamén fém mat em némé yéndfem ewatametamém fém ménaye Yuré Yesuene muyaye.
bt: Friends, finally we taught you.p how to live in order to make God joy, as already you.p are living. Now we ask you.p and urge you.p in the name of the Lord Yesu to do continually. 2 For you.p know what we taught you.p by the power of the Lord Yesu.

nama: Ngánján ménde yém fém sái em njúnnjúnofnar, féyo fémofem so ekarotati yaufi wal yam. 4 Fém so fété mat em ndernáye fém so emor féfenjo amafafé njúnnjúnofnar a utmanégh ende, 5 yau wal yam mwighé afoghkaf aem mband árnit, efe mafina em Ngánján. 6 Yéné yaman, emo yau táf yáfútar mámáfi yafrota o yáne mer sái yérsa yaufie. Yuram so tékrátan tákmangé ár méinyotio yéné yaufimén, ndernáye yéndfem té taikrataye emndetamém fém frondeyo. 7 Ngánjánam yau yénmotai yénd yaufi ghérsé ámnjoghét, wénde njúnnjúnofnar ghérsé ámnjoghét. 8 Emon yéné watamegh si njam ekarota yau ároene em, wénde Ngánjánene, emo yéramai féfe Ngánján Mbérmbér.
bt: God want you.p should be without.dust(holy), so you.p should avoid sexual immorality. 4 You.p should know how to live with your.p wife in a without.dust(holy) and respectful way, 5 don't fill with sexual thought like earthly people, who do not know God. 6 In this thing, none of you.p should do wrong his friends or make them doing sin. The Lord will put in suffering all people about theose sins, as we strongly told you.p before. 7 God did not call us to live in sinful life, but to live a without.dust(holy) life. 8 Whoever rejects this teaching talk is not to a man, but to God, who gives you.p God Spirit.

nama: Ámb yéna mwighé yau yém téfe faroghét uwéghmén féfenjo kénjún, ménamén Ngánjánamyo fém té tawatamete uwéghmén féfenjo kénjún. 10 Efaloe, fémofem té tanuyafotati féfenjo uwégh méinyotio fútarfefaf Makedonia yuwomé. Fútaréf, wénde yéndfem fém ewamnendam fémofem miya engéuwetati fá mindefifi. 11 Mé yéngwafrotati yéné uwégh ásáfogh métar ghérsé ámnjoghe, fém náreindati ásáfoghan féfenjo ngángaye, ndené fété yéndfem fém té ewawéngsotamém frondeyo, 12 ménát ámb ár efe yau em efalo yátogh ár so eutémndat fém, a fém yau so namnyotati ámb árfefaf némat ménde em. Yurane anogh
bt: There is no thought for us to write to you.p about love each other, because only God have taught you.p about loving each other. 10 In fact, you.p have overflow your.p love to all friends throughout Makedonia area. Friends, but we beg you.p to love them so much. 11 Keep doing this loving work with a quiet life, you.p keep on working hard with your.p hands, as we have encouraged you.p before, 12 so that other people who are not believers will respect you.p, and you.p will not depend on any people for what you.p need. Lord's coming

nama: Fútaréf, yénd ménde yéném fém mat kamndangi némé so nufrote efalo yátogh ár efe kér emorméng, ménát fém yau so ghérghérsisayan em ndenanit endefene méghmégh yau em. 14 Ménamén yéndfem efalo yiyátotam ndené Yesu kér yémormén a nanoi ghérsat, féyo yéndfem efalo yiyátotam ndené njam Yesu nénangota, Ngánjánam so enwangote ghérsat yémafé Yesufé efalo yátogh ár efe kér emorméng.
bt: Friends, we want you.p to know what will happen to the believers who died, so that you.p will not in sadness like as people who have no hope. 14 For we truly approve(believe) that Yesu died and rose to life, so we truly approve(believe) that when Yesu come back, God will bring back to life with Yesu the believers who have died.

nama: Yéndfem némé ewatametam sénonjo siyém Yurane watamegh: yénd efe sái ghérsé yéném yéné efghon Yuré sái yéném yau so yéngém yéfe frondeyo efe té kér emormén. 16 Féyo Yuré fáyo so kéneworngé njafarta, njafar si résagh sénko árfene kém a Ngánjánene sufér kefé, a kér téfnár Kerisoe kénjún so kanongi fronde. 17 Yéné soramé, yénd efe mé sái ghérsé yéném a ténéfrangongi so kété káumendangém yémafé njafar kwamkwaman ménát Yuré sái téfángongém njafaran. Féyo yénd so mérne Yurafé yéném tuot. 18 Yénémamén féfenjo kénjúnro néwéngsotati yéné sie.
bt: What we are teaching you.p now is the Lord's teaching: we who are alive on this day the Lord comes will not go ahead of those who have died. 16 Then the Lord himself will come down from heaven, with the voice of the head man carrying heavenly message(angels) and with the trumpet call of God, and the dead people in Keriso will rise first. 17 After that, we who are still alive and left will meet together with them in the clouds in order that we meet the Lord in the sky. So we will be with the Lord forever. 18 Therefore encourage one another with these talks.

nama: Fútaréf, ámb yéna mwighé yau yém téfe faroghét féfeyot njam a árké efghon so nufrote. 2 Ménamén fém mer mat em Yurane angogh efoghmén so sélngwéle yém, ndenanit so yém oro téfnár nau yéném sémbáran. 3 Njam ár norayat, "Méinyotio yam srem krufrátro em a awanjaréghafé, " féyo táf kérté so kuyangé yéfefaf ndenanit amafom nau kérté tayarangé ambum ráfghan, a kété ámb awanjarégh yau so yém.
bt: Friends, there is no thought for us to write you.p when and which days will happen. 2 For you.p know well the day of the Lord will come surprisingly, like as a stealing man will come in the night. 3 When people say, "All the things are peace and safety," then suddenly pains will come on them as pains comes on a pregnant woman, and there will be no escape.

nama: Fútaréf, wénde fém kwéfkwéfan yau em yéné yam ufroghmén a fém yau so sélngwél em njam Yurane efogh kawarangé ndenanit oro téfnár nau kénuwanongé. 5 Fém méinyotio em kwayaghane ambum a efghoene ambum. Yénd yau yéném sémbároene o kwéfkwéfoene. 6 Yénémaménnde, yau so ndenanit yéném ámb kés em, efe kémégh ekém, wénde fém anoghkaf so em a so nawamarotati. 7 Sémbár táf ár kémégh yékém, a sémbár táf wériafé káyátongi. 8 Wénde yénd efe kwayaghan yéném so nawarawenam, yénd so nawotam ndimbal mwighé a uwégh ndené wéf wambégh sáláme a wanjarégh méghmégh ndené walaf. 9 Ngánjánam yénd yau yénmaféryéng ménát yáne nékwan sái yéném wénde yéndfem yanayém wanjarégh téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjúmé. 10 Keriso kér yémormén téfeyot, téu ghérsé yéném o kér táf Yesu sái nénangota, yénd so yénmor tuot yémafé. 11 So néwéngsotati féfenjo kénjún a nawáutánati ndenéyameyo, ndené fété sénonjo kés nufrotati. Folene soramamén wawanjagh si
bt: Friends, but you.p are not in darkness about this things happening and you.p will not surprised when Lord's day come like a stealing man come. 5 You.p are all children of the light and children of the day. We do not belong to the night or to the darkness. 6 So then, let us not be like others, who are asleep, but you.p should be awake and watch out. 7 At night people should sleep, and at night they become drunk. 8 But who we are in the light will watch out, we will put on big mind(faith) and love as a breast protecting cloth and the hope of salvation as a hat. 9 God did not choose us to come into his anger but we receive salvation through our Lord Yesu Keriso. 10 Keriso died for us, whether living or died when Yesu comes, we may live together with him. 11 Should encourage one another and help same way, just as now you.p are doing. Fol's final instructions

nama: Fútaréf, utémndati fá efe em féfene limánégh ár Yurane ásáfogh kénjún. Fá minde násáfotat féfene kénjún a ewarametat mbérmbére wamarogh. 13 Ewauyafotati ndimbal utmanégh a uwégh ménamén yéfene ásáfoghmén. Krufrát ghérsaye aemor.
bt: Friends, respect those who are your.p leading menin the Lord's work. They work hard among you.p and give you spiritual guidance. 13 Show them big respect and love because of their work. Live in peace.

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem ewamnendam fém so ewendam efe em imángéghofnar. So ewawéngsotam efe férfér em. So ewáutánam efe em njangénnjangén. Métar aem méinyotio árfé. 15 Ndené yaufie yau so néwangotati, wénde túmén mer ewafrotati ámb árét a méinyotio árét.
bt: Friends, we beg you.p to warn who are without.moving(idly). Encourage you.p who are afraid. Help those who are weak. Be patient with every people. 15 Don't pay back with wrong, but always do good to other people and to every people.

nama: Túmén áuwéghan aem. 17 Ngánjánafé orayégh túmén. 18 Kánjo si kér ro aem méinyotio yaman, ménamén yéné siyém Ngánjánene ménde féfeyot Keriso Yesu kénjún.
bt: Always be in joy. 17 Talk with God always. 18 Be thankful in all things, because this is God's will for you.p in Keriso Yesu.

nama: Yau yékmbotati Ngánján Mbérmbéroene fés. 20 Yau ekenati ufrogh yammén si, 21 wénde ufoghan ekmetati méinyotio némé korayau, naweretati yéné sian árké mer yém, 22 ekenati méinyotio yaufi yam.
bt: Don't extinguish the fire of the God Spirit. 20 Do not deny inspired talks, 21 but put in the test everything that is said; hold this talk which is good, 22 reject all evil things.

nama: So Ngánjánam emo ténmaramangé téfe krufrát táyátongé fém njúnnjúnofnar méinyotio yaman. So ewarawene féfene mbérmbér, mwighé a fifi téfnofnar táf téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso yáne angoghan. 24 Ngánjánam so ewafrote yéné yam, ménamén Ngánján emo fém emotai siyém ndimbal mwighé kér ro.
bt: May the God who gives us peace make you.p without.dust(holy) in every way. May your.p spirit, mind and body be kept without.blame at the coming of our Lord Yesu Keriso. 24 God will do this thing, because God who called you.p is full of big mind(faithful).

nama: Fútaréf, Ngánjánafé norayati téfeyot. 26 Áuwégh enguyafotati méinyotio fútar uweghe. 27 Yéndon ewamnendan fém Yurane yétkwénan yéné férén wafghét méinyotio fútarfefaf.
bt: Friends, talk with God for us. 26 Greet all friends with the love. 27 I urge you.p by the name of the Lord to read this letter to all friends.

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
bt: The grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso be with you.p.

nama: Yéné férén siyém yéfeta Fol, Sailes a Timoti. Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné kétán Yesuene mérénfaf Tesalonika kénjún téfene Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún:
bt: This letter is from them Fol, Sailès and Timoti. We are writing to the Yesu's family(church) in Tesalonika in our Father God and the Lord Yesu Keriso:

nama: So Afé Ngánjánam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom tawaramangé ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Kánjo ramégh a orayégh Ngánjánefaf
bt: May the Father God and the Lord Yesu Keriso give you.p grace and peace. Thanksgiving and talking with God

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem so fété kánjo yarametam Ngánjáne méinyotio efghon féfeyot. Yéné siyém mbarkánd téfeyot ménát wafroghét, ménamén féfene ndimbal mwighé nanote ndimbale a uwégh árkéménáyafé méinyotio fém em ámb árét nanote ndimbale. 4 Yéné téfnan yénd yéndio mere féfenemén mé néngorayam Ngánjánene Yesuene mérén kénjún. Yénd mé néngorayam mere ndernáye ende fémofem ewaindati a efalo eyátotai méinyotio wasérmbogh a tékrát fémofem árké efandati.
bt: Friends, we must give thanks to God at all times for you.p. This is straight for us to do, because your.p big mind(faith) is growing so much and the love which all of you.p has for the other people is growing so much. 4 In this reason we ourselves keep on speaking well about you.p in the Yesu's families(churches) of God. We keep on speaking well how you.p endure and truly approve(believe) through all the persecutions and sufferings which you.p are seeing.

nama: Méinyotio yéné yam efalo yiyátote ndené Ngánjánene mogh siyém mbarkánd, a ménát fém so féyotaro em Ngánján limánéghfaf, yénémamén fém tékrátan em. 6 Ngánján siyém mbarkánd: Yémon so ekmete kértayan fá emofem tékrátan ekmetat fém. 7 A Ngánjánam so tawaramangé enagh féfeyot efe fém té tam tékrátan, a téfeyot ndenéyameyo. Yémon so yafrote yéné táf njam Yuré Yesu kufarngé kétamé njafarta yánjo muyé kér ro njafar si résagh árfé, 8 fés arangafé, ménát tékrátan sái tákmangé fá emofem tékenat Ngánján a fá emofem yau káyáretat mer si téfene Yuré Yesuenemén. 9 Fá so ambino tékrátan tákmangé tuot, tafalongé kétamé Yurata a yánjo ndimbal kwayaghé waftata. 10 Njam fá nénangota sái tanangé ndimbal kwayaghé, a uyogh yánjo efalo yátogh ár tambén. Fém kété so em yéfene kénjún, ménamén fémofem efalo yiyátotati némé té ewaufroyém yánemén.
bt: All this thing approves that Godʼs judgment is straight, and so that you.p will be able to be to the ruling of God, because of this you.p are in suffering. 6 God is straight: He will put them in trouble to those who put you.p in trouble. 7 And God will give rest to you.p who are in trouble, and to us as well. He will do this when the Lord Yesu appears from heaven with his powerful men carrying heavenly message(angels), 8 with a flaming fire, to put in pain those who reject God and those who do not obey the good talk about our Lord Yesu. 9 He will put them in final pain forever, separated from the Lord and from his power with big light. 10 When he comes he will receive big light(glory), and honor from his approving truth people. You.p will be there among them honor Yesu in these days, because you.p have truly approved(believed) what we told you.p about him.

nama: Yénémaménnde, yénd mé noraiwam Ngánjánafé féfeyot ndené téfene Ngánjánam so eyátote efalo ghérsayan kétán ándan yémon emotai fém. Yénd noraiwam Ngánjánafé ndené Ngánjánam so yánjo waftaye ewafrote méinyotio féfene ménde a ndimbal mwighamén wafroghyam. 12 Yéné téfnan, árém so yuyotat Yuré Yesuene yétkwén ménamén fém ndernáye emor. Wéi fémofem so yuyotati, ménamén fém Yesuene em. Yéné méinyotio afrátaye em ménamén téfene Ngánjánene a Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárámmén.
bt: Therefore, we continue to talk with God(pray) for you.p that our God will make you.p true life to where he called you.p. We talk with God that God will do by his power all your.p desire and work of big mind(faith). 12 As a result, people will praise our Lord Jesus because of how you live. You also will receive praise, because you belong to Jesus. All this is possible because the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem so ewaufrotam ménamén téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene wéikor angoghmén a ndernáye méinyotio yénd so náumendam mérne yá fángoghét. 2 Yau mé nasambnetati o néwérsotati yéfenemén efe néngafrotat ndené Yurane angogh té nufar. Yau táf efalo eyátotati fá njam néngafrotat ndené yémofem té téfandat ghékéf waingégh, o ufrogh si, o táf férén njam té téngém téfe tambén. 3 Yau táf ewasotat ámb árém ámb endmé. Ménamén yéné efogh mé yau so yéném kétánotio ndimbal asénanégh Ngánjánefaf a nákofnar ár so kufarngé, efe Ngánjánam so yasérmbote. 4 Yémon so eséne a fá so nawarmbote fáyo méinyotio rokaran árké árém yanmotat ndené ngánján a méinyotio wáwefnoghmén rokar. Fá so kámnjongé Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngon, namndeta ndené fáro kar yém Ngánján.
bt: Friends, we will say about coming again of our Lord Yesu Keriso and how all of us will gather together to meet him. 2 Don't be shaken or alarmed by those who say that Lord's coming has reached. Don't truly approve(believe) them if they claim that they have seen a eye passover thing(vision), or revealing talk, or a letter came from us. 3 Do not let anyone deceive you in any way. For that day will not come until there is a big fight against God and the man of without.law appear, whom God will destroy. 4 He will oppose and will lift himself over everything that people call god and every object of worship. He will sit in Godʼs worshipping house, claiming that he himself is God.

nama: Nawafarotati yéndo ndernáye tangémndetan njam yénd fémafé témorwén. 6 A fém mat em némé yam fá yangote, ménát so kété kufarngé yáne efogh njam kawerangé. 7 Yéné nákofnaye ásáfogh siyém ásáfoghan yém kwankwane, a so mé yém kwankwane kétánotio yéné ár emo mé yérete sái kitérmbongé yéné sifayata. 8 Féyo nákofnaye ár sof kufarngé, efe Yuré Yesum so yésmete yánjo sénféne amboneye a tirorngé yánjo angoghmén ndimbal kwayaghaye. 9 Yéné yaufi ár so yéném sái yafrota ásáfogh Sáiférene unyégh waftaye a ufarogh yame a sélngwélafé yame. 10 Yémon so ewafrote fénaté sáfot unyégh yam ménát sái ewasota fá efe em kétán tékrátfaf, ménamén fá kakenawét ménát sái tuwetawét a tumyongayénd efalo árkéménayan so kunjarngai fá. 11 Yéné téfnan Ngánjánam engwáfárete waftafé warsogh yéfefaf ménát yémofem so efalo eyátotat yéné unyégh. 12 Féyo fá so tákmangé tékrátan emofem yau efalo tiyátotat efalo si wénde káreindat yaufiyam wafroghan. Taikrataye aewakai
