bt: Rememer how I tell you.p when I was with you.p. 6 And you.p know what is holding him back, so that he may appear when his day comes. 7 For this without.law work is already at work secretly, and it will remain secret until the one who is holding it back stepts out of the place. 8 Then the without.law man will appear, whom the Lord Yesu will kill with the breath of his mouth and destroy him by the big light(glory) of his coming. 9 This evil man will come to do the work with lying power of Sáifèr and showing things(signs) and surprisong things(wonders). 10 He will do different shape of evil lying thing to deceive them who are to the punishment, because they refused to love and accept the truth that would save them. 11 For this reason God sends them a powerful deceive to them so that they will truly approve(believe) these lies. 12 So he will put them in pain who have not truly approved(believed) the true talk but caused doing evils. Stand firm

nama: Ndené téfeyot yéndfem túmén kánjo yarametam Ngánjáne féfe téfnan, áuwéghafé fútaréf Yuram efe euwete. Yénd yéném kánjo raméghafé ndené Ngánjánam ewaferyéng fém sái em yéfefafmé efe em fronde, ménát so mat náyátotati wanjaréghmén árké yénmormén Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé emo eyátote njúnnjúnofnar a féfene efalo yátogh kénjúmé efaloyan. 14 Yémon ewanmoi fém wanjarghét táf yéndfem njam tawaufrotawém mer si; sénonjo fém so ewafnyang Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ndimbal kwayaghé kénjún.
bt: As for us we continue to give thanks to God in the reason of you.p, loving friends whom Lord loves. We are always giving thanks that God chose you.p to be among them who are the first, to know salvation which came through God Spirit who makes you.p without.dust(holy) and through your.p truly approvement(belief) in the truth. 14 He called you.p to salvation when we told you.p the good talk; now you.p can share in the big light(glory) of our Lord Yesu Keriso.

nama: Tane fútaréf, méinyotio yéné aem mwighayan, taikre ewakai a kawerangi taikrataye yénayan méinyotio yéndfem némé tawatametam fém si afroghe a férne.
bt: My friends, be all these in mind, stand firm and hold fast on what we taught you by preaching and by letter.

nama: So téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso a Ngánján téfene Afé, emo yénmuwetam yénd a yáne ngáráme yénmaramai tuot akegh wáutárégh a mer méghmégh, 17 ewamarotati féfenjo tikéf a so ewaramete muyé méinyotio meryam kénjún fémofem némé ewafrotati a norayati.
bt: May our Lord Yesu Keriso and God our Father, who loved us and by his grace gave us eternal living help and a good hope, 17 comfort your.p heart and give power in every good thing what you.p do and say.

nama: Ambinomén, tane áuwéghafé fútaréf, yéndfem ewamnendam fém ménát sái norayati Ngánjánafé téfeyot. Norayati Ngánjánafé fronde ménát Yurane si so marat náyátote wékeye a so yutémndat yénamé árkamé so yéngém, ndené fété ndernáye yénmormén féfefaf. 2 Norayati Ngánjánafé wéi, ndené yénd yénmanjane yaufi a mámáfi ár tambén, ménamén méinyotio ár yau efalo yátogh ár em.
bt: Finally, my loving friends, we ask you.p to talk with God for us. Talk with God firstly that the Lord's talk will become wide rapidly and be honored wherever it goes, just as how it came to you.p. 2 Talk with God, too, that he save us from wicked and evil people, for all the people are not approving truth people(believer).

nama: Wénde Yuré siyém ndimbal mwighé kér ro yém a yémon so eyátote muyafé a ewambeta kétamé yaufi ár tambén. 4 A yénd mwighé táikér yéném Yurane kénjún ndené fémofem té ewafngongi wafroghyam yéné yéndfem árké té engémndayém fém a fémofem so ewafrotati túmén. 5 Ngánjánam so enérse kétán kénjkam matyamfaf Ngánjánene uwéghfaf a wamarogh árké yéném kétamé Kerisoeta. Wawanjau mer ghérsé ámnjoghét
bt: But the Lord is very big mind(faithful) and he will make you.p strong and guard you.p from the evil man. 4 And we are mind strong(confident) in the Lord that you.p started doing this which we had said and will do always. 5 God will take you into a deep knowledge to the love of God and the endurance which comes from Keriso. Encourage to good living

nama: Áuwéghafé fútaréf, yéndfem ewarametam yéné wafarégh si téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan: Nayu aem méinyotio efalo yátogh árfe tambén efe mé ámnjoghro emor a yau ewaitotat yéné watamegh yéndfem árké engwaramayém. 7 Fém mat em ndené fémofem so fété ewaitotati téfene wafroghyam. Yénd yau sakram ténfindau táf fémafé yénd sténmorwén. 8 Yéndfem yau taumyotawém njamke ámb árfeta faiofnaye. Yénd kásáfotawém efogh a sémbár ménát yénd yau so kérté ténmorwén ámb féfefaf. 9 Yéné témorwén muyé téfefaf ndené yénd sái kómnendawém njamkeyot féfefaf, wénde yau yafrotamém, ménát yénd ménde ténmorwén ramghét yéné yam fémofem sái tawaitotangi. 10 Njam fémafé mé ténmorwén, yéndfem ewaramayém yéné si waitoghét: "Efe yau njam násáfota yau so enete."
bt: Loving friends, we give you.p this commanding talk in the name of our Lord Yesu Keriso: Stay away from all approving truth people who keep on living only seating and don't follow this teaching which we gave them. 7 You.p know that you.p should follow our action. We were not idle when we were with you.p. 8 We never accepted food from other people without payment. We worked day and night so that we would not be a burden to any of you.p. 9 There are the authority to us that we can ask you.p for food, but we didn't, in order that we wanted to give you.p that way you.p will follow. 10 Even while we were with you.p, we gave you.p this command: “The one who do not work shall not eat.”

nama: Wénde yénd mé náyáretam ndené fém ámb mé emor ménd ámnjogh, nakenati ásáfoghét a efogh yánetati mé árfefafmé arenganro. 12 Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan yéndfem ewáfáretam yéné ár engémndetam mer ámnjoghét a ásáfoghét yéfenjo njamke nénet. 13 Tane fútaréf, wénde fém yau táf sakram efinda meryam wafroghmén.
bt: But we keep on hearing that some of you.p are living without working lives, refusing to work and eating time to keep on only walking around people. 12 In the name of the Lord Yesu Keriso we sent these people and said to them to live good and to work for their food to eat. 13 My friends, but you.p never get tired of doing good.

nama: Kor efandati yéné ár efe nakenat áyárghét némé yénd norayam téfene férnan. Nayu kéráye aem yéfe tambén ménát fá so wáiwáiam tawifongé. 15 Yau efandati ndené fene mék téfnár em, wénde ewawéngsotati ndené fété efalo yátogh ár em. Folene ambinomén ásneghafé si
bt: See those people careful who refuse to obey what we say in our letter. Stay away from them so that they will be full of shame. 15 Don't see them as enemies are, but warn them as men who truly approve(believers) are. Fol's final greeting talk

nama: So krufrát Yuram yémonyo túmén ewaramete féfe yánjo krufrát méinyotio efghon a méinyotio yam kénjún. So Yuré yém féfefaf méinyotio.
bt: May the Lord of peace himself give you.p his peace at all times and in every situation. The Lord be with you.p all.

nama: Yéna yém tane ásneghafé si árké yém tane ngángé faroghmén. Folém, yéndo túmén yéné ténjfi férén táf efarotan kerkeran méinyotio férnan ménát yéné yam so efalo wiyátote ndené yéné férén ta tambén fété eném.
bt: Here is my greeting talk which is in my own handwriting. Fol, I used to write simple writing when I write in the end of all letter in order to prove that this letter came from me.

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém méinyotio féfeyot.
bt: May the grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso be with you.p all.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár, wafaretai téfene Wanjarégh ár Ngánjánam a Keriso Yesum téfene méghmégh,
bt: I am Fol, a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) of Keriso Yesu, our Savior God and Keriso Yesu our hope sent.

nama: Yéndo yéfarotam kétán Timoti, tane efalo ambum ndimbal mwighé kénjún: Afé Ngánjánam a Keriso Yesu téfene Yuram so ewaramete ngárám, ghérghérsisé a krufrát. Unyégh watameghmén
bt: I am writing to Timoti, my true son in the big mind(faith). The Father God and Keriso Yesu our Lord will give grace, mercy, and peace. About false teaching

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái némor Efesos ndimbal tesenan, ndené fété yéndon kés kénémndetan fém njam yénd álighan kwémorwén Makedoniat marat yuwot. Ámb ár kété em unyégh watameghan, a fémon táf tamndé fá kékmbongi. 4 Tawaufro yéfe kékmbongi yéné ninyé si tombé kéráye ákiafene yétkwén faroghmén, ménamén yéné yamam efunat amrorégh; yéné yam yau násáfotat Ngánjánene mwighé faroréghta, árkéméné mat té náyátoyém ndimbal mwighayan. 5 Yéné wáfareghoene fifi siyém uwégh árké néntone njúnnjúnofnar tikéfta, kwayaghé emaréghta, a sotafé ndimbal mwighata. 6 Ámb ár té nawengoyénd yéné mbarkánd endta a ewawalindai yéfene end ménáyan fifiofnar si warunyéghamé. 7 Fá ménde em nák watamegh ár sái em. Fá norayat minde taikrataye, wénde fá yau mat em némamén fá norayat.
bt: I want you.s to stay in Efeso city, just as I asked you.s when I was on the trip to Makedonia province. Some people there are in false teaching, and you.s must tell them to stop. 4 Tell them to stop from those legend talk about long writings of ancestors's names, because these things produce arguments; these things do not work God's plan, which we know it in big mind(faith). 5 The meaning of this command is love which comes from a without.dust heart, a bright conscience, and a strong big mind(faith). 6 Some people have turned away from these straight way and have lost their way in without.meaning discussions. 7 They want to be teaching men of the law. They speak very strongly, but they do not know what they said.

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené nák siyém mer njam árom yafrota merkéráye. 9 Yénd mat yéném ndené nák yafrotaméng yau mbarkánd árét, wénde nák rafarégh árét a áyáréghofnar árét, yéfeyot ngánjánofnar a yaufiyamafé ár, a njúnnjúnafé árét a efe em méndméndafé Ngánjánefaf, yéfeyot emofem esmetat yéfene afaf o amaf, o ár ngi téfnárat, 10 yéfeyot efe em yaufi wal téfnár, ghakér ro mérés ro wal téfnárat, ár ténogh árét a unyégh ár a unyégh si waitogh ár o emofem ewafrotat ámb kés engém fénataye kétamé efalo watameghta. 11 Yéné watamegh so tinjongém mer si kénjúnro árké yéramayéng tafaf afroghét, yéné mer si kétándmé ndimbal kwayaghafé a frengégh Ngánjáneta. Yurane ngárám Fole
bt: We know that the law is good if man uses it properly. 9 We know that he don't make the law for straight people, but for lawbreaking people and without.obeying people, for the without.god and sinful people, the with.dust(unholy) people and who hate God, for those who kill their fathers or mothers, for people killing people, 10 for them who are the sexual immoral, for only men only women practing sexuality people(praticing homesexuality), for kidnapping people and lying people and following people of false talk or who do anything else different from true teaching. 11 We will find that teaching in the good talk which he gave me to tell, this good talk from big light(glorious) and blessed God. Lord's grace to Fol

nama: Yéndo kánjo yarametan Keriso Yesue téfene Yuré, emo té waramai ta muyé ménát tane ásáfoghét. Yéndo kánjo yarametan yá emon té fifiyafé wiyátoi a wékafai yénd yáyot ásáfoghét. 13 Yéné awaingégh kwéf kés emormén yénd korayawén yaufi si yáfaf a tésmetawén a tasalitawén fá. Wénde Ngánján témorwén ghérghérsisé afoghare tafaf ménamén yénd yau ndimbal mwighafé kwémorwén a mat yau kwémorwén némé yéndon tafrotawén. 14 A téfene Yuram yasuryéng yáne ngárám ta a waramai ndimbal mwighé a uwégh árké em Keriso Yesu kénjún. 15 Yéné si siyém efalo ménát tumyongém méinyoe a efalo tiyátongém: Keriso Yesu yénmormén yéné mband maratot ménát yaufi ár ghérsé urtoghét. Yénd wémormén mindefifi yaufi téfnár a ewaindan méinyoto ár. 16 Wénde Ngánján yémormén ghérghérsisé kér ro tafaf ménát ndené Keriso Yesum sái tuyafongai yáne métar kufrotau tafaf, minde yaufi ár, ndené fété ufénmanéghét yéfeyot efe soramé so em efalo yátogh ár a tawanangi tuot ghérsé. 17 Kétán tuot Warsagh ár, kérofnar a fandaghofnar, mé fáro Ngánján-yáfafétro wafarerégh a ndimbal kwayaghé tuot a mbanjat. Efalo.
bt: I give thanks to Keriso Yesu our Lord, who has given me strength for my work. I give thanks to him who had made me with meaning and appointed for woking for him. 13 This passing time was I spoke evil talk to him and persecuted and insulted him. But God was full of mercy to me because I did not yet have big mind(faith) and did not know what I was doing. 14 And our Lord poured out his grace on me and gave me the big mind(faith) and love which are in Keriso Yesu. 15 This talk is a true so that we accepted completely and truly approved(believed): Keriso Yesu came into this world to save sinners. I was really bad sinner and I surpassed all men 16 But God was merciful to me in order that Keriso Yesu might show his patience in dealing with me, the very bad sinners, as an example for those who would later be men who truly approve(believe) him and receive eternal life. 17 To the eternal Ruling man(King), without.dead and without.seeing, the only God himself—only to him be honor and big light(glory) forever! Amen.

nama: Timoti, tane ambum, yéndon efalo niyátotan yéné wáfareghan, árké si ndené Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénorayawét frondeyan fenemén. Násméta merot yéné sie ndené fimb sem ásméghét, 19 a miya ménj néngérnyang fenjo ndimbal mwighé a kwayaghé emarghe. Ámb ár yau káyáretawét kétán yéfene emaréghfaf a té eyátoyénd fifiofnar yéfene ndimbal mwighaye. 20 Yéfefaf ewafnyang fá em Imaneus a Aleksanda, efe yéndon eramayén Sáiféroene waftafaf; yéné yam so ewatamete sái kékmbongi yaufi si Ngánjánefaf.
bt: Timoti, my son, I truly approve(believe) you in this command, according to the talks that God's people who make know(prophets) spoke in the past about you.s. Fight well with these talks as arrows in order to fight well, 19 and keep on holding your.s big mind(faith) and a bright conscience. Some people have not been listening to their conscience and have made a without.meaning of their big mind(faith). 20 Among them are Imaneus and Aleksanda, whom I have gave them to the power of Sáifèr; this will teach them to stop saying evil talk to God.

nama: Frondefifi, tane wawéngsogh si siyém ndené méinyotio ómnengégh, Ngánjánafé orayégh, Ngánjánafé orayégh ámb árfeyot, kánjo ramégh uyogh Ngánjáne méinyotio árét. 2 Ngánjánafé norayati warsagh árfet a méinyotio limánégh árfet efe waftayan em, ménát yénd so yénmor métar a krufrát ghérsé méinyotio ngánján ghérsafé a njúnnjúnofnar. 3 Yéné siyém mer yém a yéremngote Ngánján téfene Wanjarégh ár. 4 A fá ménde yém sái tawanjarngé méinyotio ár. Fá ménde yém méinyotio ár sái mat káyátongi yáne si a sái tumyongi ndené fété efalo yém. 5 Ménamén kété siyém ámbiro Ngánján a ámbiro néndkéf ár yéfe kénjún Ngánján a ár, Keriso Yesu fá fáyo, 6 efe naramayéng méinyotio ár wanjarghét. Árkéméné yémormén fifiafé yéné mbarkánd kwéfon Ngánjánam sái méinyotio ár ghérsé tawértongai. 7 A yéné téfnan yénd wéngwáfáretam ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár a watamegh ár Téndo árét, ménát ndimbal mwighé a efalomén si waitoghét. Yénd yau nuindan. Yénd efalo nafrotan!
bt: First of all, my encouraging talk is that all asking, talking with God, talking with God for other people, and thanksgivings be offered to God for all people. 2 Pray for kings and all rulers who are in power, so that we may live a quiet and peaceful life with all godly life(godliness) and without. dust(holiness). 3 This is good and it pleases God our Savior. 4 And he wants to save all people. He wants everyone to know his message and to accept it as true. 5 For there is one God and one middleman between God and man, Keriso Yesu he himself, 6 who gave himself to save all the people. That was the proof at the straight time God will save every people. 7 And in this reason he sent me as a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) and teaching man of the Side people, to preach the talk of big mind(faith) and truth. I am not lying. I am telling the truth!

nama: Méinyotio Yesuene mérén wáwefnoghan yénd ménde wém ár sái Ngánjánafé norayat, ár efe ewatetaménd Ngánjánefaf a so yéfene ngángé euyotat Ngánjánafé oraighan nékwofnar a amroréghofnar. 9 Ndenayo yénd ménde wém amaf sái em métar a mer mwighaye sálámeyan a awoghan merkéráye, yau wéla ende séf rarmbéghafé o gol mendén o ndindi o wérawérat sálámeyafé, 10 wénde ménáyafé mer wafroghyamafé, árké yém mer amafoe efe nawarse ndené yéndon Ngánjáne yáwefnotan. 11 Amaf táf notametat métar a méinyotio yuwan ghérsaye. 12 Yéndon yau amaf eumyotan fá watameghét a sái wafté tawanangi árta. Fá fiya tam métar. 13 Ménamén Edém yafrotam fronde a If soramé. 14 A Edém yau yémormén efe yarsotai Sáifram, wénde amaf yarsotai a yérafaryéng Ngánjánene nák. 15 Wénde amaf so kawanjarngé ambum ráfégh kénjúmé, njam fá ménj yérnyang ndimbal mwighayan a uwéghan a njúnnjúnofnar a métar.
bt: In every Yesu's family(church) worshipping I want men to talk with God, men who are dedicated to God and can lift up their hands in talking with God without anger or argument. 9 I also want the women to be quiet and good mind(modest) about their clothes and to dress properly, not with fancy hair styles or with gold earlings or pearls or silk clothes, 10 but with good deeds, which is proper for women who profess that I am worshipping God. 11 Women should learn in silence and all humility. 12 I do not allow women to teach and to receive power from men. They must keep quiet. 13 For Edèm was created first and later If. 14 And it was not Edèm who was deceived by Sáifér, but the woman deceived and broke God's law. 15 But women will be save through having children, if she perseveres in big mind(faith) and love and without.dust and quiet.

nama: Yéné siyém efalo si: ár njam ménde yém Yesuene mérén limánéghét, yémon so yékwne mer ásáfogh. 2 A Yesuene mérén limánégh ár so yém téfnofnar; yáne ayém ámbiro amaf, awambégh yaufiyamta, awamarogh, a mbarkándro; yémon aeumyota wan téfnár yánjo méngot. Fá féyotaro so yém watameghét. 3 Fá yau so yém wéri nu téfnár, o ásmégh ár, wénde métar a krufrát kér ro. Fá yau táf yém mani uwégh ár. 4 Yémon fété aefrenda yánjo mérén mere a eméinda yáne ambumtértér ménát sái yiyáretat fá méinyotio utmanéghafé. 5 Ár ghakér mat so yém ndernáye ewarawene yánjoyo mérén. Njam yémon yau yafrota yéné, yémon féyotarofnar so yém sái ewarawene Ngánjánene ár Yesuene mérnan. 6 Fá sotafé ayém ndimbal mwighayan, ménát fá yau so tuktukan yém, a yémo yau so tanangé tékrat, ndené Sáifér kés yanai. 7 Fá ár ayém efe so yutémndat árém Yesuene mérén téndota, ménát fá yau so wáiwái yém a káwamangé Sáiféroene uréran. Dikunafenemén
bt: This is a true words: If a man want to be a Yesu's family(church) leading man, he desires an good work. 2 And a Yesu's family(church) leading man must be without fault; he must have only one wife, protecting himself from bad things, self-controlled, and straightly; he must welcome strangers in his house. He must be able to teach. 3 He must not be a drunkard man, or a fighting man, but gentle and peaceful. He must not money lover. 4 He must manage his own family well and make his children obey him with all respect. 5 A man must know how to take care of his own family. If he cannot do that, he will not be able to take care of God's people in the Yesu's family(church). 6 He must be mature in the big mind(faith), so that he will not be in high himself, he would receive punishment, as the Sáifèr received. 7 He should be a man who people outside the Yesu's family(church) respect him, so that he will not be shameful and fall into the Sáifèr's trap. About Dikuns

nama: Dikun ndenáyo aem mer wafroghyamafé aem efalofifi; yémofem yau so enetat wéri nu mindefifi o em nité manian. 9 Fá so nawéretat efalo sian ndimbal mwighamén ménáyafé kwayaghé emaréghafé. 10 Fá fété aeufotat fronde, a féyo njam yémofem taindangi ufogh yam, fá so násáfotat.
bt: Dikuns must also have a good action and be sincere; they must not drink too much alcohol or be greedy for money. 9 They should hold to the true talk of the big mind(faith) with a bright conscience. 10 They should test them first, and then if they pass the testing thing, they will work.

nama: Amaf dikun ndenéyameyo mer wafroghyamafé aem a yau ár warunyégh amaf aem. Fá aem métar yamafé a unyéghofnar méinyotio yaman. 12 Dikun ayém mé ámbiro amafafé, a efrenda yáne ambumtértér a mérén merkéráye. 13 Yéné wáutárégh ár emofem ewafrotat ásáfogh mere fai ewafrotat yéfendio mer okayoghét a féyotaro so norayat férférofnar yéfene ndimbal mwighamén Keriso Yesu kénjún. Ndimbal warambnogh
bt: Woman dikuns also must be of good action and must not be gossipping women. They must be with quiet way and without.lying in everything. 12 A dikun must have only one wife, and manage his children and family well. 13 Those helpers who do their work well make reward for themselves a good standing and are able to speak without-fearing about their big mind(faith) in Keriso Yesu. The big secret

nama: Ndené fété yéndon yéné férén yéfarotan feyot, yénd nemnan álighét a kéminjon fém tekofnaye. 15 Wénde njam yénd wém awaneghan, yéné férnam so mat kényátongé ndernáye yénd so nimndam téfenjo kénjúnro Ngánjánene méngo kénjún, árké yém Yesuene mérén akegh Ngánjánene, sérasér a efalo wamaroghmén. 16 Emo yau so tanyongé nderé ndimbal yém yéné warambnogh ngánján ghérsé: Fá nufaryéng ár fifie, a nauyafoi safét mbarkánde yékmai Ngánján Mbérmbéram, a yinjoyénd njafar si résagh árém, yánemén táitotawét yénamé ndimbal yuwomé, a efalo yiyátoyénd mband maratan a yéngwanayénd ndimbal kwayaghaye tukét kétán njafarot."
bt: As I write this letter to you.s, I think to come and see you.s not.far. 15 But if I are in delay, this letter will let you.s know how we should conduct ourselves in God's household, which is the Yesu's family(church) of the living God, the post and support of the truth. 16 No one can deny how big is this secret of our god life(religion): He appeared in human body, and God Spirit showed him to put straight, and men carrying heavenly message(angels) saw him. about him they preached among the nations, and they truly approved(believed) him in the world, and they took him to heaven in big light(glory).

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye safénro ndené ámb árém so efrangotat ndimbal mwighé kété kerkeran; yémofem so eyáretat unyégh mbérmbér a ewaitotat Sáiféroene watamegh. 2 Ndené watamegh marat eyátotat unyégh árém, endefene emarégh em kérwén, ndenanit wafté tote kar nakérnaménd. 3 Ndené árém ewatametat ndené awerégh a ámb njamke nénet kar mámáfi yém. Wénde Ngánjánam ewafrotam yéné njamke ménát nénet, kánjo orayégh soramé, yémofem efe em efalo yátogh ár té mat namndayénd efalo si. 4 Méinyotio rokar ndené Ngánjánam kés ewafrotam sem mer; némndafi yau kenaghmén em, wénde méinyotio rokar aeumyotam kánjo raméghafé, 5 ménamén Ngánjánene si a Ngánjánafé orayégham tiyátongé merro Ngánjánefaf. Keriso Yesuene mer faiofnar ásáfogh ár
bt: The God Spirit says clearly that some people will leave the big mind(faith) in the end; they will obey lying spirits and follow the teachings of Sáifèr. 2 That Liars make wide such teachings, whose consciences are dead, as if burnt with a hot iron. 3 Such people teach that it is wrong to marry and to eat certain foods. But God created those foods to be eaten, after a talking with God of thanks, by those who are approving truth people have come to know the true talk. 4 Everything that God has created is good; nothing are to be rejected, but everything is to be received with thanksgiving, 5 because the talk of God and the talking with God make it well to God. A good without.payment working man(servant) of Keriso Yesu

nama: Njam fémo ewarameta yéné watamegh si efalo yátogh árfet, fém so kénamndé Keriso Yesuene mer ásáfogh ár, fém so namanjne fémyo mbérmbére yéné ndimbal mwighé si tukén a efalo watameghan árké fémon ewaitote. 7 Wénde némndafi yau ewafrota ngánjánofnar ninyé sifaf, árké em fifiofnar waitoghét. Mia fémyo notameta ménát ngánján ghérsat. 8 Fifie awatamegh siyém ámb merafayo yém, wénde mbérmbére awatamegh siyém minde merafé yém méinyotio yam kénjún, ménamén unyéghofnar sian ghérsé ere sómbio ménát sénonjotau a soramé yuwot. 9 Yéné siyém efalo si, ménát sái méinyoe tumyongi a efalo tiyátongi. 10 Yénd nasmetam a násáfotam taikrataye, ménamén yéndfem ekmangém téfene méghmégh akegh Ngánján kénjún, efe yém Wanjarégh ár méinyotio árét, a yéfefifi emofem efalo yiyátotat.
bt: If you.s give these teaching talks to the approving truth people, you.s will be a good worker of Keriso Yesu, you.s should feed yourself spiritually on the talks of this big mind(faith) and in the true teaching which you.s have followed. 7 But have nothing to do with godless legend talks, which are without.meaning teaching. Keep train yourself for a godly life. 8 Physical training is some good, but spiritual training is very good in every way, because the life in without.lying talk(promise) are for two in order to the present and to the future. 9 This is a true talk, to be completely accepted and truly approved(believed). 10 We fight and work hard, because we have placed our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of all people, and especially of those who approve truth(believe).

nama: Tawaram yéfe yéné wawanjagh a yéné watamegh. 12 Emo yau néfanda fém yuwot ménamén fém ném tot ambum, wénde aném waufarogh ár yéné efalo yátogh árét fenjo sian, fenjo wafroghyaman, fenjo uwéghan, ndimbal mwighayan a féwénféwénofnaran. 13 Kétánotio yénd kénangon, koram fendio efogh a muyé kétán marataye Buk si waféghfaf a waitoghfaf a watameghfaf. 14 Yau tékarota mbérmbére fok árké yém fene kénjún, árké yéramayéng fefaf njam Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár korayawét a Yesuene mérén sénko árém efayoyénd yéfene ngángé fene tukén. 15 Engwafrota yéné yam a karam fémyo kétán yéfefaf, ménát fene anogh so yéfandat méinyotio árém. 16 Fémyo nafanda a efanda fenjo watamegh. Mé engwafrota yéné yam, ménamén njam fémon yafrota, fém so kawanjar a fá emofem niyáretat fém.
bt: Give them these instructions and these teachings. 12 Anyone must not look down on you.s because you.s are young man, but be an example for those approving truth people in your.s talk, in your.s action, in your.s love, in big mind(faith), and in without.flaws(holiness). 13 Until I come, give your.s time and power to the public reading of the Scriptures and to preaching and teaching. 14 Do not neglect the spiritual gift which is in you.s, which he gave to you.s when the God's people who make know(prophets) spoke and the Yesu's family(church) head men laid their hands on you.s. 15 Do these things and give yourself to them, in order that all the people may see your.s growing. 16 Watch yourself and watch your.s teaching. Keep on doing these things, because if you.s do it, you.s will save yourself and those who hear you.s.

nama: Yau yusérmbota bulu, wénde noraya utmanégh ende ndené fété fene afé kar yém. Ewarena totér ambum ndenáye fenjo fútar em, 2 buluausé ndenáye amaf kar em, a totér amaf ndené fene mérés kar em, ménaye méinyotio mere.
bt: Do not rebuke an old man, but say with respectful way to him as if he were your.s father. Treat the young men as your.s own friends/brothers, 2 the old women as mothers might be, and the young women as sisters might be, with all good.

nama: Yuyafota utmanégh yéfeyot efe kwiré em yéfembia. 4 Wénde njam kwiré yém ambumafé o áki ambumafé, fiya tawafrotangi fronde ndené efalo yátogh árfene ásáfogh yéfenjo mérén kénjún, a yéné ende fai so ewafrotat yéferafaf a yéfekif, ménamén yéné yaman Ngánján náuwete. 5 Kwiré efe yém mé yambia, árké árom yau yánjete fá, té ekmayéng méghmégh Ngánjánefaf a túmén Ngánjánafé orayégh ewafrote a yamnende ménát yáne wáutáréghét sémbár a efogh. 6 Wénde kwiré efe karamangé fifioene méndefaf té kér tém, ndemamén ghérsé yém. 7 Tawaram yéné wawanjagh si, ménát efe yau so tinjongém téfnot yémafé. 8 Wénde njam árké árém yau ewarawenat yéfene kaka fútar, wéi fá yéfenjo mérénfifi, yémofem té yékenangi ndimbal mwighé a yéfene yam wafrogh sem yuwon yéfeta emofem yau efalo yiyátotat Yesu.
bt: Show respect for them widows who are alone. 4 But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should do first as approving truth people(believers)'s work in their own family, and in this way will repay their parents and grandparents, because in this way pleases God. 5 A widow who is all alone, with no one to take care of her, has placed hope to God and continues to talk with God and ask him for her to help night and day. 6 But a widow who gives herself to body pleasure has already died, even though she lives. 7 Give them these instructions, so that no one will find fault with them. 8 But if any people do not take care of their close friends(relatives), especially the members of their own real family, they have denied the big mind(faith) and his behaviour is below those of people who don't truly approve(believe) Yesu.

nama: Yau tafény ámb kwiré kwirafene yétkwénfaf téfandro fá njam yém 60 yunjéf, a fá ayém ámbirotaro ár awerégh ár 10 a árém témndetat yémon tawafrote meryam: amaf emo tawanote yánjo ambumtértér, mere taumyote wan téfnár yáne méngon, tawafrote métar ásáfogh ámb efalo yátogh árét, tawáutáne ár kértayan, a naramai fáyo kétán mer ásáfoghfaf.
bt: Do not add any widow to the name of widows unless she is over sixty years of age, and she must have been married only once 10 and people said she is doing good things: a woman who brought up her children well, received strangers well in her home, did humble works for other approving truth people, helped people in trouble, and gave herself to doing good.

nama: Wénde yau ekmeta totér kwirafene yétkwén fefayan; ménamén yéfene méndeyam njam eméindat fá ár aweréghét, yémofem so tawengongi sém Kerisoe. 12 Féyo fá so kamndangi kértafé yéfenjo frondeyo unyéghofnar simén rafarégh ár yáfaf. 13 Fá ndenéyame notametat ménát efogh ewifotat ménáyan sái nawarendat kétándmé méngo kétán ámb méngo; wénde minde mámáfi siyém, fá notametat ár warunyéghan, a ámb árfene yamfaf sái enwafnyang, a néngorayat ámb yammén ndené fá yau so fété. 14 Féyo yénémamén, yénd nemnan ndené totér kwiré so ár naweretat kor ménát ambumot, a so ewarawenat yéfenjo méngon, féyo ndené yaman yau so erametat ámb féneféne mék téfnárat ménáyan sái néngorayat yaufi si téfenemén. 15 Ámb kwiré té nawengoyénd a Sáifér yaitoyénd. 16 Wénde njam árké efalo yátogh amafoefaf té em kwiré yáne mérnan, yémon fété so ewarawene a yau so yéfayote kérté Yesuene mérnot, ménát Yesuene mérnam so ewáutáne yéné kwirat efe yéfembia em. Yesuene mérén sénko árfenemén
bt: But do not put young widows' name on the paper; because when their desires make them want to marry, they turn away from Keriso. 12 So they will become guilty of breaker their earlier without.lying talk(promise) to him. 13 They also learn to waste their time in going around from house to house; but even very bad, they learn in gossip people, and interfering to other people's things, and talking about things they should not. 14 So then, I am thinking that the young widows get married again, for bearing children, and will take care of their homes, so as to give enemies no chance of speaking evil talk of us. 15 Some widows have turned away and followed Sáifèr. 16 But if any believing woman has widows in her family, she must take care of them and not put the burden on the Yesu's family(church), so that Yesu's family(church) may take care of those widows who are all alone. Church head people

nama: Yesuene mérén sénko árém emofem ewafrotat yéfenjo mer ásáfogh ndené fété limánégh árém so fété fai ersat merkéráye, mé yémofemro efe násáfotat taikrataye si waitoghan a watameghan. 18 Buk si noraye, "Yau kau sénfneyan tumbé njam kun ndau ásáfoghan yém" a wéikor 'Ásáfogh árém so fété ewarametat yéfene fai." 19 Yau náyáretati Yesuene mérén sénko ároenemén wánangogh, táfandro njam yénémnjat sómbio o nambio ghékfe fandagh árém. 20 Njam sénko árom yaufiyam yafrota, usérmbo safén ménát ámb ár so em férfér.
bt: The Yesu's family(church) head people who do their good work as leading men should be received pay well, especially those who work hard at preaching and teaching. 18 The Buk(scripture) says, “Do not tie mouth of an cow when it is working for corn” and also “Workers should be given their pay.” 19 Do not listen to an accusation against an head man, unless two or three watching men bring it. 20 If a head man does sin, rebuke publicly so that the other people may be afraid.

nama: Yéndon némndetan yéfene sáfrére Ngánján a Keriso Yesu a njúnnjúnofnar njafar si résagh ár: Fémo táf merkéráye ewaitota si yénd snorayan fefaf. Njam fémo ewaitota yéné fémo táf yuyafota ámbiro yam wafrogh kétán méinyotio árét, fémo yau táf yuyafota fénataye yam wafrogh fene fútarfefaf a ámb árfefaf. 22 Mé yau wékeye em ngángé fayoghét árfefaf yéfe wateghét Yurane ásáfoghét. Yau kufnya ámb árfene yaufiyaman, nawarawena fémyo njúnnjúnofnar.
bt: I tell you.s in thier presence of God and of Keriso Yesu and of the without.dust(holy) men carrying heavenly message(angels):You.s must carefully follow the words I am telling you.s. When you.s follow them.p you.s must show one behaviour to all people, you.s must not show different behaviour to your.s friends and other men. 22 Be in no hurry to lay hands on people to dedicate them to the Lord's work. Don't take part in the sins of other people, keep yourself without.dust(holy).

nama: Yau nuro so yénete, wénde némbne wéri nu so téneta ndené fété murémuré ménamén fém túmén enjne ném.
bt: Do not drink water only, but take a little alcohol as a medicine since you.s are sick so often.

nama: Ámb árfene yaufiyam em méinyo fandagh safén, a yéfene yaufiyam engém fronde moghfaf, wénde ámb árfene yaufiyam fandaghét em soramé. 25 Ndené yameyo mer wafroghyam fandaghét em mé safénro, a ndenáyo yéné árké yau em safénro yau so atnoghe em.
bt: The sins of some people are obvious to see, and their sins go ahead to judgment; but the sins of other people are seen only later. 25 In the same way good deeds are obviously seen, and even those that are not so obvious cannot be hidden.

nama: Fá efe em efalo yátogh faiofnar ásáfogh ár so fété merkéráye nemnat yéfene yurafenemén méinyotio utmanéghafé, ménát efe yau so noraye yaufi si Ngánjánene yétkwénfaf a téfene watameghfaf. 2 Efalo yátogh faiofnar ásáfogh ár endefene yuré em efalo yátogh ár yau táf yuwot efandati, ménamén fá wéi em efalo yátogh ár. Wénde fá so fété násáfotat merkéráye, ménamén efe eremngote yéfene ásáfoghan em efalo yátogh ár efe yéfene uwéghafé em. Unyégh watamegh a efalo wemár
bt: Those who are believing without.payment working men(servants) must think well their owners with all respect, so that no one will say bad talk to the name of God and to our teaching. 2 Believing without.payment working men(servants) belonging to owner who are truly approving man(believer) must not despise them, for they are approving truth people too. But they should serve them well, because those who make happy in their work are approving truth people who is with their love. False teaching and true riches

nama: Emo njam ewatameta fénatayo si a yau natemnda efalo sifaf téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene a watameghfaf téfene ngánján ghérsamén 4 fá sem tuktuk ár em a mat yau em yénémamén. Fá sem wasnengégh mwighafé éwighét a amrorghét simén, a yéné yamam yénérse waramnjagh, asénanégh, yaufi si orayégh, mé fayogh, 5 a túmén éwigh yam eném kétándmé yéné árta endefene mer mwighé yau násáfotat a endefaf yau efalo em. Fá nemnat ndené ngánján ghérsé yame kar yém wemár.
bt: Whoever teaches a different talk and does not suit to the true talk of our Lord Yesu Keriso and with the teaching of our godly life(religion) 4 they are boasting people and don't know about anything. They have an unhealthy desire to argue and quarrel about talks, and this thing brings on jealousy, disputes, saying bad talks(insults), suspicions, 5 and constant arguments come from those people whose good minds do not work and to whom are not true. They think that religion is a way to become rich.

nama: Ngánján ghérsayam minde wemár yényátote, táf yénd fiya ténremngongé yéné rokaram némé téfefaf em. 7 Némé yéndfem enérsamém yéné mband kénjút? Némé ámb yau! Némé so yéndfem tawanangém yéné mbandta? Némé yau! 8 Féyo, njam téfene yénmam njamke a sáláme, yéné fiya féyotaro ténmam téfeyot. 9 Wénde fá efe ménde em wemárot ufogh yaman nuitat a nawametat uréran tárfár mwighafnar a wasérmbogh mwighayan, árkéménayam fá ewewone wasnengéghfaf a wasérmboghfaf. 10 Ménamén mani uwégh siyém méinyotio yaufiyamoene sérémb. Ámb ár yéfenjo méndeyan té nénguyangi, nayu namndangi ndimbal mwighata a yéfene tikéf karéfkaréf nufrotat tárfár áuwéghofnar yaman. Folene watamegh si Timotie
bt: Religion makes us very rich, if we are satisfied with these things what we have. 7 What did we bring into the world? Nothing! What can we take out of the world? Nothing! 8 So, if we have food and clothes, that should be enough for us. 9 But those who want to get rich fall into temptation and are caught in the trap of many foolish and harmful desires, which pull them down to ruin and destruction. 10 For the love of money is a root of all evil. Some people have been so eager to have, became far from the big mind(faith) and broke to pieces their hearts in many unhappy things. Fol's teaching talk to Timoti

nama: Wénde fém, Ngánjánene ár, takarota méinyotio yéné yam. Násméta ménát mbarkánd ghérsat, ngánján ghársat, ndimbal mwighé, uwégh, métar, a merafé yam. 12 Mer wérse yafrota fendio ndimbal mwighamén, a nawereta tuot ghérsat fendio; ménamén yéné ghérsat Ngánjánam némotai fém njam taikrataye norayam fenjo ndimbal mwighamén tárfár ghékéf fandagh ár sáfrére. 13 Ngánjánene ghékfan, emo ewaramete ghérsé méinyotio rokarat, a Keriso Yesue ghékfan, emo taikrataye norayam yáne ndimbal mwighamén Fontius Failetene ghékfan, yéndon némafaretan fém muyaye 14 ménát káyáre fenjo wáfaregh a ewéreta ndimbal mwighaye kétánotio yéné efogh njam téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kufarngé. 15 Yáne ufarégh siyém Ngánjánene mbarkánd kwéfon. Ngánján siyém frengéghkaf a mé fáro Limánégh ár, warsagh árfene Warsagh ár, a yurafene Yuré. 16 Fáro yém kérofnar; fá yémor kwayaghé kénjún ndené efe yau so kaflangé kaka. Emon yau yinjoi fá; emon yau so tinjongé fá. Mé yáfafétro utmanégh a tuot wafté! Efalo.
bt: But you.s, a man of God, avoid all these things. Fight for straightness, godliness, big mind(faith), love, endurance, and gentleness. 12 Run your.s best in the race of big mind(faith), and take hold of the eternal life; because for this life that God called you.s when you.s firmly said your.s big mind(faith) before many watching men. 13 In the sight of God, who gives life to all things, and in the sight of Keriso Yesu, who firmly said his big mind(faith) before Fontius Failet, I command you.s strongly 14 to obey your.s command and keep them faithfully until that day when our Lord Yesu Keriso appears. 15 His appearing is at the straight time of God. God is the blessed and only Ruler, the King of ruling men(kings) and the Lord of lords. 16 He alone is immortal; he lives in the light that no one can reach close. No one has seen him; no one can see him. Only to him be honor and eternal power! Amen.

nama: Ewafareta fá efe wemár em yéné mband maratan yau so tuktukan em, wénde tákmangi yéfene méghmégh, yau ndené wemár rokaran, wénde Ngánján kénjúnro, emo marataye yénmaramete téfe méinyotio rokar téfene áuwéghét. 18 Ewafareta fá meryam wafroghét, wemár aem mer ásáfoghan, marataye ár aem a afrengéghkaf ámb ár wáutárghét. 19 Yéné ende yémofem so ewamndat yéfendio ngonjél árké so yém sotafé téfén soramé yutau. A féyo yémofem so tanangi ghérsé árké yém efalo ghérsé.
bt: Command those who are rich in the world not to be proud, but put their hope, not in such thing as riches, but in God, who widely gives us everything for our enjoyment. 18 Command them to do good, to be rich in good works, be wide men and ready to help other people. 19 In this way they will store up for themselves a treasure which will be a solid foundation for the future. And then they will be able to receive the life which is true life.

nama: Timoti, ewarawena némé té eraman fene ngángat. Nawarawena fifiofnar a mwighafnar amroréghta némé unyéghe ámb ár norayat ndené, "Matyam" 21 Ámb ár norayat té yanangém, wénde yénayoene fifi yémofem té téláitat ndimbal mwighane end. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
bt: Timoti, guard what I gave them to your.s hand. Avoid the without.meaning and foolish arguments of what some people wrongly call “Knowledge.” 21 Some have said to possess it, but those meaning they have lost the way of big mind(faith). God's grace be with you.p all.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan wénmafaretam unyéghofnar ghérsé si afroghét árké yém Keriso Yesue kénjún,
bt: I am Fol, a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) of Keriso Yesu by God's will, sent to proclaim the did without.lying talk(promise) life which is in Keriso Yesu,

nama: Kétán Timoti, tane tikfafé ambum: Afé Ngánján a Keriso Yesu téfene Yuram so kémaramangé ngárám, ghérghérsisé, a krufrát. Kánjo ramégh a wawéngsogh yam
bt: To Timoti, my heartful son: May the Father God and Keriso Yesu our Lord give you.s grace, mercy, and peace. Thanksgiving and Encouragement

nama: Yéndon kánjo yérametan Ngánjáne, endeyot yénd efalo násáfotan, ndené fété tane ákif kés tamorwén. Yéndon kánjo yarametan ndené fété yéndon kés némafarotan fém túmén tane Ngánjánafé orayégh kénjún sémbár a efogh. 4 Yéndon némawafarotan fene yengam, a yénd ménde wém fe fandaghét mindefifi, ménát ndené yénd so áuwégham kwafongé. 5 Yéndon némawafarotan fene ndimbal mwighé, yéné sáfot ndimbal mwighé ndené fenjo alé Lois a fenjo amé Yunis ndenáyo tawarwén. Yénd ndené nemnan fene ndenéyameyo. 6 Yéné téfnan yéndon némangotan mwighat fémon so yarawene fok árké Ngánjánam némaramai fe njam yéndon efayoyén tane ngángé fefaf. 7 Ménamén yéné Mbérmbér Ngánjánam yénmaramai yau yénméinde férférot, wénde yáne Mbérmbéram yénmafote waftaye, uwéghe a fembia awamaroghét.
bt: I give thanks to God, whom I serve truly, as my ancestors did. I thank him as I remember you.s always in my talking with God night and day. 4 I remember your.s tears, and I want to see you.s very much, so that I may be filled with joy. 5 I remember your.s big mind(faith), this kind of big mind(faith) that your.s grandmother Lois and your.s mother Yunias also had. I am thinking that you.s have it also. 6 For this reason I remind you.s to keep alive the gift which God gave you.s when I laid my hands on you.s. 7 For this Spirit God gave us does not make us to be scared, but his Spirit fills us with power, love, and self-control.

nama: Fém yau so wáiwái ném téfene Yurane si afroghmén, o yau wáiwái ném tanemén, ménamén yénd náyáton kwéfkwéf méngo ár Kerisoene téfnan. Wénde, tanang fenjo ásáfogh sifayé tékrat kénjún mer si téfnan, Ngánjánam árké muyé té némaramai yénat. 9 Yémon yénd yénmanjaryéng a yénmanmoyéng yánjo árot, yau ménamén némé yéndfem tawafarotam, wénde ménamén yánjo ménde a ngárám. Yémon yénmaramai téfe yéné ngárám Keriso Yesue frondeyo rényéghan, 10 wénde sénonjo té nufar téfefaf Wanjarégh ár Keriso Yesuene ufarégh kénjúmé. Yémon té yékmboi kroene wafté a mer si kénjúmé nufar krofnar ghérsé.
bt: Do not be ashamed of preaching talk of our Lord; neither be ashamed of me, because I became a darkness house man(prisoner) for Keriso's sake. Instead, take your.s working place in suffering for the good talk, which God gave the power for it. 9 He saved us and called us to be his own people, not because of what we have done, but because of his own will and grace. He gave us this grace by means of Keriso Yesu before the beginning, 10 but now it has been revealed to us through the appearing of our Savior Keriso Yesu. He has stopped the power of death and through the good talk has revealed without.death life.

nama: Ngánjánam té waferyéng yénd ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár a watamegh ár ménát mer si waitoghét, 12 féyo yéné téfnan ndené yénd wém tékratan yéné yammén. Wénde yénd mé táikér mwighafé wém, ménamén yénd mat wém yéndon efe efalo yiyátotan, a yénd mé mat wém ndené fá féyotaro yém yémon so warawene némé yémon té yiyátoi tayot kétánotio Yesuene angoghot.
bt: God has appointed me as a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) and teaching man to proclaim the good talk, 12 so for this reason that I am in suffering these things. But I am still full of strong mind, because I know whom I have trusted, and I know well that he is able to guard until that day what he has entrusted to me until Yesu's return.

nama: Taikrataye nawereta efalo sian ndené yéndon kés kématametan, ndené fété kés kénmaufarotan fe ménát waitoghét, a kawer taikrataye ndimbal mwighayan a uwéghan Keriso Yesu kénjún. 14 Ngánján Mbérmbér wafté kénjúmé, efe yémor téfe kénjún, ewarawena yéné meryam árké té eramayén feyot.
bt: Hold firmly to the true talks that I taught you.s, as I show for you.s to follow, and remain strong in the big mind(faith) and love in Keriso Yesu. 14 Through the power of the God Spirit, who lives in us, keep this good things which I have given to you.s.

nama: Fém mat ném ndené méinyotio ár Eisiya yuwon, yémafé Fagelus a Emogenes, té wékenayénd yénd. 16 Yuram so tuyafongé ghérghérsisé Onesiforusene mérnot, ménamén yémon kwáutánau ta kértayan tárfár mbinotmé. Fá yau wáiwái témorwén ndené yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon, 17 wénde njamandio fá néngufaryéng Rom kénjút, fá éregh nufngoi ménát tayot kétánotio yémon winjoi yénd. 18 Yuram so téramangé yáne ghérghérsisé yéné efghon! A fém mer mat ném nderé ndimbale yémon yafrotam tayot Efesos kénjún.
bt: You.s know that every people in the province of Eisia, with Fagelus and Emogenes, has deserted me. 16 May the Lord show mercy to the family of Onesiforus, because he helped me in the problem many times. He was not ashamed that I am in darkness house, 17 but as soon as he arrived in Rom, he started looking for me until he found me. 18 May the Lord gave him his mercy on that day! And you.s know very well how much he did for me in Efesos.

nama: Tane ambum, muyafé aném ngárám kénjún árké yém Keriso Yesu kénjún. 2 Tawanang watamegh si ndené fémon kés kwiyárete si waitoghan tárfár ghékéf fandagh ár sáfrére, a engéumyotan fá kétán ndimbal mwighé kér ro árfefaf, emofem wéi so engwatametat ámb ár.
bt: My son, be strong in the grace which is in Keriso Yesu. 2 Take the teaching talk that you.s heard me in preaching in the presence of many watching men, and entrust them to faithful people, who will also be able to teach other people.

nama: Tanang fenjo sifayé tékratan, ndené fété Keriso Yesuene mer fiyaré. 4 Efe njam fiyaré yém, yémo yau so féghe ásáfogh ewafrote. Wénde, ménát yémon táf yéméinde áuwéghét yáne ndimbal ár emon témotangé fiyaré ásáfoghét. 5 Efe njam wérseyan yém yau so tanangé fai táfandro yémon njam nák ewaitota. 6 Taikér ásáfogh ndau téfnárom so fronde enete njam mbwe kafongi. 7 Mé kemnang némé yénd norayan, ménamén Yuram so kémaramangé fe mwighé kwayaghé méinyotio yaman.
bt: Take your.s place in suffering, as a good soldier of Keriso Yesu. 4 Whoever is a soldier, he does not do mixed work. Instead, in order to make happy his big man who called him to work of soldier. 5 Anyone who are in a race cannot receive the prize unless he follows rules. 6 The hardworking farmer should eat first when it's produce is ripe. 7 Keep think about what I am saying, because the Lord will give you.s bright mind(understanding) in all things.

nama: Kawafarota Yesu Keriso, efe nanoyéng kérta, a efe yémormén Deifidene ákimén, ndené fété yéné siyém tane mer si árké yéndon yaitotan. 9 Ménamén yéndon mer si yaitotan, yénd tékratan wém a tot ángéghe umbetaménd ndenanit kar oro téfnár wém. Wénde Ngánjánene si siyém yau umbéghkaf yém. 10 Féyo yénémamén yénd métar wém méinyotio yaman Ngánjánene waferégh ár téfnan, ménát yémofem wéi so tanangi wanjarégh árké yéném Keriso Yesue kénjúmé a yénérse tuot ndimbal kwayaghé.
bt: Remember Yesu Keriso, who was raised from death, and who was a descendant of Deifid, as it is my good talk which I preach. 9 Because I preach the good talk, I am in suffering and they tied me with steal rope(chain) like as I might be a stealing man. But the talk of God is not tied. 10 So then I endure in everything for the sake of God's chosen people, so that they may also receive the salvation which comes through Keriso Yesu and brings eternal big light(glory).

nama: Yéné si siyém efalo: "Njam yénd té kér téném yémafé, yénd so ndenáyo naketam yémafé.
bt: This talk is true: “If we have died with him, we will also live with him.

nama: Njam yénd mé yénngérnyang métaran, yénd mé so ndenáyo limánéghan yéném yémafé. Njam yéndfem tékenangém fá, yémo ndenáyo so ténkenangé yénd.
bt: If we continue to endure, we will also rule with him. If we deny him, he will also deny us.

nama: Njam yénd yau ndimbal mwighé kér ro yéném, fá mé yakai ndimbal mwighé kér ro, ménamén fáyo yau so nawawinde. Efalo yátoghkaf ásáfogh ár
bt: If we are not faithful, he keeps standing faithful, because he cannot deceive himself.” An approved worker

nama: Mwighat ewangota fenjo ár yénémamén, a tawaram yéfe sotafé mat si Ngánjánene sáfrére yau násmetat sian. Yéné yau mer yém, wénde ewaghnati ár efe náyáretat. 15 Tafrota fenjo merfifi ménát fémyo karam kétán Ngánjánefaf ndené fété yátoghkaf, ndené ásáfogh ár efe yau wáiwái yém a emo mbarkánde yamarote efalo si. 16 Kitérmbongi njúnnjúnafé sita, árké yamam so tangférnangé a nayu kamndangi Ngánjáneta. 17 Yéfene watamegh marat so káyátongé ndenanit akmé. Sómbio amaf ere Emaneus a Filetus. 18 Yémofem té yéfrangeyayénd efalo end a tirorwét ámb efalo yátogh árfene ndimbal mwighé méné sie téfene anogh té nufrotam. 19 Wénde sotafé téfén Ngánjánam árké yékmai yau so nasambnete a Ngánjánam efarotam si yéné tukén ndené: "Yuré mat yém fá efe em yáne, " a "Fá efe norayat ndené fá em Yurane táf kawengongi kétándmé yaufiyamta."
bt: Remind your.s people of this, and give them a strict warning talk in God's presence do not fight about talks. It does not good, but destroys the people who listen. 15 Do your.s best to give yourself to God as one approved, as a worker who is not ashamed and who correctly handles the talk of truth. 16 Keep away from dirty talk, which things will flood and become far away from God. 17 Their teaching will spread like cancer. There are two women, Emaneus and Filetus. 18 They.d have left the way of truth and are destroying the big mind(faith) of some approving truth people by talk our rising has already happened. 19 But the solid foundation which God has laid cannot be shaken and God wrote talk on this that: “The Lord knows those who are his,” and “Those who say that they are Lord's must turn away from wrongdoing.”

nama: Ndimbal méngo kénjún kété em tárfár dis a bol wéla sáfot: ámb ewafrotat silfamén a golmén ménát mer wafroghyamot, ámb wénmén a ngwarngwarmén méinyotio efogh ásáfoghmén. 21 Ndené yameyo, fá efe té naumbnaménd fáyo kétamé méinyotio yaufi yamta, so em mer wafroghyamot, ménamén fá té naramayénd a mer em yéfene Yurafaf, a afrengéghkaf em ménát méinyotio meryam wafroghét.
bt: In a large house there are many dishes and bowls of all kinds: they make some with silver and gold for good use, other with wood and clay for everyday use. 21 Those who wash themselves from all evil things, will be good using, because they have given and are good to their Lord, and they are ready to do every good work.

nama: Kitrémb totér árfene yaufi méndeta a mwighé takém mbarkánd kér ro yamot, ndimbal mwighé, uwégh a krufrát, mérne yémafé efe em mer tikfan kutnangi Yurafaf wáutárghét. 23 Wénde kitérmbongi kétándmé fifiofnar a mwighé ongén éwighta, ménamén fém mat em yémofem yéfunat amrorégh. 24 Ndené fété Yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár, fém yau so namronati. Fém so kwénjtafnar ár em méinyotio árfefaf, a aem mer a métar watamegh ár. 25 Métare ewatameta fá emofem yékarotat efalo, ménát ndené Ngánjánam so tawaramangé yéfe féneféne yaufita awengoghét a mat kamndangi efalo. 26 A féyo fá so mwighat nénangotat kawanjarngi Sáiféroene urérta, emon té ernyai fá a eméindai yáne ménde wafroghét.
bt: Take away the evil desires of young people, and put a mind for straight things, big mind(faith), love and peace, together with those who are with a good heart call out to the Lord for help. 23 But keep away from without.meaning and stupid arguments, because you.s know they produce quarrels. 24 As the Lord's without.payment worker, you.s must not quarrel. You must be without.greed(kind) toward all the people, and be a good and patient teaching man. 25 Teach gently those who oppose the truth, in order that God will give them the chance to turn away from sins and know the truth. 26 And then they will come to their minds and save from the trap of the Sáifèr, who had caught them and made them do his will.

nama: Nawafarota ndené kété so yéngém táikér kwéf kerker efghon. 2 Ár so kénamndangi yandro manjorégh, nité, awarsagh kér ro, tuktuk, wasáligh, áyáréghofnar yéfene afaf a amafefaf, kánjo siofnar, njúnnjúnafé, 3 yau uwégh, yau yaufiyam tawawalindangi, warunyégh, awamaréghofnar, tékratro, so méndméndat yéfandat mer; 4 sén ramégh, mwighafnar yam wafrogh, minde tuktukan, uwégh so yém fifi méndeyan minde wénde yau uwégh Ngánjáne 5 so em ngánján ghérsafé árnit, wénde yékenat yáne efalo wafté. Nayu aem yéfe tambén.
bt: Remember that there will be hard times in the last days. 2 People will be selfish, greedy, boastful, and proud, insulted, disobedient to their parents, without thank talk, and with.dirty(unholy), 3 without love, not to forget bad things(unforgiving), gossips, without self-control, and fierce; they will hate the good; 4 betraying(lit. "making teeth"), doing without thinking, and very proud, love in body desire strongly but not love God; 5 will be like a religious people, but reject its real power. Keep away from them.

nama: Ámb ár engém árfene méngot a áfrát tinjongi njangén amafefaf efe etumndat yéfenjo yaufiyamam a englimndat fénatayo yaufi mwigham, 7 yéné amafam efe yéta túmén nawatametat totér yam, wénde yaufifi so tanangi efalo matyammén. 8 Ndené fété Janes a Jambres asénanégh ár tarwén Mosesefaf, wéi yéné árém tékarotawét efalo si. Yéfene mwighé yau násáfotat mere a efe uyégh ár ere ndimbal mwighayan. 9 Wénde fá yau so eyowé matyaman nayu, ménamén méinyotio árém so efandat nderé onon fá ere. Ndené fété némé kufrotau yéfefaf Janes a Jambres. Kerkermén watamegh
bt: Some people go into people's houses and look slow to weak women whom their sins step on(load) and all kind of evil desires lead, 7 these women who are always trying to learn new things, but they are never able to understand the truth. 8 As Janes and Jambres were opposing men to Moses, also these people are opposed to the true talk. Their.d minds do not work and who are failures in the big mind(faith). 9 But they.d will not move far in knowledge, because every people will see how foolish they.d are. Just as what happened to them Janes and Jambres. Last teachings

nama: Wénde fémon té térse tane watamegh, tane wafroghyam, a tane yam ghérsé kénjún; fémon té tafénmete tane ndimbal mwighé, tane métar yam, tane uwégh, tane awamarogh, 11 tane tárfár wasérmboghyam, a tane tékratyam. Fém mat ném méinyotio yéné kufrotawét tafaf Antiok, Ikonium a Listran, ndimbal tékratfifi yéndo yérsamén! Wénde Yuram wanjaryéng yénd kétándmé méinyotio yéfeta. 12 Méinyotio ár efe ménde em ménát ngánján ghérsé Keriso Yesu kénjún so em wasérmboghyaman; 13 a yaufi ár a unyégh ár so yaufi náyátotat kétán minde yaufi. Ámb ár so ewawindat a wéi fáyo so nawawindat. 14 Wénde ndené fém, ménj miya néngérnyang efalo sian ndené fém kés kénmatametan a taikrataye efalo tiyáto. Fém mat ném efe fene watamegh ár tamorwén, 15 a fém kawafarota ndené kétándmayo fém kénmorwén tosé, fém mat té náyátoi njúnnjúnofnar Buk si, árké ménáyam so némaramete fe káfeté mwighé yéné yam so nélimnde kétán wanjarghét ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé Keriso Yesu kénjún. 16 Méinyotio Buk si siyém Ngánjánam té yétetayéng fifiotyo ménát efalo si watameghét, witrémboghét mámáfi, yaufi frengéghét, watamegh ménát mbarkánd ámnjoghét, 17 ménát yéné ár efe násáfote Ngánjáne so yém mer frengégh ár a watameghkaf méinyotio fénatayero meryam wafroghét.
bt: But you.s have carried my teaching, my conduct, and my way in life; you.s have observed my big mind(faith), my patience, my love, my self-control, 11 my many persecutions, and my sufferings. You.s know all those happened to me in Antiok, Ikonium, and Listra, the very big sufferings I carried! But the Lord saved me from them all. 12 Everyone who wants to live a godly life in Keriso Yesu will be in persecution; 13 and evil persons and sorcerers will become bad to very bad. They deceive other people and will be deceived themselves. 14 But as for you.s, continue in the true talks that I taught you.s and firmly truly approve(believe). You.s know who your.s teaching men were, 15 and you.s remember that since you.s were a child, you.s have known the Without.dust Scriptures, which are able to give you.s the wisdom that leads to salvation through big mind(faith) in Keriso Yesu. 16 All Scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching the true talk, taking away bad things, correcting sins, and teaching for straight living, 17 so that this man who works for God may be well prepared and trained to do every kind of good work.

nama: Ndené tayot siyém, kwéf té nawer ta ménát sái karaman. Kwéf siyém yéna yém ta ménát yéné ghérsé oroghét. 7 Yénd té kásmetan mer ásmégh. Yéndon té yifon tane wérse. Yéndon té tamndan ndimbal mwighé. 8 A sénonjo kété siyém ta nawanjete mbarkánd fai, árkéméné Yuré, mbarkánd Mogh árom, so kwaramangé ta yéné efghon a yau mé tayotro, wénde méinyotio árét efe nawanjetat yáne ufarghét. Ambinomén si
bt: As for me, the day has come for me to be offered. The day is here for me to leave this life. 7 I have fought the good fight. I have finished my wérse. I have kept the big mind(faith). 8 And now there is waiting for me the reward of straightness, which the Lord, the straight Judging man, will give it to me on that day and not only to me, but to all people who have waited for his appearing. Final talks

nama: Fenjo mer a yafrota ménát tafaf sái néném wékeye. 10 Demasém té wéfrangoi yénd, ménamén yémo tauwetau yéné mband marat rokar, yéné téfnan fá nuwanoi Tesalonikat. Kresens té nuwanoi Galasia, a Taitus kétán Dalmasia. 11 Lukro siyém yéna yém yéndfé. Ténmasro Mak a yénémnja fá fémo, ménamén yémon so wáutáne ta ásáfogh kénjún. 12 Yéndon yéngwáfáretan Tukikus Efesosét. 13 Njam fém kénuwano, ténman tane sénjté sáláme árké yéndon noroyén Karfusene méngon Troas tesenan, a wéi buk, ndenáyo ámb wérár ghéngan wafroghmén.
bt: Do your.s best to come to me quickly. 10 Demas has left me, because he loved the things of this world, in this reason he has gone to Tesalonika. Kresens went to Galasia, and Taitus to Dalmasia. 11 Only Luke is here with me. Get Mak and bring him with you.s, because he can help me in the work. 12 I sent Tukikus to Efesos. 13 When you.s come, bring my cloth which I left at the house of Karfus in the town of Troas, the books also, especially the ones made of animal skin.

nama: Aleksenda tot téfén ásáfogh ár yénd yémon tárfár ende kwaghne. Yuram so taramangé yáne fai ndené fété némé yémo té tafrote. 15 Aya kor anawarawena yánemén fémyo, ménamén yémon tékarotau mindefifi téfene si.
bt: Aleksandè the working man with steal spoiled me by many ways. The Lord will give his reward to him according to what he has done. 15 Be on your.s guard against him yourself, because he was so much opposed to our talk.

nama: Efe ámb yau nokayoi ta kaka frondefifi kwéfon yénd nawamarotayén yéndio. Méinyotio árém wéfrangoyénd. Yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam ndené Ngánján so tawalindangé yéfene yaufi! 17 Wénde Yurafé yénd ténmorare a waramayéng muyé, ménát yénd so kwémorwén si waitogh árro méinyotio Téndo árét áyárghét. A yénd kwanjarngé kérta. 18 A Yuram so kwanjarngé yénd kétándmé méinyotio yaufita a kwanangé yénd yáne njafar limánéghét. Mé yáfafétro ndimbal kwayaghé yém tuot a tuot! Efalo. Ambinomén áuwégh si
bt: No one stood close to me on the first time I defended myself. Every people left me. I talked with God that God will forget(forgive) their faults! 17 But the Lord stayed with me and gave me strength, so that I was able to be preacher of talk for all the Side people to hear. And he saved me from death. 18 And the Lord will rescue me from all evil and take me into his heavenly kingdom. Only to him be the big light(glory) forever and ever! Amen. Final greeting talk

nama: Yéndon engwatembetan áuwégh si kétán Frisila a Akwila a Onesiforusene mérnot. 20 Erastus témorangérwén Korint ndimbal yuwon, a yéndo yénfrangoyén Trofimus Miletus tesenan, ménamén fá témorwén enjne. 21 Fenjo mer a yafrota néném fronde soramé yunjéf kawerangé. Yubulusém engwatembayéng áuwégh si fefaf, wéi Fudens, a Linus, a Klaudia a méinyotio ámb efalo yátogh árém kés tawafrotat.
bt: I send greeting talk to Frisila and Akwila and to the family of Onesiforus. 20 Erastus stayed in Korint city, and I left Trofimus in Miletus town, because he was sick. 21 Do your.s best to come first & later(before) winter comes. Yubulus send greeting talk to you.s, also Fudens and Linus, and Klaudia and all other approving truth people do.

nama: Yuré so yém fene mbérmbéran. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
bt: The Lord will be in your.s spirit. God's grace will be with you.s all.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Fol, Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Yesu Kerisoene muyafé ár.
bt: This letter from Fol, a without.payment worker of God and a man who has the authority(apostle) of Yesu Keriso.

nama: árké yém téfén méghmégh tuot ghérsat. Ngánján, efe yau nuinde, unyéghofnar si yénémndai fronde ufroghan. 3 A yáne waferégh efghon yémon safot yékmai yáne si kénjún. Yéné yékmai tafaf, a yéndo táitotawén ndené fété Ngánján téfene Wanjarégh árom té norayai.
bt: which is based on the hope for eternal life. God, who does not lie, said without lying talk(promised) before in creation. 3 And at his chosen time he put it clearly in his talk. He put this to me, and I preached it as God our Savior had said.

nama: Yéndon férén yéngfarotan fefaf, Taitus, tane efalo ambum ndimbal mwighayan téfene árké yénmam. Ngárám a krufrát so yém kétándmé Ngánján Afé a Keriso Yesu téfene Wanjarégh ár. Taitus násáfotam kété Kreten
bt: I am writing the letter to you.s, Taitus, my true son in the big mind(faith) which we share. Grace and peace will be from God the Father and Keriso Yesu our Savior. Taitus works there in Krete

nama: Yéndon fém néfrangoyén Kreten, ménát fémon so tifo téfene ásáfogh kété a takaf Yesuene mérén sénko ár méinyotio tesenamé. Kawafarota tane wawanjagh: 6 sénko ár ayém kértafnar. Yáne so yém ámbiro amaf, yáne ambum aem efalo yátogh ár a méinyotio mer ghérsafé a áyáréghafé. 7 Yesuene mérén sénko ár yém ghékéf fayogh ár Ngánjánene ásáfoghfaf, fá táf yém kértafnar. Fá yau yém fáro násáfota o tekofnar nékw ár, o emo eneta wéri nu, o kwérnar ár, o mani nité ár. 8 Wénde fá ayém fútar wan téfnárfefaf, uwégh némé yém mer, yandio awamarogh, mbarkánd, njúnnjúnofnar, awatamegh. 9 Fá táf taikrataye nawereta efalo yátogh sian yéndfem árké kénémndetam fém. Yéné yameyo yémo so ewawéngsote ámb efalo watameghan a ndenáyo uyafogh yéfene yaufi efe em akenagh ár.
bt: I left you.s in Krete, so that you.s could prepare well what they keep on leaving well to do and and appoint Yesu's family(church) head people in every town. Remember my instructions: 6 an head man must be without fault. He must have one wife, his children must be approving truth people and have good life and obedient. 7 A Yesu's family(church) head man is watching man to God's work, he should be without fault. He must not work for himself or quickly angry man, or who drink alcohol, or violent, or greedy for money. 8 But he must be friend to visitors, love what is good, self-controlled, straight, without.dust(holy), and disciplined. 9 He must hold firmly to the truly approving talk which we told you.s. In this way he can encourage other people in true teaching and also to show their wrong [talk] of those who are opposed men.

nama: Ménamén kété tárfár em, efe em ghéngan néfégh ár mérénmén, efe áyárghofnar em a ámb ár ewarsotat yéfene fifiofnar yame. 11 Fá so kékmbongi, ménamén yémofem ewengotat méinyotio mérén efalota yéfene unyégh watameghe, a méinyotio wáiwáiafé yam mani wafroghét. 12 Ámb Kretemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár norayai, "Kretemén ár túmén unyégh ár, kéghat wérár, a nité sakér ro." 13 Yéné si efalo yém. Yénémaménnde ewarna fá tékrate, ménát fá mé so em ndimbal mwighayan 14 a yau yérsati Ju árfene ninyé si a árfene wáfaregh emofem yékenat efalo si. 15 Yéfeyot efe em njúnnjúnofnar, méinyotio em njúnnjúnofnar, wénde yéfeyot efe em wasérmboghkaf a efalo yátoghofnar, kété yau yém mer, ménamén yéfene mwighé a emarégh sem wasérmboghkaf. 16 Fá norayat ndené mat em Ngánján, wénde yémofem mé yékenat yéfenjoyo wafroghyaman. Fá em méndménd a áyáréghofnar, féyotarofnar em mer wafroghét.
bt: Because there are many, who was from the cutting skin people group, who are without.hearing and deceive other people with their without.meaning way. 11 They must stop, because they are turning whole families away from the truth by their false teaching, and all for the shameful thing about making money. 12 One of Kreteʼs God's people who make know(prophets) said, “Krete people are always liars, wild animals, and lazy greedy.” 13 This talk is true. Therefore you.s must rebuke them strongly, so that they may be in big mind(faith) continually 14 and don't hold on to Ju people's legends and to human commands of those who have rejected the true talk. 15 To them who are without.dirty(pure), everythings are without,dirty(pure); but to those who are spoiled and do not truly approve(believe), nothing is good, for their minds and consciences are spoiled. 16 They told that they know God, but they keep on refusing it in their actions. They are hateful and without.listening, not fit to do anything good.

nama: Wénde fémo táf ewatameta ndernáye fifi yém sioene kém. 2 Ewatameta bulu sái nawamarotat, mwighé taikre em, yéfembia anawamarotat; mer aem yéfene ndimbal mwighayan, uwéghan, a métaran. 3 Ndené yameyo ewatameta auséausé sái emor njúnnjúnofnar ghérsaye, yau táf em ár si warunyégh ár o yau táf em tárfár wéri nu néne ár. Fá táf ewatametat némé yém mer. 4 Féyo fá táf ewatametat totér amafam sái euwetat yéfenjo ár a yéfenjo ambum, 5 so fáyo nawamarotat a njúnnjúnofnar em, a sái em mer méngo amaf efe áyárégh ár em yéfenjo árfefaf, ménát Ngánjánene si yau so yém utmanéghofnar.
bt: But you.s must teach how meaning is the sound of the talk. 2 Teach the old men to be controlled, be strong mind(serious), and self-controlled; to be good in their big mind(faith), in love, and in endurance. 3 In the same way teach the old women to live a without.dust(holy) life, not to be gossipping people about people or not to be people eating alcohol so much. They must teach what is good. 4 Then they should teach the young women to love their husbands and children, 5 to be self-controlled and without.dust(holy), and to be good housewives who are obeying to their husbands, so that God's talk is not be without.respectfully.

nama: Ndené yameyo, ewawéngsota totér ár sái em yéfembia awamarogh ár. 7 A fémyo aném mer ufarogh méinyotio fene wafroghyame. A fene watamegh kénjún fém aném efaloe a táikér mwighafé. 8 Noraya mbarkánd siro ménát yau so némanangotat, ménát fene mék téfnár so ekmete wáiwáiot a némé yaufi si yau so norayat téfenemén.
bt: In the same way, encourage the young men to be self-controlled men. 7 And you.s yourself must be an good showing(example) by your every actions. And in your.s teaching be truly and with strong mind. 8 Speak straight talks that they cannot criticize, so that your.s fighting men(enemies) may be put to shame and have nothing bad to say about us.

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh ár so fété em áyárégh ár yéfenjo yurafefaf a remngogh ár méinyotio yaman. Yémofem yau so ewawangotat yéfenjo yurafet 10 o yau so oro nufrotat. Wénde fá táf nauyafotat ndené fá mer a efalo yátogh kér ro em, ménamén yéfene mer yammén, méinyotio árém so yuyafotat ndimbal utmanégh Ngánjánene watameghmén téfene Wanjarégh ár.
bt: Without.payment working men(slaves) should be to obeying people to their owners and pleasing men in all things. They must not talk back to their owners 10 or not steal. But they must show that they are good and faithful. And because of their good behavior, everyone will show great respect for the teaching about God our Savior.

nama: Ngánjánam té yuyafotam yánjo ngárám ménát wanjaréghét méinyotio árét. 12 Yénayam yénmatamete yénd sái ekmbotam ngánjánofnar ghérsé a mbandoene ménde, a sái yénmor yéndio awamaroghafé, mbarkánd a ngánján ghérsaye sénonjo efghon, 13 njamandio yénd nawanjetam frengéghkaf efghot yénd méghmégh ándan yéném, njam ndimbal kwayaghafé kufarngé téfene ndimbal Ngánján a Wanjarégh ár, Yesu Keriso. 14 Fá té naramai fáyo téfeyot ménát sái ténmanjarngé kétamé méinyotio yaufita a tényátongé njúnnjúnofnar ár efe em yáne kaféghmén ár a ménát sái ewafrotam mer.
bt: God has showed his grace to save all people. 12 It teaches us to stop ungodly life and worldly desires, and to live self-controlled, straight and godly lives in the present days, 13 while we wait for the blessed day who hope for, when the big light(glory) of our big God and Savior, Yesu Keriso will appear. 14 He has given himself for us to save us from all sins and made us without.dust(holy) people who are his chosen people and eager to do good.

nama: Ewatameta yéné yam a yafrota fenjo méinyotio muyaye ménát wawéngsoghét a mbarkánd yátoghét fenjo ár. Árké árom yau so nérete yuwot fefaf.
bt: Teach these things and do with your.s full authority to encourage and to make straight your.s people. Let none of them look down on you.s.

nama: Mat eyátota fenjo ár táf námyotat kétán gafaman limánégh árfaf a muyafé ár. Yémofem táf ewaitotat a afrengéghkaf aem méinyotio mer ásáfoghét. 2 Fá yau táf yaufi si néngamndetat, a aem krufrát a fútar awarnyégh, a túmén merafé yam aem méinyotio árfefaf. 3 Yéné efghon yénd yéndio ténmorwén fifiofnar, áyáréghofnar a mámáfi. Yénd ténmorwén faiofnar ásáfogh ár méinyotio fénaté fifioene wayamnegh a ménde tárfáran. Yéndfem taramangayém téfene ghérsé yaufifaf a waramnjagh, ámb árém méndméndat ténfandawét a yéndfem ndenáyo tafandawém méndméndafé fá. 4 Wénde njam Ngánjánam téfene Wanjarégh árém yuyafotam yánjo meryam a uwégh árét, 5 yémon yénd yénmanjaryéng, yau ménamén téfenjoyo mbarkánd yam wafroghmén, wénde ménamén yánjo ghérghérsisaye. Yémon yénmanjaryéng yénd Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé, emo yénmaramai téfe totér áráfégh a totér ghérsé ménaye umbarghe. 6 Ngánjánam yasuryéng yánjo Mbérmbér téfefaf marataye Yesu Keriso kénjúmé téfene Wanjarégh ár, 7 ménát yánjo ngáráme yénd mbarkánd yényátoi Ngánjánafé a yénmaramai méghmégh tuot ghérsat árké yém téfene sifayé. 8 Yéné si efalo yém. Yénd ménde wém fém sái ewatameta yéné yamfaf, ménát emofem efalo yiyátotat Ngánján so mwighé yéfaronat meryam wafroghét. Yéné árké yém mer watameghét a féyotaro méinyotio árét. 9 Wénde ekarotati mwighafnar éwigh, ákifene tombé yétkwén sénagh, amrorégh, ásmégh nákmén. Yéné sem fifiofnar a kémbunofnar. 10 Yawéngsota sómbinotmé emo yétiane afalogh, a yéné soramé, yau wéikor yéférta fá. 11 Fém mat ném ndené yéné ár sem wasérmbogh ár, a yéfene yaufiyamam eyátote ndené yau em mer.
bt: Make know your.s people they must submit to govenment ruling people and to the people with authority. They must be followed and be ready to do all kind of good work. 2 They must not speak evil, and to be peaceful and friendly, and always to be a gentle toward every people. 3 In that day we ourselves were without.meaning, without.hearing and wrong. We were without.payment working men(servants) to bodily desires and pleasurs of all kinds. We gave our lives to evil and jealousy, other peoples hated us and we also hated them. 4 But when God our Savior showed his kindness and love for the people, 5 he saved us, not because of our doing straight thing, but because he himself has mercy. He saved us through the God Spirit, who gives us new birth and new life by washing. 6 God poured out his Spirit onto us widely through Yesu Keriso our Savior. 7 so that by his grace he might put us straight with God and give us hope for eternal life which is for our place. 8 This talk is a true. I want you.s to teach to these things, so that those who truly approve(believe) God may decide to do good thing. These which are good teaching and beneficial for every people. 9 But avoid without.mind arguments, the list of long names of ancestors, quarrels, and fights about the law. These are without.meaning and without.grain. 10 Warn two times to him who causes division, and after this, do not interact again with them. 11 You know that these people are corrupted man, and their sins prove that they are not good.

nama: Njam yéndon téngwatemban Atemas o Tukikus fefaf, mer yafrota ménát sái yéném tafaf Nikofolis tesenot, ménamén yéndon té mwighé téfaronan sái yunjfan wémor kété. 13 Tafrota fene mer wáutárghét Njenas nák téfnárai a Afolos ménát kénufngend áligh a ténfandangend ndené yéfene té eware rokar féyotaro yéfendio. 14 Téfene ár táf notametat ménát efogh sái ersat mer wafroghan, ménát so néusénat efalo ménde yamot, a fá yau so emor fifiofnar.
bt: When I send Atemas or Tukikus to you.s, do good to come to me in Nikofolis town, because I have decided to stay in the winter there. 13 Do your.s good to help Njenas the law person(laywer) and Afolos to get started on their travels and see that they.d have enough things for themselves.d. 14 Our people must learn to spend their time doing good, in order to provide for real needs, and they should not live without.meaning.

nama: Méinyotio efe em yéna yéndfé kasnetangi fém. Tasnetangi téfene fútaréf ndimbal mwighaye. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
bt: All who are here with me greet you.s. Greet to our friends in the big mind(faith). God's grace will be with you.p all.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé yénd, Fol. Yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon ménamén yénd násáfotan Keriso Yesue. Téfene fútar Timoti yéna yém yéndfé.
bt: This letter is from me, Fol. I am in the darkness house because I serve Keriso Yesu. Our friend Timoti is here with me.

nama: a yáfaf Afiya téfene mérés, yáfaf Akifus téfene fiyaré, a wéi Yesuene mérén árfefaf efe náumendat fene méngon:
bt: and to him Afia our sister, and Akifus our soldier, and also to the Yesu's family(church) people who gather in your.s house:

nama: Ngárám a krufrát so yém feyot téfene Afé Ngánjáneta a Yuré Yesu Keriso. Folene kánjo ramégh a Ngánjánafé orayégh
bt: Grace and peace will be to you.s from our Father God and the Lord Yesu Keriso. Fol's thanksgiving and talking with God

nama: Yéndon túmén kánjo yarametan tane Ngánjáne njam némafarotan fém tane Ngánjánafé oraighan, 5 ménamén yénd náyáretan fene ndimbal mwighamén Yuré Yesuene kénjún a fene uwégh yéfeyot méinyotio Ngánjánene árét. 6 Tane Ngánjánafé orayégh ndené yém téfene fútaryam fémafé ndené fété efalo yátogh ár so yénérsam kénjkam matyam méinyotio frengéghmén árké téfene em téfene ghérsayan Keriso kénjún. 7 Fene uwégham ta kwaramete ndimbal áuwégh a wawéngsogh, ménamén fémo, tane fútarém té ewafrenda méinyotio Ngánjánene árfene tikéf. Folém yéngémndete Filemon yánemén Onesimus
bt: I always give thanks to my God when I remember you.s in my talking with God, 5 because I hear of your.s big mind(faith) in the Lord Yesu and your.p love for them all of God's people. 6 My talking with God is that our friendship with you.s as approving truth people will bring about a deeper understanding of every blessing which we have in our life in Keriso. 7 Your.s love has given me big joy and encouragement, because you, my friend have blessed the hearts of all of God's people. Fol requested to Filemon for him Onesimus

nama: Yénémaménnde, ndemamén Keriso kénjún yénd yuwek wém siot a némafaretan fém ménát wafroghét némé fémo fiya tawafrotang. 9 Wénde, ménamén yénd mat wém ndené fémon túmén euwete ámb ár, yéndon yéné yafrotan, ndemamén yénd wém Fol, efe bulu yém a sénonjo wéi wém kwéfkwéf méngo ár yáne Keriso Yesuene téfnan. 10 Yénd nomnendan fefaf tane ambum Onesimus, efe nénamndai tane ambum Keriso kénjún, njamandio kwémorwén kwéfkwéf méngon yéndon nénamndayén yáne mbérmbére afé. 11 Onesimus, efe fronde témorwén fifiofnar fefaf, wénde sénonjo fifiyafé yém feyot a tayot.
bt: Therefore, although in Keriso I could be free for talk and order you.s to do what you.s ought to do. 9 But, because I know that you.s continually love other people, I do this, even though I am Fol, who is old and now also a darkness house man(prisoner) for his sake of Keriso Yesu. 10 I ask to you.s for my son Onesimus, who became my son in Keriso, while I was in darkness house I have become his spiritual father. 11 Onesimus, who was without.meaning to you.s before, but now he is meaningful for you.s and to me.

nama: Yéndon sénonjo yéngwangotan fá fefaf, efe yéngém tane tikfafé. 13 Yénd yéta ménde kwém sái tangongayén fá yéna yéndfé, njamandio yénd kwéfkwéf méngon wélau mer si téfnan, ménát yémo so wáutáne ta fene sifayan. 14 Wénde yénd méndefnar wém ámb yam sái yafrotan fe matofnaye. Yénd ménde kwém fémo ta sái kwáutánau ménamén fém ménde ném, yau ménamén fém némafaretan. 15 Fá té nafaloi fe tambén yau tekot wénde fémo so tango fendio ambino, 16 yau yém faiofnar ásáfogh árro, wénde namndai minde tukén a yáinde faiofnar ásáfogh ár, ndené fété áuwéghafé fútar. Yéndon yuwetan mindefifi. Wénde sénonjo fémon so yuwete mindefifi. Yémon so fene ásáfogh yafrote ndené fété faiofnar ásáfogh ár, wénde yémon wéi Yurane ásáfogh so yafrote ndené fété fémon kés yafrote.
bt: I am sending him back to you now, who comes my own heart. 13 I would like to keep him here with me, while I am in darkness house for the good talk's sake, so that he could help me in your place. 14 But I did not want to do anything without your.s knowing. I wanted you to help because you were willing, not because I forced you. 15 He was seperated from you.s not long time but you.s might have him back forever, 16 not as only a without.payment working man(servant), but became very much and he surpasses a without.payment working man(servant), as a lovely friend. I love him very much. But now you.s will love him more. He will do your work as a without.payment working man(servant), but he will also do Lord's work, as you do.

nama: Féyo fémo njam yénd mwighaye wékwna ndené fútar wém, tumyo táf fá ndené fété yénd sái kumyo. 18 Njam Onesimusém némé yaufi té yafrotam, yéndo so mbarkánd tiyátong wéikor. Njam yémon té ewanai feta, yéndo so némawafangotan. 19 Yéndo, Folém so yéfarotan yéné férén tanjo ngángaye: Yéndon so fai kémawangongén. Wénde fém so nawafarote yéndo némé té némaramayén fe. Fene ghérsé siyém Ngánjánafé ménamén yéndon kémaufrotan mer si Yesuenemén. 20 Féyo, tane fútar, tafrota tayot yéné ménde Yurane téfnan, ndené fété fútar Keriso kénjún, kwáutána yénd ménát kwiyáto áuwéghafé! 21 Ndené fété yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén, yénd méinyo mat wém fémon so yafrote némat yéndon néngmamnendangén. Efalo yénd mat wém ndené mer yam wafrogh fémon so yafrote yáfaf so taindangé némé yéndon némndetan fém. 22 Ámbiro yamro yém: táf yéfrenda ámb méngo tayot, ménamén tane méghmégh ndené nemnan yém Ngánjánam so káyárangé féfene orayégh ménát yénd so ngwangongé féfefaf.
bt: So if you think of me as friend, welcome him back just as you would welcome me. 18 If Onesimus has done anything wrong to you, I will make it straight again. If he took money from you, I will pay it back. 19 I, Fol will write this letter with my own hand: I will pay you back. But you should remember what I have given to you already.
