nama: Yéné ár tamorwén méinyotio efalo ménamén yéfene ndimbal mwighamén, wénde ámb árom yau yanai némat Ngánjánam té unyéghofnar si norayai, 40 ménamén Ngánjánam té yéfaronam ámb merfifi mwighé téfeyot, ménát mé yéndfé njam yéném so fá táf káyátongi féwénféwénofnar.
bt: These people were all real because of their big mind(faith), yet none of them received what God said without.lying talk, 40 because God had planned something better thinking for us, so that only with us they would be without.flaw(perfect).

nama: Téfefaf em warengéghare tárfár ár endefene ghérsayam yénmaufrotat téfe némé ndimbal mwighane fifi yém, so yénd nérsam waingéghét árkéméné yém frondeyo téfefafta a yau so kékmbongém, yéndfem so ewitérmbotam kétamé téfene ghérsata árké yam kufarngi ghérsé áligh kénjún a yaufiyam árkéménayam mé taikrofnar ténmangongi yénd. 2 Yéndfem ewafrotam yéné ménáyan téfene ghékéf éregh kétán Yesuefaf, endefaf téfene ndimbal mwighé em kétamé rényégh kétán wifogh, fá témorwén ménde ménát krot wáiwáiafé kére wafatarégh wénan ménamén áuwégh yémo yinjoi so témorwén yáne soramayan, a fá yémor Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayata. 3 Nawafarotati ménamén ndernáye fá méinyotio kénawamarotau njam yaufi kér ro árém ámb yaufiyaufiyam tawafrotawét yáfaf, ménát fém yau so kénamndangi muyafnar a nékmbotati. 4 Féfene yaufiyamafé ásmégh kénjún, fémo somé yau kásmetati kétán kérfaf. 5 Wénde fém té ewawalinde Buk si ndené fété Ngánján noraye yáne ambumtértrafefaf, "Njam Yuram tékrátan nékmete fém, yau yéfanda ófaye, a njam yémo nématameta fém, yau táf néwembeta.
bt: We have around us many people whose lives tell us what big mind(faith) means, let us run to win which is before us and never give up, we should remove from our lives something which would hinder in living run and the sin that so easily hold us back. 2 We do these by keeping our eyes onto Yesu, on whom our big mind(faith) depends from start to finish, he was willing to die a shameful death on the cross because of the joy he saw would be in his future, and he sat down at the right of the throne of God. 3 Remember about how he endured all when sinful people did other terrible things to him, so that you.p don't become without.power and give up. 4 In your fighting against sin, you have not yet fight to be killed. 5 But you.p have forgot the Buk(scripture) as God say to his children, "When the Lord punishes you.s, you.s don't see it lightly, and when he teaches you.s, don't give up.

nama: Ménamén Yuram téfél ewaramete yéné ár yémon seuwete, a yémon tékratan ekmete fá yémo seumyote ndené yáne ambum."
bt: Because the Lord discipled those people he loves, and he punishes them whom he accepts as his son.”

nama: Yamarotati táikéryam téfél Ngánjáneta ndené fété yánjo ambum. Efe wét ámb ambum yau yatametam yárefam? 8 Ngánjánam téfél ewaramete méinyotio yánjo ambumat, wénde njam yau yémo téfél ewarameta féfe, táf nde fém yau em efaloe yáne. 9 Téfene fifie afafem téfél yénmarametat téfe a yéndfem mé eutémndam fá yénayan. Nderé minde kéráye so narametam téfene mbérmbére Afafaf a yénmor! 10 Téfene fifie afafem téfél yénmarametat tekofnar efogh, a yémofem ewafrotat kétán fá ndernáye nemnat merot, wénde Ngánjánam téfél yénmaramete ménát téfene merot, ménát fá ménde yém yénd sái yéném njúnnjúnofnar. 11 Téfél yau áuwéghafé yém njam nufrota, wénde tékratafé yém. Wénde soramayan kété so yém mbarkánd a krufrát wau yu yéfeyot efe em watameghan yéné ende.
bt: Endure hardship as discipline from God as his children. Who is any child not disciplined by its father? 8 God gives discipline all of his childen, but if he doesn't give discipleship to you.p, then you.p don't really belong to him. 9 Our bodily fathers give discipline us and we still respect them. How much more should we submit to our spiritual Father and live! 10 Our bodily father gave discipline us for a little while, and they did how they thought good, but God gives discipline us for our good, in order that he wants we may be without.dust(holy). 11 Discipline is not joyful when it is happening, but painful. But in after there will be a straight and peaceful hearvest for those who are in training by this way.

nama: Yénémaménnde, ndémbérndérmbérafé ngángé muyafé táyátongi a féfene njangén budém. 13 Ewafrotati mbarkánd end féfene kafkafot, ménát aknyégh ár yau so eknyang, wénde so mer káyátongi. Ke ménát áyárghét Ngánjánefaf
bt: Therefore, become strong your.p tired hands and your weak knees. 13 Make straight paths for your.p feet, so that the lame will not fall, but they will become good. A call to listen to God

nama: Mato emor krufráte méinyotio árfé, a yufotati ménát so emor mer a njúnnjúnofnar ghérsé, yéfeyot efe yau em njúnnjúnofnar yau so tinjongi Yuré. 15 Kor fété ndené yau ámb ár táf náláita kétamé Ngánjánene ngárámta a njérmat ghafté sérémb yau so nanote ménát sái efunat kérté a ewasérmbota tárfár ár. 16 Néretam kétán yau ámb ár so yém yuwek wal téfnár. Kor fété ndené yau ámb ár yém ngánjánofnar ndené Esau témorwén tándái. Fá yéramai méinyotio ndené so ewanai ndené yáne afane fronde sénko ambum ménát ambinotaro njamkeyot. 17 Ndené fém mat em, yéné soramé, njam fá ménde témorwén yárefane frengégh résaghét yéné mer yam kétamé yárefata, wénde fá yékenai. Féyotarofnar awengoghét témorwén némé yémo yafrotam, ndemamén yéta yengamafé ye nendam.
bt: Try to live in peace with every people, and test to live a clean and without.dust(holy) life, for those who are not without.dust(holy) will not see the Lord. 15 Be careful that no one misses from God's grace and no bitter poisonous root grows up to cause trouble and destroy many people. 16 See to it no one will become free(bad) sex people. Be careful that nobody is godless like Esau was long ago. He gave away everthing that he would have received as his father's firstborn son for only one meal. 17 As you.p know, after that, when he wanted his father's blessing to receive those good things from his father. But he rejected it. It was impossible to change what he had done, even though he tried to beg with tears.

nama: Fém yau yéné sifayat nufarngi ndené Sainai mband tunakéffaf árkéméné so mé tianjangi, kété yau em fés kánkékánké, a kwéfité, a mbormbor; 19 a sufér ke, Israil ár skáyáretawét si kénorayau wénde fá nómnendayénd ménát sái kékmbongai, 20 ménamén yémofem yau tawaitotawét yáne wafarégh si: "Njam árké wéráram tianjangé mband tunakéf, so fété yafyatotat wíme." 21 Yéné sifayé témorwén minde férférafé ánde Moses norayai, "Ngernger wém férférmén."
bt: You.p have not arrive this place like the mountain of Sainai which you.p can touch, there is flaming fire, and darkness, and storm; 19 and trumpet sound, the Israil people heard a talk speaking but they begged it to stop, 20 because they could not follow his commands: “If even an animal touches the mountain, it must be stoned to death.” 21 That place was so terrifying that Moses said, “I am shaking with fear.”

nama: Wénde fém té sénonjo taném Jaion mband tunakéffaf, yéné féyém akegh Ngánjánene ndimbal tesen, yénan njafarmén Jerusalem, ánde tausen a tausen njafar si résagh ár té taném ménát wafyaghét. 23 Fém té taném yéfene áumengéghfaf Ngánjánene fronde sénko ambum, endefene yétkwén ewakai kété njafaran. Fém té taném Ngánjánefaf, efe yém méinyotio árfene mogh téfnár, a kétán mer árfene mbérmbérafefaf efe té eyátoi féwénféwénofnar. 24 Fém té taném yénan Yesuefaf, efe yém néndkéf ár totér árnyéghan, a férék áyátoghfaf. Yéné férkam yáinde Abelene férék a yéné noraye merfifi si téfeyot.
bt: But you.p have now come to Mount Jaion, that is the city of the living God, the heavenly Jerusalem, where thousands upon thousands of men carrying heavenly message(angels) have come to praise. 23 You.p have come to their meeting of God's firstborn children, whose names he wrote there in heaven. You.p have come to God, who is judging man of all people, and to the spirits of the good people who have made without.flaw(perfect). 24 You.p have come to Yesu, who is a middleman of the new covenant, and to the sprinkled blood. This blood surpasses Abel's blood and this [blood] speaks very good talk for us.

nama: Féyo kor fété! Yau táf nakenati áyárghét yáfaf njam Ngánján noraya. Ámb ár kakenawét áyárghét yáfaf njam yémon tawawéngsotau fá yéna mband maratan, a fá yau táf katnongayénd, yénémamén so yém minde yaufi téfeyot njam yénd nakenam áyárghét Ngánjánefaf emo yénmawéngsote yénd kétamé njafarta. 26 Njam fá korayau fronde, yáne siam tésambnetangai mband marat, wénde sénonjo yémo noraye unyéghofnar si, "Ambinotaro wéikor yéndon so yésambnetan yau mé mband maratro wénde njafarafayo." 27 Siam, "ambinotaro wéikor" safénro yénmauyafote téfe ndené méinyotio rokar árkéméné té kufrotau, árkéméné nasambnetat so néngironat, mé yéné rokarro árkéméné yau so nasambnetat so kafrangongi.
bt: So be careful! Do not refuse to listen to him when God speaks. Other people refused to listen to him when he warned them here on earth, and they did not escape, so it will be very bad for us if we refuse to listen to God who warns us from heaven. 26 When he spoke first, his talk shook the earth, but now he has said without.lying talk(promise), “Once again I will shake not only the earth but with the heaven.” 27 The talks “once again” clearly shows us that everything that was made, that is shaken will be destroyed, only these things that cannot be shaken will remain.

nama: Yénémaménnde, yénd so yéném kánjo ramégh ár, ménamén téfene yém warsagh ároene yu árkéménayam yau so yésambnete, yéndfem fai táwefnotangém Ngánjáne yéné ende árkéménayam yéremngote fá utmanéghafé a férférafé, 29 ménamén téfene Ngánján syém ndenanit fés emo yéngwakerne rokar méinyotio.
bt: Therefore, let us come thanks giving people, because we have a king's nation that cannot be shaken, we should worship God in this way that satisfy him with respect and fear, 29 for our God is like a fire who burns things all.

nama: Mé a néngéuwetati fémro kénjún ndené fútar. 2 Yau táf ewawalinda ménát sái eumyotati wan téfnár, yéné yame ámb árém té taumyotawét njafar si résagh ár mafinae. 3 Engwafarotati fá efe enyau kwéfkwéf méngomé ndené fém wéi kar em yéfene ámb kwéfkwéf méngo ár, a fá emofem máméghéraye ewasérmbotat ndenanit fém kar kété em tékrátan.
bt: Keep on loving each other as friends. 2 Do not forget to welcome strangers, by this way some people have welcomed men carrying heavenly message(angels) without knowing it. 3 Remember those who are in darkness house as if you.p might be one of darkness house men(prisoners), and those who are treated very badly as if you.p yourselves were suffering.

nama: Amaf awérégh fái tutémndangi méinyotio árém, a amafafé kémégh sifayé aem njúnnjúnofnaye, ménamén Ngánjánam so táf yénmote amafanyo wal ár a méinyotio yuwek wal ár. 5 Ewarawenati féfenjo ghérsé kétamé mani sái yuwetati a fiya ténremngotangé yéné yam féfene némé té em, ménamén Ngánján té norayai, "Yau so yéndon kénéfrangon fém; yau so yéndon nékarotan fém."
bt: All people should honor marriage, and the place sleep with wife kept pure, for God will judge the adulterers and all the free sex. 5 Protect your.p lives from the love of money and be content with what you.p have, because God has said, “Never will I leave you.s; never will I abandon you.s.”

nama: Yénémamén yénd norayam táikér mwighaye, "Yuré siyém tane wáutárégh ár, féyo yénd yau so férfér wém. Némé so árém yafrotat tafaf?"
bt: So we say with confidence, “The Lord is my helper, so I will not be afraid. What can people do to me?”

nama: Yau ewawalinda yéfenemén féfene limánégh ár, emofem tawatametat fém Ngánjánene si. Nawafarotati ndernáye sáfot ghérsé fá tanmorangérwén a mato a ewam ndimbal mwighé ndené yéfene tawamorwén. 8 Yesu Keriso mé ndenaro yém, káye, sénonjo, a tuot.
bt: Don't forget about them your.p leading men, who taught you.p the talk of God. Remember what kind of lives they lived and try to have big mind(faith) that they have. 8 Yesu Keriso is the same, yesterday, today and forever.

nama: Yau eumyotati méinyotio fénaté sáfot watameghyamam elimnda fém mámáfi endmé. Féfene tikfam fái mé muyé térsangi ménáyan Ngánjánene ngáráman, yau ménáyan sewaitotati nák ménamén njamkemén, árkéménayam kor yau ewáutáne fá emofem ewaitotat. 10 Wénde téfene yém ghéngén kitaré ánde ghéngén wárogh ár efe násáfotat kété wáwefnogh sifayafaf yau yém muyé nénet.
bt: Do not allow all kinds teaching lead you.p wrong way. Your.p hearts should be strengthened by God's grace, not by following rules about food, which do not help those who follow them. 10 But we have an table for burning sacrifice where burning sacrifice men who serve there to the place of worship have no authority to eat.

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém téngérsau wérár férék kénjút Mindefifi Njúnnjúnofnar Sifayat ánde yémo tatétau yéné férék yaufiyammén, wénde wérárafene fifi tawakérnawét wafrogh méngotu téndon. 12 Yesu wéi té kawambetau ndimbal tesen téndo tambén ménát so tayátongai yánjo ár njúnnjúnofnar yánjo férke. 13 Féyo yénd so yéngém kétán Yesuefaf wafrogh méngotu téndot a naweretam taikrataye ndené fá stémorwén njam yénd yénmasalitat. 14 Yéna yéné mband maratan, téfene ámb yau yém ndimbal tesen árkéméné so nakete tuot, wénde yénd mé néretam yéné ndimbal tesenot árkéméné so yéném téfeyot soramé.
bt: The leading burning sacrifice man carries the blood of animals into the Most Without.dust Place where he offers this blood for sins, but the bodies of animals are burned outside the made village(camp). 12 Yesu also suffered outside the city to make his people without.dust(holy) with his own blood. 13 So let us go to Yesu outside the camp and hold strong like he was when they insulted us. 14 Here on this world, we do not have a city which last forever, but we keep on looking for the city which is to come for us later.

nama: Yénémamén yéndfem so túmén ewatetam Ngánjánefaf áuwégh wangogh ghéngén Yesue kénjúmé, árké yém ramégh mbírmbíram yéramete ndené yémndetat fá yém Yuré. 16 Wénde yau ewawalinda mer yam wafrogh a sái nawáutánati fémro kénjún, ménamén yéné féyém ghéngén árkéménayam yéméindat Ngánján áuwéghét.
bt: Therefore Let us always offer praise to God as our sacrifice through Jesus, which is the offering presented by lips that confess he is Lord. 16 But do not forget to do good anf help one another, because these are the sacrifice which please God.

nama: Eutémndati a eyáretati féfene limánégh ár, yémofem féfene ghérsé efandat Ngánjánene téfnan. Ngánjánam so efande yéfene ásáfogh nde té tafrotat mere. Féyo eutémndati, fá so áuwéghafé em Ngánjánene ásáfoghan. Yau táf yaufi si norayati yéfefaf, ménamén yéné yam yau so ewáutánat.
bt: Respect your leaders and obey them. They watch over your lives on God's behalf. God will check to see if they have done their work well. So respect them, they will be happy in the God's work. Do not say bad things against them, because that will never help you.

nama: Ngánjánafé norayati téfeyot, yénd mat yéném ndené téfene mwighé siyém kwayaghayan a ménde yéném ménát sái yénmor utmanéghafé méinyotio ende. 19 Yénd ménde wém féfene Ngánjánafé orayégh mé sénonjo ménát yénd so nénangotan féfefaf wékeye.
bt: Talk with God(pray) for us, we know that our minde is in light and desire to live honorably in every way. 19 I need your.p talking with God right now so that I can come back to you.p quickly.

nama: Krufrat Ngánjánam yanoi téfene Yuré Yesu kétamé kérta, ndimbal sif wanjengégh ár. Ngánjánam tafrotau tuot árnyégh yémafé yánjo árfé, ménaye Yesuene férke. 21 Yéné Ngánjánam so ewamanete fém ménaye méinyotio mer rokare ménamén ewafrotati yáne ménde. A Ngánjánam so ewafrote téfene kénjún némé em áuwéghafé yáfaf, Yesu Kerisoene kénjúmé, yáfaf endefaf so yém ndimbal kwayaghé tuot. Efalo.
bt: The God of peace raised our Lord Yesu from death, the big watching man of the sheep. God made the eternal covenant with his people with Jesu's blood. 21 This God will give you.p all good things for doing his will. And God will work in us what is pleasing to him, through Yesu Keriso, to whom be big light(glory) forever. Amen.

nama: Tane fútaréf, yéndon té téfarotan mé ténjfi fefé ménát féfe wawéngsoghét, a yéndon ewamnendan fém ménát kwaramangi kaka áyárégh némé yénd té norayangén.
bt: My friends, I have written only a short letter to encourage you.p, and I beg you.p to pay close attention to hear what I have said.

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái mat kamndangi ndené téfene fútar Timoti té yutorngi kétamé kwéfkwéf méngota. Njam fá kufarngé wékeye, yéndfé mérne so yénre táf féfe fandaghét.
bt: I want you.p to know that they has released our friend Timoti from darkness house. If he arrives quickly, I will come with him to see you.p.

nama: Esnetati méinyotio féfenjo limánégh ár a méinyotio Yurane ár. Efe em kétamamén Italia engwatembangi ásneghafé si féfeyot.
bt: Kiss/Greet all your.p leading men and all the Lordʼs people. Who are from Italia send [their] greeting talk to you.p.

nama: Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
bt: May God's grace be with you.p all.

nama: Yénd wém Jems, Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Yuré Yesu Kerisoene: Yéndo yéfarotan kétán 12 mérnat efe nofarnaménd mband maratan. Ásneghafé! Ufogh a utarégh yam
bt: I am Jems, a without.payment working man of God and of the Lord Yesu Keriso: I am writing to 12 groups who scattered among world. Greetings! Trial and temptation

nama: Tane fútaréf, náuwetati táf njam eném tárfár ufogh féfefaf, 3 ménamén fém mat em ndené utarégh yéném féfene ndimbal mwighamén yéfune awamarogh. 4 Awamarogham tifongé yáne ásáfogh ménát fém so em sotafé a wifoghkaf, yau so némat náronjati. 5 Njam féfene náláita káfeté mwighé, fémofem so tamnendangi Ngánján, emo ewaramete marataye méinyotio árét, a yémo so ewaramete. Yémo yau so ekarote ómnengéghan. 6 Wénde njam fémofem yamnendati Ngánján, fémofem táf efalo tiyátongi a yau natambnati. Árké ár efe natambnat yém ndenanit sóf arakafan árké yéném a mbormbore tangwaindangé. 7 Yéné ár yau táf nemna yémon so tawanangé ámb rokar kétamé Yurata. 8 Nderé sómbio mwighafé ár siyém, a fá yau taikrataye yém yánjo wafrogh yaman.
bt: My friends, rejoice when many trials come to you.p, 3 because you.p know that the tamptation of your.p big mind(faith) produces endure. 4 Let endure finish its work so that you.p may be mature and complete, you.p will not be lacking anything. 5 If you.p lack wisdom, you.p should ask God, who gives it generously to everone, and he will give them. He will not rebuke you for asking. 6 But when you.p ask God, you.p must truly approve(believe) and not doubt. Whoever doubts is like a wave in the sea which is come and passed by the wind. 7 That person should not think to receive anything from the Lord. 8 Such a person is double-minded, and he is not stable in all his doing.

nama: Efalo yátogh ár efe yém yauyau táf ayém áuwéghafé, ménamén Ngánjánene ghékfan yéné ár siyém ndimbal utmanéghafé. 10 A ár efe em wemár fiya tam áuwéghafé njam Ngánjánam taweworngé fá. Ménamén wemár ár so kawaindangi ndenanit mbumbu kéghatan. 11 Efogh nénareinde waftafé a ghérnat eyátote yéghmén mbém, a yéfene mbumbu nuitat, a yéfene mer kolindangé. Ndené ende, wemár ár so kolindangi njamandio fá mé engém ásáfoghan.
bt: Truly approving man who is poor must be glad, because in God's eyes he is a man with great honor. 10 And people who are rich must be glad when God brings them down. For the rich will pass away like the flower in thebush. 11 The sun rises with strong and becomes dry the plant, and their flowers fall off, and their beauty is destroyed. In the same way, the rich people will be destroyed while they are going in working.

nama: Frengéghkaf fá em efe ndimbal mwighé kér ro em ufoghan, ménamén njam yémofem taindangi yéné ufoghyam, yémofem so tawanangi yéfenjo ghérsamén fai árkéméné Ngánjánam té unyéghofnar si emndai fá emofem yuwetat. 13 Njam yénd ufoghan yéném, yénd yau táf norayam, "Yéné ufoghyam yéném kétamé Ngánjáneta." Ménamén Ngánján yau so yufote yaufiyamam, a Ngánjánam yau yufote efe. 14 Wénde yénd yénmufotat njam yénd téngmanangé a ténmumbangé téfenjo yaufi méndeyam. 15 Féyo, téfenjo yaufi méndeyam téfunangé a tráftangé yaufi, a yaufiyam, njam nanota, traftangé kér.
bt: Blessed are those who are faithful under trials, because when they passed such a trial, they will receive their reward the life which God has done without.lying talk(promise) to those who love him. 13 If we are in trials, we must not say, “This temptation comes from God.” Because God cannot be tempt ed by evil, and he himself tempts no one. 14 But we are tempted when we are took us away and trapped by our own evil desires. 15 Then, our evil desires conceive and give birth to sin, and sin, when it is grown, gives birth to death.

nama: Tane áuwéghafé fútaréf, yau táf ewawindat. 17 Méinyotio mer a féwénféwénofnar ramégh nénewone kétamé tukta, njafarmén kwayaghé Afata, efe yau nawengote ndenanit witrémbogh mbanmban. 18 Yánjo méndeyan yémon yénmanai yénd árot yényátoi efalo si kénjúmé, ménát yéndfem so tawanangém fronde sifayé yáne méinyotio wafrogh rokarta. Áyárégh a wafrogh
bt: My dear friends, do not be deceived. 17 Every good and without.flaw(perfect) gift come down from above, from the Father of the heavenly lights, who does not change like shifting shadows. 18 By his own will he brought us into being people through the talk of truth, so that we should have first place among all his creatures. Hearing and doing

nama: Tane áuwéghafé fútaréf, nawafarotati yéné: Méinyotio ár aem wékeye áyárghét, awáneghe siyot a awáneghe nékwot. 20 Ároene nékwam yau yénérse mbarkánd ghérsé árkéméné Ngánján ménde yém. 21 Yénémamén, ewitrombotati méinyotio mámáfi yam a yaufi wafroghyam. Yiyáretati Ngánján a tanangi si ndené yémon eite féfene tikfan, árkéménayam so tawanjarngé fém.
bt: My loving friends, remember this: Everyone must be quick to listen, but delay speaking and delay to become angry. 20 Human anger does not carry the straight life that God desires. 21 Therefore, take away every bad things and wicked action. Obey to God and accept the talk that he plants in your.p hearts, which will save you.p.

nama: Yau náyáretati siro, a nawawindati fémyo. Ewafrotati ndernáye noraye. 23 Árké ár efe náyárete kétán sifaf wénde yau ewafrote ndernáye noraye fá yém ndené ár emo yéfande yánjo sáf glasan. 24 Fáyo afandagh soramé, nguwanongé a tekofnar tawalindangé nderé sáfot fá yém. 25 Wénde njam fém néretati kaka kétán féwénféwénofnar nákfaf árkéménayam ár yuwek táyátongé, a miya engém féfene mwighayan a yau áyáréghanro a tawawalindangé, wénde tákmangi wafroghyaman. Fém so tafrendangé Ngánjánam némé fémofem ewafrotati.
bt: Do not only listen to the talk, and deceive yourselves. Do how it says. 23 Anyone who listens to the talk but does not do how it says is same man who looks at his own face in a glass. 24 After looking at himself, goes away and immediately forget which shape he was. 25 But if you.p look closely into the without.flaw law that makes people free, and keep on going in your. mind and do not simply listen and forget it, but put it into action. God will bless you.p in what you.p do.

nama: Njam fém namndetati sái em ngánján ghérsafé wénde yau ewarawenati féfene kanké, fém nawawindati fémyo, a féfene ngánján ghérsé siyém fifiofnar. 27 Némé Ngánján Afam yumyote ndené njúnnjúnofnar a téfnofnar ngánján ghérsé siyém: ndené sái ewarawenam séfarékw ambum a kwiré yéfene tékrata a nawarawenam yéndio kétamé mbandoene wasérmboghta.
bt: If you.p say you.p are religious but you.p do not control your.p tongues, you.p deceive yourselves and your.p religion is without.meaning. 27 What God the Father allows that without.dust(holy) and without.fault(undefiled) religion is: that we take care of orphans and widows from their suffering and keep ourselves from corruption of the world.

nama: Tane fútar, ndené fété efalo yátogh ár téfene ndimbal kwayaghé Yuré Yesu Kerisoene kénjún, yau yuyafotati ámb árfaro afrengégh. 2 Táf ár njam yéném féfene áumengéghfaf yénmawogh gol ghilghil a mer sáláme, a yauyau ár kérkéf sálámefé wéi kényawangé. 3 Njam fémofem yuyafotati minde utmanégh yéné ároe efe yawo mer sáláme a korayangi, "Siyém mer ámnjoghét sifayé feyot," wénde korayangi yauyau ároefaf, "Fém kokai kété," o "Kámnjo yuwan tane kafkaffaf." 4 Fém yau so nawasalitati féfene kénjún a kénamndangi mogh ár yaufi mwighafé.
bt: My friends, as approving truth people in our glorious Lord Yesu Keriso, you.p must not show prefering only some people(favoritism). 2 If a person who wears a gold ring and fine clothes comes to your.p meeting, and a poor man with old clothes also enters. 3 If you.p show more respect to that man who are wearing good clothes and say to him, “Have a good seat for you,” but say to the poor man, “Stand over there," or "Sit under at my feet.” 4 You.p must not discriminate among yourselves and become judge people with evil minds.

nama: Tane áuwéghafé fútaréf, náyáretati. Ngánjánam té ekafete yauyau ár mband maratan sái em wemár ndimbal mwighayan a sái tanangi Ngánján limánégh Ngánjánam árké unyéghofnar si norayai yéfeyot emofem yuwetat fá. 6 Wénde fémofem té tawasérmbotati yauyau ár. Emofem ewawérsotat fém a ekmetat fém kétán nák sifayat? Wemár árém. 7 Fá yéné fem emofem yaghnat yáne tukén yétkwén fém endene em.
bt: My loving friends, listen. God has chosen the poor people in the world to be rich in big mind(faith) and to possess the God's kingdom which God said without.lying talk(promised) to those who love him. 6 But you.p have ignored poor people! Who are oppressing you.p? Who are putting you.p into law place? Rich man. 7 They are the ones who speak evil of his high name of him to whom you belong.

nama: Fémofem mere ewafrotati njam ewaitotati nák Ngánján limánéghmén Buk sian, "Fémo euweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fété fémyo." 9 Wénde njam fémofem yuyafotati ámb árfaro afrengégh, fémofem yafrotati yaufiyam a nákam eyátote ndené nák rafarégh ár em. 10 Emo njam yérafna ámbiro nák fá méinyotio nák rafarégh ár kamndangé. 11 Fá efe norayai, "Yau amafanyo awanégh," wéi norayai, "Yau ár ngi." Njam fémofem yau ewanetati amafanyo wénde ár yésmetati, fém té nénamndangi nák rafarégh ár. 12 Norayati a ewafrotati ndené efe so em moghan náke árkéménayam yénmaramete yuwek, 13 ménamén mogh ghérghérsisafnar so yuyafote árké ároefaf téu efe yau tém ghérghérsisafé. Ghérghérsisayam taindangé mogh. Ndimbal mwighé a wafroghyam
bt: You.p do well if you.p obey the law of the God's kingdom in the Buk(scripture), “Love your friend as yourself.” 9 But if you.p show prefering only some people(favoritism), you.p do sin and the law makes you.p as lawbreakers are. 10 Whoever breaks one commandment become breaker all commandment. 11 He who said, “Do not commit adultery,” also said, “Do not commit murder.” If you.p do not commit adultery but commit murder, you.p have become a lawbreaker 12 Speak and do as people who will be in judge by the law that makes us free, 13 because judgment without mercy will be shown to anyone who has not been merciful. Mercy surpasses judgment. Faith and Actions

nama: Tane fútaréf, némé mer yém njam ámb ár nawarsa ménamén ndimbal mwighamén wénde yau yém wafroghyam? Féyotaro ndené ndimbal mwighayam so tanjarngé fá? 15 Wafarnjaghét, njam fém mat em ámb ár endefene yau em sáláme a njamke. 16 Njam fém ámb koraya yéfefaf, "Nguwanongi mere. Mé so engém suafé," wénde yau ewawafrota yéfene ménde némat em, némé mer yéné yém? 17 Ndené endeyo, ndimbal mwigharo njam yém wénde yau yém wafroghyam, kérwén yém.
bt: My friends, what is good if someone boasts about big mind(faith) but has not actions? Can that big mind(faith) save you.p? 15 To illustate, if you.p know anyone who has not clothes and food. 16 If one of you.p says to them, “Go well. You.p will be satisfied,” but does not do their needs what are, what good is it? 17 In the same way, if it is only big mind(faith) but it is not action, is dead.

nama: Wénde ámb ár so korayangé, "Fefaf yém ndimbal mwighé, tafaf yém wafroghyam."
bt: But someone will say, “You.s have big mind(faith), I am deeds.”

nama: Fémofem efalo yiyátotati ndené yénayém ámbiro Ngánján? Mer! Ndené yame yaufi mbérmbéram efalo yiyátotat a néwérsotat férférafé.
bt: Do you.p truly approve(believe) that there is only one God? Good! In the same way the evil spirit truly approve(believe) and tremble with fear.

nama: Fém onon ár, fém ménde ném téfén ndené ndimbal mwighé wafroghyamofnar siyém fifiofnar? 21 Téfene áki Ebraam yiyátoi mbarkánd kétán némé yémo yafrotam njam yémo yéramai yánjoyo ambum Aisek ghéngén wárogh kitarayan. 22 Fémo tinjo ndené yáne ndimbal mwighé a yáne wafroghyam starwén kásáfowét mérne, a yáne ndimbal mwighé yiyátoi efalo yénayan yémo némé yafrotam. 23 A Buk si efalo náyátoi árké noraye, "Ebraamém efalo tiyátotau Ngánján, yumyoyéng fá mbarkánd yammén, " a fá témndetawét Ngánjánene fútar. 24 Fémofem efandati ndené ár so néretat mbarkánd ménáyan némé yémofem ewafrotat yau mé ndimbal mwighayero.
bt: You foolish man, do you.s want evidence that big mind(faith) without actions is without.meaning? 21 Our father Ebraam become straight for what he did when he gave his own son Aisek on the table for burning sacrifice. 22 You.s see that his big mind(faith) and his actions were working together, and his big mind(faith) was became true by what he did. 23 And the Buk(scripture) came true which said, “Ebraam truly approved(believed) God, accepted to him as straightness,” and they called him Godʼs friend. 24 You.p see that people will be considered straight by what they do and not by big mind(faith) alone.

nama: Ndené endeyo, Raab, árfé awanégh téfnár yiyátoi mbarkánd yénayan némé yémo yafrotam njam yémo eumyoi ayamégh téfnár a engwatembai fá fénaté endmé. 26 Ndené fété fifi kés yém mbérmbérofnar kérwén, yénémamén ndimbal mwighé wafroghyamofnar wéi yém kérwén.
bt: In the same way, Raab, the prostitute considered straight for what she did when she allowed to the spies and sent them off in a different way? 26 As the body without the spirit is dead, so also big mind(faith) without actions is dead.

nama: Tane fútaréf, tárfár yau so em watamegh ár ménamén fém mat em ndené yéndfem emofem ewatametam so yéném moghan mindefifi. 2 Yéndfem méinyotio tárfár ende yam elaitam. Njam ámb ár yau noraye ámb yammén ndené yaufi yém, yéné ár yém féwénféwénofnar. Yénayam yuyafote ndené fá féyotaro em so yamarote yáne méinyotio fifi.
bt: My friends, not many of you.p should become teaching men because you.p know that we who teach will be in judge more strongly. 2 We all make mistake in many ways. If someone never says anything that is bad, that person is without.flaw(perfect). It shows that he can control his whole body.

nama: Njam yéndfem tényawangém némbne tot téfén osafene sénfneyan ménát yénd sái yényáretat, yéndfem féyotaro so yakeindam Osoene méinyotio fifi. 4 Wéikor, tanangém matyam boutta. Ndemamén fá em minde ndimbal a yérsé ndimbal mbormboram, wénde némbne wawerégh rokaram ewasemnat ándan résagh ár ménde yém álighét. 5 Ndené yameyo, kanké siyém némbnar fifi kafe, wénde fá so noraye ndimbal yammén. Yéfandam nderé némbne fésam táf yakérne ndimbal wénaro. 6 Kanké ndenanit yém fés, yéné siyém yaufiyamoene mband marat yém. Yénayam yasérmbote méinyotio fifi, tákmangé méinyotio yéfene ghérsé fésan, a fá fáyo kakmangé fésén árké yéném kétándmé kwémbofnar yékwta.
bt: When we put a piece of iron into the mouths of horses to make them obey us, we can control the whole body of the horse. 4 Also, take an knowledge from bout. Although they are very large and strong winds carry it, but small holding thing control them where the carrying man wants to go. 5 In the same way, the tongue is a small body part, but it can say big things. See how small fire burn away big forest. 6 The tongue is like a fire, it is a world of wickedness. It corrupts the whole body, sets the whole their life on fire, and it itself is set on fire which comes to it from the hell.

nama: Árém so ewarawenat méinyotio fénatafénaté wérár, men, kamban, wagif. 8 Wénde yau árké árom so yarawene kanké. Yéné siyém wamaroghofnar yaufi, áfoghare férndén.
bt: People can control all kinds of animals, birds, snakes and fish. 8 But no person can control the tongue. This is a uncontrollable evil, full of poison.

nama: Yéné kankaye yéndfem yuwetam téfene Yuré a Afé, a yénayeyo yéndfem ewafalngotam ár, efe Ngánjánam té ewafrotam Yáne sáfot. 10 Ndené kanké tambén yéném áuwégh a wafalngogh. Tane fútaréf, yéné yam fiya yau tam. 11 Féyotaro so sómbio nu fifi a sol nu nénérsét kétamé ámbiro wérér nu yékwta? 12 Tane fútaréf, féyotaro fig wénam so téfunangé olif, o géreif mbwe ménj am téfunangé fig? Féyotarofnar yém sol nu yékwam sái téfunangé nu fifi. Sómbio sáfot káfeté mwighé
bt: By this tongue we praise our Lord and Father, and by it we curse people, who God made in Godʼs likeness. 10 Out of the same mouth come praise and cursing. My friends, this thing should not be. 11 Can both fresh water and salt water flow from the one water hole? 12 My friends, can a fig tree can bear olives, or a grapevine bear figs? A salty water hole cannot produce fresh water. Two kinds of Wisdom

nama: Efe ámb yém káfeté mwighafé a matyamafé féfene kénjún? Fémofem táf yuyafotati féfenjo mer ghérsaye, ménaye yam wafrogh métare árké yéném káfeté mwighata. 14 Wénde njam fémofem ewarambnotati waramnjagh, méndménd, a nité féfene tikfan, yau táf mé nawarmbotati yénémamén o yékenati efalo. 15 Yéné káfeté mwighé yau yéném kétamé njafarta wénde yém mbandmén, mbérmbérofnar, yaufi mbérmbéroeta. 16 Féfene ánde em waramnjagh a nité, kété fémofem tinjongi awasérmbogh a méinyotio yaufi wafroghyam.
bt: Who is wise and understanding among you.p? You should show it by your.p good life, by deeds done with the humility which comes from wisdom. 14 But if you.p have jealous, hatred, and selfish in your.p hearts, do not boast about it or deny the truth. 15 Such wisdom does not come down from heaven but is from earth, unspiritual, evil spirit. 16 Where you.p have jeolousy and selfishness, there you.p find spoiling and every evil action.

nama: Wénde káfeté mwighé árké yéném kétamé njafarta yém fronde yém njúnnjúnofnar; krufrát wafrogh, merafé yam, amyoghar, afoghare ghérghérsisé a mer mbwe, yau ámb árfaro afrengégh a unyéghofnar. 18 Krufrát wafrogh ár emofem eitat krufrátoene mbwe yéférnat mbarkánd ghérsé.
bt: But the wisdom which comes from heaven is first of all pure; peace making, gentle, submissive, full of mercy and good fruit, no perfering only some people(favoritism) and no lying. 18 Peacemakers who plant the seeds of peace harvest straight life.

nama: Némayam yéfune ásmégh a amrorégh féfe kénjún? Yéné eném kétamé féfenjo fifi méndeta árkéméné násmét féfene kénjún. 2 Fém ámb rokarot ménde em wénde yau ewam, féyo fémofem esmetati krot. Fémofem tikfe ersati rokar árkéméné féfene yau em. Wénde féfene yéné yau so em némat fém em ménde, féyo fém namronati a násmétati. Féfene yéné yau ewam ménamén fémofem yau yamnendati Ngánján. 3 Njam fém nómnendati, fémofem yau tawinjongi, ménamén fene mwighé em yaufi; fém nómnendati rokarot féfene fifioene méndeye.
bt: What causes fights and quarrels among you.p? These come from your.p bodily desires that fight in you.p. 2 You.p want other things but do not have, so you.p kill. You.p with heart try to get things that are not yours. But you.p cannot get what you.p want, so you.p quarrel and fight. You do not have these things because you.p do not ask God. 3 When you.p ask, you.p do not receive, because your.p mind are wrong, you.p ask for things for your.p bodily pleasures.

nama: Fém awerghanyo awanégh téfnár, fém táf mat em ndené mband maratafé fútaryam siyém nékwafé kétán Ngánjáne. Árké ár efe sái ménde yém sái kamndangé mband maratoene fútar kénáyátongé Ngánjánene mék téfnár. 5 Yau ndené nemnati Buk si noraye fifiofnar yém, "Ngánjánam mbérmbér árké yékmai téfene kénjún aramnjagh afoghare yém."
bt: You.p adulterous people, you.p should know that friendship with the world is with angry to God. Anyone who wants to be a friend of the world becomes an enemy of God. 5 Don't think that Scripture says without reason, "The spirit that God put in us is filled with jealousy."

nama: Wénde yémo yénmaramete téfe mindefifi ngárám. Yéné téfnan Buk si noraye: "Ngánjánam ekarote tuktuk ár wénde yuyafote ménde yéfe yuwan árét."
bt: But he gives us more grace. That is why Scripture says: “God opposes proud people but shows favor them to humble people.”

nama: Karamangi fémyo Ngánjánefaf. Yékarotati yaufi mbérmbér a fá so kitérmbongé féfe tambén. 8 Taném kaka Ngánjánefaf a fá so yéném kaka féfefaf. Eumbnati féfenjo ngángé, fém yaufi ár, a eumbnati féfenjo tikéf, fém sómbio mwighafé. 9 Áuwéghofnar, nawárametati a nendati. Tawengongi féfene fén kétán yefaf a féfene áuwégh kétán áuwéghofnar. 10 Yuwan náyátotati fémyo Yurane rére, a yémon so tauyongé.
bt: Give yourselves to God. Resist the evil spirit and he will flee from you.p. 8 Come near to God and he will come near to you.p. Wash your.p hands, you.p sinners, and purify your.p hearts, you.p with two mind. 9 Without.joy(Grieve), mourn and weep. Change your.p laughter to mourning and your.p joy to without.joy(sadness). 10 Become humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will lift you.p up.

nama: Tane fútaréf, yau yaufi si namndetati fémro fémro. Árké ár njam yaufi si noraya yánjo fútarefaf, fá yaufi si noraye nákfaf a moghan yékmete nák. Njam fémofem yékmetati moghan nák, fémofem yau yaitotati nák, wénde fém té mogh téfnárnit namndangi. 12 Ngánjánro yém Nák ramégh ár a Mogh ár. Yémonro so féyotaro ténmanjarngé a ténmirorngé. Wénde fém efe em sái moghan yékmetati féfenjo fútar. Awarsagh kaitaumén
bt: My friends, do not say bad talk one another. If anyone who says bad talk to his friend, he say bad talk to the law and put in judge the law. If you.p put in judge the law, you.p are not obeying the law, but you.p have become like a judge. 12 God is the only lawgiver and Judge. He alone can save and destroy. But who are you.p to put in judge your.p friend? Boasting about tomorrow

nama: Sénonjo kwiyárangi, fém efe norayat, "Sénonjo efghon o káye yénd so yénngém yénan o yéné ndimbal tesenot, so yitam yunjéf kété, sái néusénam a yafrotam mani." 14 Fém yau mat em némé so katyarngé káye. Féfene ghérsé em esnit árké kufarngi mé tekofnar a ngolindangi. 15 Wénde, fém ndené fái korayangi, "Njam yém Yurane ménde, yénd so yénmor a yafrotam yéné o ámb kés." 16 Ndené siyém, fém nawarmbotati a tuktuk si norayati, méinyotio tuktuk siyém yaufi. 17 Yénémaménnde, yéndfem yau njam ewafrotam mer yéné yéndfem sái tawafrotangém, yéndfem yaufiyam téfé yafrotam.
bt: Now listen to me, you.p who say, “Today or tomorrow we will go to this or that city, will spend a year there, prepare and make money.” 14 You.p do not know what will happen tomorrow. Your.p life are a mist which appears for a little while and disappears. 15 Instead, you.p should say, “If it is the Lordʼs will, we will live and do this or other.” 16 As it is, you.p are proud and you.p say boasting talk, all boasting is evil. 17 So then, if we do not do the good we know we should do, we are sinning.

nama: Fém wemár ár, káyárangi tafaf. Ye nendati a nawarametati ménamén wasnengégh árké yéném féfeyot. 2 Féfene wemár rokar norndat a ghénjam enetat féfene sáláme. 3 Féfene gol a silfé em nekérnekérafé a yéfene nekérnekér so em afroghét féfenemén a so enetat féfene fifi ndenanit fés. Fémofem tumendati rokar kerker efghon. 4 Wénde fémofem yau ámb fai tawafrotati yéné ár efe kásáfotat féfene ndawan. Káyárangi! Fémofem té tawasotati fá a sénonjo fá nawatarnat féfefaf. Ndimbal Waftafé Yuram té eyáré fá njam fá kutnat yáfaf ménát wáutárghét. Fá mat yém ndené fém sem kértafé. 5 Fém té tamor yéna mband maratan kawayotati mer rokare. Fém té kéminati yéné kwéfot ngifaf. 6 Fémofem té takmetati kértayan a tásmetati krot ménd ár, emofem yau kénkarotawét fém. Métar tékrat kénjún
bt: You.p rich people, listen to me. Weep and cry because of the misery which is coming on you.p. 2 Your.p rich things are rotted and moths have eaten your.p clothes. 3 Your.p gold and silver have rusted and their rust will testify about you.p and eat your.p body like fire. You.p have stored things in the last days. 4 But you.p have not paid anything to these people who worked in your gardens. Listen! You.p have cheated them and now they are complaining to you.p. The Lord Almighty has heard them when they shout to him for help. He knows that you are guilty. 5 You.p have lived on earth to store good things for yourselves. You have fattened yourselves in the day of slaughter. 6 You.p have put in suffering and murdered the innocent one, who did not resist you.p. Patience in Suffering

nama: Fútaréf, aem métar kétánotio Yurane angogh. Yéfandati ndernáye ndau téfnár nawanjete mbandfaf sái efuna merfifi njamke téfén, a nderé métare nawanjete kétán ufértogh a kianj nufaf. 8 Fém wéi táf aem métar a ewakai taikre, ménamén Yurane angogh siyém kaka. 9 Fútaréf, yau nawatarnati fémro fémro o fém so em moghan. Mogh téfnár yakai kaka sésafnefaf.
bt: Friends, be patient until the Lordʼs coming. See how the farmer waits for the land to produce good crop, and how patient they are waiting for the early and the last rains. 8 You.p also must be patient and stand firm, because the Lordʼs coming is near. 9 Friends, donʼt complain one another or you.p will be in judge. Judging man is standing at the door.

nama: Fútaréf, nawafarotati Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár efe korayawét Yurane yétkwénan. Fémofem túmén so ewaitotati yéfene yam. 11 Fém mat em yéndfem efalo eyátotam fá em frengégh efe té kawamarotawét. Fém té káyáretawét Jobene awamaroghmén, a té yinjoi némé Yuram té yénmarsam kétán kerkerfaf. Yuré yém minde mer a ghérghérsisé afoghare.
bt: Friends, remember the God's people who make know(prophets) who spoke in the name of the Lord. You.p must continually follow their actions. 11 You.p know we truly approve as blessed those who have endured. You.p have heard of Jobʼs endurance, and have seen what the Lord has brought us to the end. The Lord is very kind and full of mercy.

nama: Yéné tukén méinyotio, tane fútar, yau táf olaghofnar si norayati njafare o mband maratoe o ámb rokare. Méinyotio féfene siot sái ewam nekambe "O" o "Yau, " a féyo fém yau so eném Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbanan.
bt: Above all, my friends, do not say without.changing talk(swear) by heaven or by earth or by anything else. All your.p saying is a simple “Yes” or “No,” and then you.p will not come under God's judgement.

nama: Té fém ámb em kértayan? Fá so Ngánjánafé norayat. Té ámb em áuwéghan? Yémofem so eufanat wagh áuwéghafé. 14 Té ámb em enjnefé? Yémofem so tamotangi Yesuene mérén sénko ár ménát Ngánjánefaf oraighét yéfeyot a efaghanat oile Yurane yétkwénan. 15 A Ngánjánafé orayégh wategh ndimbal mwighayan so tayátongé enjnefé ár mer a Yuram so tafrendangé. Njam yémofem té tafrotat yaufiyam, yéfene so tawawayangé.
bt: Are any among you.p in trouble? They should talk with God. Are any happy? They should sing songs of praise. 14 Are any among you.p sick? They should call the head people of the Yesu's family(church) to talk with God over them and anoint them with oil in the name of the Lord. 15 And the talking with God offered in big mind(faith) will make sick man well, and the Lord will heal them. If they have committed sin, they will be washed.

nama: Yénémaménnde eufanati féfenjo yaufiyam féfenjo kénjún a Ngánjánafé norayati féfenjo kénjún ménát fém so mer káyátongi. Mbarkánd ároene Ngánjánafé orayégh siyém wafté kér ro a féyotaro yém ámb ár wáutárghét.
bt: Therefore confess your.p sins to each other and talk with God for each other so that you.p may become good. The talking with God of a straight person is powerful and is able to help others.

nama: Elaija témorwén ár ndené fété yénd. Fá Ngánjánafé koraiwét tikfe ndené yau so nu kafamndau, a yau nafamndam mbandan nambio a mbarmbar yunjéf. 18 Wéikor fá Ngánjánafé koraiwét, a njafaram yéramayéng nu, a mbandam wanogh yéngwafngoi njamke téfén. 19 Tane fútaréf, táf ámb fém njam néwérsota kétamé efalota a ámb árom so fété fá ténmangongé wéikor, 20 nawafarotati yéné: Emo njam tengongé yaufiyam téfnár kétamé mbarkándofnaye yamta so tanjarngé fá kétamé kérta a tawalindangé tárfár yaufiyam.
bt: Elija was man like us. He talked with God with heart that it would not rain, and it did not rain on the land for three and a half years. 18 Again he talked with God, and the heavens gave rain, and the ground started producing its crops. 19 My friends, if one of you.p should wander from the truth and someone should bring that person back, 20 remember this: Whoever turns a sinner from the without.straightness of their way will save them from death and forgive many sins.

nama: Yénd wém Fité, Yesu Kerisoene muyafé ár.
bt: I am Fitè, a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) of Yesu Keriso,

nama: Afé Ngánján mat témorwén a ekafai frondeyo, a Ngánján Mbérmbéram té eyátoi fém njúnnjúnofnar. Féyo fémofem té yiyáretati Yesu Keriso a yáné férkam eumbaryéng fém. Ngárám a krufrát so yém féfene méinyoe. Áuwégh Ngánjáneyot ghérsamén méghmégh
bt: The Father God knew and chose in the firstly, a God Spirit has made you without.dust. So, you have heard Yesu Keriso and his blood washed you.p. May grace and peace be yours fully. Praise to God for a living hope

nama: Áuwégh kétán Afé Ngánjáne a téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso! Yánjo ndimbal ghérghérsisaye yémo té yénmaramai téfe totér áráfégh kétán ghérsamén méghmégh yéné kénjún Yesu Kerisoene anogh kétamé kérta. 4 Yénd nawanjetam sái tawanangém méinyotio mer rokar Ngánjánam árké té tafrende téfeyot. Árké árém yau so ewaghne o ewasérmbote or yau so kérkéf kamndangi. Ngánjánam ewamnde yéné rokar njafaran féfeyot. 5 A ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé Ngánjánam ewanjane yáne waftaye kétánotio fémofem so tanangi yéné wanjarégh, árké yém frengéghkaf sái nufrota kerker efghon.
bt: Praise to Father the God and our Lord Yesu Keriso! By his big mercy he has given us new birth into a living hope through this the rising of Yesu Keriso from the dead, 4 We wait to receive all the good things that God has prepared for us. Nobody can ever destroy those things or spoil them or make old. God is keeping these things heaven for you.p. 5 And through big mind(faith), God keeps you.p safe by his power until you will receive this salvation, which is ready to be revealed in the last time.

nama: Méinyotio yénémamén fém ndimbale náuwétati, ndemamén sénonjo tekofnarot áuwéghofnar em méinyotio fénaté ufoghyamamé. 7 Yéfene fifi siyém yiyátote ndené féfene ndimbal mwighé so em mer. Ndené fété gol yufotaménd fésan, féfene ndimbal mwighé, árkéménayam yáinde gol, so yém ufoghan, ménát so nawamarotati. Fémofem so tawanangi áuwégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a utmanégh yéné efghon njam Yesu Keriso kufarngé. 8 Fémofem yau yinjoyénd Yesu, wénde mé yuwetati fá, a fémofem yau yéfandati Yesu sénonjo, wénde efalo yiyátotati fá. Féyo fém so náuwétati ndimbale a ndimbal kwayaghafé áuwéghe árkéméné siam yau so yafenat. 9 Ménamén fémofem tanangi wanjarégh, árké yém fai féfene ndimbal mwighamén yáne kénjún.
bt: Because of all this, you.p rejoice very much, even though now for a little time you.p have to be without.joy through all kinds of trials. 7 Their purpose is to prove that your faith is genuine. Like as gold is tested by fire, your faith, which surpasses gold, must also be tested, so that you can endure. You will receive praise and big light(glory) and honor on that day when Yesu Keriso appears. 8 You.p have not seen Yesu, but you.p keep on loving him, and you.p do not see Yesu now but you.p truly approve(believe) him. So you.p will rejoice with a big and glorious joy which talks cannot explain. 9 Because you.p are receiving the salvation, which is the reward for your.p big mind(faith) in him.

nama: Yéné wanjaréghmén, Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém téronjawét merkéráye a ndimbal waraweréghafé, a kafrotawét yéné ngárámmén árkéméné Ngánjánam so tawaramangai féfe. 11 Yémofem yéta téronjawét endefaf Kerisoene Mbérmbér témorwén yéfene kénjún té tawauyafotau a árké efoghmén fá korayau, njam fá korayau fronde ndené Kerisom so yamarote tékrat a ndimbal kwayaghé árkéménayam so yaitote. 12 Ngánjánam tuyafotau yáne Ngánjánene mat yátogh árét ndené yánjo si yénémamén témorwén yau efalo yéfe wáutárghét wénde féfe wáutárghét. Wénde, Ngánjánam yénmafaretam yánjo si yéfe Ngánjánene mat yátogh árét féfe wáutárghét. Yéné si siyém mer si Yesu Kerisoenemén árké yém fémofem sénonjo té náyáretati. Ngánjánam yénmafaretam Ngánján Mbérmbér njafarta ár wáutárghét ménát sái ewaufroyénd mer si féfe. Yéné siyém minde merfifi yém ndené njafar si résagh ár so ménde tamorwén matot. Aem njúnnjúnofnar
bt: About this salvation, the God's people who make know(prophets) searched carefully and with big care, and spoke of the grace which God will give you.p, 11 They tried to find out whom the Keriso's Spirit in them was showing to, and what time he was talking about, when he told first that Keriso would have to endure the suffering and the big light(glory) that would follow. 12 God showed his God's people who make know(prophets) that his talks about these things were not really to help them, but to help you.p. But, God sent his talks to the God's people who make know(prophets) to help you. That talk is the good talk about Yesu Keriso which you have now heard. God sent his God Spirit from heaven to help people to tell the good talk to you.p. It is so good that men carrying heavenly message(angels) would like to understand. Be without.dust

nama: Yénémaménnde, féfene mwighé tafrendangi ásáfoghét. Kor aem a tákmangi féfene méghmégh méinyoe frengéghfaf árkéméné Ngánjánam so tawaramangé féfe njam Yesu Keriso kufarngé. 14 Aem áyárégh kér ro Ngánjánefaf, a yau eumyotati féfenjo ghérsé sái efanat yéné méndeyam njam fém mé tamorwén áyáréghofnar. 15 Wénde, ndené fá emo emotai fém siyém njúnnjúnofnar, yénémamén aem njúnnjúnofnar méinyotio yam wafrogh kénjún. 16 Buk si noraye, "Aem njúnnjúnofnar, ménamén yénd wém njúnnjúnofnar."
bt: Therefore, prepare your minds to work. Keep alert and put your.p hope completely on the blessing which God will give you.p when Yesu Keriso reveals. 14 Be obedient to God, and do not allow your.p lives to be shaped by those desires when you.p were still disobedient. 15 But, as he who called you.p is without.dust(holy), so be without.dust(holy) in everything doing. 16 Scripture says: “Be without.dust(holy), because I am without.dust(holy).”

nama: Ménamén Afé, endefaf Ngánjánafé norayati, yau yém ámb árfaro afreghégh njam yémo yénmota yénayan némé fémofem tawafrotati. Yénémamén fém aemor yáyotro férférafé njamandio em féfenjo efghon ndené wan téfnár yéné mband maratan. 18 Fém mat em té ewanjaryéng kétamé fifiofnar wafrogh ghérsé árké notametaménd kétamé féfenjo ákiafé tambén. Yéné yau yémormén árkéméné so kirorngai, ndené silfé o gol. 19 Fém té ewanjaryéng ménaye Kerisoene mer férke, yéné mborofnar a téfnofnar sif tosé. 20 Keriso té yaferyéng soramé mband marat yafrotam, wénde fá yuyafoi mbandoefaf yéné kerker efghon féfene téfnan. 21 Kerisoene kénjúmé fémofem efalo yiyátotati Ngánján, emo yanoi Keriso kétamé kérta a yaramai ndimbal kwayaghé, a féfene ndimbal mwighé a féfene méghmégh em Ngánján kénjún.
bt: Because Father, to whom you.p talk with God, is not preferring only some people(favoritism) anyone when he judges by what you.p have done. So you.p should live for him with fear while your.p own day as foreigners in the earth. 18 You.p know he has saved you.p from without.meaning doing life which learned from your.p ancesters. This was not somthing that can be destroyed, such as silver or gold. 19 He have saved you.p by the good blood of Keriso, a lamb without.spot and without.fault. 20 He(God) has chosen Keriso before the creation of the world, but he revealed in these last days for your.p sake. 21 Through Keriso you.p truly approve(believe) God, who raised Keriso from the dead and make him big light(glory), and your.p big mind(faith) and hope are in God.

nama: Fém té náyáretati Ngánjánene efalo si. Féyo, fém té eyátoi njúnnjúnofnar kénjún, a sénonjo fémofem so efalo euwetati ámb efalo yátogh ár. Mé aem efalo uwégh fémro fémro kénjún mindefifi. 23 Fém té náráftaménd wéikor, yau kétamé kérkéf mbweta, wénde ghérsé akegh Ngánjánene si kénjúmé. 24 Buk si noraye, "Méinyotio ár ndenanit em yus, a méinyotio yéfene ndimbal kwayaghé yém ndenanit mbumbu. Yus kér em a mbumbu kuyangi,
bt: You.p have obeyed God's true talk. So, you.p have become clean inside, and now you.p can really love other approving truth people. Continue to love truly each other very much. 23 You.p have been born again, not from rotten seed, but through the living eternal talk of God. 24 The Buk(scripture) says, “All people are like grass, and all their big light(glory) is like the flowers. The grass dies and the flowers fall,

nama: wénde Yurane si so nakete tuot." Yéné si fiyém árké té táitotawét féfefaf.
bt: but the talk of the Lord lives forever.” This talk is which they preached to you.p.

nama: Yénémaménnde, nékmbotati méinyotio yaufita, yau unyégh o wasogh o waramnjagh o wasáligh si. 2 Aem totér áráfégh fasrinit efe em siogh mbérmbére nono wékwérot, ménát njam enetati fém so nanotati a kawanjarngi, 3 sénonjo fémofem té yérnongi ndené Yuré siyém mer.
bt: Therefore, stop all evil, no lying or tricking or jealousy or insulting talk. 2 Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the spiritual milk, so that when you.p drink it you.p may grow up and be saved, 3 now you.p have tasted that the Lord is good.

nama: Eném Yuré Yesuefaf, fá siyém akegh wím árém árké yékenayénd, wénde árké Ngánjánam té yékafai a minde mer yém yáfaf. 5 A sénonjo fém em akegh wím árkéménaye erametat mbérmbére méngo, ánde fém so násáfotati njúnnjúnofnar ghéngén wárogh ár ménát mbérmbére ramégh umyogh ghéngén so em Ngánjáne Yesu Keriso kénjúmé. 6 Buk si noraye: "Kéreta, yéndon yékmetan wím kété Jaion, kaféghmén a merfifi téndo wím, a fá efe ndimbal mwighé yém yáfaf yaufifi so kakmangé wáiwáiyan.
bt: Come to the Lord Yesu, he is the living stone which people rejected, but which God chose and precious to him. 5 And now you.p are living stones which they build spiritual worshipping house, where you.p will work as without.dust(holy) burning sacrifice men to be spiritual acceptable sacrifices to God through Yesu Keriso. 6 The Buk(scripture) says, “See, I lay a stone there Jaion, a chosen and precious cornerstone, and he who has big mind(trusts) in him will never be put to shame.”

nama: Yéné wím siyém merfifi féfeyot emofem efalo yiyátotat, wénde árét emofem yau efalo yiyátotat: "Wím méngo ramégh árém árké yékenayénd té nénamndé téndo wím, "
bt: This stone is of big value for you.p who truly approve(believe), but for those who do not truly approve(believe): “The stone which the builders rejected has become the cornerstone"

nama: wéi, Buk si noraye, "Wím árkéménayam eméinde ár ménát eunoghét, mbaré yéné árkéménayam eméinde ár uighét." Fá neunotat ménamén fá yau náyáretat si, yéné siyém Ngánjánene ménde yém yéfeyot.
bt: also, Buk(scripture) says, “The stone that make people to be stumble, the rock that will make them fall.” They stumbled because they did not truly approve(believe) the talk, this is God's will for them.

nama: Wénde fém em kaféghkaf ár, warsagh ároene ghéngén wárogh ár, a njúnnjúnofnar yu, a Ngánjánene yánjo ár, ndené fémofem so yuyafotati áuwégh yáyot emo emotai fém kétamé kwéfitata kétán yánjo mer kwayaghat. 10 Táf fém yau tamorwén Ngánjánene ár, wénde sénonjo fém em yáne ár. Ámb efghon fém yau mat náyátoyénd Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé, wénde sénonjo té yanangi yáne ghérghérsisé. Ngánjánene ásáfogh ár
bt: But you.p are the chosen people, the king's burning sacrifice men(priests), the without.dust(holy) nation, and God's own people, that you.p will declare the praises of him who called you.p out of darkness into his good light. 10 Once you.p were not God's people, but now you.p are his people. At one time you.p did not know God's mercy, but now you.p have received his mercy. God's workers

nama: Áuwéghafé fútaréf, fém ndenanit em wan téfnár a fénataye ár yéné mband maratan, yéndon ewamnendan fém ménát so ekenati yaufi ménde, árké túmén násmét yémafé féfene mbérmbérafé. 12 Aemor mer ghérsaye yéfefafmé efalo yátoghofnar árfefaf njam yémofem emndetat yaufi wafroghmén, yémofem so efandat féfene meryam a yarametat ndimbal kwayaghé Ngánjáne yéné efghon yémon yénd sái kufarngé. Eutémndati ár efe em waftayan
bt: Loving friends, you are as strangers and different people in this world, I ask to you.p to deny from sinful desires, which are always fighting with your.p spirit. 12 Live good lives among them the unbeliving people when they say you.p about doing wrong, they may see your.p good deeds and give big light(glory) to God on that day he appears. Respect people who are in power

nama: Yurane téfnan namyotati árfefaf efe em waftayan yéné mband maratan: ndimbal warsagh ároefaf, efe yém tukénfifi waftayan, 14 a gafana, efe té ewaferyéng yémon ménát sái tékratan ekmetat yaufiyam wafrogh ár a náuwetat yéfefaf emofem ewafrotat mer. 15 Ménamén Ngánján ménde yém kémboghét onon árfene yaufi si ménaye féfene meryam wafroghe. 16 Aemor ndené fété yuwek ár, wénde yau ewengotati féfenjo yuwek ámb yaufiyam wafarghét, wénde aemor ndené Ngánjánene ásáfogh ár. 17 Aeutémndati méinyotio ár, euwetati ámb efalo yátogh ár, yutémndati Ngánján, a yarawenati ndimbal warsagh ár. Kerisoene tékrat
bt: For the sake of the Lord obey to the people who has power in this world: to the big king(Emperor), who is in the very high power, 14 and to the governors, whom he has appointed to put the suffering the evildoers and to praise those who do good. 15 Because God wants you.p to stop the evil talk of foolish people by your good things. 16 Live as free people, but do not turn your.p freedom to cover any evil, but live as God's workers. 17 Respect every people, love other approving truth people, honor God, and respect the big king(Emperor). Keriso's suffering

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh ár, namyotati mé féfenjo yurafefaf méinyotio utmanéghafé, yau yéfeyotro efe em mer a umyogh kér ro, wénde yéfefaf wéi efe tékratro em. 19 Ámb árom njam kérté kémaramangé téfnofnar, fémo yafarota Ngánján a ewaitota yáne si, a táf so yéné kérté tané árkéméné yém téfnofnar, Ngánján náuwete yéné sáfot yaman. 20 Wénde ndernáye fai so yém kété fémofem njam tinjongi ngi ménamén yaufi wafroghmén a yamarotati? Wénde fém njam nawambetati meryam wafroghmén a yamarotati, yéné siyém mer Ngánjánefaf. 21 Ngánjánam fém emotai yénat, ménamén Kerisom tékrat yéfandam féfeyot a ewauroi féfe waufarogh, ménát fémofem so ewaitotati yáne sor. 22 Yémo yau yafrotam yaufiyam, a némé unyégh si yau yinjoyénd yáne mbírmbíran." 23 Njam yémofem tasalitawét fá, yémo yau ewawangoi wasáligheyo. Njam yémo tékrat táyáretau, fá yau norayai fai wangoghét yéfefaf, wénde fáyo efalo káyátotau yáfaf emo moghan yékmai mbarkándaye. 24 Kerisom yémonyo ewanai téfene yaufiyam yánjo fifie kétán wafatarégh wénfaf, ménát yénd so yéném kér yaufiyamta a yénmor mbarkánd yam wafroghétro, "yáne kalam yénd té yényátoi mer." 25 Fém ndenanit tamorwén sif yu nayu, wénde sénonjo fém té nénangongi Sif wanjengégh ároefaf a Ghékéf fayogh ároefaf féfene mbérmbéroene.
bt: Without.payment working men, must obey yourselves to your.p owners with complete respect, not only to those who are kind and respectful, but also to those who are only suffering. 19 one gives you.p a heavy without reason and you.p think of God and follow his talk and so are able to carry that heavy that has no reason, God is pleased with this kind of behaviour. . 20 But how reward will be there if you.p receive a beating for doing wrong and endure it? But if you.p suffer for doing good and you.p endure it, this is good to God. 21 God called you.p to this, because Keriso himself saw the pain for you.p and left you.p an example, so that you.p would follow in his steps. 22 He do not do sin, and they do not see a lie in his lips. 23 When they insulted him, he did not answer back with an insult. When he suffered, he did not say to take revenge to them, but he entrusted himself to him who put it in judge straightly. 24 Keriso himself carried our sins in his body to the cross, so that we might die from sin and live for doing straightness, "by his wounds that he have made us good." 25 You.p were like sheep that was far place, but now you.p have returned to the Shepherd and Keeper of your.p spirits.

nama: Amaf, ndené endeyo aem amyogh ár kétán féfenjarfefaf. Ndemamén féfenjarfem yau efalo yiyátotat si, féfene wafroghyamam siofnaye so eméinde fá efalo yátoghét, 2 njam yémofem yéfandat njúnnjúnofnar a férférafé wafrogh yam féfene ghérsayan. 3 Féfene sari yau so yéném kétamé faruta umángéghe, ndené séf fiyangoghare a awogh gol ndindi a mer sáláme. 4 Wénde, féfene sari so yéném kétamé kénjúta, féfene yatoghofnar merafé yam a métar mbérmbére, árkéméné yém ndimbalfifi Ngánjánene sáfan. 5 Yéné ende fronde njúnnjúnofnar amaf efe emormén yémofem ekmayénd yéfene méghmégh Ngánjánefaf káyátotawét sariafé. Fá kamyotawét yéfenjarfefaf. 6 Ndené Sara, emo tiyáretau Ebraam a témndangai yáne yuré. Fém em yáne mérésmérés njam fémofem ewafrotati némé yém mbarkánd a yau férfér em némamén.
bt: Wives, in the same way you.p must be obeying men to your.p husbands. Even though your.p husbands do not truly approve(believe) the talk, your.p doing without talk will win them over to truly approve(believe), 2 when they see the without.dust and with.scaring of your.p lives. 3 Your.p beauty should not come from outward wearing, such as elaborate hairstyles and the wearing of gold jewelry or good clothes. 4 Instead, your.p beauty should come from inner self, your.p unfinished beauty of a kind and quiet spirit, which is the very big in God's face. 5 In this way the without.dust(holy) women of the past who put their hope to God make themselves beautiful. They obeyed to their own husbands. 6 Like Sara, who obeyed Ebraam and called him her lord. You.p are her daughters if you.p do what is straight and are not afraid of anything.

nama: Fém ár kor fété so emor féfenjo amafafé mer ende. Fém táf em mer féfene amaffaf a ewáutánati amaf. Nawafarotati ndené fá yau em kor muyafé. Nawafarotati ndené fémofem té yanangi efalo ghérsé Ngánjánta, ménamén fá mer yém. Eutémndati amaf. Féyo Ngánjánam so ewawangote féfene Ngánjánafé orayégh. Tékrat ménamén meryam wafroghmén
bt: You.p husbands must also live in a good way with your wives. You.p should be kind to your.p wife and help her. Remember that she is not as strong as you.p are. Remember that you have received true life from God, because he is good. Respect her. Then God will answer your talking with God. Suffering for doing good

nama: Kerkermén, méinyotio fém, aemor ámbiro mwighaye a ámbiro wayarghe, náuwetati fémro fémro, aem ghérghérsisé a yuwan ghérsafé. 9 Yau tawawangongi yaufimén yaufieyo o wánangoghmén wánangogheyo. Wénde tawawangongi yaufimén ménaye frengéghe, ménamén yéné ménát fém ewanmoi ménát fémofem so tawanangi frengégh. 10 Buk si noraye, "Emo njam yuweta ghérsé a efande mer efogh so yékmbote yánjo kanké kétamé yaufi sita a yánjo mbírmbír kétamé unyégh afroghta.
bt: Finally, all of you.p, live one mind and one feeling, love one another, be mercy and humble. 9 Do not repay evil with evil or insult with insult. But repay evil with blessing, because to this he(God) called you.p so that you.p may receive a blessing. 10 The Buk(scripture) says, “Whoever loves life and see good days must stop his tongue from evil talk and his lips from telling lies.

nama: Fá táf kawengongi yaufita a ewafrotat mer. Yémofem táf yéronjat krufrát a yaitotat yéné.
bt: They must turn from evil and do good. They must seek peace and follow this.

nama: Ménamén Yuram yéfande némé mbarkánd árém yafrotat. Fá yiyárete mbarkánd ár njam fá Ngánjánafé norayét. Wénde fá tengo kétamé emofem ewafrotat yaufi yam."
bt: Because the Lord sees what straight people do. He listens to straight people when they talk with God. But he turns away from them who do bad things."

nama: Emo so fém némaghne njam fémo wafroghét tafngo mer? 14 Wénde táf njam téu fém em tékratan ménamén némé yém mbarkánd, fém em frengéghan. "Yau férfér em yéfene fai wangogh simén, yau férfér em." 15 Wénde féfene tikfan ayafarenati Keriso ndené Yuré. Túmén afrengéghkaf aem uwangoghét kétán méinyotio árfefaf emofem emotat fém ménát sái tawaramangi uwangogh ménamén méghméghmén árké yém féfene. Wénde yafrotati yéné ménaye mer yame a utmanéghe, 16 ewarawenati mer emarégh, ménát fá efe norayat máméghéraye féfene meryammén Keriso kénjún so em wáiwái yéfenjo simén. 17 Ménamén mer yéné yém, njam Ngánjánene ménde yém, ménát tékratan sái em ménamén meryam wafroghmén. Wénde minde mámáfi yém, yénd njam tékratan yéném ménamén yaufiyam wafroghmén. 18 Ménamén Keriso wéi kér yémormén yaufiyammén ambinotmaro méinyotioat, mbarkánd ár mbarkándofnar árét, ménát sái tanmangongé fém kétán Ngánjánefaf. Fá té yékmayénd krot fifiyan wénde nénamndai ghérsé Mbérmbéran. 19 Yéné ende, fá néngwanoi a tawawaitotau mbérmbérafet efe tamorwén kwéfkwéf méngon, 20 efe yau káyáretawét tándái táf njam Ngánján kawanjetau métare Noane efghon njam bout térametau. Kété mé nambio ár, 8ro méinyotio árta, nunjaryénd nuta. 21 Yénayam yufarote ndernáye Ngánjánam ewanjane fém. Yéné siyém ndené nue walitoghmén mbanmban yém. Nu walitogham yau ewaine fifimén njúnnjún, wénde unyéghofnar si yafrotam kétán Ngánjánefaf kétamé mer emaréghta. Yénayam ewanjaryéng fém, ménamén Yesu Keriso wéikor ghérsé témorwén soramé yáne kéran. 22 Yéné soramé, Yesu yéngmormén njafarot a yém Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. Yémo elimnde méinyotio njafar si résagh ár a njafarmén muyé a wafté.
bt: Who is going to harm you.p if you.s are eager to do good? 14 But if you.p should suffer for what is straight, you.p are in blessing. “Do not fear their pay back talks, do not be frightened.” 15 But in your.p hearts seek Keriso as Lord. Always be prepared to give an answer to every people who ask you.p to give the answer for the hope which you.p have. But do this with gentleness and respect, 16 keeping a good conscience, so that those who speak badly against your.p good things in Keriso may be ashamed of their talks. 17 Because it is good, if it is Godʼs will, to be in suffering for doing good. But it is very bad, if we will be in suffering for doing evil. 18 Because Keriso also died for sins once for all, straight people for without.straight people, to bring you.p to God. He was put to death in the body but made alive in the Spirit. 19 In this way, he went and preached them to the spirits who were in darkness house, 20 to those who were disobedient long ago when God waited patiently in the days of Noa while he was buiding bout. There only a few people, only 8 from all the people, were saved from the water. 21 That shows how God saves you.p It is like a picture of batism. Batism does not wash the dirt of the body, but make the without.lying talk(promise) to God from the good conscience. That saves you, because Yesu Keriso became alive again after his death. 22 After this, Yesu went into heaven and is at Godʼs right hand. He rules over all men carrying heavenly message(angels) and heavenly authorities and powers.

nama: Yénémamén, ndené Kerisom yáraretam tékrat yánjo fifiyan, muyé aramégh fémyo wéi ndené endeyo, ménamén emo tékrat yéfande yánjo fifiyan té nékmbo yaufita. 2 Yénandmé sénonjo, fá yau yémorangérmén yéné mbandmén ghérsaye ménát yaufi fifioene ménde wafroghét, wénde ménát Ngánjánene ménde wafroghét. 3 Fém té kareindawét yaufiyaman fronde némé efalo yátoghofnar ár ménde tamorwén wafroghét. Féfene ghérsé yénayan tamorwén walwal kér ro, wal mwigharo, wéri nu kér ro, wéri nu néne téménd, wéri nu néne mérnan, a mewangot wáwefnogh. 4 Fá em sélngwél njam fém yau kufnyangi yéfefaf yéné yam wasnengéghfaf a máméghraye ámnjogh. Féyo yémofem ewánangotat fém. 5 Wénde fá so nawafenat Ngánjánene sáfrére méinyotio némé yémofem tawafrotat, yáfaf efe yém afrengéghkaf ménát moghét ghérsé árét a kér téfnár. 6 Yéné fiyém téfén árkémamén mer si téngwaitotawét kér téfnárat, ndemamén moghan em fifiyan ndené méinyotio ár kés em, wénde fá so em ghérsé mbérmbéran ndené Ngánján.
bt: Therefore, since Keriso felt pain in his own body, make strong yourselves also with the same way, because whoever feels pain in his own body has stopped the sin. 2 From now, they do not live this earthly lives for doing desires of evil body, but for doing for the desires/will of God. 3 You.p have done sin in the past what unbelievers like to do. Your.p lives in these were immorality, lust(sexual desire), drunkenness, alcohol drinking party, drinking alcohol with group, and the worshipping idols. 4 They are surprised when you.p do not join them into this distructive way and very evil living. So they insult you.p. 5 But they must explain themselves before God all what they did, to him whom is ready to judge living people and dead people. 6 This is the reason which the good talk was preached to dead people, though they are in judge in the body like all people, but they might live in the spirit like God.

nama: Mband maratoene yatogh siyém kaka. Yénémaménnde ghékéf sénté a mer mwighafé ménát fém so norayati Ngánjánafé. 8 Yéné tukén méinyotio, náuwetati kénjkame fémro fémro, ménamén uwégham ewafne tárfár yaufiyam. 9 Eumyotati ámb ár féfenjo méngot áwátaranéghofnar. 10 Fém ámbiroámbiro so násáfote némé tambén fémo té yanai ménát sái ewáutána ámb ár, mer wanjengégh ár Ngánjánene ngáráman fénataye yamamé. 11 Njam efe norayat, yémofem so ewafrotat ndenáye efe norayat Ngánjánene si. Njam emofem ewáutánat, yémofem so ewáutánat yéné muyaye Ngánjánam árké ewaramete, ménát méinyotio yaman Ngánján so yuyotat Yesu Keriso kénjúmé. Yáyot so yém ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté tuot. Efalo. Tékrat ménamén efalo yátogh ár em
bt: The end of the earth is close. Therefore be alert and with good mind so that you.p may talk with God. 8 Above all, love each other deeply, because love covers over many sins. 9 Accept other people coming to your house without.complaining. 10 Each of you.p should do whatever gift you.s have received to help other people, as a good manager of Godʼs grace in its various ways. 11 Those who speak, they should do as one who speak the talks of God. Those who help, they should help with this strength which God gaves, so that in all things God may be praised through Yesu Keriso. To him be the big light(glory) and the power forever. Amen. Suffering because a truly approving man(believer) are

nama: Áuwéghafé fútaréf, yau táf sélngwél em tékrat fés árké nanete ménát féfene ndimbal mwighé ufoghét, ndené ámb fénataye yam kar katyáne féfefaf. 13 Wénde náuwetati ndené fémofem so yérsati Kerisoene tékrat, ménát fém so minde áuwéghan em njam yáne ndimbal kwayaghé nufrota. 14 Áuwéghafé fém em njam ewasalitat ménamén Kerisoene yétkwén téfnan. Yénayam yuyafote ndené ndimbal kwayaghane Mbérmbér, Ngánján Mbérmbér yémor féfefaf. 15 Njam fém em tékratan, yau ndené so em ár ngi téfnár o oro téfnár o ámb sáf wawérsogh ár, o emo eméinde ámb ár kértat. 16 Wénde, njam fém tékratan em ndené fété efalo yátogh ár, yau táf em wáiwái, wénde áuwégh yarametati Ngánjáne ménamén árém emndetat fém em efalo yátogh ár. 17 Sénonjo efogh yém moghét ménát so karnyangé Ngánjánene mérnan. A njam karnyangé téfefaf, ndernáye so yém yéfeyot emofem yau efalo yiyátongi Ngánjánene mer si? 18 Buk si noraye, "Té yém táikér yéfeyot mbarkánd árét sái kunjarngi, kété so yém minde táikér yéfeyot ngánjánofnar yaufiyam téfnár."
bt: Loving friends, do not be surprised a suffering like fire burning is continually happening to you.p to test your.p belief, as though something strange were happening to you.p. 13 But rejoice that you.p are carrying the sufferings of Keriso, so that you.p may be in overjoy when his big light(glory) appears. 14 Happy are you.p if they insult you.p because of the name of Keriso. It shows that the Spirit of big light(glory), God Spirit dwells with you.p. 15 If you.p are in suffering, it should not be as a murderer or thief or any other kind of criminal, or one who cause other people to have trouble. 16 But if you.p are in suffering as a truly approving man(believer)(believer), do not be ashamed, but give praise to God that people call you.p are a truly approving man(believer)(believers). 17 Now it is time for judgment to begin in Godʼs family. And if it begins with us, how will be for them who do not truly approve(believe) the good talk of God? 18 The Buk(scripture) says, “It is hard for them straight people to be saved, there will be big difficuties for the ungodly sinners.”

nama: Yénémaménnde, fá efe em tékratan ménáyan Ngánjánene méndeyan so karamangi fáyo kétán yéfene ndimbal mwighé kér ro Wafrogh ároefaf a mé so engém meryam wafroghan.
bt: Therefore, those who are in suffering according to Godʼs will should give themselves to their faithful Creator and continue to do good.

nama: Kétán sénko ár féfene kénjún, yénd wéi néngorayan ndené fété ámb sénko ár a ghékfe fandagh ár Kerisoene tékrátmén a efe so yafnyang ndimbal kwayaghé kénjún sái nufrota. 2 Aem sif wanjengégh ár Ngánjánene mérnot efe em féfene wanjengégh mbanmbanan. Elimndati mere ménamén fém ménde em yéné wafroghét. Yau ewafrotati ménát fété fémofem sái yafrotati. Ewafrotati yéné ende Ngánján árké ménde yém féfeyot. Yau yafrotati nemnati faimén, wénde ewafrotati ménamén sái ewáutánati ár. 3 Yau táf ndimbalndimbal nufrotati yéfefaf efe em féfene wanjengéghan, wénde waufarogh ár aem mérénfaf 4 A njam Sif wanjengégh sénko ár kufarngé, fémofem so tanangi ndimbal kwayaghafé fai árkéméné yau so kolindangé.
bt: To the head people among you.p, I say again as other head man and a watching man of Kerisoʼs sufferings, and who will share in the big light(glory) to be revealed. 2 Be sheep watching men(sherpherds) of Godʼs family who are under your.p care. Lead them well because you want to do it. Do not do it just because you have to do it. Do it in the way that God wants for you. Don't do it for receiving reward, but do because you want to help people. 3 Do not make yourselves great to them who are in your.p care, but be example men to the group. 4 And when the Chief Shepherd appears, you.p will receive with the big light(glorious) reward which will never disappear.

nama: Totér ambum, ndené endeyo, namyotati yéfefafmé efe em sénko ár. Méinyotio fém, nawamanetati fémyo yuwan ghérsaye, ménamén Buk si noraye, "Ngánjánam ekene tuktuk ár wénde yuyafote ménde yéfeyot efe em yuwan ghérsafé."
bt: Young men, in the same way, submit yourselves who are head people. All of you.p, clothe yourselves with humility, because the Buk(scripture) says, “God opposes proud people but show favor them who are humble.”

nama: Yénémamén, yuwan náyátotati fémyo Ngánjánene ndimbal ngángé mbanmbanan, táf yémo so tauyongé fém tukét yánjo mer efghon. 7 Taramangi méinyotio féfene mwighé wawérsogh Ngánjánefaf ménamén yémon ewambete fém.
bt: Therefore, be humble yourselves under Godʼs mighty hand, that he will lift you.p up in his own good time. 7 Give all your.p worries to God because he cares for you.p.

nama: Awamarogh a ghékéf sénté. Féfene mék téfnár Sáifér noférkawete awánangoghafé ndenanit ndimbal munjan fus nérete ménát ámb ár sái yasérmbota. 9 Yékenati fá, kokayongi taikrataye ndimbal mwighé kénjún, ménamén fém mat em efalo yátogh ár mérén mband maratan eyota yéné tékrat yamamayo.
bt: Be alert and be on watch. Your.p enemy Sáifèr roams around like a roaring big wild cat(lion) looking for someone to destroy. 9 Resist him, standing firm in the big mind(faith), because you.p know that the family of approving truth people in the world is going through this kind of sufferings.

nama: A Ngánján méinyotio ngárámmén, emo emotai kétán tuot ndimbal kwayaghafaf Kerisoene kénjún, yéné soramé fém té tam tékratan tekofnar, so yémonyo kor táyátongé mer a muyafé. Fém so ewakai taikre a mbénmbénate. 11 Yáfaf em wafté tuot. Efalo. Kerkermén ásneghafé si
bt: And the God of all grace, who called you.p to his eternal big light(glory) in Keriso, after this you.p have been in suffering a little while, will make you.p well again and strong. You.p will stand firm and steadfast. 11 To him be the power forever. Amen. Final greeting talk

nama: Sailesene wáutárghe, efe yéndon yiyátotan ndené ndimbal mwighafé fútar, yéndon té tafarotan féfeyot némbnare férén, tawawanjan fém a kéngorayan ndené yéné siyém Ngánjánene efalo ngárám. Kokayongi taikrataye yénayan.
bt: With the help of Sailes, whom I regard as a faithful friend, I have written to you.p short letter, encouraging you.p and saying that this is the God's true grace. Stand firm in this.

nama: Ásneghafé si kétamé efalo yátogh árfeta kété Babilonén, fá em Ngánjánene kaféghmén ár, Mak efe yém ndenanit tane ambum, engwatemb yánjo ásnegh si wéi. 14 Kasnetangi fémro fémro ménaye uwéghafé ásneghe. Krufrat so yém méinyotio féfefaf efe em Kerisoene kénjún.
bt: Greeting talk from approving truth people in Babilon, they are chosen people of God, Mak who is like my son, sends his greeting talks also. 14 Greet one another with a kiss of love. May peace to all of you.p who are in Keriso.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Saimon Fité, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a muyafé ár. Yéndo yéfarotan féfefaf emofem téfene Ngánjánene a Wanjarégh ár Yesu Kerisoene mbarkánd kénjúmé té ewanayénd ndimbal mwighé merfifi ndené téfene:
bt: This letter is from Saimon Fitè, a worker and man who has Yesu's authority(apostle) of Yesu Keriso. I am writing to you.p who through the straightness of our God and Savior Yesu Keriso have received a big mind(faith) as precious as ours:

nama: Ngárám a krufrát so yém féfefaf afoghare Ngánjánene a téfene Yuré Yesuene matyam kénjúmé. Ngánjánam yénkafai yandio
bt: May grace and peace be yours in full through knowledge of God and of our Lord Yesu. God chose us as his own

nama: Yáne minde mer waftaye, Ngánjánam té yénmaramai méinyotio rokar yénd ménde yéném ngánján ghérsé. Yéndfem té ewanayém méinyotio yéné ménaye sái mat kamndangém yánemén, emo yénmotai yénd ménaye yánjo ndimbal kwayaghaye a mere. 4 Yénamé yémo té yénmaramai téfe yánjo minde ndimbal a merfifi unyéghofnar si, ménát yéfe kénjúmé fém so násáfotati kété minde mer méndeyan, fém so kenngongi kétamé awanjmegh ghérsata yéné mband maratan árké nufrotat ménáyan yaufi méndeyan. 5 Yéné téfnan, násáfotati taikrataye tafghangi meryam féfene ndimbal mwighafaf, a meryamta tafghangi matyam, 6 a matyamta tafghangi awamarogh, awamaroghta tafghangi métaryam, a métaryamta tafghangi ngánján ghérsé, 7 ngánján ghérsata tafghangi efalo fútaryam, efalo fútaryamta tafghangi uwégh. 8 Njam yéné yam em féfene afoghare, yéné yam so tayátongi imangét a fifiyafé féfenjo matyaman téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoenemén. 9 Wénde endefene yau ewam fá em ghékéf kwamafé a ghékéf kwéfkwéf, té ewawalinde ndené Ngánjánam té eumbaryéng fá kétamé yéfene tándáwár yaufita.
bt: By his very good power, God has given us everything we need to live a godly life. We have received all of this by coming to know him, who called us by his own big light(glory) and goodness. 4 Through these he has given us his very big and precious without.lying talks(promises), so that through them you.p may work in the very good nature, you.p may escape/run away from the corruption in the world which caused by evil desires. 5 In this reason, work hard to add goodness to your big mind(faith), and to your goodness add knowledge, 6 to knowledge add self-control, to self-control add endurance; to endurance add godliness, 7 to godliness add real friendship, and to real friendship add love. 8 If these things are yours and abound, these things will make you.p active and with meaning(useful) in your knowledge of our Lord Yesu Keriso. 9 But whoever does not have them is shortsighted and blind, has forgot that God have washed them from their past sins.
