nama: Yénémaménnde, tane fútar, násáfotati taikrataye ménát so efalo tiyátongi féfene wanmogh a waferégh. Njam fémofem ewafrotati yéné yam, fém yau so kuyangi, 11 a fémofem so tanangi wemár umyogh téfene Yurafaf a Wanjarégh ár Yesu Kerisoene akegh Ngánján limánéghfaf. Ufrogh si Bukan
bt: Therefore, my friends, work hard to confirm your.p calling and choosing/election. If you.p do these things, you.p will never fall away, 11 and you.p will receive a rich welcome into the eternal kingdom of our Lord and Savior Yesu Keriso. Prophecy in Buk(scripture)

nama: Yénémaménnde, yéndon so túmén mat eyátotan fém yéné yammén, ndemamén fém mat em yénémamén a ewakai taikrataye efaloyan féfefaf sénonjo siyém. 13 Yénd nemnan yéné mbarkánd yém ndené yéndon so mé mat yéngiyátotan njamandio yénd ghérsé wém. 14 Ménamén téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisom té mat wiyátoi ndené yénd so tekofnaye yéné mband koron. 15 A yénd so násáfotan taikrataye ménát sái mat táyáton yéné yam safén féfeyot. Yénd ménde wém fémofem so ewafarotati yéné soramé yénd njam kér wém.
bt: Therefore, I will always make you.p know of these things, even though you.p know about these and stood firmly in the truth you.p now have. 13 I think this is straight that I should keep on reminding as long as I am alive. 14 Because our Lord Yesu Keriso has shown me that I must soon leave this earthly life. 15 And I will work hard to make known these things clearly to you.p. I want you.p will remember this after I die.

nama: Yéndfem yau mwighé wafroghmén si táitotam njam yéndfem tawaufrotam féfe ménamén téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene álighmén waftayan, wénde yéndfem té téfandam yáne ndimbal kwayaghé téfenjo ghékfe. 17 Yémon yanai utmanégh a ndimbal kwayaghé kétamé Afé Ngánjáneta njam kém yénmormén kétamé ndimbal kwayaghata, kénorayau, "Yéné fiyém tane Ambum, efe yéndon yuwetan; yáfaf yénd náuwetan." 18 Yéndfemyo fété yiyárayém yéné kém árké yénmormén kétamé njafarta njam yénd ténmorwén yémafé kété njúnnjúnofnar mband tunakfan.
bt: We did not preach make-up talks when we told you.p about the coming of our Lord Yesu Keriso in power, but we have seen his big light(glory) with our own eyes. 17 He received honor and big light(glory) from the Father God when the voice came to him from the glory, saying, “This is my Son, whom I love, with him I am pleased.” 18 We ourselves heard this voice which came from heaven when we were with him there on the without.dust(holy) mountain.

nama: A téfefaf yém ufrogh si té náyátoi mindefifi, a fémofem so mer yafrotati sái náyáretati kétán, ndené fété kwayaghé nanete kwéfité sifayan, kétánotio efogh kuyangé a akw kénd kuyongé féfene tikfan. 20 Yéné tukén méinyotio, fém mat em ndené yéndfem yau so yafenam yéndfemyo ufrogh si Bukan. 21 Ufrogh si yau yénmormén kétándmé árfene méndeta, wénde Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kafrotawét kétamé Ngánjáneta talimndau Ngánján Mbérmbéram.
bt: And to us are the prophetic talk already happened, and you.p will do well to hear to it, as a light shining in a dark place, until the sun rises and the morning star rises in your.p hearts. 20 Above all, you.p must understand that we cannot explain by ourselves a prophecy in Buks(scriptures). 21 Prophetic talk never come from people's will, but God's people who make know(prophets) spoke from God led by the God Spirit.

nama: Wénde kété wéi tamorwén unyégh mat yátogh ár árfefafmé, ndené fété yéna so em unyégh watamegh ár féfefafmé. Yémofem so kwankwane yénérsat wasérmboghafé a efalofnar watamegh, a yéngkenat Yuré emo ewanai fá, a yémofem so yénérsat tekofnar wasérmbogh yéfendio. 2 Tárfár árém so ewaitotat yéfenjo yaufi wal yam, a ménamén némé yémofem ewafrotat, ámb ár so néngorayat yaufi si efalofifi Endmén. 3 Yéfenjo kwénjtaye yéné unyégh watamegh árém so tawanangi féfene mani ménaye yéfene wafroghmén si waitoghe féfe. Tekfifi sénonjo yéfene Mogh ár siyém frengéghkaf, a yéfene Wasérmbogh ár siyém té nano.
bt: But there were also false God's people who make know(prophets) among the people, just as there will be false teaching men among you.p. They will secretly bring in destructive and untrue teaching, and denying Lord who bought them, and they will bring themselves suddenly destruction. 2 Many people will follow their immorality, and because of what they do, other people will speak evil talk of the Way of truth 3 In their greed these false teaching men will take your.p money out of their telling you.p made-up talks. For a long time now their Judge man has been ready, and their Destroyer has been awake!

nama: Ngánjánam kértayan ekmai njafar si résagh ár emofem yaufi yafrotaménd. Yémo ewitam kwémbofnar yékwét, seine eumbai kwéfkwéfan, nawanjetat ménát moghét. 5 A Ngánjánam kérté yanai tándáwár mband maratan njam yémon yénérsam nu kéfér ngánjánofnar árfefaf, wénde yanjaryéng Noa, mbarkánd si waitogh ár, a ámb 7 ár. 6 Njam yémon té tékratan ekmeyai ndimbal tesen Sodom a Gomora ménáyan ewakérnam kétán mbangmbang, a yafrotam yéfefaf ufarogh némé so néngufrote ngánjánofnar árfefaf. 7 A njam té yémo yanjaryéng Lot, mbarkánd ár, ende tékrat tarametawét yaufi wal yame nákofnar árém. 8 Yéné mbarkánd ár témorangérwén yéfene kénjún, túmén efogh yémon téfandau ndémke njam tafandau a káyáretau yéfene yaufi wafroghyammén. 9 Njam yéné yém efalo, yénémamén Yuré mat yém ndernáye so ewanjane ngánjánene ár kétamé ufogh yamta a sái ewereta mbarkándofnar ár moghfaf yéné mogh efghon. 10 Fá efe eyota fifioene méndeyan yaghnat a yékenat Ngánjánene wafté.
bt: God put in punishment the men carrying heavenly message(angels) who sinned. He threw them to without.end hole(hell), tying them in chains in darkness, they are waiting for judgment. 5 And God punished the ancient world when he brought the flood on its ungodly people, but saved Noa, a preacher of straightness, and 7 other people. 6 If he had punished the cities of Sodom and Gomora by burning them to ashes, and made them an example of what is going to happen to the ungodly. 7 And if he had saved Lot, a straight man, who lawless people distress him by the immorality. 8 That straight man lived among them, every day he suffered agony/pain when he saw and heard their evil actions. 9 If this is true, then the Lord knows how to save godly people from trials and to hold the without.straight people for punishment on this judging day. 10 They who go in bodily desire corrupt and despise God's authority.

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árém ewaindat yéné ár a em minde tukén a waftafé, yémofem yau tamndetawét yaufi si Yurane sáfrére. 12 Wénde yéné unyégh watamegh ár sem ndenanit kéghat wérár ménát werghét a krot. Fá nénwangotat tékrate fá árkéméné mafina em. Fá so kolindangi ndenanit kéghat wérár.
bt: But the men carrying heavenly message(angels) surpass these men and are very high up and great power, but they do not say bad talk to them before the Lord. 12 But these false teaching men are like wild animals [born] to be captured and killed. They pay them back with suffering which they do not know. They will be destroyed like wild animals,

nama: Fá so fai ewafrotat tékrate yéné tékrateyo yémofem árké tafrotat. Ménde yéfene siyém sái ewafrotat safén efogh kwayaghayan árkéménayam so eremngote yéfene fifi amanjarghan. Fá em wáiwái a ngárámofnar ndené kés nufeindat féfene njamkeyan, méinyotio yaman náuwetat yéfene yaufiyammén. 14 Wal ghékéf amafanyo, fá yau kékmbongi yaufiyam. Yémofem engwaramnat yau kékmbongi. Fá em nité. Fá sem Ngánjánene wafalngogh mbanmbanan. 15 Yémofem té norongi mbarkánd end a mwighé yaitongi sái yaitotat Bejerene ambum Balamene yam, emo méndefé tafandau yaufiyam wafroghét mani faie. 16 Wénde fá yusérmbotam siofnar ndonkiam ménamén yánjoyo yaufiyammén, korayau ár si kéme a yékmbotam yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene máméghéraye yam.
bt: They will do payment with suffering for the suffering they have did. Pleasure for them is to do anything widely in daylight that will satisfy their bodily eating a lot. They are a shame and a without.grace as they join you.p in your meals, in everything they enjoy their sin. 14 With eyes full of adultery, they never stop sinning. They do not stop seeking them. They are greedy. They are under God's curses. 15 They have left the straight way and followed thought to follow the way of Balam son of Bejer, who want to do sin with payment. 16 But a donkey without talk rebuked him because of his sin, spoke with a human voice and stop the God's man who make know(prophet)ʼs evil things.

nama: Yéné ár sem ndenanit sotro nu yékwnit a esnit árké yéngtarne ménáyam mbormboram. Minde kwéfité nawanjete yéfeyot. 18 Fá nawarmbotat a fifiofnar sie ewafrotat, a yaufi wal méndeye ereindat fá emofem yérnyangi kétamé nawanjarngi ár efe emormén yaufi ghérsaye. 19 Yémofem unyéghofnar si ewaramayénd yéfe yuwekmén, táf fá fáyo em faiofnar ásáfogh ár wasérmboghan ménamén, "ár eyátote faiofnar ásáfogh ár némé yam té elimnde fá. 20 Yéné unyégh watamegh ár mat náyátoyénd yánemén téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso, emo yénmanjane yénd. Yéné téfnan, fá té nékmboyénd yaufi wafroghta árkéméné em mband maratoene. Fá té nénamndayénd yuwek kétamé yéné yam waftata. Wénde soramé njam yémofem wéi ewafrotat yéné yaufi yamyo, féyo yéné yam wafrogh so kénamndangi minde muyafé a taumbangi yéné ár wéikor a fá so awasérmboghan em. 21 Ndené árém yau fia tinjongayénd mbarkánd end. Yéné siyém ménamén tekofnar emormén a nangoyénd. Njam nangoyénd ekenayénd Ngánjánene minde muyafé si yémon árké té ewaramai. 22 A sómbio káfeté si efalo nufrotam yéfefaf. Ámb si noraye, "Ághé ménd nawetotam a yéngmormén a soramé nénangotam a enete wéikor yánjo ménd." A ámb si noraye, "Kimb kumbnau mer nuan a néwanoi a wéi nénangoi a káyátotau ghéndan."
bt: These people are like water holes without water and mists driven by a wind. Very deep darkness is waiting for them. 18 They make proud and do without.meaning talks, and trap them by immoral desires who are beginning to save from among people who live in false life. 19 They made a without.lying talk(promise) them freedom, while they themselves are without.payment working men(servants) in destroy because, “people become without.payment working men(servants) to whatever has led them.” 20 These false teaching men learned about our Lord Yesu Keriso, who saves us. As a result, they had stopped doing the bad things that belong to this world. They had become free from the power of those things. But later if they do again those bad behaviors, then that behavior will become very strong and tie up those people again and they will be ruined. 21 Such people should not have seen the straight road. That's because after they saw that road they stayed it for a while, and then they turned around and went back. When they returned they were rejecting God's very strong talk that he gave them. 22 And the two wisdom talk happens to them. One of the talks said, "A dog vomited and went and later it returned and is eating again its vomit." And the other talk said, "A pig washed in good water and went and it returned and became again in mud."

nama: Áuwéghafé fútaréf, yéné siyém sénonjo yénamayo férén féfefaf. Yéndon té efaromén sómbio férén féfefaf mwighat minaghét féfe ámbiro mwighayan. 2 Yénd ménde wém fém sái nawafarotati si némé té kénorayawét tándái yémofem njúnnjúnofnar Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a wáfaregh si yénmaramayéng téfene Yuram a Wanjarégh árom féfene Yesuene muyafé ár kénjúmé.
bt: Loving friends, this is now the second letter to you.p. I have written two letters to them to increase mind for you in one thinking. 2 I want you.p to remember the talks what have spoken in the past by the without.dust(holy) God's people who make know(prophets) and the command given by our Lord and Savior through your men with Yesu's authority(apostles).

nama: Frondefifi, fém a mat náyátotati ndené kété kerker efghon si wafrogh ár so eném, si so engwafrotat a ewaitotat yéfenjo yaufiyam ménde. 4 Fá so norayat, "Ánde yém yéné 'angogh' yémo syéngufoi? Kétándmayo téfene ákif té kér enmormén, méinyotio mé néngrete ndené endeyo kétándmayo mband marat fronde nénufrotam." 5 Wénde fá fifiyanyo ewawalinde ndené tándái yénaye Ngánjánene sie njafar naketat a mband marat yafrotam kétamé nuta a mé nuero. 6 Yéné nue wéi mband marat yéné efghon yékmangérmén kéfér a yérambaryéng. 7 Yéné sieyo sénonjo njafar a mband marat nawamndat kétán fését, em kétán mogh efogh a tékrat yam ngánjánofnar árfet.
bt: Firstly, you.p must understand that in the last days making talk people(scoffers) will come, will make fun talk(scoffing) and follow their own evil desires. 4 They will say, “Where is this ‘coming’ he said? Since our ancestors died, everything goes on in the same way since the world was first created.” 5 But they purposely forget that long ago by Godʼs talk the heavens have existing and the earth was formed out of water and by water. 6 By these waters also the world of that time was flooded and no one left. 7 By that talk the present heavens and earth are reserved for fire. They are for the day of judgment and destruction of ungodly people.

nama: Tane fútaréf, wénde yau tawawalindangé yéné ámbiro yam: Yurafaf ámbiro efogh siyém ndenanit 1,000 yunjéf, a 1,000 yunjéf ndenanit ámbiro efogh. 9 Yuré yau yém awanéghe sái nufrota yáne unyéghofnar si, ndené ámb néngemnat so nawanete. Wénde fá siyém métar fémafé, yau ménde yém ámb ár sái kolindangé, wénde méinyotio ár sái kawengongi yaufiyamta.
bt: My friends, but do not forget this one thing: To the Lord one day is like 1,000 years, and 1,000 years are like one day. 9 The Lord is not slow in keeping his without.lying talk(promise), as some understand slowness. But he is patient with you.p, not wanting anyone to perish, but every people to turn away from sin.

nama: Wénde Yurane efogh so yéném ndenanit oro téfnár. Njafar so nolindat ukefé. Fésam so yasérmbote méinyotio rokar. Mband marat a méinyotio rokar némé árém ewafrotat so kolindangi.
bt: But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a roar. Fire will destroy whole things. The earth and everythings that people have made will disappear.

nama: Ménamén Ngánjánam so ewasérmbote méinyotio rokar yéné ende, fém efalo mat em ndernaye fémofem táf so násáfotati. Fém so emor njúnnjúnofnar a ngánján ghérsaye 12 njamandio fém néretati Ngánjánene efghot a wékeye tiyátongi yáne áligh. Yéné efgham so yénérsé tékrat yam njafar sái em fésan, a méinyotio rokar so nérndat waftamén. 13 Wénde yeretam yáne unyéghofnar si yénd néretam kétán totér njafar a totér mband marat, ánde mbarkánd yam so násáfotat.
bt: Because God will destroy everything in this way, you.p certainly know how you should do. You.p should live without.dust(holy) and godly lives 12 as you.p look for the day of God and his coming become quickly. That day will bring about the destruction of the heavens will be on fire, and everythings will melt in the heat. 13 But in keeping with his without.lying talk(promise) we are looking for a new heaven and a new earth, where straightness will do.

nama: Yénémamén, áuwéghafé fútaréf, ndené fété fém néretati kétán yénat méinyotio yammén a tawinjongé mborofnar, téfnofnar a krufrátan yémafé. 15 Mwighayan yérsati ndené téfene Yurane métaroene fifi siyém wanjarghét, ndené fété téfene áuwéghafé fútar Folém wéi yéfarotam féfeyot ménaye káfeté mwighaye ndené Ngánjánam syaramai yá. 16 Yémo yéfarotam ndenéyameyo méinyotio yáne férnan, korayau yénamé yéné kértamén. Yáne férnan em ámb yam árkéméné em táikér résaghét, árkéméné áyáréghofnar a awanjmegh árém yéngwengotat, ndené ámb Buk sian kés yéngfayotat. Yéné téfnan, fá so em wasérmboghan.
bt: Therefore, loving friends, as you.p are looking for to this every things and be found spotless, blameless and at peace with him. 15 Keep in mind that our Lordʼs patience means salvation, just as our loving friend Fol also wrote you.p with the wisdom that God gave him. 16 He writes the same way in all his letters, speaking in them of these matters. His letters contain some things that are hard to understand, which ignorant and unstable people twist, as they do the other Scriptures. As a result, they will be destroyed.

nama: Yénémaménnde, áuwéghafé fútaréf, fém té mat náyátongi yéné, kor aem ménát fém yau so tawanangé nákofnar árfene yaufiyamam a kuyangi kétamé féfenjo waferéghkaf sifayata. 18 Wénde nanotati téfene Yuré a Wanjarégh ár Yesu Kerisoene ngárám a matyam kénjún. Yáyot so yém ndimbal kwayaghé sénonjo a tuot! Efalo.
bt: Therefore, loving friends, you.p already know this, watch out so that you.p may not be carried away by the error of the lawless and fall from your.p secure place. 18 But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Yesu Keriso. To him be big light(glory) both now and forever! Amen.

nama: Fá efe nakete kétamayo rényégh, fá yéné féyém yéndfem efe yiyáráyém a yinjoyém, yéndfem yinjoyém téfenjo ghékfe a tianjawém téfenjo ngángaye, fá yém Yesu Keriso, ghérsé si. 2 Yéné ár efe yém ghérsé kétamé Ngánjáneta árké yuyafoi téfefaf a yéndfem té yinjoyém, a sénonjo yéndfem engwaufrotam a mat engyátotam fém ndené fá yéné féyém efe yém tuot ghérsé, fá tarwén Yárefafé a kété yémo yuyafoi téfeyot. 3 Yéndfem engwaufrotam féfe ménamén némé yéndfem té téfandam a káyáretam, ménát fémofé so nawareindam yéndfé, a téfene awarnyégh siyém yémafé Yárefafé a yánjo Ambum, Yesu Keriso. 4 Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné yammén ménát téfene áuwégh so yém afoghare. Áligh kwayaghayan
bt: He who exist from beginning, he is this one who we have heard and seen, we saw him with our own eyes and touched him with our own hands, he is Yesu Keriso, the talk of life. 2 This man who is life from God which was shown to us and we have seen, and now we are telling and make you.p know that he is the one who is eternal life, he was with his Father and there he showed to us. 3 We are telling you.p about what we ourselves have seen and heard, so that with you.p may have fellowship with us, and our fellowship is with his Father and his Son, Yesu Keriso. 4 We are writing these things so that our joy will be full. Walking in light

nama: Yéné fiyém si yéndfem árké náyárayém kétamé yá tambén a yafnamoyém féfefaf: Ngánján siyém kwayaghé, yáne kénjún yau yém kwéfité. 6 Njam yénd norayam ndené yénd nawareindam yémafé, wénde yényota mé kwéfkwéfamé, yénd nuindam a yau yénmor efaloe. 7 Wénde njam yénd yényota kwayaghayan, ndené fété fá kés yém kwayaghayan, téfene yém awarnyégh téfenjo kénjún, a Ngánjánene Ambum, Yesuene férkam, yénmaine yénd kétamé méinyotio yaufita.
bt: This is the talk which we have heard from him and passed on to you.p: God is light, in him there is no darkness. 6 If we say that we have fellowship with him, yet walk in the darkness, we lie and do not live by truth. 7 But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship in us, and the blood of Yesu, God's Son, washes us from all sin.

nama: Njam yénd norayam ndené yau yéném yaufiyamafé, yénd nawawindam yéndio a efalo yau yém téfefaf. 9 Njam yéndfem eufanam téfenjo yaufiyam, fá yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro a mbarkánd a so tawalindangé téfene yaufiyam a yénmaina yénd kétamé méinyotio mbarkándofnar yamta. 10 Yénd njam norayam téfene yau em yaufiyam, yéndfem yéméindam Ngánján unyégh ár a yáne si yau yém téfene kénjún.
bt: If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves and the truth is not in us. 9 If we confess our sins, he is faithful and straight and will forget our sins and wash us from all without.straightness. 10 If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar and his talk is not in us.

nama: Tane tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan yéné féfefaf ménát fémofem yau so yaufiyam ewafrotati. Wénde njam árké árom yafrota yaufiyam, téfene yém néndkéf ár efe noraye Yárefafaf, Yesu Keriso, Mbarkánd ár. 2 Fá siyém krufrát ghéngén téfene yaufiyam árké tawalindangé, a yau mé téfene yaufiyamro wénde méinyotio árfene yaufiyam.
bt: My heartful children, I write this to you.p so that you.p will not do sin. But if anyone does sin, we have an middlemen who say to his Father, Yesu Keriso, the Righteous One. 2 He is peace sacrifice which forget our sins, and not only our sins but all people's sins.

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené yénd té nénamndayém mat yánemén njam yéndfem ewaitotam yáne wáfaregh si. 4 Ár efe noraye, "Yénd mat wém fá, " wénde yau ewafrota némat yémo yénmáfárete yém unyégh ár, a efalo yau yém yáne kénjún. 5 Wénde njam árké árom ewaitota yáne si, Ngánjánene uwégh siyém efalo náyáto mbarkánd yáne kénjún. Yéné fiyém ndené yénd yéném yáne kénjún. 6 Efe njam noraya ménát sái yiyota ghérsayan yáne kénjún so fété yiyota ndené Yesu kés tiyotau. Totér nák
bt: We know that we have come to know him when we follow his commands. 4 The man who say, "I know him," but does not do what he commands is liar, and the truth is not in him. 5 But if anyone follows his talk, God's love is truely made straight his inside. This is that we know that we are in him. 6 Whoever say to walk in life his inside must walk as Yesu did. New law

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, yéndo yau yéfarotan totér nák féfefaf wénde tándáwár nák fém árké té náyárayénd kétamé rényéghta. Yéné watameghyo fiyém fém árké té nénáyárayénd. 8 Wénde yéné siyém efalo totér nák, a fém mat em yáne efalo fifi, ndené fété Kerisom kés ewafrote. Sénonjo yéné té wéi efalo yiyátoi féfene ghérsayan. Ménamén kwéfité néngolinde a efalo kwayaghé té natremngo.
bt: My heartful friends, I am not writing a new law to you.p but an old law which you.p have already heard from the beginning. This teaching is which you.p have heard. 8 But this is a true new law, and you.p know its true meaning, just as Keriso does. Now it has also become true in your lives. Because the darkness is fading away and the true light is already shining.

nama: Njam yénd norayam ndené yénd yéném kwayaghayan a méndméndat efandam ámb ár, yénd mé yéném kwéfitayan. 10 Wénde njam yéndfem euwetam ámb ár, yénd yéném kwayaghayan, a yéndfem yau so yaufiot eméindam ámb ár. 11 Wénde emofem njam méndméndat efandat fútaréf em kwéfitayan, emor kwéfitayan, a mafina em ándan so engém, ménamén kwéfitayam té eyáto yéné ár kwéfkwéf.
bt: If we say that we are in the light and hate other people, we are still in the dark. 10 But if we love other people, we are in the light, and we don't cause someone to sin. 11 But whoever hates friends is in darkness, lives in darkness, and does not know where to go, because the darkness has made that person blind.

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén féfene yaufiyam té tawalindangé Kerisoene kénjúmé.
bt: Heartful children, I am writing to you.p because your.p sins are forgot/forgiven through Keriso. 13 Fathers, I am writing to you.p because you.p have known him who is from the beginning. Young men, I am writing to you.p because you.p have overcome the evil one.

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fém mat té náyátongi Afé. Afaf, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fémofem mat té yiyátongi fá efe yém kétamé rényégh. Totér ambum, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fém em muyafé, a Ngánjánene si yékmang féfefaf, a fémofem té yáindangi yaufi ár. Yau yuwetati mband marat
bt: Heartful children, I am writing to you.p because you.p know the Father. Fathers, I am writing to you.p because you.p have known him who is from the beginning. Young men, I am writing to you.p because you.p are strong, and God's talk lives in you.p, and you have overcome the evil one. Don't love the world

nama: Yau yuwetati mband marat o némé rokar em mband maratan. Árké árém njam yuwetat mband marat, Afane uwégh yau yém yáfaf. 16 Méinyotio némé em yéné mband maratmén- fifioene ménde, ghékfoene ménde, a tuktuk ghérsé-yau em Afata, wénde em mbandmén. 17 Mband marat a yánjo méndefayo so nawainde, wénde yéné ár emofem yafrotat Ngánjánene ménde so emor tuot. Wawéngsogh yéfenemén unyégh keriso
bt: Don't love the world or what things are in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in him. 16 Everything what are from this world- the desire of the flesh, the desire of eyes, and the boastful life- are not of the Father, but are of the world. 17 The world and its desires will pass away, but these men who do the will of God will live forever. Warning about them false keriso

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéné siyém kerker efogh. Fém té náyárangi ndené unyégh keriso so yéném, ndené sénonjo tárfár unyégh keriso té enmormén. Ndenaye yénd mat so yéném yéné siyém kerker efogh. 19 Fá nétoryénd téfe kénjúta, wénde fá yau efaloe tamorwén téfene, njam fá tamorwén téfene, fá so mé kawangsongayénd téfefaf; wénde fá nétoryénd, ménát so yéné kufarngé ndené fá yau em méinyotio téfene.
bt: Heartful children, this is the last day. As you.p have heard that the false keriso will come, even now many false keriso have come. As we know this is the last day. 19 They went out from us, but they were not really of us, if they had been of us, they would have remained with us, but they went out, so that this would been shown that they are not all of us.

nama: Wénde féfefaf té Ngánján Mbérmbér yasuryéng Kerisom, a féyo méinyotio fém mat em efalo. 21 Yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf, yau ménamén fém mafina em efalo wénde ménamén fém mat em ndené unyégh si yau yéném efalota.
bt: But Keriso have the God Spirit poured out on you.p, and so all of you.p know the truth. 21 I am writing to you.p, not because you.p don't know the truth but because you.p know that false talk does not come from truth.

nama: A efe yém unyégh ár? Fá efe noraye ndené Yesu yau yém Keriso, ndené ár fem unyégh keriso. Yémofem té yékenangi Yárefé a Ambum. 23 Emofem yékarotat Ambum, wéi yékarotat Yárefé, wénde emofem yumyotat Ambum, ndenéyameyo yumyotat Yárefé.
bt: And who is the liar? He who says that Yesu is not Keriso, such people are false keriso. They have denied his Father and the Son. 23 Who reject the Son, also reject his Father, but who accept the Son, also accept his Father.

nama: Mé a nemnati ménamén si fémofem árké nénáyárayénd fronde, a fém so em túmén ámbiro féfene tikfan yémafé Ambumofé a Yárefafé. 25 Ambumom té unyéghofnar si norayai téfefaf: tuot ghérsé.
bt: Keep on thinking about the talk which you.p first heard, and you.p will always be one on your.p heart with the Son and with his Father. 25 The Son has told without.lying talk(promise) us: eternal life.

nama: Yéndo yéfarotan ménát ewawéngsotan fém yéné árfenemén emofem elimndat ámb endmé fém. 27 Wénde Kerisom té efrendai fém ménaye Ngánján Mbérmbére. Sénonjo yáne Mbérmbér yémor féfefaf, a fémofem yau eronjati ámb watamegh ár. Ngánján Mbérmbér siyém efalo a ewatamete fém méinyotio yam. Féyo a emor ámbiro féfene tikfan yémafé Keriso, ndené fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram ndernáye tawatamete fém ménát wafroghét. Ngánjánene ambumtértér
bt: I am writing it to warn you.p about those people who are leading you.p. other way. 27 But Keriso has blessed you.p with the God Spirit. Now his Spirit stays in you.p, and you.p don't need any teaching men. The God Spirit is true and teaches you.p everything. So stay one in your.p heart with Keriso, just as how the God Spirit taught you.p to do. God's children

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, sénonjo mé aem yáne kénjún, ménát fá njam kufarngé, yénd so yéném féyotaro a wáiwáiofnar yánerére yáne angoghan. 29 Fém njam mat em ndené fá yém mbarkánd, fém mat em ndené méinyotio árém emofem ewafrotat némé em mbarkánd té náráftayénd yáfaf.
bt: Heartful children, now continue to be in him, so that when he appears, we may be confident and get without.shame before him at his coming. 29 If you.p know that he is straight, you.p know that every people who do what is straight has been born of him.

nama: Afam té yénmuwetam yénd mindefifi ndené kés yénémndete Ngánjánene ambumtértér, a yénd efalofifi yéném yáne ambum. Téfén méné ár mband maratan yau mat em téfenemén yém ndené yémofem yau mat yiyátoyénd fá. 2 Tikfafé fútaréf, sénonjo yénd yéném Ngánjánene ambumtértér, a yénd yau mat nénamndangém ndernáye yénd fifi so yéném soramé yuwan. Wénde yénd mat yéném ndené njam Keriso nénangota wéikor, yénd so kénamndangém ndené fá kés yém, ménamén yéndfem so tinjongém fá ndené fété fá ndernáye yém. 3 Yéné méghmégham yénd yényátote njúnnjúnofnar, ndené fété Keriso kés yém njúnnjúnofnar.
bt: The Father has loved us so much that he calls us God's children, and we really are his children. The reason the people in the world do not know us is that they haven't know him. 2 Heartful friend, now we are God's children, and we didn't make know how we really will be in the future. But we know that when Keriso comes again, we will become that he is, because we will see him as how he is. 3 This hope makes us to be without.dust(holy), just as Keriso is without.dust(holy).

nama: Méinyotio ár emofem yaufiyam yéngwafrotat yéngrafnat Ngánjánene nák, ménamén yaufiyam siyém Ngánjánene nák rafarégh. 5 A fém mat em ndené fá nufaryéng ménát so tawitau téfene yaufiyam, a yáfaf kété yau yém yaufiyam. 6 Efe yém yáfaf yau so ewafrote yaufiyam. Emo njam ewafrota yaufiyam yau yinjoi fá a mat yau yiyáto fá.
bt: Everyone who do sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law. 5 And you.p know that he appeared so that might throw away our sins, and to him there is no sin. 6 Who is to him does not do sin. Whoever do sin has not seen him and not known him.

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yau yumyotati ámb árom sái elimnda fém mámáfi endmé. Emo njam ewafrota némé em mbarkánd fá siyém mbarkánd, ndené fété Keriso yém mbarkánd. 8 Sáifram té engwafngoi yaufiyam kétamayo rényégh, féyo árké ár efe ménjté mé yém yaufiyaman yém Sáiférene. Ngánjánene Ambum yénmormén yéné téfnan, ménát Sáiférene ásáfogh wirorghét.
bt: Heartful children, don't let other person lead you.p the wrong way. Whoever does what is straight is straight, just as Keriso is straight. 8 The Sáifèr has been sinning since the beginning, so anyone who continues to be in sin is of the Sáifèr. God's Son came for this reason, to destroy the Sáifèr's work.

nama: Fá efe em Ngánjánene ambumtértér yau so ménjté em yaufiyaman ménamén totér ghérsé kétamé Ngánjáneta yém yéfene kénjún, fá féyotarofnar em sái ménjté engém yaufiyaman, ménamén fá té nénamndayénd Ngánjánene ambumtértér. 10 Féyo yéndfem so efandam efe Ngánjánene ambumtértér em a efe Sáiférene ambumtértér em: Fá emofem yau ewafrotat mbarkánd yau em Ngánjánene ambum, a fá emofem yau enguwetat yéfene fútaréf yau em Ngánjánene ambumtértér. Náuwetati fémro fémro
bt: Those who are God's children do not continue in sin because the new life from God is in them, they are not able to keep on go in sin, because they have become God's children. 10 So we can see who are God's children and who are the Sáifèr's children: Those who do not do straight are not God's children, and those who do not love their friends are not God's children. Love each other

nama: Yéné fiyém watamegh fémofem árké náyárayénd kétamé rényégh: Yénd so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. 12 Yau ndené em Kein efe témorwén yaufi ároe tambén a yésmetam yánngén. Némamén yémo yésmetam krotio fá? Ménamén yam Keiném tawafrotau tamorwén mámáfi, a yam yanngnom tawafrotau tamorwén mer.
bt: This is the teaching which you.p heard from the beginning: We must love each other. 12 Don't be like Kein who was from the evil one and killed his younger brother. Why did he kill him? Because the things Kein did were bad, and things his younger brother did were good.

nama: Tane fútaréf, yau táf em sélngwél njam mband marat árém méndméndat efandat fém. 14 Yénd mat yéném yéndfem té yénfrangongém kér a té nényawangém ghérsat ménamén yéndfem náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, emo yau njam euweta mé yém kérwén. 15 Árké árom méndméndat efande yané fútaréf yém ngi téfnár, a fém mat em ndené yau ár ngi téfnárafefaf yém tuot ghérsé.
bt: My friends, do not be surprised when the people of the world hate you.p. 14 We know we have left death and have entered into life because we love each other, whoever does not love is still dead. 15 Anyone hates his friends is a murderer, and you.p know that to murderes is not eternal life.

nama: Ndenaye yénd mat yéném némé efalo uwégh yém: Yesum yéramai yánjo ghérsé téfeyot. Féyo yéndfem wéi taramangém téfene ghérsé téfene fútarfet. 17 Wénde njam endene em féyotaroan mani ménát sái yéngmor mer a efande yané fútaréf náronjat a nakena wáutárghét, ndernáye so norayam Ngánjánene uwégh yém ndené ároefaf?
bt: That is how we know what real love is: Yesu gave his life for us. So we should give our lives for our friends. 17 But if anyone have enough money to live well and sees his friends in need and refuses to help, how can we say God's love be to that person?

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yénd yau so náuwetam mé siero o kánkaye wénde ménaye wafroghyame a efaloe. 19 Ndenaye yénd mat yéném ndené yénd yéném efaloene, a ndenáye yéndfem ewalinjotam téfene tikéf Ngánján sáfrére. 20 Ndemamén téfene mwighayam so ténmaufrongé ndené yéndfem tawafrotam ámb yaufi, yénd wéi mé yau so yéném férfér Ngánjánefaf. Ngánjánam ewainde téfene mwighé. Fá té mat yém téfenemén méinyotio.
bt: Heartful children, let us not love only with talks or tongue but with action and in truth. 19 This is how we know that we come of(belongs to) the truth, and this is how we set our hearts before God. 20 Even though our thoughts tell us that we have done something wrong, we still will not be afraid of God. God surpasses our thoughts. He already knows everythings about us.

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, njam téfene tikfam yau tényátongé yaufi, yénd so yéném férférofnar Ngánjánene sáfrére, 22 a Ngánjánam yénmaramete téfe némat yéndfem yéngwamnendam ménamén yéndfem ewaitatam Ngánjánene nák a ewafrotam némé yam áuwéghét yéméinde fá. 23 A yéné féyém yáne nák: ndené yéndfem so efalo yiyátotam yánjo Ambum Yesu Kerisoene yétkwén, a náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, ndené fété yémo yénmaramai téfe nák. 24 Fá emofem ewaitotat Ngánjánene nák emor yáne kénjún, a fá yém yéfene kénjún. A ndenáye yénd mat yéném ndené fá yémor téfene kénjún, yénd mat náyátotam ménáyan Ngánján Mbérmbér yémo yénmaramai téfe.
bt: My heartful friends, if our hearts do not make us sin, we can come without fear before God, 22 and God gives us what we ask for because we follow God's law and do what please him. 23 And this is his law: that we should truly approve(believe) on the name of his Son Yesu Keriso, and love each other, as he gave us law. 24 Those who follow his law live in him, and he is in them. And that is how we know that he lives in us, we know it by God Spirit he gave us.

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, yau táf efalo eyátotati méinyotio mbérmbér, wénde eufotati mbérmbér ménát fandaghét némé fá fété em Ngánjáneta, ménamén tárfár unyégh mat yátogh ár té engmormén mband maratot. 2 Yéné fiyém ndenáye fémofem so tayamngongi Ngánjánene Mbérmbér: Árké ár njam noraya ndené Yesu Keriso té yénmormén fifie fá fiyém Ngánjáneta. 3 Wénde njam ámb ár yau noraya ndené Yesuenemén, fém mat em yéné ároefaf siyém yéné mbérmbér yau yém árkéméné yéném Ngánjáneta a yém Kerisoene mék téfnár, fém mat em yéné mék téfnár té yénmorwén yénan mband maratot a sénonjo fá té yém yéna.
bt: Heartful friends, do not truly approve(believe) every spirits, but test the spirits to find out what they are from God, because many false people who make know(prophets) have gone out into the world. 2 This is how you.p can recognize God's Spirit: If anyone says that Yesu Keriso has come with body he is from God. 3 But when someone doesn't say this about Yesu, you.p know that person has that spirit which doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Keriso, you.p know this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, fém em Ngánjáneta a té ewaindayénd fá, ménamén fá efe yém féfene kénjún yáinde efe yém yéné mband maratan. 5 Fá em yéné mband maratmén, a némé fá nénorayat em mé mband maratmén, a mband marat náyárete yéfefaf. 6 Wénde yénd yéném Ngánjánene, a fá efe mat em Ngánján náyáretat téfefaf, wénde fá efe yau em Ngánjáneta yau náyáretat téfefaf. Ndenaye yénd mat yéném mbérmbér árké yém efaloe a mbérmbér árké yém unyéghe. Ngánján siyém uwégh
bt: Heartful children, you are from God and has overcome them, because the one who is in you.p surpasses the one who is in the world. 5 They are from this world, and what they say are from the world, and the world listens to them. 6 But we come of God, and those who know God listen to us, but those who are not from God do not listen to us. That is how we know the spirit which is true and the spirit which is false. God is love

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, yénd so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, ménamén uwégh yéném kétamé Ngánjáneta. Méinyotio ár emo euwete té nénamnde Ngánjánene ambum a mat yém Ngánján. 8 Emo yau njam euweta yau mat yém Ngánján, ménamén Ngánján siyém uwégh. 9 Ndenaye Ngánjánam yuyafotam yánjo uwégh téfeyot: Yémo yénmáfáretam yánjo mé yénaro Ambum yéné mband maratot ménát téfene so yém ghérsé yáne kénjúmé. 10 Yéné siyém efalofifi uwégh: yau yéné téfene uwégh Ngánjáneyot, yéné yém Ngánjánene uwégh téfeyot ménáyan yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambum ménát sái témorwén krufrát ghéngén sái tawitau téfene yaufiyam.
bt: Heartful friends, we should love each other, because love come from God. Everyone who loves has become God's child and know God. 8 Whoever does not love does not know God, because God is love. 9 This is how God showed his love to us: He sent his one and only Son into this world so that we could have life through him. 10 This is real love: this is not our love for God, it is God's love for us in sending his Son so that it will be peace sacrifice to throw our sins.

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, njam Ngánjánam yénmuwetam yénd mindefifi wéi ndenéyameyo so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. 12 Ámb árom yau yinjoi Ngánján, wénde njam yénd náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, Ngánján yémor téfefaf, a yáne uwégh káyátongé féwénféwénofnar téfefaf.
bt: Heartful friends, if God loved us as much we also should love each other. 12 Nobody has seen God, but if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is making without.flaw(perfect) in us.

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené yénd yénmor Ngánjánene kénjún a fá yémor téfene kénjún, ménamén yémo té yénmaramai téfe yánjo Mbérmbér. 14 Yéndfem té yinjoyém a so néngafrotam ndené Yárefam yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambum ménát sái témorwén Wanjarégh ár mband maratoe.
bt: We know that we live in God and he lives in us, because he gave us his Spirit. 14 We have seen and can testify that the Father sent his Son to be the Savior of the world.

nama: Efe njam néngoraya ndené Yesu siyém Ngánjánene Ambum yényau Ngánján yáne kénjún, a yéné ár yényau Ngánjánene kénjún. 16 A yénd mat yéném uwégh Ngánjánene árké yém téfeyot, a yéndfem efalo yiyátotam yéné uwégh.
bt: Whoever says that Yesu is the Son of God have God living in him, and that person lives in God. 16 And we know the love which God has for us, and we trust that love.

nama: Yéné fiyém ndenáye so yéndfem euwetam ámb ár méinyotio tikfe. Féyo, yénd so yéném férférofnar yéné efghon Ngánjánam njam so emote méinyotio ár. Yénd mat so yéném ndené Ngánjánam yau so tékratan ténékmangé yénd. Yénd mat yéném yéné ménamén yénd ténmor yéné mband maratan yéné ende Yesu ndernaye témorangérwén. 18 Ánde Ngánjánene uwégh yém, kété yau yém férfér, ménamén Ngánjánene féwénféwénofnar uwégham titérmbongé férfér. Féyo uwégh yau náyáto féwénféwénofnar yéné ároefaf efe yém férfér, ménamén férféram so tékmangé tékratan.
bt: That is how we are able to love other people with all heart. Then, we will not be afraid on the day when God will judge all people. We can be sure that God will not punish us. We know this because we have lived in this world in the way that Yesu lived. 18 Where God's love is, there is no fear, because God's without.flaw love drives out fear. So then, love has not been made without.flaw(perfect) in anyone who is afraid, because fear put them into punishment.

nama: Yéndfem euwetam ménamén Ngánjánam fronde yénmuwetam yénd. 20 Njam ár norayat, "Yéndon yuwetan Ngánján" wénde méndméndat efandat yéfenjo fútaréf, fá em unyégh ár. Fá emofem yau euwetat yéfenjo fútaréf, efe yémofem té ewinjoyénd, yau so yuwetat Ngánján, efe yémofem yau té yinjoyénd. 21 A Ngánjánam yénmaramai téfe yéné nák: Fá emofem yuwetat Ngánján so wéi euwetat yéfenjo fútaréf.
bt: We love them because God first loved us. 20 If people say, "I love God," but hate their friends, they are liars. Those who do not love their friends, whom they have seen, cannot love God, whom they have never seen. 21 And God gave us this law: Those who love God must also love their friends.

nama: Méinyotio árém emofem efalo yiyátotat ndené Yesu siyém Keriso yéném Ngánjánene ambumtértér, a méinyotio árém emofem yuwetat afé wéi yuwetat yáne ambum. 2 Yéné fiyém ndenáye yénd mat yéném yéndfem euwetam Ngánjánene ambumtértér, yéndfem njam yuwetam Ngánján a ewaitotam yáne nák. 3 Yéndfem euyafotam téfene uwégh yáyot Ngánjáneyot ménaye ewaitotam yáne nák, a yáne nák yau em táikér ménát waitoghét, 4 ménamén méinyotio Ngánjánene ambumam so taindangi mband marat, a yéné féyém téfene ndimbal mwighé árkéménayam yénmaramete téfe waingéghét. 5 Árké árom so taindangé mband marat? Mé yéné áromro emo Yesu efalo yiyátote ndené Ngánjánene Ambum.
bt: Everyone who truly approve(believe) that Yesu is Keriso has become a child of God, and everyone who loves the father loves his child also. 2 This is how we know we love the children of God, when we love God and follow his laws. 3 We show our love for God by following his laws, and his laws are not hard to follow, 4 because every child of God can overcome the world, and this is our big mind(faith) that gives us to win. 5 Which person can defeat the world? Only this man who truly approves(believes) Yesu as the Son of God.

nama: Fá yéné féyém efe yénmormén nuafé a férék, Yesu Keriso. Fá yau yénmormén nuafaro, wénde nu a férék. A Ngánján Mbérmbér yénémamén nafrote ndené yéné siyém efalo, ménamén Ngánján Mbérmbér siyém efalo. 7 Féyo yéna em nambio ghékéf fayogh ár árkéménayam yénmaufrotat téfe Yesuenemén: 8 Ngánján Mbérmbér, nu a férék, yéné nambio ámbiro em.
bt: This is the one who came by water and blood, Yesu Keriso. He did not come only by water, but water and blood. And the God Spirit says that this is true, because the God Spirit is truth. 7 So there are three watching men(eye to see) that tell us about Yesu; 8 God Spirit, the water and the blood, these three are one.

nama: Yéndfem efalo táyátongém árfene waitogh si, wénde némé Ngánján noraye, yéné yam yáinde árfene si, a yémo té yénmaufroi téfe efaloe yánjo Ambummén. 10 Árké ár emo efalo yiyátote Ngánjánene Ambum yáfaf yém efalo si árkéméné Ngánjánam yénmaufroi téfe. Wénde árké árom emo yau njam efalo yiyátota tiyátongé Ngánján unyégh ár. Ménamén yéné árom yau efalo yiyátote némé Ngánjánam yénmaufroi téfe yánjo Ambummén. 11 Ndené Ngánjánam yénmaufroi téfe: Ngánjánam té yénmaramai téfe tuot ghérsé, a yéné ghérsé siyém yáne Ambum kénjún. 12 Fá endefaf yém Ambum yáfaf yém ghérsé, fá endefaf yau yém Ngánjánene Ambum yau yáfaf yém ghérsé. Wifoghétro si
bt: We truly approve(believe) people's speaking talk, but what God says, that thing surpasses the talk of humans, and he has told us the truth about his own Son. 10 Anyone who truly approves(believes) in the Son of God has the true talk that God told us. But anyone who does not truly approve(believe) makes God a liar. Because that person who does not truly approve(believe) what God told us about his Son. 11 This is God told us: God has given us eternal life, and this life is in his Son. 12 He who has the Son has life to him, he who does not have the Son of God does not have life to him. Final talk

nama: Yéndon yéngfarotan yéné féfefaf emofem efalo yiyátotat Ngánjánene Ambum, ménát fém mat so em féfefaf yém tuot ghérsé. 14 Yénd féyotaro yéném ndené Ngánján so náyárete téfene Ngánjánafé orayégh njam yéndfem yéngwamnendam yénat árkéménáyan fá náuwete. 15 A njam yénd mat yéném ndené Ngánján náyárete njam yénd nomnendam, yénd mat kamndangém ndené téfene Ngánjánafé orayégh Ngánjánam ténmawangongé.
bt: I am writing this to you.p who truly approve(believe) the Son of God, so that you.p may know you.p have eternal life. 14 We are certain that God will hear our talking with God when we ask for what pleases him. 15 And if we know that God listen when we ask, we know that God answered us our talking with God.

nama: Njam árké árom tinjongé fútar yaufiyaman, yaufiyam yéné árkéménayam yau yélimnde kétán krot, fém so norayét Ngánjánafé a Ngánjánam so taramangé ghérsé. Yénd norayan yéné árfenemén endefene yaufiyamam yau elimndat kétán tuot krot. Yéna yém yaufiyam árkéménayam yélimnde kétán krot. Yéndon yau norayan ndené fém so Ngánjánafé norayati yénémamén. 17 Méinyotio mbarkándofnar yam wafrogh siyém yaufiyam, wénde yéna fété yém yaufiyam árkéménayam yau so nélimnde kétán tuot krot.
bt: If anyone sees friend sinning, a sin that does not leads to death, you.p should talk with God and God will give them life. I am talking about that people whose sin does not lead to eternal death. There is a sin that leads us to death. I do not say that you.p should talk with God about that. 17 All without.staight thing is sin, but there is a sin that does not lead to eternal death.

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené fá efe em Ngánjánene ambumtértér yau so ménjté em yaufiyaman. Ngánjánene Ambumom ewarawene fá, a yaufi árom yau so eyanje fá. 19 Yénd mat yéném ndené yénd yéném Ngánjánene, wénde Yaufi árom yélimnde méinyotio mband marat. 20 Yénd mat yéném ndené Ngánjánene Ambum té yénmormén a yénmaramai téfe matyam, ménát yénd so mat yéném fá yém efalo. A yénd yéném yáne kénjún efe yém efalo ménaye yáne Ambum Yesu Keriso. Fá siyém efalo Ngánján a tuot ghérsé. 21 Tikfafé ambumtértér, a nawarawenati kétamé mewangta.
bt: We know that those who are God's children do not continue to sin. The Son of God protects them, and the evil one cannot touch them. 19 We know that we belong to God, but the Evil one rules over the whole world. 20 We know that the Son of God has come and has given us understanding, so that we may know him who is true. And we are in him who is true by his Son Yesu Keriso. He is the true God and eternal life. 21 Heartful children, protect yourselves from idols.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Jon, sénko ár.,
bt: This letter is from Jon, the head man.

nama: ménamén efalo, árké yém téfefaf a so yém yéndfé tuot.
bt: because of the truth, which lives us and will be with us forever.

nama: Ngárám, ghérghérsisé a krufrát árké yéném kétamé Afé Ngánjáneta a kétamé Yesu Keriso yáne Ambum so yéném yéndfé efe yém efaloyan a uwéghan.
bt: Grace, mercy and peace which comes from the Father God and from Yesu Keriso his Son will be with us who lives in the truth and love.

nama: Ta waramayénd ndimbal áuwégh ménáyan efandan ámb fene ambumtértér eyota efaloyan, ndenáye fété nák Afam ndernáye yénmaramete. 5 Amaf, sénonjo yéndon nomndetan fém ndené yénd so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. Yéné yau totér nák em yéndo árké efarotan, wénde yéné árkéméné yéndfem té náyárayém kétamé rényégh. 6 A yéné uwégh fiyém: ndené yéndfem ewaitotam yéné nák. Ndené fémofem té náyárayénd kétamé rényégh, yéné nák siyém ndené fém emor uwéghan.
bt: It has given me big joy by which I find some of your.p children walking in the truth, just as law the Father gave us. 5 Woman, now I ask you.p that we should love each other. This is not new law that I were writing to you.p, but one which we have heard from the beginning. 6 And this is love: that we follow these laws. As you.p have heard from the beginning, this law is that you.p live in love.

nama: Tárfár unyégh watamegh téfnár em mband maratan, sénonjo efe yau nénafrotat ndené Yesu Keriso yénmormén mband maratot ndené fété ár fifi. Yéné ár siyém unyégh ár a unyégh keriso. 8 Kor aem fémyo ndené fémofem yau so etarnati méinyotio yam fém árkéménát té kásáfotati, wénde ménát fémofem so tawanangi méinyoe fai. 9 Árké ár efe yau yémor Kerisoene watameghan, wénde yéngfayotat, yáfaf yau yém Ngánján. Wénde njam árké ár nawereta taikrataye kétán némé té ewatametam so ere kété Yárefé a Ambum. 10 Njam ár yau námyota yéné watameghfaf, yau yumyotati fá kétán féfene méngot o yésnetati. 11 Árké árom emo eumyote fá nufeinde yéfene yaufi wafroghfaf.
bt: Many false teaching men are in the world, now who do not say that Yesu Keriso come to earth as a real man. This person is a liar and false keriso. 8 Be careful yourselves that you.p do not lose everything that you.p have worked for, but so that you.p will receive full reward. 9 Anyone who does not stay in the teaching of Keriso, but adds on it, does not have God. But if who holds firmly to what he(Keriso) taught you.p will have both his Father and the Son. 10 If people won't obey this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or kiss/greet them. 11 Anyone who welcomes them takes part in their wicked work.

nama: Tane em tárfár faroghét féfeyot, wénde yénd méndefnar wém fene farogh fefayan, wénde yénd méghmégh wém ménát féfe fandaghét a sái norayam fémafé sáfero, ménát téfene áuwégh so yém wifoghkaf.
bt: I have much to write to you.p, but I do not want to write on the paper with pen, but I hope to see you.p and talk with you.p face to face, so that our joy may be complete.

nama: Fene kaféghmén mérésoene ambumtértér enwatembangi féfe yéfenjo ásnegh si.
bt: The children of your.s chosen sister send their greeting talk.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Jon, sénko ár. Yéndo yéfarotan kétán tane tikfafé fútar Gaius, efe yéndon yuwetan efaloe.
bt: This letter is from Jon, the head man. I am writing to my heartful friend Gaius, whom I truly love.

nama: Tikfafé fútar, yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam ndené fémon so yayamnete mer fifie awarawerégh a ndené méinyotio meran so néngém, ndené fété fene mbérmbére ghérsé kés yém meran. 3 Yénd minde áuwéghan kwémorwén njam ámb efalo yátogh ár nufaryénd a waufroyénd ta ménamén efalomén fene ghérsamén a ndernáye fém némor efaloyan. 4 Yénd ndimbal áuwégh wém njam yénd náyáretan tane ambumtértér emor efaloyan.
bt: Heartful friend, I talk with God that you.s may enjoy good health and that may go with you.s in all good, as your.p spiritual life is getting along well. 3 I was in very happy when some believers came and told me about the truth in your.s life and how you.s live in the truth. 4 I have big joy when I hear my children live in the truth.

nama: Tane tikfafé fútar, mer yém ndené fémo ewáutáne efalo yátogh ár, ndemamén fá em wan téfnár. 6 Fá té nafroyénd Yesuene mérénfaf yéna fene uwéghmén. Mé ewáutána njam yémofem niyafotat. Tawaram rokar yéfene álighét. Yénayam so Ngánján tiyátongé áuwéghét. 7 Ménamén fá nuwanoyénd Kerisoene ásáfoghét yau kamyotawét wáutárghét efalo yátoghofnar árta. 8 Yénémamén yéndfemyo so ewáutánam fá ménát yénd so násáfotam mérne efaloyot.
bt: My heartful friend, it's good that you.s help approving truth people(believers), even though they are strangers. 6 They have spoken to the Yesu's family(church) here about your.s love. Continue to help them when they visit you. Give them the things for their journey. That will make God happy. 7 For they went for Keriso's work without accepting any help from without.approving truth people(unbelievers). 8 Therefore we ourselves should help them so that we will work together for the truth.

nama: Yéndon té téngfarotan kétán Yesuene mérénfaf, wénde Diotrefes ménde yém sái yém yéfene limánégh ár, a yémon yau so yénérse ámb utmanégh téfefaf. 10 Yénémamén njam yénd wéném, yéndon so enérsan méinyotio yam yémon tawafrotau: yaufi si fá korayau téfenemén a unyégh si téngwaitotau! Wénde yéné yau féyotaro témorwén yáyot, a yémon yau so eumyote ámb efalo yátogh ár njam fá eném, a ekmbota fá efe ménde em umyoghét a utorghét kétamé Yesuene mérénta.
bt: I have written to the Yesu's family(church), but Diotrefes likes to be their leading man, and he won't bring any respect to us. 10 Then when I come, I will bring up everything he is doing: the evil talk he says about us and lying talk he tells! But that is not enough for him, and he will not receive other approving truth people(believers) when they come, and stops those who want to receive and puts them out of the Yesu's family(church)!

nama: Tikfafé fútar, yau yékwna némé yém yaufi, wénde yénaro yékwna némé yém mer. Árké ár emo ewafrote némé em mer yém Ngánjáneta, a árké ár emo ewafrote némé em yaufi yémo yau yinjoi Ngánján. 12 Wénde méinyotio ár norayat mere Demetriusenemén, wéi ndenáyo efalomén. Yénd yéndio wéi so néngorayam ndenéyameyo yáyot, a fém mat em yénd néngorayam efalo.
bt: Heartful friend, do not imitate what is evil, but imitate what is good. Anyone who does what is good is from God, and anyone who does what is evil he has not seen God. 12 But every people speak well about Demetrius, even truth itself. We ourselves can say the same for him, and you.s know we speak the truth.

nama: Tafaf em tárfár ménát afroghét féfeyot, wénde yénd méndefnar wém sái yéfarotan fene fefayan. 14 Yénd méghmégh wém ménát sái tawinjon fém wékeye, a yénd so norayam sáfero.
bt: I have much to tell you.p, but I don't want to write it in a letter with pen. 14 I hope to see you.s quickly, and we will say face to face.

nama: So yém Ngánjánene krufrát fefaf. Fene fútarfem yénan nénmawatembangi yéfene ásnegh si. Tawaramangi tane ásnegh si fénatayero téfene fútarfet.
bt: May God's peace be with you.s. Your.s friends here send you.s their greeting talk. Give my greet talk to all our friends personally.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Juda tambén, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yém Jemse yánngén. Yéndo yéfarotan yéfe méinyotio efe ekafai Ngánjánam, efe emor Ngánján Afane uwéghan a Yesu Kerisoene waraweréghan.
bt: This letter is from Judas, a worker of Yesu Keriso and the younger brother of Jems. I am writing to them all who God has chosen you.p, who live in the love of God the Father and the protection of Yesu Keriso.

nama: Féfefaf so yém mindefifi Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé, krufrát a uwégh. Unyégh watamegh téfnár
bt: To you.p will be more and more God's mercy, peace, and love. False teaching men

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, yénd minde ménde wém sái yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén wanjarégh árké yéndfem yéfalotam, yénd njam ménde wém faroghét féfeyot ménát wawéngsoghét sái násmétati ndimbal mwighat ambinotaro a méinyotio árét Ngánjánam árké yéramai. 4 Ámb ár té kwankwane nényawangi féfene mérnan. Tándái Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém té yéfarotaménd yéné árfenemén efe so moghan em kértafé. Fá em asénanégh ár Ngánjánafé a té tengotat téfene Ngánjánene ngárám ménát sái emor yaufiyam ghérsaye. Fá wéi ndenáyo nakenat ménát sái tumyongi Yesu Keriso, téfene fáro Ndimbal a Yuré.
bt: My heartful friends, I really wanted to write you.p about salvation which we share, when I wanted to write to you.p to encourage you.p to fight on for the big mind(faith) once and for all the people which God has given. 4 Some people have scretly entered in your group. Long ago the God's man who make know(prophet) have written about these people who will be judged guilty. They are opponent with God and have changed the grace of our God to live sinful life. They also refuse to accept Yesu Keriso, our only Master and Lord.

nama: Yéndon mat engyátotan fém ámb yammén fém árké mat em: Nawafarotati ndené Yuram ewanjaryéng yánjo ár enéutoryéng kétándmé Ijifta, wénde soramé yémo ewalindai méinyotio fá emofem yau efalo tiyátotawét. 6 A ewafarotati njafar si résagh ár emofem yau tangsotawét yéfenjo wafté sifayé wénde yénéfrangoyénd yéfenjo méngo. Yuram té emnai njafar si résagh ár kwéfitayan, sein umbéghkaf em ambino ménát sái em moghan kété ndimbal efghon. 7 Wéi engwafarotati ndimbal tesen Sodom a Gomora a ámb téndo tesen yénamé, yéfene ár kimndawét ndené njafar si résagh árnit kufrotawét a tamorwén yaufi walan a fénataye ende walan: yémofem tékrát yinjoyénd tuot fésén, ndené fété safén matot méinyotio árét.
bt: I make you.p know of some things which you.p know: Remember that the Lord saved his people by bringing them out of Ijif, but later he destroyed all those who did not truly approve(believe). 6 And remember the men carrying heavenly message(angels) who didn't keep their place of power but left their house. The Lord has kept the men carrying heavenly message(angels) in the darkness, bound with chain eternally to be judged on the big day. 7 Also remember the cities of Sodom and Gomora and the nearby towns, whose people acted as those men carrying heavenly message(angels) did and were in sexual immorality and different sexual activity: they suffer in eternal fire, as a clear warning to all the people.

nama: Ndené yameyo, yéné árfene onjo árkéménayam eméinde yaufiyamot yéfene fifi. Yémofem yékarotat Ngánjánene muyé a ewasalitat ndimbal kwayaghé ár tukmén. 9 Wénde njam sénko njafar si résagh ár, Maikélfé néwiménd Sáiférafé emo so tanangai Mosesene kér fifi, yau korayau yaufi si ndené Sáiférefaf. Wénde fá norayai, "Yuram némusérmbote fém!" 10 Wénde yéné unyégh watamegh ár néngorayat yéné yammén fá yau mat em, a némé fá mat em fifie, ndenanit mwighafnar wérár. Yéné yam rem árkéménayam ewirone fá.
bt: In the same way, these people's dreams that make them sin against their own bodies. They reject God's authority and insult the glorious beings above. 9 But when the chief man carrying heavenly message, Maikèl, argued with Sáifèr who would take the dead body of Moses, did not speak bad talk like against the Sáifèr. But he said, "The Lord rebuke you.s" 10 But these false teaching men speak about these things they do not understand, and what they know by body(instinct), like as without.thought animals. Those things are that destroy them.

nama: Yéné so yém yaufififi yéfeyot! Yémofem té yaitoyénd Keinene end, a fá té naramangi fáyo ménát wafroghét yaufi némé Balamém tawafrotau mani téfnan. Fá té kásmetawét Ngánjánafé, ndené Kora skufrotau. Féyo fá so tawalindangé.
bt: This will be very bad for them! They have followed Kein's way, and they have given themselves to do the wrong what Balam did for money. They have fought with God, just as Kora did. So he(God) will destroy them.

nama: Fá ndenanit em njúnnjúnafé mbor féfene efalo yátogh árfene nénefaf fémofem senetati. Yémofem senetat fémafé a yau em férfér, nawarawenat mé fáro. Fá em ndenanit nu kwéf árké mbormboram ewarende, wénde nuofnar. Fá em ndenanit wén mbweyofnar yunjfan, wén árké erufetat sérmbafé, kér em. 13 Yéfene wáiwáiafé yam nufanat ndenanit mbérorkam yénau nufrotat nékwafé arakaf sofan. Fá ndenanit em kénd árké té nimndayénd yéfenjo frengégh sifayata njafaran. Ngánjánam té yéfrendam méinyo kwéfité, kwéfkwéf sifayé yéfeyot. Ngánjánam kété so ewamnde tuot.
bt: They are like dirty spots in your approving truth people' meals you.p eat. They eat with you.p and have no fear, feeding only themselves. They are like clouds which wind carry along, but no rain. They are like trees without fruit in wet season, trees which have been pulled up with the roots, are completely dead. 13 Their shameful things show up like foam on wild ocean waves. They are like stars which moved away from their prepared(proper) places in the sky. God has prepared a completely black, dark place for them. God will keep them there forever.

nama: Enok témorwén 7mén ár saté Edéme soramé, a fá té korayau yéfenemén yéné árfenemén njam norayai, "Kéretangi! Yuré yéném tausen a tausen njafarmén njúnnjúnofnar si résagh árfé 15 ménát sái emota méinyotio ár. Yémo so tékrátan tákmangé méinyotio yéné ngánjánofnar ár ménamén méinyotio yaufiyam yémofem árké tawafrotawét. Yuram efalo so tékrátan tákmangé yéné ngánjánofnar yaufi ár ménamén méinyotio yaufi si árké korayawét yáfaf.
bt: Enok was the 7th generation after Edèm, and he was talking about these people when he said: "Look! The Lord is coming with thousands and thousands of without.dust(holy) men carrying heavenly message(angels) 15 to judge every people. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things which they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners because of every evil talks which they have said against him."

nama: Yéné ár nawatarnat a efayotat ámb ár; engwafrotat yaufiyam fá ándan ménde em wafroghét; fá nawauyotat yéfenjoménro a yémofem yuwan eyátotat ámb ár ménát sái ewarsat némat fá ménde em. Matot a wafroghét
bt: These people complain and blame other people; they do the evil things where they want to do; they boast about themselves and they became other people low to get what they want. Warnings and Instructions

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, nawafarotati mat si féfe té tawarametawét yémofem téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene muyafé árém. 18 Yémofem ewaufroyénd féfe ndené, "Kerker efghon, kété so yém árké árém so si wawafrotat féfe a so ewaitotat yéfenjo yaufiyam ménde." 19 Yéné árém té eméindat fém afaloghét, efe elimndat yéfenjo fifi méndeyam, endefefaf yau yém Ngánján Mbérmbér.
bt: My heartful friends, remember the warning the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) of our Lord Yesu Keriso gave to you.p. 18 They told you.p that, "In the last times, there will be people would mock you.p and follow their own sinful disries." 19 These people cause you.p divisions, who are ruled by their bodily desires, who do not have the God Spirit.

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, mé a narmbotati fémyo féfene mindefifi njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal mwighayan, ndené fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram sái ewáutána oraighét Ngánjánafé, 21 a kawerangi fémyo kété Ngánjánene uwéghan, njamandio fém nawanjetati téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ghérghérsisat sái tawaramangé féfe tuot ghérsé.
bt: Heartful friends, keep raising yourselves on your most without.dust(holy) big mind(faith), as the God Spirit helps you.p to talk with God, 21 and keep yourselves there in God's love, while you.p wait for the mercy of our Lord Yesu Keriso to give you.p eternal life.

nama: Engéuyafotati ghérghérsisé ámb árét fá efe natambnat; 23 enéfnanati ámb ár kétamé fésta, a ewanjanati fá; euyafotati ghérghérsisé férférafé ámb árét, engkarotati yéfene sáláme árké em njúnnjúnafé yaufiyammén. Yuwetam Ngánján
bt: Show mercy on some people those who have doubts; 23 take out other people from fire, and save them; show mercy with fear to other people, hating their clothes which are dirty from sin. Praise God

nama: Kétán yáfaf emo so ewarawene kétamé uyéghta a ménát sái tauyafongé fém yáne ndimbal kwayaghé tambén téfnofnar wénde ménáyafé ndimbal áuwéghafé. 25 Fá fiyém mé yénaro Ngánján, fá emo yénd ténmanjarngé, yáyot so yém ndimbal kwayaghé, ndimbal, wafté, a muyé Yesu Keriso téfene Yuré kénjúmé, kétándmayo méinyotio efogh árké kénawaindat, sénonjo, a tuot! Efalo.
bt: To him who will protect from falling and to show you.p before his glorious presence without faultness but with big joy. 25 He is the only God, the one who saves us, to him will be big light(glory), bigness, power, and authority through Yesu Keriso our Lord, until all the time which passed, now, and forever! Amen.

nama: Yéné siyém uyafogh yam Yesu Kerisoeta, árkéméné Ngánjánam yaramai yá tauyafotau yánjo ásáfogh téfnárafet némé yam tekofnar so nufrote. Kerisom yéngwáfáretam yánjo njafar si résagh ár sái mat tiyátotau yánjo ásáfogh téfnár Jon, 2 a Jon kafrotau méinyotio némé yémo téfandau ménamén Ngánjánene simén a Yesu Kerisoene simén. 3 Frengéghkaf yém emo sái yafta yéné ufrogh yammén si, a frengéghkaf em efe náyáretat a tanangi tikfe némé té yéfarotaménd kété, ménamén efogh siyém kaka. Jonene ásneghafé si kétán 7 Yesuene mérén kénjút
bt: This is a showing thing(revelation) from Yesu Keriso, which God gave him to show his workers what will not.far happen. Keriso sent his man carrying heavenly message to make him know his worker Jon, 2 and Jon is reporting everything what he saw about the talk of God and talk about Yesu Keriso. 3 Blessed is the one who read the talks of this prophecy, and blessed are those who listen and receive with heart what is written in it, because the day is near. Jon's greeting talk to the 7 Yesu's families(churches)

nama: Yéné férén siyém Jone tambén tafarotau kétán 7 Yesuene mérén kénjút kété Esia marat yuwon.
bt: This letter is from Jon into the 7 Yesu's families(churches) there in province of Esia.

nama: a kétamé Yesu Kerisoe tambén, efe yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro fandagh ár yéné yammén, fronde efe nanoi kérta a efe yém mband maratmén warsagh árfene limánégh ár.
bt: and from Yesu Keriso, who is faithful watching man to these things, the first who rised from death and who is ruler of the ruling men(kings) of the world.

nama: a emo yényátoi yénd sái yéném Ngánján limánéghan a ghéngén wárogh ár ménát sái yutémndam Ngánján Yárefé. Yáfaf so yém ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté tuot! Efalo.
bt: and who made us to become a part God's kingdom and burning sacrifice men(priests) to honor for God his Father. To him will be big light(glory) and power forever! Amen.

nama: "Kéretangi, fá nénangote njafar kwamkwamafé! Méinyotio árém so yéfandat, emofem fimbe yékunyayénd, a méinyotio ár mband maratan so tafarngé yeyam yáne téfnan. So fété nufrote! Efalo.
bt: "Look, he is coming with the clouds! Everyone will see him, those who pierced with spear him, and all peoples on the world will cover with tears because of him. It will be happened! Amen.

nama: Yuré Ngánján noraye, "Yénd wém fronde a soramé, efe yém, efe témorwén, a efe so yéném, Méinyotio tukén waftafé." Ndenanit témorwén Ároene Ambum
bt: The Lord God says, "I am first and last, who is, who was, and who will come, the With all high power(Almighty)." It was like the Son of Men

nama: Yénd wém Jon, féfene mérénmén. Ménamén yénd yéném Yesuene limánégh kénjún, yéndfem yérsam kérté a tékrat. Féyo, yénd so yéném muyafé a métar, ndené fété Yesum so yénmáutáne. Yénd kété kwémorwén Fatmos féran, ménamén té táitotawén Ngánján a Yesuenemén si. 10 Yurane efghon yénd kwémorwén Ngánján Mbérmbéran a káyáretawén ta sémta ndimbal si, ndenanit sufér ke, 11 ndené norayai, "Efarota bukan némé fémon efande, a tangwatemb 7 Yesuene mérénfaf: kétán Efesos, Sémirna, Fegamo, Taiatira, Sadis, Filadelfia a kétán Laodikia."
bt: I am Jon, your.p brother. Because we belong to Yesu' ruling, we are having trouble and pain. So, we all need to be strong and patient, as Yesu helps us. I was there on the island of Fatmos, because I was preached talk about God and Yesu. 10 On the Lord's day I was in God Spirit and I heard from my back a big talk, like a trumpet sound, 11 which said, "Write on the book what you.p see, and send it to the 7 Yesu's families(churches): to Efesos, Sèmirna, Fegamo, Taiatira, Sadis, Filadelfia and there to Laodikea."

nama: Yénd néngawengoyén ménát so tinjongayén efe norayau tafaf. Njam sémta nawengoyén yéndo ewinjoyén 7 wakayoghkaf gol lambefé, 13 a yéné lambefé wakayogh néndkéf fifiyan yéndo yinjoyén ndenanit Ároene Ambum, tawongérwén tombé sáláme kétánotio kafkaf a golmén beles téfarngérwén wéfamé. 14 Yáne sénko séf tamorwén kwayagharo ndenanit kafe séfnit, o ás fifinit, a yáne ghékéf kánetawét fés kankanit. 15 Yáne kafkaf kwayagharo tamorwén ndenanit wainaghkaf a frengéghkaf tot téfén a yáne kém ndenanit témorwén tárfár nu ráráke yénau yém. 16 Yáne tambén ngángaye taweretau 7 kénd, a yáne mbírmbírta néngtoryéng witmafé sénté náifé, a yáne sáf kálálau ndenanit sotafé efogh yénau nanete. 17 Yéndo njam yinjoyén, yénd nuyáyén yáne kafkafot kér árnit. Yémon efayoi yánjo tambén ngángé a korayangé, "Yau férfér ném! Yénd wém fronde a soramé. 18 Yénd wém efe ghérsé wém! Efe kér yémormén a sénonjo yénd ghérsé wém tuot! Tafaf em ki kérmén a fésmén. 19 Yénémamén efarota fémon némé té efande, sénonjo némé yém a némé so néngufrotat soramé. 20 7 kénd ténoghmén yam yéné fémon kés tafande tane tambén ngángata, a wéi 7 wakayoghkaf gol lambefé yéné em: 7 kénd kés em njafar si résagh ár yéné fem 7 Yesuene mérnot, a 7 lambefé wakayoghmén kés em 7 Yesuene mérén yéné fem.
bt: I turned around to see who was speaking to me. When I turn back I saw 7 golden lampstands, 13 and in the middle this lampstands I saw someone like a Son of Man, wearing a long robe to the feet and a gold belt around chest. 14 His hair on the head was white like white parrot's hair, or inside of coconut, and his eyes lighted like flames of fire. 15 His feet were bright like a melt and refined steal and his voice was like many rainfall. 16 In his right hand he held 7 stars, and from his mouth came out bothside sharp knife(sword), and his face shone like a strong sun are shining. 17 When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead man. He put his right hand and said, "Don't be afraid. I am the first and the last. 18 I am who is alive! Who was dead, and now I am alive forever! To me there are keys of death an fire(hades) 19 Therefore write what you.s have seen, what is now and what will happen later. 20 The huding meaning of the 7 stars you.s saw in my right hand, and again 7 golden lampstand is this: 7 stars are men carrying heavenly message(angels) of the 7 Yesu's families(churches), and the 7 lampstands are 7 Yesu's families(churches).

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Efesos Yesuene mérén kénjún:
bt: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Efesos:

nama: Yénd mat wém méinyotio yammén fémofem némé ewafrotati. Yéndon té téfandan féfene minde ásáfogh a féfene métar a awamarogh. Yénd mat wém fém yau nafghetati yaufiyam árfé. Fémofem té tawasufetati efe kamndetat kar Yesuene muyafé ár wénde yau em, a fémofem té mat eyátongi fá sem unyégh ár. 3 Fém té métare tam tékrátamé tayot ékmboghofnar. 4 Wénde tane áwátaranégh yéné yém féfefaf: fémofem yau wuwetati yénd ndené fronde kés tamorwén. 5 Kemnangi nderé nayu fém té nuyangi fronde féfenjo uwéghta! Kénawengongi tafaf wéikor a násáfotati ndené fronde ndernáye kásáfotawét. Yau njam fémofem yafrotati, yénd so wéném tawitérmbon lambefé wakayoghmén yéfenjo sifayata méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé. 6 Wénde yéné yém mer féfenemén: fémofem méndefnar yéfandati Nikolait mérnafene mámáfi yam wafrogh, yéndon wéi ndenáyo.
bt: I know everything what you.p did. I have seen your.p hard work and your.p patient and support. I know you.p don't associate with sinners. You.p have tested who say men with Yesu's authority(apostles) but are not, and you.p have known them they are false people. 3 You.p have patient through persecution for me without stopping. 4 But this is my complain to you.p: you.p don't love me as you.p did at first. 5 Think how far you.p have fallen from your.p first love! Turn back to me again and do that you.p did at first. If you.p don't do it, I will come and remove your.p lampstand from their place among all Yesu's family(church). 6 But this is good for you.p: you.p don't like Nikolait group's bad actions, which I also do.

nama: Árké ár ménde em áyárghét, táf náyáretat Ngánján Mbérmbéroefaf, a yérsat ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérnafefaf. Yéné ár efe njam nawaindat so yémofem enetat kétamé ghérsé akegh wénta árké yém Ngánjánene sariafé limánéghan. Kétán Yesuene mérén Sémirna kénjún
bt: Which people want to hear, listen to God Spirit, and carry how God Spirit says to the Yesu's families(churches). Those people who win will eat from the tree of life which is in God's beautiful ruling(the paradise of God). To Sèmirna Yesu's family(church)

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Sémirna Yesuene mérén kénjún:
bt: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Sèmirna:

nama: Yénd mat wém féfene tékrátmén a áronjaghmén, wénde fém em wemár! Yénd mat wém fém emofem norayat yaufi si féfefaf. Fá norayat fá sem Ju ár em, wénde fá em Sáiféroene mérén. 10 Yau férfér em ménamén némé tékrát fémofem so yéngfandati. Sáifram ámb fém so ewite kwéfkwéf méngot ménát sái eufote. Fém so tékratan em 10 efogh. Ewakai ndimbal mwighaye njam krotro em, a yéndon so tawaraman tuot ghérsé ákiki.
bt: I know your.p troubles and poverty, but you.p are the rich! I know who say bad talk to you.p. They are saying they are Ju people, but they are Sáifèr's group. 10 Don't be afraid of what you.p are about to suffer. Sáifèr will throw some of you.p into the darkness house to test you.p You.p will be in troubles for 10 days. Stand faithfully when you.p almost die, and I will give you.p eternal life as crown.

nama: Árké ár efe njam ménde em áyárghét, so náyáretat némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Efe njam em nawaindat yau so yasérmbote yénamayo kéram. Kétán Yesuene mérén Fegamam kénjún
bt: Which people want to hear, listen what God Spirit says to the Yesu's family(church). These who win will not be destroyed by second death. To the Yesu's family(church) in Fegamam

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Fégamam Yesuene mérén kénjún:
bt: "Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Fegamam:

nama: Yénd mat wém ndené fém emor yéné ndimbal tesenan ánde Sáiféroene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé yém. Wénde fém mé táikér tawakai tafaf a fém yau nékmbotati ta efalo yátoghan táf njam Antifas, tane ndimbal mwighé kér ro fandagh ár, krot yékmayénd féfene ndimbal tesen ánde Sáifér yémor.
bt: I know that you.p live in the city where Sáifèr has his sitting table. But you.p are still standing strongly to me and you.p are not stopping believing in me during when Antifas, my faithful watching man, was killed in your.p city where Sáifèr lives.

nama: Wénde tane yéna em ámb áwátaranégh féfefaf: féfefaf yéna em ár efe kaweretawét yéné watameghfaf Balam, yémo yatametam Balak ménát sái tamndetau Israil ár mewang njamke nénet a máméghéraye wal yamot. 15 Ndené yameyo, féfefaf em ámb Nikolait mérénmén ár féfene kénjún emofem yéné watameghyo yaitotat. 16 Eurotati yaufiyam! Yau njam, yénd so wéném tekofnar féfefaf a so nasmetam yémafé tane witmafé sénté náifé tane mbírmbírta.
bt: But I have a few thing complaining you.p: there are some among you.p who hold to his teaching of Balam, who taught Balak to tell Israil people to eat Idol's food and committed sexual immorality. 15 In the same way, you.p have some among you.p from Nikolait group who follow that teaching. 16 Leave from sins! If not, I will come not.far to you.p and will fight against them with the sword from my mouth.

nama: Árké ár efe ménde em áyárghét, so náyáretat ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Méinyotio efe njam nawaindat so enetat féskaf flawé árké té engétnoi njafaran. A yéndon so ewarametan fénatayero kwayaghé wím a yéné wíman so ekai totér yétkwén árkéméné ámb ár yau mat so yém mé fáro emo tanangé. Kétán Yesuene mérén Taiatira kénjún
bt: Which people want to hear, listen how the God Spirit says to the Yesu's families(churches). All the people who win will eat bread which has been hidden in heaven. And I will give you.p white stone and on that stone will write new name which no one knows except the one who recieves it. To the Yesu's family(church) in Taiatira

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Taiatira Yesuene mérén kénjún:
bt: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message(angel) of the Yesu's family(church) in Taiatira:

nama: Yénd mat wém féfene wafroghyam-féfene uwégh, féfene ndimbal mwighé, féfene ásáfogh, a féfene awamarogh. A sénonjo féfene mer wafroghyam fémofem ewafrotati engwaindat méinyotio wafroghyam fémofem kés tawafrotawét fronde. 20 Wénde tane yém ámb áwátaranégh féfefaf: fémofem yumyotati yéné amaf Jejebel, efe fáyo namndete Ngánjánene si résagh ár ménát sái elimnda tane ásáfogh téfnár nayu. Amafom emndete fá ménát sái ewáwefnotat mewangat, enetat mewangafene wateghmén njamke a ewafrotat máméghéraye wal yam. 21 Yéndon té yaramayén yá efoghféneféne yáne yaufiyam ékmboghét. Wénde fá yau so kékmbongé yánjo yaufi wal yam wafroghta. 22 Yénémaménnde, yéndon yéné amaf so yitan enjne sifayafaf, a yémon so tékrát yéfande ndimbal kéráye yémafayo emofé yaufi wal tafrotat yémafé, ndemamén fá so kékmbongi yéfenjo yaufiyam wafroghta. 23 Yéndon so tákman yáne waitogh ár krotio. Féyo méinyotio Yesuene mérén mat so em ndené yénd yéné fwém emo ewafande tikéf a mwighé, a yéndon so fai ewawangotan ámbiroámbiro féfeyot féfene wafroghyam féyotaroyan.
bt: I know your.p deeds-your.p love, your.p big mind(faith), your.p work, and your.p patience. And now your.p good deeds you.p do are surpassing the all deeds you.p did at first. 20 But I have complain to you.p: you.p accept that woman Jejebel, who calls herself a God's man who make know(prophet) to lead my worker far away. She told them to worship idols, eat food offered to idols and practice sexual immorality. 21 I have given her time to stop of her sins. But she doesn't stop doing her sexual immorality. 22 Therefore, I will throw this woman to the sick place, and she will suffer terribly with whom committed adultary with her, unless they will stop from doing their sin. 23 I will put her followers to kill. Then all the Yesu's families(churches) will know that I am the one who sees hearts and minds, and I will repay each of you.p according to your.p works.

nama: Wénde yénd norayan yéné féfefaf ámb ár Taiatira kénjún. Fémofem yau táitotati unyégh watamegh, ndené fété fá ewanmotat 'kénjkame atnogh yamafé.' Féyo, yéndo yau so tamndan ménát sái taitongi ámb táikér nák. 25 Wénde kétánotio yénd nénangotan, fém so naweretati taikrataye némé em féfene. 26 Yéfeyot efe njam nawaindat, efe so ménjté engém tane ménde wafroghan kétánotio yatoghfaf, yéndon so tawaraman wafté ndimbal yu limánéghét. 27 Yémofem so elimndat ndimbal yu tot téfén wétue a so tatiarngé karéfkaréf ndenanit ngéndmén sin. 28 Yéfefaf ndenéyameyo muyé so em yéndon árké yanayén tane Afata, a yéndo wéi so tawaraman akw kénd. 29 Árké ár efe ménde yém áyárghét, fái káyáretangi ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf.
bt: But I say this to you.p other people in Taiarira. You do not follow evil teaching, just as they called 'deep hidden things'. So, I will not tell you to obey any other difficult rules. 25 But until I come, you.p must hold firmly to what you.p have. 26 To them who win who continue to the end to do what I want, I will give power of ruling nations. 27 They will rule nations with an iron stick and will break them to pieces like a clay pots. 28 They will have same authority which I received from my Father, and I will also give them the morning star. 29 Which people want to hear, listen how the God Spirit says to the Yesu's families(churches).

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Sadis Yesuene mérén kénjún:
bt: Write this letter to man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Sadis:

nama: Kanongi! Féfene efalo yátogh yau yém muyafé a krotro yém. Féyo yénémamén fémofem so féfenjo ndimbal mwighé muyafé táyátongi. Ménamén yéndo ewawinjon féfene wafroghyam yau kor em féwénféwénofnar tane Ngánjánefaf. 3 Nawafarotati kétán némé té yanayénd a náyárayénd; terangi taikrataye a kawengongi féfene yaufiyamta. Fém yau njam kanongi, yénd so wéném féfefaf ndenanit oro téfnár, a fém yau mat so em árké efghon yénd so wéném féfefaf.
bt: Get up! Your.p belief has become not strong and almose died. So then you.p must strengthen your.p belief. Because I have found your.p deeds is without.flaw(perfect) to my God. 3 Remember what you.p have got and heard; hold to it strongly and turn back from your sins. If you.p don't wake up, I will come upon you.p like a thief, and you.p don't know which day I will come upon you.p.

nama: Wénde féfefaf em nambioro ár Sadisén emofem yau mbandafé tayátongi yéfenjo sáláme. Yémafé yénd so yényota kwayaghé sálámefé, ménamén fá sem féyotaro. 5 Fá efe njam nawaindat so nawotat kwayaghé sáláme. Yéndon yau so yéfene yétkwén tawalindangén ghérsé buk tambén. Wénde yéndo so mat táyáton tane Afanerére a yáne njafar si résagh árrére ndené fá sem tane em. 6 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Kétán Yesuene mérén kété Filadelfia kénjún
bt: But you.p have a few people in Sadis who don't make their clothes dirty. They will walk with me white clothes, because they are enough. 5 Those who win will be clothed white clothes. I will never erase their names from the book of life.
