But I will make know in front of my Father and his men carrying heavenly message(angels) that they are mine. 6 Whoever has ears, must listen to what God Spirit says to Yesu's families(churches). To the Yesu's family(church) in Filadelfia

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Filadelfia Yesuene mérén kénjút:
bt: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in filadelfia:

nama: Yénd mat wém méinyotio féfene wafroghyam, a yéndo té yésaurén sésafne féfeyot árké árom yau so témnangé. Yénd mat wém féfene em némbnar muyé, wénde fémofem káyáretati tane si a yau tekenati tane yétkwén. 9 Káyárangi! Efe em Sáiférene mérén, yéné unyégh ár efe norayat fá kar Ju ár em wénde yau, yéndo so eméindan fá sái eném nénáwefnotat féfene kafkafot. Fá méinyotio mat so káyátongi ndené yéndo fém euwetamén. 10 Ménamén fémofem tane wafaregh té teretati awamaroghafé, yéndon wéi so ewarawenan fém kétamé ufoghyam efghon árkéméné so nufrote méinyotio mband maratan ménát sái eufotat méinyotio ár mband maratan. 11 Yénd nénangotan wékeye. Naweretati yéna féfefaf némé em, ménát ámb árom yau so tanangé féfene ákiki. 12 Fá efe njam nawaindat so kénamndangi sérasér Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngon a fá kété so emor tuot a yéndon so efarotan yéfefaf tane Ngánján yétkwén a tane Ngánjánene ndimbal tesen yétkwén, totér Jerusalem, árkéméné nénewone njafarta tane Ngánjáneta. Yéndon wéi so efarotan yéfefaf tane totér yétkwén. 13 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Kétán Yesuene mérén Laodikia kénjún
bt: I know all your.p deeds, and I have opened the door for you.p no one can close it. I know you.p have little strength, but you.p obey my talk and have not denied my name. 9 Listen! Who is Sáifér's group, those liars who say that they are Jews but are not, I will make them come [and] bow down at your.p feet. They will know all that I love you.p. 10 Because you.p have kept my command with endurance, I will also protect you.p from the day of trial that will happen on the whole world to test all the people on earth. 11 I am coming back quickly. Hold here on to what you.p have, so that no one will take your.p crown. 12 Those who win will became post of the worshipping house of God and they will stay there forever and I will write on them my God's name and the name of the God's city, new Jerusalem, which is coming down out of heaven from my God. I will also write on them my new name. 13 Whoever has ears, must listen to what God Spirit says to the Yesu's families(churches). To the Yesu's family(church) in Laodikia

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Laodikia Yesuene mérén kénjún:
bt: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Laodikia:

nama: Yénd mat wém féfene wafroghyam, ndené fém yau em krufrát o yau em wafté. Yénd ménde wém fém so em krufrát o wafté! 16 Wénde fém em méndefnar-yau wafté o krufrát, yéndon so mbérme ewitan tane mbírmbírta! 17 Fém norayati, 'Yénd wém wemár; tane em méinyotio rokar yénd némat so ménde wém. Wénde fém yau mat náyátongi ndené fém em áuwéghofnar, wáiwáiafé, oronjagh, kwéfkwéf a firo. 18 Yéndon ewawéngsotan fémofem sái tanangi gol ta tambén gol árkéméné yém fése frengéghmén, táf fém so em wemár. A wéi ndenáyo tanangi kwayaghé sáláme ménát yau so wáiwái yam néramete fenjo firomén. A tanangi fagharégh wékwér féfenjo ghékfot ménát fém so táf kéretangi. 19 Yéndon tausérmbotangén a téfél ewarametan méinyotio árét efe yéndo euwetan. Mwighé tanangi a kawengongi féfene yaufiyamta. 20 Káyárangi! Yénd yéna wakai sésafnefaf a náutanan. Fém njam káyáre tane kém a tésawér sésafne, yénd so kényawan, a yéndfem so njamke enetam.
bt: I know your.p deeds, that you.p are neither cold nor hot. I want you.p are cold or hot! 16 But you.p are without sweet/tasty-neither hot nor cold, I will spit out of my mouth! 17 You.p say, 'I am rich; I have all the things what I need. But you.p don't know that you.p are unhappy, shameful, poor, blind and naked. 18 I advise you.p to take gold from me gol which is refined in the fire, you.p can become rich. And also buy white clothes so that you.p will not feel a shame of your.p nakedness. And take tree oil for your.p eyes so that you.p can see. 19 I rebuke and discipline all people whom I love. Take thought(lesson) and turn from your.p sins. 20 Look! I stand here at the door and knock. When you.p hear my voice and open the door, I will go into, and we will eat together.

nama: Yéndon so eumyotan méinyotio ár efe njam nawindat ménát sái yénmor yéndfé tane kitarayan, ndené fété yénd wémormén waingégh téfnár a namnjeyayém tane Afafé yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. 22 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf.
bt: I will invite all the people who win so that they sit with me in my ruling sitting place, just as I have become winner and I sat with my Father on his ruling sitting place. 22 Whoever has ears, must listen to what God Spirit says to the Yesu's families(churches).

nama: Yéné soramé yénd néngretayén, a kété témorwén sésafne sauréghkaf njafaran. A kém yéndon fronde náyárayén kénorayau tafaf ndenanit sufér kenit norayai, "Kénarmbo yénan, a yéndon so némauyafotan némé yam so nufrotat yéné soramé." 2 Mé tekofnaye yénd kwémorwén Ngánján Mbérmbéran, a témorwén ta rére limánégh ámnjogh sifayé njafaran ámb ár kété témorangérwén. 3 Efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan kálálau ndenanit wén arau ngarot wím a férék ngarot wímnit, a kété témorwén sikwálkwál árké natremngoi kwayaghayam yarendai yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayé. 4 24 ámb limánégh ámnjogh sifayam yarendayénd fá, a 24 sénko ár tamorangérwén yénamé. Fá méinyotio kwayaghé sáláme umaneghkaf tamorwén, a golmén ákiki tawawongérwén yéfene sénkoyamé. 5 Kétamé limánégh ámnjogh sifayata toyé karametawét a árurke kásmetawét. Utmanégh kitaré frondeta tamorwén 7 tosin, árké em 7 mbérmbér Ngánjánene. 6 Yéné limánégh ámnjogh sifayé frondeta témorwén ndenanit arakaf glas nunit kálálau. Néndkéfan, limánégh ámnjogh sifayé warengéghkaf tamorwén 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar{a{ ...f* {a{4.6 akegh ghérsafé rokar living creature. need to be assistance from consultant
bt: After this I was looking, and there was an open door in heaven. And the voice I had first heard speaking to me like the sound of a trumpet said, "Come up here, and I will show you.p what must happen after this." 2 Immediately I was in God Spirit, and there was before me a ruling sitting place(throne) in heaven a someone sitting on there. 3 Who sat on the ruling sitting place(throne) shined like a green stone and red stone, and there is a rainbow which shined brightly encircled his ruling sitting place(throne). 4 Other 24 ruling sitting places(thrones) sorrounded him, and 24 head people sat on them. They were all clothed in white clothes, and had gold crowns on their heads. 5 From the ruling sitting place came flashes of lightning and roaring of thunder. In the front of ruling sitting place, there were 7 torches, which are 7 spirits of God. 6 In the front of those ruling sitting place there was like a sea of glass shining.

nama: Fronde akegh ghérsafé rokar kéretau ndimbal munjan fusnit, yénamayomén kéretau ndenanit kaunit, a nambiomén témorwén ár sáfafé; a 4mén témorwén ndenanit anefégh ndikaké. 8 Yéné 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar tamorwén 6 njambafé, a yéfene ghékéf turawarwén njambamé kénjúta a faruta. Efogh a sémbár fá yau kékmbongi oraighan: "Njúnnjúnofnar, njúnnjúnofnar, njúnnjúnofnar siyém Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio waftafé, fá efe témorwén, efe yém, a efe so yéném."
bt: The first living thing looked like a big wild cat(lion), the second was a cow, and the third had a face like a human; the 4th looked like an flying egale. 8 Those 4 thing had 6 wings, and was covered with their eyes, inside and out wings. Day and night they never stop saying: Without.dust, without.dust(holy), without.dust(holy) is the Lord God Almighty, he who was, who is, and who is to come."

nama: Njam yéné akegh ghérsafé rokaram yuyotat a utémndat a kánjo yarametat yáyot efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a efe nakete tuot, 10 yéné 24 sénko ár táf budme kiangi a yáwefnotat yá efe nakete tuot a yémofem táf tákmangi yéfenjo ákiki limánégh ámnjogh sifayé frondeta a norayat,
bt: When those living things praise and honor ang give thanks to him who sits on the ruling sitting place and who live forever, 10 those 24 head people kneel down and worship him who live forever and they put their crowns in front of the ruling sitting place and say,

nama: "O Yuré téfene Ngánján, fém ném féyotaro sái yérsa ndimbal kwayaghé o utmanégh a wafté, ménamén fémo ewafrotam méinyotio rokar, a fene méndeyan naketat a kufrotawét."
bt: " O Lord our God, you.s are enough to take big light(glory) and honor and power, because you.s created all things, and by your.s will they were created and existed."

nama: Féyo yéndo yinjoyén buk yáne tambén ngángata efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan; férén takayongérwén kénjúta a faruta yéné bukan, a tamorwén 7 manéghkaf. 2 A yéndon yinjoyén muyé kér ro njafar si résagh ár, efe nutnai minde keye, "Efe so féyotaro yém ferghét yéné manéghkaf buk sauréghét?" 3 Wénde efe ámb yau njafaran o mband maratan o mband marat mbanmbanan féyotaro yém sái tésawérngé yéné buk a yafta. 4 Féyo yénd ye nufngoyén ménamén ámb ár yau yinjoyén emo féyotaro so tésawérngai yéné buk a taftau. 5 Wénde ámb 24 sénko ár kénjúmén yémon wémndai yénd, "Yau nenda! Kéreta, Ndimbal munjan fus kétamé Judane mérénmén, Deifidene Ákimén, féyotaro yém, yémo so tasawérngé yéné buk a yáne 7 manéghkaf."
bt: Then I saw the book on the right hand of the one who sits on the ruling sitting place; letters was covered from inside and outside in that book, and was sealed with 7 seals.(Note: people use this after closing storage.) 2 And I saw a mighty man carrying heavenly message, who is shouting in a loud voice, "Who will be able to untie to open the sealed book? 3 But no one in heaven and on earth or under the earth could open that book and read it. 4 So I started crying because I can't see any one who can open that book and read it. 5 But one of 24 head people he said to me, "Don't cry! Look, the Big wild cat(Lion) from Juda's family, the Descendant of Deifid, can do, he can open that book and its 7 seals.

nama: Féyo yéndo yinjoyén Sif tosé, kéretau ndenanit kar té yésmetaménd, takayongérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé néndkéfan, a yarendayénd 4 akegh ghérsafé rokaram a 24 sénko árém, a tamorwén 7 tartarafé a 7 ghékfafé, árké em Ngánjánene 7 mbérmbér árkéméné ewáfárete méinyotio mband maratan. 7 Fá nénaflai a yakawai buk yáne tambén ngángata efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. 8 Njam yémon yéngwanai buk, 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar a 24 sénko ár nuyáyénd Sif tosafaf frondeta. Yéfene tawamorwén gitanit wagh kembnemén a gol dis ghéngén wafoghkaf Ngánjánene árfene Ngánjánafé orayégh si. 9 A yémofem taufanawét totér wagh yéné siafé: Fém ném féyotaro sái tané yéné buk a sái tésawér yéné manéghkaf buk. Fém té nesmetaménd, a fene férkam té fai ewafrotam ár Ngánjáneyot kétamé méinyotio mérén a fénataye si a ár tárfár a méinyotio yu.
bt: Then I saw a Lamb, looked like it is had been killed, standing at the center of the ruling sitting place, and surrounded by 4 living things and 24 head people, and they had 7 horns and 7 eyes, which are the 7 spirits of God that have been sent into all the earth. 7 He went and took the book from the right hand of him who sat on the ruling sitting place. 8 When he took the book, the 4 living things and 24 head people fell down before the Lamb. They had a music tool like a guitar and gold bowls filled with sacrifice of the talking with God of God's people. 9 And they sang a new song with saying: "You.s are able to take this book and to open this sealed book. You.s were killed, and by your.s blood had done payment for God people from the every group(tribe) and several talk(language) and people(many people) and every nation.

nama: A fémofem fá té táyátotati Ngánjánene limángégh a yáne ghéngén wárogh ár a fá so em limánégh ár mband maratan."
bt: And you.p have made them to be a God's ruling and its burning sacrifice men(priests) and they will be ruler on earth."

nama: A yénd néngretayén wéikor, a yéndon eyáráyén tausen a milion njafar si résagh ár wagh taufanawét tarendawét limánégh ámnjogh sifayé yémafé ámb akegh ghérsafé rokar a sénko ár. 12 Ndimbal kéme yémofem wagh tufanawét waftafé: "Féyotaro yém Sif tosé efe té yésmetaménd, sái tanangé wafté a wemár a káfeté mwighé a muyé a utmanégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a frengégh."
bt: And I looked again, and I heard thousands and millions men carrying heavenly message(angels) song around the ruling sitting place with the living things and the head people. 12 With a loud voice they sang strongly: "Enough is the Lamb who was killed, to receive power and riches and wisdom and strength and honor and big light(glory) and blessing!"

nama: A yéndon táyáretawén méinyotio ghérsafé rokar njafaran a mband maratan a mband marat mbanmbanan a arakafan, yémofem wéi wagh taufanawét: "Frengégh a utmanégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté yáne yém efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a yáyot wéi Sif tosé efe yém tuot!"
bt: And I heard every living things in heaven and on earth and under the earth and on the sea, they were singing again: "Blessing and honor and big light(glory) and power belong to the one who sits on the ruling sitting place and to the Lamb forever!"

nama: A wéi 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar norayayénd, "Efalo!" A wéi 24 sénko ár nuyáyénd a yáwefnoyénd Ngánjáne a Sif tosae.
bt: And again the 4 living things said, "Amen!" And again 24 head people fell down and worshipped God and to the Lamb.

nama: Njam yénd kéretawén Sif tosam yésawéryéng fronde 7mén manéghkaf yam bukan. Féyo ámb akegh ghérsafé rokar néngutnai yéné ke ndenanit árurkenit, "Kénaf!" 2 Yénd néngretayén tukét a yinjoyén kwayaghé os. Os résagh árém teretau namb, a yémo yanai ákiki. Fá kérsau ménát sái kawaindau ásméghan fáro.
bt: When I saw the Lamb opened the first of the 7 seals on the book. Then one thing shouted this voice like thunder, "Come!" 2 I was looking up and saw a white horse. Horse rider held a bow, and he received a crown. He rode out in order to win himself in fighting.

nama: Njam Sif tosam yésawéryéng yénamayo manéghkaf yam, yéndo yiyárayén yénamayo akegh ghérsafé rokar korayau, "Kénaf!" 4 A ámb os nufaryéng férkat. Yéné résagh ároe yaramayénd waftafé witmafé sénté náifé, muyé ménát sái yitérmbotat krufrát ghérsé mband maratan a kété témorwén mék árké ár kásmetawét fárofáro.
bt: When the Lamb opened the second seal, I heard the second living thing say, "Come!" 4 And another horse came out, red one. To that rider was given the a powerful sword(sharp knife of both part), authority to remove peace from the earth and and there was a war which make people kill each other.

nama: Njam Sif tosam yésawéryéng nambiomén manéghkaf yam, yéndo yiyárayén nambiomén akegh ghérsafé rokar norayai, "Kénaf!" A yénd njam néngretayén yéndon yinjoyén kwéfité os. A yéné os résagh árom tawerwéng sékel yánjo ngángaye. 6 Féyo ke yénmormén kétamé 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar tambén, "Ámbiro wem ámbiro efogh ásáfogh fai, a nambio biskar ámbiro efogh ásáfogh fai, a yau yaghna olif wékwér a wéri nu!"
bt: When the Lamb opened the third seal, I heard the third living thing say, "Come!" And when I looked I saw a black horse. And this horse rider was holding a sèkel in his hand. 6 Then a voice came from among the 4 things, "One yam for a day's wages, and 3 cassavas for a day's wages, and do not spoil the olive oil and the alcohol!"

nama: A njam Sif tosam yésawéryéng 4mén manéghkaf yam, yéndo yiyárayén 4mén akegh ghérsafé rokar norayai, "Kénaf!" 8 A yénd njam néngretayén tukét, yinjoyén férénférnafé os wén arau ngarot, yéné os résagh ároene yétkwén témorwén Kér, endefaf kuwaitotau kér fés. Yéfeyot ewaramayénd wafté ámbiro 4mén mband marat sái witmafé sénté naifaye tásmétawét ár, káukáue a enjneye a kéghat wéráre.
bt: And when Lamb opened the fourth seal, I heard the 4th living thing say, "Come!" 8 And when I looked upon, I saw green colored horse, this horse rider's name was Death, killing fire was following behind him. To them were given power over one 4th of the earth to kill the men by sword, famine and disease and wild animals.

nama: Njam Sif tosam yésawéryéng 5mén manéghkaf yam, yéndo ewinjoyén yéfene mbérmbér ghéngén wárogh kitaré mbanmbanan ghérsé efe té tásmetawét ménamén Ngánjánene si téfnan a si afroghmén. 10 Fá kutnawét Yurafaf ndimbal keye, "Múye kér ro Yuré, njúnnjúnofnar a efalofifi! Nderé teke so tawanjetam fémon sái moghan takém efe em yéné mband maratmén ménamén yémofem némé tafrotat téfefaf? Njam so téfene férékmén fai yangote yéné árfefaf?" 11 Féyo kwayaghé sáláme tawarametau yéfeyot fénatayero, a fá emndayéng enaghét némbnare kétánotio méinyotio Yurane ásáfogh téfnár a yáne waitogh ár sái esmetat efe Ngánjánam eumyoi séméghét. 12 Yénd néretayén Sif tosam yésawéryéng 6mén manéghkaf yam, a kété témorwén ndimbal sokrere, a efogh nénamndai kwéfité ndenanit kwéfité sáláme, a ghérare nénamndai féréknit. 13 Kénd uyégh nénufngoyénd njafarta yénan mband maratot ndenanit tikéf wén mbwe yénau natarnat ndimbal mbormboram njam esambneta. 14 A njafar naknam ndenanit fefanit, a méinyotio mband tunakéf a fér kimndawét yéfenjo sifayata.
bt: When the Lamb opened the 5th seal, I saw underneath the sacrificing table the souls of those who had been killed because of the talk of God and of preaching talk. 10 They shouted to the Lord in a loud voice, "Powerful Lord, without.dust(holy) and true! How long will we wait for to judge these people who were on this earth what they did to us? When you.p will pay back for our blood to these people?" 11 Then a white cloth was given to each of them, and they were told to rest a little while until all of Lord's workers and his followers were killed who God has allowed to be killed. 12 I saw the Lamb opened the 6th seal, and there was a big earthquake, and the sun bacame black like black cloth, and the moon bacame like a blood. 13 The stars fell down to the earth from sky like unripe fruits falling when a strong wind shakes them. 14 And the heavens rolled up like a paper, and all the mountains and islands were moved from their place.

nama: Féyo mband maratmén warsagh ár, limánégh ár, fiyaré sénko ár, wemár ár, ár efe em ndimbal waftafé, méinyotio faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, a ár méinyotio, katnotawét mband fénemé a wím mbanmbanan mband tunakfan. 16 A fá kutnawét mband tunakéffaf a wímfaf, "Kénuyangi a ténétnongi yáne sáfta efe yénmor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a kétamé Sif tosane nékw tambén! 17 Ménamén yéfene ndimbal nékw efogh té nufar, a efe so yénamé kunjarngé?"
bt: Then the ruling men(kings) of the earth, rulers, military chiefs, the rich people, people who have a big power, every without.payment working man(servant) and free men, and all the people, hid themselves through caves and under rocks on the moutains. 16 And they shouted to the moutanins and to the rocks, "Fall on us and hide us from his face who sits on ruling sitting place and from the anger of the Lamb. 17 Because their terrible anger's day has come, and who is able to save from there?"

nama: Yéné soramé yéndon ewinjoyén 4 njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén 4 mband marat kwéndkwéndan, yéné njafar si résagh árém yangoyénd mbormbor 4 kwéndkwénd tambén ménát ámb mbormbor yau so téfnjau mband maratan o arakafan o wénan. 2 Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ámb njafar si résagh ár wér tambén, térsau akegh Ngánjánene manéghkaf yam. Fá kutnau ndimbal keye kétán 4 njafar si résagh árfefaf endefet ewaramayénd wafté wasérmboghét mband marat a arakaf: 3 "Yau yasérmbotati mband marat o arakaf o wén kétánotio yéndfem kor manéghkaf yam yérue ewatnam téfene Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár sáf sotan." 4 Féyo yéndo eyárayén yéné ár mérén efe manéghkaf yam yérue eramayénd 144,000 kétamamén méinyotio mérén Israilmén.
bt: After this I saw 4 men carrying heavenly message(angels) standing at the 4 corners of the earth, these men carrying heavenly message(angels) are stopping/blocking the winds from the 4 corners any wind should not blow on the earth or the sea or on the tree. 2 Then I saw another man carrying heavenly message from east, having the seal of the living God. He shouted with big voice to the 4 men carrying heavenly message(angels) who had been given power to destroy the earth and sea: 3 "Don't destroy the earth or the sea or the trees until we place the mark with the seal on the foreheads of the servents of our God." 4 Then I heard this people group who were marked with the seal 144,000 from all the groups of Israil.

nama: Kétamé Judane mérénta 12,000 manéghkaf yam yérue eramayénd, kétamé Réubenene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Gadene mérénta 12,000,
bt: From the tribe of Juda 12,000 were marked with the seal, from the tribe of Rèuben 12,000, from the tribe of Gad12,000,

nama: kétamé Ásarene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Naftaliene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Ménasene mérénta 12,000,
bt: from the tribe of Ásar12,000, from the tribe of Naftali 12,000, from the tribe of Manase 12,000,

nama: kétamé Simionene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Lefiene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Isakarene mérénta 12,000,
bt: from the tribe of Simion 12,000, from the tribe of Lefi 12,000, from the tribe of Aisak 12,000,

nama: kétamé Jebulunene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Josefene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Benjaminene mérénta 12,000. Ndimbal ár mérén
bt: from the tribe of Jebulun 12,000, from the tribe of Josef 12,000, from the tribe of Benjamin 12,000, The big crowd

nama: Yéné soramé yénd néngretayén, a kété tamorwén ndimbal ár mérén waféghofnaye! Fá tamorwén méinyotio ár mérénmén, ndimbal yumén, a si téfénmén, a fá tawakayongérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé tambén a Sif tosé frondeta, tawawongérwén kwayaghé sáláme a taweretawét nginar arau yéfenjo ngángaye. 10 A fá kutnawét ndimbal keye: "Wanjarégh yém téfene Ngánjáneta, efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan, a yáyot wéi Sif tosé!"
bt: After this I looked, and there was big crowd without.count! They were from every people group, nation, and language, and they stood before the ruling sitting place and before the Lamb, dressed white cloth and holding palm branches in their hands. 10 And they shouted in a loud voice: "Salvation is from our God, who sits on the ruling sitting place, and to him the Lamb!"

nama: Méinyotio njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén yarendayénd limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a sénko ár a 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar. Fá sénkoe kuitawét limánégh ámnjogh sifayarére a táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, 12 korayawét: "Efalo! Uwégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a káfeté mwighé a kánjo a utmanégh a wafté a muyé yém téfene Ngánjáne kétánotio tuot! Efalo!"
bt: All the men carrying heavenly message(angels) were standing surrounded the ruling sitting place and head people and the 4 living things. They fell down on their head in front of ruling sitting place and worshipped God, 12 saying: "Amen! Praise and big light(glory) and wisdom and thanks and honor and power and strength be to our God forever! Amen!"

nama: Féyo ámb sénko árom wémotai, "Yéné kwayaghé sálámefé sem efe em, a árkamé fá enmormén?"
bt: Then one of the head people asked me, "Who is these people with white cloth, and where do they come from?"

nama: Yéndon yawangoyén, "Ndimbal, fém mat ném." A fá korayangé, "Yéné em efe tamorwén ndimbal kértayan; yémofem té taumbnawét yéfenjo sáláme a eyátoyénd kwayaghé Sif tosane férkan.
bt: I answered him, "Sir, you.s know." And he said, "These are people who had a big trouble; they they have washed their cloth and made them white in the blood of the Lamb.

nama: Yénémamén, fá yéné fem Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayarére a yémofem yáwefnotat yáyot efogh a sémbár yánjo wáwefnogh méngo kénjún; a fá efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan so em yémafé mérne.
bt: Therefore, they are the one before the ruling sitting place of God and they worship him day and night in his worshipping house; and he who sits on the ruling sitting place will be with them.

nama: Yau wéikor so siogham fá eramete yau wéi so fá nu siogham eramete. Efogh waftayam yau so elále, fá yau so ewakérne.
bt: They will hunger no more, and thirst no more; The sun will not beat down on them, will not burn them.

nama: Ménamén Sif tosé efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayé kaka so mé ewanjete ndenanit sif wanjengégh ár. Yémon so elimnde kétán akegh wérér nufaf. A Ngánjánam so tawawányányongé méinyotio yengam kétamé yéfene ghékéfta.
bt: Beacuse the Lamb who stays near the ruling sitting place will continually care for them like a sheep watching man. He will lead them to the living spring water. And God will wipe away every tear from their eyes."

nama: Njam yémo yésawéryéng 7mén manéghkaf, métar náyátoi njafaran séno ámbiro efoghféneféne mbarmbar. 2 A yéndon ewinjoyén 7 njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén Ngánjánerére, a yéfe ewaramayéng 7 sufér.
bt: When he opened the 7th seal, it became silent in heaven about half an hour. 2 And I saw the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) standing before God, and he gave them 7 trumpets.

nama: Ámb njafar si résagh ár, emo teretau gol ghéngén disafé, yénmormén a nokayoi ghéngén wárogh kitarérére. Yémo ewanai tárfár ghéngén wateghét, ménáyafé méinyotio Ngánjánene árfene Ngánjánafé orayégh si, gol ghéngén wárogh kitarayan limánégh ámnjogh sifayé frondeta. 4 Yéné ghéngén kwam, méinyotio Ngánjánene árfene Ngánjánafé orayéghafé, kuyotawét Ngánjánrére kétamé njafar si résagh ároene ngángata. 5 Féyo njafar si résagh árom yéngwanai ghéngén dis, yaflitam fés farko kétamé ghéngén wárogh kitarata, a yéngwitam mbandot; árurke nufngoi ásmégh, toyé aramégh nufngoyénd a kété témorwén sokrere. Sufér
bt: Another man carrying heavenly message(angel), who had a golden sacrifice pot, came and stood before the table for burning sacrifice. He received many sacrifice to offer, with the talking with God(prayer) of all God's people, on the golden table for burning sacrifice in front of the ruling sitting place. 4 This smoke of the sacrifice, with the talking with God of all God's people, went up before God from the man carrying heavenly message's hand. 5 Then the man carrying heavenly message took the sacrifice pot, filled it with charcoal fire from the table for burning sacrifice, and threw it on the ground; thunder started roaring, the lightning started to strike and there was an earthquake. The trumpets

nama: Féyo 7 njafar si résagh ár nafrendaménd sufér waufghét.
bt: Then the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) prepared to blow the trumpet.

nama: Fronde njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a nu mbwe a fés wanjméghkaf férkafé enwitam mbandot. Ámbiro nambiomén mband marat nakérnam, a ámbiro nambiomén wén kakérnawét a yus méinyotio nefoi.
bt: The first man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet, and hail(water seed) and fire mixed with blood poured down on the earth. A third of the earth was burned up, and a third of the trees were burned, and all the grass finished.

nama: Féyo yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a ámb rokar ndenanit mband tunakéf fésafé yitam arakafot. Ámbiro nambiomén arakaf nawengoi férkot, 9 a ámbiro nambiomén akegh rokar arakafan eramngotam, a ámbiro nambiomén bout ewasérmbotam.
bt: Then the second man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet, and something like buring mountain was thrown into the sea. A third of the sea was turned into blood, 9 and a third of living things in the sea died, and a third of the bout were destroyed.

nama: Nambiomén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a ndimbal kénd, natremngoi ndenanit tosin, nénuyai njafarta kétán ámbiro nambiomén wanjet a wérér nufaf 11 Yéné kéndoene yétkwén siyém "Ghafté kér ro." Ámbiro nambiomén nu namndai ghafté, a tárfár ár kér tamorwén yéné nu tambén árké té nénamndayénd ghafté.
bt: The third man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet, and a big star, blazing like a torch, fell from the sky on a third of the rivers and of the springs of water. 11 The name of this star is "Bitterness." A third of the waters turned bitter, and many people died from this waters which had become bitter.

nama: 4mén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér. Ámbiro nambiomén efogh yiroryéng a ámbiro nambiomén ghérare, a ámbiro nambiomén kénd kés em, ménát yéfene ámbiro nambiomén kwayaghé nénamndayénd kwéfité; ámbiro nambiomén efogh témorwén kwayaghafnar a ámbiro nambiomén sémbár witmaro wéi ndenáyo.
bt: The 4th man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet. A third of the sun was struck and a third of the moon, and a third of the stars, so that thier one third light turned dark; a third of the day was without light, and a third of the night also.

nama: Féyo yénd néngretayén tukét, a yéndo yiyárayén ámbiro ndikáké kutnau ndimbal keye njamandio kanefetau tukmé njafaran, "Férférafé! Férférafé! Férférafé méinyotio ár efe emor yéné mband maratan, ménamén sufér kemén árké ámb nambio njafar si résagh árém so ewaufetat!"
bt: Then I looked up, and I heard an eagle shouting in a loud while it was flying in the sky, "Scared! Scraed! Scared to all the people who live on this earth, because of the trumpet sound which the other three men carrying heavenly message(angels) will blow!"

nama: 5mén njafar si résagh árém yaufetai yánjo sufér. Yéndo yinjoyén kénd árké té nénuyai mband maratot kétamé njafarta, yá yaramai ki yéné kwémbofnar yékwmén. 2 Njam yémon yésawéryéng kwémbofnar yékw, kwam nénokayoi kétamé ndenanit kwérkwér fés kwam yénau yém, féyo efogh a njafar kwéfité namndeyayénd ménamén yéné yékwoene kwammén. 3 Yéné kwam tambén ngumbainy kéntonawét mband maratot a ewaramayénd wafté ndenanit ndérkamé yátmane wafté yénau yém. 4 Ámb árom ewafaretai, "Yau ewaghnati yus yéné mband maratmén o wén o fénaté wén sáf, wénde ewghnati efe yau em Ngánjánene manéghkaf yéruafé yéfene sáf sotan. 5 Yau esmetati kérotio wénde ndémkero ewarametati 5 ghérare." Ndémke ndenanit témorwén yénau ndérkamé yatmam térarngé ár. 6 Yéné 5 ghérareyan árém yéta so yéronjat kér wénde yau so tinjongi; fá yéta so ménde em kér sái em, wénde kéram mé so ewainde.
bt: The fifth man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet. I saw a star which had fallen down to the earth from the sky, it was given the key to the without.end hole. 2 When he opened the without.end hole, smoke rose like bush fire smoke, so the sun and the sky became dark because of the smoke from the hole. 3 Out of this smoke locusts came down on the earth and were given power like that scopion have. 4 Someone commanded, "Do not destroy the grass of the earth or tree or any plant, but ruin the people who did not have God's seal on their foreheads. 5 Do not kill them, but only to give them pain for 5 months." The pain are like that scorpion bites man. 6 During those 5 months people will seek death but will not find it; they want to die, but death will pass them.

nama: Ngumbainy ndenanit kéretawét mékot os yénau náfrendat. Yéfene sénkoyan tawawéngérwén ndenanit golmén ákiki, a yéfene sáf ndenanit tamorwén ár sáfnit. 8 Yéfene séf ndenanit tawamorwén amaf séfnit, a yéfene sén ndenanit ndimbal munjan fusene sén. 9 Fá tawawéngérwén tot téfénmén awambégh sáláme, a yéfene njamb uke ndenanit témorwén tárfár osafene tétatétake yénau yém eumbang ose résaghmén mékot yénau nérsat. 10 Fá tamorwén keran wétafé ndenanit ndérkamé yátmé, a yéfene ker tamorwén waftafé árkéménaye árét ndémke tawarametawét 5 ghérare. 11 Yéfene kété témorwén warsagh ár efe témorwén kwémbofnar yékwmén si résagh ár, endene yétkwén yémndetat Ibru sie Abadon, a wéi Grik sie Afolion. Yéné sómbio yétkwénafene fifi siyém Wirorégh ár.
bt: The locusts looked like horses ready for battle. On their heads they wore like the crowns of gold, and their face was like human faces. 8 Their hair was like women's hair, and their teeth were like big wild cat(lion)'s teeth. 9 They wore iron protecting clothe(breastplastes), and the sound of their wings were like the sound of many horses running and carrier with horse(chariots) rushing for battle. 10 They had tails with stingers like scorpion, and their tails had power to give people pain for 5 months. 11 They have as the ruling man(king) over the messanger of the without.end hole, whose name in Ibu talk is Abadon, and in Grik talk is Afolion. These two names' meaning is Destroyer.

nama: Fronde férférafé yam té kawainde, wénde ámb sómbio férférafé yam mé ere ufroghét.
bt: The first frightening thing has passed, but two other frightening things are yet to come.

nama: 6mén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér. Féyo yénd káyáretawén si 4 tartar tambén kété golmén ghéngén wárogh kitaré tambén efe yakai Ngánjánerére. 14 Norayai 6mén njafar si résagh ároefaf efe témorwén suférafé, "Táfer 4 njafar si résagh ár efe taumbang kété ndimbal wanjen Eufrates!" 15 4 njafar si résagh ár efe té káfrendawét yéné efoghfénefénet, a efghot a ghéraret a yunjfot té nétoryénd ámbiro nambiomén mband marat ár ngiot. 16 Yénd náyárayén nderé tárfár tamorwén mék téfnár efe tafayongérwén osamé 200 milion.
bt: The 6th man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet. Then I heard a talk coming from the 4 horns of the golden table for burning sacrifice who is standing before God. 14 It said to the 6th man carrying heavenly message who had the trumpet, "Release the 4 men carrying heavenly message(angels) who are bound at the big Eufrates River!" 15 The 4 men carrying heavenly message(angels) who had been ready for this hour, and day and month and year were released to kill a third of man of the earth. 16 I heard that the number of the soldiers sitting on horses were 200 milion.

nama: Os a osafene résagh ár yéndon tafandawén tanjo ghékéf waingéghe kéretawét ndené: Yéfene wéf awoghmén tamorwén fésafé férék ngarot, ndéndák ngarot, téndal ngarot ndené rémérémé wékwér. Osafene sénko tamorwén ndenanit ndimbal munjan fusafene sénkonit, a yéfene sénfneta kéntonau fés, kwam a rémérémé wékwér. 18 Ár mérén ámbiro nambiomén tásmetau krotio yéné nambio férférafé kérté yame: fés, kwam a rémérémé wékwére árké kéntonawét osafene sénfneta. 19 Yéné osafene wafté stamorwén yéfene mbírmbíran a yéfene keran. Yéfene ker tamorwén kambannit sénkoyafé, yénaye kal tawaramangayénd árét.
bt: The horses and riders I saw on my eye passover thing looked like that: Their breastplates were red as fire, blue, yellow as sulfur(heated acid). The heads of the horses looked like the heads of big wild cats(lions), and out of their mouths came fire, smoke and heated acid(sulfur). 18 A third of people was killed by the three fearful troubles: fire, smoke and heated acid(sulfur) which come out of the horses' mouths. 19 These horses' power was in their mouth and in their tails. Their tails are like snakes heads, with this they injured people.

nama: Ámb ár mérén efe yau tásmetau yéné férférafé kérté yamam, yau wéi nékmboyénd yaufiyam wafroghta. Yémofem mé ménjtaye tawáwefnotawét yaufi mbérmbérat a gol wafroghmén mewangat, silfé, tot téfénmén, wímmén a wénmén, yéné mewang árkéméné yau néretat o yau náyáretat o yau eyota! 21 Fá yau nawengoyénd ár ngi tambén o ghar tambén o yaufi wal yam tambén o oro tambén.
bt: Other people groups who were killed by these fearful troubles, did not stop doing sins. They continue to worship evil spirits and made idols of gold, silver, steal, stone and wood, these idols which cannot see or hear or walk! 21 They did not turn away of murders or magic or sexual immorality or stealing.

nama: Yéndo yinjoyén ámb wafté kér ro njafar si résagh ár kénewonau njafarta. Fá njafar kwamkwam umaneghkaf témorwén, a sikwálkwál témorwén yáne sénko tukta; yáne sáf ndenanit efogh, a yáne ghambér ndenanit tamorwén kwérkwér fés. 2 Yémo teretau némbne buk árké mé tésawérngérwén yáne ngángayan. Yémo yánjo tambén kafkaf eyai arakafan a yánjo fatrata kafkaf eyai mbandan, 3 a fá nutnai ndimbal keye ndenanit ndimbal munjan fus. Njam fá nutnam, 7 árurkeyam yawangoyénd. 4 Njam 7 árurkeyam norayayénd, yéndo táf farogh féfé ewafngoyén, wénde kém kétamé njafarta yénmormén kénorayau tafaf, "Ewarambnota ndernáye 7 árurke norayat; yau efarota yéné!"
bt: I saw another mighty man carrying heavenly message(angel) coming down from heaven. He was wrapped in a cloud, and had rainbow over his head; his face was like the sun, and his legs were like bush fire. 2 He was holding a little book which was still open in this hand. He put his right foot on the sea and his left foot on the land, 3 and he shouted in a loud like big wild cat(lion)'s sound. When he shouted, the 7 thunders answered it. 4 When the 7 thunders spoke, I tried to write, but the voice came from heaven say to me, "Keep secret how the 7 thunders have said; do not write this!"

nama: Njafar si résagh ár yéndon árké yinjoyén takayongérwén arakafan a mbandan euyoi yánjo tambén ngángé njafarot. 6 Fá norayai efalo yátogh si Ngánjánene yétkwénan, efe nakete tuot, emo yafrotam njafar a méinyotio rokar kété, mband marat a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún, a arakaf a rokar méinyotio yéné kénjún, fá norayai, "Kété ámb yau awanegh so yém! 7 Wénde njam 7mén njafar si résagh árom taufetangé yánjo sufér, Ngánjánene warambnogh yam táf so nufrotat, yéné so nufrotat ndené fété ndernáye té mat táyátotau yánjo ásáfogh téfnár, Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
bt: The man carrying heavenly message which I saw standing on the sea and on the land raised his right hand to heaven. 6 He said promising talk in the name of God, who lives forever, who created the heavens and everythings there, the earth and everythings in it, and the sea and everythings in it, and he said, “There will be no more delay! 7 But when the 7th man carrying heavenly message blows his trumpet, God's secret thing will happen, this will happen just as how he had make know to his workers, the God's people who make know(prophets)."

nama: Féyo kém árké náyárayén yéndon kétamé njafarta nénorayai tafaf wéikor, "Nguwano, téngwan sauréghkaf buk árkéméné yéfai njafar si résagh ároene ngángayan efe yakai arakafan a mbandan."
bt: Then the voice which I heard from heaven spoke to me again, "Go, take the open book which is in the hand of the man carrying heavenly message(angel) who is standing on the sea an on the land."

nama: Féyo yénd wéngmormén njafar si résagh ároefaf a yamnendayén fá ménát sái kwaramangai némbne buk. Yémo kwémndangé yénd, "Téngwan a téneta; so tengongé fene fút ghaftat, wénde fene mbírmbíran ménde sái yém ndenanit fáméghár." 10 Yéndo yéngwanayén némbne buk njafar si résagh ároene ngángata a yénetamén, ndenanit ménde témorwén fáméghár tane mbírmbíran, wénde yéndo njam yénetamén, tane fútan namndai ghafté. 11 Féyo yémofem wémndayénd, "Fém táf néngafrota wéikor tárfár árfefaf, ámb yuwomé, fénaté sifaf a warsagh árfefaf."
bt: So I went to the man carrying heavenly message and asked him to give me the little book. He said to me, "Take it and eat it; it will turn your.s stomach sour, but in your.s mouth it will be sweet like as honey." 10 I took the little book from his hand of man carrying heavenly message and ate it, it tasted sweet as honey in my mouth, but when I ate it, in my stomach it became sour. 11 Then they told me, "You.s must say again to many people, other nations, different talks(languages), and ruling men(kings)."

nama: Féyo ta waramai ufoghét wétu, a yénd wémndai, "Kénngém a tufota Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo a ghéngén wárogh kitaré, a tawafta méinyotio wáwefnogh téfnár. 2 Wénde yau táf yufota téndo tambén wáwefnogh méngo sifayé, ménamén Ngánjánam té yéramai yéné sifayé Téndo árfefaf. Yémofem so kafkafe yésénat njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesen 42 ghérare. 3 Yéndon so wafté tawaramen tanjo sómbio ghékéf fandagh árét, a fá so nawot saghé sáláme a so néngafrot yéné efogh kénjúmé 1,260 efogh." 4 Yéné sómbio fandagh ár sere sómbio olif wén a sómbio lambefé fayoghmén árkéméné ewakayare Yuranerére efe yém mband maratoene. 5 Árké árom njam yéta ngiot tawafnge fá, fés so yéném sénfneta a tawifongé yéfene mék téfnár; a ndené ende yéné ár kér so em emofem njam ngiot tawafngend fá. 6 Fá ere waftafé njafar manéghét ménát némé nu yau so nafamnde táf njam néngafrot. Fá ere waftafé wengoghét wérér nu férkot, a sái engwafaret férférafé kérté yam mband maratot fá ndernáye njam ménde ere.
bt: Then someone gave me a measuring stick, and told me, "Go and measure the worshipping house of God and the table for burning sacrifice, and count all worshippers. 2 But do not measure the courts outside the worshipping house, because God gave that place to the Side people. They will trample on the without.dust(holy) city for 42 months. 3 I will give power to my two watching men, and they.d will dress in sackcloth and will say during those 1, 260 days.” 4 These two watching men are the two olive trees and the two lampstands that stand before the Lord of the earth. 5 If anyone tries to kill them, fire will come out of their mouths and destroys their enemies; and in this way whoever tries to kill them will be killed. 6 They.d have this power to shut up the sky so that there will be no rain during they are saying. They.d have this power to turn the spring of water into blood, and to strike the earth with fearful troubles(plagues) how if they.d wish.

nama: Njam yémofem tifend afrogh si, ndimbal gásié árkéméné sái kénurtongé kwémbofnar yékw tambén so násmetat yéné sómbio árfé. Yémon so tawaindange a esméwé krotio. 8 A yéfene kér fifi so ekmare endén Jurusalemén, ndimbal tesen árké ufarogh yétkwéne emndét Sodom o Ijif, yéné ndimbal tesen ánde yéfene Yuré yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan. 9 Nambio a mbarmbar efogh, méinyotio ár, mérén, fénaté si, a ndimbal yumén árém so efandét yéfene kér fifi, árké ár yau so taumyongi mband raméghét.
bt: When they.d finish proclaiming talk, the large crocodile that comes up out of the without.end hole will fight with these two people. He will defeat them.d and kill them.d. 8 And their.d dead bodies will lie in the street of Jerusalem, city which symbolic name is Sodom or Ijif, and that city where their Lord was nailed on the cross. 9 Three and a half days, every people, tribes, languages, and nations will find out their.d bodies, which people will not allow them to be buried.

nama: Ár efe em yéné mband maratmén so erametat ramégh yéfenjo kénjún a téménd sái yafrotat, ménamén sómbio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene kérmén emofem takméwét ár kértayan.
bt: The people who are of the earth will give presents to each other and will make a feast, because of two God's man who make know(prophet)'s death whose.d brought suffering upon people.

nama: Wénde nambio a mbarmbar efogh soramé, ambone Ngánjáne tambén ninyawai yéfefaf, a fá nokayeyayénd; a férféram ewifoi méinyotio fá emofem tafandwét fá. 12 Féyo ndimbal ke yénmormén kétamé njafarta, "Kénaflend yénan." A fá néwaneyayénd njafarot njafarkwamkwam kénjúmé mé tafandwét yéfene mék téfnáram. 13 A yéné efoghféneféneyanyo kété témorwén yaufiyaufi sokrere a ámbiro 10mén ndimbal tesen yiroryéng, a 7,000 ár kér emormén yéné sokrereyan, a méinyotio ár efe yau kér emormén férfér tamorwén a ndimbal kwayaghé tarametawét njafarmén Ngánjáne.
bt: But after three and a half days, the breath from God entered them.d, and they.d stood up; and all who saw them.d were filled with scaredness. 12 Then a loud voice came from heaven, “Come up here!” And they.d went up into heaven through the cloud while their enemies kept on watching. 13 At that very hour there was a violent earthquake and a tenth of the city was destroyed, and 7,000 people were killed in the earthquake, and all the people who did not died were scared and gave big light(glory) to the God of heaven.

nama: Yénamayo férférafé yam té nawaindé, wénde nambiomén férférafé yam yéném tekofnaye. 7mén sufér ke
bt: The second scaring thing is passed, but the third scaring thing is coming not.far! The 7th trumpet

nama: Féyo 7mén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a kété tamorwén ndimbal ke kutnawét njafaran, "Mband marat sénonjo té nénamndé téfene Yurane limánégh a yáne Kerisoene limángégh, a yémon so yélimnde tuot!" 16 Féyo 24 sénko ár tamorangérwén yéfenjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayan Ngánjánrére keitawét yéfenjo sénkoe a táwefnotawét yá, 17 a fá korayawét: "Yéndfem kánjo némarametam fe, Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio waftafé, fém efe ném a fém efe kénmorwén, sénonjo fémo té yané fenjo ndimbal wafté a té limánégh yérnyé.
bt: Then the 7th man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet, and there were loud voices shouting in heaven, “Now the world has become the kingdom of our Lord and his Keriso, and he will rule forever!” 16 Then the 24 head people sitting on their ruling sitting places in front of God bowed on their heads and worshiped God, 17 and they said: “We give thanks to you.s, Lord God Almighty you.s who are and who were, now you.s have taken your.p big power and have begun to rule!

nama: Mband marat ár mérén nékw té tam fefaf, wénde sénonjo fene nékw efogh té nufar. Yéné efogh té nawer sái emota kér ár a fai ewarameta fenjo ásáfogh téfnárat, fémo so fai ewaramete fenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árét Ngánjánene mat yátogh árét a efalo yátogh ár a méinyotio emofem yéfandat fene yétkwén férférafé, kétamé némbnar kétán ndimbal, a fémon so ewasérmbote méinyotio fá emofem tasérmbotat mband marat."
bt: The people of the earth were angry to you.s, but now your.s anger day has come. This time has come for judging the dead, and for giving payments your.s workers the God's people who make know(prophets) and truly approving men(believers) and all who fear your.s name, from small to big, and you.s will destroy those who destroy the earth.”

nama: Féyo njafaran Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo nasawéryéng, a yáne Nák Boks safénro téfandawét yáne wáwefnogh méngo kénjún. Féyo kété témorwén toyé karametawét, árurke kásmetawét a karoghawét, nu mbwefé ndimbal mbormbor, a sokrere.
bt: Then in heaven God's worshipping house was opened, and his Law Box was seen in his worshipping house. Then there were flashes of lightning, thunder crashed and roared, a heavy wind with water seed(hail), and earthquake.

nama: Ndimbal sélngwélafé yam nufaryéng njafaran: amaf efogh umaneghkaf témorwén, ménáyafé ghérare témorwén yáne kafkaf mbanmbanan a 12 kéndafé ákiki téfayongérwén yáne sénkoyan. 2 Amaf témorwén ambum suafé a tékrát téfandau áráfghét.
bt: A big surprising thing(sign) appeared in heaven: a woman clothed with the sun, with the moon under her feet and a crown of 12 stars on her head. 2 She was pregnant and she has pains to give birth.

nama: Wéi ámb sélngwélafé yam nufaryéng njafaran: ámb ndimbal férék ngarot ndimbal fuwai 7 sénkofé a 10 tartarafé a tawafayongérwén 7 ákiki yéfene ámbiroámbiro sénkoyamé. 4 Yáne keram ámbiro nambiomén kénd esamburyéng njafar tambén a enwitam mband maratot, féyo nawengoi amafoe tambén emo ambum ráfghét térametau, ménát yémo so ténetau yáne ambum njam káráftau. 5 Amafom yéráftam ghakér ambum, emo so elimnde méinyotio ndimbal yu ménaye warsagh ároene tot téfénmén wétue, a njafar si résagh árom yéngétnoi yáne ambum a yéngwanai Ngánjánefaf a yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayafaf. 6 Amaf nawatembai fanfne yuwot yéné sifayat Ngánjánam árké té yáfrendam yáyot, ánde fá so témorwén wambghan 1,260 efogh.
bt: Another surprising thing(sign) appeared in heaven: an enormous red dragon with 7 heads and ten horns and 7 crowns on its heads. 4 Its tail swept a third of the stars out of the sky and flung them to the earth, then he turned to woman who was about to give birth, so that he might eat her child when he was born. 5 She gave birth to a son, who will rule all the nations with the ruling man(king)'s iron stick, and an angel snatched away her child and was lift up to God and to his ruling sitting place. 6 The woman fled into the wilderness to this place which God prepared for her, where she might be in protecting for 1,260 days.

nama: Féyo mék kété témorwén njafaran. Maikél a yánjoyo njafar si résagh árfé kásmetawét ndimbal fuwayafé a ndimbal fuwayoene si résagh árfé. 8 Wénde ndimbal fuwai yau kor muyafé yémormén, a yémofem yétarnaménd yéfenjo sifayé kété njafaran. 9 Yéné ndimbal fuwai yénmitaménd yuwot, yéné tándáwár kamban yémndetat Defol, o Sáifér, emo elimndé unyéghe méinyotio ár mband maratan. Fá té yénmitaménd mband maratot yánjo si résagh árfé.
bt: Then there were a war in heaven. Maikèl and his men carrying heavenly message(angels) fought against the dragon and his men carrying heavenly message(angels). 8 But the dragon was not strong enough, and they lost their place there in heaven. 9 This big dragon was was thrown down, that ancient snake called Defol, or Sáifèr, who leads all the people in the world astray with lying. They threw him to the earth with men carrying heavenly message(angels).

nama: Féyo yénd náyárayén ndimbal ke njafarta kénorayau, "Sénonjo Ngánjánene wanjarégh té nufar! Sénonjo Ngánjánam té yuyafo yánjo wafté ndené Warsagh ár! Sénonjo yáne Kerisom yuyafo yáne muyé. Ménamén ár emo tawawafrotau sénkér efalo yátogh árét efogh a sémbár Ngánjánene sáfrére, njafar si résagh árém yénmitaménd yuwot. 11 Efalo yátogh árém yáindayénd Sif tosane férke a Ngánjánene si waitoghe, a yémofem yau yéfenjo ghérsé táuwetawét mindefifi wénde férférofnar tamorwén krot. 12 Yénémaménnde náuwetati, fém njafar a fém efe em kété! Wénde ghérghérsisé mband maratoe a arakaf, ménamén Sáifér té téném féfefaf, fá siyém nékw afoghkaf, ménamén fá mat yém yáne kwéf ndémbndémb té namndangi."
bt: Then I heard a loud voice from heaven saying, “Now the salvation and power and the kingdom of our God have come, and the authority of his Keriso. Because the one who was accusing approving truth people(believers) day and night before God, angels thrown him down. 11 Believers won him by the blood of the Lamb and by preaching the talk of God, and they did not love their lives so much but they were not afraid to die. 12 Therefore rejoice, you.s heaven and you.p who live there! But sad to the earth and the sea, because the Sáifèr has come down to you.p, he is filled with anger, because he knows that his time has became short.”

nama: Njam ndimbal fuwayam yinjoi ndené fá té yénmitaménd mband maratot. Féyo yémo téronjau amaf emo yéráftam ghakér ambum. Fá ménde témorwén tésmangai. 14 Yéné amafoe yaramayénd ndimbal ndikakane sómbio njamb, ménát fá so kanefetau yáne frengéghkaf sifayafaf fanfne yuwot, ánde fá so tambetawét nambio yunjéf a mbarmbar kétamé yéné kambanoeta. 15 A wéi yéné kambanam sénféne tambén yénmetoi amafoefaf nu ndenanit wanje, ménát amaf so kéféram tanangai. 16 Wénde amaf yáutánam mband maratam. Mband maratam yánjo sénféne yésawéryéng a néloi nu árké nu ndimbal fuwayam té yénmetoi yánjo sénféneta. 17 Féyo ndimbal fuwai nékw témorwén amafoefaf a nuwanoi a mék yéfunai yáne ambumafefaf, méinyotio emofem efalo eyátotat Ngánjánene nák a naweretat Yesuene sian. 18 A ndimbal fuwai nokayoi arakaf téndon.
bt: When the dragon saw that they had thrown him down to the earth. So he was searching for the woman who gave birth to the boy. He wanted to kill her. 14 This woman was given the two wings of a large eagle, in order that they will fly to her preparing place in the desert, where she will be protected for three and a half years from the snake. 15 And again from his mouth the snake poured out water like a river to the woman, so that flood would carry her away. 16 But the earth helped the woman. The earth opened its mouth and swallowed the water which the dragon vomitted from his mouth. 17 Then the dragon was anger with the woman and went off and fought against her descendants, all those who truly approve(believe) God's laws and follow Yesu's talk. 18 And the dragon stood on the seashore.

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ndimbal gásié nénurtoi arakafta. Kété tamorwén 10 tartar a 7 sénko a ákiki tafayongérwén méinyotio tartaramé, a fénatayero sénkoyamé yaufi yétkwén tawakayongérwén. 2 Ndimbal gásié yéndon árké yinjoyén kéretau ndenanit fénaté sáfot ndimbal munjan fus yétkwén leféd, wénde tamorwén kafkaf ndenanit kéghat ndimbal wérár yétkwén Beya a sénféne ndenanit ndimbal munjan fus. Ndimbal fuwayam yaramai ndimbal gásiyai yánjo wafté a yánjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a ndimbal muyé. 3 Ámb ndimbal gásiane sénkoyan mbor kéretau ndenanit kar yésmetaménd fronde, a yéné kérmén mbor mer nénamndai. Méinyotio mband marat sélngwél tamorwén a táitotawét ndimbal gásié. 4 Árém táwefnotawét ndimbal fuwaye ménamén yémon té yaramai yánjo muyé ndimbal gásiyai. Yémofem wéi táwefnotawét ndimbal gásiyai, korayawét, "Efe ndené yém ndimbal gásié? Emo so mék téfunangé yáfaf?"
bt: Then I saw a big crocodile coming up out of the sea There were with 10 horns and 7 heads and putting on the crowns on all the horns, and on each of its heads wearing evil name. 2 The big cassowary which I saw looked like a different shape of big cat name leféd, but with feet like a big wild animal name Beya(bear)'s feet and a mouth like a big wild cat(lion)'s mouth. The dragon gave the big crocodile his own power and his ruling sitting place and big authority. 3 On one of the heads of the big crocodile seemed the wound like having been killed before, but that wound had became good. The whole earth was surprised and followed the big crocodile. 4 People worshiped the dragon because he had given his authority to the big crocodile. They also worshiped the big crocodile, saying, “Who is like the big crocodile? Who can fight against it?”

nama: Ngánjánam yumyoi ndimbal gásié siot sái korayau yaufi si Ngánjánefaf, a yáyot yaramai muyé wafroghét fá némé ménde témorwén 42 ghérareyot. 6 Fá korayau sotafé yaufi si Ngánjánefaf, a tasérmbotau yáne yétkwén a yáne ámnjogh sifayé a yéfefaf wéi ndenáyo efe emor njafaran. 7 Ngánjánam wafté yaramai Ngánjánene árfé ásméghét a sái tawaindangé fá. A yaramai wafté méinyotio ár limánéghét, méinyotio mérén, fénaté si téfén ár, ndimbal yumén ár. 8 Méinyotio ár efe em yéné mband maratmén so yáwefnotat ndimbal gásiyai. Wénde yéné ár endefene yétkwén em Sif tasane ghérsé bukan, yémofem yau so yáwefnotat. Sif tosam yétkwén ewafarotam yéné efalo yátogh árfene yánjo bukan frondeyo soramé mband marat nufrotam. Fá yéné féyém Sif tosé árém efe yésmetaménd.
bt: God allowed the big crocodile to speak evil talk to God, and to him they gave the authority what want to do for 42 months. 6 It said very bad talk to God, and destroy his name and the sitting place and all those who live also in heaven. 7 God gave the power to fight against God's people and to defeat them. And he gave the power to govern every people, tribe, people from every language, and people from the nations. 8 All the people who are in earth will worship the big crocodile. But those people whose names are in the Lamb's book of life will not worship it. The Lamb wrote the names of these believersin his book from the beginning of the world. He is the Lamb who people killed.

nama: Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete! 10 Efe njam té ewéretat kwéfkwéf méngot so fété em kwéfkwéf ár. Efe njam esmetat krot witmafé sénté naifaye so fété esmetat witmafé sénté naifaye. Yéné yém ndené efalo yátogh ár táf so em métar a muyafé. Yémofem táf so mé efalo yiyátotat Ngánján. Ámb ndimbal gásié néntoryéng mband marat tambén
bt: Whoever has ears, let them hear. 10 Those who are to arrest into darkness house will be darkness house man(prisoner). Those who are to be killed by the sword will be killed by the sword. This means that the truly approving men(believers)(believers) must be patient and strong. They must continue to trust God.” Another big crocodile come up out of the earth

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ámb ndimbal gásié kéntonau mband marat tambén. Fá témorwén sómbio tartarafé ndenanit Sif tosé, wénde fá korayau ndenanit ndimbal fuwai kar témorwén. 12 Yémo tawafrotau méinyotio muyé frondemén ndimbal gásiane sáfrére, a yéméindai mband marat a yánjo ár wáwefnoghét fronde ndimbal gásié, efe té kér kénjúta mer náyátoi. 13 A yémon tawafrotau ndimbal sélngwélafé ufarogh yam, téfunau fés kénatarnawét njafarta mband maratot ár ghékfan. 14 Ménamén sélngwélafé ufarogh yam téfnan yáyot wafté yaramayénd ménát sái tafrotau fronde ndimbal gásiane muwémuwaye. Yémo tamndetau méinyotio ár mband maratan ménát yémofem so tafrotawét mbanmban ndimbal gásiai utmanéghét efe té yésmetaménd witmafé sénté naifaye a wénde mer wéi nénamndai. 15 Yénamayomén ndimbal gásiai yaramayénd wafté ménát sái taramangai ambone fronde ndimbal gásiane mbanmbanoe, ménát ndimbal gásiane mbanmban so korayau krot ekmeta yéné ár emofem yau njam yáwefnotat mbanmbanoe. 16 Yémo wéi wáfaregh ewafngoi méinyotio ár, némbnar kétán ndimbal, wemár a yauyau, yuwek a orsagh ár, ménát sái tarsawét mbor yéfene tambén ngángayan o sáf sotan, 17 ménát ámb yau so rokar manie erse o etérne maniot táfandro njam yéné mborafé yém, árké yém ndimbal gásiane yétkwén o yáne wafégh yétkwén.
bt: Then I saw another big crocodile came up out of the earth. It had two horns like a lamb, but it spoke like a dragon was. 12 It worked all the authority of the first big crocodile on its behalf, and made the earth and its people to worship the first big crocodile, whose wound had healed from almost died. 13 And it did big special workings(miracles), it made fire come down from heaven to earth in the sight of people. 14 Because of the surprising things to him they gave power to perform on behalf of the first big crocodile. It ordered all the people in the earth so that they will build an image in honor of the big crocodile who had been wounded by the sword and but it became good again. 15 They gave power second big crocodile to give breath to the image of the first big crocodile, so that the image of the big crocodile could say [and] put to death those people who would not worship it. 16 It also forced all the people, small and big, rich and poor, without.payment working man(servant) and free, to have a mark placed on their right hands or on their foreheads, 17 so that no one can buy or sell without this mark, which is the big crocodile's name or the number of its name.

nama: Yéna yém káfeté mwighé. Efe yém mwighé kér ro so yafene yéné wafégh ndimbal gásiane, ménamén yéné siyém ároenemén waferégh a yáne waférghét siyém 666.
bt: This is wisdom. Whoever is intelligent can figure out the number of the big crocodile, because this is people's number and its number is 666.

nama: Féyo yéndon yinyoyén Sif tosé takayongérwén Jaion mband tunakfan, mérne yánjo waitogh árfé 144,000 méinyotio efe tamorwén yáne yétkwénafé a Yárefane yétkwénafé takayongérwén yéfene sáf sotan 2 A yéndon náyárayén ke njafarta ndenanit tárfár wérér nu yénau nasunat o ndimbal toyé kenit. Ndenanit témorwén tárfár ár kembnemén wagh rokare yénau nambnat mérne. 3 A yémofem térametawét totér wagh limánégh ámnjogh sifayé rére a 4 akegh ghérsafé wérár a sénko árfene rére. Árké ár yau so kotametau yéné wagh, wénde mé fáro 144,000 árro mat tamorwén efe té ewaferyéng yéné mband maratan. 4 Fá yéné em efe yau kawasérmbotat amafafé, fá mé méinyo em. Yémofem táitotat Sif tosé árkamé fá tiota. Fá yéné wanjaréghkaf em ár tambén, árké em frondembwe Ngánjáneyot a Sif tosai. 5 Némé unyégh yau ewawinjoyénd yéfene mbírmbíran, fá sem téfnofnar. Nambio njafar si résagh ár
bt: Then I looked the Lamb standing on Mount Jaion, with his 144,000 following men all who have his name and his Father's name written on their foreheads. 2 And I heard a voice from heaven like a roaring flowing water or like the sound of loud thunder. It was like that many musicians playing on music instruments. 3 And they made a new song before the ruling sitting place and before the 4 living things and head people. No one could learn the song, but only these 144,000 can learn who had saved from this earth. 4 These are those who did not defile themselves with women, they remained virgins. They follow the Lamb wherever he goes. They are these have been saved from people, which are the firstfruits for God and to the Lamb. 5 What lie was not found in their mouths, they are without blame. The three men carrying heavenly message(angels)

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ámb njafar si résagh ár kanefetau njafar tukma, a yáfaf témorwén akegh mer si sái téngwaitotau yéfefaf mé efe ár yémorare yéné mband maratan, méinyotio ndimbal yu, mérén, a fénaté si. 7 Fá korayau ndimbal kéme, "Férférafé yéfandati Ngánján a yarametati yá ndimbal kwayaghé! Ménamén yáne mogh efogh té nawer. Yáwefnotati yá emo ewafrotam njafar, mband marat, arakaf a wérér nu."
bt: Then I saw another man carrying heavenly message flying through the sky, and to him was the eternal good talk to tell them to the peoples of this earth, to every nation, tribe, a language. 7 He said in a loud voice, “Fearful God and give him big light(glory)! For his judgement's day has come! Worship him who made heaven, earth, sea, and the springs of water!”

nama: Yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yáitoi a korayau, 'Té nuyai! Té nuyai ndimbal Babilon, emon táyátote méinyotio ár mband maratan ténetat yáne wéri nu ménaye amafoene yaufi wal yame!"
bt: A second man carrying heavenly message followed it(the first one) and said, “She has fallen! Great Babilon has fallen, who made all peoples in earth drink her alcohol by her immorality!”

nama: Nambiomén njafar si résagh árom ewaiteyai a kutnau ndimbal kéme, "Árké árém njam yáwefnotat ndimbal gásiai a yáne mbanmbanoe a tanangi yáne mbor sáf sotan o ngángayan. 10 Yémofem wéi so yenetat Ngánjánene nékw wéri nu, árkéméné té yasuryéng ndimbal muyaye kétán yánjoyo nékw kafusifaf! Fá so em awambghan fés a rémérémé wékwéran njúnnjúnofnar njafar si résagh ár a Sif tosane rére. 11 Yéfene ndémke féskwam so nuyote tuot. Yéfeyot ámb yau yém enaghét efogh o sémbár emofem yáwefnotat ndimbal gásiai a yáne mbanmbanoe, o yéné ároe emo tanangé yáne yétkwénafé mbor."
bt: A third man carrying heavenly message followed them.d(first and second) and shouting in a loud voice, “Those who worship the big crocodile and its image and receive its mark on their forehead or on their hand. 10 They will drink the wind of God's angry, which he has poured at full strength into the cup of his anger! They will be burnt in fire and sulfur before the without.dust(holy) men carrying heavenly message(angels) and the Lamb. 11 The smoke of their pain will rise forever. To them there is no rest day or night who worship the big crocodile and its image, or for that person who receive the mark of its name.”

nama: Yéné siyém ménát yém awamarogh yéfeyot Ngánjánene árét, emofem ewaitotat Ngánjánene nák a ewakai ndimbal mwighé kér ro Yesuefaf.
bt: This is to be endurance for them God's people, those who follow God's laws and stand faithful to Yesu.

nama: Féyo yénd náyárayén kém njafarta kénorayau, "Efarota: Frengéghkaf fá em yéné kér téfnár efe kér em Yurane kénjún kétánotio sénonjo. Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye, "Néméwét! Fá so nenat yéfenjo ásáfoghta, ménamén yéfenjo wafroghyamam so ewaitote fá." Mband maratoene wau yu
bt: Then I heard a voice from heaven saying, “Write it: Blessed are those who die in the Lord from now on!” God Spirit says, “Yes! They will rest from their work, because their deeds will follow them.” The harvest of the earth

nama: Yénd néngretayén, a tane rére témorwén kwayaghé njafar kwamkwam, a témorangérwén njafar kwamkwaman ndenanit ároene ambum, golmén ákikiafé sénkoyan a tafayongérwén sénté wau yu náifé teretau ngángaye. 15 Féyo ámb njafar si résagh ár néntoryéng wáwefnogh méngota a nutnai ndimbal kéme yáfaf efe témorangérwén njafar kwamkwaman, "Tané fenjo náifé néfghét, ménamén efogh té nawer néfghét a mband maratoene wau yu té nawer." 16 Féyo fá efe témorangérwén njafar kwamkwaman yéfnendai yánjo náifé mband maratan, a mband maratoene wau yu nawerai.
bt: I looked, and before me [there] was a white cloud, and sitting on the cloud was what looked like a son of man, with a crown of gold on head and a sharp harvest knife in his hand. 15 Then another man carrying heavenly message came out from the worshipping house and cried out in a loud voice to him who was sitting on the cloud, “Take your.p knife to cut, because the time to cut has come and the harvest of the earth has come!” 16 Then he who sat on the cloud swung his knife on the earth, and the earth's harvest was come.

nama: Ámb njafar si résagh ár néntoryéng wáwefnogh méngota njafaran, a yáne wéi témorwén sénté náifé.
bt: Another man carrying heavenly message came out of the worshipping house in heaven, and he also had a sharp knife.

nama: Wéi mé ámb njafar si résagh ár, efe témorwén waftafé fésfaf, yénmormén ghéngén wárogh kitarata a kutnau ndimbal kéme njafar si résagh árfaf endene témorwén sénté náifé, "Tané fenjo sénté naifé, a tanfeta mbwe kétamé ménj ndau mband maratan, ménamén yéfene mbwe té nénamndangi wau!" 19 Njafar si résagh árom yéfnendai yánjo náifé mband maratan a eumendam yéfene mbwe, a engwitam yékwét Ngánjánene nékwfaf. 20 Fá yéné tatumndawét yékwén ndimbal tesen téndo tambén, a férék kéntonau yéné rétégh tambén nawengoi wanjeyot ndené 180 kilomité tombé a ndené 1.5 mité kénjkam.
bt: Still another man carrying heavenly message, who had power of the fire, came from the table for burning sacrifice and shouted in a loud voice to the man carrying heavenly message who had the sharp knife, “Take your.p knife, and cut the fruits from the grape fruit vine garden in the earth, because their fruits became ripe!” 19 The man carrying heavenly message swung his knife on the earth and gathered their fruits, and threw them into the hole(the alcohol press) of God's anger. 20 They were trampled in the hole(alcohol press) outside the city, and blood flowed out of the press flowed out like a river about 180 kilomité length and [about] 1.5 meter deep.

nama: Yéndon yinjoyén njafaran ámb ndimbal a sélngwélafé ufarogh yam: 7 njafar si résagh árém taweretawét ambinomén 7 férférafé kérté yam, árkéménayam so Ngánjánene nékw tifongé. 2 A yéndon yinjoyén ndenanit glasafé arakafnit wanjméghkaf témorwén fésafé. Fá tawakayongérwén yéné glasafé arakaf téndon, yéné ár emofem té yáindayénd ndimbal gásié a yáne mbanmban a wafégham árké yésérmbéne yáne yétkwén. Yémofem taweretawét wagh kembnemén rokar Ngánjánam árké té ewaramai 3 a taufanawét Ngánjánene ásáfogh téfnár Mosesene wagh a Sif tosane wagh: "Ndimbal a mere em fene yam wafrogh, Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio wafté. Mbarkánd a efalofifi em fene end ndimbal yuoene Warsagh ár.
bt: I saw in heaven another big and surprising thing: 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) hold with the 7 last fearful suffering things, which Godʼs anger is completed. 2 And I saw like a sea of glass mixed with fire. They were standing beside the sea of glass, those people who had won the big crocodile and its image and the number that means its name. They held music instruments that God had given them 3 and sang the song of Godʼs worker Moses and of the Lamb: “Great and good are your.s deeds, Lord God Almighty. Straight and true are your.s ways, King of the nations.

nama: Emofem yau so férférafé néfandat, Yuré a so yénérsat ndimbal kwayaghé fene yétkwénfaf? Ménamén mé fémro ném njúnnjúnofnar. Méinyotio ndimbal yu so eném fe wáwefnoghét ménamén fene mbarkánd yam fémon némé tawafrote té mat káyátotat.
bt: Who will not fear you.s, Lord, and bring big light(glory) to your.s name? Because you.s alone are without.dust(holy). All nations will come to worship you.s, because your.s straight deeds what you.s did have made been known."

nama: Yéné soramé yénd néretayén, a njafar kénjún yinjoyén wáwefnogh méngo, Ngánjánene farai méngo asawéréghkaf. 6 7 njafar si résagh árém emofem taweretawét 7 férférafé kérté yam, enmormén wáwefnogh méngota umaneghkaf mer álálagh sálámefé a gol belesafé tafarngérwén yéfenjo wéfamé. 7 Féyo ámb 4mén akegh ghérsafé rokaram ewaramai 7 njafar si résagh árét gol dis Ngánjánene nékw wafoghkaf, efe nakete tuot. 8 A wáwefnogh méngo nofayoi kwamam kétamé Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghata a waftata, a árké ár yau so mé kényawangai wáwefnogh méngo kétánotio 7 njafar si résagh árém kor tawifongi wasurégh 7 férférafé kérté yam.
bt: After this I looked, and I saw in heaven the worshipping house, God's canvas house(tabernacle) was opened. 6 The 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) who hold with the 7 fearful suffering things, came out of the worshipping house dressed in good shining cloth and wore golden belts around their chests. 7 Then one of the 4 living things gave to the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) 7 golden bowls filled with the anger of God, who lives forever. 8 And the worshipping house was filled with smoke from the big light(glory) of God and from his power, and no one could enter the worshipping house until the 7 fearful suffering things by the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) were completed.

nama: Féyo yéndo yiyárayén ndimbal kém korayau kétamé wáwefnogh méngota 7 njafar si résagh árfefaf: "Tangém tawasunangi 7 dis Ngánjánene nékw mband maratan!"
bt: Then I heard a loud voice speaking from the worshipping house to the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels): “Go [and] pour out the 7 bowls of God's anger on the earth!”

nama: Fronde njafar si résagh ár yéngmormén a yasuryéng yánjo dis mbandot, a mafulafé a ndémkefé fénend atyarégh nufngoyénd yéné árfefafmé efe tamorwén ndimbal gásiane mborafé a táwefnotat yáne mbanmbanoe.
bt: The first man carrying heavenly message went and poured out his bowl on the land, terrible and painful sores started appearing on those people who had the mark of the big crocodile and on those who had worshiped its image.

nama: Yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis arakafot. Nawengoi arakaf kér ároene féréknit, méinyotio ghérsafé rokar arakafan kér emormén.
bt: The second man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl onto the sea. The sea became like the blood of a dead person, every living things in the sea died.

nama: Nambiomén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis wanjeyamé a wérér nuamé, a méinyotio nawengoyénd férkot. 5 A yéndo yiyárayén njafar si résagh ár efe témorwén waftafé méinyotio nufaf korayau, "Fém fété ném mbarkánd yéné tékrát yammén, O Njúnnjúnofnar ár, efe ném a efe túmén témorwén!
bt: The third man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl on the rivers and the springs of water, and all turned into blood. 5 And I heard the man carrying heavenly message who has power to every waters say, “You.s are straight in these punishments, O Without.dust One, you.s who are and who always were!

nama: Fene njúnnjúnofnar ár a fene mat yátogh ár té esmetaménd krotio a yéfene férék té tasunawét mbandan. Féyo fémo té ewaramai yéfene ngi téfnárat férék nénet. Yéné fiyém yéfene fai."
bt: They killed your.s without.dust(holy) people and the God's people who make know(prophets) and poured out their blood on the land. Then you.s have given blood to their killers to drink. It is their reward!”

nama: A yénd náyárayén si kétamé ghéngén wárogh kitarata kénorayau, "Néméwét, Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio wafté! Fene tékrát kéméghét siyém efalo yém a mbarkánd!"
bt: And I heard a talk from the table for burning sacrifice saying, “Yes, Lord God Almighty! Your.s punishments are true and straight!”

nama: 4mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis efoghfaf, téméindau minde waftat ménát ár sái tawakérnau yéné fese. 9 Ár tawakérnau yéné ndimbal efogh waftayam, a yémofem tafalngotawét Ngánjánene yétkwén, emo enwáfárete yéné férférafé kérté yam. Wénde fá yau kawengotawét yaufiyam wafroghta a tuyafotawét yáyot ndimbal kwayaghé.
bt: The 4th man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl on the sun, and it make strong power to burn people with that fire. 9 The people were burned by the fierce heat, and they cursed the name of God, who sent these fearful suffering things. But they would not turn from doing sins and praise his big light(glory).

nama: Féyo 5mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis ndimbal gásiane limánégh ámnjogh sifayan, a yáne ndimbal yu yafaryéng kwéfitayam. Árém kánké tarnawét yéfenjoyo ndémkemén, 11 a tafalngotawét Ngánján njafarmén ménamén yéfene ndémkemén a fénendmén, wénde fá kakenawét awengowét yéné yaufita némé tawafrotawét mé yémofem.
bt: The 5th man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl on the ruling sitting place of the big crocodile, and its nation fell over darkness. People bit their tongues because of their pain, 11 and they cursed the God of heaven for their pains and sores, but they denied to turn from these sin what they continually did.

nama: 6mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis kété ndimbal wanjen Eufrates, a yéné nu namndai sot, ménát yéfrendai end yéfeyot warsagh árét wer tambén. 13 Féyo yéndon ewinjoyén nambio yaufi mbérmbér kéretawét ndenanit ndokre. Fá kéntonawét ndimbal fuwayoene sénfénta, ndimbal gásiane sénféneta, a unyégh mat yátogh árfene sénféneta. 14 Yéné yaufi mbérmbér fem emofem yétyanat fénaté ufarogh yam, a fá engém yénamé méinyotio warsagh árfefaf yéné mband maratmén, ménát sái eumendat fá mékot Méinyotio wafté Ngánjánene ndimbal efghot.
bt: The 6th man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl there on the big Eufrates river, and its water dried up, to prepare the way for them the ruling men(kings) from the east. 13 Then I saw three evil spirits looked like frogs. They were coming from the mouth of the dragon, from the mouth of the big crocodile, and from the mouth of the false God's man who make know(prophet). 14 These evil spirits are who perform special workings(miracles), and they go out to all the ruling men(kings) of the world, to gather them for the battle on the big day of Almighty God.

nama: "Káyárangi, yénd so wéném oro téfnárnit! Frengéghkaf fá yém efe mé néréte ewarawene yánjo sáláme, ménát fá yau so yéngém firo a waiwaiafé."
bt: "Listen, I am coming like a thief! Blessed is he who is watching and keeping his cloth, so that he will not go naked and shamefully!”

nama: Féyo yémofem eumendayénd warsagh ár méinyotio yéné sifayat árké Ibru sie yémndetat Amagedon.
bt: Then they gathered the ruling men(kings) together in this place which in Ibru talk is called Amagedon.

nama: 7mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis mbormborfaf, a wáwefnogh méngota yénmormén ndimbal kém kétándmé limánégh ámnjogh sifayata, korayau, "Té nefo!" 18 Féyo toyé natremngoyénd, a aruruke kásmetawét a ndimbal sokrere kásámbnetau. Yéné sokrere yau nufrotam kétándmayo ár njam yafrotam mband maratan! 19 Ndimbal tesen Babilon nambio karéf nufrotam, a ndimbal tesen méinyotio yuwomé kironau. Ngánján táf nawafarotai méinyotio Babilonene yaufiyam, a yémon yéméindam yéné kafusian nénet árké yáne yaufififi nékw wéri nue té yafoi. 20 Méinyotio fér kolindawét a mband tunakéf yau kafandawét. 21 Njafarta ndimbal nu mbwe kénatarnawét, ndené 45 kg minde kértafé kuitawét árfefaf, a yémofem tafalngotawét Ngánján yéné férférafé kérté yammén, ménamén yéné témorwén minde mafulafé.
bt: The 7th man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl in the wind/air, and from the worshipping house a loud voice came from the ruling sitting place, saying, “It is finished!” 18 Then lightning flashed, and thunder stoke and a big earthquake struck. That earthquake did not occured since the creation of human on the earth! 19 The big city Bablion was split into three parts, and the cities of all countries were destroyed. God remembered all of Babilon' sins, and he made her drink the alcohol in that cup which was filled with alcohol of his furious anger. 20 All the islands disappeared and the mountains were not to be found. 21 From the sky huge hails, about 45 kg wights, fell on people, and they cursed God on account of the fearful suffering things of hail, because it was so terrible.

nama: Ámb 7mén njafar si résagh ár emo taweretau 7 dis yénmormén tafaf a norayai, "Kénaf, yéndon so némauyafotan kérté yam árkéméné so yéném yaufi wal kér ro amafoefaf, efe yémor tárfár nuan. 2 Mband maratoene warsagh árfé wal yafrotat yéné amafofé, a efe em yéné mband maratmén té eyátoi wériafé yáne yaufi wal wéri nue.
bt: One of the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) who had the 7 bowls came to me and said, “Come, I will show you.p the punishment that will come to the big prostitute, who sits by many waters. 2 The ruling men(kings) of the earth had sexual relationship with that woman, and who are in the world had become drunk from drinking the alcohol of her adulteries.”

nama: Yénamé njafar si résagh árom wéngwasroi Ngánján Mbérmbéran fanfne yuwot. Kété yéndon yinjoyén amaf témorangérwén férék ngarot ndimbal gásiyayan endene tamorwén 7 sénko a 10 tartar, faroghkaf méinyotio tamorwén Ngánjáne wanyogh siafé. 4 Amaf umaneghkaf témorwén ndéndák a férkat sálámeyafé a golmén rokar a méndefé wímmén a ndindimén. Amafom teretau yánjo ngángaye golmén kafusi yaufiyam afoghare a yáne awasérmbogh wal yam. 5 Yéné yétkwén férén takayongérwén amafoene sáf sotan: "Ndimbal Babilon, yéfetmé wal kér ro mérésmérésafene a mband maratoene méinyotio yaufi." 6 Yéndo yinjoyén amaf wériafé témorwén. Yémo enetam Ngánjánene árfene férék efe kafrotawét Yesuenemén.
bt: Then the man carrying heavenly message carried me away in the God Spirit to a desert. There I saw a woman sitting on a red big crocodile who had 7 heads and 10 horns, were written all with the talk insulting to God. 4 The woman was dressed in purple and red cloth and with golden things and precious stones and pearls. She held a gold cup in her hands full of sins and of her sexual immorality. 5 This name was written on her forehead: “Great Babilon, their mother of the prostitutes and all sins of the world.” 6 And I saw the woman was drunk. She drunk the blood of God's people who had told about Yesu.

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh árom kwémndangé yénd, "Fém némamén sélngwél ném? Yéndon so némawafenan feyot kwankwane yam amafoenemén a ndimbal gásianemén árkéménéyam yérse fá endene em 7 sénko a 1o tartar. 8 Yéné ndimbal gásié fémo árké yinjo, fronde ghérsé témorwén, wénde sénonjo yau, a wéikor fá so tekofnaye mé kénurtongé kwémbofnaye yékwta a so yéngém tuot tékrátfaf. Ár efe emor mband maratan endefene yétkwén yau ekai ghérsé bukan kétándmayo mband marat nufrotam, so em sélngwél njam yémofem tinjongi ndimbal gásié, ménamén ghérsé té namndai, sénonjo siyém yau, a wéi so yéném.
bt: Then the man carrying heavenly message told me, “Why are you.s amazed? I will explain you.s the secret about the woman and the big crocodile that carries her with 7 heads and ten horns. 8 That big crocodile which you.p saw, was once alive, but now not, and again it is about to come up from the without.end hole and will go off to forever judgement. The people who are living on earth whose names have not been written in the book of living before the creation of the world, will be amazed when they saw the big crocodile, because it once was alive, now it not, but it will come again.

nama: Yéné siyém káfeté mwighat. 7 sénko sem 7 mband tunakéf árkéménáyan amaf yéfai. Kété ndenéyameyo em 7 warsagh ár: 10 5 warsagh ár té nuyáyénd fronde, 6mén warsagh ár sénonjo mé násáfote limánéghan, a 7mén warsagh ár mé yéném sái kufarngé; wénde fá njam yéném, yáne limánégh sái yém tekofnaye. 11 Yéné ndimbal gásié árké mé ghérsé témorwén, wénde yau naketam tekot, fá simormén 8mén warsagh ár efe yém 7mén a wéi so yéngém yánjo tékrátfaf.
bt: This is for a wisdom. The 7 heads are 7 mountains on which the woman sits. They are also 7 ruling men(kings): 10 5 ruling men(kings) have fallen first, the 6th ruling man(king) still works in ruling, and the 7th ruling man(king) has not yet appear; but when he comes, his ruling is a little while. 11 That big crocodile which was once alive, but lives no longer, he is the 8th ruling man(king) who is one of the 7 and is going off again his punishment.

nama: Yáne 10 tartar sem 10 warsagh ár yéné fem emofem mé yau wafté ewanangi, wénde fá so takafangé yéfenjo yu limánéghét witmé karéf efoghro sái yélimndat mérne ndimbal gásiafé. 13 Yéfene so em ámbiro mwighé, a sái taramangi yéfenjoyo wafté a muyé ndimbal gásiai. 14 Fá so násmetat Sif tosafaf, wénde Sif tosam so tawaindangé ménamén fá siyém yurafene Yuré a warsagh ár Warsagh ár.
