A yáne ár efe té emotai a ekafai a ndimbal mwighé kér ro yémafé so em.
bt: The 10 horns are 10 ruling men(kings) who have not yet received power, but he will receive ruling of their nations for one hour to rule together with the big crocodile. 13 They have one mind, and they will give their power and authority to the big crocodile. 14 They will fight against the Lamb, but the Lamb will defeat them because he is Lord of lords and King of ruling men(kings). Andhis people who had called and chosen, and faithful will be with him.

nama: Njafar si résagh árom norayai tafaf, "Yéné nu árkéméné fémo kés yinjo, ánde yaufi wal amaf yémor, eufarote ndimbal yu, ár tárfár, ár téfén, a fénaté si. 16 Ndimbal gásié a yáne 1o tartar so méndméndat téfandawét yaufi wal amaf. Yémofem so téngwakawangi némé yáne em a so téfrangongi firo; yémofem so yénetat yáne fifi a yakérnat fése. 17 Ngánjánam yékmai yéfene tikfan árkéméné so yaitotat yáne mwighé farorégh. Fá mé so kamyongi sái taramangi yéfenjo muyé ndimbal gásiai, a Ngánjánene si táf so efalo káyátongé.
bt: The man carrying heavenly message said to me, “This waters which you.s saw, on which the prostitute sits, represent nations, peoples, races, and languages. 16 The big crocodile and his 10 horns will hate the prostitute. They will take away what she has and will leave her naked; they will eat her flesh and burn her with fire. 17 God has placed in their hearts that will carry out his plan. They will agree to give their power to the big crocodile, and the talk of God will become true.

nama: Yéné amaf fémo árké té yinjo ghékéf waingéghe yufarote ndimbal tesen árkéménéyam elimnde mband maratmén warsagh ár.
bt: That woman which you.p saw in a eye passover thing(vision) represents the big city that rules over the ruling men(kings) of the earth.”

nama: Yéné soramé yéndo yinjoyén ámb njafar si résagh ár kénewonau kétamé njafarta. Fá témorwén ndimbal muyafé, a mband marat yáne ndimbal kwayagham yétremngoi. 2 Ndimbal keye fá nutnai: "Té nuye! Té nuye Babilon yéné ndimbal tesen! Fá té nénamndé atnogh sifayé defolene a yaufi mbérmbérafene a njén yaufi ménafene, a yaufi wérárafene tarékw. 3 Ménamén méinyotio ndimbal yuam té ténetat yáne yaufi wal wéri nu. Mband maratmén warsagh árfé wal tafrotawét yéné amafofé, a rokar térarégh ár mband maratmén wémár káyátotawét yéné amafoene mani ngonjél tambén."
bt: After this I saw another man carrying heavenly message coming down out of heaven. He had big authority, and the earth was shone by his big light. 2 He cried out in a loud voice: “Fallen! Fallen the big city Babilon! She has become hiding place of Defols and evil spirits, and nest for bad birds, and the den of bad animals. 3 Because all the nations have drunk alcohol of her immorality. The ruling men(kings) of the earth practiced sexual immorality with her, and the seller of things(merchants) of the world became rich from her money treasures.”

nama: Féyo yéndo wéi ámb si kém náyárayén njafarot, kénorayau, "Kéntonangi yéné amafoe tambén, tane ár, ménát fém yau so nufeindati yáne yaufiyamot, ménát fém yau so tawanangé yéné amafoene tékrát yamam!
bt: Then I heard another voice came from heaven, saying, “Come out of that woman, my people, so that you.p must not involve in her sins, so that you.p must not receive any of her punishment!

nama: Ménamén yéné amafoene yaufiyam té kafayotat farufaru njafarot, a Ngánjánam té yawafarota yáne yaufiyam.
bt: Because this woman's sins have been piled up to heaven, and God has remembered her sins.

nama: Yafrotati yéné yam ndernáye yéné amafom té tawafrote ámb ár. Taramangi yá férghe tékrát yáne méinyotio yaufiyammén. Yémo taméindau ár tárfár kérté yamot yáne kafusi nénean, féyo yawafrotati ndenéyameyo sómbinotmé tárfár kérté yándio.
bt: Do to her as she has done to others. Pay her back double for her all sins. She caused people to drink many troubles from her cup, so make her drink twice as many troubles for herself!

nama: Taramangi yá minde kérté a ye ndené ndimbal kwayaghé a ngonjél yémo té ewaramai yáfaftio. Ménamén yémon té mé ténémndetau: Yénd wémor warsagh amaf kitarayan ndené warsagh amaf! Yénd yau wém séfarékw amaf, yénd yau mat so wém ye!
bt: Give her strong suffering and crying as the big light(glory) and treasure she has given herself. Because she keeps telling herself: ‘I sit in ruling woman(queen)'s ruling sitting place as a ruling woman(queen)! I am no widow, I will not know crying!’

nama: Yénémaménnde, ámb efghon yáne férférafé kérté yam so kufarngé yáfaf- kér, ye a káukáu. Fá so yakérne fésam, ménamén waftafé yém Yuré Ngánján, emo yéné amaf so tékmangé tékrátan.
bt: Therefore, in one day her fearful suffering things will appear to her— death, crying, and famine. Fire will burn her, because the Lord God, who judges her, is powerful.”

nama: Njam mband maratoene warsagh árém emofé yaufi wal tafrotat yéné amafofé a mer téfandawét yáne ngonjélan so nendat yéné ndimbal tesenmén njam yémofem tinjongi kwam kétámé yéné amaf árké fésam yakérne. 10 Ménamén fá férférafé so em yáne tékrátmén, fá so ewakai nayuta a nendat: "Nderé tékrat! Nderé tékrat! O ndimbal tesen, o Babilon, wafté kér ro tesen! Ámbiro efoghféneféneyan fém té ném tékrátan!"
bt: When the ruling men(kings) of the earth who committed adultery with this woman and enjoyed her treasure will cry for the city when they see the smoke from the flames that burn her. 10 Because they are afraid of her suffering, they will stand a long way off and cry, “How terrible! How terrible! O big city, o Babilon, mighty city! In one hour you.s have been punished!”

nama: Rokar térarégh ár mband maratmén so nendat a ye nawerametat yánemén, ménamén árké árom yau yéfene rokar so ewarse manie wéikor, 12 rokar ndené gol, silfé, méndefé wím, a ndindi, mer sáláme, ndéndák ngarot sáláme, áfrát sáláme, férék ngarot sáláme méinyotio fénataye mer wimafé wén a méinyotio fénataye rokar aiforimén, tukén mani kér ro wén, bronj, tot téfén, a mabulmén; 13 sinamon, wanjmengégh rokar a mer wimafé rokar, mir a mer wimafé wékwér, a wéri nu a olif wénmén wékwér, féskaf flawé a flawé mbwe, kau a sif, os a os résaghmén, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a árfene ghérsé.
bt: The seller of things(merchants) of the earth will cry and mourn for her, because no one buys their goods anymore, 12 things like gold, silver, precious stones, and pearls, good cloth, purple cloth, soft cloth(silk), red cloth; all kinds of good smell's woods and all kinds of objects made of aibori, expensive wood, bronze, iron, and marble; 13 sinamon, seasoning, good smelling things(incense), mir(myrrh) and good smelling liquid(frankincense), wine and olive oil, flour and wheat, cattle and sheep, horses and chariots, without.payment working men(slaves) and people. 14 They will say, “All the good things which you.p longed to get are gone, and all your.p things and shining things are gone, and you.p will never find them!” 15 The merchants, who exchanged these things and luxurious things with money and weath made from the woman, will stand far off, because they are afraid of her suffering. They will cry and mourn, 16 and say, “How terrible! How terrible, the big city! She was clothed in fine purple and red cloth, and cover herself with gold, precious stones, and pearls! 17 And in one hour all good things from this city are gone”

nama: Fá so norayat njam yéfandat fés kwam nayu nuyota, "Ámb ánde ndené ndimbal tesen yau tém ndené yéné ndimbal tesen stém!" 19 Yémofem táf so ewitat ngwérméng yéfenjo sénkofaf, fá kawarametawét a ye kéndawét, norayayénd, "Nderé tékrát! Nderé tékrát yém yéné ndimbal tesenoe! Fá siyém ndimbal tesen ánde fá efe karendawét boutan nénamndayénd wemár kétamé yáne ngonjélta! A sénonjo mé ámbiro efoghféneféneyan méinyotio té nefo!"
bt: They will say when they saw the smoke rising from far, “There never has been city like that bigcity!" 19 They will throw dust on their heads, they cried and mourned, saying, “How terrible! How terrible for this big city! She is the city where they who have ships sailing the seas became rich from her wealth! And now in one hour everything are finished!”

nama: Wénde fém, o njafar, náuwétati yáne kérkéfmén! Fém wéi ndenáyo náuwétati, efalo yátogh ár a Yesuene muyafé ár a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár! Ménamén kerkeran Ngánjánam té moghan yékém féfene téfnan.
bt: But you.p, oh heaven, rejoice over her death! You also rejoice, approving truth people(believers) and the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and God's people who make know(prophets)! Because in the last God has put her court for you.p!

nama: Féyo waftafé njafar si résagh árom yékafai wím ndimbal ndené mbwe tiaréghmén wím. Yémo yitam arakafot a nutnai, "Babilon, ndimbal tesen, so nawite máméghéraye ndenáye yéndon ndernáye titan yéné wím. Árké árom yau so néfande fém wéikor. 22 Yau wéikor gité wagh kém so náyáretat kété, yau wagh, waghfégh rokar, sufér! Kété yau so em rokar térarégh méngo! Yau wéikor rais waferéghmén so náyáretat! 23 Lambefé kwayaghé kété yau so nálálat féfefaf wéikor. Kété yau so em áuwégh kém awérégh témndan. Fene rokar térarégh ár tam ndimbalfifi mband maratan, tawéindat ndimbal yu yéné amafoene ghar yame!"
bt: Then a mighty man carrying heavenly message picked up a stone the size of a large milling stone. He threw it into the sea and shouted, “Babilon, the big city, will be violently thrown down like that stone. Nobody will see you again! 22 The music of guita and song voices, of players of the flute and trumpet, will never be heard in you again! There are no trading store! The sound of milling the rice will never be heard in you again! 23 Never again will the light of a lamp be seen in you.p. There are no the rejoicing voices in the wedding ceremony. Your.s merchants were the most powerful in the world, deceived the nations with this woman's sorceries!”

nama: Yéné tesenan Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene a Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ároene férék té ewinjoyénd, a méinyotio efe esmetaménd yéné mband maratan.
bt: In the city the blood of God's people who make know(prophets) and of God's without.dust people was found, and of all who have been killed on this world.

nama: Yéné soramé yéndon tiyáretawén ámb rokar ndenanit ár mérén yénau narne njafaran, kutnawét, "Ngánján yuyotam! Wanjarégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté yém téfene Ngánjánene!
bt: After this I heard something like the roar of a large crowd of people in heaven, shouting, “Praise God! Salvation and big light(glory) and power is of our God!

nama: Efalo a mbarkánd yém yáne mogh yam! Yémo té yafalngo yéné yaufi wal amaf emo tasérmbote mband marat yáne yaufi wal yame. Yémo té fai yawango yéné amafoe yáne árfene kér téfnan."
bt: True and straight is his judgment! He has condemned this prostitute who was corrupting the earth by her immorality. He has paid back to this woman in the reason of death of his people.”

nama: Wéikor fá kutnawét, "Ngánján yuyotam! Fés kwam kuyotau yéné ndimbal tesenta tuotot!"
bt: Again they shouted, “Praise God! The smoke from this city goes up forever!”

nama: 24 sénko ár a 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar nuyáyénd a táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. A kutnawét "Néméwét, Ngánján yuwetam!"
bt: The 24 head people and the 4 living things fell down and worshiped God, who was seated on the ruling sitting place. And they cried, “Amen! Praise God!”

nama: Wéikor si yénmormén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé tambén, korayau, "Yuyotam téfene Ngánján, méinyotio fém yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár, fém emofem férférafé yéfandati, méinyotio némbnar kétán ndimbal!"
bt: Again a talk came from the ruling sitting place, saying, “Praise our God, all you.p his without.payment working people, you.p who fear him all big and small!"

nama: Féyo yéndon yiyárayén ke ndenanit ár tárfár yénau nutnat, ndenanit nu wérér rárákenit a ndimbal árurke yénau kutnangé, "Ngánján yuwetam! Ménamén Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio waftafé limánéghan yém!
bt: Then I heard sound like a crowd's shouting, like the sound of a roaring waterfall and like loud peals of thunder, “Praise God! Because the Lord, our Almighty God reigns!

nama: Yénd so náuwétam a áuwéghafé yéném a yarametam yá ndimbal kwayaghé! Ménamén áwérégh yam té nufar Sif tosafé, a yáne amaf té kafrende fáyo.
bt: Let us rejoice and be glad and give him big light(glory)! Because the wedding with the Lamb has come, and his bride has prepared herself.

nama: Mer sáláme, kwayaghé a njúnnjúnofnar, yaramayénd yáyot awoghét." Ménamén mer sálámeyam eufarote Ngánjánene árfene meryam wafrogh.
bt: Fine cloth, bright and clean, was given to her to wear." Because the cloth shows for the good deeds of God's people.

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh ár norayai tafaf, "Efarota: Frengéghkaf fá em efe té taumyongi Sif tosane áwérégh téméndfaf." A wéikor wémndai, "Yéné sem efalofifi si em Ngánjánene."
bt: Then the man carrying heavenly message said to me, “Write this: Blessed are those who have been invited to the wedding feast of the Lamb.” And he said to me again, “These are the true talks of God.”

nama: Yénamé yénd nuyáyén yáne kafkafot yá wáwefnoghét, wénde fá norayai tafaf, "Yau yéné yafrota! Yénd mé faiofnar ásáfogh ár yénre fémafé a ámb efalo yátogh árfé, méinyotio fá efe nawéretat efalo yátoghfaf Yesum ewafote fá. Yáwefnota Ngánjáne!" Ménamén afrogh Yesuenemén siyém Ngánjánene mat yátoghmén Mbérmbére yém." Résagh ár yéfai kwayaghé osan
bt: Then I fell down at his feet to worship him, but he said to me, “Don't do this! I am only a worker together with you.s and with other approving truth people, all those who hold to the approving truth Yesu revealed. Worship God!” Because the testimony to Yesu is God Spirit of approving truth. The rider sit on the white horse

nama: Yéndo yinjoyén njafar sauréghare témorwén, a kwayaghé os kété takayongérwén. Yáne résagh ár árké yémndetat Ndimbal mwighé a Efalo, mbarkándayero yémo mogh yafrote a mék. 12 Yáne ghékéf em ndenanit fés kánkékánké, a yáne sénkoyan tafayongérwén tárfár ákiki. Férén takayongérwén yáfaf, árké ár yau mat em yéné férénmén wénde mé fáro. 13 Fá siyém awoghkaf yém férék ukéghkaf sálámefé, a yáne yétkwén siyém Ngánjánene Si. 14 Njafarmén fiyaram táitotawét fá, kérsau kwayaghé osan a tawongérwén mer sáláme, kwayaghé a njúnnjúnofnar. 15 Yáne sénféneta yéném witmafé sénté náifé, árkéménaye so yirone ndimbal yu. Yémo so elimnde warsagh ároene tot téfén wétue. Yémon so etumnde wéri nu wafroghmén rokaran Méinyotio wafté Ngánjánene yaufiyaufi nékwe. 16 Yáne sálámeyan a buraburan férén takayongérwén, "Warsagh árfene Warsagh ár a yurafene Yuré."
bt: I saw heaven open, and there was standing a white horse. Its rider which is called Faithful and True, it is with straight he judges and makes war. 12 His eyes were like a flame of fire, and he wore many crowns on his head. He had a name written on him, no one knows these lettters but himself. 13 He is dressed in a cloth dipped in blood, and his name is The Word of God. 14 The armies of heaven followed him, riding on white horses and dressed in fine cloth, white and clean. 15 From his mouth came a sharp sword, with which he will defeat the nations. He will rule over them with the ruling man(king)'s stick of iron. He will trample them in the alcohol press of the furious anger of the Almighty God. 16 On his cloth and on his thigh was written the name: “Ruling man(King) of ruling men(kings) and Lord of lords.”

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén njafar si résagh ár takayongérwén efghan, efe nutnai ndimbal keye méinyotio menafefaf árké nanefetat njafaran, "Taném, kénáumendangi méinyotio Ngánjánene ndimbal témndot, 18 ménát fémofem so yéngnetati warsagh árfene fenjen, fiyarafene sénko árfene, a fiyarafene, os a yéfene résagh árfene, a méinyotio árfene fenjen, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, némbnar ár kétán ndimbal!"
bt: Then I saw a man carrying heavenly message standing on the sun, who shouted in a loud voice to all the birds flying in the sky: “Come, gather together for God's big feast, 18 so that you.p may eat the flesh of ruling men(kings), of soldiers heading people, and of soldiers, of horses and of their riders, and the flesh of all people, without.payment working men(servants) and free men, small men to big men!”

nama: Féyo yéndo ewinjoyén ndimbal gásié a mband maratmén warsagh ár a yéfene fiyaré káumendawét méinyotio mérne ménát mék sái tafrotawét yémafé os résagh árfé a yáne fiyaré. 20 Wénde ndimbal gásié yerayénd, a méinyotio yémafé yáne unyégh mat yátogh árfé emofem unyégh ufarogh yam tawafrotawét yáne sáfan. Yáne ufarogh yame yémo tawawindau yéfeyot emofem té ersaménd yéné mbor ndimbal gásiane a táwefnotawét yáne mbanmbanoe. Yéné sómbio sermén ewimend ghérséghérsé kétán akrarégh fés raméramé wékwérfaf. 21 A ámb stamorwén tásmetau krot witmafé sénté naifaye árké ténmorwén yáne sénféne tambén efe témorangérwén osan, a méinyotio men stamorwén kwésro tamorwén yéfene fenjen nénemén.
bt: Then I saw the big crocodile and the ruling men(kings) of the earth and their armies gathered together to fight against the one who was riding the horse and his army. 20 But the big crocodile was captured, and together with his false God's man who make know(prophet) who had done false special workings(miracles) in his presence. By his special workings(miracles) he deceived those who had the mark of the big crocodile and those who had worshiped his image. These two were both thrown alive into burning fire with sulfur. 21 And the rest were killed by the both side sharp sword which comes out of his mouth of the one who was riding the horse, and all the birds were completly full their flesh eating.

nama: Féyo yéndo yinjoyén njafar si résagh ár kénewonau njafarta, tawerwéng kwémbofnar yékwmén ki a ndimbal sein ngángaye. 2 Yémon yerayéng ndimbal fuwai, yéné tándáwár kamban, efe yém Defol o Sáifér a yumbetam 1,000 yunjfot. 3 Njafar si résagh árém yitam kwémbofnar yékwét, a yémnai a marét yafrotam méinyotio fá, ménát yau so kor témorwén fá mband maratan ár waunyéghét wéikor kétánotio kor 1,000 yunjéf kefongi. Yéné soramé fá so kafitrarngé mé tekofnarot.
bt: Then I saw a man carrying heavenly message coming down from heaven, holding in his hand the key of the without.end hole and a heavy chain. 2 He held the dragon, that ancient snake, that is, the Devil, or Sáifèr, and chained him up for a thousand years. 3 The man carrying heavenly message threw him into the without.end hole, and locked it, and made it very tight, so that he could not deceive the nations any more until the thousand years were over. After that he must be set loose for a little while.

nama: Yéndon ewinjoyén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, yéné ár kété tamorangérwén endefet té wafrogh muyé ewaramayénd mogh kéméghét. A yéndon ewinjoyén yéné árfene mbérmbér efe té esmetaménd Yesuenemén afrogh téfnan a ménamén Ngánjánene simén. Yémofem yau táwefnotawét ndimbal gásiai o yáne mbanmbanoe a wéi yau ewanayénd yáne mbor yéfene sáf sotan o yéfene ngángayan. Fá nénamndayénd ghérsat a télimndawét Kerisofé 1,000 yunjéf. 5 (Ámb kér téfnár yau nanotaménd ghérsat kétánotio kor 1,000 yunjéf yiyato.) Yéné fiyém fronde anogh kérta. 6 Áuwéghafé a njúnnjúnofnar fá yéné fem efe sái kérta nanotat fronde anoghan. Yénamayo kér siyém waftafé yau yém yéfefaf, wénde fá so em Ngánjánene ghéngén wárogh ár a wéi Kerisoene a so yélimndat yémafé 1,000 yunjéf. Sáifér yáindayénd
bt: Then I saw ruling sitting places, and those who sat on them were given the power to judge. And I saw the spirits of those who had been killed because of their testimony about Yesu and because of the talk of God. They had not worshiped the big crocodile or its image, nor had they received the mark of the big crocodile on their foreheads or their hands. They came to life and reigned with Keriso for 1,000 years. 5 (The rest of the dead people did not come to life until 1,000 years were over.) This is the first raising of the dead. 6 Blessed and without.dust(holy) are those who are included in this first raising of the dead. The second death has no power over them, but they shall be burning sacrifice men(priests) of God and of Keriso also and they will rule with him for 1,000 years. They defeated Sáifèr

nama: Njam 1,000 yunjéf kawaindangé, Sáifér táf so ténmutorngi kwéfkwéf méngota, 8 a so kuwanongé waunyéghét méinyotio yuwomé árkémé mband maratoene 4 kwéndkwénd eyato, Gog a Magog. Sáifram so eumende fá mékot, wafghét sái em ndenanit arakaf téndo miri mband yénau em wafofnar. 9 Fá nófarnayénd mband maratan a ewarendayénd méngoméngo Ngánjánene árfene a yáne tikfafé tesen. Wénde fés yénmormén njafarta a ewakérnam. 10 Féyo Sáifér, emo tawawindau yitaménd fés a rémérémé wékwérfaf akrarégh sifayat, ándan ndimbal gásié a unyégh mat yátogh ár ewitaménd. Fá kété so em tékrátan efogh a sémbár tuot. Kér téfnár so em moghan
bt: When 1,000 years pass over, Sáifèr will be set loose from his darkness house, 8 and he will go out to deceive the nations in the four corners of the earth, Gog and Makok. Sáifér will gather them for battle, the number they are like the sand on the seashore. 9 They spread out over the earth and surrounded the shelters of God's people and his loving city. But fire came down from heaven and burned them. 10 Then the Sáifèr, who deceived them, was thrown into burning place with fire and with sulfur, where the big crocodile and the false God's man who make know(prophet) had already been thrown. They will be in suffering day and night forever. The dead people will be judged

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ndimbal kwayaghé limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a fá efe témorangérwén kété. Mband marat a njafar nawaindangeyayénd yáne sáfrére, a yéfeyot ámb sifayé yau témorwén. 12 A yéndon ewinjoyén kér ár, ndimbal kétán némbnar, tawakayongérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé rére. Buk sauréghare, a ámb buk wéi sauréghkaf témorwén, árké yém ghérsamén buk. Kér ár moghan tamorwén ménamén némé yam yémofem tawafrotawét, árké té kakayotawét bukan. 13 Arakafam enémiyoi méinyotio kér ár efe kété tamorwén yáne wérghan. Kér a kér árfene sifayé yétkwén Ades enémiyoi méinyotio kér ár efe kété tamorwén wéi. Féyo Ngánjánam moghan ekmai ár fénatafénataye. Ngánjánam ewinjoi némé yémofem té tawafrotawét a yémo mwighé ekmai némé mbarkánd témorwén. 14 Féyo kér a Ades ewitam kénjút marataye fését. Yéné marataye fés siyém yénamayo kér. 15 Árké ároene yétkwén yau tékayongérwén ghérsé bukan fá tawitawét kénjút marataye fését.
bt: Then I saw a big white ruling sitting place and the one who sits on it. Earth and heaven passed over from his presence and there was no place for them. 12 And I saw the dead people, big and small, standing before the ruling sitting place. Books were opened, and then another book was opened, which is the book of the living. The dead people were judged according to what they had done, which had been recorded in the books. 13 The sea brought up all the dead people who were in it. Death and the dead people's place called Ades brought up all the dead people who were there too. Then God judged each person. God saw what they had done and he decided what was right. 14 Then death and Ades were thrown into wide fire(the lake of fire). This wide fire is the second death. 15 Those who did not have their name written in the book of the living were thrown into the lake of fire.

nama: Féyo yéndon ewinjeyayén totér njafar a totér mband marat. Fronde njafar a fronde mband marat té nawaindangeyayénd, a arakaf yau kété nafrangoi. 2 Yéndon yinjoyén Njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesen, totér Jerusalem, kénewonau njafarta Ngánjáne tambén, afrengéghare sariafé umaneghkaf amafnit yánjo ároe. 3 A yéndon náyárayén ndimbal ke kétamé limánégh ámnjogh sifayata kénorayau, "Sénonjo Ngánjánene méngo siyém yánjo árfé! Fá so emor yémafé, a fá so em yáne ár. Ngánján fá fáyo so yém yémafé, a so yém yéfene Ngánján. 4 Yémon so méinyotio yengam ewawányányote yéfene ghékéfta. Kété yau so yém kér, wéikor ghérghérsisé o ye o ndémke, ménamén tándáwár yam té nawaindangi."
bt: Then I saw a new heaven and a new earth. The first heaven and the first earth passed away, and the sea no left there. 2 I saw the Without.dust City, the new Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God, prepared, as a bride beautifully dressed for her husband. 3 And I heard a loud voice speaking from the ruling sitting place saying: “Now God's home is with his people! He will live with them, and they shall be his people. God himself will be with them, and he will be their God. 4 He will wipe away all tears from their eyes. There will be no more death, no more grief or crying or pain, because the old things have passed away.”

nama: Fá efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan norayai, "Yéndon sénonjo méinyotio rokar yiyátotan totér!" Wéi norayai tafaf, "Yéfarota yéné, ménamén yéné si sem ndimbal mwighafé em a efalo." 6 A fá norayai tafaf, "Téfe nufrote! Yénd wém fronde a soramé, rényégh a wifogh. Yáyot efe nuam yéramete yéndon so taraman nu nénet faiofnaye kétamé ghérsé wérér nu tambén. 7 Fá efe em waingégh ár yémofem so tawanangi yéné méinyotio: yénd so wém yáne Ngánján, a fá so em tane ambum. 8 Wénde férférro ár, sén ramégh ár, ndimbal mwighé táranégh ár, ár ngi téfnár, yaufi wal téfnár, a fá efe em fénatafénaté ghar yam wafrogh ár, mewang wáwefnogh ár a méinyotio unyégh ár- yéfene sifayé sái yém fés a rémérémé wékwér akrarégh sifayé, yéné féyém yénamayo kér." Totér Jerusalem
bt: He who sits on the ruling sitting place said, “Now I make all things new!” He also said to me, “Write this, because these talks can be trusted and true.” 6 And he said to me, “It is done! I am the first and the last, the beginning and the end. To anyone who is thirsty I will give water to drink from the spring of the water of life without paying for it. 7 Those who are winner will receive all this from me: I will be their God, and they will be my children. 8 But very scaring people, men who give teeth(betrayers), who lost their truly approve(believe), murderers, the immoral, and those who practice sorcery, those who worship idols and all liars—their place is the burning place with fire and sulfur, which is the second death.” The New Jerusalem

nama: Ámb 7mén njafar si résagh ár emo taweretau 7 dis afoghare soramamén férférafé kérté yam yénmormén a norayai tafaf, "Kénaf, yéndon so kénmauyafon totér awerégh amaf, árké yém Sif tosane amaf." 10 A yémo wéngwanai yénd Ngánján Mbérmbére kétán minde tukén mband tunakéf tukét, a kwauyafotau Njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesen, Jerusalem, kénewonau kétamé njafarta Ngánjáne tambén. 11 Témorwén Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghafé, a yáne álálagh témorwén ndenanit mer sariafé wím, kwayaghé a glasro wímmén. 12 Témorwén wím áráke minde tukmé 12 sésafnefé tamorwén 12 njafar si résagh ár sésafne féyotaro. Yéné sésafneyan yétkwén takayongérwén yéfene 12 Israilmén mérén. 13 Kété tamorwén nambio sésafne wer tambén, nambio yambérmé tambén, nambio náikái tambén, a nambioyo mbormbor tambén. 14 Yéné ndimbal tesenoene wím áráke stamorwén 12 wímafé, a kété tafayongérwén 12 Sif tosane muyafé árfene yétkwén. 15 Njafar si résagh ár efe norayai tafaf teretau golmén ufogh wétu ndimbul ménát sái tufotau yéné tesen, yáne sésafne, a wím áráke. 16 Tesen témorwén tombé a marat féyotaro témorwén ndenaro. Yémo tufotau ndimbal tesen yéné ufogh wétu ndimbule a yinjoi ndené 2,200 kilomité yu tombé témorwén, ndenéyameyo marat a ndenéyameyo tuk. 17 Yémon tufotau yéné áráke téndo, a témorwén ndené 65 mité sénjté, árfene ufogh yame árké njafar si résagh árom tafrotau. 18 Yéné áráke témorwén mer kwayaghé wímmén, a ndimbal tesen témorwén mé merfifi golménro, ndenanit glas. 19 Ndimbal tesenmén áráke werégh téfénmén wím stamorwén wamaneghkaf fénataye méndefé wíme. Fronde werégh téfénmén wím témorwén jasfamén, yénémayomén safairémén, nambiomén ageitmén, 4mén emeraldmén. 20 5mén oniks, 6mén kanalian, 7mén krisolit, 8mén beril, 9mén tofaj, 1omén krisofrase, 11mén jasint, a 12mén ametist. 21 12 sésafne stamorwén 12 ndindinit férénférnafé; fénatayero sésafne stamorwén ámbiro ndindi mbwe ngarot. A ndimbal tesenoene end tékmangérwén mé golro, ndenanit glas.
bt: One of the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) who had the 7 bowls full of last fearful suffering things came and said to me, “Come, I will show you.s new married woman, which is the wife of the Lamb.” 10 And he carried me away in God Spirit to the top of a very high mountain, and showed me the Without.dust City, Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God. 11 It has the big light(glory) of God, and its brilliance was like a precious stone, a white and clear stone as glass. 12 It had a big, high stone fence with 12 gates and with 12 men carrying heavenly message(angels) in charge of the gates. On these gates were written the names of the 12 tribes of Israil. 13 There were three gates on the east, three on the south, three on the north, and three on the west. 14 This city's stone fence was built on 12 big stones, on which were written the names of the 12 men with Yesu's authority(apostles) of the Lamb. 15 The man carrying heavenly message who spoke to me had a gold measuring stick to measure that city, its gates, and its stone fence. 16 The city have exactly same length and width. He measured the city with this measuring stick and it was about 2,200 km long, same wide and same high. 17 He measured the wall outside and it was about 65 mitè thick, according to human measure which a man carrying heavenly message used. 18 The wall was made white stone, and the city was made of very good gold, like glass. 19 The foundation stones of the city wall were adorned with all kinds of precious stones. The first foundation stone was jaspa, the second safairè, the third ageit, the 4th emerald, 20 the 5th oniks, the 6th kanalian, the 7th krisolit, the 8th beril, the 9th tofaj, the 10th Krisofrase, the eleventh jasint, the 12th ametist. 21 The 12 gates were 12 pearls; each gate was made from a single pearl. And the street of the city was of pure gold, like a glass.

nama: Yéndon yau yinjoyén wáwefnogh méngo yéné ndimbal tesenan, ménamén Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio Waftafé a Sif tosé fá sere yéfene wáwefnogh méngo. 23 Yéné ndimbal tesenan yau efogh a ghérare so nanét kété, ménamén Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayagham so yéramete kwayaghé, a Sif tosé fá yéné féyém lambefé. 24 Ndimbal yumén ár so eyota yáne kwayaghan, a mband maratmén warsagh árém so enérsat yéfenjo ndimbal kwayaghé kétán. 25 Efghon yau sésafne so namnat, ménamén kété yau sémbár yém. 26 Méinyotio ndimbal yuam so enérsat yéfenjo ndimbal kwayaghé a utmanégh yéné ndimbal tesenfaf. 27 Wénde némé yaufi yau so kényawangé kétán, yau yéné ár emofem ewafrotat wáiwáiafé yam o unyéghe, wénde mé fáro endefene yétkwén ekai Sif tosane ghérsé bukan.
bt: I did not see a worshipping house in that city, because the Lord God Almighty and the Lamb they are their worshipping house. 23 That city has no need of the sun or the moon to shine on it, because the big light(glory) of God gives light, and the Lamb is its lamp. 24 The peoples of the nations will walk in its light, and the ruling men(kings) of the earth will bring their big light(glory) into it. 25 On day gates will not be shut, because there will be no night there. 26 All the nations will bring their big light(glory) and honor into that city. 27 But nothing that is evil will enter the city, nor these people who do shameful things or tells lies, but only those whose names are written in the Lamb's book of the living.

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh árom kwauyafotau ghérsamén nuafé wanje, mé glasro, ténféronau kétamé Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayata a Sif tosata 2 kété néndkéfan yéné ndimbal endmé yéné ndimbal tesenan, a wanje witmawitmé karéfamé tayangérwén ghérsamén wén, kafotawét 12 fénaté wén mbwe sáf, afogh wén mbwe yáfene témorwén túmén ghérareye. A yéné wénafene arau sem mer áyátoghét em méinyotio ndimbal yuwot. 3 Kété yau so yém wafalngogh. Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a Sif tosane utmanégh ámnjogh sifayé so yém yéné ndimbal tesenan, a yáne faiofnar ásáfogh árém so yáwefnotat. 4 Yémofem so yéfandat yáne sáf, a yáne yétkwén so em faroghkaf yéfene sáf sotan. 5 Kété yau so yém sémbár. Yémofem yau so náronjat lambefé kwayaghé o efogh kwayaghé, ménamén Yuré Ngánján so yém yéfene kwayaghé. A yémofem so yélimndat tuot. Yesu nénangote
bt: Then the man carrying heavenly message showed me the river of the water of life, as clear as glass, flowing from the ruling sitting place of God and of the Lamb 2 there in the middle of the big street of the city and on each side of the river stood the tree of life, bearing 12 crops of fruit, yielding its fruit every month. And the leaves of these tree are for the making good(healing) of the nations. 3 There will not curse any more. The ruling sitting place of God and of the Lamb will be in the city, and his without.payment working people will worship him. 4 They will see his face, and his name will be written on their foreheads. 5 There will be no more night. They will not look for the light of a lamp or the light of the sun, because the Lord God will be their light. And they will reign forever. The coming of Yesu

nama: Njafar si résagh árom norayai tafaf, "Yéné si sem ndimbal mwighafé a efalo. Yuré Ngánján, emo ewaramete Ngánján Mbérmbér Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfet, té ténmáfárete yánjo njafar si résagh ár ménát emo sái ewauyafota yáne faiofnar ásáfogh árfét némé yam so natyanat tekofnaye."
bt: The man carrying heavenly message said to me, “These talks are trustworthy and true. The Lord God, who gives God Spirit to the God's people who make know(prophets), has sent his man carrying heavenly message to show to his without.payment working people what must happen not.far.”

nama: "Kor aem! Yénd nénangotan tekofnar! Frengéghkaf yéné ár yém emo erete afrogh si yéné Bukan."
bt: “Watch out! I am coming not.far! Blessed is the one who keeps the prophetic talks in this book!”

nama: Yénd, Jon, yéné fwém efe káyáretau a tafandau yéné yam. A yéndon njam káyáretawén a tafandawén, yénd nuyáyén wáwefnoghét njafar si résagh ároene kafkafot emo tauyafotau yéné yam tafaf. 9 Wénde fá norayai tafaf, "Yau yéné yafrota! Yénd wém Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár ndené fété fém kés ném a fene fútár Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár ndené fété méinyotio emo efalo yiyátota némé té efarotamén yéné bukan. Yáwefnota Ngánjánetro!"
bt: I, Jon, am the one who heard and saw these things. And when I heard and seen them, I fell down to worship at the feet of the man carrying heavenly message who had been showing these things to me. 9 But he said to me, “Donʼt do that! I am a without.payment working man like you.s are and with your.s friends God's people who make know(prophets) and like all who truly approve(believe) the talks of this book. Worship God only!”

nama: A fá norayai tafaf, "Yau yamnda kwankwane yéné yam ufroghmén si yéné bukan, ménamén efogh kaka nénáyátote. 11 Fá emo ewafrote yaufi, mé a ewafrota yaufi. Fá efe yém awasérmboghan, mé a yém awasérmboghan. Fá emo ewafrote mer yam mé a ewarota mer yam, a fá efe yém njúnnjúnofnar, mé a yém njúnnjúnofnar."
bt: And he told me, “Do not keep secretly the talks of the prophecy of this buk, because the time become near. 11 Let the one who does wrong continue to do wrong. Let the destroyed person continue to be destroyed. Let the one who does good continue to do good, and let the without.dust(holy) person continue to be without.dust(holy).”

nama: "Kor aem! Yénd nénangotan tekofnar! Tane fai sem tafaf em a yéndon so ewarametan fénatayero ménamén némé yémofem té tawafrotat. 13 Yénd wém Alfa a Omega, Fronde a Soramé, Rényégh a Wifogh.
bt: "Watch out! I am coming not.far! My reward is with me, and I will give to each one according to what they have done. 13 I am the Alfa and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.”

nama: Frengéghkaf fá em emofem eumbénat yéfenjo sáláme a fá so em féyotaro sái enetat ghérsamén wén mbwe a so ngényawangi sésafnemé kétán ndimbal tesenfaf. 15 Wénde téndota fá em ághé efe notametat ghar yam, a yaufi wal yam, ár ngi téfnár, mewang wáwefnogh téfnár a méinyotio ár emofem méndefé yéfandat unyégh ghérsé ámnjogh.
bt: Blessed are those who wash their clothes clean and they can eat the fruit from the tree of life and to go through the gates into the city. 15 But outside the city are dogs, those who practice sorcery, the immoral, the murderers, those who worship idols and every people who loves and practices false life.

nama: "Yéndo, Yesum, té yéngwáfáretamén tane njafar si résagh ár sái kafrotau yéné yammén méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé. Yénd wém Deifidene Ákimén, a kwayaghé Akw Kénd."
bt: "I, Yesu, have sent my man carrying heavenly message to announce these things to you.p in the Yesu's families(churches). I am the Descendant of Deifid, and bright Morning Star.”

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér a awerégh mérés noraye, "Taném!" A tumyo fá efe náyárete noraye, "Taném!" Efe njam nuam nérameta, fá so kénaflangé, a efe njam ménde yém, faiofnaye yémo ghérsé wérér nu so tanangé.
bt: The God Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” And let the one who hears say, “Come!” Let the one who is thirsty come, and let the one who wishes, take the water of life without payment.

nama: Yéndon ewawéngsotan méinyotio ár efe náyáretat yéné afrogh si yéné bukan: Árké árom njam efayota yánjoyo yéné Buk sian, Ngánjánam so faru efayote férférafé kérté yam yáfaf árké emndete yéné bukan. 19 A árké árom njam efnane si yéné afrogh Buk si tambén, Ngánjánam so tawitrombonga yéfene muyé kétamé ghérsé wén mbwe néneta, a Njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesen élawégh tambén, árkéméné emndete yéné bukan.
bt: I warn every people who hears the talks of the prophecy of this buk: If anyone adds in this buk, God will add to that person the fearful suffering things described in this buk. 19 And if anyone takes talks away from this buk of prophecy, God will take away their authority to eat the fruit of tree of life, and to enter the Without.dust City, which are told in this buk.

nama: Fá efe nafrote yéné yammén noraye, "Néméwét, yénd nénangotan wékeye." Efalo. Kéném, Yuré Yesu.
bt: He who testifies to these things says, "Yes, I am coming not.far." Amen. Come, Lord Yesu.

nama: Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém méinyotio Ngánjánene árfé. Efalo.
bt: The grace of the Lord Yesu will be with Godʼs people. Amen.
